intro_zh:
皮蛋豆腐是一道清爽开胃的凉拌家常菜，松花蛋 Q 弹滑嫩，嫩豆腐入口即化，咸香微酸的口味特别下饭。豆腐富含优质植物蛋白和钙，皮蛋则提供铁、维生素 A 等营养素，搭配食用易于消化吸收。制作过程几乎零门槛，新手也能轻松完成，从备料到上桌仅需 大约 5 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：566 大卡
intro_en:
Preserved egg tofu is a refreshing and appetizing cold home-cooked dish. The preserved eggs are soft and tender, and the tender tofu melts in your mouth. The salty and slightly sour taste goes very well with rice. Tofu is rich in high-quality plant protein and calcium, while preserved eggs provide iron, vitamin A and other nutrients, which are easy to digest and absorb when eaten together. The production process is almost zero-threshold and can be easily completed by novices. It only takes about 5 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 566 kcal
steps_zh: 先把皮蛋剥壳，切成四瓣。
嫩豆腐切块或者切片放中间。
将生抽、白砂糖、醋、香油、辣椒油调成酱汁，淋上去。
最后可选撒上花生碎、葱花、香菜。
steps_en: First peel the preserved eggs and cut them into four pieces.
Cut the soft tofu into cubes or slices and place in the middle.
Mix light soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, sesame oil, and chili oil into a sauce and pour it on.
Finally, optionally sprinkle with chopped peanuts, chopped green onion, and coriander.

intro_zh:
外焦里嫩，葱香浓郁，咸鲜微辣，是一道家常风味。豆腐富含植物蛋白和钙质，搭配青椒和葱段，营养均衡。制作难度适中，煎豆腐时需掌握小火慢煎，新手按步骤耐心操作也能做好，全程约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：364 大卡
intro_en:
Charred on the outside and tender on the inside, rich in onion aroma, salty and slightly spicy, it is a home-cooked dish. Tofu is rich in plant protein and calcium, and paired with green peppers and green onions, it is nutritionally balanced. The difficulty of making the tofu is moderate. When frying tofu, you need to master low heat and slow frying. Even a novice can cook it patiently and follow the steps. The whole process takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 364 kcal
ingredients_zh: 白豆腐的数量 = 份数 * 0.8 向上取整。
辣椒的数量 = 1.5 只/三人。
ingredients_en: Quantity of white tofu = number of servings * 0.8 Round up.
Amount of chicken essence = number of servings * 1.5g.
steps_zh: 豆腐洗净。切约 5 mm 厚度，置于碟中。
葱洗净，除去根部，切成葱花，备用。
辣椒洗净，切开，去籽，切成 1cm * 1cm 状，备用、
热锅，加入份数 * 9ml 油。
油入锅后，使其均匀布于锅底，均匀放入豆腐，小火煎至金黄翻面。
待两面金黄，盛入碟中备用。
补油至覆盖锅底，倒入辣椒大火翻炒，并铲碾 3 分钟。
倒入豆腐，翻炒，加入盐与鸡精，中火翻炒 1 分钟后倒入 10 ML 水，大火收汁。
出锅前撒上之前计算好的葱花，起锅盛盘。
steps_en: Wash the tofu. Cut into approximately 5 mm thickness and place on a plate.
Wash the green onions, remove the roots, cut into chopped green onions and set aside.
Wash the peppers, cut them, remove the seeds, and cut them into 1cm * 1cm shapes. Set aside.
Heat pan and add portion * 9ml oil.
After the oil is put into the pot, spread it evenly on the bottom of the pot, add the tofu evenly, and fry over low heat until golden brown.
When both sides are golden brown, transfer to a plate and set aside.
Add oil to cover the bottom of the pot, add chili and stir-fry over high heat for 3 minutes.
Pour in the tofu, stir-fry, add salt and chicken essence, stir-fry over medium heat for 1 minute, then add 10 ML water, and reduce the juice over high heat.
Before serving, sprinkle with the chopped green onions, remove from the pan and serve on a plate.

intro_zh:
松仁玉米是一道口感清甜脆嫩的家常快手菜，松仁香酥、玉米甜润，属于广受欢迎的北方家常风味。玉米和松仁搭配，能提供丰富的膳食纤维、不饱和脂肪酸和多种维生素，营养均衡。做法简单，新手也能轻松驾驭，从备料到出锅一般只需大约十五 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：580 大卡
intro_en:
Pine nut corn is a home-cooked quick dish with a sweet, crisp and tender texture. The pine nuts are crispy and the corn is sweet. It is a popular northern home-cooked flavor. The combination of corn and pine nuts can provide rich dietary fiber, unsaturated fatty acids and multiple vitamins, providing balanced nutrition. The method is simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It usually only takes about fifteen minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 580 kcal
ingredients_zh: 玉米粒（建议使用甜玉米）
玉米粒 200 g（可用罐头甜玉米，也可自备煮熟）
胡萝卜 50 g（切小丁，可省略）
ingredients_en: 200 g corn kernels (canned sweet corn can be used, or you can prepare your own and cook it)
50 g carrots (cut into small cubes, can be omitted)
steps_zh: 玉米粒和胡萝卜丁提前焯水 1 分钟，捞出沥干备用
热锅凉油，放入胡萝卜丁略炒，再加入玉米粒翻炒
加入白砂糖和盐，炒匀
混合水与淀粉成水淀粉，倒入锅中快速翻炒使汤汁略稠
加入熟松仁翻炒均匀
出锅装盘
steps_en: Blanch the corn kernels and diced carrots for 1 minute in advance, remove and drain and set aside
Heat oil in a pan, add diced carrots and stir-fry briefly, then add corn kernels and stir-fry
Add sugar and salt, stir well
Mix water and starch to form water starch, pour it into the pot and stir-fry quickly to make the soup slightly thicker
Add cooked pine nuts and stir-fry evenly
Remove from pot and plate

name_en: Braised vegetables in water and oil
intro_zh:
水油焖蔬菜是一道简单快手的家常佐餐，通过沸水加几滴油和调料，让叶菜口感软嫩、色泽油亮，既清爽又带有淡淡油香。这种做法有助于提高脂溶性维生素的吸收率，比生吃蔬菜更有营养价值。烹饪难度低，对新手非常友好，从洗菜到出锅一般只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：92 大卡
intro_en:
Braised vegetables in water and oil is a simple and quick home-cooked meal. Add a few drops of oil and seasonings to boiling water to make the leafy vegetables soft and tender, shiny in color, refreshing and with a light oily aroma. This practice helps improve the absorption rate of fat-soluble vitamins and has more nutritional value than eating raw vegetables. The cooking difficulty is low and very friendly to novices. It usually only takes 10 minutes from washing vegetables to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 92 kcal
steps_zh: 洗净蔬菜
锅中加入 150ml 水，并烧开。（水不需要能完全没过蔬菜）
加入 3g 盐
（可选）加入 3ml 蚝油
加入 2ml 食用油
下菜， 翻拌一下，然后盖上锅盖焖 1 分钟
盛盘
steps_en: wash vegetables
Add 150ml water to the pot and bring to a boil. (The water does not need to completely cover the vegetables)
Add 3g salt
(optional) add 3ml oyster sauce
Add 2ml cooking oil
Serve, stir, then cover the pot and simmer for 1 minute
Plate

intro_zh:
金针菇日本豆腐煲是一道酱香浓郁的家常下饭菜，豆腐外焦里嫩，金针菇爽滑入味。金针菇富含氨基酸和膳食纤维，日本豆腐提供优质蛋白，营养开胃。这道菜步骤简单，新手也能轻松掌握，从备菜到出锅大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：606 大卡
intro_en:
Japanese Tofu Pot with Enoki Mushrooms is a home-cooked dish with rich sauce flavor. The tofu is charred on the outside and tender on the inside, and the enoki mushrooms are smooth and delicious. Enoki mushrooms are rich in amino acids and dietary fiber, and Japanese tofu provides high-quality protein and is nutritious and appetizing. This recipe is simple enough for novices to master, and it takes about 30 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 606 kcal
steps_zh: 豆腐切片，小火煎到两面金黄出锅备用。
切蒜成蒜末；将生抽，蚝油，老抽，糖，100ml 水调汁备用。
热锅放油，油热放小米椒、蒜末爆香，先放金针菇，炒软，把煎好的豆腐平铺在金针菇上，倒入#2 配好的料汁，焖 5 分钟，大火收汁。
steps_en: Slice the tofu and fry over low heat until golden brown on both sides. Set aside.
Cut the garlic into minced garlic; mix light soy sauce, oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, sugar and 100ml water and set aside.

Heat oil in a pan, add millet pepper and minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add enoki mushrooms first and stir-fry until soft. Spread the fried tofu on the enoki mushrooms, pour in the sauce prepared in #2, simmer for 5 minutes, and reduce the juice over high heat.

intro_zh:
一道原汁原味的家常蒸菜，最大程度保留南瓜的天然甜味与营养，口感软糯香甜，既可当甜点也可作主食。南瓜富含β-胡萝卜素和膳食纤维，有益视力与肠胃健康。制作极其简单，新手也能轻松搞定，从切配到出锅仅需 15-20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：80 大卡
intro_en:
An authentic home-cooked steamed dish that retains the natural sweetness and nutrition of pumpkin to the greatest extent. It has a soft, glutinous and sweet texture and can be used as a dessert or a staple food. Pumpkin is rich in beta-carotene and dietary fiber, which is good for eyesight and gastrointestinal health. It is extremely simple to make, even for novices, and it only takes 15-20 minutes from cutting to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 80 kcal
steps_zh: 将 南瓜 外皮洗净，去除瓜瓤和籽。
将 南瓜 切成厚度大约 2 cm 的片，备用。
在 蒸锅 的锅中加入 1000 ml 饮用水。
将切好的 南瓜 片均匀摆放在盘中。
待蒸锅中的水烧开后，将装有 南瓜 的盘子放入蒸锅中。
盖上锅盖，保持大火蒸 **15-20 分钟**，直至南瓜变软，可以用筷子轻松穿透。
关火，小心取出盘子。
steps_en: Wash the pumpkin skin and remove the pulp and seeds.
Cut the pumpkin into slices about 2 cm thick and set aside.
Add 1000 ml of drinking water to the steamer pot.
Arrange the cut pumpkin slices evenly on the plate.
After the water in the steamer boils, place the plate with pumpkin into the steamer.
Cover the pot and steam over high heat for **15-20 minutes** until the pumpkin is soft and can be easily penetrated with chopsticks.
Turn off the heat and carefully remove the plate.

intro_zh:
这道凉菜清爽可口，富含植物蛋白和钙质，低脂健康，制作简单快捷，一般初学者只需要 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：343 大卡
intro_en:
This cold dish is refreshing and delicious, rich in plant protein and calcium, low in fat and healthy. It is simple and quick to make. It only takes 10 minutes for beginners to make it.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 343 kcal
ingredients_zh: 豆腐 （推荐选用北豆腐或老豆腐）
豆腐 250 g （约 1 块常见大小的豆腐）
ingredients_en: Tofu (recommended to use northern tofu or old tofu)
250 g tofu (about 1 regular size piece of tofu)
steps_zh: 将 豆腐 切成 2 cm 见方的小块，备用。
锅中加入 500 ml 饮用水，大火烧开。
放入 豆腐 块，煮 **1-2 分钟**，以去除豆腥味并使豆腐口感更紧实。
将 煮好的 豆腐 块捞出，沥干水分，放入碗中，备用。
将 小葱 洗净，切成葱花，备用。
将 大蒜 去皮，切成蒜末，备用。
在一个干净的小碗中，加入 15 ml 生抽，5 ml 香油，5 ml 醋（可选），2 g 白糖（可选）。
加入切好的 大蒜末。
搅拌均匀，使 白糖 充分溶解，酱汁混合均匀。
将制作好的酱汁均匀淋在 豆腐 块上。
撒上切好的 小葱花。
根据个人喜好，淋上 5 ml 辣椒油（可选）。
用 筷子 或勺子轻轻拌匀，即可食用。
steps_en: Cut the tofu into 2 cm square pieces and set aside.
Add 500 ml drinking water to the pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add the tofu cubes and cook for **1-2 minutes** to remove the beany smell and make the tofu firmer.
Take out the cooked tofu pieces, drain them, put them in a bowl, and set aside.
Wash the green onions, cut into chopped green onions and set aside.
Peel the garlic, cut into minced garlic, and set aside.
In a clean small bowl, add 15 ml light soy sauce, 5 ml sesame oil, 5 ml vinegar (optional), and 2 g sugar (optional).
Add minced garlic.
Stir evenly to fully dissolve the sugar and mix the sauce evenly.
Pour the prepared sauce evenly over the tofu pieces.
Sprinkle with chopped green onions.
Drizzle with 5 ml chili oil (optional) if desired.
Use chopsticks or a spoon to mix gently and serve.

name_en: Fried cucumber with eggs and ham
intro_zh:
这是一道清爽快手的家常小炒，咸鲜适口，黄瓜脆嫩、鸡蛋软滑、火腿增香，属于大众化的中式家常菜。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白，黄瓜富含维生素和水分，火腿补充风味，整体营养均衡。烹饪步骤简单明了，难度很低，对厨房新手非常友好。从备菜到出锅，全程只需约 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：337 大卡
intro_en:
This is a refreshing and quick home-cooked stir-fry. It is salty and delicious. The cucumbers are crisp and tender, the eggs are soft and smooth, and the ham is fragrant. It is a popular Chinese home-cooked dish. Eggs provide high-quality protein, cucumbers are rich in vitamins and water, ham adds flavor, and the overall nutrition is balanced. The cooking steps are simple and clear, the difficulty is very low, and it is very friendly to kitchen novices. From preparation to serving, the whole process only takes about 10 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 337 kcal
steps_zh: 黄瓜洗净，切半圆形片，备用
火腿切半圆形片，备用
红尖椒（可选）切碎，备用
将鸡蛋打入碗中，搅匀，即为 `鸡蛋液`
热锅里倒 5ml 食用油
油热后转小火，倒入打散的`鸡蛋液`，用筷子划散，翻炒至鸡蛋结为固体且颜色微微发黄，即为 `半熟鸡蛋`，盛出备用
**不用洗锅**，往锅内倒入 5ml 食用油，倒入黄瓜片大火**翻炒 1 分钟**
把 `半熟鸡蛋` 倒入锅中，调入 2g 盐、3ml 生抽，立刻倒入火腿片和辣椒碎（可选）翻炒均匀
关火，盛盘
steps_en: Wash the cucumber, cut into semi-circular slices, set aside
Cut ham into semi-circular slices and set aside
Red pepper (optional) chopped, set aside
Crack the eggs into a bowl and stir well to form the `egg liquid`
Pour 5ml cooking oil into the hot pan

After the oil is hot, turn to low heat, pour in the beaten `egg liquid`, spread it with chopsticks, and stir-fry until the eggs become solid and slightly yellow in color, which is the `half-boiled egg`, take it out and set aside
**No need to wash the pot**, pour 5ml cooking oil into the pot, add cucumber slices and stir-fry over high heat for 1 minute**
Pour the `half-boiled eggs` into the pot, add 2g salt and 3ml light soy sauce, immediately add ham slices and chopped chili pepper (optional) and stir-fry evenly
Turn off the heat and serve

intro_zh:
一道常见的家常素菜，口感脆嫩爽口。富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维。做法简单快捷，一般初学者仅需 15 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：211 大卡
intro_en:
A common home-cooked vegetarian dish with a crisp, tender and refreshing taste. Rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber. The method is simple and quick, and it only takes 15 minutes for beginners to complete it.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 211 kcal
ingredients_zh: 花菜 约 300 g （约 1/2 中等大小的花菜）
饮用水 50 ml （用于炒制过程）
ingredients_en: Cauliflower about 300 g (about 1/2 medium size cauliflower)
steps_zh: 将 花菜 洗净，用刀或手掰成小朵，粗茎部分可以切片，备用。
将 大蒜 去皮，切成蒜片，备用。
锅中加入 1000 ml 饮用水，大火烧开。
放入 花菜 朵，煮 **2-3 分钟**，至花菜颜色变浅，口感稍微软化。
将 煮好的 花菜 捞出，沥干水分，备用。
热锅，加入 15 ml 食用油，大火烧热。
放入 蒜片，快速煸炒出香味。
放入 焯好水的 花菜 朵，转中大火，快速翻炒约 **2 分钟**，使花菜均匀受热。
加入 3 g 盐，继续翻炒均匀。
沿锅边淋入 50 ml 饮用水，盖上锅盖，焖 **1 分钟**，帮助花菜完全熟透入味。
开盖，快速翻炒均匀，即可出锅。
steps_en: Wash the cauliflower and break it into small florets with a knife or your hands. The thick stem part can be sliced and set aside.
Peel the garlic, cut into slices and set aside.
Add 1000 ml drinking water to the pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add the cauliflower and cook for **2-3 minutes** until the color of the cauliflower becomes lighter and the texture is slightly softened.
Take out the cooked cauliflower, drain and set aside.
Heat the pan, add 15 ml cooking oil and heat over high heat.
Add garlic slices and stir-fry quickly until fragrant.
Add the blanched cauliflower buds, turn to medium high heat, and stir-fry quickly for about **2 minutes** so that the cauliflower is evenly heated.
Add 3 g of salt and continue to stir-fry evenly.
Pour 50 ml of drinking water along the edge of the pot, cover the pot, and simmer for **1 minute** to help the cauliflower become fully cooked and flavorful.
Open the lid, stir-fry quickly and serve.

intro_zh:
这道家常蔬菜以蒜香浓郁、调味简单见长，西兰花焯水后软嫩或微脆，清淡鲜美。富含维生素 C、膳食纤维和多种抗氧化物质，是营养均衡的快手素菜。制作过程不难，新手也能轻松掌握，从备料到出锅一般约 15 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：187 大卡
intro_en:
This home-cooked vegetable is famous for its strong garlic aroma and simple seasoning. The broccoli is tender or slightly crispy after blanching, making it light and delicious. Rich in vitamin C, dietary fiber and various antioxidants, it is a nutritionally balanced quick-serve vegetarian dish. The preparation process is not difficult and can be easily mastered by novices. It usually takes about 15 minutes to complete from preparing ingredients to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 187 kcal
ingredients_zh: 西兰花 约 200 g （约 1/2 中等大小的西兰花）
steps_zh: 将 西兰花 切成小朵，清洗干净。
将 大蒜 去皮，切成蒜末，备用。
锅中加入 1000 ml 饮用水，大火烧开。
放入 西兰花，保持大火 **煮 2-3 分钟**，至 西兰花 颜色变翠绿，口感变软。
将 煮好的 西兰花 捞出，沥干水分，摆入盘中，备用。
热锅，加入 10 ml 食用油。油温升高后，放入 大蒜末，小火煸炒出香味。
加入 10 ml 生抽，5 ml 蚝油，2 g 白糖，加入 30 ml 饮用水。
将锅中汤汁烧开。
将烧好的蒜蓉汁 均匀淋在盘中的 西兰花 上。
steps_en: Cut the broccoli into small florets and clean them.
Peel the garlic, cut into minced garlic, and set aside.
Add 1000 ml drinking water to the pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add the broccoli, maintain high heat and **cook for 2-3 minutes** until the broccoli turns emerald green in color and becomes soft in texture.
Take out the cooked broccoli, drain the water, place it on a plate, and set aside.
Heat the pan and add 10 ml cooking oil. After the oil temperature rises, add minced garlic and stir-fry over low heat until fragrant.
Add 10 ml light soy sauce, 5 ml oyster sauce, 2 g sugar, and 30 ml drinking water.
Bring the soup in the pot to a boil.
Pour the cooked garlic sauce evenly over the broccoli on the plate.

intro_zh:
红烧茄子是一道咸香浓郁的家常下饭菜，软糯的茄块吸饱汤汁，搭配柿子椒和番茄，酸辣适口。茄子富含膳食纤维和维生素 P，炸过的茄块香而不腻。制作需要挂糊油炸并慢烧入味，步骤略多但对新手仍可尝试，专注细节就能成功。从备料到出锅大约需要 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：547 大卡
intro_en:
Braised eggplant is a home-cooked dish with a rich salty aroma. The soft and waxy eggplant pieces soak up the soup. It is paired with bell peppers and tomatoes. It is sour and spicy. Eggplant is rich in dietary fiber and vitamin P, and the fried eggplant pieces are fragrant but not greasy. It requires frying in batter and slow-cooking to infuse the flavor. There are a few steps, but it can still be tried by novices. Pay attention to the details and you can succeed. It takes about 45 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 547 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青茄子的数量 = 份数 * 0.7 个
青辣椒 = 份数 * 0.5 个
面粉 = 青茄子数量 * 150 克
酱油 = 茄子数量 * 7 克（向上取整）
ingredients_en: Quantity of green eggplants = number of servings * 0.7 pieces
Green chili = number of servings * 0.5 pieces
Flour = number of green eggplants * 150 g
Soy sauce = number of eggplants * 7 grams (round up)
steps_zh: 青茄子、青辣椒、西红柿、洋葱、大葱洗净。
大葱切 5 毫米宽的葱花，大蒜扒皮并拍碎，西红柿切 6 立方厘米的块，青辣椒、洋葱切 5g 的块。
茄子切菱形块（先切 2 公分厚的片，然后再把片切成 2 公分的条，最后斜刀切块儿...）。
将面粉倒入盆中，依次加入少量水，搅拌均匀，呈粘稠糊状。
加入淀粉，加入 30 克水，搅拌均匀。
将鸡蛋打到盆中，加入（面粉 / 20）克的盐，搅拌均匀。
将茄块倒入面糊中，搅拌使茄块的每一面都能沾上面糊。
开大火，热锅，加入 500 毫升的油，当能看到锅里的油冒出一丝烟时，调至小火，将茄块用筷子夹入到油锅，待所有的茄块下锅之后，调至中火，直到茄块变金黄色时捞出，将油倒出。
加入（份数 * 5）g 的油，放入大蒜、葱花，翻炒 15 秒，放入青辣椒块翻炒 30 秒，放入西红柿翻炒 30 秒。
放入炸好的茄块，加水面高度为锅内食材的 0.8 倍。
放入酱油和（份数 * 3）g 的盐。
等待，直到汤汁呈粘稠状（水位大概为剩余食材高度的 0.2-0.3 倍），开盖，盛出菜，关火。
steps_en: Wash green eggplants, green peppers, tomatoes, onions and green onions.
Cut the green onion into 5 mm wide slices, peel and smash the garlic, cut the tomatoes into 6 cubic centimeter pieces, and cut the green pepper and onion into 5g pieces.
Cut the eggplant into diamond-shaped pieces (first cut into 2 cm thick slices, then cut the slices into 2 cm strips, and finally cut into pieces with a diagonal knife...).
Pour the flour into a basin, add a small amount of water one by one, and stir evenly until it becomes a thick paste.
Add starch, add 30 grams of water and mix well.
Crack the eggs into a basin, add (flour/20) grams of salt, and stir evenly.
Pour the eggplant cubes into the batter and stir to coat all sides of the eggplant cubes.

Turn on high heat, heat the pan, and add 500 ml of oil. When you can see a trace of smoke coming out of the oil in the pan, reduce the heat to low. Use chopsticks to insert the eggplant pieces into the oil pan. After all the eggplant pieces are in the pan, turn to medium heat and take them out when the eggplant pieces turn golden brown. Pour out the oil.
Add (portion * 5) g of oil, add garlic and chopped green onion, stir-fry for 15 seconds, add green chili cubes and stir-fry for 30 seconds, add tomatoes and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the fried eggplant cubes and add water to a level 0.8 times the height of the ingredients in the pot.
Add soy sauce and (number of portions * 3) g of salt.
Wait until the soup becomes thick (the water level is about 0.2-0.3 times the height of the remaining ingredients), open the lid, take out the dishes, and turn off the heat.

intro_zh:
这是一道清爽可口的家常素菜，口感脆嫩、咸鲜回甘。青菜富含维生素与膳食纤维，有助于促进消化。做法非常简单，零基础也能轻松驾驭，从备菜到出锅大约只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：152 大卡
intro_en:
This is a refreshing and delicious home-cooked vegetarian dish with a crisp and tender taste, salty and sweet aftertaste. Green vegetables are rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, which help promote digestion. The recipe is very simple and can be easily mastered with no basic knowledge. It only takes about 10 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 152 kcal
ingredients_en: Edible oil 10-15ml (just enough to cover the bottom of the pot)
steps_zh: 青菜掰成小瓣，用清水洗净，备用。
将蒜瓣剁碎，备用
中火或大火热锅后，锅内放入 10-15ml 食用油。再等待 30 秒让油温升高。
将准备好的青菜倒入锅中，翻炒至青菜变软（约 1 分钟）。
放入剁碎的蒜瓣
倒入计算好的清水，水位应当完全浸润或即将没过青菜，加入食盐 （2g * 份数），继续翻炒约 1 分钟。
最后加入白糖小火加热 2 分钟，加热时盖上锅盖。
盛盘。
steps_en: Break the green vegetables into small pieces, wash them with water and set aside.
Chop the garlic cloves and set aside
After heating the pot over medium or high heat, add 10-15ml cooking oil into the pot. Wait another 30 seconds for the oil to heat up.
Pour the prepared greens into the pot and stir-fry until the greens are soft (about 1 minute).
Add minced garlic cloves
Pour in the calculated water. The water level should be completely soaked or almost cover the vegetables. Add salt (2g * portion) and continue to stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Finally add the sugar and heat over low heat for 2 minutes. Cover the pot while heating.
Serve on a platter.

intro_zh:
一道清爽解腻的家常凉菜，芝麻酱的醇厚包裹着油麦菜的脆嫩，酸甜咸香交织，非常开胃。油麦菜富含维生素和膳食纤维，芝麻酱则补充钙与健康脂肪，营养均衡。做法毫无难度，切一切、拌一拌就行，从准备到上桌只需十几分钟，特别适合新手和忙碌时快速成菜。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：191 大卡
intro_en:
A refreshing home-cooked cold dish, the richness of sesame sauce wraps around the crispness and tenderness of lettuce, a mixture of sweet, sour and salty flavors, very appetizing. Lettuce is rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, while sesame paste supplements calcium and healthy fats, providing a balanced nutrition. There is no difficulty in making it, just cut everything and mix it. It only takes ten minutes from preparation to serving. It is especially suitable for novices and quick dishes when you are busy.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 191 kcal
ingredients_zh: 1 颗 油麦菜（约 200g） * 份数
steps_zh: 蒜拍碎切末
醋，酱油，芝麻酱，香油，糖，蚝油，蒜末放到碗里搅拌均匀
油麦菜切段，每段不超过 4cm
油麦菜放到一个大点的盆里,倒入上述碗中酱料,充分搅拌均匀.
steps_en: Garlic smashed and minced
Add vinegar, soy sauce, sesame paste, sesame oil, sugar, oyster sauce, and minced garlic to a bowl and stir evenly
Cut lettuce into sections, each section no longer than 4cm
Put the lettuce into a larger basin, pour the sauce into the above bowl, and mix thoroughly.

intro_zh:
雷椒皮蛋是一道卖相朴实但风味十足的家常凉菜，青椒的焦香与皮蛋的醇滑交融，酸辣开胃，尤其适合夏日佐餐。皮蛋富含蛋白质和矿物质，青椒提供丰富的维生素 C，大蒜则有助增进食欲。整道菜操作简单，新手也能轻松驾驭，从备料到完成大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：448 大卡
intro_en:
Thunder pepper preserved egg is a home-cooked cold dish that is simple in appearance but full of flavor. The burnt aroma of green pepper blends with the smoothness of preserved egg. It is sour and spicy and appetizing, especially suitable for summer meals. Preserved eggs are rich in protein and minerals, green peppers provide a rich source of vitamin C, and garlic helps increase appetite. The whole dish is simple to make, even for novices, and it only takes about 15 minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 448 kcal
ingredients_zh: 长条青椒（有些叫线椒，后面介绍以“青椒”代替）
葱 （大约 10cm 即可，葱绿最佳）
ingredients_en: Long green peppers (some are called string peppers, and will be replaced by "green peppers" later)
Green onions (about 10cm is enough, green ones are best)
steps_zh: 青椒清洗，去除根部，侧面切开，去除内部的子后在案板压平，备用（一定要去除青椒子，否则会在锅里炸开）
葱切成半厘米小段，备用
蒜去皮，切成碎末，备用
皮蛋去皮，备用
小米辣，切成 5-10mm 的小段，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 20ml 食用油
放入全部青椒，改小火保持锅子温度，煎至青椒变软（可以用筷子试一下，插入即透即可）
关火，将皮蛋和青椒放入小铁盆中
方法 1： 有擀面杖且砸东西不会吵到邻居：用擀面杖的一头在小盆中砸击皮蛋和青椒，至皮蛋与青椒混合（选项）
方法 2：将青椒用手撕开，撕成大约半厘米的条状，用叉子将皮蛋压碎（选项）
小米辣
倒入生抽，陈醋，白糖，香油，以及其他未使用的备用食材
均匀搅拌
steps_en: Wash the green peppers, remove the roots, cut the sides, remove the inner seeds and flatten them on a chopping board and set aside (be sure to remove the green pepper seeds, otherwise they will explode in the pot)
Cut green onions into half-centimeter pieces and set aside
Peel the garlic, mince and set aside
Peel the preserved eggs and set aside
Spicy millet, cut into 5-10mm pieces, set aside
Heat the pot and put 10ml - 20ml cooking oil in the pot

Add all the green peppers, reduce the heat to low to maintain the temperature of the pot, and fry until the green peppers become soft (you can try it with chopsticks, it will be translucent when inserted)
Turn off the heat and put the preserved eggs and green peppers into a small iron basin

Method 1: If you have a rolling pin and smashing things without disturbing the neighbors: Use the end of the rolling pin to smash the preserved eggs and green peppers in a small basin until the preserved eggs and green peppers are mixed (optional)
Method 2: Tear the green peppers with your hands into strips of about half a centimeter, and crush the preserved eggs with a fork (optional)
Millet Spicy
Pour in light soy sauce, mature vinegar, sugar, sesame oil, and other unused reserve ingredients
Stir evenly

intro_zh:
酸辣开胃的经典家常菜，口感脆爽，色泽鲜亮，属于大众喜爱的快手小炒。土豆提供碳水化合物和钾元素，辣椒富含维生素 C，有助于增进食欲。操作步骤简单明了，对新手十分友好，从备料到出锅大约只需 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：374 大卡
intro_en:
A classic home-cooked dish that is spicy and sour, with a crisp texture and bright color. It is a quick stir-fry that everyone loves. Potatoes provide carbohydrates and potassium, and peppers are rich in vitamin C, which helps increase appetite. The operation steps are simple and clear, very friendly to novices, and it only takes about 20 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 374 kcal
ingredients_en: 240g potatoes (the thinner and longer, the better)
steps_zh: 土豆去皮、切丝（或用刨丝器）。
切好的土豆丝用清水清洗，去除多余的淀粉，然后对土豆丝焯水 10 秒。沥干，备用。
葱切成葱花；大蒜拍碎切成蒜末（分为两等份备用）；干辣椒切小段；青红椒切丝。
热锅，小火热油，下入一半的葱花（葱白部分）、一半的蒜末和干辣椒爆香。
加入青红椒翻炒几下，加入土豆丝翻炒至变色。
加 5ml 生抽，10ml 陈醋，倒入剩下的一半蒜末和 2g 盐快速翻炒均匀。
出锅前撒上剩余的葱花，翻匀即可装盘。
steps_en: Peel and shred potatoes (or use a grater).
Wash the cut potato shreds with water to remove excess starch, and then blanch the shredded potatoes for 10 seconds. Drain and set aside.

Chop the onion into chopped green onion; crush the garlic and mince it (divide into two equal parts and set aside); cut the dried chili pepper into small sections; cut the green and red chili pepper into shreds.
Heat oil in a pan over low heat, add half of the chopped green onion (the white part of the green onion), half of the minced garlic and dried chili pepper and sauté until fragrant.
Add green and red pepper and stir-fry for a few times, add shredded potatoes and stir-fry until color changes.
Add 5ml of light soy sauce, 10ml of mature vinegar, pour in the remaining half of the minced garlic and 2g of salt, stir-fry quickly and evenly.
Sprinkle remaining chopped green onions before serving, toss evenly and serve.

intro_zh:
蒲烧茄子是一道咸甜交织、口感软糯的家常菜，借鉴日式蒲烧风味却用中式煎烧手法烹制。茄子富含膳食纤维和多种维生素，有助于清热活血。难度适中，对新手稍需耐心，预计制作时长约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：326 大卡
intro_en:
Kabayaki eggplant is a home-cooked dish with a mixture of salty and sweet flavors and a soft and glutinous texture. It draws on the flavor of Japanese kabayaki but is cooked with Chinese frying techniques. Eggplant is rich in dietary fiber and multiple vitamins, which help clear away heat and activate blood circulation. The difficulty is moderate and requires a little patience for novices. The estimated production time is about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 326 kcal
ingredients_zh: 根据锅的类型决策不同量的油
1 个长的上小下大的茄子（注意不要使用浙茄和圆茄）
ingredients_en: Determine the amount of oil depending on the type of pot
1 long eggplant with a small top and a large bottom (be careful not to use Zhejiang or round eggplants)
steps_zh: 茄子削皮、横着切成两段
蒸 5  分钟
纵向切开，不要切断，在两边切面各划 2~3 刀至可以摊平
煎至两面金黄
往茄子上浇蒲烧汁至没过 1/2 茄子高度
煎至背面上色，翻面
把剩下的蒲烧汁浇在茄子上
出锅，一份茄子烧蒲烧汁就烧好了
steps_en: Peel the eggplant and cut it into two sections
Steam for 5 minutes
Cut it lengthwise, don't cut it off, make 2~3 cuts on both sides until it can be flattened.
Fry until golden brown on both sides
Pour the kabayaki sauce over the eggplant until it covers 1/2 the height of the eggplant.
Fry until the back is colored and turn over
Pour the remaining kabayaki sauce over the eggplant
Take it out of the pot, and a portion of eggplant roasted kabayaki sauce is ready.

intro_zh:
这道家常炒茄子软嫩入味，酱香浓郁，加八角后风味更足。茄子富含膳食纤维、维生素 P 和钾元素，有助于保护心血管。做法简单，对新手友好，全程大火快炒，从备料到出锅大约二十分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：610 大卡
intro_en:
This home-cooked stir-fried eggplant is soft and tender, with a rich sauce flavor, and the addition of star anise makes it even more flavorful. Eggplant is rich in dietary fiber, vitamin P and potassium, which help protect cardiovascular systems. The method is simple and friendly to novices. The whole process is very fast and can be completed in about 20 minutes from preparing the ingredients to taking it out of the pan.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 610 kcal
ingredients_zh: 茄子数量 = 份数 *  1.8 个
虾皮 = 份数 * 正常男子手抓半把
ingredients_en: Number of eggplants = number of servings * 1.8 pieces
Star anise = number of servings * 1 piece
Shopee = number of servings * a normal man would grab half a handful
Minced meat = number of servings * 50 g
steps_zh: 将茄子洗净，一刀分为两段（竖切）。每段的茄子切菱形块，将切好的茄子放入碗中待命。
将香葱洗净，并切成葱花放到案板上待命。
切好八角，放到案板上待命。
如果打算放肉末，先用 10 ml（如果是纯瘦肉，用 15 ml）油中火炒至变色（约 1 分钟），然后盛出备用。
开火热锅，直至锅内没有水。
往锅内倒食用油，没过锅底的两倍（油可以多加，但不可少加）。
热油约 6 成熟，放入八角、虾皮、香葱这三种可选性材料。
如果没有八角等可选材料，热油至 9 成熟。
待锅内的油到 9 成熟，将碗中的茄子倒入锅内用锅铲进行翻炒。
翻炒约 40 秒，将锅铲悬空，与锅平行，把酱油倒入锅铲内。一人约 2.5 锅铲（酱油可以少加，但不可多加，会咸）。
茄子炒到半软时（约 1 分钟后），放回预炒的肉末，快速搅拌均匀。
如果打算加入糖和醋，加入糖和醋。
继续进行翻炒。
等到锅内所有茄子变色且变软时捞出。
steps_en: Wash the eggplant and cut it into two sections (cut vertically). Cut each section of eggplant into diamond-shaped pieces, put the cut eggplant into a bowl and set aside.
Wash the scallions, cut them into slices and put them on the chopping board.
Cut the star anise and place it on the chopping board.
If you plan to put minced meat, first use 10 ml (if it is pure lean meat, use 15 ml) oil to fry over medium heat until it changes color (about 1 minute), then remove and set aside.
Heat the pot over high heat until there is no water in the pot.
Pour cooking oil into the pot to cover twice the bottom of the pot (you can add more oil, but not less).
Heat oil for about 6 seconds and add three optional ingredients: star anise, dried shrimps, and chives.
If optional ingredients such as star anise are not available, heat oil until 9 done.
When the oil in the pot reaches 9, pour the eggplant in the bowl into the pot and stir-fry with a spatula.

Stir-fry for about 40 seconds, hold the spatula parallel to the pot, and pour the soy sauce into the spatula. Approximately 2.5 spatulas per person (you can add less soy sauce, but not more, as it will be salty).
When the eggplant is fried until semi-soft (about 1 minute later), add the pre-fried minced meat and stir quickly to combine.
If you plan to add sugar and vinegar, add sugar and vinegar.
Continue to stir-fry.
Wait until all the eggplants in the pot change color and become soft, take them out.

intro_zh:
这是一道清爽开胃的家常凉菜，口感脆嫩，酸香适口。黄瓜富含水分和维生素，有助于清热解暑、美容养颜。做法非常简单，对新手友好，只需拍碎、调味、腌制 15 分钟，全程约 20 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：107 大卡
intro_en:
This is a refreshing and appetizing home-cooked cold dish with a crisp and tender texture and a delicious sour aroma. Cucumber is rich in water and vitamins, which helps to clear away heat, relieve heat, and beautify the skin. The preparation is very simple and friendly to novices. You only need to smash it, season it, and marinate it for 15 minutes. The whole process can be completed in about 20 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 107 kcal
ingredients_zh: 酱油 5 ml + 2.5 ml * 份数
香油 5 ml + 2 ml * 份数
ingredients_en: Soy sauce 5 ml + 2.5 ml * number of servings
Sesame oil 5 ml + 2 ml * number of servings
steps_zh: 用菜刀将黄瓜拍扁，再剁成长 3 厘米的碎块
将碎黄瓜装入碗中
将蒜拍碎切成碎末
将碗中放入 5 克白糖，搅拌均匀腌制 15 分钟（用糖腌制更好吃，且成色更好不会蔫）
将醋，酱油，盐，蚝油和蒜依次倒入碗中搅拌均匀
将香油倒入碗中并均匀搅拌
steps_en: Flatten the cucumber with a kitchen knife and chop into 3 cm pieces.
Put chopped cucumber into bowl
Chop the garlic into fine pieces
Put 5 grams of white sugar in the bowl, mix well and marinate for 15 minutes (it is more delicious when marinated with sugar, and the color will be better and will not wilt)
Pour the vinegar, soy sauce, salt, oyster sauce and garlic into the bowl and mix well.
Pour the sesame oil into the bowl and stir evenly

intro_zh:
凉拌金针菇是一道简单快捷的家常开胃凉菜，口感脆嫩爽滑，咸鲜微酸。金针菇富含膳食纤维和多种维生素，热量较低。制作全程只需焯烫和调味，对新手非常友好，忙碌时也能快速准备。从备菜到完成大约只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：163 大卡
intro_en:
Cold Enoki Mushrooms is a simple and quick home-cooked appetizer with a crisp, tender and smooth texture, salty and slightly sour. Enoki mushrooms are rich in dietary fiber and multivitamins and have low calories. The entire preparation process only requires blanching and seasoning. It is very friendly to novices and can be prepared quickly when you are busy. It only takes about 10 minutes from prep to done.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 163 kcal
ingredients_zh: 金针菇 150 g （约 1 小包）
steps_zh: 将 金针菇 根部切除，用清水冲洗干净，备用。
将 小葱 洗净，切成葱花，备用。
将 大蒜 去皮，切成蒜末，备用。
锅中加入 1000 ml 饮用水，大火烧开。
放入 金针菇，煮 **1-2 分钟**，至金针菇变软。
将 煮好的 金针菇 捞出，沥干水分，放入一个较大的碗中，备用。
在另一个干净的小碗中，加入 15 ml 生抽，10 ml 醋，3 g 白糖（可选），5 ml 香油（可选）。
加入切好的 大蒜末。
搅拌均匀，使 白糖 充分溶解，酱汁混合均匀。
将制作好的酱汁均匀淋在 金针菇 上。
撒上切好的 小葱花。
根据个人喜好，淋上 5 ml 辣椒油（可选）。
用 筷子 轻轻拌匀，即可食用。
steps_en: Cut off the roots of the enoki mushrooms, rinse them with clean water and set aside.
Wash the green onions, cut into chopped green onions and set aside.
Peel the garlic, cut into minced garlic, and set aside.
Add 1000 ml drinking water to the pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add the enoki mushrooms and cook for **1-2 minutes** until the enoki mushrooms become soft.
Take out the cooked enoki mushrooms, drain them, put them into a larger bowl, and set aside.
In another clean small bowl, add 15 ml light soy sauce, 10 ml vinegar, 3 g sugar (optional), 5 ml sesame oil (optional).
Add minced garlic.
Stir evenly to fully dissolve the sugar and mix the sauce evenly.
Pour the prepared sauce evenly over the enoki mushrooms.
Sprinkle with chopped green onions.
Drizzle with 5 ml chili oil (optional) if desired.
Use chopsticks to mix gently and serve.

intro_zh:
一道酸甜开胃的家常菜肴，嫩滑的鸡蛋裹着软烂多汁的西红柿，是中国家庭餐桌上的经典味道。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质，西红柿富含维生素 C 和番茄红素，营养均衡好吸收。步骤简单，原材料易得，特别适合厨房新手入门，从头备菜到盛盘出锅大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：252 大卡
intro_en:
A sweet and sour home-cooked dish, with tender eggs wrapped in soft and juicy tomatoes, it is a classic taste on Chinese family tables. Eggs provide high-quality protein, and tomatoes are rich in vitamin C and lycopene, which are nutritionally balanced and easy to absorb. The steps are simple and the raw materials are easily available. It is especially suitable for beginners in the kitchen. It only takes about 15 minutes from preparing the dish to plating it.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 252 kcal
ingredients_zh: 西红柿 = 1 个（约 180g） * 份数
鸡蛋 = 1.5 个 * 份数，向上取整
ingredients_en: Chopped green onion = 0-10g * number of servings
steps_zh: 西红柿洗净
可选：去掉西红柿的外表皮
西红柿去蒂，切成边长不超过 4cm 的小块，即为 `西红柿块`
将鸡蛋打入碗中，加入 `1g * 份数` 的盐，搅匀，即为 `鸡蛋液`
热锅，加入食用油
油热后，倒入 `鸡蛋液`。翻炒至鸡蛋结为固体且颜色微微发黄，即为 `半熟鸡蛋`
关火。将 `半熟鸡蛋` 盛盘，重新开火
加入 `西红柿块`，锅铲拍打并翻炒 20 秒，或至西红柿软烂
向锅中加入 `半熟鸡蛋`，翻炒均匀
加入剩余的盐、糖（可选，如果倾向于甜味版本）、葱花（可选），翻炒均匀
关火，盛盘
steps_en: Wash tomatoes
Optional: Remove the outer skin of the tomatoes
Remove the stems from the tomatoes and cut them into small pieces with a side length of no more than 4cm, which are called tomato pieces.
Crack the eggs into a bowl, add `1g * portion` of salt, mix well, it will be `egg liquid`
Heat the pan and add cooking oil
After the oil is hot, pour in the `egg liquid`. Stir fry until the eggs become solid and slightly yellow in color, which is called half-boiled eggs.
Turn off the heat. Place the `half-boiled eggs` on a plate and turn the heat back on
Add the `tomato chunks`, beat with a spatula and stir-fry for 20 seconds, or until the tomatoes are soft and mashed
Add half-boiled eggs to the pot and stir-fry evenly
Add the remaining salt, sugar (optional, if you prefer a sweeter version), chopped green onion (optional), and stir-fry evenly
Turn off the heat and serve

intro_zh:
金钱蛋是一道外焦里嫩、咸香微辣的湘味家常菜，煎至金黄的蛋片形似铜钱，寓意吉祥。鸡蛋与青红椒搭配，富含优质蛋白质和多种维生素，营养均衡。制作难度中等，新手稍加练习也能掌握，全程约需 30 分钟即可完成下饭菜。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：427 大卡
intro_en:
Money Egg is a Hunan-style home-cooked dish that is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, salty and slightly spicy. The egg slices fried until golden are shaped like copper coins, which means good luck. Paired with green and red peppers, eggs are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins and have balanced nutrition. The difficulty of making it is medium, and novices can master it with a little practice. The whole process takes about 30 minutes to complete the meal.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 427 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡蛋冷水下锅，大火煮开转小火煮 8 分钟
用自来水冲凉，方便剥皮
蒜切沫（粒径不大于 1 mm），线椒和小米辣切小粒（约 2-3 mm）
每个熟鸡蛋沿短轴切成体积类似的 4 份
如果打算沾淀粉，每片鸡蛋粘上淀粉，抖掉多余的淀粉
锅内放入 25 ml 油（如果不沾淀粉，放 20 ml），放入熟鸡蛋片
煎至微焦黄后，补 10 ml 油（如果不沾淀粉，补 10 ml），翻面
第二面微黄后，加入线椒、小米辣、蒜末煎制约一分钟，翻面
接着加豆瓣酱煎制约几十秒，翻面
生抽、耗油、糖调成汁，轻轻颠锅后即可出锅
steps_en: Put the eggs in a pot of cold water, bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce to low heat and simmer for 8 minutes
Take a shower with running water to make peeling easier
Chop the garlic into fine pieces (the particle size is no more than 1 mm), and cut the chili pepper and millet into small pieces (about 2-3 mm).
Cut each hard-boiled egg into 4 equal portions along the short axis
If you plan to dip it in starch, coat each piece of egg with starch and shake off the excess starch.
Put 25 ml of oil in the pot (if no starch is used, put 20 ml) and add cooked egg slices
Fry until slightly browned, add 10 ml of oil (if not covered with starch, add 10 ml), and turn over
After the second side is lightly browned, add chili peppers, millet chili and minced garlic and fry for one minute, then turn over.
Then add bean paste and fry for a few dozen seconds, then turn over
Mix light soy sauce, oil and sugar into juice, stir the pot gently and it's ready to serve

intro_zh:
脆皮豆腐外酥里嫩，酱汁咸甜适口，是一道快手下饭菜。豆腐富含植物蛋白和钙质，鸡蛋提供优质蛋白，营养搭配均衡。制作需要耐心煎出金黄脆皮，但步骤清晰，初学者也能掌握，全程大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：840 大卡
intro_en:
The crispy tofu is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, and the sauce is salty and sweet, making it a quick and easy meal. Tofu is rich in plant protein and calcium, and eggs provide high-quality protein with a balanced nutritional mix. Making it requires patience to fry the golden crispy skin, but the steps are clear and even beginners can master it. The whole process takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 840 kcal
ingredients_zh: 老豆腐 1 块 （市场买 1.25 格 * 人）
鸡蛋 2 只 * 老豆腐块数
玉米淀粉 50 g * 老豆腐块数
ingredients_en: 2 eggs * number of old tofu pieces
Corn starch 50 g * number of old tofu pieces
steps_zh: 鸡蛋搅拌形成蛋液放置备用
配置酱料 （20 g 生抽+10 g 蚝油+5 g 老抽+10 g 白糖+10 g 玉米淀粉+200 ml 清水）
老豆腐切片 （个人建议，仅供参考  人 * 5 片，厚度 1.2 cm）
玉米淀粉倒入盘中，将老豆腐片粘上淀粉后，粘上蛋液，放置一旁
热锅，锅内放入 18ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
将粘上蛋液的老豆腐片均匀放入锅中，铺好锅底，小火煎至金黄翻面
待两面煎至金黄后，倒入酱料，让每块豆腐都沐浴在酱料中，大火 3 分钟至酱汁浓稠
关火
steps_en: Stir the eggs to form egg liquid and set aside
Prepare sauce (20 g light soy sauce + 10 g oyster sauce + 5 g dark soy sauce + 10 g white sugar + 10 g corn starch + 200 ml water)
Sliced old tofu (personal recommendation, for reference only, person * 5 slices, thickness 1.2 cm)
Pour cornstarch into a plate, coat the old tofu slices with starch, then coat with egg liquid and set aside
Heat the pan and put 18ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Put the old tofu slices coated with egg liquid evenly into the pot, spread the bottom of the pot, and fry over low heat until golden brown.
Fry both sides until golden brown, pour in the sauce so that each piece of tofu is bathed in the sauce, and cook over high heat for 3 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Turn off the heat

intro_zh:
家常日本豆腐是一道外酥里嫩的家常快手菜，金黄脆壳包裹着柔滑的玉子豆腐，搭配青椒、胡萝卜等时蔬，可调成咸鲜或酸甜风味，脆嫩咸香。日本豆腐以鸡蛋为主要原料，富含优质蛋白，加上木耳和蔬菜，营养均衡。需要一点煎豆腐的技巧，难度适中，新手也能尝试，全程大约 30 分钟即可上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：946 大卡
intro_en:
Homemade Japanese tofu is a quick home-cooked dish that is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. The golden crispy shell wraps the smooth tamagoyaki tofu, and is paired with green peppers, carrots and other seasonal vegetables. It can be made into salty or sweet and sour flavors, crisp, tender and salty. Japanese tofu uses eggs as the main raw material, rich in high-quality protein, plus fungus and vegetables, and has balanced nutrition. It requires a little skill in frying tofu, it is moderately difficult and can be tried by novices, and it can be served in about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 946 kcal
ingredients_zh: 油（煎豆腐用，能没过一大半就行）
日本豆腐 300 g（约 3 个）
青椒 120 g（中等大小 1 个）
黑木耳 30 g（干黑木耳约 10 g 泡发）
盐 2 g（如果添加了鸡精，只放 0.5g 或不放）
ingredients_en: Oil (for frying tofu, just enough to cover more than half of it)
30 g black fungus (about 10 g dried black fungus soaked)
2 g salt (if chicken essence is added, only add 0.5g or not)
steps_zh: 胡萝卜切片，尖椒切薄块，葱蒜碎切好
把买好的日本豆腐打开袋子切好，切成大概 1 cm 厚的圆柱体
生粉放到平盘中，准备给豆腐裹面
轻轻把豆腐放到面粉上，上下两面和周边都裹上面粉，注意不要包裹的太厚
在平底锅里放 150 ml 油，油能没过豆腐一大半即可，看边缘颜色变成金黄，翻面煎就可以了
两边都煎好的时候捞出来放在干净的盘里备用
在炒锅中倒入 10-15 ml 油，放入葱蒜，爆香后放入青椒、胡萝卜、火腿肠、黑木耳
加入蚝油、生抽、盐、鸡精、白砂糖、番茄酱
轻轻翻炒至颜色均匀
steps_en: Slice the carrots, cut the peppers into thin pieces, and mince the onions and garlic.
Open the bag of purchased Japanese tofu and cut it into cylinders about 1 cm thick.
Put the cornstarch into a flat plate and prepare to coat the tofu
Gently put the tofu on the flour, and coat the upper, lower and surrounding sides with flour. Be careful not to coat it too thickly.
Put 150 ml of oil in the pan. The oil can cover more than half of the tofu. When the color of the edge turns golden, turn over and fry.
When both sides are fried, take them out and place them on a clean plate for later use.
Pour 10-15 ml oil into the wok, add onion and garlic, saute until fragrant, then add green pepper, carrot, ham sausage and black fungus
Add oyster sauce, light soy sauce, salt, chicken essence, sugar and tomato sauce
Stir gently until the color is even

intro_zh:
这道印度家常素菜以干香金黄、香料浓郁为特点，土豆绵软、花菜略带焦边，属于北印度风味。土豆和花菜富含膳食纤维与维生素 C，营养均衡。做法简单，对新手友好，从准备到出锅约需 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：668 大卡
intro_en:
This Indian home-cooked vegetarian dish is characterized by its dry golden color and rich spices. The potatoes are soft and the cauliflower has slightly burnt edges. It is a North Indian flavor. Potatoes and cauliflower are rich in dietary fiber and vitamin C, providing a balanced nutritional profile. It’s simple, novice-friendly, and takes about 25 minutes from prep to dish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 668 kcal
ingredients_zh: 土豆 2 个（约 250g），去皮切块（约 2cm 大小）
花菜 1 个（约 300g），掰成小朵
ingredients_en: 2 potatoes (about 250g), peeled and cut into pieces (about 2cm in size)
steps_zh: 将土豆去皮切成约 2cm 的块状
将花菜掰成均匀的小朵，大朵可用刀切小
在炒锅中倒入 30ml 食用油，中火加热
油热后放入孜然籽 3g，炸至*孜然籽变深色且散发香味*（约 10 秒，注意不要炸糊）
放入切碎的洋葱，翻炒至*洋葱变透明微黄*（约 3-4 分钟）
加入生姜、大蒜和青辣椒，翻炒 1 分钟
加入切碎的番茄，翻炒至*番茄软烂*（约 2-3 分钟）
加入姜黄粉 3g、红辣椒粉 3g、香菜粉 5g、盐 5g
翻炒 1 分钟，使香料与蔬菜融合
放入土豆块，翻炒 2 分钟使土豆表面裹上香料
放入花菜朵，轻轻翻拌均匀
盖上锅盖，转中小火，**焖 12-15 分钟**，期间每 3-4 分钟打开翻炒一次防止粘锅
当*土豆用筷子可轻松戳透、花菜略有焦边*时，撒入印度综合香料粉 3g
翻炒 1 分钟
关火，撒上香菜叶，盛盘
steps_en: Peel the potatoes and cut into pieces of about 2cm
Break the cauliflower into small uniform florets, and cut large florets into small pieces with a knife
Pour 30ml cooking oil into the wok and heat over medium heat
After the oil is hot, add 3g of cumin seeds and fry until *the cumin seeds turn dark and fragrant* (about 10 seconds, be careful not to burn them)
Add chopped onions and stir-fry until onions turn translucent and slightly brown* (about 3-4 minutes)
Add ginger, garlic and green chilies and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add chopped tomatoes and stir-fry until *tomatoes are soft* (about 2-3 minutes)
Add 3g turmeric powder, 3g red chili powder, 5g coriander powder, 5g salt
Stir-fry for 1 minute to combine the spices with the vegetables
Add the potato cubes and stir-fry for 2 minutes to coat the potatoes with the spices
Add the cauliflower and stir gently to combine
Cover the pot, turn to medium-low heat, **simmer for 12-15 minutes**, and stir-fry every 3-4 minutes to prevent sticking.
When the potatoes can be easily poked through with chopsticks and the cauliflower is slightly burnt, sprinkle in 3g of Indian mixed spice powder
Stir-fry for 1 minute
Turn off the heat, sprinkle with coriander leaves and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
这道北印度素菜将葫芦擦丝与鹰嘴豆粉团成丸子，油炸后浸入番茄洋葱咖喱，外酥内软、酱汁浓郁香辛。瓠瓜清润、鹰嘴豆粉提供植物蛋白与膳食纤维，是一道饱腹又均衡的素食。制作涉及油炸和熬酱，步骤稍多但按序操作不难掌握，全程大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：571 大卡
intro_en:
This North Indian vegetarian dish consists of grated gourd and chickpea flour rolled into balls, deep-fried and soaked in tomato and onion curry. It is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, and the sauce is rich and spicy. The gourd is refreshing and the chickpea flour provides plant protein and dietary fiber, making it a filling and balanced vegetarian dish. The preparation involves frying and boiling the sauce, which is a bit more steps but not difficult to master in sequence. The whole process takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 571 kcal
steps_zh: 将瓠瓜去皮，用刨丝器刨成细丝
用手将瓠瓜丝中的水分挤干，*尽量挤干*，否则丸子炸不成型
在挤干水分的瓠瓜丝中加入鹰嘴豆粉 80g、盐 3g、红辣椒粉 3g、香菜粉 3g
用手充分混合均匀，揉成不粘手的面团状
将混合物搓成直径约 3cm 的小丸子，备用
在深锅中倒入 500ml 食用油，中火加热至油温约 170°C（放入一小块面团，能快速浮起且冒泡即可）
将丸子分批放入油中，**炸 4-5 分钟**，直至*表面金黄酥脆*
炸好的丸子用厨房纸吸去多余油分，备用
在炒锅中倒入 30ml 食用油，中火加热 10 秒
放入切碎的洋葱，翻炒至*洋葱变成金棕色*（约 5-7 分钟）
加入磨碎的生姜和大蒜，翻炒 1 分钟至*香味散出*
加入切碎的番茄，翻炒至*番茄完全软烂出油*（约 5 分钟）
加入姜黄粉 3g、红辣椒粉 5g、香菜粉 5g、孜然粉 3g、盐 5g
翻炒 2 分钟，使香料与番茄充分融合
加入 200ml 水，搅拌均匀，煮沸后转小火**炖 5 分钟**
将炸好的丸子轻轻放入酱汁中，小火**炖 3-5 分钟**，使丸子吸收酱汁
撒上印度综合香料粉 3g 和切碎的青辣椒
关火，撒上香菜叶装饰，盛盘
steps_en: Peel the gourd and grate into thin strips with a grater
Squeeze the water out of the gourd shreds with your hands, *squeeze as much as possible*, otherwise the meatballs will not be fried into shape.
Add 80g of chickpea flour, 3g of salt, 3g of red pepper powder, and 3g of coriander powder to the squeezed gourd shreds.
Mix thoroughly with your hands and knead into a dough that is not sticky.
Shape the mixture into small balls about 3cm in diameter and set aside
Pour 500ml cooking oil into a deep pot and heat over medium heat until the oil temperature is about 170°C (put a small piece of dough in, it will float quickly and bubble)
Add the meatballs into the oil in batches and **fry for 4-5 minutes** until *golden and crispy*
Use kitchen paper to absorb excess oil from the fried meatballs and set aside
Pour 30ml cooking oil into the wok and heat over medium heat for 10 seconds
Add chopped onions and stir-fry until onions turn golden brown* (about 5-7 minutes)
Add grated ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant*
Add chopped tomatoes and stir-fry until tomatoes are completely soft and oily* (about 5 minutes)
Add 3g turmeric powder, 5g red chili powder, 5g coriander powder, 3g cumin powder, 5g salt
Stir-fry for 2 minutes to fully combine the spices with the tomatoes
Add 200ml water, stir evenly, bring to a boil, then turn down to low heat and simmer for 5 minutes**
Gently put the fried meatballs into the sauce and **simmer over low heat for 3-5 minutes** to allow the meatballs to absorb the sauce
Sprinkle 3g Indian mixed spice powder and chopped green chillies
Turn off the heat, garnish with coriander leaves and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
蚝油生菜是一道爽口鲜香的家常菜，脆嫩的生菜淋上蒜香蚝油汁，咸中带甜，属于粤菜和川菜馆都很常见的快手素菜。富含维生素和膳食纤维，有助于促进消化。做法对新手非常友好，从洗菜到出锅大约只需 15 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：125 大卡
intro_en:
Oyster sauce lettuce is a refreshing and fragrant home-cooked dish. Crisp and tender lettuce is topped with garlic oyster sauce. It is salty and sweet. It is a quick vegetarian dish that is common in Cantonese and Sichuan restaurants. Rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, it helps promote digestion. The recipe is very beginner-friendly, and it only takes about 15 minutes to complete from washing the vegetables to taking it out of the pot.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 125 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大蒜 4-5 瓣（做成蒜泥或切碎）
steps_zh: 生菜洗净并去掉烂菜叶。
热锅，先放 1 L 清水（凉），然后在锅内放入 2 ml - 3 ml 食用油和 0.5 g 盐，等待锅中的水煮沸。
水沸后，放入生菜，将**每一片**生菜叶都焯水 10 s。
捞出生菜，控干水份，摆盘 。
调汁：将生抽 10 ml 、蚝油 6-8 ml 、盐 0.5 g 、 白糖 1 g 放入碗中调匀，并加入 10-15 ml 清水（凉）搅拌均匀。
再开火，热锅，放入食用油 5-8 ml，油热放入蒜泥。
等待有蒜香飘出，倒入调好的汁，煮沸即可，立马关火。
将锅中的汤汁均匀地**浇**在生菜上。
steps_en: Wash the lettuce and remove the rotten leaves.
Heat the pot, first put 1 L of clean water (cool), then add 2 ml - 3 ml cooking oil and 0.5 g of salt in the pot, and wait for the water in the pot to boil.
After the water boils, add lettuce and blanch **each** lettuce leaf for 10 seconds.
Remove the lettuce, drain it, and arrange on a plate.
Make the sauce: Put 10 ml of light soy sauce, 6-8 ml of oyster sauce, 0.5 g of salt, and 1 g of sugar in a bowl and mix thoroughly, then add 10-15 ml of water (cool) and stir evenly.
Turn the heat back on, heat the pan, add 5-8 ml of cooking oil, add minced garlic when the oil is hot.
Wait until the aroma of garlic comes out, pour in the prepared juice, bring to a boil, and immediately turn off the heat.
Pour the soup in the pot evenly over the lettuce.

intro_zh:
这是一道酱香浓郁的家常小炒，豆角软嫩入味，鲜辣下饭。富含膳食纤维和多种维生素，有助于促进消化。做法简单，新手也能轻松上手，从备菜到出锅大约 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：107 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-style stir-fry with a rich sauce. The beans are soft, tender and flavourful, and are spicy enough to go with rice. Rich in dietary fiber and multivitamins, it helps promote digestion. The recipe is simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about 20 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 107 kcal
steps_zh: 葱切花，蒜切沫，备用。
生抽、老抽、耗油、盐混合调料汁，备用。
小米椒切圈，备用。
豆角去筋，45° 斜切*4-10cm*小段，备用。
起锅烧油(10ml - 15ml)，冒烟后放入葱、小米椒，翻炒至闻到香味；
加入豆角，翻炒*30s*,
加入料汁，开大火翻炒*2分钟*
倒入 150ml 水
转中小火，盖上锅盖焖制 8-10 分钟
加入蒜切沫，出锅。
steps_en: Cut green onion into flowers and finely mince garlic. Set aside.
Mix the sauce of light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, oil and salt and set aside.
Cut millet pepper into rings and set aside.
Remove gluten from the beans, cut into 4-10cm* pieces at a 45° angle, and set aside.
Heat oil (10ml - 15ml) in a pan. When it starts to smoke, add green onions and millet peppers and stir-fry until fragrant;
Add green beans and stir-fry *30s*,
Add the sauce, turn up the heat and stir-fry *2 minutes*
Pour 150ml water
Turn to medium-low heat, cover and simmer for 8-10 minutes
Add minced garlic and remove from pan.

intro_zh:
茄子炖土豆是一道东北家常炖菜，口感绵软咸香，带着辣椒的微辣和蒜香，十分下饭。茄子富含花青素和膳食纤维，土豆提供碳水化合物和维生素 C，加上猪肉的蛋白质，营养均衡又饱腹。这道菜操作流程简单，但需要掌握翻炒和收汁的火候，对新手有一定挑战，预估难度中等。从备料到出锅大约需要 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：623 大卡
intro_en:
Eggplant stewed with potatoes is a home-style stew from Northeastern China. It has a soft and salty texture, with the slight spiciness of chili and garlic, and is perfect for rice. Eggplant is rich in anthocyanins and dietary fiber, while potatoes provide carbohydrates and vitamin C. Together with the protein of pork, it is nutritionally balanced and filling. The operation process of this dish is simple, but it requires mastery of stir-frying and reducing the heat. It will be a challenge for novices, and the difficulty is estimated to be medium. It takes about 45 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 623 kcal
ingredients_zh: 辣椒（是青辣椒，而**不是辣椒面或辣椒油**）
茄子的数量 = 份数 * 1 个 （每个茄子约 150g）
土豆数量 = 份数 * 1 个（每个土豆约 150g）
酱油量 = 份数 * 15 毫升
辣椒量 = 50 克（调味，所以无论多少人都放这些。）
蒜量 = 3 瓣（调味，所以无论多少人都放这些。注意是里面的小瓣 3 瓣，而**不是3整头**）
ingredients_en: Chili pepper (green chili pepper, not chili powder or chili oil**)
Quantity of eggplants = number of portions * 1 (each eggplant is about 150g)
Number of potatoes = number of servings * 1 (each potato is about 150g)
Amount of meat = number of portions * 180 g
Amount of soy sauce = number of servings * 15 ml
Amount of chilli = 50g (To season, so put these in no matter how many people.)
Amount of garlic = 3 cloves (seasoned, so put these no matter how many people are there. Note that it is the 3 small cloves inside, not **3 whole heads**)
steps_zh: 将茄子、土豆、辣椒洗净，蒜扒皮并拍碎。
将茄子、土豆切成约 6 立方厘米的块，辣椒切成 5 克的小块，肉切成 3 厘米的丝。
开火，热锅，加入份数 * 13 毫升的油。
当能看到锅里的油冒出一丝烟时，放入辣椒。
煸出辣椒香气后，立刻放入肉，用铲子翻炒 30 秒。
放入土豆，翻炒 30 秒。
放入茄子，翻炒 30 秒。
放入酱油和盐，继续翻炒 5 分钟。
加入水，水面高度为锅内食材高度的 0.9 倍，并盖上锅盖。
等待，直到锅内水的高度剩余食材高度的 0.1 倍时，开盖，放入蒜，搅拌均匀，关火。
steps_en: Wash the eggplant, potatoes, and peppers, peel and smash the garlic.
Cut the eggplant and potatoes into about 6 cubic centimeter pieces, cut the pepper into 5 g pieces, and cut the meat into 3 cm shreds.
Turn on the heat, heat the pan and add portions * 13 ml of oil.
When you can see a hint of smoke coming from the oil in the pan, add the chilies.
After the chili pepper is fragrant, immediately add the meat and stir-fry for 30 seconds with a spatula.
Add potatoes and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the eggplant and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add soy sauce and salt and continue stir-frying for 5 minutes.
Add water until the height of the water surface is 0.9 times the height of the ingredients in the pot, and cover the pot with a lid.
Wait until the height of the water in the pot reaches 0.1 times the height of the remaining ingredients, open the lid, add the garlic, stir evenly, and turn off the heat.

intro_zh:
这是一道湘味十足的家常快手下饭菜，酸辣鲜香，鸡蛋焦香蓬松裹满浓郁汤汁，十分开胃。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质和卵磷脂，搭配香醋更有助于促进食欲。做法极其简单，新手友好，从准备到出锅仅需大约十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：471 大卡
intro_en:
This is a quick home-cooked dish full of Hunan flavor. It is sour, spicy and fragrant. The eggs are fluffy and covered in rich soup. It is very appetizing. Eggs provide high-quality protein and lecithin, and paired with balsamic vinegar, they can help stimulate appetite. The recipe is extremely simple and beginner-friendly, and it only takes about ten minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 471 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡蛋不需打散，直接打入碗中备用
香葱切 3cm 长小段即可
蒜瓣和小米辣放入打蒜器，打成沫
将香醋、生抽、蚝油、白糖、水加入小碗，搅拌均匀作为糖醋料汁
油热倒入鸡蛋，等鸡蛋凝固之后铲成大块，倒入蒜沫、小米辣沫、倒入糖醋料汁
大火收汁、快出锅时加入葱段即可
steps_en: There is no need to beat the eggs, just break them directly into the bowl and set aside.
Cut chives into 3cm long sections
Place the garlic cloves and millet into a garlic beater and beat until fine.
Add balsamic vinegar, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and water to a small bowl and stir evenly to make the sweet and sour sauce.
Heat the oil and pour in the eggs. After the eggs are solidified, scoop them into large pieces. Pour in minced garlic, minced millet and spicy mint, and pour in the sweet and sour sauce.
Reduce the juice over high heat and add green onions when it is almost out of the pan.

intro_zh:
这是一道西北农家风味的炖菜，豆角绵软、土豆沙糯、番茄汤汁浓郁，酸香开胃。富含膳食纤维、维生素和碳水化合物，营养均衡。做法极其简单，食材用量可随喜好调整，几乎没有失败的可能，对新手特别友好。从备料到出锅，大约只需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：191 大卡
intro_en:
This is a Northwest farm-style stew, with soft beans, glutinous potato paste, rich tomato soup, and appetizing sourness. Rich in dietary fiber, vitamins and carbohydrates, nutritionally balanced. The method is extremely simple, the amount of ingredients can be adjusted according to preference, there is almost no possibility of failure, and it is especially friendly to novices. From preparation to serving, it only takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 191 kcal
ingredients_zh: 螺丝椒（可选）2 个 * 2 人
香菜碎（可选）根据口味加
ingredients_en: Chopped coriander (optional) add according to taste
steps_zh: 葱切花，蒜切沫，姜切丝，备用。
豆角去筋，切*2-10cm*小段，备用。
土豆去皮，切*1cm³*小块，备用。
西红柿去皮，切*1cm³*小块，备用。
辣椒去仔，切*0.15cm 宽*条，备用。
起锅烧油(10ml - 15ml)，冒烟后放入葱姜蒜，翻炒至闻到葱姜蒜香味；
加入豆角，翻炒至变色（青绿色变为翠绿色）；
加入土豆块，翻炒 30s；
加入热水（水面刚刚漫过菜），盖上锅盖熬至土豆*变软*（可以用筷子确认）；
加入西红柿块，加入盐，生抽，蚝油，五香粉，辣椒，熬至西红柿成汁（注意搅拌，防止糊锅）；
加入香菜碎，出锅。
steps_en: Cut the green onion into flowers, mince the garlic, and cut the ginger into shreds. Set aside.
Remove gluten from green beans, cut into small pieces of *2-10cm*, and set aside.
Peel the potatoes, cut into *1cm³* pieces, set aside.
Peel the tomatoes, cut into *1cm³* pieces and set aside.
Remove the peppers and cut into 0.15cm wide strips. Set aside.
Heat oil (10ml - 15ml) in a pan. When it starts to smoke, add onion, ginger, and garlic. Stir-fry until you can smell the aroma of onion, ginger, and garlic;
Add the beans and stir-fry until they change color (turquoise turns to emerald green);
Add potato cubes and stir-fry for 30 seconds;
Add hot water (the water just covers the vegetables), cover the pot and simmer until the potatoes are *soft* (you can use chopsticks to confirm);
Add tomato cubes, salt, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, five-spice powder, and chili pepper, and cook until the tomatoes become juice (be careful to stir to prevent the pot from being stuck);
Add chopped coriander and remove from pan.

intro_zh:
一道清淡鲜美的家常汤羹，酸甜开胃，口感嫩滑。西红柿富含维生素 C 和番茄红素，搭配鸡蛋与豆腐，能补充优质蛋白，营养均衡易吸收。做法简单，只需切配翻炒和煮制，新手也能轻松掌握，从准备到出锅大约 15 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：242 大卡
intro_en:
A light and delicious home-cooked soup, sweet and sour, appetizing, and tender in texture. Tomatoes are rich in vitamin C and lycopene. When paired with eggs and tofu, they can supplement high-quality protein and have balanced nutrition that is easy to absorb. The recipe is simple, just add, stir-fry and cook, and it can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about 15 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 242 kcal
steps_zh: 西红柿切成小丁、鸡蛋打入碗中搅拌、豆腐切块备用
起锅烧油，放入姜片 5 S 后倒入入西红柿翻炒 30 S
锅中加入开水，汤水烧开，60 S 后到入鸡蛋液、豆腐块
汤水重新烧开后，加入水淀粉，沿一个方向搅拌 2 圈
加入鸡精、盐、香葱，30 S 后起锅
steps_en: Cut the tomatoes into small cubes, beat the eggs into a bowl and stir, and cut the tofu into cubes and set aside.
Heat oil in a pan, add ginger slices for 5 seconds, add tomatoes and stir-fry for 30 seconds
Add boiling water to the pot and bring the soup to a boil. After 60 seconds, add the egg liquid and tofu cubes.
After the soup boils again, add water starch and stir 2 times in one direction
Add chicken essence, salt and chives, and cook after 30 seconds
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/西红柿豆腐汤羹/西红柿豆腐汤羹.md

intro_zh:
西葫芦炒鸡蛋是一道清爽可口的家常快手菜，西葫芦软嫩多汁、鸡蛋鲜香松软，加入西红柿后更添酸甜风味，十分下饭。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质和卵磷脂，西葫芦含有丰富的维生素 C 和膳食纤维，搭配食用营养均衡。制作过程简单，对新手非常友好，从备料到出锅一般初学者只需 15 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：224 大卡
intro_en:
Scrambled eggs with zucchini is a refreshing and delicious home-cooked dish. The zucchini is soft and juicy, and the eggs are fragrant and fluffy. Adding tomatoes adds a sweet and sour flavor, making it a perfect addition to rice. Eggs provide high-quality protein and lecithin, and zucchini is rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, making it a nutritionally balanced combination. The preparation process is simple and very friendly to novices. From preparation to cooking, it only takes 15 minutes for beginners to complete it.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 224 kcal
steps_zh: 西红柿洗净，切成小块，备用
西葫芦洗净，切成边长约为 4cm 的菱形，备用
打三个鸡蛋到碗里，打散搅匀，备用
热锅，锅内放入 5ml - 10ml 食用油
倒入鸡蛋，保持翻炒至鸡蛋成固体，用锅铲分成小块后盛到碗里，备用
锅内放入 5ml - 10ml 食用油，倒入西红柿，炒至变软
倒入西葫芦一起翻炒均匀，放入 6g 食用盐，将火调小然后**等待 4 - 5 分钟**
倒入备用的鸡蛋，中火翻炒 15 秒
关火，盛盘
steps_en: Wash the tomatoes, cut into small pieces and set aside
Wash the zucchini and cut into diamond shapes with a side length of about 4cm, set aside
Crack three eggs into a bowl, beat well and set aside
Heat the pot and put 5ml - 10ml cooking oil in the pot
Pour in the eggs and keep stirring until the eggs become solid. Use a spatula to break the eggs into small pieces and transfer them to a bowl. Set aside.
Put 5ml - 10ml cooking oil in the pot, add tomatoes and fry until soft
Add the zucchini and stir-fry evenly, add 6g of edible salt, reduce the heat to low and **wait for 4 - 5 minutes**
Pour in the reserved eggs and stir-fry over medium heat for 15 seconds
Turn off the heat and serve
images: dishes/vegetable_dish/西葫芦炒鸡蛋/西葫芦炒鸡蛋.jpeg
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/西葫芦炒鸡蛋/西葫芦炒鸡蛋.md

intro_zh:
一道简单易做的家常食疗汤饮，有甜咸两种风味，口感柔滑嫩爽，属于民间润喉小方。富含优质蛋白质和卵磷脂，易于消化吸收，可缓解喉咙干痒不适。制作极简单，初学者看一遍就能上手，从烧水到完成大约只需 5 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：107 大卡
intro_en:
A simple and easy-to-make home-cooked therapeutic soup, it has sweet and salty flavors and a smooth and tender taste. It is a folk throat soothing recipe. It is rich in high-quality protein and lecithin, easy to digest and absorb, and can relieve dry and itchy throat discomfort. It is extremely simple to make, and beginners can get started with just one look. It only takes about 5 minutes from boiling water to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 107 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡蛋 1 个 （去壳后约 50 g）
ingredients_en: 5 - 10 g sugar (if making a sweet dish)
1 - 2 g table salt (if making salty taste)
steps_zh: 将鸡蛋打入碗中。
使用筷子或搅拌器，顺着一个方向搅打蛋液，直至蛋清与蛋黄完全混合均匀，颜色一致。（此过程约需 1 - 2 分钟）
将糖或盐等调味料加入蛋液中，略微搅匀。
准备刚烧开的、100 ℃ 的沸水。
**一边用筷子快速搅拌碗中的蛋液，一边将沸水以细流状冲入蛋液中**。确保沸水与蛋液充分混合。
持续搅拌片刻，直至蛋液被完全烫熟，形成均匀的淡黄色蛋花。
steps_en: Crack the eggs into a bowl.
Using chopsticks or a whisk, beat the egg liquid in one direction until the egg white and egg yolk are completely mixed and the color is the same. (This process takes approximately 1 - 2 minutes)
Add seasonings such as sugar or salt to the egg mixture and mix slightly.
Prepare freshly boiled, 100°C boiling water.

**While using chopsticks to quickly stir the egg liquid in the bowl, pour the boiling water into the egg liquid in a thin stream**. Make sure the boiling water is thoroughly mixed with the egg mixture.
Keep stirring for a while until the egg liquid is completely cooked and a uniform light yellow egg drop is formed.

intro_zh:
拔丝土豆是一道经典的鲁菜，成菜色泽金黄、糖丝细长，外脆里糯、香甜可口。土豆富含碳水化合物和维生素 C，能快速补充能量。这道菜有一定难度，新手需注意熬糖火候，避免翻沙或焦苦。从备料到出锅，预计制作时长约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1158 大卡
intro_en:
Shredded potatoes are a classic Shandong dish. The finished dish is golden in color, has slender sugar strands, is crispy on the outside and waxy on the inside, and is sweet and delicious. Potatoes are rich in carbohydrates and vitamin C, providing a quick energy boost. This dish is a bit difficult. Beginners need to pay attention to the cooking temperature of the sugar to avoid turning it into sand or burning it. From preparation to serving, it takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1158 kcal
ingredients_zh: 食用油 300 ml （土豆能浮在油上面即可）
白砂糖 120 g （要多放糖，这是为了在土豆上面裹上一层厚厚的糖浆，从而产生拔丝的效果）
ingredients_en: 300 ml cooking oil (potatoes can float on top of the oil)
120 g white sugar (add more sugar to coat the potatoes with a thick layer of syrup to create a silky effect)
steps_zh: 土豆去皮，切均匀的小块。放入淀粉（不加水）搅拌，使得淀粉覆盖土豆表面
起锅烧油，放入土豆块，缓缓翻滚煎炸 5-7 分钟 ，直至筷子可以插进土豆
取出土豆，放入大碗备用
锅中加入水、白砂糖，沿着一个方向慢慢搅动白砂糖，直到白砂糖颜色变成褐色
重新倒入土豆，翻炒 30 S 后 出锅
土豆盛盘，散上芝麻
steps_en: Peel the potatoes and cut into even pieces. Add starch (without adding water) and stir until the starch covers the surface of the potatoes.
Heat oil in a pan, add potato pieces, and fry slowly for 5-7 minutes, until chopsticks can be inserted into the potatoes.
Take out the potatoes and put them into a large bowl and set aside
Add water and sugar to the pot and slowly stir the sugar in one direction until the sugar turns brown.
Add the potatoes again, stir-fry for 30 seconds and remove from the pan
Serve potatoes on a plate, sprinkle with sesame seeds

intro_zh:
凉拌木耳，由于发放物资中有很多干货，木耳是较为健康的食物。且凉拌木耳的烹饪方式也相对简单。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：129 大卡
intro_en:
Cold fungus, because there are a lot of dry goods in the distribution materials, fungus is a relatively healthy food. And the cooking method of cold fungus is relatively simple.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 129 kcal
ingredients_zh: 干木耳 （湿木耳也可，但不能太久之前泡发的，必须是新鲜的湿木耳）
ingredients_en: Dried fungus (wet fungus can also be used, but it cannot be soaked too long ago, it must be fresh wet fungus)
steps_zh: 泡发干木耳, 水量约为 400ml, 泡发约 45 分钟。 （湿木耳跳过此步骤）
将泡发好的木耳, 进行去根处理（如图 4, 5, 6）, 并彻底洗净。
起锅烧水，水开后放入木耳, 大火煮 1.5-2 分钟。
将蒜瓣、小米辣切碎放入碗中 （可选取中大碗）, 并依次加入盐、糖、生抽、醋、香油、芥末, 用量如上。
木耳盛出后沥水, 放入上一步碗中。
搅拌充分，端盘。
steps_en: Soak the dried fungus with about 400ml of water for about 45 minutes. (Skip this step for wet fungus)
Remove the roots of the soaked fungus (as shown in Figures 4, 5, 6) and wash them thoroughly.
Boil water in a pot. When the water boils, add fungus and cook over high heat for 1.5-2 minutes.
Chop the garlic cloves and millet into a bowl (you can choose a medium to large bowl), and add salt, sugar, light soy sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, and mustard in order, with the above amounts.
Drain the fungus from the water and put it into the bowl from the previous step.
Stir thoroughly and serve.

intro_zh:
干锅花菜是一道湘味家常菜，口感脆嫩干香，五花肉焦香四溢，带着微微辣意。花菜富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维，搭配五花肉补充蛋白质与能量。制作难度适中，只需注意焯水后充分沥干并把五花肉煸出油脂，适合有一定基础的烹饪新手。从准备到出锅大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：759 大卡
intro_en:
Dry pot cauliflower is a Hunan-style home-cooked dish with a crispy, tender, dry and fragrant texture. The pork belly is charred and slightly spicy. Cauliflower is rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, and paired with pork belly, it adds protein and energy. The difficulty of making it is moderate. Just pay attention to blanch the water and drain the pork belly thoroughly to remove the fat. It is suitable for cooking novices with a certain foundation. It takes about 40 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 759 kcal
steps_zh: 花菜朵朝下，没入淡盐水中浸泡 20 分钟。然后洗净用小刀拆成小朵
入开水锅中焯水 1 分钟，捞出立即用冷水冲淋至完全凉透，沥水备用
五花肉切成薄片，大蒜白色切下用刀背拍扁，小红辣椒切成段
锅烧热放油，油热下大葱白爆香
下五花肉片入锅，用中火煸炒至表面全部变色，继续煸炒一会儿，把肥肉部分的油份逼出一部分
倒入红辣椒段和花菜，翻炒几下
加入 10 ml 生抽
再加入 5 g 白糖，转大火不断翻炒 1 分钟
把大蒜叶部分切成段，放入锅中，翻炒几下后，关火盖上盖子焖 1 分钟即可
steps_en: Soak the cauliflower buds side down in lightly salted water for 20 minutes. Then wash it and use a knife to break it into small florets.
Blanch in a pot of boiling water for 1 minute, remove and immediately rinse with cold water until completely cool, drain and set aside.
Cut the pork belly into thin slices, cut off the white garlic and flatten it with the back of a knife, and cut the red pepper into sections.
Heat the pan and add oil. When the oil is hot, sauté the green onions until fragrant.
Add the pork belly slices to the pot and stir-fry over medium heat until the surface changes color. Continue stir-frying for a while to release some of the oil from the fat part.
Add red pepper segments and cauliflower, stir-fry a few times
Add 10 ml light soy sauce
Add 5 g more sugar, turn to high heat and stir-fry for 1 minute
Cut the garlic leaves into sections, add them to the pot, stir-fry for a few times, then turn off the heat, cover and simmer for 1 minute.

intro_zh:
乾隆白菜是一道经典的北京风味凉菜，以手撕白菜心拌上浓稠芝麻酱汁，口感酸甜爽脆、醇厚开胃。白菜富含维生素和膳食纤维，芝麻酱则带来优质脂肪与钙质，清爽解腻又营养。全程不炒不煮，调酱拌匀即可，对新手十分友好，一般仅需 10 分钟便能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：150 大卡
intro_en:
Qianlong cabbage is a classic Beijing-style cold dish. It is made of hand-shredded cabbage hearts mixed with thick sesame sauce. It has a sweet and sour taste, crispy, mellow and appetizing. Cabbage is rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, while sesame paste brings high-quality fat and calcium, which is refreshing and nutritious. There is no frying or boiling in the whole process, just make the sauce and mix well. It is very friendly to novices and can be served to the table in only 10 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 150 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大白菜（取黄心嫩叶，冬季黄心白菜最佳）
陈醋（推荐镇江香醋或山西老陈醋）
熟白芝麻（可选，用于点缀）
陈醋 45ml（约 3 汤匙，醋与麻酱比例约 3:2）
ingredients_en: Chinese cabbage (take the young yellow leaves, yellow cabbage in winter is the best)
Mature vinegar (recommended Zhenjiang balsamic vinegar or Shanxi mature vinegar)
Cooked white sesame seeds (optional, for garnish)
45ml aged vinegar (about 3 tablespoons, the ratio of vinegar to sesame paste is about 3:2)
steps_zh: 大白菜只取内部嫩叶（黄色部分），去除菜帮，用手撕成半个巴掌大的块，**不要用刀切**（手撕截面粗糙更易挂酱）
将撕好的白菜叶冲洗干净，充分控干水分，水分残留会导致酱汁无法挂附
碗中加入 30g 芝麻酱，**先加入 45ml 陈醋**，沿同一方向搅拌，将麻酱慢慢稀释开，直至*成细线状滴落*为止（切勿来回搅拌，会导致芝麻酱"走油"）
向麻酱汁中加入 5g 白糖，搅拌均匀；再加入 1g 食盐，搅拌均匀；最后加入 5ml 香油，搅拌均匀（各调料需分次加入并分别搅拌，边加边感受稀稠度）
将调好的麻酱汁均匀淋在白菜叶上，用手轻轻抓拌，使每片菜叶都裹上酱汁
撒上熟白芝麻，装盘即可食用；若时间充裕，可**静置 5 分钟**待其入味后再食用
steps_en: Only take the inner young leaves (yellow part) of Chinese cabbage, remove the edges, and tear them into half-palm-sized pieces with your hands. **Do not cut with a knife** (hand-teared sections are rough and easier to get sauce)
Rinse the torn cabbage leaves and fully control the moisture. The remaining moisture will prevent the sauce from sticking to it.

Add 30g sesame paste to the bowl, **first add 45ml mature vinegar**, stir in the same direction, and slowly dilute the sesame paste until it *drops into thin lines* (do not stir back and forth, as it will cause the sesame paste to "leave oil")

Add 5g of white sugar to the sesame sauce and stir evenly; then add 1g of salt and stir evenly; finally add 5ml of sesame oil and stir evenly (each seasoning needs to be added in batches and stirred separately, feeling the consistency while adding)
Pour the prepared sesame sauce evenly over the cabbage leaves, and gently stir with your hands to coat each leaf with the sauce.
Sprinkle with cooked white sesame seeds, plate and serve; if you have enough time, you can **let it stand for 5 minutes** until the flavor is absorbed before eating

intro_zh:
红烧冬瓜是一道色泽红亮、香鲜味美的家常素菜，口感软糯入味，属于大众喜爱的中式烧菜。冬瓜本身富含水分、膳食纤维和维生素 C，具有清热解暑、利尿消肿的作用，搭配简单的调味料，营养又好消化。这道菜对初学者比较友好，操作步骤清晰，只需掌握好火候和调味，预计制作时长约 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：519 大卡
intro_en:
Braised winter melon is a home-cooked vegetarian dish that is bright red in color, fragrant and delicious. It has a soft and glutinous texture and is a popular Chinese cooking dish. Winter melon itself is rich in water, dietary fiber and vitamin C. It has the effects of clearing away heat, relieving summer heat, diuresis and reducing swelling. With simple seasonings, it is nutritious and easy to digest. This dish is relatively beginner-friendly with clear steps. You only need to master the heat and seasoning. It is expected to take about 25 minutes to make.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 519 kcal
steps_zh: 冬瓜去皮，切 边长不超过 2cm 小块
起锅烧油，放入冬瓜，缓缓翻滚煎炸 2 分钟 ，直至冬瓜表面泛金黄色
取出冬瓜，放入大碗备用
利用锅中的剩余油，依次放入姜末、生抽、蚝油，翻炒 15 S
重新倒入冬瓜，翻炒 30 S 后，加入开水，水要没过冬瓜表面，大火煮 10 分钟
加入老抽上色，继续煮，直至冬瓜软糯（筷子可以轻松插近冬瓜）
加入鸡精、料酒、香葱翻炒后 30 S， 取出冬瓜到大碗中
锅中剩余汤汁保留，倒入水淀粉，煮开后汤汁浇灌在冬瓜表面
steps_en: Peel the winter melon and cut into small pieces with sides no longer than 2cm.
Heat the oil in a pan, add the winter melon, and fry slowly for 2 minutes until the surface of the winter melon turns golden brown.
Take out the winter melon and put it into a large bowl and set aside
Using the remaining oil in the pot, add minced ginger, light soy sauce, and oyster sauce in sequence, and stir-fry for 15 S
Pour in the winter melon again, stir-fry for 30 seconds, add boiling water, the water should cover the surface of the winter melon, and cook on high heat for 10 minutes
Add dark soy sauce for color, and continue cooking until the winter melon is soft and waxy (chopsticks can be easily inserted into the winter melon)
Add chicken essence, cooking wine and chives and stir-fry for 30 seconds, then take out the winter melon and put it into a large bowl
Reserve the remaining soup in the pot, pour in water and starch, and pour the soup on the surface of the winter melon after boiling

name_en: Celery mixed with tea tree mushrooms
intro_zh:
这是一道清爽脆嫩的凉拌菜，芹菜脆嫩与茶树菇的嚼劲相得益彰，口感层次丰富。富含多种维生素和矿物质，营养又开胃。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松掌握，从备菜到完成只需约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：127 大卡
intro_en:
This is a refreshing and crisp cold dish. The crispness of celery and the chewiness of tea tree mushrooms complement each other perfectly, and the taste is rich in layers. Rich in a variety of vitamins and minerals, nutritious and appetizing. The recipe is very simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It only takes about 30 minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 127 kcal
ingredients_zh: 芹菜 250-300g（推荐 30cm 高的芹菜苗,没有芹菜苗可以用山芹或芹菜代替但是需要稍微焯水断生）
ingredients_en: Celery 250-300g (30cm tall celery seedlings are recommended. If you don’t have celery seedlings, you can use celery or celery instead but they need to be slightly blanched to cut them off)
steps_zh: （如果是芹菜苗这一步略过）用热水壶烧一壶热水,备用
新鲜的芹菜苗或者芹菜摘去黄叶清洗,备用
（如果是芹菜苗这一步略过）将芹菜摘去叶子单独放一个盆中,将芹菜茎用刀划成 2-3 毫米宽的芹菜条备用,这一步的目的是让芹菜断生的更快更均匀,吃起来更脆更爽口
芹菜苗切成 4cm 的芹菜段,备用
（如果是芹菜苗这一步略过）起锅开火,将热水壶的开水倒入锅中待水起泡沸腾
（如果是芹菜苗这一步略过）将切好的芹菜条放入锅中焯水,大约 20 秒放入芹菜叶,5 秒后关火全部捞出过凉水,备用
将盆中焯好的芹菜或者芹菜苗撒上准备好的食盐,香油,耗油和味极鲜搅拌均匀
将茶树菇倒入盆中搅拌均匀
装盘
开吃
steps_en: (If it is celery seedlings, skip this step) Use a hot water kettle to boil a pot of hot water and set aside.
Fresh celery seedlings or celery, remove the yellow leaves, wash and set aside

(If it is a celery seedling, skip this step) Remove the leaves from the celery and put it in a separate pot. Cut the celery stems into 2-3 mm wide celery strips with a knife and set aside. The purpose of this step is to make the celery break faster and more evenly, and taste crisper and more delicious.
Cut celery seedlings into 4cm celery segments and set aside
(If it is celery seedlings, skip this step) Turn on the pot and pour boiling water from the hot water kettle into the pot until the water bubbles and boils.

(If it is celery seedlings, skip this step) Put the cut celery sticks into the pot and blanch the water. Add the celery leaves for about 20 seconds. After 5 seconds, turn off the heat and drain them all into cold water. Set aside.
Sprinkle the blanched celery or celery seedlings in the basin with the prepared salt, sesame oil, oil and fresh flavor and stir evenly
Pour the tea tree mushrooms into the basin and stir evenly
Plate
Start eating

intro_zh:
一道外酥里嫩、咸香扑鼻的风味小食，有着川菜馆里常见的干香口感，咬开是玉米自带的清甜。玉米提供丰富的碳水化合物与膳食纤维，搭配芝麻还能补充优质脂肪和维生素 E。这道菜步骤略多但操作简单，需要一点耐心抖水裹粉，对新手比较友好。从解冻到出锅大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：693 大卡
intro_en:
A snack that is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with a tangy salty aroma. It has the dry aroma common in Sichuan restaurants, and when you bite it, you will feel the sweetness of corn. Corn provides rich carbohydrates and dietary fiber, and when paired with sesame seeds, it can also supplement high-quality fats and vitamin E. This dish has a few steps but is simple to operate. It requires a little patience to shake the water and coat with flour, making it more friendly to novices. It takes about 30 minutes from defrosting to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 693 kcal
ingredients_zh: 淀粉（在锅里完全能盖住玉米粒表面为准，在 40 - 70g）
ingredients_en: Starch (can completely cover the surface of corn kernels in the pot, 40-70g)
steps_zh: 玉米粒都是剥好的，直接解冻即可，温水泡 15 分钟或者灶上开水煮 5 分钟。
拿出一个簸箕，将其假设为 BoxA，垫上吸油纸，倒进解冻好的玉米粒。
shaking shaking shaking! - 直到吸油纸全部变湿为止。
拿出第二个簸箕 BoxB，垫上吸油纸，将 BoxA 的玉米粒全部倒入 BoxB 中。
shaking shaking shaking! - 直到吸油纸全部变湿为止。
重复上述操作多次，直到玉米表面没有明显可见的水滴但保持湿润的状态。
倒入大量淀粉，能够完全盖住玉米粒。
shaking shaking shaking! - 直到淀粉裹住了玉米粒
开灶 - 放锅 - 倒入油 尽量铺满锅底 但不要太多。
油热 8 成，倒入裹上了淀粉的玉米粒。
中火先煎 30s，不要翻炒，不然淀粉会掉。
轻微翻炒 3 分钟即可出锅。
最重要的一步：撒上 3g 椒盐，撒上芝麻粒！
香喷喷的”椒盐玉米“就做好了
steps_en: The corn kernels are all peeled and can be thawed directly. Soak in warm water for 15 minutes or boil in boiling water for 5 minutes.
Take out a dustpan, assume it is Box A, line it with absorbent paper, and pour in the thawed corn kernels.
shaking shaking shaking! - until the absorbent paper is all wet.
Take out the second dustpan BoxB, line it with absorbent paper, and pour all the corn kernels from BoxA into BoxB.
shaking shaking shaking! - until the absorbent paper is all wet.
Repeat the above operation several times until there are no obvious water droplets on the surface of the corn but it remains moist.
Pour in enough starch to completely cover the corn kernels.
shaking shaking shaking! - until the starch coats the corn kernels
Turn on the stove - place the pot - pour in oil and cover the bottom of the pot as much as possible but not too much.
Heat the oil to 80% and pour in the corn kernels coated with starch.
Fry over medium heat for 30 seconds. Do not stir fry, otherwise the starch will fall off.
Stir-fry lightly for 3 minutes and serve.
The most important step: Sprinkle 3g of salt and pepper and sprinkle with sesame seeds!
The fragrant "salt and pepper corn" is ready

intro_zh:
话梅煮毛豆是一道酸甜开胃的家常小菜，口感清爽软糯，带有梅子的自然果香。毛豆富含植物蛋白和膳食纤维，有助于补充能量、促进消化。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松上手，全程只需 35 到 45 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：454 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled edamame with plums is a sweet and sour home-cooked dish with a refreshing and soft texture, with the natural fruity aroma of plums. Edamame is rich in plant protein and dietary fiber, which helps replenish energy and promote digestion. The method is very simple, even for novices, and it only takes 35 to 45 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 454 kcal
steps_zh: 清水加入食用盐，毛豆浸泡 15 分钟
加入开水，倒入毛豆、话梅，水煮 20-30 分钟
起锅开吃
steps_en: Add edible salt to water and soak edamame for 15 minutes
Add boiling water, pour in edamame and plum, and cook for 20-30 minutes
Start eating
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/话梅煮毛豆/话梅煮毛豆.md

intro_zh:
莴笋叶煎饼是一道简单快手的家常小吃，口感外酥里嫩，带有莴笋叶的清香味。莴笋叶富含维生素和膳食纤维，搭配鸡蛋补充优质蛋白，营养均衡。制作过程无需复杂技巧，只需搅拌并煎制两面，新手也很容易上手，预计从备料到出锅仅需 大约 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：477 大卡
intro_en:
Lettuce leaf pancakes are a simple and quick home-cooked snack, crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with the fragrance of lettuce leaves. Lettuce leaves are rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, and paired with eggs to supplement high-quality protein, the nutrition is balanced. The preparation process does not require complicated skills, just stir and fry both sides, and it is easy for novices to use. It is expected to only take about 10 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 477 kcal
steps_zh: 莴笋叶剁碎，加入鸡蛋、生粉、生抽、鸡精搅拌均匀备用
起锅烧油，倒入莴笋叶浆汁，均匀平铺在锅面上
第一面炸 120 S 后，翻面再炸 60 S 后出锅
steps_en: Chop the lettuce leaves, add eggs, cornstarch, light soy sauce, and chicken essence, mix well and set aside.
Heat oil in a pan, pour in lettuce leaf juice, spread evenly on the surface of the pan
Fry the first side for 120 seconds, flip over and fry for another 60 seconds, then remove from the pan.
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/莴笋叶煎饼/莴笋叶煎饼.md

intro_zh:
蒜蓉空心菜是一道清脆爽口、蒜香浓郁的家常快手菜，属于典型的川式小炒风味。空心菜富含膳食纤维、维生素和钙质，有助于促进肠道蠕动。做法非常简单，对新手十分友好，从备料到出锅大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：440 大卡
intro_en:
Garlic water spinach is a crisp and refreshing home-cooked dish with rich garlic aroma, which is a typical Sichuan stir-fry flavor. Water spinach is rich in dietary fiber, vitamins and calcium, which helps promote intestinal peristalsis. The recipe is very simple and friendly to novices, and it only takes about 15 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 440 kcal
ingredients_en: Half garlic, chopped into minced garlic
steps_zh: 空心菜洗净，去掉烂叶或者老梗，均匀切成 2 段或者 3 段（防止过长不好炒）
锅里先倒少量油，烧至微微冒烟，此时拿起锅将国内的热油向四周浸润，让油均匀覆盖锅底，然后再倒入剩余的油([热锅凉油法](https://cook.aiursoft.com/tips/learn/%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E7%82%92%E4%B8%8E%E7%85%8E/?h=%E7%83%AD%E9%94%85#_5))。
放入蒜末，小火炒 10 到 15 秒煸香
尽快均匀地放入空心菜，**开大火**，左手拿铲子，右手拿筷子，配合将空心菜不停翻动，**直至软化变绿**。
接着不需使用筷子，而是使用铲子快速翻炒已软化的空心菜 15 - 20 秒，使之受热更均匀，撒入盐 2 g ，白糖 3 g，生抽 8 ml。
继续大火翻炒 10 秒，即可出锅。
steps_en: Wash water spinach, remove rotten leaves or old stems, and cut into 2 or 3 sections evenly (to prevent it from being too long for frying)

First pour a small amount of oil into the pot and heat it until it smokes slightly. At this time, pick up the pot and infiltrate the domestic hot oil around so that the oil evenly covers the bottom of the pot, and then pour in the remaining oil ([Hot pot and cold oil method](https://cook.aiursoft.com /tips/learn/%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E7%82%92%E4%B8%8E%E7%85%8E/?h=%E7%83%AD%E9%94%85#_5)).
Add minced garlic and stir-fry over low heat for 10 to 15 seconds until fragrant

Add water spinach evenly as soon as possible, **turn on high heat**, hold a shovel in your left hand and chopsticks in your right hand, and keep turning the water spinach until it softens and turns green**.

Then, instead of using chopsticks, use a spatula to quickly stir-fry the softened water spinach for 15-20 seconds to heat it more evenly. Sprinkle in 2 g of salt, 3 g of sugar, and 8 ml of light soy sauce.
Continue to stir-fry over high heat for 10 seconds, then serve.
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/蒜蓉空心菜/蒜蓉空心菜.md

intro_zh:
这道上汤娃娃菜清甜鲜美，口感软嫩，属于家常素菜，尤其适合减肥期间食用。娃娃菜富含维生素和膳食纤维，低脂低热量，搭配皮蛋和午餐肉增添风味又不会过多增加负担。制作难度适中，新手也能尝试，从备菜到出锅大约只需 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：158 大卡
intro_en:
This baby vegetable soup is sweet and delicious, with a soft and tender texture. It is a home-cooked vegetarian dish, especially suitable for consumption during weight loss. Baby cabbage is rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, low in fat and calories. It can be paired with preserved eggs and luncheon meat to add flavor without adding too much burden. The preparation is moderately difficult and can be tried by novices. It only takes about 20 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 158 kcal
ingredients_zh: 金针菇 10g（看个人喜好, 不喜欢 see you tomorrow 的就不放 😂）
皮蛋 一个（没有也可以不放）
午餐肉（火腿肠都可以替代）
ingredients_en: Enoki mushroom 10g (depends on personal preference, if you don’t like see you tomorrow, leave it out 😂)
One preserved egg (you can leave it out if you don’t have it)
Luncheon meat (ham sausage can be substituted)
steps_zh: 娃娃菜洗净, 竖着切开切成段。
葱 3g 切 小段。蒜 10g 切片。姜 10g 切小片。
皮蛋切成丁, 火腿肠或者午餐肉切成丁（1cm 大小的丁）
金针菇洗净撕开
烧热水娃娃菜放进去十秒钟出一下水捞出。
热锅凉油, 加热锅倒入油过一遍就倒出来, 重新倒入一点油。
调至小火加入葱姜蒜，煎炒出香味即可。
加入适 300g 清水（水量没过娃娃菜即可）, 放入娃娃菜, 金针菇, 午餐肉
加入调味料蚝油、糖、盐、味精烧开。
煮 3 分钟, 煮开后开始装盘, 盛出娃娃菜后皮蛋放在上面把汤汁浇上去就可以了
