steps_en: Wash the baby cabbage, cut it vertically into sections.
3g green onion, cut into small pieces. 10g garlic sliced. 10g ginger cut into small slices.
Cut preserved eggs into cubes, ham or luncheon meat into cubes (1cm in size)
Wash and tear the enoki mushrooms
Boil hot water, put the baby cabbage in and drain it out after ten seconds.
Heat the pan and cool the oil. Pour the oil into the heated pan and then pour it out. Pour in a little more oil.
Reduce the heat to low, add onion, ginger and garlic, and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add an appropriate amount of 300g of water (just enough to cover the baby cabbage), add baby cabbage, enoki mushrooms, and luncheon meat
Add seasoning oyster sauce, sugar, salt and MSG and bring to a boil.
Cook for 3 minutes. When it boils, start to put it on a plate. Put the preserved egg on top after taking out the baby cabbage and pour the soup over it.
images: dishes/vegetable_dish/上汤娃娃菜/上汤娃娃菜.png
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/上汤娃娃菜/上汤娃娃菜.md

intro_zh:
炒滑蛋是一道口感嫩滑、蛋香浓郁的经典家常菜，带有淡淡的奶香。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白质和多种维生素，营养丰富，易于吸收。做法非常友好，新手也能轻松掌握，从备料到出锅只需约 5 分钟，是忙碌时快速补充能量的理想选择。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：391 大卡
intro_en:
Fried eggs are a classic home-cooked dish with a tender texture and rich egg flavor, with a hint of milk. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins, rich in nutrients and easy to absorb. The recipe is very user-friendly and can be easily mastered by novices. It only takes about 5 minutes from preparation to serving, making it an ideal choice for quick energy replenishment when you are busy.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 391 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡蛋加入牛奶以及 5ml 食用油搅拌均匀，备用
大火烧热平底锅约 30s, 加入 5ml 食用油
烧 30s 转小火, 并且放入搅拌好的鸡蛋
在锅中静置 5 秒后，用锅铲将蛋液从边缘缓慢推向中间
翻炒至鸡蛋大致凝固后关火，装盘
steps_en: Add eggs, milk and 5ml cooking oil, mix well and set aside
Heat the pan over high heat for about 30 seconds, add 5ml cooking oil
Cook for 30 seconds, then turn to low heat and add the beaten eggs
After letting it sit in the pan for 5 seconds, use a spatula to slowly push the egg mixture from the edges to the center.
Stir-fry until the eggs are roughly set, then turn off the heat and serve on a plate

name_en: Three Fresh Mushrooms in Oyster Sauce
intro_zh:
蚝油三鲜菇是一道鲜美滑嫩的家常快手菜，菌菇吸饱蚝油酱汁，口感软滑有嚼劲，带着微微辣意，清爽不腻。富含植物蛋白、膳食纤维和多种维生素，搭配西蓝花营养均衡。制作简单，新手也能轻松掌握，从备料到出锅仅需 大约 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：222 大卡
intro_en:
Three Fresh Mushrooms in Oyster Sauce is a delicious and tender home-cooked quick-serve dish. The mushrooms absorb the oyster sauce and have a soft, chewy texture with a slight spiciness, refreshing and not greasy. Rich in plant protein, dietary fiber and multiple vitamins, it is nutritionally balanced with broccoli. It is simple to make and can be easily mastered by novices. It only takes about 15 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 222 kcal
steps_zh: 蟹味菇、白玉菇 去掉根部泥土，掰散菌朵
香菇切片（每片厚度 0.5-1 cm，厚点相对薄点更有嚼劲）
生粉倒入小碗中，加入 50ml 水，搅拌生粉直至融化没有颗粒（即水淀粉）备用
水开，放入西蓝花，清水煮 3 分钟，放入碗中备用
洗锅烧开水，加入 5 g 食用盐，倒入蟹味菇、白玉菇、香菇，水煮 1 分钟
1 分钟后，捞出沥干水分
起锅烧油，待油开始冒小泡，放入姜末、小米辣、菜椒 煸炒 30 S
倒入三鲜菇，然后依次倒入生抽、蚝油、鸡精，翻炒均匀后，倒入水淀粉
中火烧干汁，加入料酒、葱花 出锅
摆上西蓝花
steps_en: For crab-flavored mushrooms and white jade mushrooms, remove the soil from the roots and break up the mushroom buds.
Slice mushrooms (each slice is 0.5-1 cm thick, thicker ones are chewier than thinner ones)
Pour the cornstarch into a small bowl, add 50ml of water, stir the cornstarch until it melts and there are no particles (i.e. water starch) and set aside
Boil water, add broccoli, simmer for 3 minutes, put in a bowl and set aside
Wash the pot and boil water, add 5 g of edible salt, pour in the crab mushrooms, white jade mushrooms, and shiitake mushrooms, and cook for 1 minute
After 1 minute, remove and drain
Heat the oil in a pan. When the oil starts to bubble, add the minced ginger, spicy millet and green pepper and stir-fry 30 S
Pour in the three fresh mushrooms, then pour in the light soy sauce, oyster sauce, and chicken essence in sequence. Stir well and then pour in the water starch.
Boil the juice over medium heat, add cooking wine and chopped green onion and remove from the pot.
Arrange broccoli
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/蚝油三鲜菇/蚝油三鲜菇.md

intro_zh:
一道清脆爽口的家常凉拌小菜，莴笋经过腌制后格外脆嫩，带着微微辣意，十分开胃。富含维生素与膳食纤维，热量不高。做法简单，对新手很友好，从备料到上桌大约二十分钟，冰镇后风味更佳。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：295 大卡
intro_en:
A crisp and refreshing home-cooked cold side dish. The lettuce is extra crispy and tender after being pickled. It is slightly spicy and very appetizing. Rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, low in calories. The preparation is simple and friendly to novices. It takes about twenty minutes from preparation to serving. The flavor is better after being chilled.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 295 kcal
steps_zh: 莴笋削皮，切小条。萝卜切条，一起放入大碗，加入盐搅拌，放置 10 分钟
放置后的莴笋用水清洗 1-2 遍
起锅烧水，放入莴笋，水煮 1 分钟 捞出，沥干水分，放入大碗
起锅烧油，放入姜片、蒜粒、小米椒煸炒 30-45 S ，倒入莴笋中
搅拌充分，端盘
steps_en: Peel the lettuce and cut into small strips. Cut the radish into strips, put them into a large bowl, add salt, stir and let stand for 10 minutes
Wash the lettuce 1-2 times with water after placement
Boil water in a pot, add lettuce, and cook for 1 minute. Remove, drain, and put into a large bowl.
Heat oil in a pan, add sliced ginger, garlic, millet and pepper and stir-fry for 30-45 seconds, then add in lettuce
Stir thoroughly and serve

intro_zh:
手撕包菜是一道酸辣脆爽的经典湘菜，成菜包菜脆嫩入味，五花肉干香不腻，开胃下饭。包菜富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维，搭配五花肉能提供蛋白质和能量。制作时需要掌握大火快炒的火候，对新手稍有挑战，但按步骤操作也能成功。从备料到出锅大约 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1663 大卡
intro_en:
Hand-shredded cabbage is a classic Hunan dish that is spicy, sour and crispy. The cooked cabbage is crispy, tender and tasty, and the dried pork belly is fragrant and not greasy, making it an appetizing meal. Cabbage is rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, and when paired with pork belly, it provides protein and energy. When making it, you need to master the heat of high fire and stir-fry quickly. It is a little challenging for novices, but you can still succeed if you follow the steps. It takes about 20 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1663 kcal
steps_zh: 包菜对半切开，去掉中间白色部分【参见图一】
手撕包菜，碗中放入 2 g 盐，清洗包菜并沥干备用【参见图二】
姜片、蒜头、小米辣、蒜苗处理后备用【参见图三】
五花肉切片，清水清洗后备用
锅中加入 30 ml 食用油，倒入包菜翻炒，大火翻炒 1 分钟 后，加入 3 g 盐 ，继续翻炒 2 分钟 后取出备用
锅中加入 30 ml 食用油，倒入五花肉，大火翻炒 1 分钟
倒入姜片等材料，翻炒 1 分钟
倒入包菜翻炒后，加入 香醋、料酒、鸡精、料酒，大火继续翻炒，2 分钟 后出锅
steps_en: Cut the cabbage in half and remove the white part in the middle [see picture 1]
Tear the cabbage by hand, put 2 g of salt in a bowl, wash and drain the cabbage and set aside [see picture 2]
Ginger slices, garlic, spicy millet, and garlic sprouts are processed and set aside [see Figure 3]
Slice pork belly, rinse with water and set aside
Add 30 ml cooking oil to the pot, add cabbage and stir-fry over high heat for 1 minute. Add 3 g of salt and continue to stir-fry for 2 minutes. Take it out and set aside.
Add 30 ml cooking oil to the pot, add pork belly, stir-fry over high heat for 1 minute
Pour in ginger slices and other ingredients and stir-fry for 1 minute
Pour in the cabbage and stir-fry. Add balsamic vinegar, cooking wine, chicken essence, and cooking wine. Continue stir-frying over high heat and remove from the pan after 2 minutes.

intro_zh:
地三鲜是东北经典家常菜，茄子软糯、土豆绵香、尖椒清脆，酱香咸鲜十分下饭。食材搭配可提供丰富的维生素与膳食纤维，土豆还带来满足的碳水能量。这道菜需要油炸和快速翻炒，有一定技巧要求，新手需稍加练习，制作全程约需 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：264 大卡
intro_en:
Di Sanxian is a classic home-cooked dish in Northeast China. The eggplant is soft and glutinous, the potatoes are fragrant, the peppers are crisp, and the sauce is salty and delicious. It goes well with rice. The combination of ingredients can provide rich vitamins and dietary fiber, and potatoes also bring satisfying carbohydrate energy. This dish requires deep frying and quick stir-frying, which requires certain skills. Novices need a little practice. The whole process takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 264 kcal
steps_zh: 土豆、茄子、尖椒洗净。
土豆去皮。
茄子、土豆均切成 15g 的不规则的小块。
尖椒用手顺着纹路撕即可，撕成比土豆、茄子略大 25%的块。
尽可能除去青椒表面的水分，避免后续炸的时候炸水。考虑使用厨房纸或风干半小时。
葱切 0.5cm 小段，共取 5g。蒜剁碎成蒜蓉取 15g，分成两份，各 7.5g。姜切沫取 5g。
拿一个空碗，放入生抽 10ml、糖 10g、淀粉 8g，加入 80ml 清水，彻底搅拌均匀，作为调料碗，备用。
热锅，加入 150ml 油。
加入土豆，煎炸大约 3-4 分钟，以显示金黄色、筷子能轻松扎透为准。
捞出土豆，留下油。
加入茄子，煎炸大约 2-3 分钟，待其到大约 7 分熟，以茄子变软、边缘微焦且吐出多余油脂为准。
捞出茄子，留下油。（也可能没有残余的油了）
如果锅内已经没有流动的油，可以考虑补充 15ml 油。
加入尖椒块，煎炸大约 15 秒，边缘稍微起虎皮后，立刻捞出。倒出锅里的油。
重新热锅，重新加入 15ml 新底油。
放入葱 5g，姜 5g，蒜 7.5g。中小火爆香。
放入豆瓣酱 15ml。转小火，炒出红油和酱香味。
倒入调料碗。立刻转大火，高速搅拌避免糊锅！大约 10 秒后汤汁就会开始冒泡并变得黏稠。
立刻放入之前准备好的全部土豆、茄子和尖椒。
翻炒 20 秒，让浓稠的酱汁均匀挂在食材上。
关火，撒入 7.5g 蒜。翻拌均匀，盛盘。
steps_en: Wash potatoes, eggplants and peppers.
Peel the potatoes.
Cut the eggplant and potatoes into 15g irregular pieces.
Just tear the peppers along the lines with your hands, and tear them into pieces that are 25% larger than potatoes or eggplants.
Remove as much moisture from the surface of the green peppers as possible to avoid water damage during subsequent frying. Consider using kitchen paper or air drying for half an hour.
Cut green onions into 0.5cm pieces, taking a total of 5g. Chop the garlic into minced garlic, take 15g, divide it into two portions, 7.5g each. Mince ginger and take 5g.
Take an empty bowl, add 10ml of light soy sauce, 10g of sugar, 8g of starch, add 80ml of water, mix thoroughly and use as a seasoning bowl, set aside.
Heat pan and add 150ml oil.
Add potatoes and fry for about 3-4 minutes, until golden brown and can be easily pierced with chopsticks.
Remove the potatoes, leaving the oil.
Add the eggplant and fry for about 2-3 minutes, until about 7 minutes done, when the eggplant is tender, slightly charred on the edges and spitting out excess fat.
Remove the eggplant, leaving the oil. (There may be no residual oil left)
If there is no flowing oil in the pot, consider adding 15ml of oil.
Add the hot pepper cubes and fry for about 15 seconds. Remove the skin from the edges and remove immediately. Pour out the oil from the pan.
Reheat the pan and add 15ml of new base oil.
Add 5g of green onion, 5g of ginger and 7.5g of garlic. Fragrant over medium-low heat.
Add 15ml of bean paste. Turn to low heat and stir-fry until the aroma of red oil and sauce comes out.
Pour into a mixing bowl. Turn up the heat immediately and stir at high speed to avoid burning the pot! The sauce will begin to bubble and thicken in about 10 seconds.
Immediately add all the potatoes, eggplants and peppers prepared previously.
Stir-fry for 20 seconds to allow the thick sauce to coat evenly.
Turn off the heat and sprinkle in 7.5g garlic. Stir evenly and serve on a plate.

intro_zh:
这是一道利用蒸箱快速制作的嫩滑家常蛋羹，口感可调，水少则弹、水多则嫩。富含优质蛋白质和多种营养素，易于消化吸收。难度适中，新手稍加注意即可掌握，从准备到出锅大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：118 大卡
intro_en:
This is a tender homemade custard that is quickly made using a steamer. The taste can be adjusted, with less water making it more elastic and more water making it more tender. Rich in high-quality protein and various nutrients, easy to digest and absorb. It's moderately difficult and can be mastered by novices with a little attention, and it only takes about 15 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 118 kcal
ingredients_zh: 生抽 / 味极鲜 6ml（可选调味）
ingredients_en: Light soy sauce / very fresh flavor 6ml (optional seasoning)
steps_zh: 一个鸡蛋放入碗中打散
向碗中加入鸡蛋体积 1.0-1.5 倍 60 度纯净水，并且搅拌均匀
加入食用盐 1g
加入食用油 5ml
过滤蛋液，去掉蛋液中的浮沫（可选，不过滤蒸出来的蛋会有气泡导致不好看）
确认蒸箱的水源已经补充至足够（若不确定，可把水槽补满）
将已经完全搅拌均匀的鸡蛋液碗放入蒸箱
调节至**100摄氏度**蒸 **10 分钟**
打开蒸箱 （注意：蒸箱在开启时会有蒸气瞬间喷出，注意缓慢开启）
出锅（可加入生抽调味）
享用
steps_en: Beat an egg in a bowl
Add 1.0-1.5 times the volume of eggs and 60-degree purified water to the bowl, and stir evenly
Add 1g of edible salt
Add 5ml cooking oil
Filter the egg liquid to remove the scum in the egg liquid (optional, eggs steamed without filtering will have bubbles which will make them unsightly)
Make sure the water source in the steamer has been replenished (if unsure, fill up the water tank)
Place the bowl of egg liquid that has been thoroughly mixed evenly into the steamer
Adjust to **100 degrees Celsius** and steam **10 minutes**
Open the steamer (note: steam will spurt out instantly when the steamer is opened, be careful to open it slowly)
Remove from the pot (light soy sauce can be added for seasoning)
enjoy

intro_zh:
微波炉鸡蛋羹是一道简单快手的家常蒸蛋，口感嫩滑细腻，尤其适合作为夜宵或快速加餐。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白质和多种维生素，能为身体提供必要营养，虾皮还补充了钙质。这道菜对新手非常友好，无需掌握火候技巧，从打蛋调味到出炉，全程仅需约 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：160 大卡
intro_en:
Microwave egg custard is a simple and quick home-cooked steamed egg dish with a tender and smooth texture, especially suitable as a late night snack or a quick snack. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins, which can provide the body with necessary nutrients. Shopee also supplements calcium. This dish is very beginner-friendly and requires no mastery of cooking skills. The whole process from beating eggs and seasoning to taking it out of the oven only takes about 10 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 160 kcal
ingredients_zh: 虾皮 10 个 * 份数（可选）
steps_zh: 将鸡蛋打入可使用微波炉加热的陶瓷碗中，使用筷子将其打散。
加入水和盐，搅拌均匀。
将虾皮放入碗中，搅拌均匀，保证所有虾皮不会堆积在一起。
葱切碎至边长 0.6±3mm 状，放入碗中搅拌均匀。
将此碗及内容物放入微波炉中，容器表面覆盖保鲜膜或以可微波瓷盘加盖（注意：不得密封，必须留有涨缩量）加热 2 分钟(500W)。
小心地取下保鲜膜或其他覆盖物，然后继续加热 2 分钟。
若微波炉不带旋转式加热盘，将碗缓慢的水平旋转 180 度，以确保内容物加热均匀。
放入芝麻油。
小心地从微波炉中拿出碗（真的很烫）。
如果选择放入酱油，则确保酱油在鸡蛋羹表面流动后能以最薄的形式沾满鸡蛋羹表面即可。
开心的享受鸡蛋羹
steps_en: Crack the eggs into a microwave-safe ceramic bowl and use chopsticks to break them up.
Add water and salt and mix well.
Put the dried shrimps into a bowl and mix well to ensure that all the dried shrimps do not pile together.
Chop the green onion until the side length is 0.6±3mm, put it in a bowl and mix well.

Put the bowl and its contents into the microwave, cover the surface of the container with plastic wrap or cover it with a microwaveable porcelain plate (note: it must not be sealed, and expansion and contraction must be allowed) and heat for 2 minutes (500W).
Carefully remove plastic wrap or other covering and continue heating for 2 minutes.
If your microwave does not have a rotating hot plate, slowly rotate the bowl horizontally 180 degrees to ensure that the contents are heated evenly.
Add sesame oil.
Carefully remove the bowl from the microwave (it's really hot).
If you choose to add soy sauce, make sure that the soy sauce flows on the surface of the egg custard and can cover the surface of the egg custard in the thinnest form.
Enjoy egg custard happily

intro_zh:
这道菜是一道简单快手的家常蒸菜，口感嫩滑如果冻，咸鲜适口，常作为早餐或配餐出现在各地餐桌。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质和卵磷脂，易于消化吸收。对新手十分友好，只需简单几步就能蒸出平整细腻的蛋羹，全程大约需要 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：168 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is a simple and quick home-cooked steamed dish. It tastes as tender and smooth as jelly, salty and delicious. It often appears on dining tables everywhere as breakfast or as a side dish. Eggs provide high-quality protein and lecithin, which are easy to digest and absorb. It is very friendly to novices and can steam a smooth and smooth custard in just a few simple steps. The whole process takes about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 168 kcal
steps_zh: 两个鸡蛋放入碗中打散
加入食用盐 3g
加入 2ml 白醋，去除鸡蛋的腥味（可选）
向碗中加入鸡蛋体积 1-1.5 倍的 70 度纯净水，并且搅拌均匀
过滤蛋液，去掉蛋液中的浮沫（可选，不过滤蒸出来的蛋会有气泡导致不好看）
向任意一口锅中加入 50ml 清水，水烧开后，放入盛有鸡蛋液的碗
蒸煮步骤（二选一）
开**中火**蒸**10 分钟**, 10 分钟之后关火再闷上**5 分钟**。
开**大火**蒸**5 分钟**，要保持锅中水一直处于沸腾状态，否则要延长时间。每隔**2 分钟**开盖一次释放水蒸气，开盖过晚蛋羹容易变成蜂窝状；开盖太早/频繁蒸的时间需要久一些。
如何判断已经熟了？
出锅
加入香油和生抽即可享用
steps_en: Beat two eggs in a bowl
Add 3g of edible salt
Add 2ml white vinegar to remove the fishy smell of eggs (optional)
Add 70-degree purified water 1-1.5 times the volume of eggs into the bowl and stir evenly
Filter the egg liquid to remove the scum in the egg liquid (optional, eggs steamed without filtering will have bubbles which will make them unsightly)
Add 50ml of water to any pot. After the water boils, add a bowl with egg liquid.
Cooking steps (choose one of two)
Turn on **medium heat** and steam for **10 minutes**. After 10 minutes, turn off the heat and simmer for **5 minutes**.

Turn on high heat and steam for 5 minutes. Keep the water in the pot boiling, otherwise the time will be extended. Open the lid every **2 minutes** to release water vapor. If you open the lid too late, the custard will easily turn into a honeycomb shape; if you open the lid too early/steam frequently, it will take longer.
How to tell if it's done?
Take out of the pot
Add sesame oil and light soy sauce and enjoy

intro_zh:
包菜炒鸡蛋粉丝是一道咸鲜可口的家常快手菜，脆甜的包菜丝与软韧的粉丝、嫩滑的鸡蛋相互融合，口感层次丰富。包菜富含维生素和膳食纤维，鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质，胡萝卜增添营养，荤素搭配均衡。制作时需要提前浸泡粉丝，整体流程稍多但操作并不复杂，对新手有一定挑战性。从备料到出锅，大约需要 1 小时 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：570 大卡
intro_en:
Fried vermicelli with cabbage and eggs is a salty and delicious home-cooked dish. The crispy and sweet cabbage shreds are blended with the soft vermicelli and tender eggs, creating a rich texture. Cabbage is rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, eggs provide high-quality protein, carrots add nutrition, and the mix of meat and vegetables is balanced. The fans need to be soaked in advance during production. The overall process is a bit more but the operation is not complicated, making it challenging for novices. From preparation to serving, it takes about 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 570 kcal
ingredients_zh: 盐 2 g、生抽 15 ml、老抽 10 ml、蚝油 10 ml
葱 半 根、蒜瓣 2 片、干辣椒 5 根
ingredients_en: Salt, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, oyster sauce
2 g salt, 15 ml light soy sauce, 10 ml dark soy sauce, 10 ml oyster sauce
Half green onion, 2 garlic cloves, 5 dried chili peppers
steps_zh: 胡萝卜、包菜切丝备用
粉丝先用冷水浸泡 1 小时，然后将粉丝放入锅中，加入开水烧至粉丝烫软捞出备用
鸡蛋打入碗中，加入盐后搅拌 15 秒
葱、蒜、辣椒切成小粒备用
起锅烧油，倒入鸡蛋，打散炒熟盛出
再倒入油，放入葱、蒜、干辣椒翻炒 8 秒
下胡萝卜、包菜丝儿翻炒 30 秒
放入粉丝
放调料，生抽 15 ml，老抽 10 ml，蚝油 10 ml，盐 2 克
放入之前炒好的鸡蛋，翻炒约 15 秒
出锅摆盘
steps_en: Cut carrots and cabbage into shreds and set aside
Soak the vermicelli in cold water for 1 hour, then put the vermicelli into a pot, add boiling water and cook until the vermicelli is scalded and soft, take it out and set aside
Crack the eggs into a bowl, add salt and mix for 15 seconds
Chop onions, garlic, and peppers into small pieces and set aside
Heat oil in a pan, add eggs, break them up and fry until cooked.
Pour in oil, add onion, garlic and dried chili and stir-fry for 8 seconds
Add carrots and cabbage shreds and stir-fry for 30 seconds
Add fans
Add seasonings, 15 ml light soy sauce, 10 ml dark soy sauce, 10 ml oyster sauce, 2 grams salt
Add the previously scrambled eggs and stir-fry for about 15 seconds
Take out the pot and plate it
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/包菜炒鸡蛋粉丝/包菜炒鸡蛋粉丝.md

intro_zh:
烤茄子香气浓郁、外焦里嫩，孜然和蒜蓉的辛香完美融入软糯的茄肉，是街头烧烤风味在家轻松复刻的菜品。茄子富含维生素 P 和花青素，有助于保护心血管、抗氧化。做法需要用到烤箱，但步骤清晰，新手也能在大约半 小时完成，很适合作为家庭聚餐的快手下饭菜。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：145 大卡
intro_en:
The grilled eggplant is rich in aroma, charred on the outside and tender on the inside. The spices of cumin and garlic are perfectly blended into the soft and waxy eggplant meat. It is a dish that can easily recreate the street barbecue flavor at home. Eggplant is rich in vitamin P and anthocyanins, which help protect cardiovascular and antioxidant properties. The recipe requires the use of an oven, but the steps are clear and a novice can complete it in about half an hour. It is very suitable as a quick meal for family dinners.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 145 kcal
steps_zh: 将酱油、孜然、食用盐、蒜蓉和切碎的小米椒置于碗中，均匀搅拌备用
茄子洗净，用纸巾擦干表面的水分
用叉子在茄子的一侧扎 4-8 下
使用 15-25ml 的食用油涂满茄子表面
将烤箱温度设置为 200℃ （打开烤箱风扇 大火），预热 2 分钟
将茄子放入烤箱中层或者上层，烤制 12-15 分钟 （茄子表面有褶皱，且能按压 0.3-0.5cm 的深度即可）
取出茄子，用刀茄子上竖着划一个口子。口子居中，上下距 1-1.5cm
用小刀或者叉子伸入口子，竖着切割茄子内部
将口子微微掰开，倒入第一步准备的酱料
再次将茄子放入烤箱，将烤箱温度设置为 200℃ ，烤制 4-7 分钟
取出，关闭烤箱电源
steps_en: Place soy sauce, cumin, salt, minced garlic and chopped millet pepper in a bowl, stir evenly and set aside
Wash the eggplants and dry them with paper towels
Prick one side of the eggplant 4-8 times with a fork
Use 15-25ml of cooking oil to coat the surface of the eggplant
Set the oven temperature to 200°C (turn on the oven fan to high heat) and preheat for 2 minutes
Place the eggplant in the middle or upper rack of the oven and bake for 12-15 minutes (the surface of the eggplant should be wrinkled and can be pressed to a depth of 0.3-0.5cm)
Take out the eggplant and make a vertical slit on the eggplant with a knife. The opening is in the center, with a distance of 1-1.5cm from top to bottom.
Use a knife or fork to insert into the mouth and cut the inside of the eggplant vertically.
Open the mouth slightly and pour in the sauce prepared in the first step
Place the eggplant in the oven again, set the oven temperature to 200°C, and bake for 4-7 minutes
Remove and turn off the oven power

intro_zh:
小炒藕丁是一道快手家常素菜，藕丁脆嫩爽口，咸鲜中带着微微辣意，非常下饭。莲藕富含膳食纤维和维生素，有助于清热润燥。制作简单，只要注意藕丁焯水和调味，厨房新手也能轻松完成。全程大约 20 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：214 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried diced lotus root is a quick home-cooked vegetarian dish. The diced lotus root is crispy, tender and refreshing, salty and slightly spicy, and goes very well with rice. Lotus root is rich in dietary fiber and vitamins, which helps clear away heat and moisturizes dryness. It is simple to make, as long as you pay attention to blanching the lotus roots and seasoning, even a novice in the kitchen can complete it easily. It’s on the table in about 20 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 214 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小米辣 1-2 根 （看个人吃辣程度）
ingredients_en: 1-2 spicy millet sticks (depending on how spicy you like it)
steps_zh: 大葱、小米辣切小段，备用
莲藕去皮，切成不超过 3cm 的小块，放入水中备用（防止氧化发黑）
取炒锅，锅内放入 500ml 凉水，煮沸
将藕丁下入沸水中，焯水 2 分钟后，取出放入盘中备用
将锅中水倒掉后，将锅加热干燥，加入 10-15 ml 食用油
待油温升高后，下入葱花，小米辣爆香
将处理好的藕丁下入锅中，大火翻炒
加入生抽、老抽、耗油
翻炒 2 分钟即可出锅
steps_en: Cut green onions and millet into small pieces and set aside
Peel the lotus root, cut into small pieces no larger than 3cm, put in water and set aside (to prevent oxidation and blackening)
Take a wok, put 500ml cold water in the pot, and bring to a boil
Add the diced lotus root into the boiling water, blanch it for 2 minutes, take it out and put it on a plate for later use.
After draining the water from the pot, heat the pot to dry and add 10-15 ml cooking oil.
After the oil temperature rises, add chopped green onion and millet and stir-fry until fragrant
Add the processed lotus root cubes into the pot and stir-fry over high heat
Add light soy sauce, dark soy sauce and oil consumption
Stir fry for 2 minutes and serve

intro_zh:
虎皮青椒是一道家常小菜，外皮微焦起皱，口感软嫩带脆，咸鲜中透着酸甜，十分开胃下饭。青椒富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维，有助于增强免疫力、促进消化。制作过程简单明了，只需掌握按压和火候，对新手也比较友好，一般约 15 分钟就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：341 大卡
intro_en:
Tiger-skinned green pepper is a home-cooked side dish, with slightly charred and wrinkled skin, soft and crispy texture, salty and sweet, and very appetizing. Green peppers are rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, which help strengthen immunity and improve digestion. The production process is simple and straightforward. You only need to master the pressing and heat. It is also friendly to novices and can usually be completed in about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 341 kcal
ingredients_zh: 砵或者有一定深度的碗
青椒 5 个，长度在 10-15cm 的最为合适
ingredients_en: A pot or a bowl with a certain depth
5 green peppers, 10-15cm in length is most suitable
steps_zh: 去掉青椒蒂，用自来水冲洗干净。
青椒切长片，平均一个青椒纵向切成 3-4 片即可。
大蒜去皮，切成碎末，体积在 2mm x 2mm x 2mm 即可。
`调料 1`：拿一个小碗倒入 20ml 油，将大蒜末放入其中。
`调料 2`：白糖、生抽、醋、盐全部倒入砵（碗）等容器，搅拌。
将 `调料 1` 倒入锅中，开火加热 5 成放入青椒，青椒片不要叠在一起，单独成片放置锅中。
用锅铲不停的按压青椒，合适的时候翻面。
翻炒约 2 分钟，待青椒表皮出现褶皱时，倒入 `调料 2`。
加大火候继续翻炒 30s 后即可出锅盛入盘中。
steps_en: Remove the stems of the green peppers and rinse them with tap water.
Cut the green pepper into long slices. On average, cut one green pepper into 3-4 slices lengthwise.
Peel the garlic and chop into fine pieces, with a volume of 2mm x 2mm x 2mm.
`Seasoning 1`: Take a small bowl, pour 20ml of oil, and put the minced garlic into it.
`Seasoning 2`: Pour all the sugar, light soy sauce, vinegar and salt into a bowl (bowl) and stir.
Pour `Seasoning 1` into the pot, heat for 50% and add green peppers. Do not stack the green pepper slices, place them in separate slices in the pot.
Use a spatula to keep pressing the green peppers, turning them over when appropriate.
Stir-fry for about 2 minutes. When the skin of the green pepper becomes wrinkled, add `Seasoning 2`.
Increase the heat and continue to stir-fry for 30 seconds, then remove from the pan and transfer to a plate.

intro_zh:
菠菜炒鸡蛋是一道清淡爽口的家常快手菜，菠菜软嫩、鸡蛋鲜香，属于南北皆宜的大众风味。菠菜富含铁、叶酸和维生素，鸡蛋提供优质蛋白与卵磷脂，搭配食用有助于补血养气、增强体质。整道菜操作简单，非常适合烹饪新手，从备料到出锅大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：350 大卡
intro_en:
Scrambled eggs with spinach is a light and refreshing home-cooked dish. The spinach is soft and tender and the eggs are fragrant. It is a popular flavor suitable for both north and south. Spinach is rich in iron, folic acid and vitamins, and eggs provide high-quality protein and lecithin. Eating them together can help replenish blood, nourish qi, and enhance physical fitness. The entire dish is simple to make and perfect for novice cooks, taking only about 15 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 350 kcal
steps_zh: 菠菜去根，洗净，放在篮子里，焯水
将鸡蛋打入碗中，搅匀
热锅，加入 10ml 油
油热后，倒入鸡蛋液，中火翻炒 15 秒，先煎成蛋饼，然后再用锅铲切成小块
关火，将鸡蛋块 盛到盘子中，不要洗锅
重新开火，倒入 5ml 油，油热后，放入菠菜，大火 翻炒 15 秒后，倒入鸡蛋块，翻炒均匀
加入 5g 盐、100ml 饮用水，大火 翻炒 10 秒
关火，盛盘
steps_en: Remove the roots from spinach, wash it, put it in a basket and blanch it
Crack the eggs into a bowl and mix well
Heat the pan and add 10ml oil
After the oil is hot, pour in the egg liquid, stir-fry for 15 seconds over medium heat, first fry into egg cakes, and then cut into small pieces with a spatula.
Turn off the heat, put the egg cubes on a plate, do not wash the pot
Turn the heat back on and pour in 5ml of oil. When the oil is hot, add the spinach and stir-fry over high heat for 15 seconds. Add the egg cubes and stir-fry evenly.
Add 5g salt and 100ml drinking water, stir-fry over high heat for 10 seconds
Turn off the heat and serve
images: dishes/vegetable_dish/菠菜炒鸡蛋/菠菜炒鸡蛋.jpg
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/菠菜炒鸡蛋/菠菜炒鸡蛋.md

name_en: Green beans with minced pork and olives
intro_zh:
榄菜肉末四季豆是潮汕风味浓厚的家常小炒，口感咸香脆嫩，十分下饭。四季豆富含膳食纤维与维生素，搭配肉末能提供优质蛋白，橄榄菜则带来独特的鲜咸风味。这道菜步骤清晰，新手也能较快上手，只需注意将四季豆彻底炒熟。从备料到出锅，大约三十分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：720 大卡
intro_en:
Green beans with minced pork and olives is a home-style stir-fry with strong Chaoshan flavor. It tastes salty, crispy and tender, and goes well with rice. Green beans are rich in dietary fiber and vitamins. When paired with minced meat, they can provide high-quality protein, while olives bring a unique salty flavor. The steps of this recipe are clear, and novices can get started quickly. Just pay attention to frying the green beans thoroughly. From preparation to serving, it takes about thirty minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 720 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小米辣（不吃辣可以不放）
ingredients_en: Spicy millet (you can leave it out if you don’t like spicy food)
steps_zh: 将四季豆洗净，并把筋撕干净，然后切成大小均匀的颗粒备用。
将大蒜拍碎剁成蒜末备用。
将小米辣切成大小均匀的颗粒备用。
将五花肉去皮，然后剁成肉末备用。
将锅烧热，然后加入 20ml 油滑锅，锅滑好之后将热油倒出，然后加入 10ml 冷油，这就是传说中热锅冷油，这么做主要是防止肉末粘锅。
如果家里没有晾油瓶的话，也可以不用滑锅，放入油之后，直接加入肉末开始煸炒，小火煸炒两分钟，炒出猪油。
肉末炒香之后加入蒜末，橄榄菜和小米辣，炒出香味。
加入四季豆开中火煸炒，四季豆至少要炒 5 分钟，一定要保证四季豆**熟透**，否则可能会食物中毒。
四季豆炒熟后加入 2ml 酱油从锅边淋入，然后加入 2g 盐、1g 鸡精、1g 胡椒粉和 0.5g 糖。
将调料翻炒均匀。
出锅，装盘。
steps_en: Wash the green beans and tear off the tendons, then cut them into evenly sized pieces and set aside.
Crush the garlic and chop into minced garlic. Set aside.
Cut the spicy millet into evenly sized particles and set aside.
Peel the pork belly and chop into mince. Set aside.

Heat the pan, then add 20ml of oil to the pan. After the pan is smooth, pour out the hot oil, and then add 10ml of cold oil. This is the legendary hot pan and cold oil. This is mainly to prevent the minced meat from sticking to the pan.

If you don’t have an oil bottle at home, you don’t need to use a sliding pan. After adding the oil, directly add the minced meat and start stir-frying. Stir-fry over low heat for two minutes until the lard comes out.
After the minced meat is sautéed, add minced garlic, olives and millet and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the green beans and stir-fry over medium heat. Stir-fry the green beans for at least 5 minutes. Make sure the green beans are **cooked**, otherwise you may get food poisoning.
After the green beans are fried, add 2ml of soy sauce and pour it from the side of the pot, then add 2g of salt, 1g of chicken essence, 1g of pepper and 0.5g of sugar.
Stir the seasonings evenly.
Remove from pan and plate.
images: dishes/vegetable_dish/榄菜肉末四季豆/榄菜肉末四季豆.JPG
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/榄菜肉末四季豆/榄菜肉末四季豆.md

intro_zh:
这道经典粤菜采用白灼技法，沸水快焯保留菜心的清甜与脆嫩，根茎尤为爽口，味道清淡鲜美。富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维，低脂低热量，适合追求健康饮食的人群。做法非常简单，预估难度仅两星，一般初学者只需 15 分钟即可完成，是快速补充绿叶蔬菜的理想选择。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：86 大卡
intro_en:
This classic Cantonese dish uses the blanching technique, where it is quickly blanched in boiling water to retain the sweetness, crispness and tenderness of the cabbage heart. The rhizome is particularly refreshing and has a light and delicious taste. Rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, low in fat and calories, it is suitable for people who pursue a healthy diet. The preparation is very simple, with an estimated difficulty of only two stars. It only takes 15 minutes for beginners to complete it, making it an ideal choice for quickly replenishing green leafy vegetables.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 86 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大蒜四五瓣、小米辣一两根
ingredients_en: Light soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt
Four or five cloves of garlic, one or two sprigs of chili millet
steps_zh: 菜心洗净，**去除根部比较硬或老的地方**。此处还用刀刮了**刮菜心根茎部分**，刮掉外面那层比较硬的，菜心内部更可口，但要注意根茎白灼时长，时间太长的话根茎不脆了
大蒜切成蒜末，有洋葱顺便加了点洋葱
调制灵魂料汁：生抽 5g 吧、蚝油 5g，加 3g 糖和 100g 清水半碗成一碗汁儿
一锅 500ml 清水加 5g 盐和 10g 食用油烧开
将菜心根茎在沸水中烫 1 分钟，直到根茎颜色变成深绿。再将整个菜心放到锅中烫熟 1 分钟，捞起来码入盘中
开另一小锅将兑好的料汁倒入，小火烧开，放入一半的蒜末，一点点姜丝和小米椒碎。在制作时加了一点点洋葱碎和大蒜，先在锅底倒油，五成热后倒入蒜末、洋葱，稍稍爆香后再加入料汁，加入小米辣煮开
料汁稍微收汁，煮沸后稍等十来秒吧，后直接浇在菜心上，不要特别多，但蒜末还是很给力的不要少蒜
steps_en: Wash the cabbage, **remove the hard or old parts of the roots**. Here I also use a knife to scrape the rhizome part of the cabbage. Scrape off the harder outer layer. The inside of the cabbage will be more delicious. However, you should pay attention to how long it takes to boil the rhizome. If the time is too long, the rhizome will not be crispy.
Chop the garlic into mince and add some onions if you have them.
Prepare soul sauce: 5g light soy sauce, 5g oyster sauce, add 3g sugar and 100g water to make half a bowl of juice.
Bring a pot of 500ml water, 5g salt and 10g cooking oil to a boil

Blanch the cabbage rhizomes in boiling water for 1 minute, until the rhizomes turn dark green in color. Then put the whole choy sum into the pot and blanch for 1 minute, then scoop it out and put it on a plate

Open another small pot, pour the mixed sauce, bring to a boil over low heat, add half of the minced garlic, a little shredded ginger and crushed millet and pepper. When making, add a little bit of chopped onion and garlic. First pour oil in the bottom of the pot. After it is 50% hot, pour in the minced garlic and onion. Saute for a while before adding the sauce. Add the millet and cook.

The sauce is slightly reduced, wait for about ten seconds after boiling, and then pour it directly on the cabbage. Don't use too much, but the minced garlic is still very powerful. Don't skip the garlic.

intro_zh:
这是一道适合夏季的家常凉菜，酸甜爽口，制作简便。西红柿富含维生素 C，开胃解腻。新手也能轻松完成，整个过程（包含冷藏）约 15 分钟即可上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：104 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked cold dish suitable for summer, sweet and sour, refreshing and easy to make. Tomatoes are rich in vitamin C, which is appetizing and relieves fatigue. It's easy for novices to make, and the entire process (including refrigeration) takes about 15 minutes to serve.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 104 kcal
ingredients_zh: 西红柿 2 个（每个西红柿约 100g，共 200g）
steps_zh: 用刀将西红柿皮米字型划开
用筷子插入西红柿的菊花，在燃气上转动烤 10 秒（或用开水冲 30 秒），直到西红柿皮卷边
把西红柿的衣服脱光
再西红柿大卸八块（沿纹路切可以更多的留汁水），去掉头部根蒂部，备用
全部切好后，将西红柿在盘子中均匀码一层
撒上白糖，重复上面一步直到全部西红柿放完
放入冰箱冷藏 10 分钟
一盘糖拌西红柿就好了，营养美味，酸甜爽口，夏日解暑又解腻
steps_en: Use a knife to cut the tomatoes into skin-like shapes
Insert the chrysanthemums of the tomatoes with chopsticks, turn and grill on the gas for 10 seconds (or rinse with boiling water for 30 seconds) until the skin of the tomatoes curls up
Take off the tomatoes' clothes
Cut the tomatoes into eight pieces (cut along the grain to retain more juice), remove the head and base, and set aside
After all the tomatoes are cut, arrange the tomatoes in an even layer on the plate.
Sprinkle with sugar and repeat the above step until all the tomatoes are gone
Chill in refrigerator for 10 minutes
A plate of tomatoes mixed with sugar is enough. It is nutritious and delicious, sweet and sour, and can relieve summer heat and fatigue.
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/糖拌西红柿/糖拌西红柿.md

intro_zh:
洋葱炒鸡蛋是一道咸香适口、葱香浓郁的家常菜肴，鸡蛋嫩滑，洋葱清甜，属于国民下饭菜。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白质和多种维生素，洋葱含有膳食纤维和抗氧化物质，是一道营养均衡的快手菜。这道菜操作极其简单，对新手非常友好，从备料到出锅只需约 5 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：562 大卡
intro_en:
Fried eggs with onions is a home-cooked dish that is salty and delicious, with a rich onion aroma. The eggs are tender and the onions are sweet. It is a national meal. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins, and onions contain dietary fiber and antioxidants. They are a nutritionally balanced quick dish. This recipe is extremely simple and beginner-friendly, taking only about 5 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 562 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡蛋打入大碗中，加入洋葱片、盐后搅拌 60 S
起锅烧油，倒入鸡蛋，一面煎炸 30-45 S ，翻面继续翻炒，反复 2-3 分钟 后散上料酒出锅
鸡蛋装盘，散上葱花
steps_en: Crack the eggs into a large bowl, add onion slices and salt and stir 60 S
Heat oil in a pan, pour in eggs, fry for 30-45 seconds on one side, turn over and continue to stir-fry, repeat for 2-3 minutes, then sprinkle with cooking wine and serve
Plate the eggs and sprinkle with chopped green onion
file_path: dishes/vegetable_dish/洋葱炒鸡蛋/洋葱炒鸡蛋.md

intro_zh:
这是一道印度风味的发酵烤饼，外表微焦酥脆，内部松软有嚼劲，是咖喱的绝佳搭档。富含碳水化合物和蛋白质，酸奶的加入也让面饼更易消化。制作稍有难度，需注意面团软硬和火候，但平底锅即可操作，提前 1 小时发酵，总耗时约 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：559 大卡
intro_en:
This Indian-style fermented naan is lightly charred and crispy on the outside and soft and chewy on the inside, making it a perfect accompaniment to curry. Rich in carbohydrates and protein, the addition of yogurt also makes the bread easier to digest. It is a little difficult to make, and you need to pay attention to the softness and hardness of the dough and the heat, but it can be operated in a pan. It is fermented 1 hour in advance and takes about 1.5 hours in total.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 559 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大蒜（蒜蓉烤饼版本，可选）
平底锅（不粘锅或铸铁锅）
大蒜 3 瓣（约 9g），切碎（蒜蓉版本可选）
ingredients_en: 3 cloves of garlic (about 9g), minced (minced garlic version is optional)
steps_zh: 将干酵母 3g 和糖 10g 溶解在 100ml 温水中（水温约 40°C，不可过烫）
静置 **5 分钟**，直至*表面冒出细泡沫*（说明酵母已激活）
在大碗中放入中筋面粉 300g 和盐 5g，混合均匀
倒入酵母水、酸奶 60ml 和食用油 15ml
用手揉成*光滑柔软*的面团（面团应比普通面团稍软，微微粘手是正常的）
在面团表面涂 3ml 油防止干裂
用湿布或保鲜膜盖住碗口
放置在温暖处发酵 **至少 1 小时**，直至*面团膨胀至约两倍大*
将发酵好的面团取出，轻揉排气
分成 6 个等大的小剂子（每个约 80g）
取一个剂子，手上沾 3ml 面粉或油
用擀面杖擀成长椭圆形或泪滴形面饼，厚度约 4-5mm
如果制作蒜蓉烤饼：在面饼表面撒上切碎的大蒜和香菜叶，轻轻擀压使其嵌入面饼
可在面饼表面撒上芝麻
将平底锅（铸铁锅最佳）大火加热至*非常烫*（滴水立即蒸发的程度）
在面饼一面刷一层薄薄的水
将刷水一面朝下放入锅中
烤 **1-2 分钟**，直至*底面出现金棕色斑点且面饼开始鼓泡*
翻面，继续烤 **1-2 分钟**
如果有煤气灶：翻面后可用夹子夹起面饼，将其直接放在明火上烤 **数秒钟**，面饼会迅速鼓起
取出后立即在表面涂上酥油或黄油
烤箱预热至最高温度（通常 250°C）
将面饼放在烤盘上
烤 **3-5 分钟**，直至*表面金黄且鼓起*
取出后涂上酥油或黄油
趁热食用
适合搭配任何印度咖喱，如黄油鸡、红芸豆咖喱等
steps_en: Dissolve 3g dry yeast and 10g sugar in 100ml warm water (the water temperature is about 40°C, not too hot)
Let it sit for **5 minutes** until fine foam* appears on the surface* (indicating that the yeast has been activated)
Put 300g all-purpose flour and 5g salt in a large bowl and mix evenly
Pour in yeast water, 60ml yogurt and 15ml cooking oil
Knead it with your hands into a *smooth and soft* dough (the dough should be slightly softer than normal dough, a slight stickiness is normal)
Knead the dough **8-10 minutes**
Apply 3ml of oil on the surface of the dough to prevent it from drying out
Cover the bowl with a damp cloth or plastic wrap
Leave to rise in a warm place for **at least 1 hour** until the dough has doubled in size*
Take out the fermented dough and knead it gently to deflate the dough.
Divide into 6 equal-sized portions (about 80g each)
Take a potion and dip your hand in 3ml of flour or oil
Use a rolling pin to roll the dough into a long oval or teardrop shape, about 4-5mm thick.
If making garlic naan: Sprinkle minced garlic and coriander leaves over the surface of the dough and gently roll it into the dough to embed it.
Sprinkle sesame seeds on the surface of the dough
Heat a pan (cast iron is best) over high heat until it is *very hot* (to the point where dripping water evaporates immediately)
Brush one side of the dough with a thin layer of water
Put the water side down into the pot
Bake for **1-2 minutes** until golden brown spots appear on the bottom and the pastry begins to bubble*
Flip and continue grilling for **1-2 minutes**
If you have a gas stove: After turning over, use tongs to pick up the dough and place it directly on the open flame to bake for **a few seconds** and the dough will puff up quickly.
Immediately after taking it out, apply ghee or butter on the surface
Preheat the oven to maximum temperature (usually 250°C)
Place the dough on the baking sheet
Bake for **3-5 minutes** until *golden and puffy*
Take it out and apply ghee or butter on it
Serve hot
Pairs well with any Indian curry such as butter chicken, red kidney bean curry, etc.

intro_zh:
麻辣汤底融合了火锅底料与花生酱、牛奶，口感浓郁顺滑，带有鲜明麻辣风味。搭配高纤维荞麦面与新鲜蔬菜，低卡饱腹，适合减脂期享用。做法毫无难度，无需厨艺基础，全程约 20 分钟即可端锅开吃。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：790 大卡
intro_en:
The spicy soup base combines hot pot base ingredients with peanut butter and milk. It has a rich and smooth taste with a distinct spicy flavor. Paired with high-fiber soba noodles and fresh vegetables, it is low in calories and filling, and is suitable for enjoying during the fat loss period. It’s easy to make and requires no cooking skills. The whole process takes about 20 minutes and you can start eating.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 790 kcal
ingredients_zh: 调味料：火锅底料、花生酱、全脂牛奶、生抽、辣椒油、醋、花椒油
原料：半干荞麦面、娃娃菜、生菜
洗菜盆、直径 18cm 的小锅
ingredients_en: Seasonings: hot pot base, peanut butter, whole milk, light soy sauce, chili oil, vinegar, pepper oil
Ingredients: Semi-dry soba noodles, baby cabbage, lettuce
8 slices of baby cabbage (150g in total)
steps_zh: 娃娃菜、生菜洗好，备用
锅内倒入 500ml 水，开大火，将荞麦面和娃娃菜放进去，等待水沸腾
水沸腾后，转小火，加入火锅底料、花生酱、牛奶、生抽、辣椒油，水开后煮 5 分钟
加入生菜，再煮 2 分钟
加入醋、花椒油，关火，直接端着小锅开吃。
steps_en: Wash the baby cabbage and lettuce and set aside
Pour 500ml of water into the pot, turn on high heat, put the soba noodles and baby cabbage in, wait for the water to boil
After the water boils, turn to low heat, add hot pot base ingredients, peanut butter, milk, light soy sauce, and chili oil, and cook for 5 minutes after the water boils
Add lettuce and cook for 2 minutes more
Add vinegar and pepper oil, turn off the heat, and start eating directly in the small pot.

intro_zh:
鹰嘴豆咖喱配油炸面饼是北印度经典街头小吃，松软的炸饼搭配香料浓郁的鹰嘴豆，口感层次丰富，酸辣咸香。鹰嘴豆富含植物蛋白和膳食纤维，饱腹又营养。制作步骤稍多，但跟着流程走并不难，适合有一定基础的家常烹饪。约 50 分钟即可完成（鹰嘴豆需提前浸泡 8 小时）。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1098 大卡
intro_en:
Chickpea curry with fried flatbread is a classic street snack in North India. The soft fried flatbread is paired with richly spiced chickpeas. It has a rich texture, sour, spicy and salty. Chickpeas are rich in plant protein and dietary fiber, filling and nutritious. There are a little more steps to make, but it is not difficult to follow the process. It is suitable for home cooking with a certain foundation. It’s ready in about 50 minutes (chickpeas need to be soaked 8 hours in advance).
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1098 kcal
ingredients_zh: 红茶包（用于鹰嘴豆上色）
石榴粉(Amchur/Anardana)— 可用柠檬汁替代
干鹰嘴豆 200g（提前浸泡 8 小时）
ingredients_en: Black tea bags (for coloring the chickpeas)
Pomegranate powder (Amchur/Anardana) – can be substituted with lemon juice
200g dried chickpeas (soaked for 8 hours in advance)
steps_zh: 将干鹰嘴豆用清水浸泡过夜（至少 8 小时），浸泡后体积会膨胀至约两倍
将浸泡好的鹰嘴豆沥干水分
放入锅中，加入 500ml 水和 1 个红茶包（用于上色）
大火煮沸后转中火，**煮 25-30 分钟**，直至*鹰嘴豆用手指可以轻松压碎*
取出红茶包，保留煮豆的汤水，备用
在炒锅中倒入 30ml 食用油，中火加热
放入切碎的洋葱，翻炒至*金棕色*（约 6-8 分钟）
加入磨碎的生姜和大蒜，翻炒 1 分钟
加入切碎的番茄，翻炒至*番茄完全软烂出油*（约 5 分钟）
加入姜黄粉 3g、红辣椒粉 5g、香菜粉 8g、孜然粉 5g、盐 6g
翻炒 2 分钟，使香料充分释放香味
将煮好的鹰嘴豆连同汤水一起倒入锅中
加入青辣椒，搅拌均匀
大火煮沸后转小火，**炖 15-20 分钟**，期间可用铲子背面压碎一些鹰嘴豆使汤汁变稠
加入印度综合香料粉 5g 和石榴粉 3g（或柠檬汁 15ml）
搅拌均匀后关火，备用
在大碗中混合中筋面粉 250g、小苏打 2g、盐 3g
加入酸奶 60ml 和食用油 15ml
逐渐加入温水，边加边揉，揉成*光滑柔软*的面团（面团应比普通面团稍软）
用湿布盖住面团，静置 **30 分钟**
将面团分成 8 个等大的小剂子
取一个剂子，手上沾少量油，擀成直径约 15cm、厚度约 3mm 的圆形面饼
在深锅中倒入 500ml 食用油，中大火加热至油温约 180°C
将面饼轻轻滑入热油中，用漏勺轻轻按压面饼使其*膨胀鼓起*
**炸 1-2 分钟**，翻面炸至*两面金黄*
捞出，用厨房纸吸去多余油分
将鹰嘴豆咖喱重新加热
炸饼趁热上桌，搭配鹰嘴豆咖喱食用
可搭配切片洋葱、青辣椒和柠檬角
steps_en: Soak dried chickpeas in water overnight (at least 8 hours). They will swell to about double in size after soaking.
Drain soaked chickpeas
Place in a pot, add 500ml water and 1 black tea bag (for coloring)
Bring to a boil, then reduce to medium heat and **cook for 25-30 minutes** until *the chickpeas can be easily crushed with your fingers*
Remove the black tea bag and keep the bean soup for later use
Pour 30ml cooking oil into the wok and heat over medium heat
Add the chopped onions and stir-fry until *golden brown* (about 6-8 minutes)
Add grated ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add chopped tomatoes and stir-fry until tomatoes are completely soft and oily* (about 5 minutes)
Add 3g turmeric powder, 5g red chili powder, 8g coriander powder, 5g cumin powder, 6g salt
Stir-fry for 2 minutes to release the aroma of the spices
Pour the cooked chickpeas into the pot along with the soup water
Add green chilies and mix well
Bring to a boil, then reduce to low heat and **simmer for 15-20 minutes**. During this period, you can crush some chickpeas with the back of a spatula to thicken the soup.
Add 5g Indian mixed spice powder and 3g pomegranate powder (or 15ml lemon juice)
Stir evenly and then turn off the heat and set aside
Mix 250g all-purpose flour, 2g baking soda, and 3g salt in a large bowl
Add 60ml of yogurt and 15ml of cooking oil
Gradually add warm water and knead as you add to form a *smooth and soft* dough (the dough should be slightly softer than regular dough)
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let rest **30 minutes**
Divide the dough into 8 equal-sized portions
Take a dough, dip your hands in a little oil, and roll it into a round dough ball about 15cm in diameter and 3mm thick.
Pour 500ml cooking oil into a deep pot and heat over medium-high heat until the oil temperature is about 180°C
Gently slide the pastry into the hot oil and use a slotted spoon to gently press the pastry to *puff up*
**Fry for 1-2 minutes**, flip and fry until *both sides are golden brown*
Take it out and use kitchen paper to absorb excess oil.
Reheat Chickpea Curry
Serve the fritters hot with chickpea curry
Serve with sliced onions, green chilies and lemon wedges

intro_zh:
以嫩滑蛋皮包裹茄汁炒饭，口感丰富，酸甜开胃，是一道经典的日式家庭料理。富含蛋白质、碳水和多种维生素，营养均衡。包裹蛋皮需要一点技巧，但整体难度适中，新手也可尝试，从准备到完成约需 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：695 大卡
intro_en:
Fried rice with tomato sauce wrapped in tender egg skin is rich in taste, sweet and sour and appetizing. It is a classic Japanese home dish. Rich in protein, carbohydrates and multiple vitamins, nutritionally balanced. Wrapping the egg skin requires a little skill, but the overall difficulty is moderate and can be tried by novices. It takes about 25 minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 695 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡蛋（建议使用土鸡蛋，口感更香）
食用油（建议使用植物油）
ingredients_en: Eggs (it is recommended to use free-range eggs for a more fragrant taste)
Milk (optional, to make the egg skin more tender)
Corn kernels and green beans total 30g
steps_zh: 洋葱、胡萝卜、火腿肠或鸡胸肉切成小丁，备用
热锅，锅中倒入 10ml 食用油，等待 10 秒加热
先放入洋葱丁翻炒 1 分钟，出香味后加入胡萝卜、玉米粒、青豆继续翻炒 2 分钟
加入火腿肠或鸡胸肉丁，炒至变色
加入米饭炒散后，加入番茄酱 20ml，翻炒均匀，炒饭完成，盛出备用
鸡蛋打散，加入 10ml 牛奶搅匀
锅中放入 5ml 食用油，倒入蛋液，轻晃锅底让蛋液均匀铺满锅面
用小火加热，待蛋液表面半熟状态时，将炒饭放入蛋液中央
用铲子将蛋皮折叠包住米饭，形成椭圆形状
用锅铲轻轻推至盘中，整理外形，可在表面挤上少量番茄酱装饰
steps_en: Cut onions, carrots, ham or chicken breast into small cubes and set aside
Heat the pot, pour 10ml cooking oil into the pot, wait 10 seconds to heat
First add the diced onions and stir-fry for 1 minute. When fragrant, add the carrots, corn kernels and green beans and continue to stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add ham or chicken breast cubes and stir-fry until color changes
Add rice and stir-fry, add 20ml of tomato sauce, stir-fry evenly, the fried rice is done, take it out and set aside
Beat the eggs, add 10ml of milk and mix well
Put 5ml of cooking oil in the pot, pour in the egg liquid, and gently shake the bottom of the pot to evenly cover the surface of the pot with the egg liquid.
Heat over low heat. When the surface of the egg liquid is half cooked, put the fried rice into the center of the egg liquid.
Use a spatula to fold the egg skin around the rice to form an oval shape
Use a spatula to gently push it onto the plate, arrange the shape, and squeeze a small amount of tomato sauce on the surface for decoration.

intro_zh:
这道菜以可乐替代糖调味，带来独特的焦香微甜风味，酱汁浓郁包裹粒粒米饭，属于创意家常炒饭。鸡蛋和火腿肠提供优质蛋白质与能量，搭配主食米饭，营养均衡管饱。操作步骤直观，适合新手尝试，一般 大约 20 分钟便可端上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：913 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is seasoned with cola instead of sugar, bringing a unique caramel and slightly sweet flavor. The rich sauce coats the grains of rice. It is a creative home-style fried rice. Eggs and ham provide high-quality protein and energy, and paired with the staple food of rice, it is nutritionally balanced and filling. The steps are intuitive and suitable for novices to try. It usually takes about 20 minutes to serve.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 913 kcal
ingredients_zh: 胡椒粉（白胡椒、黑胡椒均可）
老抽 7.5 ml（如果使用无糖可乐，追加 5 ml，如果不使用豆瓣酱，追加 5 ml）
ingredients_en: Pepper (white pepper or black pepper can be used)
Dark soy sauce 7.5 ml (if using sugar-free cola, add 5 ml; if not using doubanjiang, add 5 ml)
steps_zh: 将锅烧热后，加入 25 ml 油，放两个鸡蛋，煎至底部完全凝固
翻面，煎至两面完全凝固
关火，将鸡蛋取出，剪成 2-5 cm² 的小块后放回锅中（也可以直接用锅铲铲碎）
重新开火，倒入可乐、生抽、老抽、豆瓣酱、蚝油，搅拌均匀
加热到锅内液体剩 1/3，倒入米饭和火腿肠翻炒
翻炒均匀后，改小火，锅内食物中心挖一个洞，打入 1 个鸡蛋，盖上锅盖，焖 2 分钟
开盖翻炒至第三颗鸡蛋熟透，撒上葱花和胡椒粉，出锅
steps_en: After the pan is heated, add 25 ml of oil, add two eggs, and fry until the bottom is completely solid.
Flip and fry until both sides are completely set
Turn off the heat, take out the eggs, cut them into 2-5 cm² pieces and put them back into the pot (you can also use a spatula to smash them directly)
Turn the heat back on, add cola, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, bean paste, and oyster sauce, and stir evenly
Heat until 1/3 of the liquid is left in the pot, add rice and ham and stir-fry
After stir-frying evenly, reduce the heat to low, make a hole in the center of the pot, crack in 1 egg, cover the pot and simmer for 2 minutes
Open the lid and stir-fry until the third egg is cooked, sprinkle with chopped green onion and pepper, and remove from the pan

name_en: Hot and sour fern root powder
intro_zh:
酸辣蕨根粉口感爽滑筋道，酸辣开胃，是一道家常凉菜，也可当作主食享用。蕨根粉富含淀粉和膳食纤维，能为身体提供能量。这道菜做法格外简单，对新手非常友好，从准备到完成只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：318 大卡
intro_en:
The spicy and sour fern root powder has a smooth and chewy taste, and is sour and appetizing. It is a home-cooked cold dish and can also be enjoyed as a staple food. Fern root powder is rich in starch and dietary fiber, which can provide energy to the body. This dish is incredibly simple and beginner-friendly, taking just 10 minutes from prep to done.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 318 kcal
ingredients_zh: 酱油 : 醋 : 油泼辣子 = 3 : 2 : 2 （酱料具体量根据蕨根粉多少决定，这个比例仅为保证口味的方向不出错）
如果觉得酱料较为清淡，可以加入 2 至 5 克盐
如果想要酱料鲜一些，可以加入 2 克糖
ingredients_en: Soy sauce: vinegar: chili pepper = 3: 2: 2 (The specific amount of sauce is determined by the amount of fern root powder. This ratio is only to ensure that the taste direction is correct)
If you feel the sauce is bland, add 2 to 5 grams of salt
If you want the sauce to be fresher, you can add 2 grams of sugar
steps_zh: 锅中加入约为深度 3/5 的水，烧开
水沸腾后加入蕨根粉，中小火煮 8 分钟
出锅
根据配比，加入酱油、醋、油泼辣子
用筷子蘸取，尝一口
如果觉得此时酱油味稍浓，加入准备好的盐
如果觉得此时不够鲜，加入准备好的糖
充分搅拌至大部分颗粒状调料溶解
取一个碗
加入上一步调制的酱料
将蕨根粉过冷水后放入酱料中
充分搅拌
将准备的葱、蒜、小米辣切碎后撒在粉上
完成啦(｡･∀･)ﾉﾞ
steps_en: Add water to about 3/5 of the depth of the pot and bring to a boil
After the water boils, add fern root powder and cook over medium-low heat for 8 minutes
Take out of the pot
According to the ratio, add soy sauce, vinegar and spicy oil
Dip it with chopsticks and take a bite
If you feel that the soy sauce tastes a little strong at this time, add the prepared salt
If you feel it is not fresh enough at this time, add the prepared sugar
Stir thoroughly until most of the granular seasoning is dissolved
take a bowl
Add the sauce prepared in the previous step
Pour the fern root powder into cold water and add it to the sauce
stir well
Chop the prepared onions, garlic, and millet and sprinkle them on the flour
It’s done (｡･∀･)ﾉﾞ

intro_zh:
这是一道充满南方家常气息的简单拌饭，米粒被融化的猪油包裹，透着酱油的咸鲜和葱花的清香，是许多孩子食欲不振时的安心之选。主要提供快速碳水与脂肪能量，但胆固醇较高，不宜常吃。制作毫无门槛，哪怕完全不会做饭也能轻松完成，煮好的米饭只要几分钟就能拌出一碗香喷喷的主食。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：420 大卡
intro_en:
This is a simple bibimbap full of southern home-style flavor. The rice grains are wrapped in melted lard, revealing the saltiness of soy sauce and the fragrance of chopped green onions. It is a safe choice for many children when they have a loss of appetite. It mainly provides quick carbohydrate and fat energy, but it has high cholesterol and should not be eaten frequently. There is no threshold for making it. Even if you don’t know how to cook, you can easily complete it. It only takes a few minutes to mix the cooked rice into a bowl of fragrant staple food.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 420 kcal
ingredients_zh: 生抽（推荐用李锦记或海天）
猪油 15 g（添加蚝油时，减少到 10 g）
生抽 5 ml（添加蚝油时，减少到 3 ml）
葱花 0-12 g（初始建议 5 g）
ingredients_en: Light soy sauce (Lee Kum Kee or Haitian is recommended)
15 g lard (reduce to 10 g when adding oyster sauce)
5 ml light soy sauce (reduce to 3 ml when adding oyster sauce)
Chopped green onion 0-12 g (initial recommendation: 5 g)
steps_zh: 碗底铺猪油
加入米饭
淋上酱油与蚝油
撒上葱花和猪油渣
搅拌均匀
steps_en: Spread lard on the bottom of the bowl
Add rice
Drizzle with soy sauce and oyster sauce
Sprinkle with chopped green onion and lard residue
Stir evenly

intro_zh:
这是一道充满上海弄堂风情的家常主食，咸肉的醇香与青菜的清甜在猪油的点化下融进每一粒米饭，既有锅巴焦脆，又保留菜梗爽嫩，层次分明。青菜富含维生素和膳食纤维，咸肉提供蛋白质与能量，荤素搭配均衡。做法并不复杂，但需要掌握分次下菜叶的小技巧，对新手而言稍有挑战。从头备料到出锅，大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：847 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked staple food full of Shanghai alley style. The mellow aroma of bacon and the sweetness of green vegetables are melted into every grain of rice with the help of lard. The rice crust is crispy while the vegetable stalks are tender and distinct. Green vegetables are rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, while bacon provides protein and energy, with a balanced mix of meat and vegetables. The method is not complicated, but you need to master the skills of removing the leaves in batches, which is a bit challenging for novices. It takes about 1 hour from start to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 847 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青菜（推荐矮脚青菜，又称上海青）
水 310 ml（偏硬 300 ml，偏软 325 ml，如果加入冬笋，额外加入 20 ml）
ingredients_en: Green vegetables (recommend short-legged green vegetables, also known as Shanghai greens)
310 ml of water (300 ml for hard, 325 ml for soft, if adding winter bamboo shoots, add an additional 20 ml)
steps_zh: 如果加入冬笋，切薄片后冷水下锅煮 10 分钟去涩味
咸肉切 1 cm 小丁
咸肉和冬笋冷锅下 10 g 猪油、料酒、白糖，中小火煸炒到透明冒泡
青菜切碎，菜梗和菜叶分开放，菜梗切成 0.5 cm 边长的正方形小块，菜叶切成长 2-3 cm，宽 1-1.5 cm 的长方形小块
菜梗下锅炒到翡翠色
米淘净后倒进电饭煲，加水
把炒好的咸肉和菜梗铺在米上
正常煮饭模式启动，最后 10 分钟开盖快速铺入菜叶
煮好后焖 5 分钟，再淋 5 g 猪油、白胡椒粉疯狂翻拌均匀
steps_en: If you add winter bamboo shoots, cut them into thin slices and boil them in cold water for 10 minutes to remove the astringency.
Cut bacon into 1 cm cubes
Add 10 g of lard, cooking wine, and sugar to the cold pan of bacon and winter bamboo shoots. Stir-fry over medium-low heat until translucent and bubbling.

Chop the green vegetables, separate the stems and leaves, cut the stems into square pieces with a side length of 0.5 cm, and cut the leaves into rectangular pieces with a length of 2-3 cm and a width of 1-1.5 cm.
Stir-fry the vegetable stems until they turn emerald color
After washing the rice, pour it into the rice cooker and add water
Spread the fried bacon and vegetable stems on the rice
Start the normal cooking mode, open the lid and quickly add the vegetable leaves in the last 10 minutes.
After cooking, simmer for 5 minutes, then pour 5 g of lard and white pepper, stir evenly

intro_zh:
利提巧卡是印度比哈尔邦的传统主食，由烤得金黄的麦球和烟熏风味的蔬菜泥组成，口感外脆内软，香气浓郁。烤鹰嘴豆粉馅料富含植物蛋白和膳食纤维，搭配茄子、番茄、土豆等蔬菜，营养丰富。制作需要和面、包馅、烤制以及处理蔬菜，步骤较多，对新手有一定挑战，全程大约需要 60 分钟完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1019 大卡
intro_en:
Ritti choka is a traditional staple food in Bihar, India. It consists of roasted golden wheat balls and smoky vegetable puree. It is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, and has a rich aroma. Roasted chickpea flour filling is rich in plant protein and dietary fiber, and paired with eggplant, tomatoes, potatoes and other vegetables, it is rich in nutrients. The preparation requires kneading dough, stuffing, roasting and processing vegetables. There are many steps and it is a challenge for novices. The whole process takes about 60 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1019 kcal
ingredients_zh: 烤鹰嘴豆粉(Sattu)— 可用炒熟的鹰嘴豆磨粉替代
芥末油(Mustard Oil)— 可用其他食用油替代
印度黑盐(Kala Namak)— 可用普通盐替代
洋葱 1 个（约 80g），切极细碎
青辣椒 2 根，切极细碎
ingredients_en: Roasted chickpea flour (Sattu) – can be substituted with roasted chickpea flour
Mustard Oil – can be substituted with other cooking oils
Indian black salt (Kala Namak) – can be substituted with regular salt
2 green chili peppers, chopped very finely
steps_zh: 在碗中混合烤鹰嘴豆粉 120g、切碎的洋葱、青辣椒、生姜
加入孜然籽 3g、芝麻 5g、红辣椒粉 3g、印度黑盐 3g、盐 3g
加入芥末油 15ml、柠檬汁 10ml、切碎的香菜叶
充分混合均匀，馅料应呈松散但可捏合的状态，备用
将全麦面粉 200g 放入大碗中
逐渐加入温水，边加边揉，揉成*光滑柔软*的面团
面团静置 **15 分钟**
将面团分成 8 个等大的小剂子
每个剂子用手压成一个直径约 8cm 的圆形面片（中间稍厚）
在面片中央放入约 15g 馅料
将面片四周收拢包住馅料，封口处捏紧，搓成圆球
烤箱预热至 200°C
将利提放在烤盘上，烤 **25-30 分钟**，期间翻面一次，直至*表面金棕色且有裂纹*
如果使用明火：将利提直接放在炭火或煤气灶小火上烤，不断翻转，直至*均匀焦黄*
烤好后趁热将每个利提表面涂上酥油，使其*浸润吸收*
将茄子、番茄、土豆放在明火上直接烤，或放入 200°C 烤箱烤 **20-25 分钟**，直至*外皮焦黑、内部完全软烂*
烤好后去皮，将茄子、番茄、土豆分别用叉子或手捣碎
将捣碎的蔬菜混合在一起
加入切碎的大蒜、青辣椒、盐 4g、芥末油 15ml
充分搅拌混合均匀
撒上香菜叶装饰
将利提摆盘，旁边放上巧卡蔬菜泥
趁热食用，用手掰开利提蘸巧卡
steps_en: In a bowl mix 120g of roasted chickpea flour, chopped onion, green chilli, ginger
Add 3g cumin seeds, 5g sesame seeds, 3g red chili powder, 3g Indian black salt, 3g salt
Add 15ml mustard oil, 10ml lemon juice, chopped coriander leaves
Mix thoroughly and the filling should be in a loose but kneadable state. Set aside.
Put 200g whole wheat flour into a large bowl
Gradually add warm water, kneading as you add, to form a *smooth and soft* dough
Let the dough rest for **15 minutes**
Divide the dough into 8 equal-sized portions
Press each dough by hand into a round dough piece about 8cm in diameter (slightly thicker in the middle)
Put about 15g of filling in the center of the dough sheet
Gather the dough around to wrap the filling, pinch the sealing area tightly, and roll into a round ball
Preheat oven to 200°C
Place the litti on the baking sheet and bake for **25-30 minutes**, turning once during this time, until *the surface is golden brown and crackled*
If using an open flame: Place the liti directly on a charcoal or gas stove over low heat, turning constantly until *evenly browned*
After baking, apply ghee on the surface of each Litti while it is still hot, so that it *soaks and absorbs*
Bake the eggplants, tomatoes, and potatoes directly over an open flame, or bake in a 200°C oven for **20-25 minutes** until *the outside is charred and the inside is completely soft*
After roasting, peel off the skin and mash the eggplant, tomatoes, and potatoes separately with a fork or your hands.
Mix together the mashed vegetables
Add chopped garlic, green chili, 4g salt, and 15ml mustard oil
Stir thoroughly to mix evenly
Garnish with coriander leaves
Arrange the leeti on a plate and place the chaoca vegetable puree on the side
Serve hot, break open the liti with your hands and dip into choka

intro_zh:
这道北印度家常菜是旁遮普邦和德里地区的传统美食，番茄洋葱汤汁浓郁辛香，炖煮后红芸豆软糯入味，与热米饭拌食温暖饱腹。豆子富含蛋白质、膳食纤维和多种微量元素，营养均衡。做法简单，初学者也能轻松上手，全程制作约 40 分钟，但干豆需提前浸泡 8 小时。浓郁的家常滋味，有妈妈的味道。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1842 大卡
intro_en:
This North Indian home-cooked dish is a traditional delicacy in the Punjab and Delhi regions. The tomato and onion soup is rich and spicy, and the red kidney beans are soft and glutinous after simmering. It is warm and filling when mixed with hot rice. Beans are rich in protein, dietary fiber and a variety of trace elements, and are nutritionally balanced. The method is simple and can be easily started by beginners. The whole process takes about 40 minutes, but the dried beans need to be soaked for 8 hours in advance. Rich home-cooked taste, just like mom's.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1842 kcal
ingredients_zh: 巴斯马蒂香米或普通大米
高压锅（推荐）或普通汤锅
干红芸豆 200g（提前浸泡 8 小时）
番茄 3 个（约 300g），切碎（或番茄酱 30ml）
ingredients_en: Pressure cooker (recommended) or regular stock pot
200g dry red kidney beans (soaked 8 hours in advance)
steps_zh: 将干红芸豆用清水浸泡至少 8 小时（过夜），浸泡后体积会膨胀约两倍
将浸泡好的红芸豆沥干
**使用高压锅**：放入红芸豆和 600ml 水，盖好锅盖，大火上气后转中火，**压 15-20 分钟**，直至*豆子用手指可轻松压碎*
**使用普通锅**：放入红芸豆和足量水，大火煮沸后转中火，**煮 60-90 分钟**，直至豆子完全软烂
煮好后保留煮豆汤水，备用
在炒锅中倒入 30ml 食用油，中火加热
放入月桂叶 2 片，炸至*散出香味*（约 10 秒）
放入切碎的洋葱，翻炒至*金棕色*（约 6-8 分钟）
加入磨碎的生姜和大蒜，翻炒 1 分钟
加入切碎的番茄，翻炒至*番茄完全软烂出油*（约 5 分钟）
加入姜黄粉 3g、红辣椒粉 5g、香菜粉 5g、孜然粉 3g、盐 6g
翻炒 2 分钟，使香料与番茄融合
将煮好的红芸豆连同汤水一起倒入锅中
加入青辣椒，搅拌均匀
大火煮沸后转小火，**炖 15-20 分钟**
期间用铲子背面压碎一部分豆子，使汤汁变得*浓稠*
加入印度综合香料粉 3g，搅拌均匀
关火，撒上香菜叶
将大米淘洗干净
放入电饭锅，加入 400ml 水
正常蒸煮即可
将米饭盛入盘中
将红芸豆咖喱浇在米饭上或旁边
可搭配洋葱沙拉和柠檬角
steps_en: Soak dry red kidney beans in water for at least 8 hours (overnight). They will expand approximately twice in size after soaking.
Drain soaked red kidney beans

**Use a pressure cooker**: Add red kidney beans and 600ml water, cover the pot, turn to medium heat after the fire is steamed up, **press for 15-20 minutes** until *the beans can be easily crushed with your fingers*
**Use an ordinary pot**: Add red kidney beans and enough water, bring to a boil over high heat, then turn to medium heat, **cook for 60-90 minutes** until the beans are completely soft.
After cooking, reserve the bean soup water for later use
Pour 30ml cooking oil into the wok and heat over medium heat
Add 2 bay leaves and fry until fragrant* (about 10 seconds)
Add the chopped onions and stir-fry until *golden brown* (about 6-8 minutes)
Add grated ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add chopped tomatoes and stir-fry until tomatoes are completely soft and oily* (about 5 minutes)
Add 3g turmeric powder, 5g red chili powder, 5g coriander powder, 3g cumin powder, 6g salt
Stir-fry for 2 minutes to combine the spices with the tomatoes
Pour the cooked red kidney beans into the pot together with the soup water
Add green chilies and mix well
Bring to a boil, then turn to low heat and **simmer for 15-20 minutes**
In the meantime, use the back of a spatula to crush some of the beans to make the soup *thick*
Add 3g Indian mixed spice powder and mix well
Turn off the heat and sprinkle with coriander leaves
Wash the rice
Put into rice cooker and add 400ml water
Just cook it normally
Put the rice on the plate
Serve red kidney bean curry over or alongside rice
Serves with onion salad and lemon wedges

intro_zh:
炒河粉是一道流行于广东地区的经典小吃，讲究镬气十足、干香爽滑，河粉软韧透亮，搭配肉丝、豆芽和黄瓜丝，口感层次丰富。主要提供碳水化合物和蛋白质，蔬菜的加入也补充了维生素与膳食纤维。按本菜谱操作难度适中，即便新手只要备齐材料也能尝试，整个制作过程约需 30 分钟即可端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：822 大卡
intro_en:
Fried rice noodles is a classic snack popular in Guangdong. It is full of wok flavor, dry and smooth. The rice noodles are soft, tough and translucent. It is paired with shredded pork, bean sprouts and cucumbers, and has a rich texture. It mainly provides carbohydrates and protein, and the addition of vegetables also supplements vitamins and dietary fiber. This recipe is moderately difficult, and even a novice can try it as long as he has all the ingredients. The entire preparation process takes about 30 minutes and can be served on the table.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 822 kcal
ingredients_zh: 炒料：盐、味精、老抽、生抽、孜然粉（或直接用河粉料）
黄瓜、面筋块、绿豆芽、鸡蛋、蒜瓣、小葱、淀粉
河粉用量为 250 g/人，如果需要更大食量，可再加 100g/人 向下取整。
黄瓜丝 30g/人、面筋块 30g/人、绿豆芽 30g/人、打碎的鸡蛋 1 个/人。
拍碎的蒜瓣 2 个/人、小葱 1 根/人
河粉料可按 20g/人添加，若自行准备炒料可 10g 盐+2g 味精+3g 孜然粉。
淀粉可准备每 100g 肉+5g 淀粉比例准备。
老抽/生抽，分别为每 250g 河粉 10ml/15ml。
ingredients_en: Stir-fried ingredients: salt, monosodium glutamate, dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, cumin powder (or just use rice noodles)
Cucumber, gluten cubes, mung bean sprouts, eggs, garlic cloves, shallots, starch
The dosage of rice noodles is 250g/person. If you need more food, you can add 100g/person and round down.
30g cucumber shreds/person, 30g gluten pieces/person, 30g mung bean sprouts/person, 1 beaten egg/person.
You can add 20g of rice noodles ingredients per person. If you prepare your own stir-fry ingredients, you can add 10g of salt + 2g of MSG + 3g of cumin powder.
Starch can be prepared at a ratio of 100g of meat + 5g of starch.
Dark soy sauce/light soy sauce, respectively, are 10ml/15ml per 250g of rice noodles.
steps_zh: 小葱切碎（葱白和葱叶分开）、蒜瓣拍碎，丢案板上备用。
打碎鸡蛋，捞一点蛋清到一只碗中，剩下的丢入另一只碗中备用。
将绿豆芽放入锅中，大火煮 60 秒。豆芽捞出，过凉水，放入盘中备用。
黄瓜切丝放入盘中备用，可和豆芽丢一起。
处理面筋，单独丢一个盘中。
肉切细条状，加入淀粉与刚刚碗中的鸡蛋清、胡椒粉，顺时针拌匀。
注：超市购买来的凉皮表面一般会有食用油，可以使用自来水清洗。面筋同样。
注：清洗面筋之后，请用手将面筋中的大量水分挤出（不需过于用力）。
加入食用油，锅热倒出。
倒入处理好的肉，翻炒均匀至变色，倒入碗中备用。
趁锅热，加入 20g 食用油（高血压人群可降低用量），倒入葱白、蒜爆炒出香。
加入河粉，淋入老抽提色，翻炒均匀后再加入河粉炒料，继续翻炒。
河粉即将透明时，放入炒制好的肉丝与面筋，并加入生抽提鲜，简单翻炒两次。
加入豆芽与黄瓜丝，翻炒至河粉完全透明。
关火！
撒入葱叶点缀，把锅端起。
倒入盘中，开始干饭。
steps_en: Chop the shallots (separate the green onions and leaves), smash the garlic cloves, and set aside on the chopping board.
Crack the eggs, scoop a little of the egg white into one bowl, and throw the rest into another bowl and set aside.
Add the mung bean sprouts to the pot and cook over high heat for 60 seconds. Remove the bean sprouts, rinse in cold water, and place in a plate for later use.
Cut the cucumber into shreds and put it on a plate for later use. You can throw it together with the bean sprouts.
Dispose of gluten and transfer to a separate plate.
Cut the meat into thin strips, add starch, egg white and pepper from the bowl just now, and mix well in a clockwise direction.
Note: Liangpi bought in supermarkets usually has cooking oil on the surface and can be cleaned with tap water. Same with gluten.
Note: After washing the gluten, please squeeze out a lot of water from the gluten with your hands (no need to use too much force).
Add cooking oil and heat the pan.
Pour in the cooked meat, stir-fry evenly until it changes color, pour into a bowl and set aside.
While the pot is hot, add 20g of cooking oil (people with high blood pressure can reduce the amount), add green onions and garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the rice noodles, pour in the dark soy sauce to enhance the color, stir-fry evenly, then add the rice noodles stir-fry ingredients and continue to stir-fry.
When the rice noodles are almost transparent, add the fried shredded pork and gluten, add light soy sauce to enhance the freshness, and stir-fry twice.
Add bean sprouts and cucumber shreds and stir-fry until the rice noodles are completely transparent.
Turn off the heat!
Garnish with green onion leaves and lift the pot.
Pour it into a plate and start cooking.

intro_zh:
炸酱面是一道酱香浓郁、面条劲道的传统北京家常面食，搭配清爽菜码，咸甜适口。主要营养来自瘦肉蛋白质和蔬菜维生素，能为人体提供充足能量。做法对新手友好，预计制作时长约 30 分钟，熟练掌握后可通过备菜与炒酱并行进一步缩短时间。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1272 大卡
intro_en:
Zhajiang noodles are a traditional Beijing home-cooked noodle dish with rich sauce and chewy noodles. It is paired with refreshing side dishes that are salty and sweet. The main nutrients come from lean protein and vegetable vitamins, which can provide the human body with sufficient energy. The method is friendly to novices and the preparation time is expected to be about 30 minutes. Once mastered, the time can be further shortened by preparing the vegetables and stir-frying the sauce in parallel.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1272 kcal
ingredients_zh: 菜码（根据个人喜好选择，通常 4-10 种，可选择黄瓜、白菜、萝卜等）
如果 *面条* 选择了*挂面*：150g
ingredients_en: Vegetable code (select according to personal preference, usually 4-10 types, you can choose cucumber, cabbage, radish, etc.)
steps_zh: 菜码切丝备用。
葱切碎。油锅烧热，下葱和肉，炒至肉完全熟透（无红色）
下豆瓣酱和甜面酱，继续炒至**微微粘稠**。盛出，得到*炸酱*。
取大碗，加凉水备用。
煮面条至断生（无白芯），盛入第 4 步装有凉水的碗中。
立即控水捞出，盛入干净的碗中。
取第 3 步炸酱，倒入碗中，拌匀。然后取第 1 步菜码，倒入碗中，拌匀。
steps_en: Cut the vegetable into shreds and set aside.
Chop green onions. Heat the oil pan, add onions and meat, and stir-fry until the meat is completely cooked (no red color)
Add the bean paste and sweet noodle sauce and continue to stir-fry until **slightly sticky**. Dish out and get *fried sauce*.
Take a large bowl, add cold water and set aside.
Cook the noodles until they are tender (no white core) and put them into the bowl filled with cold water in step 4.
Immediately remove from the water and put into a clean bowl.
Take the fried sauce from step 3, pour it into a bowl and mix well. Then take the recipe from step 1, pour it into a bowl, and mix well.

intro_zh:
汤面是一道自由搭配的家常主食，汤汁清爽，面条软滑，兼容各种荤素食材，味道可鲜可淡。它富含碳水化合物和优质蛋白质，搭配蔬菜还能补充维生素与膳食纤维，营养均衡又饱腹。做法非常简单，无需厨艺基础，新手也能轻松驾驭。从准备食材到出锅，一般约需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：565 大卡
intro_en:
Noodle soup is a home-cooked staple food that can be mixed freely. The soup is refreshing and the noodles are soft and smooth. It is compatible with various meat and vegetable ingredients and the taste can be fresh or bland. It is rich in carbohydrates and high-quality protein. When paired with vegetables, it can also supplement vitamins and dietary fiber. It is nutritionally balanced and filling. The method is very simple, no cooking skills are required, and novices can easily master it. From preparing ingredients to serving, it usually takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 565 kcal
ingredients_zh: 面食材料：可以是手工面条、龙须面、面鱼，也可以是泡面面饼、各类规格粉丝，或者是其他任何自己所喜欢的面食形式。
菜类材料：建议荤素搭配，选择自己喜欢的食材洗干净即可。例如：
面类材料：单人一个方便面大小的量，可以在 70-230g 之间选择。
冷水： 加入能浸没面的量，一般在 200 - 400 ml 之间选择
菜类：体积大约和面类相当
ingredients_en: Noodle ingredients: It can be handmade noodles, dragon whisker noodles, fish noodles, instant noodles, vermicelli of various sizes, or any other form of pasta you like.
Ingredients: It is recommended to mix meat and vegetables. Just choose your favorite ingredients and wash them thoroughly. For example:
Noodle ingredients: The amount is about the size of one instant noodle per person, and you can choose between 70-230g.
Cold water: Add enough water to cover the noodles, usually between 200 - 400 ml
Vegetables: The volume is about the same as noodles
steps_zh: 先将菜类材料切成边长不超过 4cm 的块状，便于煮熟
如有生肉，则先放入冷水中，盖上锅盖，煮沸腾，先捞出上层血沫，再关火，捞出半熟的肉备用
先大火将水加热至沸腾，后调至中火
将较难煮熟的食材放入锅中（比如半熟肉类、香菇类、等最先放入锅中）。为保证煮熟，可在沸腾后计时 10 分钟，特别难熟的大块食材可追加 5 分钟。
将面食放入锅中，适当搅拌确保面和汤充分接触，使液面保持轻微沸腾，煮 5 分钟。加入面后液面易产生白色泡沫，可适当抬起锅盖通气或者撤下锅盖。
将易于煮熟的食材如青菜类放入锅中，适当搅拌以充分浸没，煮 2-5 分钟
关火，随后加入盐、胡椒粉、香油等自己喜欢的调味料，适当搅拌即可出锅食用
steps_en: First cut the vegetable ingredients into pieces with a side length of no more than 4cm for easy cooking
If there is raw meat, first put it into cold water, cover the pot, bring it to a boil, remove the upper layer of blood foam, then turn off the heat, remove the half-cooked meat and set aside.
First heat the water until it boils over high heat, then reduce to medium heat

Put ingredients that are difficult to cook into the pot (such as half-cooked meat, mushrooms, etc. first). To ensure doneness, time the cooking time for 10 minutes after boiling, and add an additional 5 minutes for large pieces of ingredients that are particularly difficult to cook.

Add the pasta to the pot, stirring properly to ensure full contact between the noodles and soup, keeping the liquid at a slight boil, and cook for 5 minutes. After adding the noodles, white foam will easily appear on the liquid surface. You can lift the lid appropriately to ventilate it or remove the lid.
Add easy-to-cook ingredients such as vegetables into the pot, stir properly to fully submerge them, and cook for 2-5 minutes
Turn off the heat, then add salt, pepper, sesame oil and other seasonings you like, stir properly and serve.

intro_zh:
韭菜盒子是一道传统中式面点，外皮金黄酥脆，内馅鲜香多汁。韭菜搭配虾仁和鸡蛋，富含维生素与优质蛋白质。做法简单，对新手也很友好，从和面到出锅大约需要 2.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：794 大卡
intro_en:
Chive box is a traditional Chinese noodle dish with a golden and crispy exterior and a juicy and juicy filling. Leeks paired with shrimp and eggs are rich in vitamins and high-quality protein. The recipe is simple and friendly to novices, and it takes about 2.5 hours from kneading to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 794 kcal
steps_zh: 将面粉放入大碗中，加入水，搅拌成光滑的面团，静置 30 分钟。
韭菜洗净切碎，加入打散的鸡蛋、5g 盐，搅拌均匀。
将面团分成小剂子，擀成薄圆饼，包入韭菜、虾仁、鸡蛋液。
热锅，加入食用油，放入包好的韭菜盒子，煎至两面金黄，约 3-4 分钟。
盛盘，稍凉后即可享用。
steps_en: Place the flour in a large bowl, add the water, stir into a smooth dough and let sit for 30 minutes.
Wash and chop the leeks, add beaten eggs, 5g of salt, and stir evenly.
Divide the dough into small pieces, roll it into a thin round cake, and fill it with leeks, shrimps and egg liquid.
Heat the pan, add cooking oil, add the wrapped leek box, and fry until both sides are golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Transfer to a plate and allow to cool slightly before serving.

intro_zh:
印度焖饭是源自莫卧儿帝国时期的皇家料理，米粒细长、香料气息浓郁，鸡肉嫩滑、米饭粒粒分明，层次丰富。富含蛋白质和多种香料精华，能提振食欲。制作步骤较繁琐，对新手不太友好，全程约需 90 分钟（鸡肉需提前腌制 1 小时）。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：730 大卡
intro_en:
Indian rice stew is a royal dish originated from the Mughal Empire. It has slender rice grains, rich spices, tender chicken, clear rice grains and rich layers. Rich in protein and various spice essences, it can stimulate appetite. The preparation steps are complicated and not very friendly to novices. The whole process takes about 90 minutes (the chicken needs to be marinated for 1 hour in advance).
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 730 kcal
ingredients_zh: 巴斯马蒂长粒香米(Basmati Rice)
鸡腿肉（去骨，可用羊肉替代）
藏红花(Saffron)— 可用食用黄色素替代
全香料：月桂叶、肉桂棒、小豆蔻、丁香、八角
巴斯马蒂香米 300g（提前浸泡 30 分钟）
藏红花 0.5g + 温牛奶 30ml（浸泡用）
ingredients_en: Chicken thighs (boneless, mutton can be substituted)
Saffron - can be replaced by edible yellow pigment
Whole spices: bay leaves, cinnamon sticks, cardamom, cloves, star anise
Chicken thigh 500g (boneless, cut into large pieces)
Basmati rice 300g (soak for 30 minutes in advance)
steps_zh: 在大碗中混合酸奶、磨碎的生姜和大蒜、红辣椒粉、姜黄粉、印度综合香料粉、盐、柠檬汁
放入鸡肉块，均匀裹上腌料
盖保鲜膜，冷藏腌制**至少 1 小时**（过夜更佳）
将藏红花 0.5g 放入 30ml 温牛奶中浸泡 **15 分钟**，备用
在锅中倒入 50ml 食用油，中火加热
放入洋葱薄片，翻炒至*深金棕色且酥脆*（约 12-15 分钟，需耐心）
捞出炸洋葱，用厨房纸吸油，备用
将浸泡好的巴斯马蒂香米沥干
在大锅中烧开 2000ml 水
加入月桂叶、小豆蔻、丁香、肉桂棒、八角和盐 10g
放入米饭，大火煮 **5-6 分钟**，直至*米粒约七成熟*（外部软、芯部仍有硬度）
立即沥干，丢弃全香料，备用
在厚底锅底部涂抹酥油 15g
第一层：将腌制好的鸡肉均匀铺在锅底
第二层：铺上一半的半熟米饭
撒上一半的炸洋葱、薄荷叶、香菜叶、青辣椒
第三层：铺上剩余的米饭
撒上剩余的炸洋葱、薄荷叶、香菜叶
将藏红花牛奶均匀淋在最上层米饭表面
放上剩余的酥油 15g（切小块散放）
**密封锅盖**：用面粉加水和成面团条，沿锅口边缘封住缝隙（传统方法），或用锡纸包裹锅口再盖锅盖
先用大火加热 **3 分钟**，直至锅内开始冒蒸汽
然后转最小火，**焖 25-30 分钟**
关火后**不要开盖**，再焖 **5 分钟**
开盖，用大铲子从底部轻轻翻拌，使各层混合均匀
盛盘，搭配酸奶(Raita)食用
steps_en: In a large bowl combine yogurt, grated ginger and garlic, red chili powder, turmeric powder, garam masala, salt, lemon juice
Add chicken pieces and coat evenly with marinade
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate to marinate **at least 1 hour** (overnight is better)
Soak 0.5g saffron in 30ml warm milk for **15 minutes** and set aside
Pour 50ml cooking oil into the pot and heat over medium heat
Add the thinly sliced onion and stir-fry until *deep golden brown and crispy* (about 12-15 minutes, please be patient)
Take out the fried onions and absorb the oil with kitchen paper, set aside
Drain the soaked basmati rice
Boil 2000ml water in a large pot
Add bay leaf, cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick, star anise and 10g salt
Add the rice and cook over high heat for **5-6 minutes** until the *rice grains are about seven years old* (soft on the outside but still hard in the core)
Drain immediately, discard whole spices, and set aside
Spread 15g of ghee on the bottom of a heavy-bottomed pan
First layer: spread the marinated chicken evenly on the bottom of the pot
Second layer: spread half of the half-cooked rice
Sprinkle half of the fried onions, mint leaves, coriander leaves, green chilies
Third layer: spread the remaining rice
Sprinkle with remaining fried onions, mint leaves, coriander leaves
Pour the saffron milk evenly over the top layer of rice
Add the remaining 15g of ghee (cut into small pieces and scattered)
**Seal the pot lid**: Add flour and water to form dough strips, seal the gap along the edge of the pot mouth (traditional method), or wrap the pot mouth with tin foil and cover the pot lid
First heat over high heat for **3 minutes** until steam starts to come out of the pot
Then turn to minimum heat and **simmer for 25-30 minutes**
After turning off the heat, **do not open the lid** and simmer for another **5 minutes**
Open the lid and use a large spatula to gently stir from the bottom until all layers are evenly mixed.
Serve on a plate and serve with yogurt (Raita)

name_en: Boil instant noodles and add eggs
intro_zh:
煮泡面加蛋是一道便捷的快手主食，口感顺滑，汤味浓郁，适合随时填饱肚子。主要提供碳水化合物和蛋白质，能快速补充能量。做法极其简单，只需烧水、煮面、打入鸡蛋煮熟，新手也能轻松掌握，全程大约 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：550 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled instant noodles with eggs are a quick and convenient staple food with a smooth texture and rich soup flavor, perfect for filling your stomach at any time. Mainly provides carbohydrates and protein, which can quickly replenish energy. The method is extremely simple. You only need to boil water, boil noodles, and add eggs to cook. Even novices can easily master it. The whole process can be completed in about 10 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 550 kcal
ingredients_zh: 单人，能支撑一个成年人不饥饿状态约 3 至 4 小时。
水 550ml-1000ml，根据锅的情况。以能完整将泡面浸入其中为准。
ingredients_en: For one person, it can support an adult for about 3 to 4 hours without hunger.
Water 550ml-1000ml, depending on the condition of the pot. The instant noodles can be completely immersed in it.
steps_zh: 先将水加热至沸腾（火候不做严格要求，使用热水会更快）
将取出的面饼放入锅中
将泡面里附带的佐料放入锅中
取出筷子轻微拨动泡面，使佐料充分溶解，面饼充分浸泡受热
盖上锅盖等待约 1 分钟至锅内水再次沸腾
去壳鸡蛋，加入锅中
等待约 3 至 4 分钟，即可
steps_en: First heat the water until it boils (the heat is not strictly required, it will be faster to use hot water)
Put the removed dough into the pot
Put the condiments that come with the instant noodles into the pot
Take out the chopsticks and gently stir the instant noodles so that the seasonings are fully dissolved and the noodles are fully soaked and heated.
Cover the pot and wait for about 1 minute until the water in the pot boils again
Peel eggs and add to pot
Wait about 3 to 4 minutes and you're done

intro_zh:
这道菜酱香浓郁、咸甜适口，肉馅焦香、鸡蛋嫩滑，盖在热米饭上十分满足，属于家常快手料理。富含优质蛋白质和必需氨基酸，能快速补充能量。做法简单直观，新手也能轻松上手，从备料到出锅大约只需十五分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1822 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is rich in sauce, salty and sweet, the meat filling is caramelized, and the eggs are tender and smooth. It is very satisfying when topped with hot rice. It is a quick and easy home-cooked dish. Rich in high-quality protein and essential amino acids, it can quickly replenish energy. The method is simple and intuitive, and even novices can easily get started. It only takes about fifteen minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1822 kcal
steps_zh: 煮好米饭，通常使用买米赠送的量杯，一杯米 240g
锅中放油 30ml
放入肉馅，调中火煎至两面微焦
将鸡蛋打入锅中，不要打散，盖上锅盖
调一个碗汁，碗中放入计算中的对应数量的老抽，生抽，醋，糖，红葱油，搅拌均匀
打开锅盖，将碗汁倒入锅中，等待三分钟
关火，将肉蛋盖到米饭上
安全检查，开始食用盖饭
steps_en: After cooking the rice, usually use the measuring cup that comes with the purchase of rice. One cup of rice is 240g.
Put 30ml of oil in the pot
Add the meat filling and fry over medium heat until lightly browned on both sides
Crack the eggs into the pot without breaking them, and cover the pot with a lid
Make a bowl of juice. Add the calculated amounts of dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and shallot oil into the bowl. Stir evenly.
Open the lid, pour the juice into the pot and wait for three minutes
Turn off the heat and cover the rice with meat and eggs
Safety check, start eating rice bowl

intro_zh:
热干面是武汉最具代表性的小吃之一，属于鄂菜系。碱水面条筋道爽滑，裹满浓稠的芝麻酱，搭配酸豆角、萝卜干和肉末，咸香微辣，滋味醇厚。主要提供碳水化合物和蛋白质，芝麻酱也富含钙质。制作简单快捷，新手也能轻松上手，从煮面到拌好大约只需十几分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1341 大卡
intro_en:
Hot dry noodles are one of the most representative snacks in Wuhan and belong to Hubei cuisine. The alkaline water noodles are chewy and smooth, covered in thick sesame sauce, and paired with pickled beans, dried radish and minced meat. It is salty, slightly spicy and has a mellow taste. Providing primarily carbohydrates and protein, tahini is also rich in calcium. It is simple and quick to make, and even novices can easily get started. It only takes about ten minutes from cooking to mixing.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1341 kcal
ingredients_en: The unique alkaline water surface of hot dry noodles
Hot dry noodles’ unique alkaline water surface (250g)
steps_zh: 水煮沸，并加入碱水面，焯烫 25 秒钟捞起
撒上食盐、鸡精和胡椒粉
芝麻酱用 90ml 水稀释，搅匀，然后加入
加入 5ml 酱油，加入 30ml 肉汤汁和蒜水
加入萝卜干，肉末，酸豆角，葱花
拌均匀后开吃
steps_en: Boil the water, add alkaline water, blanch for 25 seconds and remove
Sprinkle with salt, chicken stock and pepper
Dilute sesame paste with 90ml water, stir well, then add
Add 5ml soy sauce, 30ml broth and garlic water
Add dried radish, minced meat, pickled beans, chopped green onion
Mix well and eat

intro_zh:
一道香辣开胃的家常快手面食，面条筋道裹满老干妈的豆豉辣香，酱油提鲜，简单却滋味十足。作为主食能快速补充碳水化合物和能量，辣椒素还有助促进食欲。制作毫无门槛，新手也能轻松驾驭，从烧水到出锅只需大约十 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：502 大卡
intro_en:
A spicy and appetizing home-cooked noodle dish. The noodles are chewy and filled with the spicy aroma of Lao Gan Ma’s black bean sauce. The soy sauce adds freshness. It’s simple but full of flavor. As a staple food, it can quickly replenish carbohydrates and energy, and capsaicin can also help stimulate appetite. There are no barriers to making, and even novices can easily master it. It only takes about ten minutes from boiling water to taking it out of the pot.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 502 kcal
ingredients_en: Amount of dough 120 g * number of servings
steps_zh: 将水倒入锅中并煮沸
将面均匀放入锅中
在煮的过程注意搅拌，避免面粘成一坨
当用筷子挑起一根面且该面能自然地从筷子上滑落时再等 30 秒关火
将面夹入碗中
按照上面的计量放入老干妈和酱油
用筷子将碗里的面、老干妈、酱油拌均匀
吃
steps_en: Pour water into pot and bring to boil
Put the noodles evenly into the pot
Be careful to stir during the cooking process to prevent the noodles from sticking into a lump.
When you pick up a noodle with chopsticks and the noodle can naturally slide off the chopsticks, wait another 30 seconds and turn off the heat.
Put noodles into bowl
Add Laoganma and soy sauce according to the above measurements
Use chopsticks to mix the noodles, Laoganma and soy sauce in the bowl evenly
eat

intro_zh:
麻油香气浓郁，搭配老抽与胡椒粉简单调味，咸香适口，是一道省时省钱的家常拌面。面条提供充足碳水化合物，麻油含有不饱和脂肪酸与维生素 E，能为身体补充能量。制作毫无难度，厨房新手也能轻松上手，从煮水到拌好只需大约十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：451 大卡
intro_en:
The aroma of sesame oil is rich, and it is simply seasoned with dark soy sauce and pepper. It is salty and delicious. It is a home-cooked noodle dish that saves time and money. Noodles provide sufficient carbohydrates, and sesame oil contains unsaturated fatty acids and vitamin E, which can replenish energy for the body. There is no difficulty in making it, and even a novice in the kitchen can easily get started. It only takes about ten minutes from boiling water to mixing.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 451 kcal
ingredients_zh: 风干快熟面/任何牌子的快熟面（不需要调味料）
盐 30 克（可选，这 30g 盐不会被全部食用）
ingredients_en: Air-dried instant noodles/any brand of instant noodles (no seasoning required)
30g salt (optional, all 30g of salt will not be consumed)
steps_zh: 将水倒入锅中并煮沸 （喜欢吃 q 弹面的同学，可在水里加入 30 克盐，用盐水煮出来的面会比较 q 弹）
将快熟面放入锅中 3 分钟（也可参考当下品牌快熟面的烹饪时间）
当面开始散了可以开始搅拌，让面受热均匀
将水滤干把面倒入碗中
按照上面的计量放入麻油，老抽，胡椒粉，生抽（可选）
筷子搅拌均匀
一道简单即省钱的懒人麻油拌面就完成啦
