steps_en: Pour water into the pot and bring to a boil (those who like to eat springy noodles can add 30 grams of salt to the water. The noodles cooked with salt water will be more springy)
Put the instant noodles into the pot for 3 minutes (you can also refer to the cooking time of the current brand of instant noodles)
When the noodles start to fall apart, you can start stirring so that the noodles are evenly heated.
Drain the water and pour the noodles into a bowl
Add sesame oil, dark soy sauce, pepper, and light soy sauce according to the above measurements (optional)
Stir evenly with chopsticks
This is a simple and cost-effective lazy sesame oil noodle dish.

intro_zh:
葱油拌面是一道经典的上海家常面点，以独特的葱油香味著称，做法简单快捷。富含碳水化合物和脂肪，能快速补充能量。一般初学者只需 20 分钟即可完成，非常适合作为日常快手晚餐。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：355 大卡
intro_en:
Scallion oil noodles is a classic Shanghai home-cooked noodle dish. It is famous for its unique scallion oil aroma and is simple and quick to make. Rich in carbohydrates and fats, it quickly replenishes energy. It only takes 20 minutes for beginners to make, making it perfect for a quick everyday dinner.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 355 kcal
ingredients_zh: 干面条 80 g （约相当于 150 g 湿面条）
ingredients_en: 80 g dry noodles (equivalent to approximately 150 g wet noodles)
steps_zh: 将 小葱 洗净，切成长段（约 5-7 cm）。葱白和葱绿可以分开。
锅中加入 100 ml 食用油，中火烧热。先放入葱白段，煸炒至微黄。
加入葱绿段，转小火，继续煸炒。
保持小火，耐心煸炒约 **15-20 分钟**，直至葱段变得焦黄酥脆。
将焦黄的葱段捞出（葱油保留在锅中）。
在锅中的葱油中，加入 60 ml 生抽，20 ml 老抽，15 g 白糖。小火加热并搅拌，约 **1 分钟**，至糖溶解，酱汁混合均匀。立即关火。将制作好的葱油酱汁倒入容器中，放凉后密封保存。
取 80 g 干面条。
锅中加入 1000 ml 饮用水，大火烧开。
放入 面条，根据面条包装说明，煮至熟透（通常 **3-8 分钟**，以包装说明为准）。
将 煮好的 面条 捞出，沥干水分，放入碗中。
在装有 面条 的碗中，加入 15 ml 之前做好的 葱油酱汁。
可以加入之前炸好的葱段（可选）。
用 筷子 快速搅拌均匀，即可食用。
steps_en: Wash the shallots and cut into long sections (about 5-7 cm). Onion white and onion green can be separated.
Add 100 ml cooking oil to the pot and heat over medium heat. Add the green onions first and stir-fry until slightly brown.
Add the green onions, turn to low heat and continue to stir-fry.
Keep the heat low and sauté patiently for about **15-20 minutes** until the green onions become brown and crispy.
Remove the browned scallions (retain the scallion oil in the pot).

In the scallion oil in the pot, add 60 ml light soy sauce, 20 ml dark soy sauce, and 15 g white sugar. Heat and stir over low heat, until the sugar has dissolved and the sauce is evenly combined, about **1 minute**. Turn off the heat immediately. Pour the prepared scallion oil sauce into a container, let it cool and seal it for storage.
Take 80 g dry noodles.
Add 1000 ml drinking water to the pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add noodles and cook until noodles are cooked through according to package instructions (usually **3-8 minutes**, subject to package instructions).
Take out the cooked noodles, drain them and put them into a bowl.
In the bowl with noodles, add 15 ml of the scallion oil sauce prepared previously.
You can add previously fried scallions (optional).
Use chopsticks to stir quickly and serve.

intro_zh:
照烧鸡腿饭是一道甜咸适口的下饭菜，鸡腿煎得焦香后融入浓郁酱汁，口感嫩滑入味。鸡腿肉富含优质蛋白，搭配西兰花和胡萝卜能补充膳食纤维与维生素。制作稍需一点去骨技巧，但整体不复杂，新手跟着步骤也能成功。从备料到出锅，大约 30 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1670 大卡
intro_en:
Teriyaki Chicken Leg Rice is a sweet and salty side dish. The chicken legs are fried until fragrant and melted into the rich sauce, making it tender and flavourful. Chicken thighs are rich in high-quality protein, and paired with broccoli and carrots, they can supplement dietary fiber and vitamins. Making it requires a little bit of bone removal skills, but the overall process is not complicated and even a novice can succeed by following the steps. From preparation to cooking, it can be on the table in about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1670 kcal
ingredients_zh: 西兰花（没有就用不辣的青椒代替）
蜂蜜 15 ml（没有时使用白糖 20 g + 玉米淀粉 5 g + 0.5 ml 柠檬汁或醋代替）
大蒜 10 g（拍碎，不用切末）
ingredients_en: Broccoli (if not available, use mild green pepper instead)
15 ml honey (if not available, use 20 g sugar + 5 g cornstarch + 0.5 ml lemon juice or vinegar instead)
10 g garlic (beat into pieces, no need to mince)
steps_zh: 取一只鸡腿，鸡皮朝下放在砧板上
用刀尖沿着鸡腿骨头的轮廓轻轻划开，从一端到另一端
用手指或刀背慢慢推开鸡肉，让骨头暴露出来。如果遇到筋膜，用刀尖切断
当鸡肉完全分离后，握住骨头一端，轻轻扭转并拔出
重复上述步骤将所有鸡腿去骨
去骨鸡腿加入黑胡椒粉、黑胡椒碎、盐、姜片腌制 5 分钟
碗里加入料酒、生抽、蜂蜜、老抽清水拌匀
蔬菜焯水 1-2 分钟煮熟捞起
热锅放油 15 ml 放入拍碎的大蒜爆香
放入鸡腿中小火煎至两面金黄，如果感觉锅中太干，补 5-10 ml 油
加入调好的酱汁，盖好盖子中小火（在燃气灶上使用小火）焖 5-10 分钟熟透，酱汁浓稠起泡即可
切件，和蔬菜一起摆在饭面，淋入煎鸡腿的酱汁就可以慢慢享用啦
steps_en: Take a chicken leg and place it skin side down on the cutting board
Use the tip of a knife to gently cut along the outline of the chicken leg bone, from one end to the other.
Use your fingers or the back of a knife to slowly push apart the chicken to expose the bones. If fascia is encountered, cut it off with the tip of a knife
When the chicken is completely separated, hold one end of the bone, gently twist and pull out
Repeat the above steps to debone all chicken legs
Add boneless chicken legs, add black pepper powder, cracked black pepper, salt and ginger slices and marinate for 5 minutes
Add cooking wine, light soy sauce, honey, dark soy sauce and water into the bowl and mix well
Blanch the vegetables for 1-2 minutes until cooked and remove
Heat 15 ml of oil in a pan, add chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant
Add the chicken legs and fry over medium-low heat until both sides are golden brown. If the pan feels too dry, add 5-10 ml of oil.
Add the prepared sauce, cover and simmer over medium-low heat (use low heat on a gas stove) for 5-10 minutes until the sauce is thick and bubbly.
Cut into pieces, place on top of rice with vegetables, pour in the sauce from the fried chicken legs and enjoy slowly.

intro_zh:
一道家常蛋炒饭，金黄的蛋丝裹着粒粒分明的米饭，搭配火腿、胡萝卜和黄瓜，口感丰富，咸香适口。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白，胡萝卜增添维生素，碳水化合物带来充足能量。制作步骤稍多，但新手按流程操作也能成功，全程大约需要 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：853 大卡
intro_en:
A home-style egg fried rice, golden egg shreds wrapped in crispy rice, paired with ham, carrots and cucumbers, rich in texture, salty and delicious. Eggs provide high-quality protein, carrots add vitamins, and carbohydrates provide sufficient energy. There are a little more steps to make, but novices can still succeed if they follow the process. The whole process takes about 25 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 853 kcal
ingredients_zh: 灯影牛肉丝/午餐肉/腊肠/卤肉...等熟肉（备选）
鸡蛋 （份数*1.5 // 1 向下取整）
ingredients_en: Dengying shredded beef/luncheon meat/sausage/braised pork...and other cooked meats (optional)
steps_zh: 米饭提前用铲子铲成小块
火腿肠、胡萝卜、黄瓜等根据需求切片或者块状
如果家里有熟肉 准备好味道更佳
将蛋白，蛋黄分开，分别打入一个大碗里，各自搅匀。注意，不要在这一步加盐。
大火热锅，待锅里冒烟放入食用油，放入蛋白，待主体凝固后盛出备用。
如果油够，则直接放入蛋黄，如果油不够则放入食用油并等其升温到大火热锅
待主体凝固后，将火调至中小火，倒入火腿肠、熟肉，胡萝卜、黄瓜等备料、翻炒 10 秒钟（到爆香）
重新倒入蛋白，翻炒 5s 钟，迅速倒入米饭大火翻炒，为的就是每一粒饭都裹上鸡蛋。
翻炒过程中将米饭的块状捣碎、这一步过程会比较长、待米饭全部捣碎再翻炒均匀即可
调至小火、加盐、胡椒粉、生抽
进一步翻炒均匀，能看到一些米饭在锅里有“跳起来”的时候其实就已经差不多了
最后倒入香葱再翻炒 10s
关火、盛入碗中
steps_en: Use a shovel to cut the rice into small pieces in advance
Ham sausage, carrots, cucumbers, etc. sliced or cubed as needed
If you have cooked meat at home, prepare it to taste better
Separate the egg whites and egg yolks into a large bowl and mix well. Be careful not to add salt at this step.
Heat a pot over high heat, add cooking oil when the pot starts to smoke, add egg whites, wait until the main body solidifies, take it out and set aside.
If there is enough oil, add the egg yolk directly. If there is not enough oil, add cooking oil and wait for it to heat up to high heat.

After the main body is solidified, reduce the heat to medium-low, pour in the ham sausage, cooked meat, carrots, cucumbers and other ingredients, and stir-fry for 10 seconds (until it becomes fragrant)
Pour in the egg whites again and stir-fry for 5 seconds. Quickly add the rice and stir-fry over high heat so that every grain of rice is coated with eggs.
During the stir-frying process, mash the lumps of rice. This step will take a long time. Once all the rice is mashed, stir-fry evenly.
Reduce heat to low, add salt, pepper, and light soy sauce
Stir-fry further and evenly. When you can see some of the rice "jumping" in the pot, it's almost done.
Finally add the chives and stir-fry for 10 seconds
Turn off the heat and put into a bowl

intro_zh:
螺蛳粉是广西柳州的特色小吃，汤鲜味浓，酸辣爽口，米粉软滑筋道。口味上融合了螺蛳汤的鲜美、酸笋的独特发酵风味和辣椒油的刺激，层次分明。作为主食，米粉提供充足碳水化合物，螺蛳肉包和配料带来一定蛋白质，酸笋则有助于开胃促消化。这道菜所需操作简单，只需按顺序煮熟米粉和调味即可，对新手非常友好。从烧水到出锅，最快约十分钟就能端上餐桌，适合快手解决一餐。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：1109 大卡
intro_en:
Snail noodles are a specialty snack in Liuzhou, Guangxi. The soup is rich in flavor, spicy and sour, and the rice noodles are soft and chewy. The taste combines the deliciousness of snail soup, the unique fermented flavor of sour bamboo shoots and the stimulation of chili oil, with distinct layers. As a staple food, rice noodles provide sufficient carbohydrates, snail meat buns and toppings provide a certain amount of protein, and sour bamboo shoots help to stimulate appetite and promote digestion. This dish requires simple operations, just cook the rice noodles and season them in order, making it very friendly to novices. From boiling water to taking out the pot, it can be on the table in about ten minutes at the fastest, making it perfect for a quick meal.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 1109 kcal
ingredients_zh: 袋装螺蛳粉一包，其中应该包含：
根据个人经验，一包袋装螺蛳粉足够一人一餐食（虽然看着很大包）
ingredients_en: A bag of snail noodles should contain:
According to personal experience, one bag of snail noodles is enough for one person (although it looks very big)
steps_zh: 锅中加水，将水烧开
下米粉，煮 3-5 分钟，期间用筷子搅拌，防止米粉粘在一起
下汤料包，按个人口味添加
下一部分配料包，如木耳，花生，螺蛳（这部分配料需要煮一会才入味）
下调味包，按个人口味添加
搅拌后捞出，放入碗中
下剩下的配料包，如酸笋，豆皮（这部分配料不适合被汤泡太久）
享用美食
steps_en: Add water to the pot and bring the water to a boil
Add the rice noodles and cook for 3-5 minutes, stirring with chopsticks to prevent the rice noodles from sticking together.
Add the soup packet and add according to personal taste
The next part of the ingredients package, such as fungus, peanuts, snails (this part of the ingredients needs to be cooked for a while before it tastes)
Add seasoning packets and add according to personal taste
After stirring, take it out and put it into a bowl
Add the remaining ingredients, such as pickled bamboo shoots and tofu skin (this part of the ingredients is not suitable for soaking in the soup for too long)
Enjoy the food

intro_zh:
这是一道闽南风味的主食，年糕软糯弹牙，带着葱油的焦香，家常又饱腹。以米粉制成的年糕提供充足碳水化合物，搭配鸡蛋和青菜能补充蛋白质与维生素，营养均衡。做法简单，对新手友好，从准备到出锅大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：960 大卡
intro_en:
This is a staple food of southern Fujian style. The rice cake is soft, glutinous and chewy, with the aroma of scallion oil. It is homely and filling. Rice cakes made from rice flour provide sufficient carbohydrates, and paired with eggs and vegetables, they can supplement protein and vitamins for a balanced nutrition. It’s simple, novice-friendly, and takes about 30 minutes from prep to dish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 960 kcal
ingredients_zh: 盐 1-2g * 份数，按口味喜好。
ingredients_en: Rice cake/white cake (no limit on shape)
Rice cake 250 g * number of servings
Salt 1-2g * portion, according to taste preference.
steps_zh: 锅中加水烧开，煮熟年糕，碗中加水确保年糕不会粘连，捞起年糕备用。
小葱切葱花（将葱白和葱叶分开），青菜切小段备用。
（可选） 制作炒蛋，见[西红柿炒蛋](https://github.com/Anduin2017/HowToCook/blob/master/dishes/vegetable_dish/%E8%A5%BF%E7%BA%A2%E6%9F%BF%E7%82%92%E9%B8%A1%E8%9B%8B.md)。
热锅，加入 30ml 食用油。
将葱白倒入锅中，直至大部分葱白变成焦黄色且发出香味，倒出葱油备用。
重新热锅，加入 20ml 食用油。
加入所有辅料（鸡蛋，青菜等），翻炒均匀。
将年糕的水倒掉，向锅中加入年糕。
加入酱油和盐，翻炒均匀。
关火，加入葱油，翻炒均匀，乘盘。
steps_en: Add water to the pot and bring to a boil to cook the rice cakes. Add water to a bowl to ensure that the rice cakes will not stick to each other. Remove the rice cakes and set aside.
Chop the shallots into finely chopped green onions (separate the green onions and leaves), and cut the green vegetables into small sections and set aside.
(Optional) To make scrambled eggs, see [Tomato Scrambled Eggs](https://github.com/Anduin2017/HowToCook/blob/master/dishes/vegetable_dish/%E8%A5%BF%E7%BA%A2%E6%9F%BF%E7%82%92%E9%B8%A1%E8%9B%8B.md).
Heat the pan and add 30ml cooking oil.
Pour the scallions into the pot until most of the scallions turn brown and become fragrant. Pour out the scallion oil and set aside.
Reheat the pan and add 20ml cooking oil.
Add all the ingredients (eggs, vegetables, etc.) and stir-fry evenly.
Pour off the water from the rice cakes and add the rice cakes to the pot.
Add soy sauce and salt and stir-fry evenly.
Turn off the heat, add scallion oil, stir-fry evenly, and serve.

intro_zh:
这是一道豫南地区经典的家常面食，荤素搭配，面条吸足汤汁，口感软韧，咸香入味。五花肉提供优质蛋白质和脂肪，芹菜富含膳食纤维。做法简单易学，新手也能从容上手，整体制作约需一小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1563 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic home-cooked noodle dish in southern Henan. It is a combination of meat and vegetables. The noodles soak up the soup, have a soft texture, and are salty and fragrant. Pork belly provides high-quality protein and fat, and celery is rich in dietary fiber. The method is simple and easy to learn, and even beginners can easily get started. The overall production takes about an hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1563 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鲜面条（要求必须是**最细**的，如果附近菜市场没有，请参考制作[焖面](https://note.youdao.com/)）
生抽,老抽,料酒,盐,五香粉
芹菜 两根中等大小的芹菜
ingredients_en: Fresh noodles (must be the thinnest ones. If there are no nearby vegetable markets, please refer to making [Stewed Noodles](https://note.youdao.com/))
Light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, cooking wine, salt, allspice
Steamer, need to bring a basket
Celery Two medium stalks of celery
steps_zh: 猪肉去皮，切成 `2 cm * 6 cm * 0.5 cm` 薄片备用
芹菜去叶，去掉根部 2cm，然后从中对半切开，切成 2cm 段备用
大蒜去皮切粒备用，葱切 0.2cm 薄片备用，姜切细丝备用
炒锅烧热至冒烟后，倒入 3ml 食用油滑锅后倒出底油
重新加入食用油，加入肉片，葱姜蒜，干红椒，炒 1 分钟，注意不停匀速翻炒
加入料酒，生抽，老抽，再翻炒 1 分钟
续入 500ml 热水。盖上锅盖炖煮 3 分钟
将芹菜，青椒倒入锅中，加入盐，五香粉调味，盖上锅盖继续炖煮煮 3 分钟 后关火
蒸锅加入 1000ml 水，烧开上汽后，将面条摊平在笼屉上放入锅中，蒸 15 分钟
面条蒸熟后取出，用筷子和无情铁手扒拉散开在案板上，室温冷却
将面条放入菜锅中搅拌，搅拌方式为一手持筷，一手持锅铲将菜翻至面条上面，以面条以全部均匀上色为搅拌完成标准
将搅拌后的面条再次放在整屉上，再次蒸 10 分钟 关火
steps_en: Peel the pork and cut into 2 cm * 6 cm * 0.5 cm thin slices for later use
Remove the leaves from the celery, remove 2cm from the root, then cut it in half and cut it into 2cm sections for later use.
Peel and dice the garlic and set aside, cut the green onion into 0.2cm thin slices and set aside, and cut the ginger into thin strips and set aside.
Heat the wok until smoking, pour 3ml cooking oil into the wok and pour out the base oil
Add the cooking oil again, add the meat slices, onion, ginger, garlic, and dried red pepper, and stir-fry for 1 minute. Be sure to stir-fry evenly.
Add cooking wine, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add 500ml hot water. Cover and simmer for 3 minutes
Pour the celery and green pepper into the pot, add salt and five-spice powder to taste, cover the pot and continue to simmer for 3 minutes, then turn off the heat.
Add 1000ml water to the steamer, bring it to a boil, spread the noodles flat on the basket, put them into the pot, and steam for 15 minutes
After the noodles are steamed, take them out, use chopsticks and ruthless iron hands to spread them out on the chopping board, and let them cool to room temperature.

Put the noodles into the cooking pot and stir. Hold chopsticks in one hand and a spatula in the other to turn the vegetables over the noodles. The mixing is completed until all the noodles are evenly colored.
Place the stirred noodles on the whole tray again and steam for another 10 minutes. Turn off the heat.

intro_zh:
手工水饺是一道中式经典主食，皮薄馅大、鲜美多汁，饱腹又可以根据个人口味随意调味。猪肉馅提供优质蛋白质和脂肪，搭配韭菜还能补充维生素与膳食纤维。这道菜品对新手来说难度较高，需要掌握和面、擀皮、调馅和煮饺的火候，预计制作时间约 3 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1313 大卡
intro_en:
Handmade dumplings are a classic Chinese staple food, with thin skin and large fillings, delicious and juicy. They are filling and can be seasoned according to personal taste. Pork filling provides high-quality protein and fat, and when paired with leeks, it can also supplement vitamins and dietary fiber. This dish is more difficult for novices. It requires mastering the dough, rolling out the dough, adjusting the fillings and cooking the dumplings. It is expected to take about 3 hours to make.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1313 kcal
ingredients_en: Pots with a diameter of 30cm or more
Fatty minced pork 20g #don’t add if you don’t like it
steps_zh: 盆中加入所有面粉
加入芝麻香油
面粉中央挖小洞
分 4-5 次加入水，并搅和，当出现碎末状的稍微干燥面团时
取消加水，用手将面团压实
面团压实至可把盆周围的面粉纳入即可，此步骤为面光盆光
将面团置于桌上，盆倒扣于桌上，环境温度为 25 度，使面团醒发约 45 分钟
醒发完成后，将面团搓成条状，合成一团，再次搓成条，重复 3 次
擀成条状，切成 20 份均匀大小面团，并搓成直径约 3-3.5cm 的球状
压扁面团，在手上，桌上，擀面杖上，及面团上撒上面粉，此步骤防止面团发粘
用擀面杖将面团擀平，约 8cm 直径，厚约 2mm，中间略微比四周厚 1mm
猪肉去皮,保留部分肥肉,切成小块
菜刀（建议两把）将猪肉剁成肉沫,放入碗中
葱、姜切成末,放入肉碗中搅拌均匀
韭菜洗净,切短至 3mm 以下长度
韭菜和肉沫混合,加入蚝油、生抽、香油各 2ml,加入一个鸡蛋的蛋清,用手混合搅拌均匀
放置 30 分钟即可开始包饺子
左手上放面皮，放饺子馅一面尽量不要粘到面粉，防止无法合拢
右手用筷子夹约面皮 1/2 直径的馅
沿饺子皮圆周进行合拢，捏实，个人吃无需捏花，饺子皮不漏即可
使用可放下 20 只饺子的锅，或分批量煮
烧水，水约 3/4 锅的高度
大火烧开水后放入饺子，调至中火
第一次放入饺子，且水冒泡后，锅边加入 50ml 冷水（重复此步骤两次）
第三次水开后加入冷水 50ml，水开后调至小火等 60s 即可出锅
steps_en: Add all the flour to the basin
Add sesame oil
Make a small hole in the center of the flour
Add water in 4-5 times and stir until a slightly dry dough appears.
Cancel adding water and press the dough with your hands
The dough is compacted until it can incorporate the flour around the basin. This step is the dough polishing process.
Place the dough on the table, turn the basin upside down on the table, and let the dough rise for about 45 minutes at an ambient temperature of 25 degrees.
After proofing, roll the dough into strips, form a ball, roll into strips again, repeat 3 times
Roll the dough into strips, cut into 20 pieces of evenly sized dough, and roll into balls about 3-3.5cm in diameter.
Flatten the dough and sprinkle flour on your hands, on the table, on the rolling pin, and on top of the dough to prevent the dough from becoming sticky.
Use a rolling pin to roll the dough flat, about 8cm in diameter and about 2mm thick, with the middle slightly thicker than the surrounding 1mm.
Peel the pork, keep some of the fat, and cut into small pieces
Use a kitchen knife (two are recommended) to chop the pork into minced meat and put it into a bowl
Chop onion and ginger into mince, add to meat bowl and stir evenly
Wash the leeks and cut into lengths of less than 3mm
Mix the leeks and minced meat, add 2ml each of oyster sauce, light soy sauce, and sesame oil, add the egg white of an egg, and mix well with your hands.
Leave for 30 minutes to start making dumplings
Place the dough on your left hand, and try not to stick the flour to the dumpling filling side to prevent it from being able to close up.
Use chopsticks in your right hand to pick up about 1/2 the diameter of the dough.
Gather along the circumference of the dumpling skin and pinch it firmly. You don’t need to pinch the flowers to eat it individually, as long as the dumpling skin does not leak.
Use a pot that holds 20 dumplings, or cook in batches
Boil water to about 3/4 of the height of the pot
Bring the water to a boil over high heat, add the dumplings, and turn to medium heat
After the dumplings are put in for the first time and the water bubbles, add 50ml cold water to the side of the pot (repeat this step twice)
After the water boils for the third time, add 50ml of cold water. After the water boils, turn to low heat and wait 60 seconds before serving.

intro_zh:
炒馍是一道咸香酥脆的家常面食，属于北方风味。馒头丁炒至金黄，外脆里软，孜然与五香粉的加入让风味更加浓郁。可搭配鸡蛋提供蛋白质，搭配小葱增添清香，营养均衡。制作难度适中，新手也能很快上手，预计 大约 15 分钟即可出锅享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：767 大卡
intro_en:
Fried buns are a salty and crispy home-cooked noodle dish with a northern flavor. The diced steamed buns are fried until golden brown, crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. The addition of cumin and five-spice powder makes the flavor more intense. It can be paired with eggs to provide protein and green onions to add fragrance and balanced nutrition. It is moderately difficult to make and can be easily picked up by novices. It is expected to be ready in about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 767 kcal
ingredients_zh: 馒头 2 个（隔天略硬更好）
油 20ml（花生油或芝麻油更好）
ingredients_en: Steamed buns (slightly harder the next day, better)
2 steamed buns (harder the next day, better)
Oil 20ml (peanut oil or sesame oil is better)
steps_zh: 将馒头切成小块或小片。
选有鸡蛋的话将鸡蛋打进碗里，打散（可加盐和五香粉各 1g 或不加，等炒的过程中加）。
鸡蛋浇在馒头上，拌匀，鸡蛋不宜过多。
大火热锅，倒入食用油（不锈钢锅怕伤锅的话可以先倒油，烧至油热也可也可）
将馍丁放进去翻炒，翻炒均匀。
将火调小，炒至馍丁呈金黄色。
放入盐，胡椒粉，五香粉。
最后将葱花放入一起翻炒几下。
关火出锅。
steps_en: Cut the steamed buns into small pieces or slices.
If you choose eggs, break them into a bowl and beat them up (you can add 1g each of salt and five-spice powder or not, and add them during the frying process).
Pour the eggs on the steamed buns and mix well. Don't overdo it.
Heat the pot over high heat and pour in the cooking oil (if you are afraid of damaging the stainless steel pot, you can pour the oil first and heat it until the oil is hot)
Add the diced buns and stir-fry evenly.
Reduce the heat to low and stir-fry until the buns turn golden brown.
Add salt, pepper, and allspice.
Finally, add the chopped green onions and stir-fry for a few times.
Turn off the heat and remove from the pot.

intro_zh:
这是一道江南风味的精致点心，皮薄如纸，馅料饱满多汁，咬开时肉香、笋鲜与皮冻融化后的汤汁交融，咸中带甜，口感软嫩弹牙。猪肉和虾仁提供优质蛋白质，冬笋与香菇增添膳食纤维和微量元素，低脂版本进一步减少了饱和脂肪。虽然包制手法需要一点耐心，但整体步骤清晰，新手多加练习也能掌握，从拌馅到出锅大约需要一小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1485 大卡
intro_en:
This is a delicate snack with Jiangnan flavor. The skin is as thin as paper, and the filling is plump and juicy. When you bite into it, the meat, fresh bamboo shoots and the soup after the skin jelly melts blend together. It is salty and sweet, and has a soft and chewy texture. Pork and shrimp provide high-quality protein, winter bamboo shoots and shiitake mushrooms add dietary fiber and trace elements, and the low-fat version further reduces saturated fat. Although the wrapping technique requires a little patience, the overall steps are clear and even a novice can master it with more practice. It takes about an hour from mixing the stuffing to taking it out of the pan.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1485 kcal
ingredients_zh: 猪肉末（肥瘦 3:7，如果想做低脂版本，用猪里脊肉或猪前腿肉）
香菇（或干香菇泡发，可选）
复配食品增稠剂（κ-卡拉胶 45%、瓜尔胶 35%、氯化钾 20%）（或玉米淀粉）（低脂版本）
蒸笼垫（推荐顺序为刷油竹垫、草垫、粽叶、带孔硅油纸，传统上用草垫，现在更多用带孔硅油纸）
烧卖皮 240-465 g（约 24-31 张，建议用每张 10g 的烧卖皮 30 张）
猪肉末 300 g（低脂版本用猪里脊或猪前腿肉 280 g）
盐 3-5 g（如果使用浓汤宝，减少 3 g）
浓汤宝 6 g（建议家乐牌，约 1/8 块）
香菇 75 g（或干香菇 30 g 泡发）
复配食品增稠剂 1.2 g（或玉米淀粉 2 g）
ingredients_en: Minced pork (fat to lean ratio 3:7, if you want to make a low-fat version, use pork loin or pork shank)
Minced green onion (only use the green part)
Shiitake mushrooms (or soaked dried shiitake mushrooms, optional)
Compound food thickener (κ-carrageenan 45%, guar gum 35%, potassium chloride 20%) (or corn starch) (low-fat version)

Steamer mat (the recommended order is oiled bamboo mat, straw mat, rice dumpling leaves, and perforated silicone paper. Traditionally, straw mats are used, but now more perforated silicone paper is used)
Siomai skin 240-465 g (about 24-31 pieces, it is recommended to use 30 pieces of Siomai skin with 10g each)
300 g minced pork (for a low-fat version use 280 g pork loin or pork shank)
Salt 3-5 g (if using puree, reduce 3 g)
6 g thick soup (recommended Knorr brand, about 1/8 piece)
75 g shiitake mushrooms (or 30 g dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked)
Compound food thickener 1.2 g (or 2 g corn starch)
steps_zh: （低脂版本）取 10 mL 冷水，加入复配食品增稠剂，调成糊糊
（低脂版本）加入 25 mL 开水，搅拌至半透明凝胶
（低脂版本）冷却后混入 280 g 纯瘦肉糜 + 15 g 融化猪油（或鸡油）
将猪肉末与生姜末、葱末混合，加入酱油、料酒、盐、糖、白胡椒粉，顺一个方向搅拌上劲
如果使用浓汤宝，取浓汤宝块加入 15 mL 热水混合，搅拌至乳浊液完全分散，再加入 15 mL 常温水
慢慢加入水或高汤，继续搅拌，直到馅料吸收水分，变得粘稠，如果觉得肉馅太稠，补 5 mL 水继续搅拌
加入可选配料（冬笋、皮冻、香菇），最后淋上芝麻油，拌匀。冷藏 30 分钟，让味道融合
取一张烧卖皮，放上约 20-25 g 馅料（别太贪心，否则包不住）
用虎口轻轻收拢皮子边缘，形成“花瓶”状，顶部留开口
用手指轻轻压实底部，确保站立稳定
如果要加虾仁，在顶部加一颗虾仁
重复包烧卖的步骤，直到包好
放在蒸笼里，间隔开，避免粘连
大火蒸 8-10 分钟即可
steps_en: (Low-fat version) Take 10 mL of cold water, add compound food thickener, and mix into a paste
(Low-fat version) Add 25 mL boiling water and stir until translucent gel
(Low-fat version) Cool and mix in 280 g pure lean minced pork + 15 g melted lard (or chicken fat)
Mix the minced pork with minced ginger and green onion, add soy sauce, cooking wine, salt, sugar and white pepper, stir in one direction.
If using a thick soup cube, add 15 mL of hot water to the thick soup cube, stir until the emulsion is completely dispersed, and then add 15 mL of room temperature water.
Slowly add water or stock and continue stirring until the filling absorbs water and becomes thick. If you feel the meat filling is too thick, add 5 mL of water and continue stirring.
Add optional ingredients (bamboo shoots, jelly skin, mushrooms), and finally drizzle with sesame oil and mix well. Refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld
Take a piece of siomai skin and put about 20-25 g of fillings (don’t be too greedy, otherwise you won’t be able to wrap it)
Use the tiger's mouth to gently gather the edges of the leather to form a "vase" shape, leaving an opening at the top.
Gently press the bottom with your fingers to ensure a stable standing
If you want to add shrimp, add one shrimp on top
Repeat the steps of wrapping the siomai until it is wrapped well
Place in a steamer, spaced apart to avoid sticking
Steam over high heat for 8-10 minutes

intro_zh:
醪糟小汤圆是一道香甜软糯的传统中式甜品，酒酿的微酸与糯米的绵滑交融，暖胃又舒心。它富含碳水化合物和少量 B 族维生素，能快速补充能量，也有助促进血液循环。做法毫无门槛，对新手特别友好，从烧水到出锅只需约 15 分钟，是一碗随时都能轻松完成的家常甜汤。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：957 大卡
intro_en:
Rice dumplings with fermented glutinous rice are a traditional Chinese dessert that is sweet and glutinous. The slight acidity of the fermented rice wine blends with the smoothness of the glutinous rice, which is both stomach-warming and comforting. It is rich in carbohydrates and a small amount of B vitamins, which provides a quick energy boost and also helps improve blood circulation. There are no barriers to making this recipe, and it is especially friendly to novices. It only takes about 15 minutes from boiling water to taking it out of the pot. It is a home-cooked sweet soup that can be easily prepared at any time.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 957 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小汤圆 250 克 * 份数
ingredients_en: Small glutinous rice balls 250 g * serving size
steps_zh: 将水倒入锅中并煮沸
放入小汤圆煮 8 分钟
放入醪糟和枸杞再煮 2 分钟
盛入碗中根据个人口味加入白糖并搅拌均匀
吃
steps_en: Pour water into pot and bring to boil
Add the glutinous rice balls and cook for 8 minutes
Add glutinous rice and wolfberry and cook for another 2 minutes
Put it into a bowl, add sugar according to personal taste and stir evenly
eat

intro_zh:
炒凉粉是一道山西、陕西地区的特色小吃，入口滑嫩，咸香微辣，带着蒜香和酱香。凉粉主要由淀粉制成，能提供丰富的碳水化合物，快速补充能量。烹饪难度适中，适合有一定基础的新手尝试，全程制作大约需要 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：567 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried jelly is a special snack in Shanxi and Shaanxi regions. It is smooth and tender in the mouth, salty and slightly spicy, with the aroma of garlic and soy sauce. Jelly is mainly made of starch, which can provide rich carbohydrates and quickly replenish energy. The cooking difficulty is moderate and suitable for novices with a certain basic knowledge. The whole process takes about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 567 kcal
steps_zh: 凉粉改刀切麻将块大小
开小火，起锅烧油，锅烧微热后，下入蒜末爆香后加入豆瓣酱炒出红油
将凉粉块下入锅中，翻炒 10 秒
加入生抽提味，老抽上色，翻炒均匀后加入辣椒面继续翻炒均匀
加入食盐、十三香继续翻炒 10 秒
加入准备好的矿泉水，再次翻炒 10 秒，待汤汁浓稠后，关火出锅装盘
撒上葱花即可完成
steps_en: Cut the jelly into mahjong pieces
Turn on low heat and heat the oil in a pan. After the pan is slightly hot, add minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add bean paste and stir-fry until red oil appears.
Add the jelly cubes into the pot and stir-fry for 10 seconds
Add light soy sauce to enhance the flavor, dark soy sauce to add color, stir-fry evenly, then add chili powder and continue to stir-fry evenly.
Add salt and thirteen spices and continue stir-frying for 10 seconds
Add the prepared mineral water, stir-fry again for 10 seconds, until the soup thickens, turn off the heat and serve on a plate
Sprinkle with chopped green onions and it's done

intro_zh:
这道家常烙饼层次分明，外皮酥脆内里柔软，带着油酥的焦香，是北方餐桌上常见的主食。主要提供碳水化合物和能量，适合搭配菜肴一起食用。制作需要一点手法，尤其卷酥和擀饼环节，但跟着步骤操作并不难，新手也能掌握。从和面到烙好，大约需要 1 个小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1185 大卡
intro_en:
This home-style pancake has distinct layers, crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, with a crispy burnt aroma. It is a common staple food on northern dining tables. It mainly provides carbohydrates and energy and is suitable for consumption with dishes. It requires a bit of skill to make, especially the rolling and rolling out the cakes, but it is not difficult to follow the steps and can be mastered by novices. It takes about 1 hour from kneading to baking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1185 kcal
steps_zh: 将 400g 面粉倒入盆中，一半用凉水和面，一半用热水和面，搅拌成面絮，用手揉成团。用保鲜膜封起来，醒面 40 分钟
离醒面完成时间还有 10 分钟时，请查看[小技巧](../../condiment/油酥.md)中的油酥做法（热油酥效果更好）
醒好的面不用揉，稍微摁一下，用一横刀一竖刀将其分成四份。
搓圆，擀开，擀成与电饼铛大小差不多的饼，取 1/4 的油酥，将饼表面涂抹均匀
沿饼的半径切开，从外圈将其卷成圆锥形，然后将圆锥尾部捏好，防止油酥外漏。
按压面饼圆锥尖的地方，将其压扁，然后再次擀成与电饼铛大小差不多的面饼（厚度约为 3mm）
将电饼铛预热，涂上凉油（热锅凉油），将擀好的饼放入电饼铛中，将饼的上方也刷点油，涂抹均匀（锁住水分），盖上盖子
大火烙一分钟，打开盖子，将饼翻个面再烙一分钟
重复以上动作，完成饼的烙制
steps_en: Pour 400g of flour into a basin, mix half with cold water and half with hot water, stir into dough, and knead into a ball with your hands. Seal with plastic wrap and rest for 40 minutes
When there are still 10 minutes left before the dough is ready to rise, please check the puff pastry method in [Tips](../../condiment/ puff pastry.md) (hot puff pastry is more effective)
There is no need to knead the risen dough, just press it slightly and use a horizontal knife and a vertical knife to divide it into four parts.
Roll it into a ball, roll it out, and roll it into a cake about the same size as an electric baking pan. Take 1/4 of the pastry and spread it evenly on the surface of the cake.
Cut along the radius of the cake, roll it into a cone shape from the outer circle, and then pinch the end of the cone to prevent the pastry from leaking out.
Press the tip of the dough cone to flatten it, and then roll it out again into a dough about the same size as the electric baking pan (thickness is about 3mm)

Preheat the electric baking pan, apply cold oil (hot pan, cool oil), put the rolled out cake into the electric baking pan, brush some oil on top of the cake, spread evenly (to lock in moisture), and close the lid
Fry on high heat for one minute, open the lid, turn the cake over and fry for another minute.
Repeat the above actions to complete the baking of the cake.

intro_zh:
披萨饼皮采用低温隔夜发酵，成品饼底柔软又略带嚼劲，属于家常西式面点。主要提供碳水化合物和少量优质脂肪。制作流程简单，但需要耐心等待面团发酵，对新手也算友好。从准备到烘烤完成，算上隔夜冷藏时间大约需要 10-14 小时，适合提前一天备好。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：537 大卡
intro_en:
The pizza crust is fermented at low temperature overnight, and the finished crust is soft and slightly chewy, making it a homely Western-style pastry. Provide mainly carbohydrates and a small amount of good fats. The production process is simple, but you need to be patient and wait for the dough to ferment. It is also friendly to novices. From preparation to completion of baking, it takes about 10-14 hours including overnight refrigeration time, so it is suitable to be prepared a day in advance.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 537 kcal
ingredients_zh: 披萨石（有更好，没有普通烤盘也可以）
ingredients_en: Pizza stone (it’s better if you don’t have a regular baking pan)
steps_zh: 用准备好的温水把酵母粉化开，稍微搅拌小就好，备用
取准备好的面粉，依次添加盐、橄榄油、白砂糖
准备混合水和面粉，边加水边搅拌直至水全部加完
搅拌至看不到干米粉为止
用差不多三倍大面团的容器装好，密封，冰箱冷藏（4 度） **等待 8~12 小时，一般晚上做第二天就可以用**
观察面团醒发完毕 **差不多是原始大小大约两倍算醒发完毕**
取醒发好的面团，均匀分成四份，分别用保鲜膜盖好，备用
案板撒稍微多一点的干面粉，准备开始揉面
因为是比较湿的面团，所以粘上干面粉后才没那么粘手，不用揉太多次，面团表面稍微光滑一点就可以了
用手拉扯，或者擀面杖擀平，也不一定非得擀圆，只要厚度均匀，烤箱放得进去就好
铺好油纸，放上饼皮，依照个人口味，把准备好的食材放上去，撒上芝士碎
水果烤箱上 180 度，下 220 度，16 分钟即可
肉蔬菜烤箱上 200 度，下 230 度，18 分钟即可
挤上沙拉酱或者其他自己喜欢的酱即可享用~
steps_en: Dissolve the yeast powder with the prepared warm water, stir it slightly and set aside.
Take the prepared flour and add salt, olive oil, and white sugar in sequence.
Prepare to mix water and flour, add water while stirring until all water is added
Stir until no dry rice flour can be seen
Put it into a container that is about three times the size of the dough, seal it, and refrigerate it (4 degrees) **Wait for 8~12 hours, usually make it at night and use it the next day**
Observe that the dough has risen. **It is almost twice the original size and is considered complete**
Take the risen dough, divide it evenly into four portions, cover each portion with plastic wrap, and set aside.
Sprinkle a little more dry flour on the chopping board and prepare to start kneading the dough
Because it is a relatively wet dough, it is less sticky after adding dry flour. You don’t need to knead it too many times. The surface of the dough will be slightly smooth.
Pull it with your hands, or roll it flat with a rolling pin. It doesn't have to be rolled into a round shape. As long as the thickness is uniform and the oven can fit it, it will be fine.
Lay out the parchment paper, put the crust on it, put the prepared ingredients on top according to your personal taste, and sprinkle with grated cheese
Fruit oven at 180 degrees upper and 220 degrees lower, 16 minutes
For meat and vegetables, bake in the oven at 200 degrees upper and 230 degrees lower for 18 minutes.
Squeeze on salad dressing or other sauces of your choice and enjoy~

intro_zh:
日式咖喱饭是一道浓郁醇厚的家常和风料理，以咖喱块调味，搭配土豆、胡萝卜、洋葱和肉类，口感顺滑绵密、辛香微甜。它富含蛋白质、碳水与多种维生素，能为身体提供充足能量。做法整体不算复杂，但需要掌握火候与搅拌技巧，适合稍有下厨经验的朋友尝试。从备料到出锅约需 1 小时，冷藏后风味更佳。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：730 大卡
intro_en:
Japanese curry rice is a rich and mellow home-style Japanese cuisine, seasoned with curry cubes and paired with potatoes, carrots, onions and meat. It has a smooth, creamy, spicy and slightly sweet taste. It is rich in protein, carbohydrates and multiple vitamins, which can provide the body with sufficient energy. The overall method is not complicated, but it requires mastery of heat and stirring skills. It is suitable for friends with a little cooking experience to try. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to serving, and the flavor will be better after being refrigerated.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 730 kcal
ingredients_en: Meat (pork, chicken, beef are all acceptable)
steps_zh: 胡萝卜去头尾，去皮，滚刀切
洋葱剥去外层去芯，切成月牙状
土豆去皮、切大块
肉切块状
剥蒜拍平切碎
咖喱块切碎，增加接触面积加速溶解
热油锅放入蒜和肉，**快速翻炒**至肉*表面变白*
加入胡萝卜，**快速翻炒**至均匀受热
加入洋葱，**快速翻炒**至洋葱*变透明状*
加入土豆，保持翻炒至土豆*变软*（可以用筷子确认）
加水没过所有食材，沸腾后**等待 15 分钟**
关火，加咖喱并搅拌
等待咖喱融化后再开火，缓慢**搅拌 10 分钟**，防止糊锅
在外观*呈粘稠状态*关火结束制作
微波炉：单人份高火 2-3 分钟
锅：需额外加 50ml 水，加热时保持搅拌
steps_en: Remove heads and tails from carrots, peel and cut with hob
Peel and core the onion and cut into crescent shapes
Peel potatoes and cut into large pieces
Meat cut into cubes
Peel garlic, flatten and chop finely
Chop the curry cubes into small pieces to increase the contact area and accelerate dissolution
Heat the oil in the pan and add the garlic and meat, stir-fry **quickly** until the surface of the meat turns white*
Add the carrots and stir-fry **quickly** until evenly heated
Add onions and stir-fry **quickly** until onions *turn translucent*
Add the potatoes and keep stirring until the potatoes become *soft* (you can use chopsticks to confirm)
Add water to cover all ingredients and wait for 15 minutes after boiling**
Turn off the heat, add the curry and stir
Wait for the curry to melt before turning on the heat and stirring slowly for 10 minutes to prevent burning.
When the appearance is *viscous* turn off the heat and finish the production
Microwave: Single serving on high for 2-3 minutes
Pot: need to add 50ml additional water, keep stirring while heating
file_path: dishes/staple/日式咖喱饭/日式咖喱饭.md

intro_zh:
这款基础牛奶面包通过酵头预发酵简化了传统面包的制作，成品奶香浓郁，质地松软。富含碳水化合物和蛋白质，能为身体提供能量。难度适中，适合烘焙新手尝试，全程大约需要 200 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：2048 大卡
intro_en:
This basic milk bread simplifies the making of traditional bread through starter fermentation. The finished product has a rich milky aroma and a soft texture. Rich in carbohydrates and protein, it provides energy to the body. The difficulty level is moderate and suitable for novice bakers. The whole process takes about 200 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 2048 kcal
ingredients_zh: 高筋或中筋面粉 *（尽量使用高筋面粉，但**避免使用低筋面粉**。所有无特殊说明的“万能面粉”均为中筋面粉）*
鸡蛋 *（不过分要求大小及重量）*
牛奶或淡奶油或炼乳或奶粉 *（最好使用**奶粉**，奶香味十足，但**不要使用任何复方奶粉**，如成人奶粉或婴儿奶粉，因为化学性质不稳定。同时可以两种奶制品混合使用。尽量**避免选用额外含糖**的原料，因为实际含糖量会多于本食谱建议加糖量）*
黄油或玉米油 *（如果**选用的奶制品含脂量极高可以不加**。黄油尽量选用动脂无盐的。豆油可能会有豆腥味，尽量不要使用。）*
烤箱 *（**不要使用不带控温的烤箱**）*
*注意：虽然给出了原料的具体用量，但室内温度、室内湿度甚至是空气中酵母菌的含量都会影响制作过程。本食谱会在制作过程中尽可能地给予调整建议。**
ingredients_en: High-gluten or all-purpose flour* (Try to use high-gluten flour, but **avoid using low-gluten flour**. All "all-purpose flour" without special instructions is all-purpose flour)*

Milk or light cream or condensed milk or milk powder* (It is best to use **milk powder**, which is full of milk flavor, but **do not use any compound milk powder**, such as adult milk powder or infant milk powder, because of its unstable chemical properties. You can mix the two milk products at the same time. Try to avoid using raw materials containing extra sugar**, because the actual sugar content will be more than the recommended amount of sugar in this recipe)*

Butter or corn oil * (If the dairy product you choose has a very high fat content, you can omit the addition of butter. Try to use animal fat and salt-free butter. Soybean oil may have a beany smell, so try not to use it.) *
Oven* (**Do not use an oven without temperature control**)*

*Note: Although specific amounts of ingredients are given, indoor temperature, indoor humidity, and even the amount of yeast in the air will affect the production process. This recipe will provide suggestions for adjustments as much as possible during the production process. **
steps_zh: 首先，将酵母和 ***30℃ 的温水*** 用刮刀或厨具混合均匀，静置 5 分钟。之后与面粉混合，搅拌均匀。此时的酵头应该是**特别粘稠**的面糊。
用布盖上面糊，将面糊放置到**温暖的地方**进行发酵，时长为 45 ~ 60 分钟。
最终的面糊应该是表面有很多气泡的且体积明显增大。
将剩下的原料全部与酵头用刮刀混合、搅拌。在搅拌时一定要刮壁，使其充分混合。在形成面团且没有干粉时，用干净的干燥的一只手按压面团，另一只手扶住容器，使其形成一个大的面团，然后倒在面板或硅胶垫上操作
用手掌下部推开面团，然后对折再次推开，直至表面没有干粉结块。这时的面团还不是很光滑。
使用喷壶将至少是当前面团三倍大的容器内喷上一层植物油（也可用手涂抹均匀），将面团放入并盖上布，发酵 1 小时。
此时面团应该有原来的两倍大。在面板或硅胶垫上撒上薄薄的一层面粉（可以看见面板或硅胶垫的厚度即可），然后将面团拿出，用手压瘪面团排气。
之后使用擀面杖，擀成 1 cm 的厚片。并紧实、不留空隙地从一边卷起来。
然后旋转 90° ，重复步骤 4、步骤 5 。
将面包整形，放到垫了硅油纸的烤盘或者涂抹油脂的模具内。注意接缝处朝下。
在托盘或模具内，发酵 30 ~ 45 分钟 。
于此同时，预热烤箱。
在面包上用剪子或者刀划开几条缝作为面包的花纹。
用刷子刷上蛋液。（可选）
放入烤箱，上下火 180℃ 烤制 30 分钟，然后调 165 ℃ 再烤 10 分钟。
放凉后装入食品袋内，可保存一个星期。冷冻可保存一个月。
steps_en: First, mix the yeast and ***30℃ warm water*** evenly with a spatula or kitchen utensil and let it sit for 5 minutes. Then mix with flour and mix well. The starter at this time should be a **particularly thick** batter.
Cover the batter with a cloth and place the batter in a **warm place** to ferment for 45 ~ 60 minutes.
The final batter should have many bubbles on the surface and have increased in volume significantly.

Mix all the remaining ingredients with the starter using a spatula and stir. Be sure to scrape the walls while stirring to mix thoroughly. When the dough is formed and there is no dry flour, use a clean, dry hand to press the dough, and hold the container with the other hand to form a large dough, and then pour it onto a panel or silicone mat for operation
Push the dough out with the lower part of your hand, then fold it in half and push it out again until there are no lumps of dry powder on the surface. The dough at this time is not very smooth yet.

Use a spray bottle to spray a layer of vegetable oil into a container that is at least three times the size of the current dough (you can also spread it evenly with your hands), put the dough in and cover with a cloth and let it ferment for 1 hour.

The dough should be twice as big at this point. Sprinkle a thin layer of flour on the panel or silicone mat (you can see the thickness of the panel or silicone mat), then take out the dough and press it with your hands to deflate the dough.
Then, using a rolling pin, roll it into a 1 cm thick piece. And roll it up from one side tightly without leaving any gaps.
Then rotate 90° and repeat steps 4 and 5.
Shape the bread and place it on a baking sheet lined with silicone paper or a greased mold. Note that the seams are facing downwards.
Ferment in a tray or mold for 30 to 45 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven.
Use scissors or a knife to cut a few slits on the bread to create the bread pattern.
Brush with egg wash. (optional)
Place in the oven and bake at 180°C for 30 minutes, then adjust to 165°C and bake for another 10 minutes.
Let it cool and put it into a food bag. It can be stored for one week. Can be kept frozen for up to one month.

intro_zh:
意式肉酱面是一道简单快手的家常西餐，酱汁浓郁、面条筋道，适合忙碌的日常。肉末和洋葱搭配成品意面酱，能快速补充蛋白质与碳水化合物，洋葱还含有膳食纤维。做法对初学者十分友好，全程只需简单切炒，熟练后 15 分钟就能端上桌，比方便面更满足。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：1199 大卡
intro_en:
Spaghetti Bolognese is a simple and quick home-cooked Western dish. The sauce is rich and the noodles are chewy. It is suitable for busy daily life. Minced meat and onions paired with finished pasta sauce can quickly replenish protein and carbohydrates. Onions also contain dietary fiber. The method is very friendly to beginners. It only requires simple cutting and frying. Once you are familiar with it, it can be served on the table in 15 minutes. It is more satisfying than instant noodles.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 1199 kcal
ingredients_zh: 意大利面 180 克（可以根据食量上下浮动）
肉沫 80 克（可以根据食量上下浮动）
洋葱大半个 （大约 150 克，通常是肉的两倍重）
意大利面酱 300 克（可以看情况上下浮动）
ingredients_en: White onions (purple onions will also work)
180 grams of pasta (can fluctuate depending on the amount of food)
80 grams minced meat (can fluctuate according to food intake)
Large onion half (about 150 grams, usually twice the weight of meat)
300g pasta sauce (can fluctuate depending on the situation)
steps_zh: 锅中加水，烧开后放入意面（等待 6 - 12 分钟）
在烧水的时候可以进行下面这些步骤，但请注意煮面的时间
洋葱切成小丁
空锅中倒油，中火下入洋葱碎
时刻搅拌，注意不要让洋葱烧糊，直到洋葱变成半透明状
下入肉沫，继续搅拌（搅散），直到肉末变成棕色
加入意大利面酱，稍微搅拌一下即可
把煮好的意大利面沥干水分并倒入肉酱中搅拌均匀即可（或者直接把做好的肉酱倒在意面上也行）
steps_en: Add water to the pot, bring to a boil and add pasta (wait 6-12 minutes)
You can perform the following steps when boiling water, but please pay attention to the cooking time.
Onion cut into small cubes
Pour oil into an empty pot and add chopped onions over medium heat
Stir constantly, taking care not to burn the onions, until the onions become translucent.
Add the minced meat and continue stirring (scattering) until the minced meat turns brown
Add spaghetti sauce and stir briefly
Drain the cooked pasta and pour it into the meat sauce and stir evenly (or just pour the prepared meat sauce directly onto the pasta)
file_path: dishes/staple/意式肉酱面/意式肉酱面.md

intro_zh:
河南蒸面条是源自河南的家常小吃，面条先蒸后炒再蒸，油润入味，口感劲道爽滑。五花肉和蒜薹提供丰富的蛋白质和膳食纤维，搭配主食带来均衡营养。制作步骤稍多一些，但对新手而言只要按顺序操作就能成功。从备料到出锅，总共约需 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：3066 大卡
intro_en:
Henan steamed noodles are a home-cooked snack originating from Henan. The noodles are first steamed, then stir-fried and then steamed again. They are oily and flavourful, with a chewy and smooth texture. Pork belly and garlic sprouts provide rich protein and dietary fiber, and bring balanced nutrition with staple food. There are a few more steps to make, but novices can succeed as long as they follow the order. From preparation to serving, it takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 3066 kcal
ingredients_zh: 葱 + 姜 + 蒜 + 料酒
盐 + 鸡精 + 十三香
生抽 + 老抽 + 蚝油
油 + 锅 + 菜刀 + 铲子
ingredients_en: Light soy sauce + dark soy sauce + oyster sauce
steps_zh: 起锅加 7 成水，水开，上蒸篦子
将挂面，均匀铺开放置，淋 5ml 油并抹匀，蒸 15 分钟
将挂面和蒸篦子取出，放置一边，并倒掉锅中的水
五花肉，切成 2mm 厚度的肉片
蒜薹，切成 3cm 段
葱，切成 0.2cm 薄片
姜，切成 1mm x 1mm x 3cm 的细丝
蒜，放在砧板上拍碎，切成 1mm 的粒度
起锅，烧干水分，加 3ml 食用油
手持锅柄，摇晃锅，使食用油充分挂满锅的 2/3
中火，加入肉片，翻炒 1 分钟
加入葱姜蒜，料酒，继续翻炒 1 分钟
将蒜薹段，放入锅中，翻炒 1 分钟
开始调味，加入老抽、生抽、蚝油、盐、鸡精、十三香，翻炒 1 分钟
加入 500ML 水，没过蔬菜，炖煮 1 分钟
将蒸好的挂面放入，不断搅拌 3 分钟，待挂面全部均匀上色，关火
将搅拌好的挂面和菜，全部倒入额外的盆中
起锅，加冷水 7 成，放上蒸篦子，将拌好的面条和菜，均匀的铺在上面
水开后，大火烧 15 分钟，出锅
淋上 10g 的麻油，即可食用
steps_en: Add 70% water to the pot, bring to a boil, and put on the steaming grate
Spread the noodles evenly, drizzle with 5ml of oil and spread evenly, steam for 15 minutes
Take out the noodles and steaming grate, set them aside, and pour out the water in the pot
Pork belly, cut into 2mm thick slices
Garlic sprouts, cut into 3cm sections
Green onions, cut into 0.2cm thin slices
Ginger, cut into thin strips 1mm x 1mm x 3cm
Garlic, smash on a cutting board and cut into 1mm pieces
Heat up the pot, boil away the water, and add 3ml cooking oil
Hold the pot handle and shake the pot to fully cover 2/3 of the pot with cooking oil.
On medium heat, add the meat slices and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add onion, ginger, garlic, cooking wine, and continue to stir-fry for 1 minute
Add garlic sprouts into the pot and stir-fry for 1 minute
Start seasoning, add dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, chicken essence and thirteen spices, stir-fry for 1 minute
Add 500ML water to cover the vegetables and simmer for 1 minute
Add the steamed noodles and stir continuously for 3 minutes. When all the noodles are evenly colored, turn off the heat.
Pour the mixed noodles and vegetables into an extra basin
Take out the pot, add 70% cold water, put the steaming grate on it, and spread the mixed noodles and vegetables evenly on top
After the water boils, simmer over high heat for 15 minutes, then remove from the pot
Drizzle with 10g sesame oil and serve
images: dishes/staple/河南蒸面条/河南蒸面条.png
file_path: dishes/staple/河南蒸面条/河南蒸面条.md

intro_zh:
一道简单快手的日式风味饭团，咸香火腿搭配沙拉酱与海苔，口感丰富饱腹。富含碳水化合物、蛋白质和维生素，能快速补充能量。制作难度极低，新手也能轻松上手，从煮饭到完成大约只需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：665 大卡
intro_en:
A simple and quick Japanese-style rice ball, with salty ham, salad dressing and seaweed, rich and filling. Rich in carbohydrates, proteins and vitamins, it can quickly replenish energy. It is extremely easy to make and can be easily picked up by novices. It only takes about 1 hour from cooking to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 665 kcal
ingredients_zh: 喜欢的沙拉酱（推荐日式 mayo！）
steps_zh: 将米饭和水放到电饭锅里，点击米饭模式，等待完成
冷冻玉米粒和青豆放到锅里，加水没过所有食材，沸腾后静待 2 分钟后，捞出。
火腿切成 1cm 的方块
与此同时，加入 10ml 食用油，加入火腿翻炒至火腿上色
将米饭，火腿，海苔碎，青豆，玉米粒，沙拉酱放入碗中，混合均匀即可
装盘（如果有的话）
steps_en: Put rice and water into the rice cooker, click rice mode and wait for completion
Place frozen corn kernels and green beans in a pot, add water to cover all ingredients, wait for 2 minutes after boiling, then remove.
Cut ham into 1cm cubes
At the same time, add 10ml cooking oil, add ham and stir-fry until ham is colored.
Put the rice, ham, chopped seaweed, green beans, corn kernels, and salad dressing into a bowl and mix evenly.
Loading (if applicable)

intro_zh:
凉粉是一道源自四川的传统小吃，口感冰凉爽滑，酸辣开胃，很适合夏天消暑。主要原料是豌豆淀粉，富含碳水化合物，能为身体快速补充能量。制作过程不算复杂，但需要耐心搅煮和长时间冷藏定型，对新手来说难度适中。从煮制到完成大约需要 3-4 小时，其中大部分是等待冷藏的时间，动手操作只需大约半 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：539 大卡
intro_en:
Liangfen is a traditional snack originating from Sichuan. It tastes cool and smooth, spicy and sour, and is appetizing. It is very suitable for cooling off in summer. The main raw material is pea starch, which is rich in carbohydrates and can quickly replenish energy for the body. The production process is not complicated, but it requires patient stirring and long-term refrigeration to set the shape. It is moderately difficult for novices. It takes about 3-4 hours from cooking to completion, most of which is waiting for refrigeration, and only about half an hour of hands-on time.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 539 kcal
steps_zh: 准备食材。
把豌豆淀粉和水各 100 克混合搅拌。
往锅中倒入 600g 水，大火煮开后转为小火。
倒入淀粉水，边倒边不断的搅拌，搅拌到浓稠且色泽均匀。
找一个容器，在容器中刷一层薄薄的食用油。
将煮好的淀粉倒入容器中冷藏 2-4 小时。
冷藏后取出，脱模，切条。
大蒜和小米辣剁成沫，放上 10g 辣椒粉，5g 花生碎，热油搅拌均匀。
再加入 10ml 酱油，10ml 醋，5g 白糖，3g 鸡精，3g 盐搅拌均匀。
将调味料倒在凉粉上，然后撒上香菜即可。
steps_en: Prepare ingredients.
Mix 100 grams each of pea starch and water.
Pour 600g of water into the pot, bring to a boil over high heat and then reduce to low heat.
Pour in the starch water, stirring constantly while pouring, until thick and even in color.
Find a container and brush a thin layer of cooking oil into the container.
Pour the cooked starch into a container and refrigerate for 2-4 hours.
After refrigeration, take it out, unmold and cut into strips.
Chop garlic and millet into paste, add 10g chili powder, 5g chopped peanuts, heat oil and stir evenly.
Add 10ml soy sauce, 10ml vinegar, 5g sugar, 3g chicken essence, 3g salt and stir evenly.
Pour the seasoning over the jelly and sprinkle with coriander.

intro_zh:
一道经典的日式家常盖饭，肥牛片与白洋葱在咸甜酱汁中炖煮入味，肉质软嫩，洋葱甜润，汁香浓郁。牛肉提供优质蛋白和血红素铁，洋葱富含膳食纤维与多种抗氧化物。制作不算复杂，新手只要跟着步骤操作也能轻松完成，炒煮过程约需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：774 大卡
intro_en:
A classic Japanese home-style rice bowl, beef slices and white onions are simmered in a sweet and salty sauce. The meat is soft and tender, the onions are sweet, and the juice is rich. Beef provides high-quality protein and heme iron, and onions are rich in dietary fiber and various antioxidants. The preparation is not complicated, and novices can easily complete it as long as they follow the steps. The stir-frying process takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 774 kcal
ingredients_zh: 洋葱（务必选用外皮为白黄色的洋葱，不要用紫色的洋葱）
肥牛（火锅肥牛即可，也可选用原切肥牛片）
葱（也可选用切好的葱段）
味淋（一种常用日式调料，可在各大电商平台购买，也可用料酒代替）
出汁（使用柴鱼干和昆布熬制的汤汁，可以用于提鲜）
ingredients_en: Onions (be sure to choose onions with white-yellow skin, do not use purple onions)
Fatty beef (fatty beef is sufficient for hot pot, or you can use raw beef slices)
Green onions (chopped green onions can also be used)
Mirin (a commonly used Japanese condiment, which can be purchased on major e-commerce platforms, or can be replaced with cooking wine)
[Hot Spring Egg](../../breakfast/Hot Spring Egg/Hot Spring Egg.md)
Decoction (soup made from dried bonito and kombu, which can be used to enhance the freshness)
steps_zh: 洋葱剥去外层去芯，切成月牙状
葱洗净切成 0.5cm 的小段
热锅直接放入白芝麻，**前后晃动锅体**使芝麻均匀受热至*略呈金黄色*
肥牛焯水 1 分钟后捞出
将 40g `味淋`（或 30g `料酒`），30g `酱油`，20g `耗油`，5g `糖`，5g `老抽`（可选，用于调色），在碗中搅拌混合成`调料`（该步骤可直接将碗放在电子秤上进行）
热油锅放入洋葱，**快速翻炒**至洋葱*变透明状*
关小火，加入 250g 水（或出汁），开回大火加热**等待 3 分钟**
加入牛肉和`调料`
**不断翻动**所有食材 **10 分钟**，防止食材粘锅
关火
盛装肥牛丼至[米饭](../米饭/电饭煲蒸米饭.md)上（注意要把汁水淋一些在饭上）
撒上葱花和白芝麻，制作完成。
微波炉：单人份高火 2-3 分钟
锅：需额外加 50ml 水，加热时需**不断翻动**
steps_en: Peel and core the onion and cut into crescent shapes
Wash the green onions and cut into 0.5cm pieces
Directly add white sesame seeds to the hot pot, **shake the pot back and forth** to heat the sesame seeds evenly until *slightly golden*
Blanch the fat beef for 1 minute and take it out

Mix 40g `mirin` (or 30g `cooking wine`), 30g `soy sauce`, 20g `consumed oil`, 5g `sugar`, 5g `dark soy sauce` (optional, for color adjustment) in a bowl to form a `seasoning` (this step can be performed directly by placing the bowl on an electronic scale)
Heat the oil in the pan and add the onions, **stir quickly** until the onions *turn transparent*
Turn down the heat, add 250g of water (or juice), return to high heat and heat **wait 3 minutes**
Add beef and `seasonings`
**Continuously stir** all ingredients **10 minutes** to prevent ingredients from sticking to the pan
Turn off the heat
Serve the beef donburi on [rice](../rice/rice cooker steamed rice.md) (be careful to pour some juice on the rice)
Sprinkle with chopped green onion and white sesame seeds and it's done.
Microwave: Single serving on high for 2-3 minutes
Pot: need to add 50ml extra water, need to **continuously stir** when heating
file_path: dishes/staple/日式肥牛丼饭/日式肥牛丼饭.md

intro_zh:
这道日式照烧风味的鸡肉饭，甜咸酱汁浓郁，表层烘烤得略微焦脆，内里软嫩多汁，搭配米饭非常下饭。鸡肉和鸡蛋提供丰富的优质蛋白，不过酱油和糖的用量较多，更适合偶尔改善口味。做法简单，只需混合原料交给空气炸锅，新手也能轻松搞定，从准备到出锅大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1854 大卡
intro_en:
This Japanese teriyaki-style chicken rice dish has a rich sweet and salty sauce. The surface is slightly toasted and crispy, while the inside is soft and juicy. It goes very well with rice. Chicken and eggs provide plenty of high-quality protein, but more soy sauce and sugar are used, which is more suitable for occasionally improving the taste. The method is simple, just mix the ingredients and hand it to the air fryer. Even a novice can make it easily. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1854 kcal
ingredients_zh: 丽滋饼干（咸味曲奇可替代） 16 个(48g)
ingredients_en: Ritz crackers (savory cookies can be substituted) 16 pieces (48g)
steps_zh: 将酱油、糖和醋混合在一起,搅匀料汁备用
另一个碗中加入鸡肉、鸡蛋、1/2 料汁和压碎的丽滋饼干。搅拌均匀
空气炸锅用箔纸碗铺底，加入肉饼混合物，将剩余的料汁均匀的倒在上面
在外观*呈金黄酥脆*后出锅，切块盛盘
steps_en: Mix soy sauce, sugar and vinegar together, stir well and set aside
In another bowl add chicken, eggs, 1/2 sauce and crushed Ritz crackers. Stir evenly
Place a foil bowl on the bottom of the air fryer, add the meatloaf mixture, and pour the remaining sauce evenly on top.
Fry **350°F(177°C)** **40 minutes**. Best served over rice
Remove from the pan when *golden and crispy* appears, cut into cubes and serve on a plate
images: dishes/staple/空气炸锅照烧鸡饭/空气炸锅照烧鸡饭.jpg
file_path: dishes/staple/空气炸锅照烧鸡饭/空气炸锅照烧鸡饭.md

intro_zh:
老友猪肉粉酸辣鲜香，米粉爽滑，带着豆豉与酸笋特有的浓郁风味，是典型的南宁家常味。猪肉提供优质蛋白质，米粉则快速补充碳水能量。整体制作中等难度，需注意提前泡发米粉，熟练后大约四十分钟就能端上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：927 大卡
intro_en:
Laoyou Pork Noodles are sour, spicy and fragrant, and the rice noodles are smooth, with the unique rich flavor of tempeh and sour bamboo shoots. It is a typical Nanning home-cooked dish. Pork provides high-quality protein, while rice noodles quickly replenish carbohydrate energy. The overall preparation is moderately difficult. You need to pay attention to soaking the rice noodles in advance. Once you are proficient, it can be served in about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 927 kcal
ingredients_zh: 米粉（250g 记得 50 度的温水泡半小时）
剁椒（15g 辣椒剁完后, 个人需求适当放。 ）
白糖（5g 如果不喜欢糖，可以考虑不放）
ingredients_en: Rice noodles (250g, remember to soak in warm water at 50 degrees for half an hour)
Chop peppers (after 15g of peppers are chopped, add them appropriately according to personal needs.)
White sugar (5g, if you don’t like sugar, you can consider leaving it out)
steps_zh: 全部猪肉用料酒、盐、生抽、生粉、胡椒粉倒在一个碗里调味,备用
热锅不放油,下全部酸笋把水份炒干，炒干的酸笋中间留点空间
放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油与全部大蒜、 剁椒、 豆豉到炒干的酸笋中间到炒干的酸笋中间,全部推到中间炒出香味
放入全部调味好的猪肉,持续放入 10ml 生抽炒一分钟
放入 5ml 米醋、 10ml 生抽、450ml 清水一起煮开
水煮开后,放入温水泡好的米粉,继续煮 3 分钟就可以盛盘
steps_en: Season all the pork in a bowl with cooking wine, salt, light soy sauce, cornstarch, and pepper and set aside.
Heat the pan without adding oil, add all the sour bamboo shoots and fry them dry, leaving some space in the middle of the dried sour bamboo shoots.
Add 10ml - 15ml cooking oil, all the garlic, chopped peppers, and black bean sauce to the middle of the fried sour bamboo shoots, push them all to the middle and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add all the seasoned pork, continue to add 10ml of light soy sauce and stir-fry for one minute
Add 5ml rice vinegar, 10ml light soy sauce and 450ml water and bring to a boil
After the water boils, add the rice noodles soaked in warm water and continue cooking for 3 minutes before serving.
images: dishes/staple/老友猪肉粉/老友猪肉粉.jpg
file_path: dishes/staple/老友猪肉粉/老友猪肉粉.md

intro_zh:
这道炒意大利面软糯爽口，搭配肥牛和酱料，酱香浓郁，是带有西式风味的家常主食。富含碳水化合物与蛋白质，能快速补充能量。做法简单，新手也能轻松掌握，全程大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：406 大卡
intro_en:
This fried pasta is soft, glutinous and refreshing. It is paired with fatty beef and sauce. The sauce is rich and fragrant. It is a home-cooked staple food with a Western flavor. Rich in carbohydrates and protein, it can quickly replenish energy. The method is simple and can be easily mastered by novices, and the whole process takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 406 kcal
ingredients_zh: 番茄酱 / 黑胡椒酱（选其一即可）
菜籽油（其他植物油也可）
意大利面 50 克 / 人
ingredients_en: Tomato sauce / black pepper sauce (just choose one)
Rapeseed oil (other vegetable oils are also acceptable)
steps_zh: 加入 250 克水 / 人
待水烧开，下入面条，中火煮 15 - 20 分钟（这个面通常比较硬，捞起来之前最好尝一下，中心如果有一点硬，需要继续煮）
捞出面条，盛入盘中备用
热锅倒入食用油，待油温中热，下入面条翻炒一分钟（如果太干，加入少量水）
放入 10 克番茄酱、肥牛、加入 2g 食盐，继续翻炒一分钟
起锅
steps_en: Add 250g water/person

When the water boils, add the noodles and cook over medium heat for 15-20 minutes (the noodles are usually hard, so it’s best to taste them before picking them up. If the center is a little hard, you need to continue cooking)
Take out the noodles and put them on a plate and set aside
Pour cooking oil into the hot pan, wait until the oil is medium hot, add the noodles and stir-fry for a minute (if it is too dry, add a small amount of water)
Add 10 grams of tomato paste, beef, 2 grams of salt, and continue to stir-fry for one minute.
Start the pot
file_path: dishes/staple/炒意大利面/炒意大利面.md

intro_zh:
这道饼外皮微脆内里松软，馅料咸香，属于家常面食。富含碳水化合物和蛋白质，搭配胡萝卜和鸡蛋更添营养。制作难度中等，新手需掌握火候，但步骤明确易上手。从备料到完成大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1265 大卡
intro_en:
This pancake is slightly crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, and has a salty filling. It is a home-style pasta. Rich in carbohydrates and protein, it is even more nutritious when paired with carrots and eggs. The difficulty of making it is medium, and novices need to master the heat, but the steps are clear and easy to master. It takes approximately 1 hour from prep to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1265 kcal
ingredients_zh: 风味调料（如鸡粉、孜然、椒盐，可选）
炒锅（可以使用同一个平底锅替代）
ingredients_en: Flavor seasonings (such as chicken powder, cumin, salt and pepper, optional)
Wok (the same pan can be used instead)
steps_zh: 取肉沫（解冻），加入 1/2 所有上述调料（油、盐、糖、酱油、风味调料）和全部的生粉，搅拌均匀，腌制 30 分钟。
将面粉加入碗中，加入鸡蛋，加入剩下 1/2 所有上述调料，加入相当于面粉 1/2 的水（使得面粉相对粘稠但可以流动），搅拌均匀。
蒜头切为蒜末。
大葱切段。
胡萝卜切末（作为馅料用，所以要求尽量细碎，可用乱刀）
热锅冷油，宽油起锅。
待油烧热后，放入蒜末爆香。
加入腌制的肉沫，翻炒，直至断生。
将胡萝卜末加入肉沫中一同翻炒，直至油被染为金黄色（这是为了萃取胡萝卜的风味）。
关火。冷却 2 分钟。
将炒好的肉沫倒入生面糊中，搅匀。
重新开火，平底锅铺底油。
调至小火，将面糊倒入锅中均匀铺满。保证厚度不要过高。可以端起锅，让面糊流过锅底来完成这一操作。
在饼的表面尚为液态时，撒上大葱段。
保持小火，直到底面凝固。
将饼翻面，继续小火煎烤，直至另一侧凝固。
之后，每一面再额外煎 20 秒。
关火出锅。
steps_en: Take the minced meat (thawed), add 1/2 of all the above seasonings (oil, salt, sugar, soy sauce, flavorings) and all the cornstarch, stir evenly, and marinate for 30 minutes.
Add the flour to the bowl, add the eggs, add the remaining 1/2 of all the above ingredients, add 1/2 of the flour's worth of water (making the flour relatively thick but runny), and mix well.
Cut the garlic into minced pieces.
Cut green onions into sections.
Chop the carrots into mince (for filling purposes, so mince them as finely as possible, you can use a random knife)
Heat the pan with cold oil, then heat up the pan with oil.
After the oil is hot, add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant.
Add the marinated minced pork and stir-fry until cooked through.
Add the minced carrots to the minced meat and stir-fry until the oil turns golden brown (this is to extract the flavor of the carrots).
Turn off the heat. Let cool for 2 minutes.
Pour the fried minced meat into the raw batter and mix well.
Turn the heat back on and grease the pan.
Reduce the heat to low and pour the batter into the pan evenly. Make sure the thickness is not too high. This can be done by lifting the pan and letting the batter flow over the bottom.
When the surface of the cake is still liquid, sprinkle with green onions.
Keep the heat low until the underside is set.
Flip the pancake over and continue cooking over low heat until the other side is set.
After that, fry each side for an additional 20 seconds.
Turn off the heat and remove from the pot.

intro_zh:
这是一道朴实无华的家常主食，用普通煮锅就能做出软糯适口的米饭。白米饭主要提供碳水化合物，为身体快速补充能量。做法极为简单，新手只需全程关注火候即可轻松掌握，从下米到出锅大约需要 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：418 大卡
intro_en:
This is an unpretentious home-cooked staple dish, and you can make soft, glutinous and delicious rice in an ordinary cooking pot. White rice mainly provides carbohydrates to quickly replenish energy for the body. The method is extremely simple, and novices can easily master it by paying attention to the heat throughout the process. It takes about 25 minutes from adding the rice to taking it out of the pan.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 418 kcal
ingredients_zh: 厚底煮锅+严丝合缝的锅盖（制作过程中不会有大量蒸汽泄漏）
ingredients_en: Thick-bottomed cooking pot + tight-fitting lid (there won’t be a lot of steam leaking during the cooking process)
Water: 2 times the volume of meters
steps_zh: 清洗大米
将米和水加入煮锅
大火煮至水沸腾
**搅拌底部防止粘黏**
盖上锅盖，转**小火**加热 10-15 分钟（根据对软糯程度的喜好），中途切勿打开锅盖
关火，静置 5 分钟
Enjoy :)
steps_en: Wash the rice
Add rice and water to cooking pot
Cook over high heat until the water boils
**Stir the bottom to prevent sticking**
Cover the pot, turn to **low heat** and heat for 10-15 minutes (depending on your preference for softness). Do not open the lid during the process.
Turn off the heat and let sit for 5 minutes
Enjoy :)

intro_zh:
一道家喻户晓的基础主食，米香纯粹、口感软糯，因水量调节可偏硬或偏润。富含碳水化合物，能快速补充能量，适合搭配各类菜肴。操作极其简单，新手也能轻松上手，从洗米到焖好大约需要四十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：442 大卡
intro_en:
A well-known basic staple food, rice has a pure aroma and a soft and waxy texture. It can be hard or moist depending on the amount of water. Rich in carbohydrates, it can quickly replenish energy and is suitable for a variety of dishes. The operation is extremely simple, and even novices can easily get started. It takes about forty minutes from washing the rice to stewing it.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 442 kcal
ingredients_zh: 一般一个人可以食用 100ml-200ml 的米。
江南米，米和水放在电饭煲的容器内，食指触及米时，水量能刚好没过食指的第一个指节又第二个指节 1/4 处（即大约 2.6 厘米）。
北方大米，米和水放在电饭煲的容器内，食指触及米，水量能刚好没过食指的第一个指节（即大约 2 厘米处）。
ingredients_en: Generally, one person can consume 100ml-200ml of rice.

Jiangnan rice, rice and water are placed in the rice cooker container. When the index finger touches the rice, the amount of water can just cover 1/4 of the first and second knuckles of the index finger (that is, about 2.6 cm).

For northern rice, put the rice and water in the rice cooker container, touch the rice with your index finger, and the amount of water can just cover the first knuckle of the index finger (that is, about 2 cm).
steps_zh: 清洗米
将米和水一起加入电饭煲中。
连接电饭煲电源，进入加热模式。等待大约 30 分钟。
待电饭煲自动进入保温模式后。
将米在电饭煲中闷 10-15 分钟。
盛出米。
steps_en: Clean rice
Add the rice and water to the rice cooker.
Connect the rice cooker to the power source and enter heating mode. Wait approximately 30 minutes.
Wait until the rice cooker automatically enters the keep warm mode.
Simmer the rice in the rice cooker for 10-15 minutes.
Serve rice.

intro_zh:
芝麻烧饼是北方家喻户晓的面点，外皮沾满芝麻酥香可口，内层层次分明、松软适口。面粉提供充足的碳水化合物，芝麻含有丰富的钙和不饱和脂肪酸。制作过程虽然包含揉面、做油酥等步骤，但操作并不复杂，初学者也能跟着做出来。从备料到出锅大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：282 大卡
intro_en:
Sesame sesame cake is a well-known pastry in the north. The outer layer is covered with sesame seeds and is crispy and delicious. The inner layer is well-structured, soft and delicious. Flour provides ample carbohydrates, and sesame seeds are rich in calcium and unsaturated fatty acids. Although the production process includes steps such as kneading dough and making puff pastry, the operation is not complicated and even beginners can follow it. It takes about 40 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 282 kcal
steps_zh: 面团：300 克面粉，3 克酵母粉，3 克白糖，180 克温水，20 克食用油，醒面 10 分钟
油酥：小碗放 30 克面粉，2 克盐，4 克十三香，20 克食用油，拌匀后，静置
做饼：面擀成长方形，抹上调好的油酥，从一头卷起，切成 7 个面剂子，对折，用虎口收拢即可，先沾水再沾白芝麻，擀成小圆饼
烙饼：将电饼铛预热，倒入凉油（锅底铺满油），将擀好的饼放入电饼铛中，将饼的上方也刷点油，涂抹均匀盖上盖子，选大饼档,听到叮的一声出锅即可
steps_en: Dough: 300g flour, 3g yeast powder, 3g sugar, 180g warm water, 20g cooking oil, rest for 10 minutes
Pastry: Put 30 grams of flour, 2 grams of salt, 4 grams of thirteen spices, and 20 grams of cooking oil in a small bowl. Mix well and let it sit.

Making cakes: roll the dough into a rectangular shape, spread with the prepared pastry, roll up from one end, cut into 7 pieces of dough, fold in half, gather it with the tiger's mouth, first dip it in water and then the white sesame seeds, roll it into a small round cake

Pancake: Preheat the electric pancake pan, pour in cold oil (the bottom of the pan is covered with oil), put the rolled pancake into the pancake pan, brush some oil on the top of the pancake, spread it evenly and cover it with the lid, select the large pancake pan, and you can hear a "ding" sound before taking it out of the pan.

intro_zh:
韩式拌饭是一道色彩缤纷、口感丰富的韩国家常料理，甜辣酱汁包裹着米饭、蔬菜、牛肉和溏心蛋，拌匀后一口满足。多种蔬菜提供维生素和膳食纤维，牛肉和鸡蛋补充优质蛋白，营养均衡。制作简单但备菜步骤稍多，新手也能从容完成，从准备到上桌大约需要 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1080 大卡
intro_en:
Korean bibimbap is a colorful and rich Korean home-cooked dish. Rice, vegetables, beef and soft-boiled eggs are wrapped in sweet and spicy sauce, and it is satisfying after one bite. A variety of vegetables provide vitamins and dietary fiber, while beef and eggs supplement high-quality protein and provide balanced nutrition. It’s simple to make but requires a little more preparation, so novices can easily complete it. It takes about 45 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1080 kcal
steps_zh: 蔬菜清洗 切丝 放锅中翻炒 食材变软 便可称出
煮水 等沸腾时 焯牛肉卷 只需煮熟 大概三分钟即可捞出
煎[溏心蛋](../../breakfast/溏心蛋.md)
将[米饭](../../staple/米饭/电饭煲蒸米饭.md)放在一个碗里 然后倒扣在大碗
将准备好的蔬菜和肉卷依次绕圈放在米饭上面 将煎蛋放中间
备酱汁
将备好的酱汁倒在摆好盘的碗中
steps_en: Wash the vegetables, cut them into shreds, put them in a pot and stir-fry until the ingredients become soft, then weigh them out.
When the water boils, blanch the beef rolls. It only takes about three minutes to take them out.
Fried [soft-boiled eggs](../../breakfast/soft-boiled eggs.md)
Put [rice](../../staple/rice/rice cooker steamed rice.md) in a bowl and then invert it in a large bowl
Arrange the prepared vegetable and meat rolls in a circle on top of the rice and place the fried egg in the middle.
Prepare sauce
Pour the prepared sauce into the plated bowl

intro_zh:
这道炒方便面口感 Q 弹筋道，咸香入味，是一道改良自传统煮面的家常快手主食。搭配鸡蛋和火腿肠，丰富了蛋白质和能量来源。做法简单，只需注意冷水冲面保持口感，新手也能轻松完成，全程大约 15 分钟即可出锅。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：789 大卡
intro_en:
This stir-fried instant noodles has a chewy texture and a salty aroma. It is a quick home-cooked staple food that is improved from traditional boiled noodles. Paired with eggs and ham sausage, it enriches the source of protein and energy. The method is simple, just rinse the noodles with cold water to maintain the taste. Even a novice can complete it easily. The whole process can be done in about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 789 kcal
ingredients_zh: 方便面用量为 1 包/人。
鸡蛋的用量为 1 个/人。
火腿肠的用量为 1 个/人。
食用油的用量为 10 - 18 ml / 人。
ingredients_en: The dosage of instant noodles is 1 pack/person.
The amount of ham sausage is 1 piece per person.
The dosage of cooking oil is 10 - 18 ml / person.
steps_zh: 将火腿肠撕开包装，切成宽度 1cm 的小块。
向煮锅中加入 1200 ml 水，实际以没过面饼为准。完全煮沸，不要在未沸腾时加面。
加入方便面面饼，煮 45 秒。煮的过程中将其挑动，把面条打散。
面条打散后立刻关火。不要煮熟！
从锅中舀出 80ml 热面汤备用。
将面汤和面分离。用凉水冲一下面条。
沥干面条上的水分。不要长时间将面泡在水中。
准备一个小碗，将方便面的调料包挤进去。
将上一步的 80ml 热面汤全部倒入小碗，搅匀，得到调料碗。
取出计算好的数量的鸡蛋，打入一个小碗。不要加盐！（鸡蛋最终会混合锅里食材的盐味）
热锅 20s，加入份数 * 8ml 油。
加入刚刚准备好的一碗鸡蛋。翻炒大约 20s 至鸡蛋形成固态即可。
将煎鸡蛋取出暂存。不需要洗锅。但一般锅内不会残余太多油。
重新热锅 20s，向锅内加入油：份数 * 10ml。
加入第一步处理的火腿肠。翻炒 10 秒。
加入第二步的面。翻炒 30 秒。
加入第三步的调料碗。翻炒 30 秒。
加入第四步的煎鸡蛋。翻炒 30 秒。
关火盛盘即可。
steps_en: Tear the ham sausage out of the package and cut into 1cm wide pieces.
Add 1200 ml of water to the cooking pot until the dough is covered. Bring to a full boil and do not add noodles while it is still boiling.
Add instant noodles and cook for 45 seconds. Stir it during cooking to break up the noodles.
Turn off the heat immediately after the noodles are broken up. Don't overcook!
Ladle 80ml of hot noodle soup from the pot and set aside.
Separate the noodle soup from the noodles. Rinse the noodles with cold water.
Drain the water from the noodles. Do not soak the noodles in water for a long time.
Prepare a small bowl and squeeze the instant noodles seasoning packet into it.
Pour all 80ml of hot noodle soup from the previous step into a small bowl, stir well to get a seasoning bowl.
Take the calculated number of eggs and break them into a small bowl. Don't add salt! (The eggs will eventually mix with the salt of the ingredients in the pan)
Heat the pan for 20s, add portion * 8ml oil.
Add the bowl of eggs you just prepared. Stir-fry for about 20 seconds until the eggs become solid.
Remove the fried eggs and store temporarily. No need to wash the pot. But generally there won’t be too much oil left in the pot.
Reheat the pan for 20s and add oil to the pan: number of servings * 10ml.
Add the ham processed in the first step. Stir-fry for 10 seconds.
Add the noodles from step 2. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add to the mixing bowl from step three. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the fried eggs from step 4. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Turn off the heat and serve.

intro_zh:
这是一道简单快手的粤式风味主食，米饭吸足腊肠油脂后油润咸香，搭配脆嫩青菜和胡萝卜，口感层次丰富。富含碳水化合物、蛋白质和多种维生素，营养均衡。烹饪用微波炉操作，对新手十分友好，预计全程仅需 15 分钟即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1039 大卡
intro_en:
This is a simple and quick Cantonese-style staple food. The rice has soaked up the grease of the sausage and is oily and salty. It is paired with crispy green vegetables and carrots, giving it a rich texture. Rich in carbohydrates, protein and multivitamins, nutritionally balanced. The cooking process is microwave-friendly and very beginner-friendly, and you can expect it to be ready in just 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1039 kcal
steps_zh: 将米淘洗干净后倒入 `饭碗` 内，加入 400ml 的水，**盖上盖**
放入微波炉，高火，`6` 分钟，煮饭途中准备原料
6 分钟后，用毛巾或隔热手套取出碗，可以看见米饭已经八分熟
在米饭上摆入切片的腊肠，继续高火 `2` 分钟
取出腊肠饭，放入 `青菜碗`，高火 `4-5` 分钟
在腊肠饭上摆好青菜，磕入鸡蛋，看个人喜好继续高火 `40-60` 秒
取出腊肠饭，此时已经基本完成。
将 `小碗` 放入，继续高火 `30` 秒
在腊肠饭上淋上叮热的生抽，撒上葱花即可
多余的青菜可以沾着酱油吃
steps_en: Wash the rice and pour it into a `rice bowl`, add 400ml of water and **cover it**
Put it in the microwave oven, set it to high heat for `6` minutes, and prepare the ingredients while cooking.
After 6 minutes, use a towel or oven mitts to take out the bowl. You can see that the rice is halfway cooked.
Arrange the sliced sausages on top of the rice and continue to cook on high for `2` minutes
Take out the sausage rice, put it into the `vegetable bowl`, and cook on high heat for `4-5` minutes
Arrange the vegetables on the sausage rice, crack in the eggs, and continue to cook on high for `40-60` seconds depending on your personal preference.
Take out the sausage rice, it is basically done now.
Put the `small bowl` in and continue to heat for `30` seconds
Pour the hot soy sauce over the sausage rice and sprinkle with chopped green onion.
The extra green vegetables can be eaten with soy sauce
images: dishes/staple/微波炉腊肠煲仔饭/微波炉腊肠煲仔饭.png
file_path: dishes/staple/微波炉腊肠煲仔饭/微波炉腊肠煲仔饭.md

intro_zh:
这是一道融合日式炊饭做法的家常料理，米饭吸饱牛油和三文鱼的香气，口感浓郁鲜香。三文鱼提供优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，搭配菌菇更添膳食纤维。操作极其简单，只需用电饭煲一键完成，从备料到出锅大约 45 分钟，非常适合新手尝试。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：889 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked dish that combines Japanese rice cooking methods. The rice is filled with the aroma of butter and salmon, and has a rich and delicious taste. Salmon provides high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids, and mushrooms add dietary fiber. The operation is extremely simple, just use the rice cooker to complete it with one click, and it takes about 45 minutes from preparation to cooking, making it very suitable for novices to try.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 889 kcal
steps_zh: 三文鱼去鳞，去骨
金菇、冬菇切碎
洗米三次
把三文鱼、米、牛油放入电饭煲
想口感浓厚一点，可以加多一汤匙牛油
根据电饭煲的刻度放水
把电饭煲調較至煲飯模式，等待大約 30 - 45 分鐘
steps_en: Remove the scales and bones from the salmon
Chopped enoki and winter mushrooms
Wash rice three times
Put salmon, rice and butter into rice cooker
If you want a thicker taste, add an extra tablespoon of butter
Pour water according to the scale of the rice cooker
Set the rice cooker to rice cooking mode and wait for about 30 - 45 minutes
images: dishes/staple/电饭煲三文鱼炊饭/电饭煲三文鱼炊饭.webp
file_path: dishes/staple/电饭煲三文鱼炊饭/电饭煲三文鱼炊饭.md

intro_zh:
酱拌荞麦面酸甜可口、清凉爽滑，是一道简单快手的家常凉拌面。荞麦面富含膳食纤维和蛋白质，搭配黄瓜、胡萝卜增添清爽口感与维生素，营养均衡。只需煮面、切菜、拌入老干妈，几步搞定，对新手非常友好，一般约 20 分钟便可完成。冷藏后食用风味更佳。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：475 大卡
intro_en:
Soba noodles with soy sauce are sweet and sour, cool and smooth. It is a simple and quick home-cooked cold noodle dish. Buckwheat noodles are rich in dietary fiber and protein. Paired with cucumbers and carrots, they add a refreshing taste and vitamins, and are nutritionally balanced. You only need to cook the noodles, cut the vegetables, and mix in Laoganma. It is done in a few steps. It is very friendly to novices and can usually be completed in about 20 minutes. It tastes better when eaten refrigerated.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 475 kcal
steps_zh: 荞麦面下冷水煮熟，8-10 分钟 后捞出沥干备用
黄瓜、萝卜 切成小条
将荞麦面、黄瓜、萝卜放入盘子，放上老干妈，搅拌
steps_en: Cook the buckwheat noodles in cold water for 8-10 minutes, drain and set aside.
Cucumber and radish cut into small strips
Put the buckwheat noodles, cucumbers, and radishes on a plate, add Laoganma, and stir
file_path: dishes/staple/酱拌荞麦面/酱拌荞麦面.md

intro_zh:
豆角焖面是一道北方家常面食，面条吸饱汤汁，口感软韧咸香，带着豆角的清爽和肉片的油润。五花肉提供蛋白质和脂肪，豆角富含膳食纤维和维生素，荤素搭配均衡。整体操作不难，但需要留意火候和加汤时机，适合有一定下厨经验的朋友尝试，一般约 30 分钟就能端上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1386 大卡
intro_en:
Braised noodles with green beans is a home-cooked noodle dish in the north. The noodles soak up the soup and have a soft, chewy and salty texture, with the freshness of the beans and the oiliness of the meat. Pork belly provides protein and fat, beans are rich in dietary fiber and vitamins, and the mix of meat and vegetables is balanced. The overall operation is not difficult, but you need to pay attention to the heat and the timing of adding soup. It is suitable for friends with certain cooking experience. It can usually be served in about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1386 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鲜面条（韭叶 or 二细<解释见最下方 关于面条粗细区别一栏）
ingredients_en: Fresh noodles (chive leaves or Erxi <for explanation, see the column about the difference in thickness of noodles at the bottom)
The amount of salt used is: 2g.
The amount of cooking oil is 10 - 18 ml.
The dosage of chicken essence is: 2g.
The dosage of light soy sauce is: 10ml.
The amount of fuel consumption is: 5g.
The dosage of Thirteen Incense is: 1g.
The dosage of dark soy sauce is: 5ml.
The amount of hot water is: 150ml.
steps_zh: 将豆角切成 5cm - 6cm 的小段。
将葱切成 1cm - 2cm 小段。
将姜切成 1mm x 1mm x 3cm 的长条
将蒜放在砧板上拍碎，切成 1mm 的粒度。
将五花肉切成 2mm 厚度的肉片。
首先将锅烧热，烧去锅内全部水汽，手放过内距离锅底 10cm 处，感觉明显有些许烤手。
加入上述定量的食用油，手持锅柄，离灶 5cm 处，摇晃锅，使食用油充分挂满锅的三分之二（自下而上）。
放入全部的姜和全部的葱段，翻炒爆香 5 秒（注意！此时有油飞溅的危险，建议带上手套或做好防护措施）。
放入全部的肉片，放入以后不着急饭锅，静置 5 秒后，再翻炒，使所有的肉都裹满食用油。
不断翻炒肉片，待到全部肉片都已经变色，沿锅边均匀淋如准备好的生抽，翻炒均匀。
依次加入准备好的盐、老抽、耗油、十三香、鸡精以及全部准备好的豆角，翻炒 2 分钟。
加入准备好的热水。
水开使用勺子舀出锅内 2 分之一菜汤（注意！不要将菜舀出）。
将所有面条平铺在菜的上方。
盖上锅盖，中火焖 5 分钟。
打开锅盖，将舀出的菜汤使用勺子，以每次一勺的量，均匀撒在面条上。
盖上锅盖，中火焖 3 分钟。
打开锅盖，将所有的蒜、味精均匀撒入。
使用筷子不断翻炒，将菜与肉均匀搅拌。
关火
steps_en: Cut the beans into 5cm - 6cm pieces.
Cut the green onions into 1cm - 2cm pieces.
Cut the ginger into 1mm x 1mm x 3cm strips
Crush the garlic on a cutting board and cut into 1mm pieces.
Cut the pork belly into 2mm thick slices.
First, heat the pot and burn off all the water vapor in the pot. Place your hand 10cm away from the bottom of the pot. You will feel that your hands are obviously slightly toasty.
Add the above-mentioned amount of cooking oil, hold the pot handle 5cm away from the stove, and shake the pot so that the cooking oil fully covers two-thirds of the pot (from bottom to top).
Add all the ginger and all the green onions, stir-fry and sauté for 5 seconds (note! There is a risk of oil splashing at this time, so it is recommended to wear gloves or take protective measures).
Put all the meat slices into the pot, let it sit for 5 seconds, and then stir-fry until all the meat is coated with cooking oil.
Stir-fry the meat slices continuously until all the meat slices have changed color, pour the prepared light soy sauce evenly along the edge of the pot, and stir-fry evenly.
Add the prepared salt, dark soy sauce, oil, thirteen spices, chicken essence and all the prepared beans in sequence, and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the prepared hot water.
When the water is boiling, use a spoon to scoop out 1/2 of the vegetable soup in the pot (note! Do not scoop out the vegetables).
Spread all the noodles flat on top of the dish.
Cover and simmer over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Open the lid of the pot, use a ladle to scoop out the vegetable soup, and sprinkle it evenly over the noodles one ladle at a time.
Cover and simmer over medium heat for 3 minutes.
Open the lid of the pot and sprinkle all the garlic and MSG evenly.
Use chopsticks to stir-fry continuously to mix the vegetables and meat evenly.
Turn off the heat

intro_zh:
这道家常煎饼融合了腊肉的咸香与茄子的软糯，外皮酥脆、内里绵润，是一道充满乡土风味的米粉主食。它富含碳水化合物和优质蛋白质，茄子还能提供膳食纤维和维生素，荤素搭配营养均衡。制作难度中等，需要掌握面糊稠度和煎制火候，但初学者跟着步骤操作也能成功。从备料到出锅大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：904 大卡
intro_en:
This home-style pancake combines the saltiness of bacon with the softness of eggplant. It is crispy on the outside and moist on the inside. It is a rice noodle staple food full of local flavor. It is rich in carbohydrates and high-quality protein. Eggplant can also provide dietary fiber and vitamins, with a balanced combination of meat and vegetables. The difficulty of making it is medium, and you need to master the batter consistency and frying temperature, but beginners can also succeed if they follow the steps. It takes about 30 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 904 kcal
ingredients_zh: 米粉（指用大米研磨成的粉）
茄子（买长条状的，越圆越好）
ingredients_en: Rice noodles (referring to powder ground from rice)
Eggplant (buy long strips, the rounder the better)
steps_zh: 将茄子去皮后切成片，将腊肉切成片，备用
依次向盆中加入 250g 米粉（大米研磨成的粉）、50g 面粉和 1 个鸡蛋
边用筷子搅拌，边加入清水（**清水用于调节粘稠度**），使米粉、面粉、鸡蛋混合成面糊,当面糊能够附着在茄片、肉片上而不掉落时停止加水，而后将所有茄片和肉片放入面糊中，用面糊充分包裹
平底锅加入食用油**10-30ml**，开小火
用筷子或勺子把裹了面糊的茄片、肉片放入锅中，先煎至两面金黄，再煎**3-6分钟**（**煎的过程中，食用油会变少，可再添加食用油**）
撒盐，翻炒均匀，起锅装盘
steps_en: Peel the eggplant and cut into slices, cut the bacon into slices and set aside
Add 250g rice flour (powder ground from rice), 50g flour and 1 egg into the basin in sequence

While stirring with chopsticks, add water (**Water is used to adjust the viscosity**) to mix the rice flour, flour, and eggs into a batter. Stop adding water when the batter can adhere to the eggplant slices and meat slices without falling off. Then put all the eggplant slices and meat slices into the batter and wrap them fully with the batter.
Add cooking oil **10-30ml** to the pan and turn on low heat

Use chopsticks or a spoon to put the batter-coated eggplant slices and meat slices into the pot, fry until both sides are golden brown, and then fry for **3-6 minutes** (**During the frying process, the cooking oil will become less, you can add more cooking oil**)
Sprinkle salt, stir-fry evenly, remove from pot and serve on a plate
