file_path: dishes/staple/茄子肉煎饼/茄子肉煎饼.md

intro_zh:
这是一道配料丰富的升级版炒饭，米饭粒粒分明，鸡蛋嫩滑，搭配虾仁、午餐肉和蔬菜丁，口感层次鲜明，属于淮扬菜系中的经典主食。富含优质蛋白、碳水化合物和多种维生素，营养均衡。步骤虽多但操作直观，对初级烹饪者也较为友好，只需耐心备料。预计制作时长约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1769 大卡
intro_en:
This is an upgraded version of fried rice with rich ingredients. The rice has distinct grains and tender eggs. It is paired with shrimp, luncheon meat and diced vegetables. It has a distinct texture and is a classic staple food in Huaiyang cuisine. Rich in high-quality protein, carbohydrates and multiple vitamins, nutritionally balanced. Although there are many steps, the operation is intuitive and friendly to beginner cooks. All you need to do is prepare the ingredients patiently. Estimated production time is approximately 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1769 kcal
ingredients_zh: 冷冻去头去皮基围虾 10-15 只
午餐肉罐头 150g（推荐上海梅林的火腿午餐肉罐头，340g 每罐，一次用半罐）
ingredients_en: Frozen headless and peeled prawns 10-15 pieces
Canned luncheon meat 150g (recommend Shanghai Meilin’s canned ham luncheon meat, 340g per can, use half a can at a time)
steps_zh: 胡萝卜切丁 0.2cm*0.2cm*0.2cm，备用
午餐肉切丁 0.2cm*0.2cm*0.2cm，备用
葱分别取葱白和葱绿，各切成 0.25-0.5cm 的小段，分开备用
在碗中打入鸡蛋液，均匀搅拌，备用
将胡萝卜，青豆，玉米粒煮熟捞出，备用（水别倒）
将虾煮熟，捞出备用（水可以倒了）
热锅热油，可以参考[学习炒与煎](../../../tips/learn/学习炒与煎.md)中的热锅双油
鸡蛋凝固后立刻捞出，备用
将午餐肉，青豆，胡萝卜，玉米粒，虾倒入锅中翻炒 1-2 分钟，装盘备用
水冲一下锅，将杂物冲干净，保证锅内干净（可以有油但是不能有杂质）
热锅热油(10ml)，将葱白放入爆香
调至小火（如果油温过高可以关火 1-2 分钟），放入米饭，用铲子快速砸击米饭并翻炒，保证米饭均匀沾到油且粒粒分明
倒入鸡蛋，继续砸击，使鸡蛋碎开并与米饭充分混合
转大火，倒入其他所有备用配料，快速翻炒 1-2 分钟
撒入盐，并翻炒至充分混合
撒入葱绿，翻炒 1 分钟
关火，装盘
steps_en: Dice carrots into 0.2cm*0.2cm*0.2cm, set aside
Cut lunch meat into 0.2cm*0.2cm*0.2cm cubes and set aside
Take white and green green onions, cut each into 0.25-0.5cm pieces, separate them for later use
Beat the egg mixture into a bowl, stir evenly, and set aside
Cook the carrots, green beans and corn kernels and set aside (don’t pour the water)
Cook the shrimps, take them out and set aside (the water can be poured in)
Heat the oil in the pan, you can refer to the double oil in the hot pan in [Learn to stir-fry and fry](../../../tips/learn/learn to stir-fry and fry.md)
Remove the eggs immediately after they solidify and set aside
Add luncheon meat, green beans, carrots, corn kernels, and shrimps to the pot and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes. Plate and set aside.
Rinse the pot with water to wash away the debris and ensure that the pot is clean (there can be oil but no impurities)
Heat oil (10ml) in a pan, add scallions and saute until fragrant

Reduce the heat to low (if the oil temperature is too high, you can turn off the heat for 1-2 minutes), add the rice, quickly smash the rice with a spatula and stir-fry to ensure that the rice is evenly coated with oil and the grains are distinct.
Pour in the eggs and continue pounding to break them up and mix well with the rice
Turn up the heat, add all other reserved ingredients, and stir-fry quickly for 1-2 minutes
Sprinkle in salt and stir-fry until well mixed
Add green onions and stir-fry for 1 minute
Turn off the heat and plate

intro_zh:
西红柿鸡蛋挂面是一道家常快手面食，酸甜咸鲜，汤汁浓郁，面条劲道，属于融入北方风味的日常主食。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白，西红柿富含番茄红素和维生素，搭配碳水主食，营养均衡。操作简单，步骤清晰，对新手友好，从备料到完成大约只需 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：654 大卡
intro_en:
Tomato and egg noodles are a home-cooked quick noodle dish with sweet, sour, salty, rich soup and chewy noodles. It is a daily staple food that incorporates northern flavor. Eggs provide high-quality protein, and tomatoes are rich in lycopene and vitamins. Together with carbohydrate staple foods, they are nutritionally balanced. The operation is simple, the steps are clear, and it is friendly to novices. It only takes about 20 minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 654 kcal
ingredients_zh: 白砂糖（中和西红柿的酸味，西红柿如果不酸就不用加）
挂面 1 把（根据食量来）50-100g
西红柿 1 个大概 200g 吧。
ingredients_en: Hanging noodles or fresh noodles will also work
Soy sauce, oyster sauce or chicken essence
White sugar (to neutralize the sourness of tomatoes, no need to add if tomatoes are not sour)
1 handful of dried noodles (depending on food intake) 50-100g
The amount of cooking oil is 20g
steps_zh: 小葱洗净并切成葱花
西红柿切块儿，如果不太会切建议先百度一下~
青椒切成菱形块
生鸡蛋打入一个小碗并打散，如果鸡蛋有点腥味可以加 2g 白醋去腥
起锅烧热，倒入 15~20g 食用油，鸡蛋炒嫩滑就得多一点油，同时为后面煸炒西红柿留一些底油
待油温到七成热时（手掌隔大概 10cm，能感觉到热），倒入蛋液快速划散
鸡蛋滑到凝固后，一点不会有蛋液了后倒入小碗备用，此处留一些底油
锅中留底油后先加入葱白、蒜末炒香
加入西红柿块、青椒，待西红柿炒出一点汁水
此时速速加入 5g 酱油和 2g 白砂糖
翻炒十几秒后加入一碗清水（刚刚好即将没过西红柿即可）
煮沸后加入炒好的鸡蛋，加入蚝油 5g 或者 2g 鸡精用于提鲜
中小火收汁，期间要搅拌防止粘锅，收汁到下图后加一点葱花（剩下的葱绿部分）和香油（不加也可以），臊子制作完成
可以不用洗锅，直接加清水 500ml
煮沸加入挂面，挂面煮软后加入 100ml 清水
再次煮沸后，若面条飘起来了，再加入 100ml 清水
煮沸后看面条两侧是否呈透明状，透明状则熟了
捞面到臊子碗中，拌面即可啦~
steps_en: Wash and chop green onions
Cut the tomatoes into pieces. If you are not good at cutting, I suggest you search on Baidu first~
Green peppers cut into diamond-shaped pieces
Crack the raw eggs into a small bowl and beat them up. If the eggs have a fishy smell, you can add 2g of white vinegar to remove the fishy smell.
Heat up the pan, pour in 15~20g of cooking oil, add a little more oil if the eggs are tender and smooth, and leave some base oil for frying the tomatoes later.
When the oil is 70% hot (you can feel the heat if you hold your palms about 10cm apart), pour in the egg liquid and spread quickly.
After the eggs are solidified and there is no more egg liquid left, pour them into a small bowl and set aside. Leave some base oil here.
Leave some oil in the pot, add scallions and minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant
Add tomato cubes and green peppers, and stir-fry the tomatoes until they produce a little juice
At this time, quickly add 5g soy sauce and 2g white sugar
Stir fry for ten seconds and then add a bowl of water (just enough to cover the tomatoes)
After boiling, add the scrambled eggs and 5g of oyster sauce or 2g of chicken essence for freshness.

Collect the juice over medium-low heat. Stir during this period to prevent sticking to the pan. After the juice reaches the point shown below, add a little chopped green onion (the remaining green part) and sesame oil (you can omit it). The sautee is finished.
You don’t need to wash the pot, just add 500ml of water directly
Bring to a boil and add noodles. After the noodles are soft, add 100ml of water.
After boiling again, if the noodles float, add 100ml of water
After boiling, check whether both sides of the noodles are transparent. If they are transparent, they are cooked.
Pour the noodles into a steamed rice bowl and mix with them~
file_path: dishes/staple/西红柿鸡蛋挂面/西红柿鸡蛋挂面.md

intro_zh:
这道西北传统面食以筋道的扯面和热油泼出的香辣风味著称，是陕西家喻户晓的日常主食。面条富含碳水化合物，搭配青菜和豆芽，能快速补充能量，膳食搭配合理。整个流程简单明了，对新手十分友好，从备料到出锅大约只需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：771 大卡
intro_en:
This traditional northwest noodle dish is famous for its chewy pulled noodles and spicy flavor splashed with hot oil. It is a well-known daily staple food in Shaanxi. Noodles are rich in carbohydrates, and paired with vegetables and bean sprouts, they can quickly replenish energy and provide a reasonable meal mix. The whole process is simple, straightforward and friendly to novices, and it only takes about 30 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 771 kcal
ingredients_en: Fresh noodles (pulled noodles are especially good)![pulled noodles](./chemian.png)
Dried chili pepper noodles (or Qin pepper noodles)
steps_zh: 扯面的话, 用擀面杖（没有擀面杖,用手也行）上下两边轻压, 两手拽住左侧和右侧两端,轻轻拉开
葱切成葱花，蒜切成蒜末备用
青菜洗净，豆芽洗净备用（如使用）
锅中加入足量清水，大火烧开后加入 1g 盐
放入面条，用筷子轻轻搅动防止粘连，煮至面条浮起后再煮 1-2 分钟
在煮面的最后 1 分钟，放入青菜和豆芽焯水
将煮好的面条和青菜、豆芽捞出，沥干水分后放入碗中
在面条上依次加入生抽、香醋、葱花、蒜末和干辣椒面, 也可放点芝麻
炒锅中倒入食用油，同时放入花椒、八角、桂皮、香叶（如使用），小火炸出香味后捞出香料
待油温升至七成热（微微冒烟）时，迅速均匀地泼在碗中的干辣椒面上，听到“滋啦”声即可
用筷子将所有调料和面条充分拌匀即可食用
steps_en: If you want to pull the noodles, use a rolling pin (you can use your hands if you don’t have a rolling pin) to gently press the upper and lower sides, grab the left and right ends with both hands, and gently pull them apart.
Chop the onions into finely chopped green onions and mince the garlic and set aside.
Wash green vegetables and bean sprouts and set aside (if used)
Add enough water to the pot, bring to a boil over high heat and add 1g of salt
Add noodles, stir gently with chopsticks to prevent sticking, cook until noodles float, then cook for 1-2 minutes
During the last minute of cooking the noodles, add the green vegetables and bean sprouts and blanch them
Take out the cooked noodles, vegetables and bean sprouts, drain them and put them into a bowl
Add light soy sauce, balsamic vinegar, chopped green onion, minced garlic and dried chili powder to the noodles in sequence. You can also add some sesame seeds.
Pour cooking oil into the wok, and at the same time add peppercorns, star anise, cinnamon, and bay leaves (if used). Fry over low heat until fragrant and remove the spices.
When the oil temperature rises to 70% hot (slightly smoking), quickly and evenly pour it on the dried chili noodles in the bowl until you hear a "sizzling" sound.
Use chopsticks to mix all the seasonings and noodles thoroughly and serve
file_path: dishes/staple/陕西油泼面/陕西油泼面.md

intro_zh:
这是一道鲜香味美的日式简餐，米饭粒粒分明，融合了鲣鱼的咸鲜、海苔的酥香与玉米的甜脆。鲣鱼富含优质蛋白和 DHA，搭配海苔的矿物质和玉米的膳食纤维，营养均衡。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松完成，实际动手仅需 5 分钟，加上煮饭总共约 40 分钟即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：383 大卡
intro_en:
This is a delicious Japanese simple meal. The rice has distinct grains and combines the saltiness of bonito, the crispness of seaweed and the sweetness and crunchiness of corn. Bonito is rich in high-quality protein and DHA, and combined with the minerals of seaweed and the dietary fiber of corn, it is nutritionally balanced. It is very simple to make and can be easily completed by novices. It only takes 5 minutes to actually do it, and it takes about 40 minutes in total to cook and enjoy.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 383 kcal
ingredients_zh: 必备：东北米（金龙鱼 30 元 5kg 的就行，推荐使用米家 IH 电饭煲煮，教程用的是米家小饭煲，**不推荐使用高压锅煮饭**）
必备：鲣鱼海苔碎（JD 和淘宝都有，可以搜索：日式拌饭料）
必备：玉米粒（淘宝搜索：玉米粒 即食）
ingredients_en: Necessary: Northeast rice (Arowana is 30 yuan for 5kg. It is recommended to use Mijia IH rice cooker. The tutorial uses Mijia small rice cooker. **It is not recommended to use pressure cooker to cook rice**)
Must-have: Crushed bonito and seaweed (available in JD and Taobao, you can search for: Japanese bibimbap ingredients)
Essential: corn kernels (Taobao search: corn kernels ready to eat)
steps_zh: 盛好米饭，放入玉米粒拌好
放入鲣鱼海苔碎
steps_en: Serve rice, add corn kernels and mix well
Add chopped bonito and seaweed
file_path: dishes/staple/鲣鱼海苔玉米饭/鲣鱼海苔玉米饭.md

intro_zh:
速冻馄饨皮薄馅嫩，汤清味鲜，是一道便捷的家常面食。主要提供碳水化合物和蛋白质，便于快速补充能量。做法简单，对新手非常友好，使用电饭煲即可完成，从烧水到出锅大约需要 55 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：540 大卡
intro_en:
Quick-frozen wontons have thin skin and tender fillings, and the soup is clear and delicious. It is a convenient home-cooked pasta. Mainly provides carbohydrates and protein for quick energy replenishment. The recipe is simple and very friendly to novices. It can be done using a rice cooker and it takes about 55 minutes from boiling water to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 540 kcal
ingredients_zh: 未过期的一袋速冻馄饨（自带调味料包更佳）
电饭煲（推荐品牌小米智能电饭煲）
盐（速冻馄饨无调味料包时）
鸡精（速冻馄饨无调味料包时）
胡椒粉（速冻馄饨无调味料包时）
香油（速冻馄饨无调味料包时）
一般一个人一顿可以食用 12～20 个馄饨
当所有馄饨放入电饭煲中时，能刚好没过所有馄饨的水乘以 2~3 倍的水量（一人食用的馄饨约需要 600ml 水量）
ingredients_en: A bag of frozen wontons that has not expired (it is better to bring your own seasoning packet)
Rice cooker (recommended brand Xiaomi smart rice cooker)
Salt (when there is no seasoning package for quick-frozen wontons)
Chicken essence (when there is no seasoning package for quick-frozen wontons)
Pepper (if there is no seasoning package for quick-frozen wontons)
Sesame oil (when there is no seasoning package for quick-frozen wontons)
Generally, one person can eat 12 to 20 wontons in one meal.

When all the wontons are put into the rice cooker, the amount of water that can just cover all the wontons is multiplied by 2 to 3 times the amount of water (approximately 600ml of water is needed for one person to eat wontons)
steps_zh: 将水倒入电饭煲中，按炖或煮的模式运行 35 分钟，此时揭开电饭煲应看到水为沸腾状态。
将速冻馄饨小心放入水中，注意不要烫伤。
放入电饭煲前可以适当用水过一下。
如果馄饨有调料包，此时可一并加入水中。
盖上电饭煲，按同样炖或煮的模式运行 20 分钟。
将所有馄饨连同能没过所有馄饨的水一同盛入碗中。
如果此前没有加入调料包，此时可按自身口味轻重加入盐、鸡精、胡椒粉、香油调味。
也可撒上 5~8 片香菜叶佐味（仅适用于对香菜味道不敏感的人）。
steps_en: Pour water into the rice cooker and run it in stew or boil mode for 35 minutes. At this time, you should see the water boiling when you open the rice cooker.
Carefully place the frozen wontons into the water, being careful not to burn them.
You can rinse it with water before putting it in the rice cooker.
If the wontons have seasoning packets, you can add them to the water at this time.
Cover the rice cooker and run it in the same simmer or boil mode for 20 minutes.
Place all the wontons into a bowl along with enough water to cover them all.
If you have not added the seasoning packet before, you can add salt, chicken essence, pepper, and sesame oil to season according to your own taste.
You can also sprinkle 5~8 coriander leaves for taste (only suitable for people who are not sensitive to the taste of coriander).

intro_zh:
凉皮是一道源自陕西的家常小吃，口感筋道爽滑，酸辣开胃，带有浓郁的芝麻酱香。芝麻酱和面筋提供了丰富的植物蛋白与钙质，搭配清脆的黄瓜和绿豆芽，富含维生素和膳食纤维。整体操作难度中等，只需简单煮烫、切丝和调汁，一般初学者也能从容完成。从备料到上桌大约需要 40 分钟，非常适合夏日餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：761 大卡
intro_en:
Liangpi is a home-cooked snack originating from Shaanxi. It has a chewy and smooth texture, is sour and spicy, and has a rich sesame sauce aroma. Tahini and gluten provide rich plant protein and calcium, paired with crisp cucumber and mung bean sprouts, which are rich in vitamins and dietary fiber. The overall operation difficulty is medium. It only requires simple blanching, shredding and sauce making, and even beginners can complete it calmly. It takes about 40 minutes from prep to serving, making it perfect for the summer table.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 761 kcal
ingredients_zh: 盐、鸡精、蚝油、生抽、老抽、香油、香醋、芝麻酱（原味芝麻酱最佳）
凉皮用量为 300 g/人 向下取整。
芝麻酱的用量为 30 g/人 向下取整。
ingredients_en: Salt, chicken essence, oyster sauce, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, sesame oil, balsamic vinegar, sesame paste (original sesame paste is best)
The dosage of cold skin is 300 g/person, round down.
The amount of sesame paste is 30 g/person, round down.
steps_zh: 锅中加入 500ml 水。煮沸。
将绿豆芽放入锅中，大火煮 60 秒。豆芽捞出，过凉水，放入盘中备用。
黄瓜切丝放入盘中备用
将 10g 蒜瓣剥皮、放入蒜臼中加入 1g 盐。锤成蒜泥，加入 10g 自来水。放置备用。
注：超市购买来的凉皮表面一般会有食用油，可以使用自来水清洗。面筋同样。
注：清洗面筋之后，请用手将面筋中的大量水分挤出（不需过于用力）。
准备小碗，加入 3g 盐、2g 鸡精、5g 生抽、1g 老抽、1g 香油、2g 蚝油、香醋 5g、（盐、香醋均可根据个人口味酌量添加，以上数据只是大众口味）。
以上调料加入 25-35g 温水（据个人咸淡程度），使用筷子将其拌匀、溶解。静置一旁冷却。
注：以下计量均为一人份，如果有 n 人，请自觉将计量乘以 n
拿出小碗，将准备好的芝麻酱放入其中。
加入 4g 盐、3g 鸡精、5g 生抽、1g 老抽、3g 蚝油。
使用筷子将其调料与芝麻酱拌匀。
加入 10g 清水将其拌匀。
上一步骤重复 2、3 次（次数根据个人对芝麻酱的浓稠程度而定）。
拿出之前准备好的小盆，加入之前准备好的凉皮。
倒入盐水，使用筷子将其拌匀。随之盛入小碗（盐水一并倒入碗中）。
豆芽放置凉皮上、面筋随后放上。
将调配好的芝麻酱从面筋上方倒下。
撒上黄瓜丝。
如有喜爱可以加入辣椒油。
色香味俱全的家常凉皮出炉！
steps_en: Add 500ml water to the pot. boiled.
Add the mung bean sprouts to the pot and cook over high heat for 60 seconds. Remove the bean sprouts, rinse in cold water, and place in a plate for later use.
Cut the cucumber into shreds and place on a plate. Set aside
Peel 10g of garlic cloves, put into a garlic mortar and add 1g of salt. Hammer the garlic into paste and add 10g of tap water. Set aside.
Note: Liangpi bought in supermarkets usually has cooking oil on the surface and can be cleaned with tap water. Same with gluten.
Note: After washing the gluten, please squeeze out a lot of water from the gluten with your hands (no need to use too much force).

Prepare a small bowl, add 3g salt, 2g chicken essence, 5g light soy sauce, 1g dark soy sauce, 1g sesame oil, 2g oyster sauce, 5g balsamic vinegar (salt and balsamic vinegar can be added according to personal taste, the above data is for public taste only).
Add 25-35g of warm water (depending on personal saltiness) to the above seasonings, mix well and dissolve with chopsticks. Set aside to cool.
Note: The following measurements are for one person. If there are n people, please multiply the measurements by n.
Take out a small bowl and put the prepared sesame paste into it.
Add 4g salt, 3g chicken essence, 5g light soy sauce, 1g dark soy sauce, and 3g oyster sauce.
Use chopsticks to mix the seasoning with the sesame paste.
Add 10g of water and mix well.
Repeat the previous step 2 or 3 times (the number of times depends on how thick the tahini is).
Take out the small basin you prepared earlier and add the cold skin prepared earlier.
Pour in the salt water and mix well using chopsticks. Then put it into a small bowl (pour the salt water into the bowl as well).
Place the bean sprouts on the cold skin, followed by the gluten.
Pour the prepared sesame sauce over the gluten.
Sprinkle with cucumber shreds.
You can add chili oil if you like.
Home-made cold skin with delicious flavor and color is out of the oven!

intro_zh:
这是一道利用市售半成品快速完成的西式简餐，面条弹韧有嚼劲，搭配现成酱料风味浓郁。以碳水化合物为主，能迅速补充能量，并含有蛋白质。制作难度极低，新手也能零失误，从开火到装盘仅需约 2 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：578 大卡
intro_en:
This is a Western-style simple meal that is quickly prepared using commercially available semi-finished products. The noodles are elastic and chewy, and the ready-made sauce is rich in flavor. Mainly composed of carbohydrates, it can quickly replenish energy and contains protein. It is extremely easy to make, and even beginners can make zero mistakes. It only takes about 2 minutes from firing to loading.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 578 kcal
ingredients_zh: 1 袋 半成品意大利面（推荐品牌圃美多）
平底锅 或 微波炉
2 人 1 顿 520g（以半成品为准）
ingredients_en: 1 bag of semi-finished pasta (recommended brand Pumido)
1 meal for 2 people 520g (subject to semi-finished product)
steps_zh: 热锅
将 50 ml 清水倒入平底锅
将面条放入，炒 1 分钟
将酱料倒入，翻炒 1 分钟
装盘即可
将面条放入「可用于微波炉加热」的盘子中
将附带的酱料倒在面条上
倒入 50 ml 清水
700W 加热 2 分钟
取出拌匀即可
steps_en: hot pot
Pour 50 ml water into the saucepan
Add the noodles and fry for 1 minute
Pour in the sauce and stir-fry for 1 minute
Just load it on the plate
Place noodles in a microwave-safe plate
Pour the accompanying sauce over the noodles
Pour 50 ml water
700W heating for 2 minutes
Take it out and mix well

intro_zh:
这道重庆火锅底料以大量牛油为基底，糅合糍粑辣椒和多种香辛料，熬出的底料麻辣醇厚、香气浓烈，是涮烫毛肚、鸭肠等食材的灵魂。牛油和猪油提供了丰富能量，辣椒与花椒能温中散寒、促进食欲，但油脂含量较高，宜节制食用。制作过程需精准控制油温和翻炒火候，对新手有一定挑战，从备料到完成约需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：585 大卡
intro_en:
This Chongqing hot pot base is based on a large amount of butter, mixed with glutinous rice cake peppers and various spices. The base is spicy and mellow with a strong aroma. It is the soul of scalding tripe, duck intestines and other ingredients. Butter and lard provide abundant energy. Chili and Sichuan pepper can warm the body, dispel cold and stimulate appetite. However, they have high fat content and should be eaten in moderation. The production process requires precise control of oil temperature and stir-frying heat, which is a challenge for novices. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 585 kcal
ingredients_zh: （色拉油 或 菜籽油） 1000 ml
老油 ? 颗粒香料 100 g : 整形香料 150 g
老油 ?? 干辣椒面 15 g
每份原料可制作 7.5 kg 火锅底料/火锅老油
ingredients_en: Old oil? Granulated spices 100 g: Plastic spices 150 g
Each ingredient can make 7.5 kg of hot pot base/hot pot oil
steps_zh: 锅置旺火（大火）放入牛油烧至 八成热(240±10°C) 时放入 `老姜、大葱、洋葱、大蒜 (各100g)`，炸干（吸尽异味（牛油腥味））后捞出扔掉。
放入 `(色拉油 || 菜籽油)、纯猪油`，等待锅中油温下降到 五成热(150±10°C) 时放入 `糍粑辣椒` 持续翻炒 5-8 分钟。
放入 `豆瓣` 炒散，转用 **中小火** 慢炒至料渣略发白翻砂（发出沙沙声）。
油在外观呈现樱桃红时放入 `姜片(150g)、大蒜(100g)` 炒香，大约 15 秒。
放入 `豆鼓、豆母子` 炒香，放入 `红花椒、小茴香` 炒香。
（老油） 此刻放入 颗粒香料
放入 `麦芽粉` 炒散，放入 `白酒` 炒散。
起锅装入容器中，静置于温度低的环境(10-20) 5 天后再使用效果最佳。
起锅装入容器中放入 `干辣椒面` 搅匀置放 24 小时，等待制作 **老油**。
将底料倒入锅中，加入 3/5 的开水用大火烧开 （底料:2/5 开水:3/5）。
烧开后表面会出现泡沫，将泡沫撇净。
转用 **中小火** 慢熬出味（约 25-30 分钟），过滤去渣。
等待容器中 **油水分离** 后，将表面的 **油** 撇净（将油打出来） 装入另外的容器。
将上一步所 **撇** 出来的 **油** 重新倒入 **净锅** 中，直至 **炼干** 油中水分起锅装入容器即为 **火锅老油**。
steps_en: Place the pot over high heat (high fire), add butter and cook until it is 80% hot (240±10°C). Add `old ginger, scallions, onions, and garlic (100g each)`, fry them dry (to absorb the odor (butter smell)), take them out and throw them away.
Add `(salad oil || rapeseed oil) and pure lard`, wait until the oil temperature in the pot drops to 50% hot (150±10°C), add `糍粑 pepper` and continue to stir-fry for 5-8 minutes.
Add the `douban` and stir-fry until scattered, then turn to **medium-low heat** and stir-fry slowly until the residue is slightly white and sanded (makes a rustling sound).
When the oil turns cherry red, add ginger slices (150g) and garlic (100g) and stir-fry until fragrant, about 15 seconds.
Add `Dougu and Dou Muzi` and stir-fry until fragrant. Add `red pepper and cumin` and stir-fry until fragrant.
(Old oil) Add granulated spices at this moment
Add `malt powder` and stir-fry. Add `white wine` and stir-fry.
Remove the pot and put it into a container, and let it sit in a low temperature environment (10-20) for the best effect before using it for 5 days.
Put the pot into a container, add `dried chili noodles`, mix well and let it sit for 24 hours, waiting to make **old oil**.
Pour the base ingredients into the pot, add 3/5 of the boiling water and bring to a boil over high heat (base ingredients: 2/5, boiling water: 3/5).
After boiling, foam will appear on the surface. Skim off the foam.
Turn to **medium-low heat** and simmer slowly to release the flavor (about 25-30 minutes), then filter to remove residue.
After waiting for the **oil and water to separate** in the container, skim off the **oil** on the surface (punch out the oil) and put it into another container.

Pour the **oil** that was **skimmed** out in the previous step back into the **clean pot** until it is **refined** and the water in the oil is removed from the pot and put into a container to become **old hot pot oil**.

intro_zh:
这是一道源自中国的家常面食，采用市售冻饺速成，皮薄馅丰，口感鲜香。佐以醋、姜、蒜等蘸料，滋味更添层次。作为一餐，它能提供充足的蛋白质与碳水，营养饱腹。制作毫无难点，新手也能轻松上手，前后仅需大约一 刻钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：502 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked noodle dish originating from China. It is made from commercially available frozen dumplings. It has a thin skin, rich filling and a delicious taste. Served with vinegar, ginger, garlic and other dipping sauces, the taste will be more layered. As a meal, it provides sufficient protein and carbohydrates and is nutritious and satiating. There is no difficulty in making it, and novices can easily get started, and it only takes about a quarter of an hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 502 kcal
ingredients_zh: 未过期的一袋速冻水饺
一般一个人可以食用 7～10 个水饺
一个水饺约需要本身体积两倍的水（饺子倒入锅内时，水的高度应一至两倍于饺子的高度，即饺子高度为 1，水高度则为 1~2）
ingredients_en: A bag of frozen dumplings that have not expired
Generally, one person can eat 7 to 10 dumplings

One dumpling requires about twice its own volume of water (when the dumpling is poured into the pot, the height of the water should be one to two times the height of the dumpling, that is, the height of the dumpling is 1 and the height of the water is 1~2)
steps_zh: 中火，将水倒入锅中，静候水煮沸。
将饺子倒入锅中。
倒入锅前可以适当用水过一下。
倒入饺子后，可以用炒菜勺子或铲子搅水，但要注意不要铲到饺子上，以避免粘锅上撕破皮或互相粘连造成粘连处夹生。
频率不需要太高，平均每 `30` 秒摇 `3` 秒，饺子浮起后不需要再做此步。
饺子浮起及水再次煮沸后，用炒菜勺子盛起一个饺子观察，如果面皮有夹生可用炒菜勺子舀入 80ml 凉水，将水降温，然后继续煮至沸腾，此间重复此观察、搅拌操作，最多加两次水就能全熟。
所有饺子浮起后（下饺子后约 8 分钟）用铲子或漏勺把饺子铲入盘或碗中，装盘后即可食用。
吃完饺子后，等锅内水温降低，将水倒掉并用洗洁精及时刷锅，不然过段时间锅内煮过的面粉会在锅壁形成黏糊糊的物质。
steps_en: Over medium heat, pour the water into the pot and wait for the water to boil.
Pour the dumplings into the pot.
You can rinse it with water before pouring it into the pot.

After pouring the dumplings, you can use a cooking spoon or shovel to stir the water, but be careful not to shovel the dumplings to avoid sticking to the pan and tearing the skin or sticking to each other, causing the adhesions to get caught.
The frequency does not need to be too high, on average, shake for `3` seconds every `30` seconds. There is no need to do this step again after the dumplings float.

After the dumplings float and the water boils again, use a cooking spoon to pick up a dumpling and observe. If the dough is uncooked, use a cooking spoon to scoop in 80ml of cold water, cool down the water, and continue to boil until it boils. Repeat this observation and stirring operation. Add water at most twice before it is fully cooked.
After all the dumplings have floated (about 8 minutes after placing them), use a spatula or slotted spoon to scoop the dumplings into a plate or bowl, plate them and serve.

After eating the dumplings, wait for the water temperature in the pot to drop, pour out the water and clean the pot promptly with dish soap, otherwise the flour cooked in the pot will form a sticky substance on the wall of the pot over time.

intro_zh:
这是一道方便省事的家常快手菜，鸡翅外焦里嫩，自带油脂香气，比快餐店的更对胃口。鸡翅中富含优质蛋白和脂肪，能量充足。对新手非常友好，实际操作只需几分钟，全程大约四十分钟就能吃上。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：504 大卡
intro_en:
This is a convenient and hassle-free home-cooked dish. The chicken wings are crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. They have their own aroma of oil and are more appetizing than those in fast food restaurants. Chicken wings are rich in high-quality protein and fat and have sufficient energy. It is very friendly to novices, the actual operation only takes a few minutes, and the whole process can be eaten in about forty minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 504 kcal
ingredients_zh: 必备：鸡翅中（推荐买泰森的奥尔良鸡翅中，JD 打折的话 30 多一袋 454g 大概 12 个。上鲜和圣农的也买过，没这个方便。泰森的是腌好的，如果有时间的话可以买没腌的自己腌。）
可选：罗勒碎（撒上去纯粹为了好看）
可选：云南单山蘸水（代替烧烤料）
鸡翅中 6 个（泰森奥尔良鸡翅中，其他品牌例如圣农嘟嘟翅可能会大一些，请自行根据食量斟酌）
ingredients_en: Must-have chicken wings (it is recommended to buy Tyson’s Orleans Chicken Wings. If you have a JD discount, it costs 30 more per bag of 454g and about 12 pieces. I have also bought the ones from Shangxian and Shengnong, but they are not as convenient. Tyson’s are marinated, if you have time, you can buy unmarinated ones and marinate them yourself.)
Optional: chopped basil (sprinkled just for looks)
Optional: Yunnan Shanshan dipping sauce (instead of barbecue ingredients)
6 pieces of chicken wings (Tyson Orleans chicken wings, other brands such as Saint-Germain Dudu wings may be larger, please consider according to your appetite)
steps_zh: 鸡翅从冰箱拿出来，鸡翼面朝下放入锡纸烤盘，撒上罗勒碎，盖上保鲜膜自然解冻 20 分钟
撒上罗勒碎，空气炸锅 200°C，10 分钟
翻面，撒上罗勒碎，空气炸锅 200°C，7 分钟
steps_en: Take the chicken wings out of the refrigerator, place the chicken wings side down on a tin foil baking sheet, sprinkle with chopped basil, cover with plastic wrap and defrost naturally for 20 minutes.
Sprinkle with chopped basil and air fry at 200°C for 10 minutes
Flip over, sprinkle with chopped basil, air fryer 200°C, 7 minutes

dishes/semi-finished/空气炸锅鸡翅中/鸡翅中_1.jpg

intro_zh:
这道甜品利用现成的蛋挞皮和蛋挞液，外皮酥香、内馅嫩滑，带有焦糖斑点，是经典粤式点心中最易上手的版本。主要成分鸡蛋和牛奶提供了优质蛋白质与钙质，适合作为家庭小点心。整个操作只需组装和烘烤，对完全零基础的新手也很友好，从预热烤箱到出炉约需 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：137 大卡
intro_en:
This dessert uses ready-made egg tart crust and egg tart liquid. It has a crispy crust, tender filling and caramel spots. It is the most accessible version of the classic Cantonese dim sum. The main ingredients, eggs and milk, provide high-quality protein and calcium, making it suitable as a family snack. The whole operation only requires assembly and baking, and is also friendly to novices with no basic knowledge. It takes about 40 minutes from preheating the oven to taking it out of the oven.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 137 kcal
ingredients_zh: 需要烤箱 1 个（有上下火功能的最佳，也可以没有）
网购蛋挞液 1 盒，蛋挞皮 1 盒（附近的大超市也可以，比如家乐福、沃尔玛等等）
蛋挞液约 10ml，到达挞皮的 4/5 最佳
ingredients_en: Requires 1 oven (the one with upper and lower heat functions is best, but not required)
Purchase 1 box of egg tart liquid and 1 box of egg tart shell online (you can also buy it from nearby large supermarkets, such as Carrefour, Walmart, etc.)
The egg tart liquid is about 10ml, reaching 4/5 of the tart shell.
steps_zh: 烤箱 200 度，预热 10 分钟
在烤盘上放上蛋挞皮，蛋挞皮中倒入蛋挞液约 10ml，具体分量需要看蛋挞皮大小，通常倒入 4/5 即可
将烤盘放入烤箱内，上下火 190 度，烤 10 - 20 分。如果想快速烤出蛋挞液上的焦褐斑点，需要上火更高一些，通常是 200 - 210 度
蛋挞液烤出焦褐斑点，蛋挞皮完全蓬松冒油即可
steps_en: Oven 200 degrees, preheat for 10 minutes
Place the egg tart shell on the baking sheet, and pour about 10ml of egg tart liquid into the egg tart shell. The specific amount depends on the size of the egg tart shell, usually 4/5 is enough.

Place the baking sheet in the oven, heat up and down to 190 degrees, and bake for 10 - 20 minutes. If you want to quickly bake out the brown spots on the egg tart liquid, you need to set the heat to a higher temperature, usually 200-210 degrees.
The egg tart liquid is baked until brown spots appear, and the egg tart skin is completely fluffy and oily.

intro_zh:
炸薯条外酥里软，金黄咸香，属于广受欢迎的快餐小食。土豆提供碳水化合物和膳食纤维，但油炸或空气炸制后热量较高。使用半成品薯条和空气炸锅，操作简单，新手也能轻松上手。从预热到出锅，大约需要 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1132 大卡
intro_en:
Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, golden and salty, French fries are a popular fast food snack. Potatoes provide carbohydrates and dietary fiber, but are higher in calories when fried or air-fried. Using semi-finished French fries and an air fryer, the operation is simple and even novices can get started. It takes about 25 minutes from preheating to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1132 kcal
ingredients_zh: 1 袋半成品薯条（推荐品牌麦肯）
1 个空气炸锅（喜欢脆的切忌小牌子）
作为主食，1 人 1 顿 400g（以半成品为准）
作为小食，1 人 1 顿 1/4 主食质量+-50g
ingredients_en: 1 bag of semi-finished chips (recommended brand McCann)
1 air fryer (avoid the small brand if you like crispiness)
As a staple food, 400g per person per meal (based on semi-finished products)
As a snack, 1 person, 1 meal, 1/4 staple food mass +-50g
steps_zh: 开封大分量半成品薯条注意开口要小，可以有效减少长久储藏下薯条表面结霜。
插电，200℃预热 5 分钟。
预热的目的是为了确保放入食材的时候锅内温度已经处于烹饪所需温度。
注意，预热完再拿出薯条，不应等薯条软化后再炸制。
取出薯条放入空气炸锅，200℃20 分钟。
取出薯条的时候注意半成品薯条已经有油，所以要异步去做客户端内刀斯林的话需要使用夹持工具。
5~10 分钟时可以拿出锅体晃动使薯条受热均匀也防止粘连。
10 分钟~15 分钟时，拿出锅体，往已经干了的薯条表面喷 1 层面积为薯条表面积 2/3 的油。
喜欢脆薯条的，取出后拿着锅体跳舞让空气经过薯条表面后装盘；喜欢软薯条的直接装盘。配合蘸酱或浇上酱汁更佳。
steps_en: When opening large quantities of semi-finished French fries, make sure the opening is small, which can effectively reduce frost on the surface of the French fries during long-term storage.
Plug it in and preheat at 200℃ for 5 minutes.
The purpose of preheating is to ensure that the temperature inside the pot is at the required cooking temperature when ingredients are added.
Note that you should take out the fries after preheating and do not wait for the fries to soften before frying.
Take out the fries and put them in the air fryer at 200℃ for 20 minutes.
When taking out the fries, pay attention to the fact that the semi-finished fries are already oily, so if you want to make the cut in the client asynchronously, you need to use a clamping tool.
After 5 to 10 minutes, you can take out the pot and shake it to heat the fries evenly and prevent them from sticking.
After 10 to 15 minutes, take out the pot and spray a layer of oil covering 2/3 of the surface area of the dried fries onto the surface of the fries.

If you like crispy fries, take it out and dance with the pot to let the air pass through the surface of the fries before placing it on a plate; if you like soft fries, put it on a plate directly. Best served with dipping sauce or topped with sauce.

intro_zh:
速冻汤圆是一道快速方便的微波炉甜点，外皮软糯、内馅香甜，属于中式传统小吃。主要提供碳水化合物，能迅速补充能量。做法极易上手，新手也能轻松完成，从准备到出锅仅需大约 6 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：568 大卡
intro_en:
Quick-frozen glutinous rice balls are a quick and convenient microwave dessert with soft and waxy outer skin and sweet filling. They are traditional Chinese snacks. Mainly provides carbohydrates, which can quickly replenish energy. The recipe is extremely easy to follow and can be easily completed by novices. It only takes about 6 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 568 kcal
ingredients_zh: 速冻汤圆：11 个。数量取决于碗的大小。保证放入的汤圆最高不超过碗高度 - 5mm。
ingredients_en: Quick-frozen glutinous rice balls: 11 pieces. Quantity depends on bowl size. Make sure that the height of the glutinous rice balls placed does not exceed the height of the bowl - 5mm.
steps_zh: 取出速冻汤圆，放入碗中。
倒入开水，直至浸没汤圆。
微波炉高火 4 分钟。
假如汤圆均已吸水膨胀，则已熟。
如果没熟，再加热 1 分钟。
steps_en: Take out the quick-frozen glutinous rice balls and put them into a bowl.
Pour in boiling water until the glutinous rice balls are submerged.
Microwave on high for 4 minutes.
If the glutinous rice balls have absorbed water and swelled, they are ready.
If not done, reheat for 1 minute.

intro_zh:
这道菜做法超级懒人，用空气炸锅能逼出多余油脂，成品外焦里嫩、蒜香浓郁，风味主要取决于羊排本身品质。羊肉富含优质蛋白和铁、锌等微量元素，有助于温补气血、增强体质。烹饪难度适中，新手也能轻松上手，实际动手操作仅需 10 分钟，算上腌制总时长约 40 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：473 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is super lazy to make. Using the air fryer can force out excess fat. The finished product is charred on the outside and tender on the inside, with a strong garlic aroma. The flavor mainly depends on the quality of the lamb chop itself. Mutton is rich in high-quality protein and trace elements such as iron and zinc, which helps warm and replenish qi and blood and enhance physical fitness. The cooking difficulty is moderate and can be easily picked up by novices. The actual hands-on operation only takes 10 minutes, and the total time of marinating is taken into account and it can be served on the table in about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 473 kcal
ingredients_zh: 必备：羊排（推荐 JD 购买大庄园 新西兰进口 羔羊法式肩排，500g/袋共三片，JD 打折的话 42 元）
必备：黑椒混合牛排调味料（懒）
必备：蒜蓉酱（推荐川娃子的，同样是因为懒）
可选：黄油（JD 买小盒装的，一片一小盒）
可选：空气炸锅烤架（用烤架油比较少，底下更容易熟，洗起来麻烦。不用的话比较入味。看个人选择啦）
黄油 1 小盒 10g 或 烧烤料 20g
ingredients_en: Must-have: Lamb chops (recommend JD to buy La Hacienda Lamb French shoulder chops imported from New Zealand, 500g/bag, three pieces in total, 42 yuan if JD has a discount)
Must-have: black pepper mixed with steak seasoning (lazy)
Must-have: Garlic sauce (I recommend Sichuan Wazi’s, also because I’m lazy)
Optional: butter (JD buys it in small boxes, one piece per box)
Optional: Air fryer grill (using a grill requires less oil, and the bottom is easier to cook, and it is troublesome to wash. If not used, it will taste better. It depends on personal choice)
1 small box of butter 10g or 20g barbecue ingredients
steps_zh: 羊排放入碗中清水洗净血水
羊排用厨房纸吸干水分，双面抹上黑椒混合调味料、蒜蓉酱，静置腌制 20 分钟
锡纸碗放上烤架，羊排放在烤架上，撒上罗勒碎，黄油或烧烤料放在羊排上，空气炸锅 180° 10 分钟
羊排翻面，撒上罗勒碎，黄油（从锡纸碗里舀上来）或烧烤料放在羊排上，空气炸锅 180° 5 分钟（可以视个人喜好加一点时间，这里写的是不会焦的时间）
steps_en: Put the lamb chops into a bowl and wash away the blood
Drain the lamb chops with kitchen paper, apply black pepper seasoning and garlic sauce on both sides, and marinate for 20 minutes.
Place the tin foil bowl on the grill, place the lamb chops on the grill, sprinkle with chopped basil, put butter or barbecue seasoning on the lamb chops, air fryer at 180° for 10 minutes

Turn the lamb chops over, sprinkle with chopped basil, butter (scooped from the tin foil bowl) or barbecue ingredients on the lamb chops, air fryer at 180° for 5 minutes (you can add a little more time according to personal preference, the time written here is the time that will not burn)
file_path: dishes/semi-finished/空气炸锅羊排/空气炸锅羊排.md

intro_zh:
胡萝卜甜糕是印度家喻户晓的冬季甜品，胡萝卜丝与牛奶慢炖浓缩，融入酥油和坚果，口感绵密香甜、色泽金红。富含胡萝卜素、钙质和优质脂肪，暖身滋养。制作过程简单，但对新手需要些耐心，全程约需 45 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：374 大卡
intro_en:
Carrot sweet cake is a well-known winter dessert in India. Shredded carrots are slowly simmered and concentrated with milk, and mixed with ghee and nuts. It has a dense and sweet taste and a golden color. Rich in carotene, calcium and high-quality fat, it warms and nourishes the body. The production process is simple, but requires some patience for novices, and the whole process takes about 45 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 374 kcal
ingredients_zh: 胡萝卜（建议选用红色胡萝卜）
酥油(Ghee)— 可用黄油替代
胡萝卜 500g（约 5-6 根中等大小）
糖 80g（可根据个人口味调整至 60g-100g）
ingredients_en: Ghee – can be substituted for butter
80g sugar (can be adjusted to 60g-100g according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 将胡萝卜去皮，用刨丝器刨成细丝
在厚底锅中倒入酥油 20g（一半量），中火加热融化
放入胡萝卜丝，翻炒 **3-5 分钟**，直至*胡萝卜丝变软且散发香味*
倒入全脂牛奶 500ml，搅拌均匀
大火煮沸后转中小火，保持*缓慢沸腾*状态
**持续翻搅 25-30 分钟**，直至*牛奶几乎完全被胡萝卜吸收蒸发*（这是最关键的步骤，需要耐心且不断搅拌防止糊底）
当锅中几乎没有液体时，加入糖 80g，搅拌均匀
加糖后会重新出水，继续中小火翻炒 **5-8 分钟**，直至*水分再次蒸发*
加入剩余的酥油 20g 和小豆蔻粉 3g，翻炒 2 分钟
在另一个小锅中，用少量酥油将腰果、杏仁片和葡萄干分别炸至*金黄*（约 1 分钟），注意葡萄干会膨胀
将炸好的坚果和葡萄干的一半拌入胡萝卜甜糕中
盛盘，将剩余坚果和葡萄干撒在表面作为装饰
steps_en: Peel the carrots and grate them into thin strips
Pour 20g (half the amount) of ghee into a heavy-bottomed pot and heat over medium heat until melted
Add the shredded carrots and stir-fry for **3-5 minutes** until the shredded carrots become soft and fragrant*
Pour in 500ml of whole milk and stir evenly
After boiling over high heat, turn to medium-low heat and keep *slowly boiling*

**Continue to stir for 25-30 minutes** until the *milk is almost completely absorbed by the carrots and evaporates* (this is the most critical step, requiring patience and constant stirring to prevent the bottom from burning)
When there is almost no liquid in the pot, add 80g of sugar and stir evenly
The water will come out again after adding sugar, continue to stir-fry over medium-low heat for **5-8 minutes** until the *water evaporates again*
Add remaining ghee 20g and cardamom powder 3g, stir-fry for 2 minutes
In another small pan, fry the cashews, slivered almonds and raisins separately in a little ghee until *golden* (about 1 minute), watch for the raisins to expand
Fold half of the fried nuts and raisins into the carrot cake
Serve on a plate and sprinkle remaining nuts and raisins on top for garnish.

intro_zh:
奥利奥冰淇淋口感细腻，奶香与奥利奥的酥脆甜蜜相融，纯动物奶油令整体轻盈不腻。它主要提供能量，含有脂肪和碳水化合物，适合作为消暑小甜点。制作过程较为简单，只需处理饼干夹心和搅打奶油，新手稍加耐心也可完成，全程准备约需半小时，再冷冻 4 小时以上即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1160 大卡
intro_en:
Oreo ice cream has a delicate texture, with the milky aroma blending with the crispy sweetness of Oreos. The pure animal cream makes the whole ice cream light and not greasy. It mainly provides energy, contains fat and carbohydrates, and is suitable as a dessert to relieve the heat. The preparation process is relatively simple. You only need to deal with the biscuit filling and whipping cream. A novice can complete it with a little patience. The whole preparation takes about half an hour, and it can be frozen for more than 4 hours before you can enjoy it.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1160 kcal
ingredients_zh: 淡奶油（推荐品牌 安佳动物淡奶油）
一个容量在 600 毫升以上且直径小（PS: 需要注意能放得下电动打蛋仪）深度深的容器（如准备了冰淇淋模具 容器需要有尖嘴方便转移）
小刀（或者可以去除夹心的工具）
ingredients_en: Whipping cream (recommended brand Anchor Animal Whipping Cream)

A container with a capacity of more than 600 ml and a small diameter (PS: you need to make sure it can accommodate an electric egg beater) and a deep depth (if you prepare an ice cream mold, the container needs to have a sharp spout for easy transfer)
steps_zh: 将奥利奥拧开后去除利利（夹心），备用
用筷子将奥奥剁碎，需要有一半奥奥变成粉状，另一半的奥奥最大长度小于 0.5 厘米，备用（某宝可搜“奥利奥饼干碎”，节省时间精力^-^）
将奶油全部倒置于深容器中，并加入准备好的糖
开始用电动打蛋器高速挡 搅打至 电动打蛋器提起后下方会出现**悬挂住**的奶油（ 0.5 厘米 - 1 厘米），而不是**全部**像液体一样滴下（部分滴下是正常现象）。
搅打完成后将奥奥放入奶油中，搅拌均匀直至底部有奥奥。
可选：将混合物倒入冰淇淋模具中
放置冰箱冷冻室（ -18 度） 4 小时以上可取出
steps_en: Unscrew the Oreos and remove the core (sandwich) and set aside

Use chopsticks to chop the Oreos into pieces. Half of the Oreos need to be turned into powder, and the maximum length of the other half of the Oreos is less than 0.5 cm. Set aside (you can search for "Oreo Cookie Crumbs" in a certain treasure to save time and energy ^-^)
Place all the cream in a deep container and add the prepared sugar

Start beating with the electric egg beater at high speed until the cream (0.5 cm - 1 cm) appears suspended underneath the electric egg beater, instead of **all** dripping like a liquid (partial dripping is normal).
After the whipping is complete, add the oats into the cream and stir evenly until there are oao at the bottom.
Optional: Pour mixture into ice cream molds
Place in the refrigerator freezer (-18 degrees) for more than 4 hours before taking out
file_path: dishes/dessert/奥利奥冰淇淋/奥利奥冰淇淋.md

name_zh: 烤箱版巴斯克芝士蛋糕
intro_zh:
巴斯克芝士蛋糕是一道口感浓郁绵密、表面焦香内部湿润的甜品，属于西班牙巴斯克地区的经典风味。主要原料为奶油奶酪和鸡蛋，富含优质蛋白质和钙质。制作过程非常简单，新手也能轻松驾驭。从准备到出炉仅需约 30 分钟，但建议冷藏过夜后食用，总耗时约 8 小时以上。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：266 大卡
intro_en:
Basque cheesecake is a dessert with a rich and dense texture, a caramelized surface and a moist interior. It is a classic flavor of the Basque region in Spain. The main raw materials are cream cheese and eggs, which are rich in high-quality protein and calcium. The production process is very simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It only takes about 30 minutes from prep to out of the oven, but it is recommended to refrigerate overnight before serving, taking about 8+ hours in total.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 266 kcal
ingredients_zh: 奶油奶酪：212g （这是一块的质量，比较方便，原教程是 250g）
巧克力：38g（只尝试过将普通巧克力融化，在淡奶油那一步加入搅拌均匀即可）
ingredients_en: Cream cheese: 212g (this is the mass of a piece, which is more convenient, the original tutorial is 250g)
Chocolate: 38g (I have only tried to melt ordinary chocolate, add the whipping cream and stir evenly)
steps_zh: 奶油奶酪软化，微波炉 10s + 10s。
奶油奶酪加入白砂糖，打蛋器打至顺滑。
加入 2 个全蛋 + 1 个蛋黄，搅拌均匀。
加入淡奶油，搅拌均匀。
加入低筋面粉，搅拌均匀。
放凉之后放入冰箱，最好过夜。
steps_en: To soften cream cheese, microwave 10s + 10s.
Add sugar to the cream cheese and beat with a whisk until smooth.
Add 2 whole eggs + 1 egg yolk and mix well.
Add light cream and mix well.
Add low-gluten flour and stir evenly.
Oven at 220°(425°F) for 20 - 25 minutes (I usually use 20 or 22 minutes).
Let cool and then place in the refrigerator, preferably overnight.
images: dishes/dessert/烤箱版巴斯克芝士蛋糕/烤箱版巴斯克芝士蛋糕.jpg
file_path: dishes/dessert/烤箱版巴斯克芝士蛋糕/烤箱版巴斯克芝士蛋糕.md

intro_zh:
龟苓膏是一道广式传统甜品，口感嫩滑微苦回甘，常作为夏日消暑小食。龟苓膏能清热祛湿、滋阴养颜，是营养健康的一款点心。做法简单，新手也能轻松掌握，全程只需备料、搅拌和加热，冷藏等待约两小时后即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：129 大卡
---
intro_en:
Guiling paste is a traditional Cantonese dessert with a tender and smooth taste, slightly bitter but sweet, and is often served as a snack to relieve the heat in summer. Guiling paste can clear away heat and dampness, nourish yin and nourish the skin. It is a nutritious and healthy snack. The recipe is simple and can be easily mastered by novices. The whole process only requires preparing ingredients, stirring and heating, then refrigerate and wait for about two hours before enjoying.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 129 kcal
---
steps_zh: 在锅中倒入龟苓膏粉 25 克与冷水 120 毫升，充分搅拌至无颗粒感。
在另一个容器中加入白砂糖 100 克，倒入沸水 500 毫升，搅拌至糖完全溶解。
将糖水缓慢倒入龟苓膏粉液中，立即搅拌均匀，避免结块。
将混合液体放入锅中，加热时保持中小火，并持续搅拌以防粘锅。
加热至液体变粘稠并开始冒小泡，即可关火。
快速将液体倒入模具中，自然冷却凝固。建议冷藏 1~2 小时后食用，口感更佳。
steps_en: Pour 25 grams of Guiling paste powder and 120 ml of cold water into the pot and stir thoroughly until there is no graininess.
Add 100 grams of white sugar to another container, pour 500 ml of boiling water, and stir until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Slowly pour the sugar water into the Guiling paste powder and stir evenly immediately to avoid clumping.
Put the mixed liquid into the pot and heat it over medium-low heat, stirring constantly to prevent sticking.
Heat until the liquid thickens and starts to bubble, then turn off the heat.
Quickly pour the liquid into the mold and let it cool and solidify naturally. It is recommended to refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours before eating for a better taste.

intro_zh:
这款甜品融合了咖啡的醇厚与椰奶的清甜，口感像布丁般细腻滑嫩，层次丰富。淡奶油和椰汁提供了优质脂肪与植物营养，食用能带来满足感。做法非常友好，只需混合加热，无需复杂技巧，新手也能一次成功。不算冷藏的话，实际操作约需 1 小时，加上冷藏定型共 大约 4 小时即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：162 大卡
intro_en:
This dessert combines the mellowness of coffee and the sweetness of coconut milk. It tastes as delicate and smooth as pudding and has rich layers. Whipped cream and coconut milk provide high-quality fats and plant nutrients, which can bring you a sense of satisfaction. The method is very user-friendly, just mix and heat it, no complicated skills are required, even a novice can succeed in one go. Not counting refrigeration, the actual operation takes about 1 hour, plus the refrigeration setting, a total of about 4 hours before you can enjoy it.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 162 kcal
ingredients_zh: （那个...有摆盘需求的话，可以来点蓝莓 and/or 咖啡粉）
35ml espresso 意式浓缩（个人不推荐用 fruity 的咖啡豆）
50ml 椰子水（推荐 vita coco coconut water，有条件可以敲一个椰子）
ingredients_en: (Well...if you need to put it on the plate, you can have some blueberries and/or coffee powder)
35ml espresso (I personally do not recommend using fruity coffee beans)
50ml coconut water (vita coco coconut water is recommended, you can knock a coconut if possible)
steps_zh: 将定量淡奶油，椰树牌椰汁，espresso，椰子水混合备用。
将以上液体加热 1 分钟，温度达到 50-60 度即可。
（可选）如果格外嗜甜可以加额外的糖。
倒入吉利丁，搅拌至融化，煮 1 分钟。
（可选）过筛 （这一步可以让椰奶冻口感更佳顺畅）。
放入模具。
（可选）过滤掉表层的泡泡。这一步可以让椰奶冻口感更好，并且看着也会更棒。
放入冰箱冷藏区，等待 3 小时。
steps_en: Mix a certain amount of whipping cream, coconut milk, espresso, and coconut water and set aside.
Heat the above liquid for 1 minute until the temperature reaches 50-60 degrees.
(Optional) Add extra sugar if you’re feeling extra sweet.
Pour in the gelatine, stir until melted, and cook for 1 minute.
(Optional) Sieve (this step can make the coconut milk jelly taste smoother).
Put into mold.
(Optional) Filter out surface bubbles. This step will make the coconut milk jelly taste better and look better.
Place in the refrigerator and wait 3 hours.
images: dishes/dessert/咖啡椰奶冻/咖啡椰奶冻.png
file_path: dishes/dessert/咖啡椰奶冻/咖啡椰奶冻.md

intro_zh:
炸鲜奶是一道外酥里嫩、香甜可口的经典甜点，属于家常小吃。富含蛋白质和钙质，营养较均衡。制作难度中等，新手也能上手，预计操作时长约 20 分钟，但需要提前 1 小时冷藏定型。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1026 大卡
intro_en:
Fried milk is a classic dessert that is crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, sweet and delicious, and is a home-cooked snack. Rich in protein and calcium, nutritionally balanced. The preparation level is moderate and can be mastered by novices. The operation is expected to take about 20 minutes, but it needs to be refrigerated 1 hour in advance to set.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1026 kcal
steps_zh: 将牛奶倒入碗中
加入玉米淀粉和白糖，搅拌均匀
将模具刷上食用油
牛奶下锅，中火烧开
烧开后转小火，边煮边搅拌
牛奶*变粘稠*后出锅，倒入模具
将模具放冰箱**冷却 1 小时**
拿出，切成大小均匀的条，随后放入碗中
向碗中倒入一半的面包糠，奶糊裹上后取出，备用
在一个新碗中打入鸡蛋，搅匀，备用
将奶糊裹上蛋液和剩余的面包糠
锅中倒入足以覆盖奶糊的油，下锅
奶糊外观*呈金黄状态*后停火，摆盘
steps_en: Pour milk into bowl
Add cornstarch and sugar and mix well
Brush the mold with cooking oil
Put the milk in the pot and bring to a boil over medium heat
Bring to a boil, then turn to low heat and stir while cooking
When the milk becomes thick, take it out of the pan and pour it into the mold
Place the mold in the refrigerator to cool down for 1 hour**
Take it out, cut it into evenly sized strips, and put it in a bowl
Pour half of the bread crumbs into the bowl, coat with the milk paste and take it out, set aside
Crack the eggs into a new bowl, mix well, and set aside
Coat the batter with egg wash and remaining bread crumbs
Pour enough oil into the pot to cover the milk paste, and put it in the pot
When the milk paste looks golden, stop the fire and place it on the plate.

intro_zh:
反沙芋头是一道外酥里糯、甜香可口的潮汕传统小吃，常作下午茶点。荔浦芋头富含膳食纤维、钾和多种维生素，能提供持久饱腹感。制作不难但需要掌握熬糖火候，适合稍有基础的初学者尝试，全程大约 20 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：397 大卡
intro_en:
Taro is a traditional Chaoshan snack that is crispy on the outside, waxy on the outside, sweet and delicious, and is often served as afternoon tea. Lipu taro is rich in dietary fiber, potassium and multiple vitamins, which can provide a long-lasting feeling of satiety. It is not difficult to make, but you need to master the temperature of boiling sugar. It is suitable for beginners with a little basic knowledge. The whole process can be completed in about 20 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 397 kcal
ingredients_zh: 荔浦芋头（电商平台购买即可，实惠新鲜）
ingredients_en: Lipu taro (can be purchased on e-commerce platform, affordable and fresh)
steps_zh: 芋头切长条（稍微大条一点，翻炒过程不容易烂）
加入可以没过芋头的油，等油温起来（插入筷子冒小泡即可）
放进芋头到油里，去炸到芋头浮起来，一般是微微泛黄并且可以用筷子很轻松戳洞
炸芋头的油放起来别浪费，后面炒菜啥的都能用
接下来关键的一步，把糖(30g)和水(15g)按照 2：1 比例，加热至不变色且冒小泡
倒入葱花和芋头，关火翻炒，此时等温度下来，糖就会有反沙的效果
装盘上桌！
steps_en: Cut the taro into long strips (slightly larger so it won’t rot easily during stir-frying)
Add enough oil to cover the taro and wait until the oil warms up (insert chopsticks to make small bubbles)
Put the taro into the oil and fry until the taro floats. It is usually slightly yellow and can be easily poked with chopsticks.
Don't waste the oil used for frying taro, it can be used for cooking and other things later.
The next critical step is to heat sugar (30g) and water (15g) in a ratio of 2:1 until it does not change color and bubbles appear.
Pour in the chopped green onion and taro, turn off the heat and stir-fry. When the temperature comes down, the sugar will have an anti-sand effect.
Plate and serve!
images: dishes/dessert/反沙芋头/反沙芋头成品.jpg

intro_zh:
这道意大利传统甜品无需烤箱，奶酪糊绵密轻盈，浸润咖啡液的手指饼干香醇柔软，属于入门级甜点。富含蛋白质和钙质，但糖分与热量较高，宜偶尔享用。操作简便，对烘焙新手十分友好，只需大约半 小时动手，再冷藏四小时即可成型品尝。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：809 大卡
intro_en:
This traditional Italian dessert does not require an oven. The cheese paste is dense and light, and the finger biscuits soaked in coffee liquid are mellow and soft. It is an entry-level dessert. Rich in protein and calcium, but high in sugar and calories, it should be enjoyed occasionally. It is easy to operate and is very friendly to novice bakers. It only takes about half an hour to start, and it can be refrigerated for another four hours before it can be shaped and tasted.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 809 kcal
ingredients_zh: 朗姆酒（不喜欢酒的朋友可省略，可按照自己口味调节）
一个装成品的容器（这里用的是玻璃乐扣）
打蛋器（手劲儿大的朋友也可以锻炼臂力）
ingredients_en: Rum (if you don’t like alcohol, you can omit it and adjust it according to your own taste)
A container for finished products (glass locks are used here)
Egg beater (those with strong hands can also exercise their arm strength)
steps_zh: 分离蛋黄蛋清
盛有蛋白的碗中加 10g 白砂糖湿性打发
盛有蛋黄的碗中将 40g 白砂糖分三次加入，搅拌至均匀
蛋黄中分三次加入马斯卡彭芝士，搅拌至均匀
蛋黄中最后加入朗姆酒，搅拌均匀
将打发好的蛋白分三次加入蛋黄芝士液中
手指饼干两面浸湿咖啡液，平铺入容器
两层芝士液两层饼干交替放入容器（这一步按照大家意愿及容器高度酌情处理）
放入冰箱冷藏四个小时（心急的小伙伴可以提早拿出来）
取出后在表面筛上可可粉，即可享用啦
steps_en: Separate egg yolk and egg white
Add 10g of white sugar to a bowl containing egg whites and beat until wet
Add 40g of white sugar in three batches to the bowl containing egg yolks, and stir until even
Add the mascarpone cheese to the egg yolks in three batches and mix until smooth
Finally add rum to the egg yolks and stir evenly
Add the beaten egg whites to the egg yolk cheese liquid in three batches
Soak both sides of finger biscuits with coffee liquid and place them flatly into a container
Two layers of cheese liquid and two layers of biscuits are placed alternately into the container (this step is handled according to your wishes and the height of the container)
Place it in the refrigerator for four hours (if you are impatient, you can take it out earlier)
After taking it out, sift cocoa powder on the surface and enjoy.
images: dishes/dessert/提拉米苏/提拉米苏成品.jpg

intro_zh:
一道改良自意大利经典的甜品，融入原味酸奶后口感更为清爽顺滑，甜而不腻，适合作为餐后小点搭配水果或果酱。奶制品带来丰富的钙质和蛋白质，营养温和。制作步骤简单，只需加热搅拌和冷藏定型，新手也能顺利上手，从准备到冷藏完成大约需要 5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1034 大卡
intro_en:
This is an improved version of an Italian classic dessert. After incorporating original yogurt, the taste becomes more refreshing and smooth, sweet but not greasy. It is suitable as an after-dinner snack with fruit or jam. Dairy products are rich in calcium and protein and are mildly nutritious. The preparation steps are simple, just heat, stir and refrigerate to set. Even novices can get started smoothly. It takes about 5 hours from preparation to refrigeration.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1034 kcal
steps_zh: 吉利丁片剪成小片，泡入冷水中
淡奶油和糖放入锅中，加热至 60 度
关火，吉利丁从水中取出，控干水份，加入热淡奶油中，搅拌均匀
淡奶油降温至 40 度，加入原味酸奶，搅拌均匀
将上述步骤得到的混合物过两遍筛网
分装入合适的容器，放入冰箱冷藏 4 小时以上
steps_en: Cut gelatine into small pieces and soak in cold water
Place whipping cream and sugar in a pot and heat to 60 degrees
Turn off the heat, remove the gelatin from the water, drain it, add it to the hot whipping cream, and stir evenly
Cool the light cream to 40 degrees, add plain yogurt, and stir evenly
Pass the mixture obtained in the above steps through a sieve twice
Divide into appropriate containers and refrigerate for more than 4 hours
images: dishes/dessert/酸奶意式奶冻/酸奶意式奶冻.png
file_path: dishes/dessert/酸奶意式奶冻/酸奶意式奶冻.md

intro_zh:
这是一道不需要搅拌机就能轻松制作的家常草莓冰淇淋，果香浓郁、口感绵密。草莓富含维生素 C，搭配奶香四溢的炼乳和奶油，能提供能量和钙质。做法简单不考验厨艺，新手也能一次成功。全程制作耗时约八小时，其中大部分是冷冻时间，实际动手只需短短几十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1653 大卡
intro_en:
This is a homemade strawberry ice cream that you can easily make without a blender. It has a rich fruity aroma and a creamy texture. Strawberries are rich in vitamin C and paired with the creamy condensed milk and cream, they provide energy and calcium. The method is simple and does not test your cooking skills, and even a novice can succeed in the first try. The entire production process takes about eight hours, most of which is freezing time, and the actual work only takes a few dozen minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1653 kcal
steps_zh: 先做草莓糖浆。把草莓洗干净，去掉顶部叶子。将草莓切成 **5mm** 的小块。保留一半切碎的草莓，稍后折叠成冰淇淋。
将另一半切碎的草莓和糖一起放入酱汁锅中。用中火搅拌和烹饪，直到草莓释放液体并在锅中形成糖浆。
让草莓在糖浆中加热，不时搅拌，直到它们分解并变形，糖浆稍微变稠。
当糖浆保持分开 **3秒钟** 时，就已经准备好了。把糖浆从火上移开，加入香草和盐搅拌。将草莓糖浆放在一边冷却。
当糖浆冷却时，准备冰淇淋基料。在碗中加入甜炼乳、浓奶油、香草精和盐。使用手动搅拌器搅打混合物，直到它变得轻盈蓬松，并形成柔软的尖峰。
将保留的切碎的新鲜草莓折叠到冰淇淋底座中。将生过的冰淇淋底座转移到冷冻安全容器中。将冷却的草莓糖浆淋在冰淇淋上，然后轻轻地将其旋入混合物中。
盖上冰淇淋并冷冻 **八小时** ，然后舀取和食用。
steps_en: Make the strawberry syrup first. Wash the strawberries and remove the top leaves. Cut the strawberries into **5mm** pieces. Reserve half of the chopped strawberries to fold into the ice cream later.
Add the other half of the chopped strawberries to the sauce pan along with the sugar. Stir and cook over medium heat until the strawberries release their liquid and form a syrup in the pan.
Let the strawberries heat in the syrup, stirring occasionally, until they break down and lose their shape and the syrup thickens slightly.
The syrup is ready when it stays separate for **3 seconds**. Remove the syrup from the heat and stir in the vanilla and salt. Set the strawberry syrup aside to cool.

While the syrup is cooling, prepare the ice cream base. Add sweetened condensed milk, heavy cream, vanilla extract and salt to a bowl. Use a hand mixer to beat the mixture until it is light and fluffy and forms soft peaks.

Fold reserved chopped fresh strawberries into ice cream base. Transfer the uncooked ice cream base to a freezer-safe container. Drizzle the cooled strawberry syrup over the ice cream and gently swirl it into the mixture.
Cover with ice cream and freeze for **eight hours** before scooping and serving.
file_path: dishes/dessert/草莓冰淇淋/草莓冰淇淋.md

intro_zh:
这是一款无需厨师机的家常蜂蜜小面包，松软香甜，底部略带脆感，表面刷满蜂蜜水再撒上芝麻，透着朴实的甜香。主要用料为高筋面粉、牛奶、鸡蛋和黄油，提供充足的碳水化合物、蛋白质和钙质，作为早餐或加餐都很安心。做法简单，全程手揉，发酵时间灵活，甚至可以提前一晚放入冰箱冷藏，第二天再烘烤，对新手相当友好。制作耗时大约 3 小时，其中大部分是发面等待时间，实际动手并不费力。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：176 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-made honey bun that does not require a cooker. It is soft and sweet, with a slightly crispy bottom. The surface is brushed with honey water and sprinkled with sesame seeds, giving it a simple and sweet aroma. The main ingredients are high-gluten flour, milk, eggs and butter, which provide sufficient carbohydrates, protein and calcium, making it a safe breakfast or snack. The method is simple, the whole process is kneaded by hand, and the fermentation time is flexible. You can even put it in the refrigerator one night in advance and bake it the next day, which is very friendly to novices. It takes about 3 hours to make, most of which is waiting time for the dough to rise, and the actual work is not strenuous.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 176 kcal
steps_zh: 制作面团：将面粉，牛奶（建议加热到 40°，本人使用微波炉 15 - 20s），酵母，鸡蛋，面粉，糖和盐混合起来。
搅拌面团，将原料混合均匀成团。
加入黄油混合。
继续搅拌 + 手揉，均匀混合。
开始发面，使用保鲜膜覆盖容器，普通气温(10 - 20°)放置 1 - 2 小时，稍长时间对效果影响不大。
明显看到面团发酵变大（2 倍）即可开始切分面团, 此时面团应该不再十分黏手。
切分面团：理想状态每一份 60g（美观），可根据喜好适当调整大小。
将每一份小面团使用擀面杖擀成舌状后卷起, 再次醒面 10。
再次使用擀面杖擀成舌状后卷起, 从中间切开（一个变成两个）。
再次使用擀面杖擀成舌状后卷起, 从中间切开（两个变成四个）。（此步骤可以按照自己的时间多擀/卷几次, 把握一份的大小就行）
烤盘放入油纸并倒入花生油, （每份卷好的）底部蘸水 + 面粉后放入烤盘。
再次醒发（盖上保鲜膜）, 这一步可以放入冰箱, 第二天再烤。
刷上蛋液。
出炉后, 刷上蜂蜜水, 撒上芝麻。
steps_en: Make the dough: Mix flour, milk (recommended to heat to 40°, I use a microwave for 15-20s), yeast, eggs, flour, sugar and salt.
Stir the dough and mix the ingredients into a dough.
Add butter and mix.
Continue stirring + kneading with your hands to combine evenly.
Start proofing, cover the container with plastic wrap, and leave it at normal temperature (10 - 20°) for 1 - 2 hours. A longer time will have little effect on the effect.
When you can obviously see that the dough has fermented and enlarged (2 times), you can start cutting the dough. At this time, the dough should no longer be very sticky.
Cut the dough: ideally 60g per portion (nicely), you can adjust the size according to your preference.
Use a rolling pin to roll each piece of dough into a tongue shape, then roll it up and let it rest for 10 seconds.
Use the rolling pin again to roll it into a tongue shape, roll it up, and cut it in the middle (one becomes two).

Use the rolling pin again to roll it into a tongue shape, roll it up, and cut it in the middle (two becomes four). (You can roll/roll this step several times according to your own time, just control the size of one portion)
Place parchment paper on a baking sheet and pour peanut oil into it. Dip the bottom of each roll with water + flour and place it on the baking sheet.
Let it rise again (cover it with plastic wrap). You can put it in the refrigerator and bake it the next day.
Brush with egg wash.
Oven 180°(355°F), 18 - 20 minutes.
After taking it out of the oven, brush it with honey water and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
images: dishes/dessert/无厨师机蜂蜜面包/无厨师机蜂蜜面包.jpg
file_path: dishes/dessert/无厨师机蜂蜜面包/无厨师机蜂蜜面包.md

intro_zh:
烤蛋挞是一款经典的中式甜品，外皮酥脆、内馅嫩滑，奶香浓郁。富含蛋白质、钙质和多种维生素，能提供丰富能量。制作过程十分简单，新手也能轻松上手，而且半成品可冷冻保存，随吃随取。从准备到出炉，大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：169 大卡
intro_en:
Baked egg tart is a classic Chinese dessert with crispy exterior, tender filling and rich milky aroma. Rich in protein, calcium and multiple vitamins, it can provide abundant energy. The production process is very simple, and even novices can easily get started, and the semi-finished product can be frozen and stored for eating at any time. From prep to out of the oven, it takes about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 169 kcal
ingredients_zh: 搅拌器 包含且不限于筷子 打蛋器等工具
筛网 网孔约为 1 毫米
蛋挞皮 品牌不限 整包蛋挞皮约为 30 只
鸡蛋 8 个 普通鸡蛋即可
牛奶 200 毫升 普通袋装牛奶即可
淡奶油 450 毫升 烘焙店或超市即有售
白砂糖 80 克 普通砂糖即可 细砂糖更优 易于融化
ingredients_en: Mixers include but are not limited to chopsticks, egg beaters and other tools
Egg tart shells are not limited to brands. The whole package of egg tart shells is about 30 pieces.
Milk 200 ml, ordinary bagged milk is enough
Whipping cream 450 ml, available in bakeries or supermarkets
80 grams of white sugar. Ordinary sugar is sufficient. Fine sugar is better. It is easy to melt.
steps_zh: 将碗置于克数称上 称量 450 克 淡奶油（淡奶油密度在此处记为 1 ）
加入 80 克白砂糖 （甜度中等 可按个人口味增减 建议范围 60-100 克）
加入 200 克牛奶 （牛奶密度在此处记为 1 ）
取 8 个蛋黄加入 蛋清可留作他用
均匀搅拌所有材料直至白砂糖全部融化
使用网筛对搅拌完成的食材进行过滤 滤除鸡蛋黏膜 鸡蛋壳 未融化的白砂糖 结块的淡奶油
此时请将烤箱设置 220 摄氏度开始预热（约 10 分钟） 记得拿出烤盘
将蛋挞皮以 0.5 厘米的间隔均匀放置于烤盘中
将过滤完成的食材倒入蛋挞皮中 液面距离蛋挞皮上沿 0.5 厘米即可不宜过多
截止此步骤 半成品蛋挞的制作已经完成 可直接放入冰箱速冻 12 小时以上保存
将半成品蛋挞放入烤箱中进行烤制 温度为 200 摄氏度 时间为 25 分钟
烤制结束后即可食用
steps_en: Place the bowl on a gram scale and weigh 450 grams of whipping cream (the density of whipping cream is recorded here as 1)
Add 80 grams of white sugar (medium sweetness, can be increased or decreased according to personal taste, recommended range 60-100 grams)
Add 200 grams of milk (the density of milk is recorded as 1 here)
Take 8 egg yolks and add to the egg whites. Reserve them for other uses.
Stir all ingredients evenly until all sugar is melted
Use a mesh sieve to filter the mixed ingredients. Filter out the egg mucosa, egg shells, unmelted white sugar, and clumped whipping cream.
At this time, please set the oven to 220 degrees Celsius and start preheating (about 10 minutes). Remember to take out the baking sheet
Place the tart shells evenly on the baking sheet at intervals of 0.5 cm
Pour the filtered ingredients into the tart shell. The liquid level should be 0.5 cm from the top edge of the tart shell, but not too much.
As of this step, the semi-finished egg tarts have been made and can be placed directly in the refrigerator to be frozen for more than 12 hours.
Bake the semi-finished egg tarts in the oven at 200 degrees Celsius for 25 minutes
Ready to eat after baking

intro_zh:
红柚蛋糕是一道用空气炸锅就能轻松完成的清新甜点，融合了红柚果粒的微酸果香与蛋糕的松软口感，适合作为单人份下午茶。鸡蛋和面粉提供蛋白质与碳水，红柚富含维生素 C，带来简单的基础营养。制作难度中等，关键在于分次搅拌成无颗粒的淡黄色面糊，新手只要耐心按步骤操作就能成功。从备料到出锅大约需要 35 分钟，想吃现烤甜点时不会占用太多时间。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：622 大卡
intro_en:
Red Pomelo Cake is a refreshing dessert that can be easily made using an air fryer. It combines the slightly sour fruity aroma of red pomelo berries with the soft texture of the cake. It is suitable for a single afternoon tea. Eggs and flour provide protein and carbohydrates, and red grapefruit is rich in vitamin C, providing simple basic nutrition. The difficulty of making it is medium. The key is to stir it into a light yellow batter without particles. Novices can succeed as long as they follow the steps patiently. It takes about 35 minutes from prep to serving, so it won’t take up too much time when you’re craving a freshly baked dessert.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 622 kcal
steps_zh: 锡纸盘里打入鸡蛋 2 个， 加入红柚果肉 20g
锡纸盘中倒入 15ml 油并摇晃锡纸盘时期均匀覆盖盘底
锡纸盘中放入 10g 糖， 以及 40g 面粉和 40ml 水
用筷子顺时针方向搅拌至淡黄色糊状
锡纸盘中放入 5g 糖， 以及 40g 面粉和 40ml 水
继续用筷子搅拌至淡黄色糊状
锡纸盘放入空气炸锅的烤篮上，用 180 摄氏度烤 15 分钟
打开空气炸锅，小心取出锡纸盘，用筷子或勺子将蛋糕翻面
继续 180 摄氏度烤 8 分钟
取出即可食用
steps_en: Crack 2 eggs into a tin foil plate and add 20g of red pomelo pulp.
Pour 15ml of oil into the tinfoil plate and shake the tinfoil plate to evenly cover the bottom of the plate.
Put 10g sugar, 40g flour and 40ml water in a tin foil plate
Use chopsticks to stir clockwise until a light yellow paste forms.
Put 5g sugar, 40g flour and 40ml water in a tin foil plate
Continue to stir with chopsticks until a light yellow paste forms
Place the tin foil tray on the baking basket of the air fryer and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 15 minutes
Open the air fryer, carefully remove the tin foil plate, and use chopsticks or a spoon to turn the cake over
Continue baking at 180 degrees Celsius for 8 minutes
Take out and eat

intro_zh:
英式司康是一款经典英式下午茶点心，外酥内软，蛋奶香气浓郁，搭配果酱或奶油食用风味更佳。它主要由面粉、黄油、鸡蛋和淡奶油制成，富含碳水化合物和蛋白质，能快速补充能量。制作过程较为简单，只要掌握基本揉面手法，新手也能胜任，从准备到出炉大约需要一小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1197 大卡
intro_en:
British scones are a classic British afternoon tea snack. They are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. They have a rich custard aroma and are best served with jam or cream. It is mainly made of flour, butter, eggs and whipping cream. It is rich in carbohydrates and protein and can quickly replenish energy. The production process is relatively simple. As long as you master the basic kneading techniques, even a novice can do it. It takes about an hour from preparation to delivery.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1197 kcal
ingredients_zh: 无盐黄油（推荐品牌总统）
steps_zh: 鸡蛋打散，称量出 30g 蛋液放入干净容器中，放入全量淡奶油和奶油奶酪混合均匀。如果奶酪太硬可以水浴加热至大约 40 度再混合。
将低筋面粉，盐，糖，泡打粉放入干净容器中混合均匀
黄油切成小块，放入上一步的混合物中，用手将黄油捏入混合物中，呈粗玉米粉质地
将第一步的蛋奶混合液倒入上一步得到的粉油混合物种，搅拌均接近。叠压成均匀面团
面团放到案板上，擀成 1.5cm 厚的面片，用刀或者模具分切成合适的形状
用刷子蘸取剩余的 20g 鸡蛋液，刷在司康表面
烤箱预热 180 度，烤制 27 分钟
steps_en: Beat the eggs, weigh out 30g of egg liquid and put it into a clean container. Add the entire amount of whipped cream and cream cheese and mix evenly. If the cheese is too hard, heat it in a water bath to about 40 degrees before mixing.
Put the low-gluten flour, salt, sugar and baking powder into a clean container and mix evenly
Cut the butter into small pieces and add it to the mixture from the previous step. Knead the butter into the mixture with your hands until it has the texture of coarse cornmeal.
Pour the egg-milk mixture from the first step into the powder-oil mixture obtained from the previous step, and stir until combined. Stack into a uniform dough
Place the dough on the chopping board, roll it into a 1.5cm thick piece, and cut it into appropriate shapes with a knife or mold.
Dip the remaining 20g of egg liquid with a brush and brush it on the surface of the scone.
Preheat the oven to 180 degrees and bake for 27 minutes

intro_zh:
芋泥雪媚娘外皮软糯 Q 弹，内馅是细腻香甜的芋泥与轻盈奶油，口感层次丰富，是一道源自家常创意的中式甜品。芋头和紫薯提供膳食纤维与花青素，牛奶和淡奶油补充钙质，营养均衡。制作无需烤箱，步骤简单，对新手很友好，即使不擅烘焙也能轻松完成。从头到尾大约需要两小时，就能做出让孩子爱不释口的自制小点心。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：160 大卡
intro_en:
The taro puree snow meiniang has a soft and chewy outer skin, and the filling is delicate and sweet taro puree and light cream. It has a rich texture and is a Chinese dessert inspired by home-cooked creativity. Taro and purple sweet potato provide dietary fiber and anthocyanins, while milk and light cream supplement calcium and provide balanced nutrition. No oven is required to make it, the steps are simple, and it is friendly to novices. Even if you are not good at baking, you can easily complete it. It takes about two hours from start to finish to make homemade snacks that your kids will love.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 160 kcal
ingredients_zh: 荔浦芋头（电商平台购买即可，实惠新鲜）
料理搅拌机（电动打蛋器也可以）
ingredients_en: Lipu taro (can be purchased on e-commerce platform, affordable and fresh)
Food mixer (electric egg beater is also acceptable)
steps_zh: 芋头切块，大火煮熟至软（40 分钟即可），全部放入料理机
向内加入 30g 牛奶，25g 淡奶油，将其打成泥状
再向内加入 3g 紫薯粉，18g 白砂糖，继续搅拌打成细腻芋泥
取出另一个碗，加入全部糯米粉 b，22g 玉米淀粉，135g 牛奶，50g 白砂糖，混匀并过筛一遍，保鲜膜盖上并扎小洞，中火蒸半个小时
在蒸的过程中，将糯米粉 a 放入平底锅小火翻炒至微微发黄（即炒熟），作为手粉备用
将中火蒸完半小时的糯米牛奶混合物（果冻状）趁热加入黄油 30g，将黄油揉至面团完全吸收，然后放冰箱冷藏一小时
取出另一只碗，加入 120g 淡奶油，8g 白砂糖，打发至有纹路，装进裱花袋备用
取出冷藏后的面团，搓揉 5 分钟，分成 30g 一个，均匀撒上 2g 手粉防粘，擀成圆形，先挤上 5g 裱花奶油，然后放上 30g 芋泥，最后将面饼像包包子一样包起来（可以减去多余的皮）
包好后再均匀撒 2g 手粉防粘
重复以上两步直至原材料用光
steps_en: Cut the taro into cubes, cook over high heat until soft (40 minutes is enough), and put everything into a food processor
Add 30g milk and 25g whipping cream and beat until it becomes puree
Then add 3g of purple sweet potato starch and 18g of white sugar, and continue to stir until it becomes a fine taro paste.

Take out another bowl, add all the glutinous rice flour B, 22g corn starch, 135g milk, 50g white sugar, mix well and sift once, cover with plastic wrap and make small holes, steam over medium heat for half an hour
During the steaming process, put the glutinous rice flour a into a pan and stir-fry over low heat until slightly brown (that is, fried). Set aside as hand flour.

Add 30g of butter to the glutinous rice-milk mixture (jelly-like) that has been steamed over medium heat for half an hour while it is still hot. Knead the butter until the dough is completely absorbed, then place it in the refrigerator for one hour.
Take out another bowl, add 120g whipping cream, 8g sugar, beat until texturey, put into a piping bag and set aside

Take out the refrigerated dough, knead it for 5 minutes, divide it into 30g pieces, sprinkle 2g hand flour evenly to prevent sticking, roll it into a round shape, first squeeze 5g decorating cream, then put 30g taro paste, and finally wrap the dough like a bun (you can subtract the excess skin)
After wrapping, sprinkle 2g hand powder evenly to prevent sticking.
Repeat the above two steps until the raw materials are used up
images: dishes/dessert/芋泥雪媚娘/芋泥雪媚娘成品.jpg
file_path: dishes/dessert/芋泥雪媚娘/芋泥雪媚娘.md

intro_zh:
魔芋蛋糕是一款低热量、无麸质的甜点，用赤藓糖醇代替白砂糖，口感轻盈湿润，带有可可香气，尤其适合减脂人群。它富含膳食纤维和蛋白质，饱腹感强。制作有一定难度，需要打发蛋白并注意翻拌手法，但整体耗时仅约半小时，算是快手健康的烘焙选择。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：234 大卡
intro_en:
Konjac cake is a low-calorie, gluten-free dessert that uses erythritol instead of white sugar. It has a light and moist taste with a cocoa aroma, and is especially suitable for people who want to lose weight. It is rich in dietary fiber and protein and has a strong feeling of satiety. It’s a bit difficult to make, as you need to beat the egg whites and pay attention to the mixing techniques, but it only takes about half an hour in total, making it a quick and healthy baking option.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 234 kcal
ingredients_zh: 金属蛋糕模具（形状任意）
餐刀（用于翻拌和抹平蛋糕糊）
ingredients_en: Table knife (for folding and smoothing cake batter)
steps_zh: 在准备蛋糕糊之前，可以开始预热烤箱至 350 ℉( 150 ℃)以节省时间
从冰箱中取出新鲜的鸡蛋
准备两个容器并擦干，分别盛放蛋清与蛋黄
对盛放蛋清的容器，可稍有水珠，但**不能有任何油**；盛放蛋黄的容器不能有水珠
打蛋，手工或利用分蛋器，将蛋清与蛋黄分离到两个容器中。
分离过程中蛋黄不能破碎，**蛋清中不能混有任何蛋黄**，否则会严重影响打发。（白色系带可进入蛋清，不影响）
（注意，不使用厨房机的情况下，盛放蛋清的容器也是打蛋的容器，为避免溢出，加入全部蛋清后不要超过容器的 **1/8**）
蛋清中加入 1g 塔塔粉
打蛋器高速，打发蛋白至*粗大气泡的状态*，加入 50g 赤藓糖醇
打蛋器中低速，打发蛋白至*干性发泡*的状态（提起打蛋器头，有短小直立的尖角；倒扣容器，蛋白可粘住容器不掉下来）
此时蛋白打发程度已符合要求
把分离的蛋黄加入打发的蛋清中，打蛋器中低速搅拌均匀
蛋清中加入 **10g 可可粉**和 **10g 魔芋粉**，先用餐刀翻拌，这是由于如果直接用打蛋器搅拌会造成粉末飞溅
翻拌手法是
翻拌结束后，打蛋器低速搅拌均匀
模具铺好烘焙纸，贴合底部与内壁
将蛋糕糊倒入模具，然后用餐刀抹平，再然后震荡几下避免大气泡
烘烤 25 分钟
烤好后，戴好隔热手套取出
（可选） 将模具从高处落下，震出其中的热气
模具倒扣 10 分钟，使蛋糕冷却
脱模，餐刀切块食用
steps_en: Before preparing the cake batter, you can start preheating the oven to 350 ℉ (150 ℃) to save time
Fresh eggs from the refrigerator
Prepare two containers and dry them to hold egg whites and egg yolks respectively
There can be a little water droplets in the container for egg whites, but there must not be any oil**; there should be no water droplets in the container for egg yolks.
Beat the eggs, either by hand or using an egg separator, and separate the egg whites and yolks into two containers.

During the separation process, the egg yolk cannot be broken, and **the egg white cannot be mixed with any egg yolk**, otherwise it will seriously affect the beating. (The white frenulum can enter the egg white and will not affect it)

(Note that when a kitchen machine is not used, the container holding the egg whites is also the container for beating eggs. To avoid overflow, do not exceed **1/8** of the container after adding all the egg whites)
Add 1g cream of tartar to egg whites
Use the whisk at high speed to beat the egg whites until they form *thick bubbles*, then add 50g erythritol

Use the whisk at medium-low speed to beat the egg whites to *dry foam* (lift the whisk head, there will be a short upright sharp corner; turn the container upside down, the egg whites can stick to the container and not fall off)
At this point, the egg whites have been whipped to the required level.
Add the separated egg yolks to the beaten egg whites and stir evenly with a whisk on medium-low speed.
Add **10g cocoa powder** and **10g konjac powder** to the egg whites and stir them with a table knife first. This is because if you stir them directly with a whisk, the powder will splash.
The mixing method is
After the mixing is completed, stir the egg evenly at low speed.
Line the mold with baking paper and fit the bottom and inner wall
Pour the cake batter into the mold, then smooth it out with a table knife, then shake it a few times to avoid big bubbles
Bake for 25 minutes
After baking, put on heat-proof gloves and take it out
(Optional) Drop the mold from a high place to shake out the hot air
Invert the mold for 10 minutes to cool the cake
Unmold, cut into pieces with a knife and serve

intro_zh:
玛格丽特饼干口感酥松，黄油香气浓郁，是一款经典的西式小甜点。它主要由蛋黄、黄油和面粉制成，含有丰富的碳水化合物与脂肪，能快速补充能量。制作难度适中，从准备到出炉大约需要 45 分钟，新手也能轻松上手。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：863 大卡
intro_en:
Margherita biscuits have a crispy texture and rich butter aroma. They are a classic Western dessert. It is mainly made of egg yolks, butter and flour. It is rich in carbohydrates and fats and can quickly replenish energy. It is moderately difficult to make and takes about 45 minutes from preparation to baking, making it easy for novices to get started.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 863 kcal
steps_zh: 黄油隔热水融化、将蛋黄磨碎备用。
在融化的黄油中添加糖、盐、以及碾碎的鸡蛋黄，搅拌均匀
加入低筋面粉与玉米淀粉，揉成面团
将面团均匀分割成大约 8 克重的小面团，然后将它们搓成球状。
使用大拇指轻压在每个小面团上，以形成裂纹。
预热烤箱至 150℃，将小面团放入烤箱中，烘烤 20 分钟。
微微放凉即可食用
steps_en: Melt the butter over hot water and grate the egg yolks and set aside.
Add sugar, salt, and crushed egg yolks to the melted butter and mix well
Add low-gluten flour and cornstarch and knead into dough
Divide the dough evenly into small pieces of approximately 8 g each and roll them into balls.
Use your thumb to press lightly onto each dough ball to create cracks.
Preheat the oven to 150°C, place the dough balls in the oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Let cool slightly and serve
images: dishes/dessert/玛格丽特饼干/玛格丽特饼干.jpg
file_path: dishes/dessert/玛格丽特饼干/玛格丽特饼干.md

intro_zh:
雪花酥是一道口感酥脆香甜、奶香浓郁的小甜点，属于简单快手的家常烘焙，也很适合装盒送礼。由于含有黄油、奶粉和混合坚果，能提供丰富的能量和蛋白质，不过热量较高，适合偶尔享用。制作难度适中，对新手有一定挑战，但只要注意火候和搅拌手法，一般只需 30 分钟就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1313 大卡
intro_en:
Snowflake Crispy is a small dessert that is crispy, sweet, and rich in milk. It is a simple and quick home baking, and it is also suitable for boxing and giving as gifts. Because it contains butter, milk powder and mixed nuts, it provides rich energy and protein, but is high in calories and suitable for occasional enjoyment. It is moderately difficult to make and may be challenging for novices, but as long as you pay attention to the heat and mixing techniques, it usually only takes 30 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1313 kcal
ingredients_zh: 烘焙刮刀（可用锅铲代替，小心使用破坏不粘锅涂层）
混合坚果（三只松鼠每日坚果）
饼干（非夹心型饼干，推荐小奇福或购买使用雪花酥烘焙专用小饼干）
ingredients_en: Baking spatula (can be replaced with a spatula, be careful not to damage the non-stick coating)
Biscuits (non-sandwich biscuits, we recommend Xiaoqifu or purchase special biscuits made with Snowflake Crisp)
steps_zh: 饼干超过一元硬币大小先切成小块
无盐黄油加入锅中，小火加热至无盐黄油完全融化
棉花糖加入锅中，使用刮刀搅拌，直至棉花糖融化并与无盐黄油均匀融合
20g 奶粉加入锅中，使用刮刀搅拌，奶粉与黄油棉花糖混合物搅拌均匀后立即关火
准备好的所有混合坚果与饼干趁热加入锅中，使用刮刀搅拌
搅拌到温度下降到手可以接触的温度后，戴上一次塑料手套，在锅中搓揉或者双手拿起拉扯，让饼干混合坚果与棉花糖黄油奶粉混合物分散均匀。
将上述步骤混合物压入模具中，边角压实，擀面杖擀平，未满的一边用手尽量压成直边
室温放凉，完全冷却后脱模，按照模具纹路切块，或切成自己喜欢的大小，撒上剩余奶粉，尽量使雪花酥每面都沾上奶粉
steps_en: If the biscuits exceed the size of a one-yuan coin, cut them into small pieces first.
Add unsalted butter to the pot and heat over low heat until the unsalted butter is completely melted
Add marshmallows to the pan and use a spatula to stir until the marshmallows are melted and evenly combined with the unsalted butter
Add 20g of milk powder into the pot and stir with a spatula. Stir the milk powder and butter marshmallow mixture evenly and immediately turn off the heat.
Add all the prepared mixed nuts and biscuits to the pot while they are still hot, and use a spatula to stir

After stirring until the temperature drops to a temperature that your hands can touch, put on plastic gloves and rub the pot or pick it up and pull with both hands to disperse the biscuit mixed nuts and marshmallow butter milk powder mixture evenly.
Press the mixture of the above steps into the mold, compact the corners, flatten it with a rolling pin, and press the unfilled side into a straight edge as much as possible with your hands.

Let cool at room temperature, remove from the mold after complete cooling, cut into pieces according to the pattern of the mold, or cut into the size you like, sprinkle with remaining milk powder, try to make all sides of the snowflake cake covered with milk powder

intro_zh:
这道烘焙入门甜品口感细腻绵软，拥有云朵般的轻盈质地，属于西点中的经典基础款。主要原料鸡蛋和牛奶提供了优质蛋白与钙质，营养丰富。制作过程对打发、翻拌及烘烤火候要求较高，具有一定挑战，但只要耐心按步骤操作，新手也能成功。从准备到出炉一般需要 1.5 至 2 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：274 大卡
intro_en:
This introductory baking dessert has a delicate and soft taste and a light, cloud-like texture. It is a classic basic style in Western pastry. The main raw materials, eggs and milk, provide high-quality protein and calcium and are rich in nutrients. The production process requires high heat for whipping, mixing and baking, which is a certain challenge, but as long as you follow the steps patiently, even novices can succeed. It usually takes 1.5 to 2 hours from prep to out of the oven.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 274 kcal
ingredients_zh: 烤箱（电饭锅可替代，但大多情况下由于锅胆材质问题易失败）
打蛋器（电动最好，手动费力且有一定失败概率）或筷子（非常不推荐）
铝合金阳极模具（千万不能选不沾模具，常用尺寸为 6 寸或 8 寸）
食用油（或黄油，但需加热软化）
ingredients_en: Oven (a rice cooker can be substituted, but in most cases it is prone to failure due to the material of the pot)
Egg beater (electric is best, manual is laborious and has a certain probability of failure) or chopsticks (highly not recommended)
Aluminum alloy anode mold (never choose a non-stick mold, the common size is 6 inches or 8 inches)
Cooking oil (or butter, but heat to soften)
steps_zh: 从冰箱中取出新鲜的鸡蛋
准备两个容器并擦干，分别盛放蛋清与蛋黄
对盛放蛋清的容器，可稍有水珠，但**不能有任何油**；盛放蛋黄的容器不能有水珠
打蛋，手工或利用分蛋器，将蛋清与蛋黄分离到两个容器中。
分离过程中蛋黄不能破碎，**蛋清中不能混有任何蛋黄**，否则会严重影响打发。（白色系带可进入蛋清，不影响）
（注意，不使用厨房机的情况下，盛放蛋清的容器也是打蛋的容器，为避免溢出，加入全部蛋清后不要超过容器的 **1/8**）
准备一个新的空碗，加入配方中**全部的食用油**和**全部的牛奶**
用打蛋器手动快速搅拌，直到油水完全融合，呈现乳白色悬浊液状态（完成乳化）
将配方中**全部的低筋面粉**过筛，加入上述乳化液中。用刮刀以”Z 字形”划拌至没有明显干粉即可（此时面糊可能会有些粗糙，属于正常现象）
将分离好的**全部蛋黄**加入碗中，继续用刮刀”Z 字形”划拌
此时面糊会变得非常细腻顺滑，且不易产生面筋。将其静置备用
准备好剩余 **3/4** 的白糖。分为三份，每份为总量的 **1/4**
蛋清中加入柠檬汁或白醋（可选）
打蛋器中速，打发蛋白至有*粗大气泡的状态*，加入**第一份白糖**
打蛋器高速，打发蛋白至*气泡较细腻的状态*，加入**第二份白糖**
打蛋器高速，打发蛋白至”湿性发泡”的状态，加入**第三份白糖**
打蛋器中低速，打发蛋白至”干性发泡”的状态
此时蛋白打发程度已符合要求
简单搅拌几下蛋黄液
用刮刀取 **1/3** 的蛋白霜，加入到蛋黄糊中
采用“翻拌”的手法，此手法是为了避免消泡
将 **1/3** 的蛋白霜与蛋黄液的混合液倒入剩余 **2/3** 的蛋白霜中，继续翻拌均匀
将蛋糕糊倒入模具，震荡几下避免大气泡
烘烤总时间：6 寸蛋糕 **30-35** 分钟，8 寸蛋糕 **50** 分钟。根据自己烤箱特性灵活调整，一般不超过 $\pm 5$ 分钟。（最后几分钟时可在烤箱前观察）
以**上管 **150** 摄氏度，下管 **160** 摄氏度**预热烘烤，约 10 分钟可到达预定温度。
预热完成后，将模具放入烤箱下层
选择**变温烘烤**，分为两个阶段。
烤好后，出炉
预热：空气炸锅设置 **130°C** 预热 **5 分钟**
入锅与遮盖：将装有蛋糕糊的模具放入炸锅。**立刻在模具上方盖上一层锡纸**（亮面朝上，哑光面接触食物），锡纸边缘捏紧，防止被热风吹开
第一阶段烘烤：设置 **130°C**，烘烤 **35 分钟**
第二阶段上色：打开炸锅，**撤掉锡纸**。将温度调高至 **150°C**，继续烘烤 **10–15 分钟**
判断熟透：蛋糕顶部膨胀且上色呈金黄色即可出锅。用牙签扎入中心，拔出后没有湿润面糊带出即代表已烤熟
出锅后的震热气与倒扣脱模操作，与烤箱版完全一致
（可选） 将模具从高处落下，震出其中的热气
模具倒扣 10 分钟，使蛋糕冷却
脱模，食用
steps_en: Fresh eggs from the refrigerator
Prepare two containers and dry them to hold egg whites and egg yolks respectively
There can be a little water droplets in the container for egg whites, but there must not be any oil**; there should be no water droplets in the container for egg yolks.
Beat the eggs, either by hand or using an egg separator, and separate the egg whites and yolks into two containers.

During the separation process, the egg yolk cannot be broken, and **the egg white cannot be mixed with any egg yolk**, otherwise it will seriously affect the beating. (The white frenulum can enter the egg white and will not affect it)

(Note that when a kitchen machine is not used, the container holding the egg whites is also the container for beating eggs. To avoid overflow, do not exceed **1/8** of the container after adding all the egg whites)
Prepare a new empty bowl and add **all the cooking oil** and **all the milk** in the recipe
Use a whisk to stir quickly by hand until the oil and water are completely combined and present a milky white suspension state (emulsification is completed)

Sift **all the low-gluten flour** in the formula and add it to the above emulsion. Use a spatula to stir in a "Z" shape until there is no obvious dry powder (the batter may be a little rough at this time, which is normal)
Add the separated **all egg yolks** into the bowl and continue to mix with a spatula in a "Z" shape.
At this point the batter will become very fine and smooth and less likely to produce gluten. Let it sit for later use
Prepare the remaining **3/4** of sugar. Divide into three parts, each part is **1/4** of the total amount
Add lemon juice or white vinegar to egg whites (optional)
Beat the egg whites at medium speed until there are *thick bubbles*, add the **first portion of sugar**
Use the whisk at high speed to beat the egg whites until *the bubbles are finer*, then add the **second portion of sugar**
Use the whisk at high speed to beat the egg whites until they become "wet foam", then add the **third portion of sugar**
Using a mixer on medium-low speed, beat the egg whites to a "dry peak" state.
At this point, the egg whites have been whipped to the required level.
Simply stir the egg yolk liquid a few times
Use a spatula to take **1/3** of the meringue and add it to the egg yolk batter
Use the "turning and stirring" technique to avoid defoaming
Pour **1/3** of the meringue and egg yolk mixture into the remaining **2/3** of meringue, and continue to mix evenly
Pour the cake batter into the mold and shake it a few times to avoid big bubbles

Total bake time: **30-35** minutes for 6" cake, **50** minutes for 8" cake. Flexibly adjust according to the characteristics of your own oven, generally no more than $\pm 5$ minutes. (Watch in front of the oven during the last few minutes)
Preheat and bake at **150** degrees Celsius for the upper tube and **160** degrees Celsius for the lower tube. It will take about 10 minutes to reach the predetermined temperature.
