After preheating is complete, place the mold into the lower shelf of the oven
Choose **variable temperature baking**, which is divided into two stages.
After baking, take it out of the oven
Preheat: Air fryer setting **130°C** Preheat **5 minutes**

Putting and covering: Place the mold containing the cake batter into the fryer. **Immediately cover the top of the mold with a layer of tin foil** (glossy side facing up, matte side in contact with food), pinch the edges of the tin foil tightly to prevent it from being blown open by hot air
Stage 1 Bake: Set **130°C**, bake **35 minutes**
Second stage of coloring: Open the fryer and **remove the tin foil**. Increase temperature to **150°C** and continue baking for **10–15 minutes**

Check for doneness: The top of the cake is puffed up and golden brown in color and ready to serve. Poke a toothpick into the center. If no moist batter comes out when you pull it out, it means it is cooked.
The hot air blasting and inversion demoulding operations after taking out the pan are exactly the same as the oven version.
(Optional) Drop the mold from a high place to shake out the hot air
Invert the mold for 10 minutes to cool the cake
Demold, eat

intro_zh:
示例菜是一道简单易做的菜。富含 DHA 和蛋白质。一般初学者只需要 3 小时即可完成。还有美容效果哦~
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1265 大卡
intro_en:
The sample dish is a simple and easy to prepare dish. Rich in DHA and protein. It usually only takes 3 hours for beginners to complete. It also has beauty effects~
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1265 kcal
ingredients_zh: 土豆 2 个（每个土豆大约重 120g，共约 240g）
ingredients_en: 2 potatoes (each potato weighs about 120g, total about 240g)
steps_zh: 土豆去皮、切成不超过 4cm 的大块，备用
咖喱块切碎，增加接触面积加速溶解，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
放入土豆，保持翻炒至土豆*变软*（可以用筷子确认）
加水没过所有食材，沸腾后，将火调小然后**等待 15 - 20 分钟**
关火，加咖喱并搅拌，等待直至咖喱融化
再开火，缓慢**搅拌 10 分钟**，防止糊锅
在外观*呈粘稠状态*后关火，盛盘
steps_en: Peel the potatoes, cut into large pieces no larger than 4cm, set aside
Chop the curry cubes into small pieces to increase the contact area and speed up dissolution. Set aside.
Heat a pan and put 10ml - 15ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Add the potatoes and keep stirring until the potatoes become *soft* (you can use chopsticks to confirm)
Add water to cover all ingredients, once boiling, reduce heat to low and **wait 15 - 20 minutes**
Turn off the heat, add the curry and stir, wait until the curry melts
Turn the heat back on and slowly **stir for 10 minutes** to prevent burning.
When it looks *sticky*, turn off the heat and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
这道菜成品色泽红亮，肘皮呈现诱人的虎皮纹路，口感软烂入味，肥而不腻，瘦肉松软，属于传统中式宴客大菜。猪肘富含胶原蛋白和优质蛋白，经过长时间炖煮后更易吸收，对皮肤和关节有一定滋养效果。制作过程包含烧皮、油炸、炒糖色和高压炖煮等多个步骤，对新手来说挑战较大，建议有一定烹饪基础再尝试。从预处理到上桌，预计总耗时约 2.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1018 大卡
intro_en:
The finished dish is bright red in color, with attractive tiger skin texture on the elbow skin. It tastes soft and tasty, fat but not greasy, and the lean meat is soft. It is a traditional Chinese banquet dish. Pork knuckle is rich in collagen and high-quality protein, which is easier to absorb after long-term stewing and has a certain nourishing effect on the skin and joints. The production process includes multiple steps such as roasting the skin, frying, frying the sugar, and high-pressure stewing. It is quite challenging for novices. It is recommended to have a certain cooking foundation before trying it. Expect it to take about 2.5 hours total from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1018 kcal
steps_zh: 猪肘解冻后水泡 1 小时去除血水。
如有火焰喷枪，则使用火焰喷枪灼烧**猪肘皮**表面至**棕黑色**以去除猪毛，破坏汗腺。注意不要长时间炙烤同一个位置以避免烧焦，当猪肘皮几乎完全呈现棕黑色时则停止灼烧。
如无火焰喷枪，将铁锅烧至 200 以上，将猪肘直接放入锅内，用锅铲或筷子使猪肘皮充分接触铁锅表面，当猪肘皮与铁锅接触位置呈现出棕色时，更换位置继续烫猪肘皮，直到整个猪肘被充分烫过。注意再次过程中注意铁锅温度，不要使铁锅红热。
使用清洁球在水中刷洗猪肘，将其表面烧焦的部分去除。刷洗结束后，猪肘再次呈现出未被灼烧前的状态。
将猪肘置于铁锅中，加尽量多的冷水，具体视铁锅深度与猪肘大小而定，在保证可以拿得动铁锅及其内容物的情况下，能浸没猪肘 3/4 以上为最佳。
取 1 棵葱的葱白，分成 3 段，放入锅中。
取 3 粒蒜，分别用刀身拍扁，放入锅中。
取 3 克姜，放入锅中。
将 2 汤匙料酒加入锅中。
锅中水烧开后，等待五分钟，随后将猪肘取出，捡出锅中所有配料，更换容器保留所有肉汤备用。
向锅中加入冷油，以之前水量为参考，能浸没猪肘 3/5 以上为佳，开中火加热。
当[油温](tips/advanced/油温判断技巧.md)达到五成时，转为小火，放入猪肘油炸。
在油炸过程中烹饪者应注意人身安全。
在油炸过程中，使用锅铲或其他耐高温厨具将锅中的油均匀淋到猪肘未被浸没的部分，如果条件允许应以 3 分钟的间隔翻转猪肘，使其油炸均匀。
油炸过程持续大约 20 分钟，当观察到猪肘皮已经全部呈现出浅棕色，而瘦肉部分已经微焦，则可捞出备用。
炸制完后的油可用于制作其他油炸类食物，但注意不要使用太多次。
[炒糖色](../../tips/advanced/糖色的炒制.md)200ml 备用。
将猪肘加入高压锅内，加入所有肉汤、糖色、香叶、肉桂皮、豆蔻、花椒、大料、老抽、生抽、白醋。如果喜欢甜口，可以再额外加入 2-3 克冰糖。
取 1 棵葱的葱白，分成 3 段，放入锅中。
取 3 粒蒜，分别用刀身拍扁，放入锅中。
取 3 克姜，放入锅中。
盖上锅盖，加压炖煮 40 分钟。
在炖煮期间调制水淀粉。取碗 1 个，加入 1 汤匙淀粉，100ml 水，搅拌使其成为白色悬浊液
炖煮时间结束后，打开高压锅锅盖，捡出锅中所有的配料，只保留猪肘。
将高压锅中剩余的肉汤转移至铁锅内，猪肘转移至盘子或盆内
将铁锅置于灶台上，开大火。在收汁过程中可以用筷子头蘸取锅内汤汁判断咸淡，并根据口味添加盐。注意，汤汁多的时候味道会比汤汁少的时候味道更淡，加入盐时需要考虑这一点。
当肉汤沸腾时，注意观察剩余肉汤余量
当剩余肉汤少于原肉汤体积的 1/2 时，再次搅拌之前调制好的水淀粉，并加入一半
等待肉汤沸腾，加入剩下的一半
等待肉汤沸腾，沸腾后等待 1-2 分钟关火，此时锅内的肉汤呈红棕色粘稠状
用汤匙舀起肉汤均匀地淋在猪肘上，尽量使猪肘的每一处都淋到汤汁。如果在猪肘被完全淋到前汤汁已经用完则可直接上桌，否则剩余汤汁不需要再淋，可直接上桌。
steps_en: After thawing, soak the pork knuckles in blisters for 1 hour to remove blood.

If you have a flame spray gun, use the flame spray gun to burn the surface of the **pig elbow skin** until it is brown and black** to remove the pig hair and destroy the sweat glands. Be careful not to sear the same spot for a long time to avoid burning. Stop searing when the pork knuckle skin is almost completely brown and black.

If there is no flame gun, heat the iron pot to above 200, put the pork knuckle directly into the pot, and use a spatula or chopsticks to make the pork knuckle skin fully contact the surface of the iron pot. When the contact point between the pork knuckle skin and the iron pot turns brown, change the position and continue scalding the pork knuckle skin until the entire pork knuckle is fully scalded. Pay attention to the temperature of the iron pot during the process and do not make the iron pot red hot.
Use a cleaning ball to scrub the pork knuckle in water to remove the burnt surface. After the brushing, the pork knuckle once again appeared in the same state as before it was burned.

Place the pork knuckle in the iron pot and add as much cold water as possible, depending on the depth of the iron pot and the size of the pig's knuckle. It is best if more than 3/4 of the pork knuckle can be submerged while ensuring that the iron pot and its contents can be handled.
Take the white part of 1 green onion, divide it into 3 sections, and put it into the pot.
Take 3 garlic cloves, flatten them with the blade of a knife, and put them into the pot.
Take 3 grams of ginger and add it to the pot.
Add 2 tablespoons cooking wine to the pot.
After the water in the pot boils, wait five minutes, then take out the pork knuckle, pick out all the ingredients in the pot, replace the container and keep all the broth for later use.
Add cold oil to the pot. Using the previous amount of water as a reference, it is better to submerge more than 3/5 of the pork knuckle. Turn on medium heat and heat.
When the [oil temperature](tips/advanced/oil temperature judgment skills.md) reaches 50%, turn to low heat and fry the pork knuckle.
Cooks should pay attention to personal safety during the frying process.

During the frying process, use a spatula or other high-temperature cooking utensils to evenly pour the oil in the pot onto the unimmersed parts of the pork knuckle. If conditions permit, turn the pork knuckle over at 3-minute intervals to allow it to fry evenly.

The frying process lasts for about 20 minutes. When it is observed that the pork knuckle skin has completely turned light brown and the lean meat has been slightly burnt, it can be removed and set aside.
The oil after frying can be used to make other fried foods, but be careful not to use it too many times.
[Fried Sugar Color](../../tips/advanced/Roasted Sugar Color.md) 200ml for later use.

Add the pork knuckle to the pressure cooker, add all the broth, sugar, bay leaves, cinnamon bark, cardamom, peppercorns, aniseed, dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, and white vinegar. If you like it sweeter, you can add an additional 2-3 grams of rock sugar.
Take the white part of 1 green onion, divide it into 3 sections, and put it into the pot.
Take 3 garlic cloves, flatten them with the blade of a knife, and put them into the pot.
Take 3 grams of ginger and add it to the pot.
Cover and pressure simmer for 40 minutes.
Prepare water starch during simmering. Take a bowl, add 1 tablespoon of starch and 100ml of water, stir until it becomes a white suspension
After the stewing time is over, open the lid of the pressure cooker and take out all the ingredients in the pot except the pork knuckle.
Transfer the remaining broth in the pressure cooker to the iron pot and transfer the pork knuckle to a plate or basin

Place the iron pan on the stove and turn on high heat. During the juice collection process, you can use the head of a chopstick to dip the soup in the pot to judge whether it is salty or not, and add salt according to taste. Note that when there is more soup, the taste will be lighter than when there is less soup. You need to consider this when adding salt.
When the broth boils, pay attention to the amount of broth remaining.
When the remaining broth is less than 1/2 of the original broth volume, stir the previously prepared water starch again and add half
Wait for the broth to boil and add the remaining half
Wait for the broth to boil. After boiling, wait 1-2 minutes and turn off the heat. At this time, the broth in the pot will be reddish brown and sticky.

Use a spoon to scoop up the broth and pour it evenly over the pork knuckle, trying to cover every part of the pork knuckle with the soup. If the soup has been used up before the pork knuckle is completely poured, it can be served directly. Otherwise, the remaining soup does not need to be poured again and can be served directly.

intro_zh:
可乐鸡翅色泽红亮、口感嫩滑，味道咸甜适口，是一道流行于家庭餐桌的创意菜肴。鸡翅富含优质蛋白质与脂肪，搭配可乐烹煮后肉质更为软烂。制作过程需要掌握煎制与收汁的火候，对新手有一定挑战，但跟随步骤仍可成功。从备料到完成大约耗时 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：960 大卡
intro_en:
Cola chicken wings are bright red in color, tender and smooth in texture, and taste salty and sweet. They are a popular creative dish on the family table. Chicken wings are rich in high-quality protein and fat, and the meat becomes softer after being cooked with cola. The production process requires mastering the heat of frying and collecting juice, which is a challenge for novices, but they can still succeed if they follow the steps. It took about 40 minutes from prep to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 960 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡翅入锅，倒入冷水淹没。放生姜 1 片和料酒 10 ～ 20 毫升。大火煮开（ 大约 2 分钟 ）后，撇去浮沫，沥出水分
捞出鸡翅，可用刀将两边各划上两口改刀。生抽约 10 克腌制鸡翅 10 分钟（生抽能完全包裹鸡翅表面入味就行）
锅重新小火起油，先将剩余姜片爆香，然后下入腌好的鸡翅。将鸡翅煎至金黄翻面（直到两面金黄），用炒菜勺子翻动一下鸡翅，与姜片一起翻炒 4～5 下（目的是防止鸡翅和姜片粘黏）。
鸡翅金黄，倒入可乐没过鸡翅，开大火将锅中可乐煮沸，然后撇去漂浮的黑色浮沫（包含血水）。此时加入葱结。
调味：加入食用盐 2 克，白糖 10 克，生抽 3 克调味（可以适当用老抽调底色，3 克）。
等到葱结变黄，和姜片一起捞出，转中火继续慢煮可乐鸡翅。
等到可乐呈现挂丝状态，关小火让汁牢牢挂在鸡翅上。出锅，装盘。
steps_en: Put the chicken wings into the pot and cover with cold water. Add 1 piece of ginger and 10 to 20 ml of cooking wine. Bring to a boil over high heat (about 2 minutes), skim off the foam and drain off the water

Take out the chicken wings and use a knife to make two cuts on each side. About 10 grams of light soy sauce marinated chicken wings for 10 minutes (the light soy sauce can completely coat the surface of the chicken wings and add flavor)

Return the oil to low heat in the pot, sauté the remaining ginger slices until fragrant, then add the marinated chicken wings. Fry the chicken wings until golden brown and flip over (until both sides are golden brown), flip the chicken wings with a cooking spoon, and stir-fry with the ginger slices 4 to 5 times (the purpose is to prevent the chicken wings and ginger slices from sticking).

When the chicken wings are golden brown, pour in the Coke to cover the chicken wings, turn up the heat and bring the Coke to a boil, then skim off any floating black foam (including blood). At this time add the onion knots.
Seasoning: Add 2 grams of edible salt, 10 grams of sugar, and 3 grams of light soy sauce (you can use dark soy sauce to adjust the base color, 3 grams).
Wait until the onion knots turn yellow, remove them together with the ginger slices, turn to medium heat and continue to slow cook the cola chicken wings.
Wait until the cola is in a silky state, turn down the heat and let the juice hang firmly on the chicken wings. Remove from pan and plate.

intro_zh:
这是一道家常风味小炒，咸中带甜，酱香浓郁，洋葱炒软后滋味温和，搭配嫩滑猪肉片非常下饭。猪肉提供优质蛋白质和 B 族维生素，洋葱含膳食纤维和多种抗氧化物，开胃助消化。操作简单，新手也能轻松上手，预计制作时长仅需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：979 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-style stir-fry, salty yet sweet, with a rich sauce aroma. The onions are soft and mild in taste. It goes very well with tender pork slices. Pork provides high-quality protein and B vitamins, while onions contain dietary fiber and a variety of antioxidants, which are appetizing and aid digestion. The operation is simple, even for novices, and the production time is expected to only take 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 979 kcal
ingredients_zh: 洋葱 一颗 （是主角，喜欢吃洋葱可以多半颗～一颗）
ingredients_en: One onion (this is the protagonist, if you like to eat onions, you can add half to one more onion)
steps_zh: 洋葱切片，猪肉，蒜头拍碎，以及混合上述调味料备用
炒锅内倒入 1 大匙食用油（等待 10 秒让油温升高），倒入猪肉
炒至变色后下蒜头炒香盛起备用
原锅下洋葱翻炒 3~4 分钟后加入调味料炒匀
下刚盛起备用的猪肉翻炒至猪肉熟后
待猪肉熟后再翻炒 1、2 分钟即可起锅
steps_en: Slice onions, mince pork, garlic, and mix the above seasonings and set aside
Pour 1 tablespoon cooking oil into the wok (wait 10 seconds for the oil to heat up) and add the pork
Stir-fry until it changes color, add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Set aside.
Add the onions to the original pot and stir-fry for 3 to 4 minutes. Add the seasonings and stir-fry evenly.
Add the reserved pork and stir-fry until the pork is cooked
After the pork is cooked, stir-fry for 1 or 2 minutes before serving.

intro_zh:
粉蒸肉是一道经典中式蒸菜，香味浓郁，口感软糯，属于广泛流传的家常风味。五花肉提供优质蛋白质和脂肪，搭配土豆等根茎蔬菜，营养均衡。此菜适合有一定烹饪经验的人士制作，从准备到完成大约需要 90 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1606 大卡
intro_en:
Steamed pork with rice flour is a classic Chinese steamed dish with a rich aroma and soft and glutinous texture. It is a widely popular home-style flavor. Pork belly provides high-quality protein and fat, and is nutritionally balanced when paired with root vegetables such as potatoes. This dish is suitable for those with some cooking experience and takes about 90 minutes from prep to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1606 kcal
ingredients_zh: 蒸肉米粉 100g（推荐使用李锦记或自制）
土豆 300g（或南瓜 300g，作为垫底食材）
ingredients_en: Steamed pork rice noodles 100g (recommended to use Lee Kum Kee or homemade)
steps_zh: 将五花肉洗净，切成长约 5cm、宽约 3cm、厚度约 0.5cm 的肉片
将姜、蒜切成颗粒直径不大于 1mm 的细末
取一大碗，放入切好的五花肉、15ml 生抽、10ml 老抽、15ml 料酒、10g 郫县豆瓣酱、10g 姜末、10g 蒜末、5g 白砂糖
用筷子搅拌均匀后，盖上保鲜膜，室温(20°C - 25°C)静置腌制 30 分钟
腌制完成后，加入 100g 蒸肉米粉，继续翻拌 2 分钟，确保每片肉都均匀裹粉
土豆去皮，切片厚度控制在 0.8cm，片面积约为 5cm x 5cm，重量控制在 300g
在直径 20cm 的深碗底部铺满土豆片，尽量无重叠
将拌好粉的五花肉均匀铺在土豆片上，压实
蒸锅中加入 2000ml 清水，开火加热至水面持续冒泡(100°C)
将装好食材的碗放入蒸锅内，盖好锅盖
保持中火蒸 60 分钟（火力保持在可持续沸腾的程度，约 600W 热功率）
时间结束后，用筷子插入肉块中央，若能轻松穿透并无明显阻力，则表明蒸熟
若未达到此状态，则继续加热 10 - 15 分钟，直至肉质软烂，油脂渗出
取出盛盘，即可食用
steps_en: Wash the pork belly and cut into slices about 5cm long, 3cm wide and 0.5cm thick.
Cut the ginger and garlic into fine pieces with a diameter of no more than 1mm.
Take a large bowl, add chopped pork belly, 15ml light soy sauce, 10ml dark soy sauce, 15ml cooking wine, 10g Pixian bean paste, 10g minced ginger, 10g minced garlic, 5g white sugar
Stir evenly with chopsticks, cover with plastic wrap, and let marinate at room temperature (20°C - 25°C) for 30 minutes.
After marinating, add 100g of steamed pork rice noodles and continue stirring for 2 minutes to ensure that each piece of meat is evenly coated in flour
Peel potatoes, slice thickness to 0.8cm, slice area to approximately 5cm x 5cm, and weight to 300g
Spread potato slices all over the bottom of a deep bowl with a diameter of 20cm, trying not to overlap.
Spread the flour-mixed pork belly evenly on the potato slices and press firmly
Add 2000ml of water to the steamer and heat until the water surface continues to bubble (100°C)
Place the bowl filled with ingredients into the steamer and cover the pot
Keep steaming on medium heat for 60 minutes (keep the heat at a sustainable boiling level, about 600W heating power)
After the time is up, use chopsticks to insert into the center of the meat. If it can penetrate easily without obvious resistance, it means it is steamed.
If this state is not reached, continue heating for 10 - 15 minutes until the meat is tender and the fat oozes out.
Remove to a serving plate and serve

intro_zh:
小炒肉是一道香辣下饭的经典湘式家常菜，五花肉片焦香不腻，搭配鲜辣椒与豆豉、豆瓣酱炒出浓郁酱香。富含优质蛋白质和脂肪，辣椒能提供丰富的维生素 C，有助开胃暖身。制作难度中等，适合有一定基础的新手尝试，需注意肉片腌制和火候把控。从备料到出锅大约需要 1 小时，其中腌制 30 分钟，炒制过程约 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：2873 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried pork is a classic Hunan-style home-cooked dish that is spicy and served with rice. The pork belly slices are caramelized and not greasy, and are stir-fried with fresh chili, tempeh, and bean paste to create a rich sauce aroma. Packed with high-quality protein and fat, chili peppers provide a rich source of vitamin C, which helps to warm up the stomach and warm the body. The difficulty of making it is medium, suitable for novices with a certain foundation. You need to pay attention to marinating the meat and controlling the heat. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to serving, including 30 minutes of marinating and 15 minutes of stir-frying.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 2873 kcal
ingredients_zh: 豆豉 10g，根据个人口味加减 ±5g
豆瓣酱 10g，根据个人口味加减 ±5g
ingredients_en: Tempeh 10g, add or subtract ±5g according to personal taste
Doubanjiang 10g, add or subtract ±5g according to personal taste
steps_zh: 五花肉切片
把肉放入器皿内，加入淀粉、老抽、盐搅拌腌制半小时
葱切段
小米椒、朝天椒斜刀切好
热锅、倒油
油热后加入五花肉煸炒。炒至变色后盛出来
向锅中加蒜，煸出香味，加入豆豉，翻炒均匀
加入豆瓣酱翻炒均匀
加入炒好的五花肉继续的翻炒均匀
加入小米椒、朝天椒、葱段翻炒 40 秒
出锅。
steps_en: Pork belly slices
Put the meat into a container, add starch, dark soy sauce, and salt, stir and marinate for half an hour
Cut green onion into sections
Cut millet pepper and Chaotian pepper with diagonal knife
Heat pan, pour oil
When the oil is hot, add pork belly and stir-fry. Fry until it changes color and then serve it out
Add garlic to the pot, stir-fry until fragrant, add tempeh and stir-fry evenly
Add bean paste and stir-fry evenly
Add the fried pork belly and continue to stir-fry evenly
Add millet pepper, Chaotian pepper and green onion and stir-fry for 40 seconds
Remove from the pan.

intro_zh:
糖醋里脊酸甜浓郁、外酥里嫩，是广受欢迎的家常风味，在多地域菜系中都很常见。猪里脊提供优质蛋白，但裹粉油炸和糖醋汁使整体热量偏高。制作时需要掌握腌制、复炸和调汁火候，对新手稍有挑战，建议提前备好料并一气呵成。从备料到出锅大约需要 45 分钟到 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1573 大卡
intro_en:
Sweet and sour pork is sweet and sour, crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. It is a popular home-cooked flavor and is common in many regional cuisines. The pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein, but the breading, frying, and sweet-and-sour sauce make the overall caloric high. When making it, you need to master the heat of marinating, re-frying and seasoning, which is a bit challenging for novices. It is recommended to prepare the ingredients in advance and cook it in one go. It takes about 45 minutes to an hour from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1573 kcal
steps_zh: 腌肉：将猪里脊肉先切厚片，用刀背拍一拍，把肉拍松一点。切成一个手指头粗的条，加料酒，生抽，蚝油，食盐，白胡椒粉，一个鸡蛋，将肉用手抓匀，腌制 20 分钟以上。
调酱：番茄酱+10g 醋+30g 白糖+150ml 清水，搅拌至糖融化，备用。
裹粉：先把粉全部裹好再来炸，这样在炸的时候就不会手忙脚乱。准备一个大碗，里面放淀粉，把每一根肉条都满满裹上淀粉。
炸制：油温 160 摄氏度下里脊，可以拿一个干筷子放在油里面试一下，周围冒小泡就可以下锅。
炸到表面微黄可以捞出，全程中火。然后等油温升高到 200 摄氏度，把里脊倒进去重新炸一次，只需 40 秒，表皮就会很脆，马上捞出。
裹酱：另外拿一个锅，锅里放底油，把调好的酱汁倒进去，煮到冒泡，把炸好的里脊放进去，翻炒，让每一根都裹上酱汁。
下炸好的里脊肉翻炒，关火盛出。
steps_en: Marinate the pork: Cut the pork tenderloin into thick slices and pat it with the back of a knife to loosen the meat a little. Cut into strips as thick as a finger, add cooking wine, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, white pepper, and an egg, rub the meat evenly with your hands, and marinate for more than 20 minutes.
Make the sauce: ketchup + 10g vinegar + 30g sugar + 150ml water, stir until the sugar melts, set aside.
Coating: Coat all the flour before frying, so that you won't be in a hurry when frying. Prepare a large bowl, put starch in it, and coat each strip of meat fully with starch.
Frying: Lower the tenderloin in oil at 160 degrees Celsius. You can put a dry chopstick in the oil to test it. If there are small bubbles around it, you can remove it from the frying pan.

Fry until the surface is slightly brown and can be taken out, and the heat should be medium throughout. Then wait until the oil temperature rises to 200 degrees Celsius, pour the tenderloin in and fry it again. It only takes 40 seconds. The skin will be very crispy and you can take it out immediately.
Coating with sauce: Take another pot, put some oil in the pot, pour the prepared sauce in, cook until bubbling, put the fried tenderloin in, stir-fry so that each one is coated with the sauce.
Add the fried tenderloin and stir-fry, turn off the heat and serve.

name_en: Sweet and Spicy Grilled Whole Wings
intro_zh:
这道甜辣烤全翅利用空气炸锅烹制，外皮微焦、内里多汁，甜中带辣的风味很受欢迎。鸡肉富含优质蛋白质，用空气炸代替油炸大幅减少了油脂，吃起来负担更轻。制作流程清晰明了，只需提前腌制并中途翻面一次，对新手也比较友好。从处理食材到出锅大约需要 3 个小时，大部分是静置腌制的时间，实际操作并不繁琐。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：775 大卡
intro_en:
This sweet and spicy grilled whole wing is cooked in the air fryer, with a slightly charred exterior and juicy interior. The sweet yet spicy flavor is a hit. Chicken is rich in high-quality protein. Using air frying instead of deep-frying greatly reduces the fat and makes it lighter to eat. The production process is clear and simple. You only need to marinate it in advance and turn it over halfway. It is also friendly to novices. It takes about 3 hours from processing the ingredients to taking it out of the pot, most of which is the time of resting and marinating, so the actual operation is not cumbersome.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 775 kcal
steps_zh: 将 4 个新鲜鸡全翅取出，在翅中两根骨头之间用刀划开表皮，正反面各一刀
将 4 个鸡全翅放入碗中，加入生抽 45ml ， 老抽 15ml ， 蒜粉 10g ， 胡椒粉 5g ， 糖 10g ， 甜椒粉 10g ，辣椒粉 5g ， 蚝油 15ml ， 水 20ml 以及油 10ml
用勺子将酱汁均匀的抹在鸡全翅上，尤其是翅中的刀口处，大约花费 3 分钟
用保鲜膜盖住防油腌制中鸡全翅的碗，放入冰箱冷藏格静置 120 分钟
取出鸡全翅，锡纸盘中放入鸡全翅 4 个，将碗中残余酱料均匀倒在鸡全翅上
锡纸盘放入空气炸锅的烤篮上，用 200 摄氏度烤 25 分钟
打开空气炸锅，小心取出锡纸盘，将鸡全翅翻面
继续 200 摄氏度烤 25 分钟
取出即可食用
steps_en: Take out 4 fresh chicken wings and use a knife to cut the skin between the two bones in the wings, one knife on the front and back.

Put 4 whole chicken wings into a bowl, add 45ml of light soy sauce, 15ml of dark soy sauce, 10g of garlic powder, 5g of pepper, 10g of sugar, 10g of sweet pepper powder, 5g of chili powder, 15ml of oyster sauce, 20ml of water and 10ml of oil.
Use a spoon to spread the sauce evenly over the chicken wings, especially the edges of the wings. It takes about 3 minutes.
Cover the bowl of oil-proof marinated chicken whole wings with plastic wrap and place it in the refrigerator to rest for 120 minutes.
Take out the whole chicken wings, put 4 whole chicken wings on the tin foil plate, and pour the remaining sauce in the bowl evenly over the whole chicken wings.
Place the tin foil tray on the baking basket of the air fryer and bake at 200 degrees Celsius for 25 minutes
Open the air fryer, carefully remove the tin foil plate, and turn the chicken wings over
Continue baking at 200 degrees Celsius for 25 minutes
Take out and eat

name_en: Stir-fried Minced Pork with Garlic Moss
intro_zh:
蒜苔炒肉末是北方家常菜，咸鲜脆嫩，蒜香浓郁。蒜苔富含膳食纤维和维生素，五花肉提供蛋白质，荤素搭配均衡。做法简单，备料轻松，新手也能快速上手。从切配到出锅大约只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：258 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried minced pork with garlic moss is a home-cooked dish in the north. It is salty, crispy and tender, and has a strong garlic aroma. Garlic moss is rich in dietary fiber and vitamins, while pork belly provides protein, with a balanced mix of meat and vegetables. The method is simple, the ingredients are easy to prepare, and even novices can get started quickly. It only takes about 10 minutes from cutting to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 258 kcal
ingredients_zh: 蒜苔 1 扎（每扎蒜苔约 190g）
ingredients_en: 1 bunch of garlic moss (approximately 190g per bunch of garlic moss)
steps_zh: 蒜苔切成 5cm 小段，备用
五花肉切成 5mm * 5cm 丝状，备用
蒜瓣拍碎切成末，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
放入蒜末，中火翻炒 **10 秒** 将蒜末炒出香味
放入五花肉和 5ml 生抽，中火翻炒 **30 秒** 将肉炒熟并上色
将蒜苔放入锅内并加入 10ml 生抽，翻炒 **30 秒**
锅内加入 20g 水，中火翻炒 **5 分钟** 将蒜苔炒至稍稍变软
最后加入 2g 食盐，中火翻炒 **30 秒**，即可出锅装盘
steps_en: Cut the garlic into 5cm pieces and set aside
Cut the pork belly into 5mm * 5cm strips and set aside
Chop the garlic cloves into small pieces and set aside
Heat the pan and put 10ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Add the minced garlic and stir-fry over medium heat for **10 seconds** Stir-fry the minced garlic until fragrant
Add pork belly and 5ml light soy sauce, stir-fry over medium heat for **30 seconds** until the meat is cooked and browned
Put the garlic moss into the pot and add 10ml light soy sauce, stir-fry **30 seconds**
Add 20g water to the pot, stir-fry over medium heat for **5 minutes** Stir-fry the garlic until it softens slightly
Finally add 2g of salt, stir-fry over medium heat for **30 seconds**, then take it out of the pan and serve it on a plate

intro_zh:
孜然牛肉是一道香辣鲜嫩的家常小炒，浓郁的孜然风味与牛肉的软滑、青椒的清脆融合得恰到好处。牛肉富含优质蛋白和铁，搭配青椒还能补充维生素，营养均衡。制作需要一些刀工和火候把控，适合有一定下厨基础的爱好者尝试。算上腌肉和备菜，全程大约 45 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：612 大卡
intro_en:
Cumin beef is a spicy and tender home-style stir-fry. The rich cumin flavor is perfectly blended with the softness of the beef and the crispness of the green pepper. Beef is rich in high-quality protein and iron. When paired with green pepper, it can also supplement vitamins and provide balanced nutrition. The production requires some knife skills and heat control, so it is suitable for enthusiasts with certain cooking skills to try. Including marinating the meat and preparing the vegetables, it takes about 45 minutes to have it on the table.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 612 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青椒用量为 2 颗/人, 每颗 100g
小米椒用量为 3 颗/人, 每颗 5g
生抽酱油用量为 20 ml/人
葱用量为 1 根/人, 每颗 20g
ingredients_en: The amount of beef is 250 g/person
The dosage of green pepper is 2 pieces per person, 100g each
The dosage of millet pepper is 3 pieces per person, 5g each
The dosage of light soy sauce is 20 ml/person
The dosage of onion is 1 green onion/person, 20g each
steps_zh: 首先将小米椒切碎，和孜然粒一起放入捣药罐捣碎成颗粒，这样更入味。如果时间紧张可跳过捣碎步骤
青椒切头去籽（喜欢辣的可不去），切成丝。葱切段。
牛肉提前解冻，过一边水洗干净，晾干或用厨用纸吸干，将牛肉顺着纹理切成片
然后进行腌肉，加入生抽，淀粉，油，均匀搅拌，静止 30 分钟。腌肉方法也可参考[学习腌](../../tips/learn/学习腌.md)
热锅下油，放入葱，爆出香味后放入腌好的牛肉煸炒
牛肉变色后均匀放入孜然辣椒颗粒并炒熟
然后下入青椒丝，断生后放盐
大🔥炒 1 分钟后关火再翻炒 30 秒保证受热均匀即可出锅
steps_en: First, chop the millet pepper into small pieces, put it into a mash jar with cumin seeds and mash it into particles, which will make it more delicious. If you are pressed for time, you can skip the mashing step.
Cut off the green peppers and remove the seeds (don’t remove them if you like spicy food) and cut into shreds. Cut green onions into sections.
Defrost the beef in advance, wash it with water, dry it or blot it with kitchen paper, and cut the beef into slices along the grain.

Then marinate the meat, add light soy sauce, starch, and oil, stir evenly, and let rest for 30 minutes. For the method of marinating meat, you can also refer to [Learn to marinate](../../tips/learn/learn to marinate.md)
Heat oil in a pan, add green onions, add marinated beef and stir-fry until fragrant.
After the beef changes color, add cumin and chili granules evenly and stir-fry until cooked
Then add shredded green peppers and add salt after breaking them.
Stir-fry for 1 minute, then turn off the heat and stir-fry for 30 seconds to ensure even heating before serving.

intro_zh:
这是一道源自印度的经典咖喱菜肴，以烤制后再炖煮的鸡腿肉搭配番茄、黄油和奶油制成的酱汁，口感醇厚丝滑，酸甜微辣，带有独特的香料复合香气。鸡肉、酸奶和腰果提供了丰富的蛋白质与健康脂肪，番茄和香料也带来一定的维生素与抗氧化物。制作有一定挑战，需要掌握火候和香料的平衡，加上腌制时间共约 1 小时 45 分钟方可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：641 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic curry dish originating from India. It is made of grilled and then stewed chicken legs with a sauce made of tomatoes, butter and cream. It has a mellow and silky taste, sweet and sour and slightly spicy, with a unique complex aroma of spices. Chicken, yogurt, and cashews provide a rich source of protein and healthy fats, while tomatoes and spices also provide vitamins and antioxidants. There are certain challenges in making it, as you need to master the balance of heat and spices. Including marinating time, it takes about 1 hour and 45 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 641 kcal
ingredients_zh: 红辣椒粉（Kashmiri 红辣椒粉最佳，色红味不辣）
干葫芦巴叶(Kasuri Methi)— 可选但强烈推荐
红辣椒粉 5g（Kashmiri 红辣椒粉最佳）
ingredients_en: Red chili powder (Kashmiri red chili powder is the best, red in color and not spicy in taste)
Dried Fenugreek Leaves (Kasuri Methi) – optional but highly recommended
Chicken thigh 500g (boneless, cut into large pieces)
Red chilli powder 5g (Kashmiri red chilli powder is best)
steps_zh: 在大碗中混合酸奶、生姜泥、大蒜泥、红辣椒粉、姜黄粉、盐、柠檬汁
放入鸡肉块，充分裹上腌料
盖保鲜膜，冷藏腌制**至少 1 小时**
在平底锅中倒入 15ml 食用油，大火加热
将腌好的鸡肉块放入锅中（不要倒入腌料汁）
大火煎至*两面焦黄*（每面约 3 分钟），鸡肉不需要完全煮熟
盛出备用
在锅中放入番茄块、洋葱块、腰果、生姜、大蒜和水 100ml
大火煮沸后转中火，**煮 15 分钟**，直至*所有材料完全软烂*
稍微冷却后，倒入搅拌机中打成*细腻顺滑的泥状*
用滤网过滤一遍，去除渣滓，得到顺滑的酱汁，备用
在炒锅中放入黄油 50g，中火加热融化
倒入过滤好的番茄酱汁
加入红辣椒粉 5g、香菜粉 5g、孜然粉 3g、盐 5g
翻炒 **3-5 分钟**，直至*酱汁颜色变深且油花浮出*
放入烤好的鸡肉块，翻拌均匀
加入糖 10g（平衡番茄的酸味），搅拌
倒入淡奶油 100ml，搅拌均匀
小火**炖 10-12 分钟**，使鸡肉完全熟透且吸收酱汁
加入印度综合香料粉 3g、小豆蔻粉 2g
撒入干葫芦巴叶 3g（用手搓碎后撒入）
搅拌均匀，关火
盛盘，可额外淋上少量淡奶油作为装饰
steps_en: In a large bowl mix yogurt, ginger paste, garlic paste, red chili powder, turmeric powder, salt, lemon juice
Add chicken pieces and coat thoroughly with marinade
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate to marinate **at least 1 hour**
Pour 15ml cooking oil into the pan and heat over high heat
Put the marinated chicken pieces into the pot (do not pour in the marinade juice)
Fry over high heat until *brown on both sides* (about 3 minutes per side), chicken does not need to be fully cooked
Serve out and set aside
Add tomato cubes, onion cubes, cashew nuts, ginger, garlic and 100ml water to the pot
Bring to a boil over high heat, then turn to medium heat and **cook for 15 minutes** until *all ingredients are completely soft*
After cooling slightly, pour it into a blender and blend until it becomes a *fine and smooth puree*
Strain through a strainer to remove any residue and obtain a smooth sauce. Set aside
Put 50g of butter in a wok and heat over medium heat until melted
Pour in the strained tomato sauce
Add 5g red chili powder, 5g coriander powder, 3g cumin powder, and 5g salt
Stir-fry for **3-5 minutes** until the *sauce becomes darker in color and oil blooms*
Add the roasted chicken pieces and mix evenly
Add 10g of sugar (to balance the sourness of tomatoes) and stir
Pour in 100ml of light cream and stir evenly
Simmer** for 10-12 minutes** until the chicken is fully cooked and the sauce is absorbed
Add 3g Indian mixed spice powder and 2g cardamom powder
Sprinkle in 3g of dried fenugreek leaves (crushed with hands and sprinkled in)
Mix well and turn off the heat
Serve on a plate, you can add a little extra whipped cream for decoration

intro_zh:
一道麻辣浓郁的川味家常菜，汇集蔬菜、肉类和豆制品，口感香辣过瘾、层次丰富。荤素搭配提供了优质蛋白质和多种维生素，营养全面。操作步骤清晰，需要掌握焯水和翻炒火候，对新手有一定挑战，总制作时间约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1050 大卡
intro_en:
A spicy and rich Sichuan-style home-cooked dish, which brings together vegetables, meat and soy products. It has a spicy and spicy taste and rich layers. The combination of meat and vegetables provides high-quality protein and multiple vitamins, providing comprehensive nutrition. The steps are clear and you need to master the heat of blanching and stir-frying, which is a challenge for novices. The total production time is about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1050 kcal
ingredients_zh: 无骨肉（猪肉、牛肉、鸡肉、鱼丸、火腿肠）
青菜共需 455 克，其中油菜、油麦菜、菠菜的比例按自己喜好分配即可
无骨肉共需 430 克，其中猪肉、牛肉、鸡肉、鱼丸、火腿肠的比例按自己喜好分配即可
北京麻辣方便面 1 袋
ingredients_en: Boneless meat (pork, beef, chicken, fish balls, ham sausage)
A total of 455 grams of green vegetables are needed, and the proportions of rapeseed, lettuce, and spinach can be allocated according to your preference.
A total of 430 grams of boneless meat is required. The proportions of pork, beef, chicken, fish balls, and ham sausages can be allocated according to your preference.
steps_zh: 烧开一锅水（水量能没过第 2-4 步中的食材即可）。
在开水中放入青菜，焯 5 分钟后盛出备用。
在开水中放入无骨肉，焯 4 分钟后盛出备用。
在开水中放入北京麻辣方便面，煮 2 分钟后盛出备用。
倒出开水，擦干锅具，放入 105 克食用油，大火加热 30 秒。
放入麻辣香锅调料，翻炒 20 秒。
放入干辣椒，翻炒 10 秒。
放入焯过的青菜，改中火，翻炒 3 分钟。
放入焯过的无骨肉，翻炒 3 分钟。
放入煮过的北京麻辣方便面，用筷子翻动 1 分钟。
关火，出锅。
steps_en: Boil a pot of water (just enough to cover the ingredients in steps 2-4).
Add green vegetables to boiling water, blanch for 5 minutes and set aside.
Add boneless meat to boiling water, blanch for 4 minutes and set aside.
Add Beijing Spicy Instant Noodles to boiling water, cook for 2 minutes and set aside.
Pour out the boiling water, dry the pot, add 105 grams of cooking oil, and heat over high heat for 30 seconds.
Add the spicy pot seasoning and stir-fry for 20 seconds.
Add the dried chilies and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
Add the blanched green vegetables, reduce heat to medium, and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Add the blanched boneless meat and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Add the cooked Beijing spicy instant noodles and stir with chopsticks for 1 minute.
Turn off the heat and remove from the pot.

name_en: Pork Ribs with Black Bean Sauce
intro_zh:
这是一道粤式茶楼里的人气蒸点，豉香醇厚，排骨滑嫩脱骨。排骨提供优质蛋白和钙质，发酵豆豉增添风味也更利吸收。做法需经过泡洗、腌制和控火蒸制，对新手稍有考验，但步骤清晰易上手，从备料到出锅大约只需 1 小时。剩余的汤汁用来拌饭或拌面格外鲜美。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1513 大卡
intro_en:
This is a popular steamed dish in Cantonese teahouses. It has a mellow aroma of black bean and the pork ribs are tender and fall off the bones. Pork ribs provide high-quality protein and calcium, and fermented tempeh adds flavor and is easier to absorb. The method requires soaking, marinating and steaming under controlled heat, which is a bit challenging for novices, but the steps are clear and easy to follow, and it only takes about 1 hour from preparation to cooking. The remaining soup is especially delicious when used with rice or noodles.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1513 kcal
ingredients_zh: 食用油 20 ml（不打算淋热油为 10 ml）
ingredients_en: 20 ml cooking oil (10 ml if you don’t plan to pour hot oil)
steps_zh: 将排骨用冷水浸泡 10 分钟泡去血水，换水重复 2 次，用厨房纸吸干
将豆豉放入水中浸泡 5 分钟
将所有食材混合（食用油放 10 ml），腌制 8-30 分钟
水开后上锅蒸 18 分钟
焖 2 分钟
锅中倒入 10 ml 热油，加热到 180-200 ℃
均匀撒上葱花和白芝麻，热油浇在撒料上
steps_en: Soak the ribs in cold water for 10 minutes to remove the blood. Repeat the water change twice and blot dry with kitchen paper.
Soak the tempeh in water for 5 minutes
Mix all ingredients (put 10 ml of cooking oil) and marinate for 8-30 minutes
After the water boils, steam it for 18 minutes
Simmer for 2 minutes
Pour 10 ml hot oil into the pot and heat to 180-200 ℃
Sprinkle chopped green onion and white sesame seeds evenly, and pour hot oil over the sprinkles

intro_zh:
这是一道经典的江南家常菜，五花肉与红腐乳同炖，色泽红亮如琥珀，肉质酥烂到入口即化，咸甜交织的酒香与豆香在舌尖层层展开。富含优质蛋白质和 B 族维生素，经慢火煨煮后更易消化。制作流程需要耐心把控火候和收汁，对新手来说有一定挑战，预计制作时长约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1190 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Jiangnan home-cooked dish. Pork belly is stewed with red fermented bean curd. The color is as red as amber. The meat is so crispy that it melts in your mouth. The salty and sweet aroma of wine and bean spreads on the tip of the tongue. Rich in high-quality protein and B vitamins, it is easier to digest after simmering. The production process requires patience to control the heat and collect the juice, which is a challenge for novices. The production is expected to take about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1190 kcal
ingredients_zh: 红腐乳（推荐咸亨牌玫瑰腐乳）
ingredients_en: Red bean curd (recommended Xianheng brand rose bean curd)
30 g red fermented bean curd (about 2 pieces)
steps_zh: 五花肉切成长宽 2.5 cm 的小块
冷水放料酒姜片，五花肉放入开火慢慢加入到水沸腾后捞出
玫瑰腐乳块和腐乳汁碾成泥，加冰糖、老抽调成酱汁
热锅冷油爆香葱姜，下肉块煸到金黄
倒入腐乳酱炒匀加热水焖煮
小火慢炖 40 分钟
大火收汁，看到汤汁冒浓稠鱼眼泡时关火
steps_en: Cut the pork belly into small pieces 2.5 cm wide
Pour cooking wine and ginger slices into cold water, put pork belly over high heat and add slowly until the water boils, then take it out.
Crush the rose bean curd cubes and bean curd juice into a puree, add rock sugar and dark soy sauce to make a sauce
In a hot pan, sauté the onion and ginger with cold oil, then add the meat and stir-fry until golden brown
Pour in fermented bean curd sauce, stir well, heat water and simmer
Simmer for 40 minutes
Reduce the juice over high heat. Turn off the heat when you see thick fish-eye bubbles in the soup.

intro_zh:
水煮肉片是一道麻辣鲜香、肉片滑嫩、配菜爽脆的经典川菜，极其适合下饭。猪里脊提供优质蛋白质，搭配豆芽等蔬菜，营养均衡。做法稍显繁琐，尤其需要耐心腌制肉片和制作刀口辣椒，新手大约需要 1 至 2 小时完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：361 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled Pork Slices is a classic Sichuan dish that is spicy and fragrant, with smooth and tender meat slices and crispy side dishes. It is perfect for rice. Pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein, and when paired with vegetables such as bean sprouts, it is nutritionally balanced. The method is a bit tedious, especially requiring patience in marinating the meat slices and making the knife-edge chili. It takes about 1 to 2 hours for a novice to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 361 kcal
ingredients_zh: 红泡椒 20g（根据受辣程度选择 0-40 g）
植物油 280g（根据情况选择，想吃重油就多加 100g）
菜籽油 200g（根据情况选择，想吃重油就多加 100g）
小米辣干辣椒 20g（根据受辣程度选择 0-40g）
青花椒 5g（根据情况选择，想吃麻就多 5g）
ingredients_en: 20g red pickled pepper (0-40g depending on the degree of spiciness)
Vegetable oil 280g (choose according to the situation, if you want to eat heavy oil, add 100g more)
200g rapeseed oil (choose according to the situation, if you want to eat heavy oil, add 100g more)
Millet spicy dried chili 20g (choose 0-40g according to the degree of spiciness)
5g green peppercorns (choose according to the situation, if you want to eat hemp, add 5g more)
steps_zh: 里脊肉改刀成小块，再切成 2 毫米薄片（可根据自己的口感改进），放入碗中，加入清水清洗两遍来去除血水和杂质，捞出挤干水分备用。
碗中加入食用盐 1.5g，胡椒粉 1g，生抽酱油 5g，料酒 3g，然后朝着一个方向搅拌 2 分钟，使其入味。
另外准备一个碗，加入一个鸡蛋清，加入 7g 土豆淀粉，一个方向搅拌均匀，倒入肉中
绿豆芽 100g，凤尾 1 根（改刀成小条），芹菜 3 根切成小段，蒜苗 2 根拍散切成小段。
大蒜 20g 剁碎，生姜小块剁碎，红泡椒 20g 剁碎。
小米辣干辣椒 15g，青花椒 3g，锅内加入油滑锅，油稍许热了将多余的倒出备用留 50g 底油，下入干辣椒、花椒，开小火炒香，切记不要炒糊（颜色要变黑即可），倒出在菜板上剁细。
锅烧热，放入 100g 植物油烧至 6 成热，加入 2g 青花椒、干辣椒爆香，配菜下锅，加入 1g 食用盐，炒至断生，盛入碗中垫底备用。
锅洗干净，加入 150g 植物油烧至 6 成热，加入制作好的姜蒜红泡椒，爆香后加入豆瓣 10g，开小火把豆瓣爆香炒出红油即可。
加入 800 毫升清水（根据实际情况选择），大火烧开，转小火调味，加入食用盐 2.5g，鸡精 1.5g，1g 白砂糖提鲜，1g 胡椒粉，5g 水淀粉（根据实际情况选择）将汤汁收浓稠一点。
汤汁开后，开小火将腌制好的肉片分开依次下锅，然后开中火将肉片烫熟，用锅铲轻轻推动一下避免粘连，待汤汁烧开，肉片熟后捞出放入碗中配菜上，再将原汤倒入（不超过菜品）。
碗中均匀撒上刀口辣椒、蒜蓉和葱花。
锅洗干净，加入 200g 菜籽油，烧至 7 成热，然后一次性均匀泼在碗中肉片上（注意安全），美味完成。
steps_en: Cut the tenderloin into small pieces, then cut into 2mm thin slices (you can improve it according to your own taste), put it in a bowl, add water and wash it twice to remove blood and impurities, remove and squeeze out the water and set aside.
Add 1.5g of edible salt, 1g of pepper, 5g of light soy sauce, and 3g of cooking wine to the bowl, then stir in one direction for 2 minutes to infuse the flavors.
Prepare another bowl, add an egg white, add 7g potato starch, stir evenly in one direction, and pour into the meat
100g mung bean sprouts, 1 phoenix tail (cut into small strips), 3 celery stalks cut into small sections, 2 garlic sprouts smashed and cut into small sections.
Chop 20g garlic, mince ginger into small pieces, and mince 20g red pickled pepper.

Add 15g of millet, spicy dried chili, and 3g of green peppercorns. Add oil to the pan. When the oil is slightly hot, pour out the excess and reserve 50g of base oil. Add dried chili peppers and Sichuan peppercorns. Stir-fry over low heat until fragrant. Be sure not to burn them (the color must turn black). Pour out and chop finely on the cutting board.

Heat the pot, add 100g vegetable oil and heat until 60% hot, add 2g green peppercorns and dried chili peppers and sauté until fragrant, add garnishes to the pot, add 1g edible salt, fry until raw, put in a bowl and set aside.

Clean the pot, add 150g of vegetable oil and heat it to 60% heat. Add the prepared ginger, garlic and red pickled peppers. Saute until fragrant. Add 10g of watercress. Turn on low heat and stir-fry the watercress until fragrant and the red oil will come out.

Add 800 ml of water (choose according to the actual situation), bring to a boil over high heat, turn to low heat and season, add 2.5g edible salt, 1.5g chicken essence, 1g white sugar for freshness, 1g pepper, 5g water starch (choose according to the actual situation) to thicken the soup.

After the soup is boiling, turn on low heat and put the marinated meat slices into the pot one by one. Then turn on medium heat and scald the meat slices until cooked. Use a spatula to gently push the meat slices to avoid sticking. When the soup is boiling, when the meat slices are cooked, take them out and place them in a bowl with garnishes. Then pour in the original soup (no more than the dish).
Sprinkle the chili pepper, minced garlic and chopped green onion evenly into the bowl.
Clean the pot, add 200g of rapeseed oil, heat until 70% hot, then pour it evenly on the meat slices in the bowl at once (pay attention to safety), and the deliciousness is complete.

intro_zh:
一道家常小炒，咸香微辣，牛肉滑嫩入味，尖椒清脆爽口。牛肉提供优质蛋白和铁，尖椒富含维生素 C，搭配起来营养均衡。虽然腌制需要一些耐心，但操作步骤明确，新手也能上手，难度适中。从备料到出锅大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：449 大卡
intro_en:
A home-style stir-fry, salty and slightly spicy, the beef is tender and flavourful, and the pepper is crisp and refreshing. Beef provides high-quality protein and iron, and peppers are rich in vitamin C, making them a nutritionally balanced combination. Although pickling requires some patience, the steps are clear, novices can get started, and the difficulty is moderate. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 449 kcal
ingredients_en: The amount of beef is 250 g/person
The amount of green onions is 0.5/person
The dosage of ginger is 1 piece/person
The dosage of salt is 3 g/person
The dosage of sugar is 1.5 g/person
The dosage of soy sauce is 9 ml/person
steps_zh: 蒜剁成蒜泥
葱切段
姜切成姜片
尖椒切成段
牛肉放入碗中
加姜、盐、酱油、糖进行腌制 30-40 分钟
腌制完姜可以去掉
冷油下锅，待油变热至偶有气泡
加入蒜泥
蒜泥变金黄后加入尖椒
待尖椒表皮微皱，加入腌制好的牛肉翻炒
翻炒变熟之前加入葱，继续翻炒
翻炒至牛肉变熟，关火出锅
steps_en: Chop garlic into minced garlic
Cut green onion into sections
Ginger cut into slices
Chili peppers cut into sections
Put beef in bowl
Add ginger, salt, soy sauce and sugar and marinate for 30-40 minutes
You can remove the ginger after it is pickled.
Add cold oil to the pan and wait until the oil becomes hot until there are occasional bubbles
Add minced garlic
When the garlic turns golden, add the peppers
When the skin of the pepper is slightly wrinkled, add the marinated beef and stir-fry
Add the onions before they are cooked and continue to stir-fry
Stir-fry until the beef is cooked, turn off the heat and remove from the pan

intro_zh:
商芝肉是陕西商县的传统风味菜，色泽红润，质地软嫩，肥而不腻，带有商芝独特的清香。猪肉提供优质蛋白和脂肪，蕨类蔬菜商芝则增添了膳食纤维和多种微量元素。这道菜工序繁琐，对刀工和火候均有要求，适合有一定烹饪基础的人挑战。从备料到成菜，全程大约需要 2.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1621 大卡
intro_en:
Shangzhi meat is a traditional dish from Shangxian County, Shaanxi Province. It is red in color, soft and tender in texture, fat but not greasy, and has the unique fragrance of Shangzhi. Pork provides high-quality protein and fat, while fern vegetables add dietary fiber and a variety of trace elements. The process of this dish is complicated and requires both knife skills and heat. It is suitable for people with certain cooking skills to challenge. From preparation to dish, the entire process takes about 2.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1621 kcal
ingredients_zh: 商芝（又名紫萁，属蕨类，嫩叶可食）
摊鸡蛋皮:一张约 15 克
熟猪油: 2000 克（消耗约 60 克）
ingredients_en: Shangzhi (also known as Zhizhi, belongs to fern, and the young leaves are edible)
Spread egg skin: about 15 grams per piece
Cooked lard: 2000 grams (consumption of about 60 grams)
steps_zh: 将肉刮洗干净，入煮锅煮至六成熟（变色为白），捞出趁热用蜂蜜、醋涂抹肉皮。
炒锅内放入熟猪油，用旺火烧至八成熟（约 200 度，油表有大量青烟，油状平静），将肉块皮朝下投入，炸至呈金红色时，捞入凉肉煮锅（之前煮完的煮锅）中泡软，放在案板上，切成三寸(10 cm)长、两分(0.6 cm)厚的片，仍然皮朝下，整齐装入蒸碗内。
将 5 克大葱切成 2.4 cm 长的段，5 克切成 2.4 cm 长的斜形片。姜去皮洗净，1.5 克切成片，5 克切成末，摊的鸡蛋皮切成 2.4 cm 长的等腰三角形片。
商芝入沸水锅中煮软捞出，去除老茎、杂质，淘洗干净，切成 3 cm 长的段，放入碗中,加酱油（5 克）、精盐（1 克）、熟猪油（10 克）拌匀，盖在肉片上，另将鸡汤（100 克）放入一小碗中，加酱油（5 克）、精盐（0.5 克）、料酒（15 克）搅匀，浇入蒸碗，再放入姜片、葱段、八角上笼用旺火蒸约半小时后，转用小火继续蒸约一小时三十分钟，熟烂后取出，拣去姜、葱、八角，倒、过滤原汁，将肉扣入汤盘。
炒锅内，放入鸡汤（100 克），加入原汁，用旺火烧沸，下入姜末、葱片、味精后搅匀，投入摊鸡蛋皮，淋芝麻油，浇入汤盘即成。
steps_en: Scrape and clean the meat, put it into a pot and cook it until it is six-mature (it changes color to white), take it out and smear the skin with honey and vinegar while it is still hot.

Put cooked lard in the wok and cook it over high heat until it is medium-ripened (about 200 degrees, there is a lot of green smoke on the surface of the oil and the oil is calm). Put the meat pieces skin side down and fry until it turns golden red. Then put it into the cold meat pot (the pot that was cooked before) and soak it until soft. Place it on the chopping board and cut it into three-inch (10 cm) long and two-minute (0.6 cm) thick slices. Keep the skin side down and put them neatly into a steaming bowl.

Cut 5 g of green onions into 2.4 cm long segments and 5 g into 2.4 cm long diagonal slices. Peel and wash the ginger, cut 1.5 grams into slices, cut 5 grams into mince, and cut the egg skin into 2.4 cm long isosceles triangle slices.

Boil the Shangzhi in a pot of boiling water until soft, remove old stems and impurities, wash clean, cut into 3 cm long sections, put into a bowl, add soy sauce (5g), refined salt (1g), cooked lard (10g), mix well, cover the meat slices, put the chicken soup (100g) into a small bowl, add soy sauce (5g), refined salt (0.5g), cooking wine (15g) g), mix well, pour into a steaming bowl, then add ginger slices, green onion segments, and star anise, steam on high heat for about half an hour, then switch to low heat and continue steaming for about an hour and thirty minutes. When cooked, take it out, remove the ginger, green onion, and star anise, pour and filter the original juice, and put the meat into a soup plate.

In the wok, add chicken soup (100 grams), add the original juice, bring to a boil over high heat, add minced ginger, green onion slices, MSG and mix well, add egg skin, drizzle with sesame oil, pour into the soup plate and serve.

intro_zh:
这是一道源自东北的经典炖菜，酸爽鲜香、暖心暖胃。酸菜富含乳酸菌和膳食纤维，排骨提供优质蛋白与钙质，血肠则能补充铁元素。制作时需要耐心处理血肠以防煮爆，对厨房新手有一定挑战。从备料到出锅，预计耗时约一小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1657 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic stew originating from the Northeast. It is sour, fragrant, heart-warming and stomach-warming. Sauerkraut is rich in lactic acid bacteria and dietary fiber, pork ribs provide high-quality protein and calcium, and blood sausage can supplement iron. The blood sausage needs to be handled patiently to prevent it from overcooking, which is a challenge for novices in the kitchen. From preparation to serving, it is expected to take about an hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1657 kcal
ingredients_zh: 蘸料：辣椒油 5 克、生抽 10 克、蒜蓉 5 克、香油 2 克。
ingredients_en: Dipping ingredients: 5g chili oil, 10g light soy sauce, 5g minced garlic, 2g sesame oil.
steps_zh: 血肠用牙签多扎一些小孔，然后放水中小火煮十分钟，不要让水烧开，保持 80 度，否则血肠非常容易爆开。
煮好的血肠切块备用。
排骨放料酒焯水，控干水分备用。
锅内放入菜籽油，放蒜瓣，干辣椒，姜粉炒香。
放入排骨翻炒至表面金黄。
酸菜洗净拧干水分，放入锅中，加入香油翻炒，香油可以更好的去除酸味而且让酸菜更香，大火翻炒二分钟。
加入 600 毫升热水。
转入电压力锅，加香叶，八角，葱结，盐。
浓香模式压 40 分钟。
到时间后放气开盖。加入血肠和枸杞，盖上锅盖焖二分钟即可，血肠是熟的，不需再加热。
倒入盆中，按照上表调制蘸料，即可开吃。
steps_en: Poke some small holes in the blood sausage with a toothpick, then put it in water and simmer for ten minutes. Do not let the water boil and keep it at 80 degrees, otherwise the blood sausage will burst easily.
Cut the cooked blood sausage into cubes and set aside.
Blanch the pork ribs in cooking wine, drain and set aside.
Put rapeseed oil in the pot, add garlic cloves, dried chili peppers, and ginger powder and saute until fragrant.
Add the pork ribs and stir-fry until the surface is golden brown.

Wash the sauerkraut and wring out the water, put it in a pot, add sesame oil and stir-fry. The sesame oil can better remove the sour taste and make the sauerkraut more fragrant. Stir-fry for two minutes on high heat.
Add 600ml hot water.
Transfer to electric pressure cooker, add bay leaves, star anise, green onions and salt.
Press in strong aroma mode for 40 minutes.
After the time is up, deflate and open the lid. Add the blood sausage and wolfberry, cover the pot and simmer for two minutes. The blood sausage is cooked and does not need to be reheated.
Pour into a basin, prepare dipping sauce according to the table above, and serve.

intro_zh:
小米辣炒肉香辣过瘾，是一道典型的西南风味下饭菜，猪肉的鲜嫩搭配小米辣的爽辣，令人食欲大开。猪肉富含蛋白质和脂肪，辣椒提供丰富的维生素 C，能够促进食欲。虽然需要掌握爆香和翻炒的火候，但步骤清晰，新手也能轻松上手，预计制作时长约 25 分钟。注意，这道菜辣味突出，不建议清淡饮食者尝试。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：620 大卡
intro_en:
Spicy stir-fried pork with millet is spicy and satisfying. It is a typical southwestern-style side dish. The tenderness of the pork combined with the spiciness of the spicy millet will whet your appetite. Pork is rich in protein and fat, and chili peppers provide a rich source of vitamin C, which stimulates appetite. Although you need to master the heat of sauteing and stir-frying, the steps are clear and novices can easily get started. It is expected to take about 25 minutes to make. Note that this dish is very spicy and is not recommended for light eaters.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 620 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小米椒 20 个，根据个人口味加减
豆瓣酱 10g，根据个人口味加减
ingredients_en: 20 millet peppers, add or subtract according to personal taste
Doubanjiang 10g, add or subtract according to personal taste
steps_zh: 将小米辣洗净，斜刀切大一点
肉的话，想切丝切丝，想切片切片，倒入调料（生抽、蚝油、盐）腌制 5 分钟
热锅倒油，先把肉炒好盛起
姜蒜爆香，倒入豆瓣酱翻炒，到入切好的小米辣，再倒入瘦肉，翻炒一下，放点生抽、鸡精、盐、糖翻炒
steps_en: Wash the millet and cut it into larger pieces with a diagonal knife
For meat, cut it into shreds or slice it, add seasonings (light soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt) and marinate for 5 minutes.
Pour oil into the hot pan and fry the meat first.

Saute the ginger and garlic until fragrant, add the bean paste and stir-fry until the chopped millet is spicy, then add the lean meat, stir-fry, add some light soy sauce, chicken essence, salt and sugar and stir-fry

intro_zh:
鸭肉与啤酒同炖，汤汁浓郁，肉质鲜香软烂，还带有一股淡淡的啤酒清香，是一道风味独特的家常菜。鸭肉本身滋补，富含蛋白质、B 族维生素和多种矿物质，搭配啤酒炖煮后更易入味。这道菜步骤虽稍多，但操作并不复杂，一般初学者只需 大约 1 小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1324 大卡
intro_en:
Duck meat is stewed with beer. The soup is rich, the meat is fragrant and soft, and it also has a faint fragrance of beer. It is a home-cooked dish with a unique flavor. Duck meat itself is nutritious and rich in protein, B vitamins and various minerals. It becomes more delicious after being stewed with beer. Although this recipe has a few steps, it is not complicated and can be completed by beginners in about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1324 kcal
ingredients_zh: 32 厘米以上的炒锅一个(锅太小难炒
鸭肉（半只,1 kg,让市场老板剁成小块）
啤酒 1000 ml （可以买 500 ml 的罐装啤酒两瓶）
青椒 2 条,红椒 1 条 （ 长度 10 厘米到 15 厘米 之间都可以）（切段 或者切片都可以, 2 厘米一段）
生姜 3 厘米长,拍散备用
小米辣 3 颗,切两段即可(不吃辣的可以不用
蒜苗 2 根 切段备用
大葱 2 根  1 根切段,1 根备用
草果 两颗,拍散去仔备用
干辣椒 6 条 (不吃辣可以不用
ingredients_en: A wok over 32 cm (the pan is too small and difficult to fry)
Duck meat (half duck, 1 kg, ask the market owner to chop it into small pieces)
Beer 1000 ml (you can buy two bottles of 500 ml canned beer)
2 green peppers, 1 red pepper (length can be between 10 cm and 15 cm) (cut into sections or slices, 2 cm sections)
4 garlic cloves, smashed and set aside
Ginger 3 cm long, smashed and set aside
3 pieces of spicy millet, cut into two sections (you can omit it if you don’t like spicy food)
2 garlic sprouts, cut into sections and set aside
2 green onions, 1 green onion, cut into sections, 1 green onion, set aside
Two strawberries, smashed and discarded for later use
6 dried chili peppers (you can omit them if you don’t like spicy food)
steps_zh: 鸭肉清洗一遍放进锅中
加清水淹没鸭肉
加 20 ml 料酒
加备用的 1 根 大葱
加生姜 ,拍散的 2 厘米
开火烧滚
捞出浮沫
鸭肉捞出,清水洗干净备用
锅清洗感觉烧热,加 60ml 的花生油
油温到 60 度的时候,加一把花椒（ 30 颗）
加鸭肉翻炒 4 分钟
加入 1000 ml 的啤酒
烧鸭肉 30 分钟
出锅
steps_en: Wash the duck meat and put it into the pot
Add water to cover the duck meat
Add 20 ml cooking wine
Add reserved 1 green onion
Add ginger, break up 2cm
Turn on the fire
scoop out the foam
Remove the duck meat, wash it with water and set aside
If the pot feels hot after cleaning, add 60ml of peanut oil.
When the oil temperature reaches 60 degrees, add a handful of Sichuan peppercorns (30)
Add duck meat and stir-fry for 4 minutes
Add 1000 ml of beer
Roast duck 30 minutes
Take out of the pot

intro_zh:
猪肉烩酸菜是一道北方家常炖菜，酸香浓郁，五花肉软烂，排骨入味。主要提供蛋白质，酸菜也带来乳酸菌等有益成分。做法步骤清晰，新手也能按部就班完成，但需耐心慢炖，从头到尾大约需要 3 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1817 大卡
intro_en:
Pork braised with sauerkraut is a northern home-style stew with rich sour aroma, soft pork belly and delicious ribs. Mainly providing protein, sauerkraut also brings beneficial ingredients such as lactic acid bacteria. The steps are clear and novices can complete it step by step, but it requires patience and slow cooking, which takes about 3 hours from start to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1817 kcal
ingredients_zh: 猪排骨或者五花肉（总共） 1500 克
ingredients_en: Pork ribs or pork belly (total) 1500 g
steps_zh: 大葱切段；生姜 50 克切段， 50 克切末；大蒜切末，备用。
全部酸菜切丝，用水冲洗 2 ～ 3 遍备用。
排骨和五花肉入锅，倒入冷水淹没。放入全部葱段， 50 克生姜段和料酒 20 毫升。大火煮开后，等待 5 分钟。关火，将排骨和五花肉捞出，冷水冲洗掉浮沫，备用
煮好的五花肉切片或者切块，备用。
将之前的锅洗干净，并且擦干（不然加入油会崩出来）。
锅中加入油，开中火，放入姜蒜末爆香，放入五花肉和排骨。将五花肉和排骨煎至金黄，倒入 10 克五香粉和 15 克 生抽酱油，用铲子翻动 1 ～ 2 分钟。
将冲洗好的酸菜丝加入锅中，翻炒 3 分钟。
倒入纯净水至刚好没过食材，加入 2 颗大料，转大火，直到锅中水沸腾。转中火，盖锅盖焖煮。
等待 1.5 ～ 2 小时，直至五花肉软烂 （可以用筷子轻松扎穿）
掀开锅盖，开大火收汤，翻动锅中食材直至锅中剩余水分只覆盖锅底，转小火，准备调味。
调味：加入食用盐 10 克，搅拌均匀。
关火，出锅。
steps_en: Cut green onions into sections; cut 50 grams of ginger into sections and mince 50 grams; mince garlic and set aside.
Cut all the sauerkraut into shreds, rinse with water 2 to 3 times and set aside.

Put the ribs and pork belly into the pot and pour in cold water to cover. Add all green onion segments, 50 g ginger segments and 20 ml cooking wine. Bring to a boil and wait 5 minutes. Turn off the heat, take out the ribs and pork belly, rinse with cold water to remove the foam, and set aside
Slice or dice the cooked pork belly and set aside.
Wash the previous pot and dry it (otherwise the oil will fall out when added).

Add oil to the pot, turn on medium heat, add minced ginger and garlic and sauté until fragrant, add pork belly and ribs. Fry the pork belly and ribs until golden brown, add 10 grams of five-spice powder and 15 grams of light soy sauce, and stir with a spatula for 1 to 2 minutes.
Add the rinsed shredded sauerkraut to the pot and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Pour purified water until the ingredients are just covered, add 2 aniseed, turn up the heat until the water in the pot boils. Turn to medium heat, cover and simmer.
Wait 1.5 to 2 hours until the pork belly is tender (can be easily pierced with chopsticks)

Lift the lid of the pot, turn on high heat to collect the soup, stir the ingredients in the pot until the remaining water in the pot only covers the bottom of the pot, turn to low heat and prepare for seasoning.
Seasoning: Add 10 grams of edible salt and stir evenly.
Turn off the heat and remove from the pot.

intro_zh:
肉饼炖蛋是一道咸鲜滑嫩的传统家常菜，肉饼吸饱了酱汁，鸡蛋卧在其中，口感软嫩又下饭。它富含优质蛋白质和多种氨基酸，能很好地补充体力。做法十分简单，对厨房新手非常友好，从备料到出锅大约只需要 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1124 大卡
intro_en:
Stewed meatloaf with eggs is a traditional home-cooked dish that is salty, fresh and tender. The meatloaf soaks up the sauce and the eggs lie in it. It is soft and tender and goes well with rice. It is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of amino acids, which can replenish physical strength well. The recipe is very simple and friendly to kitchen novices, and it only takes about 20 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1124 kcal
steps_zh: 在碗中加入猪肉末、料酒、生抽、白胡椒粉、鸡蛋和芝麻香油，搅拌均匀。
将调好味的猪肉末铺在盘子里，肉末中间用勺子挖一个洞，往洞中打入 1 个鸡蛋。
锅中加水至 1/4 高度，水烧开后，将盘子放入锅中，盖上锅盖，蒸 15 分钟。
steps_en: Add minced pork, cooking wine, light soy sauce, white pepper, eggs and sesame oil to the bowl and stir evenly.
Spread the seasoned minced pork on a plate, use a spoon to make a hole in the middle of the minced meat, and break an egg into the hole.
Add water to the pot to 1/4 height. After the water boils, put the plate into the pot, cover the pot and steam for 15 minutes.

intro_zh:
这道汤菜清鲜不腻，羊肉软烂入味，萝卜饱吸汤汁后甘甜绵糯，是北方冬季常见的家常暖身菜。羊肉富含优质蛋白和铁，萝卜含有维生素与膳食纤维，两者搭配温补脾胃、驱寒助消化。虽然需经焯水去腥和两次炖煮，但步骤清晰易循，新手也能顺利上手。整体制作大约需要两小时，若用高压锅可缩短至大约一 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1259 大卡
intro_en:
This soup is fresh and not greasy, the mutton is soft and tasty, and the radish is sweet and glutinous after absorbing the soup. It is a common home-cooked warm-up dish in the north in winter. Mutton is rich in high-quality protein and iron, while radish contains vitamins and dietary fiber. The two are combined to warm the spleen and stomach, dispel cold and aid digestion. Although it requires blanching to remove the fishy smell and stewing twice, the steps are clear and easy to follow, and novices can get started smoothly. The overall preparation takes about two hours, which can be shortened to about one hour if you use a pressure cooker.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1259 kcal
ingredients_zh: 姜 10g ，一般买一头姜，从中切大约 4 片即可
ingredients_en: Ginger 10g, usually buy one head of ginger and cut about 4 pieces from it
Water: enough to cover the ingredients, 1000ml is required
steps_zh: 萝卜去皮、滚刀切成 3-5cm 的大块，备用
羊排在购买时可以让卖家切好，因为家用刀一般难以切动，备用
羊肉冷水下锅，加入一半的料酒，一半的葱姜，煮 10 分钟去掉血腥，（可选）把焯的过程中出现的血沫子可以用勺子盛出来
另起一锅冷水，放入切好的白萝卜，放入一半的冰糖，等水开后煮 5 分钟去掉白萝卜的辣味
盛出来焯好的羊排，放入高压锅中，加水没过所有食材后再增加大约 300ml 的水
将剩余的葱姜料酒，花椒，冰糖，白芷（可选），盐放入锅中，盖锅等待上汽后计时，中火炖大约 15 分钟。
关火，等待高压锅放气完毕，开盖，加入之前焯好的萝卜，调味，加入 3-10g 的食盐或者水，品尝汤的咸淡，
再开火，中火，高压锅上汽再炖 10 分钟，普通锅盖盖再炖 20 分钟
关火，盛盘
steps_en: Peel the radish, cut into 3-5cm large pieces with a hob, set aside
You can ask the seller to cut the lamb chops when you buy them, because it is generally difficult to cut them with a household knife.

Put the mutton in cold water, add half of the cooking wine, half of the green onion and ginger, and cook for 10 minutes to remove the blood. (Optional) Use a spoon to scoop out the blood foam that appears during the blanching process.
In another pot of cold water, add the chopped white radish and half of the rock sugar. After the water boils, cook for 5 minutes to remove the spiciness of the white radish.
Take out the blanched lamb chops and put them into the pressure cooker. Add water to cover all the ingredients and then add about 300ml of water.

Put the remaining onion and ginger cooking wine, Sichuan peppercorns, rock sugar, Angelica dahurica (optional), and salt into the pot, cover the pot and wait for the steam to start, then simmer over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat, wait for the pressure cooker to deflate, open the lid, add the previously blanched radish, season, add 3-10g of salt or water, and taste the saltiness of the soup.
Turn the heat back on to medium heat, put the pressure cooker on steam and simmer for another 10 minutes, and cover the regular pot for another 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat and serve

intro_zh:
带把肘子是陕西大荔的传统名菜，因脚爪形似把柄而得名。成菜肘皮胶粘软糯，肉质酥烂不腻，蘸甜面酱佐葱段食用，咸香醇厚。富含胶原蛋白和优质蛋白质，滋补养颜。制作需去骨、定形、长时间蒸制，对新手有一定挑战，预计整个制作过程约需 3.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1037 大卡
intro_en:
Elbow with handle is a traditional dish of Dali, Shaanxi Province. It is named after its claws are shaped like a handle. The skin of the cooked elbow is sticky and glutinous, and the meat is crispy and not greasy. It is dipped in sweet noodle sauce and served with green onions. It has a salty and mellow aroma. Rich in collagen and high-quality protein, nourishing and nourishing the skin. The production requires bone removal, shaping, and long-term steaming, which is a challenge for novices. The entire production process is expected to take about 3.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1037 kcal
ingredients_zh: 带脚、爪猪前肘: 一个（大约二斤五两 = 1250 克）
红豆腐乳: 1 块 = 10 克
ingredients_en: Pig front elbow with legs and claws
Pig elbow with legs and claws: one (about two pounds and a half = 1250 grams)
steps_zh: 将肘子刮洗干净，肘头朝外、肘把（脚爪）朝里、肘皮朝下放在案板上。
用刀在正中由肘头向肘把沿着腿骨将皮剖开，剔去腿骨两边的肉（三面离肉），底部骨与肉相连，使骨头露出，然后将两节腿骨由中间用刀背（还是用斧头吧）砸断。
肘子放入煮锅煮至七成熟捞出（外观正常，内部淡红色），用干净抹布擦干水，趁热用红酱油涂抹肉皮。
取蒸锅一个，锅底放入八角、桂皮，先将肘把的关节处用手掰断，不伤外皮，再将肘皮朝下装进蒸锅内，装锅时根据肘子体型，将肘把贴住锅边窝着装进锅内，成为圆形。
撒入精盐，用消过毒的干净纱布盖在肉上，再将甜面酱（50 克）、葱（75 克）、红豆腐乳、红酱油、白酱油、姜、蒜等在纱布上抹开，用旺火蒸大约三小时（以蒸烂为准）。
蒸完取出，揭去纱布，扣入盘中，拣去八角，上桌时另带葱段和甜面酱小碟（或将甜面酱抹到肘面上，另带葱段小碟亦可）。
steps_en: Scrape and clean the elbows, and place them on the chopping board with the elbows facing outwards, the handles (paws) of the elbows facing in, and the skins of the elbows facing down.

Use a knife to cut open the skin along the leg bone in the middle from elbow to elbow, remove the meat on both sides of the leg bone (three sides are separated from the meat), connect the bottom bone to the meat to expose the bones, and then break the two leg bones from the middle with the back of the knife (or use an axe).

Put the elbow into a pot and cook until it is seven-cooked. Take it out (the appearance is normal, the inside is light red), dry the water with a clean rag, and smear the skin with red soy sauce while it is hot.

Take a steamer, put star anise and cinnamon in the bottom of the pot, break off the joints of the elbow handles with your hands without damaging the outer skin, and then put the elbow skin down into the steamer. When loading the pot, according to the shape of the elbow, place the elbow handle against the edge of the pot and put it into the pot into a round shape.

Sprinkle in refined salt, cover the meat with sterilized clean gauze, then spread the sweet noodle sauce (50g), green onions (75g), red bean curd, red soy sauce, white soy sauce, ginger, garlic, etc. on the gauze, and steam over high heat for about three hours (subject to steaming until tender).

After steaming, take it out, remove the gauze, place it on a plate, remove the star anise, and serve with scallions and a small plate of sweet noodle sauce (or spread the sweet noodle sauce on the elbow surface, and also bring a small plate with scallions).

intro_zh:
黄焖鸡是一道以鸡腿、香菇、青椒为主料的家常菜，汤汁浓郁，鸡肉滑嫩，咸鲜微甜，十分下饭。富含优质蛋白质和菌菇多糖等营养。炒糖色环节稍有挑战，但可用老抽替代，整体难度不高，新手也能顺利掌握。从备菜到出锅，大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：766 大卡
intro_en:
Braised chicken is a home-cooked dish with chicken legs, mushrooms, and green peppers as the main ingredients. The soup is rich, the chicken is tender, salty and slightly sweet, and it goes very well with rice. Rich in high-quality protein and mushroom polysaccharides and other nutrients. The process of frying the sugar color is slightly challenging, but it can be replaced by dark soy sauce. The overall difficulty is not high, and novices can master it smoothly. From prep to serving, it takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 766 kcal
ingredients_zh: 香菇（干香菇最佳）= 5 朵
土豆 = 一个（可选，可使汤汁更粘稠）
ingredients_en: Potato = one (optional, can make the soup thicker)
steps_zh: 鸡腿洗净，剁成**4cm**大小的块
生姜切片、干辣椒切成**小圈**
香菇切片，青椒切成细长的**马蹄状**，若为干香菇，洗净灰尘后泡一晚上并留香菇水备用
若有土豆，切为与鸡肉大小类似的**滚刀块**
炒糖色：锅里倒入底油，冷油时放入白糖（**有一定难度，新手可跳至鸡肉炒制并使用老抽替代**）
小火慢慢加热，待油温逐渐升高，白糖开始融化并变成较深的棕色（期间要不断搅拌，防止糊锅）
迅速倒入鸡块，转大火，快速翻炒！烹入料酒，继续翻炒片刻
将生姜片和干辣椒倒入
放入酱油，炒匀
倒入香菇水或清水，以能淹住鸡肉为准
倒入香菇片，白胡椒粉，盐，土豆
翻炒均匀后，盖上锅盖焖煮，转中小火**15——20分钟**，有条件可以转至砂锅
待鸡肉软烂，汤汁浓稠后（汤汁不要收的太干），最后放入青椒
放入味精，兜炒均匀后，关火！青椒基本断生即可，不要炒时间久了
steps_en: Wash the chicken legs and chop into **4cm** size pieces
Slice ginger and dry chili into **small circles**
Slice the mushrooms and cut the green peppers into long and thin **horseshoe shapes**. If they are dried mushrooms, wash the dust and soak them overnight and reserve the mushroom water for later use.
If potatoes are available, cut into **hob pieces** similar to the size of chicken
Fry the sugar color: Pour the base oil into the pot, and when the oil is cold, add the sugar (**it is difficult, novices can skip to frying the chicken and use dark soy sauce instead**)
Heat slowly over low heat until the oil temperature gradually rises and the sugar begins to melt and turn into a darker brown color (keep stirring during this period to prevent the pot from sticking)
Quickly add the chicken pieces, turn up the heat and stir-fry quickly! Add cooking wine and continue to stir-fry for a while
Add ginger slices and dried chili peppers
Add soy sauce and stir well
Pour in mushroom water or water, whichever can cover the chicken
Add mushroom slices, white pepper, salt, and potatoes
After stir-frying evenly, cover the pot and simmer, turn to medium-low heat **15-20 minutes**, if possible, transfer to a casserole
After the chicken is tender and the soup is thickened (don’t make the soup too dry), add the green peppers at the end
Add MSG, stir-fry evenly, then turn off the heat! The green peppers can be basically cut off. Do not fry them for too long.

intro_zh:
这是一道经典的四川自贡盐帮菜，麻辣干香，兔肉紧实有嚼劲，入口先辣后鲜，回味悠长。兔肉高蛋白低脂肪，富含卵磷脂和多种氨基酸，营养丰富且易于消化。制作过程需处理多种香料并严格控制火候，对新手有一定挑战。从备料到炒制完成约需 1.5 小时，但放置一夜后风味更佳，值得提前准备。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：590 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Sichuan Zigong Yanbang dish. It is spicy and dry, and the rabbit meat is firm and chewy. It is spicy at first and then fresh in the mouth, with a long aftertaste. Rabbit meat is high in protein and low in fat, rich in lecithin and various amino acids, rich in nutrients and easy to digest. The production process requires handling a variety of spices and strictly controlling the heat, which is a challenge for novices. It takes about 1.5 hours from preparation to stir-frying, but the flavor is better after it's been left overnight, so it's worth preparing ahead of time.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 590 kcal
ingredients_zh: 盐量 = 兔肉斤数 * 2 克
味精量 = 兔肉斤数 * 1 克
蚝油量 = 兔肉斤数 * 5 克
料酒量 = 兔肉斤数 * 10 克
油量 = 兔肉斤数 * 0.9 ～ 1 升
蒜量 = 兔肉斤数 * 二分之一头蒜
小葱/大葱/洋葱总量 = 兔肉斤数 * 15 克
干辣椒量 = 辣椒段的总体积等于兔肉的总体积
青花椒量 = 3 斤兔肉对应吃饭用的小碗，一整碗花椒
八角量 = 兔肉斤数 * 1 粒
桂皮量 = 兔肉斤数 * 大拇指长短的一块
香叶量 = 兔肉斤数 * 5 片
山奈量 = 兔肉斤数 * 黄豆大小的一块
白蔻量 = 兔肉斤数 * 2 颗
小茴香量 = 兔肉斤数 * 15 克
白芝麻量 = 兔肉斤数 * 25 克
ingredients_en: Amount of salt = pounds of rabbit meat * 2 grams
Amount of MSG = kg of rabbit meat * 1 gram
Amount of oyster sauce = pounds of rabbit meat * 5 grams
Amount of cooking wine = kilograms of rabbit meat * 10 grams
Amount of oil = kg of rabbit meat * 0.9 ~ 1 liter
Amount of garlic = kg of rabbit meat * 1/2 head of garlic
Amount of ginger = amount of garlic
Total amount of shallots/green onions/onions = pounds of rabbit meat * 15 grams
Amount of dried chilies = total volume of chili segments equals total volume of rabbit meat
Amount of green Sichuan peppercorns = 3 pounds of rabbit meat corresponding to a small bowl for eating, a whole bowl of Sichuan peppercorns
Amount of star anise = kg of rabbit meat * 1 piece
Amount of cinnamon = kilograms of rabbit meat * piece of thumb length
Amount of fragrant leaves = number of pounds of rabbit meat * 5 pieces
Amount of kaempferol = kilograms of rabbit meat * soybean-sized piece
Amount of white cardamom = number of kilograms of rabbit meat * 2 pieces
Amount of cumin = pounds of rabbit meat * 15 grams
Amount of white sesame seeds = pounds of rabbit meat * 25 grams
steps_zh: 蒜、姜扒皮并剁碎备用，八角、桂皮、香叶、山奈、白蔻、小茴香洗净备用。
干辣椒剪成 2 厘米的小段，洗净备用。
小葱/大葱/洋葱洗净，洋葱切成小块。
兔肉剁成 2 厘米的小块，加入盐、料酒、味精调味，腌制 15 分钟。
锅中倒油，油温 4 成热下小葱/大葱/洋葱，中小火煸炒出香味，待到小葱/大葱/洋葱微焦，将其捞出。
开大火升高油温，油温 8 成热时下入兔肉，炸制过程转中小火，炸至兔肉微微焦黄时捞出兔肉。
升高油温，倒入干辣椒、青花椒、八角、桂皮、香叶、山奈、白蔻、小茴香；转小火将辣椒段炸脆。
重新倒入兔肉，加入蚝油、翻炒几分钟。
关火，加入蒜、姜、白芝麻，翻炒均匀。
放置一夜更加入味。
steps_en: Peel and chop the garlic and ginger and set aside. Wash the star anise, cinnamon, bay leaves, kaempferol, white cardamom and cumin and set aside.
Cut the dried chilies into 2cm pieces, wash and set aside.
Wash the shallots/green onions/onions and cut the onions into small pieces.
Chop the rabbit meat into 2cm pieces, season with salt, cooking wine and MSG, and marinate for 15 minutes.

Pour oil into the pot, heat the oil to 40%, stir-fry the shallots/green onions/onions over medium-low heat until fragrant, wait until the shallots/green onions/onions are slightly charred, then take them out.

Turn on high heat and increase the oil temperature. When the oil temperature is 80% hot, add the rabbit meat. During the frying process, turn the heat to medium-low and fry until the rabbit meat is slightly browned. Remove the rabbit meat.

Increase the oil temperature, add dried chili peppers, green peppercorns, star anise, cinnamon bark, bay leaves, kaempferol, white cardamom and cumin; turn to low heat and fry the chili sections until crispy.
Add the rabbit meat again, add the oyster sauce and stir-fry for a few minutes.
Turn off the heat, add garlic, ginger, and white sesame seeds, stir-fry evenly.
Leave it overnight for more flavor.

intro_zh:
腌制入味的鸡中翅经高温烘烤，外皮微焦、内里鲜嫩多汁，带有黑胡椒和酱油的咸香。富含优质蛋白质和胶原蛋白。难度适中，新手也能轻松上手，从准备到出炉大约需要 1 小时。还可按喜好添加蜂蜜或五香粉增添风味。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：187 大卡
intro_en:
The marinated chicken wings are roasted at a high temperature. The outside is slightly charred and the inside is tender and juicy, with the salty aroma of black pepper and soy sauce. Rich in high-quality protein and collagen. The difficulty level is moderate, and it can be easily picked up by novices. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to cooking. You can also add honey or allspice to enhance the flavor if you like.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 187 kcal
ingredients_zh: 黑胡椒粉的用量为 1 g/人
ingredients_en: The amount of chicken wings is 3-4 pieces per person
The dosage of salt is 2 g/person
The dosage of black pepper is 1 g/person
The dosage of soy sauce is 3 ml/person
The dosage of cooking wine is 3 ml/person
steps_zh: 鸡翅放入碗中
加盐、黑胡椒粉、酱油、料酒进行腌制 30-40 分钟
将烤箱预热至 200℃
将腌制好的鸡翅均匀地放在烤盘上
将烤盘放入烤箱中层，烤 15-20 分钟
取出烤盘，将鸡翅翻面，再烤 15-20 分钟，直到熟透
steps_en: Put chicken wings in a bowl
Add salt, black pepper, soy sauce and cooking wine and marinate for 30-40 minutes
Preheat oven to 200°C
Place the marinated chicken wings evenly on the baking sheet
Place the baking sheet into the middle rack of the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes
Remove the baking sheet, turn the chicken wings over and bake for another 15-20 minutes, until cooked through

intro_zh:
红烧鸡翅是一道家常下饭菜，咸鲜带甜、色泽红亮，肉质嫩滑易脱骨。鸡翅富含优质蛋白质与胶原蛋白，营养好吸收。制作难度适中，新手按步骤操作也能顺利掌握，从备料到出锅大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1016 大卡
intro_en:
Braised chicken wings is a home-cooked dish. It is salty and sweet, bright red in color, and the meat is tender and easy to fall off the bone. Chicken wings are rich in high-quality protein and collagen, and the nutrients are easy to absorb. The preparation difficulty is moderate, and novices can master it smoothly by following the steps. It takes about 40 minutes from preparing the ingredients to taking it out of the pan.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1016 kcal
ingredients_zh: 新鲜鸡翅（推荐选择鸡翅中，肉质更嫩）
姜片（推荐使用生姜，去腥效果更佳）
葱段（推荐使用大葱白部分，香味更浓郁）
干辣椒（可选，不吃辣可省略）
黄酒或料酒（二选一即可，黄酒风味更醇厚）
胡椒粉（推荐白胡椒粉，辛辣味较淡）
新鲜鸡翅 500g（约 8-10 个，单个鸡翅约 50-60g）
姜片 4-5 片（约 10g，切片厚度约 2mm）
葱段 2-3 段（约 15g，每段长度约 3cm）
干辣椒 2 个（可选，约 5g，不吃辣可省略）
ingredients_en: Fresh chicken wings (it is recommended to choose chicken wings, the meat is more tender)
Ginger slices (it is recommended to use ginger, which has a better effect of removing fishy smell)
Scallions (it is recommended to use the white part of scallions for a richer aroma)
Dried chili pepper (optional, you can omit it if you don’t like spicy food)
Rice wine or cooking wine (choose one of the two, rice wine has a more mellow flavor)
Pepper (white pepper is recommended, less spicy)
500g fresh chicken wings (about 8-10 pieces, a single chicken wing is about 50-60g)
4-5 slices of ginger (about 10g, slice thickness is about 2mm)
2-3 green onion sections (about 15g, each section is about 3cm long)
2 dried chili peppers (optional, about 5g, if you don’t like spicy food, you can omit it)
steps_zh: 将鸡翅洗净。用刀在鸡翅厚处划三刀，背面扎一刀，便于入味。
如果鸡翅不新鲜，可在打完花刀之后用姜水泡 10-20 分钟。
将 10g 姜片（3-4 片）、15g 葱段（2-3 段）备好；3-4 瓣大蒜（约 15g）用刀拍散（无需剁碎）；1 片香叶、1 个八角、2 个干辣椒（可选）整理好备用。
起锅开火，锅中加入清水没过所有鸡翅，冷水下锅放入处理好的鸡翅，加入 20ml 黄酒或料酒、2 片姜片（约 5g），开大火烧至沸腾，沸腾后保持大火继续煮 2-3 分钟，撇去浮沫。
煮好后将鸡翅捞出，用温水清洗 2 遍，彻底去除血沫，控干水分备用。
另起锅，开火烧热后放入 10-15ml 食用油。
待油温至 5 成热，加入 15g 冰糖，开大火将冰糖熬至完全融化，冰糖融化变色后转小火，继续炒至冰糖呈枣红色，立即放入控干水分的鸡翅，快速翻炒 1-2 分钟，使每只鸡翅均匀裹上糖色。
加入准备好的 1 片香叶、1 个八角、2 个干辣椒（可选）、剩下的 2 片姜片（约 5g）、15g 葱段、拍散的大蒜，继续煸炒 30 秒至香料香味完全释放。
沿锅边淋入 15ml 料酒或黄酒，15ml 生抽，快速翻炒 10 秒。
加入温水（水温约 50-60℃），水量以稍微没过所有鸡翅为准。
加入 5ml 老抽、3g 盐、2g 白糖、1g 胡椒粉，用炒勺轻轻搅拌均匀。
盖上锅盖，开中火烧煮 7-8 分钟。
打开锅盖，用筷子将锅中的香叶、八角、姜片、葱段、大蒜捡出丢弃。
转大火，保持不断翻炒，将汤汁烧至粘稠状态（约 1-2 分钟）。
关火，将鸡翅盛入盘中，淋上锅中剩余的粘稠汤汁。
最后撒上 3g 白芝麻和 5g 小葱花，完成制作。
steps_en: Wash the chicken wings. Use a knife to make three cuts in the thick part of the chicken wings and prick the back once to facilitate the flavoring.
If the chicken wings are not fresh, soak them in ginger water for 10-20 minutes after cutting.

Prepare 10g ginger slices (3-4 slices) and 15g green onion segments (2-3 segments); break up 3-4 cloves of garlic (about 15g) with a knife (no need to chop); prepare 1 bay leaf, 1 star anise, and 2 dried chili peppers (optional) for later use.

Turn on the pot and add water to cover all the chicken wings. Add cold water to the pot and add the processed chicken wings. Add 20ml rice wine or cooking wine and 2 slices of ginger (about 5g). Turn up the heat and bring to a boil. After boiling, keep the heat on and continue to cook for 2-3 minutes. Skim off the foam.
After cooking, take out the chicken wings, wash them twice with warm water, thoroughly remove the blood foam, drain them and set aside.
Take another pot, heat it up and add 10-15ml cooking oil.

When the oil temperature reaches 50%, add 15g of rock sugar. Turn up the heat and simmer the rock sugar until it is completely melted. After the rock sugar melts and changes color, turn to low heat and continue to fry until the rock sugar turns maroon. Immediately add the chicken wings that have been dried and stir-fry quickly for 1-2 minutes, so that each chicken wing is evenly coated in sugar color.

Add the prepared 1 bay leaf, 1 star anise, 2 dried chili peppers (optional), the remaining 2 ginger slices (about 5g), 15g scallions, and chopped garlic, and continue to stir-fry for 30 seconds until the aroma of the spices is completely released.
Pour 15ml cooking wine or rice wine and 15ml light soy sauce along the edge of the pot and stir-fry quickly for 10 seconds.
Add warm water (water temperature is about 50-60℃), enough water to slightly cover all the chicken wings.
Add 5ml dark soy sauce, 3g salt, 2g sugar, 1g pepper, and stir gently with a frying spoon.
Cover the pot and cook over medium heat for 7-8 minutes.
Open the lid of the pot, use chopsticks to pick out the bay leaves, star anise, ginger slices, green onions and garlic in the pot and discard them.
Turn up the heat and stir-fry constantly until the soup becomes thick (about 1-2 minutes).
Turn off the heat, transfer the chicken wings to a plate, and pour over the remaining thick soup in the pot.
Finally, sprinkle with 3g white sesame seeds and 5g chopped green onion to complete the preparation.

intro_zh:
椒盐排条是上海本帮菜里的经典家常菜，外酥里嫩，咸香适口。猪大排提供优质蛋白质和必需氨基酸，能补充体力。这道菜虽然步骤稍多，但跟着流程走并不难，新手也可以大胆尝试。从备料到出锅，大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1290 大卡
intro_en:
Salt and pepper ribs are a classic home-cooked dish in Shanghai local cuisine. They are crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with a delicious salty aroma. Pork chops provide high-quality protein and essential amino acids, which can replenish physical strength. Although this dish has a few steps, it is not difficult to follow the process, and novices can also try it boldly. From preparation to serving, it takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1290 kcal
ingredients_zh: 吉士粉（增色增香，没有可以不放）
大排 4 块（大约 360 克）
吉士粉 2-3 g（增色增香，没有可以不放）
ingredients_en: Custard powder (to add color and flavor, you can omit it if you don’t have it)
Green onion and ginger water 100 ml
2-3 g custard powder (to add color and flavor, you can omit it if you don’t have it)
steps_zh: 大排洗干净，剔骨，用刀面拍松，切成厚片，再改成粗条。
加入椒盐粉，搅匀，待到出胶质了**分次**加入葱姜水，放入冰箱腌制 20 分钟。
制作炸糊。放入 80 g 面粉，20 g 淀粉（注意是 20 g 淀粉，剩下 60 g 备用），2 - 3 g 吉士粉，盐 1 g。
打入一个鸡蛋，搅拌，再分次加入水 100 g ，再加 10 g 油，反复搅拌。直到炸糊完全调开，略粘稠即可。
取出剩余的 60 g 淀粉，取出排条，裹上一层淀粉，再裹上面糊。
锅中加入油，能没过食材即可，加热到大约 150 ℃ - 160 ℃ 。下入排条炸成浅金黄色后捞出。刚下入排条时可能会有粘连，不要动。待排条定型后可用筷子翻动，即可分开。
待油温再次升高到 150 ℃ - 160 ℃ 时，下入排条复炸至金黄色后捞出。
撒上椒盐粉，搅拌均匀后出锅。
steps_en: Wash the large ribs, remove the bones, fluff them with a knife, cut into thick slices, and then cut into thick strips.
Add pepper and salt powder, mix well, wait until it becomes gelatin, add onion and ginger water in batches, and marinate in the refrigerator for 20 minutes.
Make fried batter. Add 80 g of flour, 20 g of starch (note that it is 20 g of starch, leaving 60 g for later use), 2 - 3 g of custard powder, and 1 g of salt.
Crack in an egg, stir, add 100 g of water one at a time, add 10 g of oil, and stir repeatedly. Cook until the fried batter is completely mixed and slightly thick.
Take out the remaining 60 g of starch, take out the strips, cover them with a layer of starch, and then cover them with batter.

Add oil to the pot, just enough to cover the ingredients, and heat to about 150 ℃ - 160 ℃. Add the strips and fry until light golden brown, then take them out. There may be adhesion when the strips are first inserted, so do not move them. After the strips are set, you can flip them with chopsticks and separate them.
When the oil temperature rises to 150 ℃ - 160 ℃ again, add the strips and fry again until golden brown, then take them out.
Sprinkle with pepper and salt powder, stir evenly and remove from the pan.

intro_zh:
咕噜肉是一道经典粤式家常菜，酸甜开胃、外酥里嫩，菠萝的果香让肉块吃起来格外清爽解腻。猪肉提供优质蛋白质，青椒和菠萝则补充维生素与膳食纤维。这道菜的难点在于掌握炸肉的火候，对新手略有挑战，但只要按步骤操作便能成功。从腌制到出锅，全程大约需要 40 分钟，很适合为家人做一道下饭快菜。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：673 大卡
intro_en:
Sweet and sour pork is a classic Cantonese home-cooked dish. It is sweet and sour, crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. The fruity aroma of pineapple makes the meat taste particularly refreshing and relieves greasiness. Pork provides high-quality protein, while green peppers and pineapples supplement vitamins and dietary fiber. The difficulty of this dish is to control the heat of the fried meat, which is a bit challenging for novices, but as long as you follow the steps, you can succeed. From marinating to serving, the whole process takes about 40 minutes, making it a perfect dish for the family as a quick meal.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 673 kcal
steps_zh: 将梅头猪肉（100 克）洗净，然后用厨房纸抹干水份，将猪肉切成比想要的成品小一圈的大小。
用盐（1/2 茶匙）腌制梅头猪肉 20 分钟。
将青椒（25 克）切碎。
将菠萝片（75 克）切件。
在碗中加入茄汁（4 汤匙）﹑白醋（2 茶匙）﹑蒜蓉（1 汤匙）﹑生抽（½ 茶匙）﹑生粉（2½ 茶匙）﹑白砂糖（2 汤匙）﹑盐（¼ 茶匙）和水（200 毫升），拌匀成酱汁。
将梅头猪肉粒沾上生粉（6 汤匙）。
加入油（500 毫升）中火加热。
将梅头猪肉粒放至锅里中火炸 5 分钟，然后盛起。
加入梅头猪肉粒，再大火翻炸 1 分钟。
加入油（1 茶匙）和酱汁，中火加热 3 分钟。
加入青椒和菠萝，大火加热 2 分钟。
将已炸好的梅头猪肉粒与酱汁拌匀即可。
steps_en: Wash the plum pork (100g), pat dry with kitchen paper, and cut the pork into pieces smaller than the desired finished product.
Marinate plum pork with salt (1/2 teaspoon) for 20 minutes.
Finely chop green peppers (25 g).
Cut pineapple slices (75 g) into pieces.

Add tomato juice (4 tbsp), white vinegar (2 tsp), minced garlic (1 tbsp), light soy sauce (½ tsp), cornstarch (2½ tsp), sugar (2 tbsp), salt (¼ tsp) and water (200 ml) in a bowl and mix well to form a sauce.
Dip the plum pork cubes in cornstarch (6 tablespoons).
Add oil (500 ml) and heat over medium heat.
Place the plum pork cubes into the pot and fry over medium heat for 5 minutes, then remove.
Add the plum pork cubes and fry over high heat for 1 minute.
Add oil (1 teaspoon) and sauce and cook over medium heat for 3 minutes.
Add bell pepper and pineapple and cook over high heat for 2 minutes.
Mix the fried plum pork cubes with the sauce evenly.

name_en: Braised Vermicelli with Cabbage and Pork
intro_zh:
猪肉白菜炖粉条是东北地区经典的家常炖菜，汤汁浓郁咸鲜，五花肉软烂、粉条吸饱肉香后滑韧入味，白菜清甜解腻。整道菜荤素搭配均衡，能提供蛋白质、维生素和碳水化合物，营养饱腹。制作过程需要一些耐心，特别是粉条处理和炖煮火候，对新手有一定挑战，但按步骤操作不易失败，从头到尾大约需要 45 分钟即可上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1880 大卡
intro_en:
Stewed vermicelli with pork and cabbage is a classic home-cooked stew in the Northeast.
