The soup is rich and salty, the pork belly is soft and rotten, the vermicelli is smooth and tasty after absorbing the aroma of the meat, and the cabbage is sweet and soothing. The whole dish has a balanced mix of meat and vegetables, which can provide protein, vitamins and carbohydrates, making it nutritious and filling. The production process requires some patience, especially the handling of vermicelli and the simmering temperature, which is a certain challenge for novices, but it is not easy to fail if you follow the steps. It takes about 45 minutes to serve from beginning to end.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1880 kcal
steps_zh: 锅内烧水，水开后放入干粉条，煮 5 分钟后同水一起倒出容器中，盖上盖子继续浸泡泡 备用（第一步先做这个，期间可以进行以下步骤）
五花肉切 3mm 的肉片，备用
大白菜嫩叶与白菜帮子分开切成 2 份菜片，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
放入五花肉，保持翻炒至肉变色
加入老抽，炒 **1 分钟**，给肉上色
加入白菜帮子，加入食用盐、生抽，炒一分钟（如果粘锅，烹入 10ml 水）
加水没过所有食材，加入鸡精 ，十三香，沸腾后，将火调小然后**等待 20 分钟**
粉条滤水切成小段放入碗中 备用
加入白菜嫩叶，炒匀后将粉条放在菜上方，加盖再煮 **5 分钟**
尝味、关火，收汁
steps_en: Boil water in a pot, add dry vermicelli after the water boils, cook for 5 minutes, then pour it out into the container with the water, cover with the lid and continue soaking for later use (do this first, during which you can perform the following steps)
Cut the pork belly into 3mm slices and set aside
Separately cut the young Chinese cabbage leaves and cabbage stalks into 2 pieces and set aside.
Heat a pan and put 10ml - 15ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Add the pork belly and stir-fry until the meat changes color
Add dark soy sauce and fry for **1 minute** to color the meat
Add cabbage buns, salt and light soy sauce, stir-fry for one minute (if it sticks to the pan, add 10ml of water)
Add water to cover all ingredients, add chicken essence and thirteen incense, after boiling, turn down the heat and **wait 20 minutes**
Drain vermicelli, cut into small pieces and put in a bowl. Set aside.
Add the young cabbage leaves, stir-fry well and place the vermicelli on top of the vegetables, cover and cook for **5 minutes**
Taste, turn off the heat and collect the juice

intro_zh:
鱼香肉丝是一道经典川菜，口味酸甜微辣，肉丝滑嫩，配以胡萝卜、青椒和木耳，口感丰富。富含蛋白质和多种维生素，荤素搭配，营养均衡。制作有一定难度，需要调好鱼香汁并掌握翻炒火候，新手建议严格按步骤操作。预计制作时长约 40 分钟（不含木耳泡发时间）。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：421 大卡
intro_en:
Fish-flavored shredded pork is a classic Sichuan dish with a sweet and sour taste, smooth and tender pork, and rich taste with carrots, green peppers and fungus. It is rich in protein and multiple vitamins, with a combination of meat and vegetables, and balanced nutrition. It is somewhat difficult to make, as you need to adjust the fish sauce and master the stir-fry temperature. Novices are advised to strictly follow the steps. The estimated preparation time is about 40 minutes (excluding fungus soaking time).
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 421 kcal
steps_zh: 制作`腌料`：将下列原料混合：
制作`香汁`：将下列原料混合：
用`腌料`腌制里脊肉 15-30 分钟。注意将肉抓匀。
干木耳泡 4 个小时，洗净，切成小块。
青椒洗净，去蒂，切成丝。
胡萝卜洗净，切成丝，将胡萝卜丝[焯水](../../tips/learn/学习焯水.md)。
姜、蒜切沫。
葱切成 5mm 的小段。
将锅烧热，加入 15ml 油。
向锅内倒入准备好的腌肉，快速滑散至变白，盛出备用。
将锅烧热，加入 5ml 油。
倒入全部`葱`、`姜`、`蒜`、`豆瓣酱`。
倒入全部`胡萝卜`，翻炒 20s 后，放入青椒和木耳，翻炒 2 分钟。
倒入`炒过的肉`。快速翻炒均匀。注意不要炒超过 20 秒。
倒入`香汁`。快速翻炒均匀。注意不要炒超过 15 秒。
关火，盛盘。
steps_en: To make the `marinade`: combine the following ingredients:
To make the `sauce`: combine the following ingredients:
Marinate the tenderloin with the marinade for 15-30 minutes. Pay attention to grasp the meat evenly.
Soak the dried fungus for 4 hours, wash and cut into small pieces.
Wash the green peppers, remove the stems and cut into shreds.
Wash the carrots, cut into shreds, and [blanch the carrot shreds](../../tips/learn/learnblanch.md).
Mince ginger and garlic.
Cut green onions into 5mm pieces.
Heat the pan and add 15ml of oil.
Pour the prepared marinated meat into the pot, quickly spread it until it turns white, and set aside.
Heat the pan and add 5ml of oil.
Pour in all the green onions, ginger, garlic, and bean paste.
Pour in all the carrots, stir-fry for 20 seconds, then add green pepper and fungus, stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Pour in the `fried meat`. Quickly stir-fry evenly. Be careful not to fry for more than 20 seconds.
Pour in the `fragrance`. Quickly stir-fry evenly. Be careful not to fry for more than 15 seconds.
Turn off the heat and serve.

intro_zh:
这是一道清爽脆嫩的家常快手菜，咸鲜适口，带有蒜香与微辣。富含蛋白质和多种维生素，有助于清热补水。对新手比较友好，只要注意火候就能成功，预计制作时长约 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：550 大卡
intro_en:
This is a refreshing, crisp and tender home-cooked dish, salty and delicious, with garlic flavor and slight spiciness. Rich in protein and multivitamins, it helps clear away heat and replenishes moisture. It's friendly to novices, as long as you pay attention to the heat, you can succeed. It is expected to take about 25 minutes to make.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 550 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小米辣 = 1  根  * 份数
ingredients_en: Spicy millet = 1 stick * number of servings
steps_zh: 将猪瘦肉切片，放入碗中，倒入食用油 10 克，生抽，搅拌均匀，腌制 10 分钟
将黄瓜切去 5 厘米的头尾，剩余部分斜着切成 0.5 厘米的薄片
将黄瓜倒入碗中，撒上盐 8 克，搅拌均匀，腌制 5 分钟
将蒜瓣去皮，压扁，切成蒜末备用
将小米辣去丁切分成均匀 0.5 厘米的段状
热锅，倒油 40 克，等油温到冒烟，放入蒜蓉小米辣翻炒 5 次
放入腌制好的猪瘦肉，翻炒至肉熟变色
放入黄瓜，加入盐 2 克，大火翻炒均匀半分钟，出锅
steps_en: Slice the lean pork, put it into a bowl, pour in 10 grams of cooking oil and light soy sauce, stir evenly, and marinate for 10 minutes
Cut off 5 cm of the head and tail of the cucumber, and cut the remaining part diagonally into 0.5 cm slices
Pour the cucumber into a bowl, sprinkle with 8 grams of salt, stir well, and marinate for 5 minutes
Peel the garlic cloves, flatten them, and cut them into minced garlic.
Dice the millet and cut into even 0.5 cm segments.
Heat the pan, pour 40 grams of oil, wait until the oil is hot enough to smoke, add minced garlic and millet and stir-fry 5 times
Add the marinated lean pork and stir-fry until the meat is cooked and changes color.
Add cucumber, add 2 grams of salt, stir-fry over high heat for half a minute, and remove from the pan

intro_zh:
香干肉丝是一道咸香下饭的家常小炒，肉丝嫩滑，香干柔韧，青椒爽脆。富含动物性与植物性双重蛋白质，搭配青椒补充维生素。难度适中，新手稍加练习即可掌握，预计制作时长约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：472 大卡
intro_en:
The fragrant dried shredded pork is a home-style stir-fry that goes well with rice. The shredded pork is tender, the fragrant dried pork is pliable, and the green pepper is crispy. It is rich in animal and plant protein, and paired with green peppers to supplement vitamins. The difficulty is moderate and beginners can master it with a little practice. The estimated production time is about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 472 kcal
ingredients_zh: 猪里脊（可以买超市切好且称重好的肉丝）
青椒的数量 = 份数 * 5 个
大蒜 = 份数 * 5g（大约 3 个蒜瓣）
ingredients_en: Pork tenderloin (you can buy chopped and weighed pork from the supermarket)
Quantity of green peppers = number of servings * 5
Amount of meat = number of portions * 100g
Light soy sauce = number of servings * 5ml
steps_zh: `肉丝`（没有肉丝，自己切）用生抽(3ml)，生粉混合均匀待用。
将`青椒`洗净，再用`滚刀手法`切好备用。
`大蒜`横切成片，`香干`切丝。
`淀粉`与水(10ml)混合，搅拌均匀。
干净锅 15ml 油，不用等油热就倒入肉丝慢慢划散，肉丝熟了，立马捞出，留油到锅里。
将蒜片和香干放入锅中，加入 2ml 生抽，翻炒均匀。
2-3 分钟，看火大小，将青椒丝放入锅中混合，翻炒。
1 分钟后，放入肉丝混合。
倒入淀粉与水的混合物勾芡，加入盐 3g，鸡精 2g，翻炒 2-3 分钟出锅。
成品。
steps_en: `Shredded pork` (If you don’t have shredded pork, cut it yourself) use light soy sauce (3ml) and cornstarch, mix well and set aside.
Wash the `green peppers` and cut them using the `hob technique` and set aside.
Slice the garlic crosswise and shred the dried fragrant garlic into shreds.
Mix `starch` with water (10ml) and stir evenly.

Clean the pot and add 15ml of oil. Do not wait for the oil to heat up. Pour in the shredded pork and slowly break it up. When the shredded pork is cooked, take it out immediately and leave the oil in the pot.
Put the garlic slices and dried coriander into the pot, add 2ml of light soy sauce, and stir-fry evenly.
2-3 minutes, depending on the heat, add shredded green peppers to the pot, mix and stir-fry.
After 1 minute, add shredded pork and mix.
Pour in a mixture of starch and water to thicken, add 3g of salt and 2g of chicken essence, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes and remove from the pan.
Finished product.

intro_zh:
意式烤鸡是一道带有地中海风味的家常烤箱菜。鸡腿肉经过蒜香橄榄油腌制，烤后外皮微焦、内里鲜嫩多汁，搭配柠檬汁和欧芹，口感清爽不腻。鸡肉富含优质蛋白质，橄榄油提供不饱和脂肪酸，营养均衡。制作难度适中，需要提前预热烤箱，新手跟着步骤也能顺利完成，从腌制到出炉总计约五十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：315 大卡
intro_en:
Rotisserie Chicken is a home-cooked oven dish with a Mediterranean twist. The chicken thighs are marinated in garlic olive oil, grilled and slightly charred on the outside, tender and juicy on the inside. Served with lemon juice and parsley, the taste is refreshing and not greasy. Chicken is rich in high-quality protein, and olive oil provides unsaturated fatty acids, which is nutritionally balanced. The difficulty of making it is moderate, and the oven needs to be preheated in advance. Novices can also complete it smoothly by following the steps. It takes about fifty minutes in total from marinating to taking out the oven.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 315 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡腿肉用量通常来说为 1-2 个/人
ingredients_en: The amount of chicken thigh meat is usually 1-2 pieces per person
The dosage of black pepper is 0.5 g/person
The dosage of olive oil is 5 ml/person
The dosage of garlic is 1 clove/person
The dosage of lemon juice is 5ml/person
The amount of parsley is 1 stick/person
steps_zh: 鸡腿肉涂上盐、黑胡椒、橄榄油和蒜末
放入预热至 180 度的烤箱中，烤 30-40 分钟或至熟
欧芹切成碎末备用
柠檬挤出汁备用
烤好的鸡肉取出，淋上柠檬汁
撒上欧芹碎即可
steps_en: Coat chicken thighs with salt, black pepper, olive oil and minced garlic
Place in an oven preheated to 180 degrees and bake for 30-40 minutes or until cooked
Chop parsley into fine pieces and set aside
Squeeze the lemon juice and set aside
Take out the grilled chicken and pour lemon juice on it
Sprinkle with chopped parsley

intro_zh:
辣椒炒肉是一道湘味浓郁的家常菜，辣椒干香微焦，肉片滑嫩入味，咸鲜微辣十分下饭。猪肉富含优质蛋白质和 B 族维生素，青椒则提供丰富的维生素 C。这道菜需要掌握干煸和快炒的火候，适合有一定烹饪基础的朋友尝试。从备料到出锅，大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：425 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried Pork with Chili Peppers is a home-cooked dish with a strong Hunan flavor. The dried chili peppers are slightly burnt, the meat slices are tender and flavorful, and the salty, slightly spicy flavor goes well with rice. Pork is rich in high-quality protein and B vitamins, while green peppers provide a rich source of vitamin C. This dish requires mastering the heat of dry stir-frying and quick stir-frying, so it is suitable for friends with a certain cooking foundation to try. From preparation to serving, it takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 425 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青椒（吃辣的话推荐用杭椒，螺丝椒，不吃辣的用尖椒，甜椒）
青椒的数量 = 份数 * 3 个。
ingredients_en: Green peppers (if you like spicy food, we recommend hanging peppers and screw peppers; if you don’t like spicy food, use sharp peppers and sweet peppers)
Number of green peppers = number of servings * 3 pieces.
Amount of meat = number of servings * 200g.
Light soy sauce = number of servings * 3ml.
steps_zh: 将`青椒`洗净，去除`青椒把`以及`青椒籽`，再用`滚刀手法`切好备用。
`大蒜`用刀拍一下，再横切成`蒜瓣`，`生姜`切碎成`姜末`。
将`猪瘦肉`切成`肉片`（顺着猪肉的纹理切，即刀和肉的纹理呈水平线，出来的肉片，纹路呈“川”字）。
将切好的`猪肉`洗净，放入空碗，再加入计算好的`生抽`、`蚝油`、`盐`搅拌均匀，腌制 10 分钟。
热锅，不用倒油，把`切好的青椒`放入锅中，大火干煸至虎皮状后，再加 2g`盐`继续翻炒 1 分钟 后捞起。
不用洗锅，大火热锅，加入份数 * 8ml`油`，等待 30s，加入`蒜瓣`、`姜末`翻炒 15s。
加入腌制好的`猪肉`倒入锅内翻炒 2 分钟，再加入干煸过的`青椒`翻炒 1 分钟。
根据个人口味喜好加入`豆豉`，最后加入`酱油`，继续翻炒 30s。
出锅，盛盘。
steps_en: Wash the `green peppers`, remove the `green pepper handles` and `green pepper seeds`, and then use the `hob technique` to cut them and set aside.
Clap the garlic with a knife, cut it into garlic cloves, and chop the ginger into minced ginger.

Cut the lean pork into slices (cut along the grain of the pork, that is, the knife and the grain of the meat form a horizontal line, and the texture of the sliced meat will look like the word "Chuan").
Wash the cut pork, put it into an empty bowl, then add the calculated light soy sauce, oyster sauce, and salt, stir evenly, and marinate for 10 minutes.

Heat the pot without pouring oil. Add the chopped green peppers into the pot and stir-fry over high heat until they become like tiger skin. Add 2g of salt and continue to stir-fry for 1 minute before removing.
No need to wash the pot, heat the pot over high heat, add portion * 8ml `oil`, wait 30s, add `garlic cloves` and `minced ginger` and stir-fry for 15s.
Add the marinated pork into the pot and stir-fry for 2 minutes, then add the stir-fried green pepper and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add tempeh according to personal taste preference, finally add soy sauce, and continue to stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Remove from pan and serve.

intro_zh:
这款意式风味酱料香浓可口，蔬菜与牛肉的搭配带来丰富口感。它富含蛋白质和多种维生素，营养均衡。制作过程稍有繁琐，需要一些烹饪基础，例如炒出颗粒感的牛肉和控火慢煮。从备料到完成约需一小时，一次可多做一些冷冻保存，随取随用十分方便。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1955 大卡
intro_en:
This Italian-style sauce is rich and delicious, and the combination of vegetables and beef brings a rich taste. It is rich in protein and multiple vitamins and has balanced nutrition. The production process is a little tedious and requires some cooking basics, such as stir-frying grainy beef and slow cooking under controlled heat. It takes about an hour from preparation to completion. You can make more batches at a time and freeze them for storage. It is very convenient to take and use at any time.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1955 kcal
steps_zh: 将胡萝卜、芹菜、洋葱切碎，蒜瓣切片。
加入 10ml 橄榄油，热油下锅蔬菜，大火翻炒开始略微变色后盛出。
锅内加油 10ml，加蒜翻炒 10 秒，加入碎牛肉、糖、盐、胡椒粉和香料将牛肉炒脆（有颗粒感）。
加入炒好的蔬菜们和番茄酱继续翻炒，搅拌均匀。
分多次缓缓倒入牛奶，中小火煮 30 分钟，完成。
steps_en: Chop carrots, celery, onions, and slice garlic cloves.
Add 10ml of olive oil, heat the vegetables and stir-fry over high heat until they begin to change color slightly, then remove.
Add 10ml of oil to the pot, add garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds. Add ground beef, sugar, salt, pepper and spices and stir-fry the beef until crispy (grainy).
Add the fried vegetables and tomato paste and continue to stir-fry, stirring evenly.
Slowly pour in the milk in batches and cook over medium-low heat for 30 minutes until done.

intro_zh:
蚂蚁上树是一道经典的川味家常菜，咸香微辣，粉丝软滑吸汁，肉末细嫩鲜香。以红薯粉丝和肉末为主料，富含碳水化合物与蛋白质，能快速补充能量。制作难度中等，步骤清晰，对新手比较友好，全程约需 20 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：791 大卡
intro_en:
Ants climbing a tree is a classic Sichuan home-cooked dish, salty and slightly spicy, the vermicelli is soft and juicy, and the minced meat is tender and fragrant. Using sweet potato vermicelli and minced meat as the main ingredients, it is rich in carbohydrates and protein and can quickly replenish energy. The production difficulty is medium, the steps are clear, and it is friendly to novices. The whole process takes about 20 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 791 kcal
steps_zh: 红薯粉丝提前泡软，泡水时间为 20 分钟，备用
将蒜、姜分别剁碎，备用
锅烧热，加入 10ml 食用油，加入蒜末、姜末炒香
加入猪肉末翻炒至**肉色发白且微微出油**
加入郫县豆瓣酱，炒至**红油析出**
加入生抽和老抽，翻炒均匀
倒入 300ml 清水，煮沸
放入泡软沥干的粉丝，用筷子轻轻拨动防止粘连
中小火煮约 5 分钟，直至粉丝**完全吸收汤汁**、呈现微微收干状态
依据口味可撒入小葱末，关火装盘
steps_en: Soak the sweet potato vermicelli in advance until soft. Soak in water for 20 minutes. Set aside.
Chop garlic and ginger separately and set aside
Heat the pot, add 10ml cooking oil, add minced garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant
Add minced pork and stir-fry until **the meat turns white and is slightly oily**
Add Pixian bean paste and stir-fry until **red oil precipitates**
Add light soy sauce and dark soy sauce, stir-fry evenly
Pour 300ml water and bring to boil
Add the soaked and drained vermicelli and stir gently with chopsticks to prevent sticking.
Cook over medium-low heat for about 5 minutes, until the vermicelli** completely absorbs the soup** and becomes slightly dry.
Sprinkle in chopped green onions according to taste, turn off the heat and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
小酥肉外酥里嫩，咸香中带着花椒的微麻，是川渝地区家家户户都会做的家常炸物。猪肉富含蛋白质和脂肪，油炸后热量较高，适合偶尔解馋。这道菜步骤稍多，需掌握初炸定型与复炸上色的火候，对新手略有挑战，预计从头到尾约 1 小时 30 分钟完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1939 大卡
intro_en:
The short crispy pork is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with a salty aroma and a slight numbness from Sichuan peppercorns. It is a homely fried dish that every household in Sichuan and Chongqing makes. Pork is rich in protein and fat. It has high calories after frying and is suitable for occasional cravings. This dish has a few steps and requires mastering the heat of initial frying and re-frying for coloring. It is a bit challenging for novices. It is expected to be completed in about 1 hour and 30 minutes from start to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1939 kcal
ingredients_zh: 去皮猪肉（根据喜好选择肥瘦）
ingredients_en: Skinless pork (choose fat or thin according to preference)
steps_zh: 老姜切丝,小葱不用切。
根据计算公式倒入料酒、清水。
用手捏揉 5 分钟，使姜葱的味道充分溶解在水中。
将猪肉去皮洗净
切成长度 8~10 厘米，厚度 1.5 厘米的肉条。
根据上面的计算公式加入盐，十三香、胡椒粉、味精、鸡精、花椒碎、花椒粒、生抽。
倒入前面制作好的葱姜水
抓匀并且充分揉制 10 分钟，直至肉吸收所有水分并且变得粘手。
封上保鲜膜放冷藏室静置 30 分钟。
将面粉、红薯粉倒入腌制好的肉中，加入鸡蛋清。
充分揉制 15 分钟。
锅中倒入植物油，根据锅大小控制油量，油面高度 3 厘米以上。
大火将温加热至 150° 后，转小火保持温度。
将裹好粉的肉条用筷子夹入油锅中，捋成自己喜欢的形状，炸 3~5 分钟定型。目测颜色微黄，用锅铲翻动感受倒略微有些硬了就可以。具体时间受肉块大小、油温、裹粉程度影响。
捞出沥油。
将油温升至 180° 放入初炸好的肉条，炸至金黄色即可捞出。
steps_en: Cut the old ginger into shreds, but don’t cut the green onions.
Pour cooking wine and water according to the calculation formula.
Knead with your hands for 5 minutes to fully dissolve the flavor of ginger and green onion in the water.
Peel and wash the pork
Cut into strips of meat 8 to 10 cm in length and 1.5 cm in thickness.
Add salt, thirteen spices, pepper, MSG, chicken essence, crushed Sichuan peppercorns, Sichuan peppercorns, and light soy sauce according to the calculation formula above.
Pour in the onion and ginger water prepared earlier
Grasp and knead well for 10 minutes until the meat absorbs all the water and becomes sticky.
Cover with plastic wrap and let rest in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
Pour the flour and sweet potato starch into the marinated meat, and add the egg white.
Knead well for 15 minutes.
Pour vegetable oil into the pot, control the amount of oil according to the size of the pot, and keep the oil level above 3 cm.
After the heat reaches 150°, turn to low heat to maintain the temperature.

Put the flour-coated meat strips into the oil pan with chopsticks, shape them into your favorite shape, and fry for 3 to 5 minutes to set. Visually, the color is slightly yellow, and you can flip it with a spatula and feel it is slightly hard. The specific time is affected by the size of the meat pieces, oil temperature, and breading degree.
Remove and drain.
Increase the oil temperature to 180°, add the fried meat strips, fry until golden brown and take them out.

intro_zh:
过油肉是山西传统名菜，肉片滑嫩、蒜苔爽脆，咸鲜微酸，带着陈醋的醇香，属于典型的地方家常风味。猪里脊提供优质蛋白，搭配木耳、蒜苔和葱头，营养均衡。这道菜对火候和上浆技巧有一定要求，更适合有一定下厨基础的爱好者尝试。从备料到出锅，大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：679 大卡
intro_en:
Oily pork is a traditional dish in Shanxi. The meat slices are smooth and tender, the garlic coating is crispy, salty and slightly sour, and has the mellow aroma of mature vinegar. It is a typical local home-cooked flavor. Pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein, and is paired with fungus, garlic and onions for a balanced nutritional profile. This dish has certain requirements for heat and sizing skills, and is more suitable for enthusiasts with a certain cooking foundation to try. From preparation to serving, it takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 679 kcal
steps_zh: 木耳提前泡发好，如果着急可以用热水泡发。
猪里脊切片放入碗中，加 20ml 生抽、料酒、花椒粉，打入一个鸡蛋，拿自己的小手搅拌均匀，加入淀粉（建议红薯淀粉）拌匀，倒入 300ml 食用油封浆，腌制 15 分钟。
蒜苔切段大约 3cm，葱头切菱形块备用。
起锅烧油油要多一点，油温五成热，下入腌制好的肉片，将肉片打散，捞出控油备用。
将锅中多余油倒出，留 10ml 油炒菜，油温七成热
下入葱姜蒜爆香，先下蒜苔炒至断生，再下入木耳葱头，加入生抽，花椒粉，翻炒几下将之前炸好的肉片下入翻炒
加 10g 的盐，起锅前加 10ml 的醋和鸡精，起锅装盘。
steps_en: Soak the fungus in advance. If you are in a hurry, you can soak it in hot water.

Slice the pork tenderloin into a bowl, add 20ml of light soy sauce, cooking wine, and Sichuan peppercorn powder, beat in an egg, stir evenly with your hands, add starch (sweet potato starch is recommended), mix well, pour in 300ml of edible oil seal slurry, and marinate for 15 minutes.
Cut the garlic into approximately 3cm pieces and cut the onions into diamond-shaped pieces and set aside.
Heat a little more oil in the pan, the oil temperature should be 50% hot, add the marinated meat slices, break up the meat slices, remove and control the oil and set aside.
Pour out the excess oil in the pot, leaving 10ml of oil for cooking. The oil temperature is 70% hot.

Add the onion, ginger and garlic and saute until fragrant. Add the garlic and fry until raw. Then add the fungus and onion. Add light soy sauce and pepper powder. Stir-fry for a few times. Add in the previously fried meat slices and stir-fry.
Add 10g of salt, 10ml of vinegar and chicken essence before serving, remove from the pan and serve on a plate.

name_en: Steamed white eel with black bean sauce
intro_zh:
豉汁蒸白鱔是一道粤式经典蒸菜，豆豉蒜蓉的酱香渗透进鱼肉，口感嫩滑鲜美。白鱔富含优质蛋白和多种不饱和脂肪酸，对身体有滋补作用。操作步骤清晰，但处理生鱼和掌握火候稍有挑战，适合有一定基础的厨友。从备料到上桌大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：472 大卡
intro_en:
Steamed white eel with black bean sauce is a classic Cantonese steamed dish. The aroma of black bean and garlic paste penetrates into the fish, making it tender and delicious. White eel is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of unsaturated fatty acids, which has a nourishing effect on the body. The operation steps are clear, but handling raw fish and controlling the heat are a little challenging, so it is suitable for cooks with a certain foundation. It takes about 30 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 472 kcal
ingredients_zh: 白鱔 250g （约一条小白鱔，已去内脏并切成段）
生粉 1 茶匙 （可选，用于腌制）
ingredients_en: 250g white eel (about one small white eel, gutted and cut into segments)
1 green onion (cut into sections or shreds)

**准备酱汁**：
**装饰与完成**：

**Prepare the Sauce**:
**Plating**:
**Steaming**:
**DECORATIONS AND FINISHES**:

name_en: Beef Stew with Tomatoes and Potatoes
intro_zh:
一道家常炖菜，酸甜开胃，汤汁浓郁，牛肉软烂，土豆绵密。牛肉提供优质蛋白，西红柿富含番茄红素，搭配土豆和洋葱，营养均衡。操作简单，无需复杂技巧，新手也能轻松上手。从备菜到出锅大约需要 1 至 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：827 大卡
intro_en:
A home-style stew, sweet and sour, appetizing, rich soup, soft beef, and dense potatoes. Beef provides high-quality protein, tomatoes are rich in lycopene, and paired with potatoes and onions, it is nutritionally balanced. The operation is simple, no complicated skills are required, and novices can easily get started. It takes approximately 1 to 1.5 hours from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 827 kcal
ingredients_zh: 土豆两三个（看喜好，锅能盛了为准）
西红柿拳头大小中等个头两三个
比拳头大一点的洋葱一个
ingredients_en: Two or three potatoes (depending on preference, the pot can hold it)
Two or three fist-sized tomatoes, medium in size
An onion a little bigger than your fist

制作
炖煮

make
stew

name_en: Guizhou Style Sausage and Baby Vegetables
intro_zh:
这道菜咸鲜可口，融合了黔式腊肠的醇香与娃娃菜的清甜，是西南菜系中少见的不辣风味，南北皆宜。娃娃菜富含维生素和膳食纤维，搭配腊肠的蛋白质与脂肪，营养均衡。制作过程极为简单，无需掌握火候和额外调味，从备料到出锅仅需 15 分钟，非常适合新手和忙碌的日常。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：1030 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is salty, fresh and delicious. It combines the mellow aroma of Guizhou-style sausage and the sweetness of baby cabbage. It is a rare non-spicy flavor in southwestern cuisine and is suitable for both north and south. Baby cabbage is rich in vitamins and dietary fiber, and combined with the protein and fat of sausage, it is nutritionally balanced. The preparation process is extremely simple, and there is no need to control the heat or additional seasoning. It only takes 15 minutes from preparation to serving, making it very suitable for novices and busy daily people.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 1030 kcal
steps_zh: 锅内放入 750ml 水，开火加热至沸腾
放入腊肠，计时 13 分钟
放入娃娃菜，计时 2 分钟
关火，夹出腊肠及娃娃菜
娃娃菜切段、腊肠切片，装盘
steps_en: Put 750ml water into the pot and heat it until it boils
Add sausage and time for 13 minutes
Add baby cabbage and time for 2 minutes
Turn off the heat, take out the sausage and baby cabbage
Cut the baby cabbage into sections, slice the sausage, and place on a plate
images: dishes/meat_dish/黔式腊肠娃娃菜/黔式腊肠娃娃菜.jpg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/黔式腊肠娃娃菜/黔式腊肠娃娃菜.md

intro_zh:
清蒸鳜鱼肉质细嫩，鲜甜本味突出，是讲究原汁原味的家常河鲜做法。鳜鱼富含优质蛋白和多种微量元素，易于消化吸收。处理时需小心鱼鳍，但整体步骤不复杂，新手稍加注意也能胜任。从备料到出锅，大约只需半小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：359 大卡
intro_en:
Steamed mandarin fish has tender meat and outstanding fresh and sweet flavor. It is a home-cooked river fish method that pays attention to the original taste. Mandarin fish is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of trace elements, and is easy to digest and absorb. You need to be careful with the fins when handling them, but the overall steps are not complicated and a novice can do it with a little attention. From preparation to serving, it only takes about half an hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 359 kcal
steps_zh: **食材处理**：
**炒制过程**：
steps_en: **Food handling**:
**Frying Process**:

intro_zh:
一道外酥里嫩、香气浓郁的料理，先以香料炖煮再煎出金黄脆壳，风味浓郁不腻，是家常宴客两相宜的硬菜。羊肉富含优质蛋白和铁、锌等矿物质，有助于温补气血。做法步骤稍多，但只要按流程走，新手也能拿下；使用高压锅全程约 1 小时，普通锅约 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1850 大卡
intro_en:
A dish that is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with a rich aroma. It is first stewed with spices and then fried into a golden crispy shell. Mutton is rich in high-quality protein and minerals such as iron and zinc, which helps warm and replenish qi and blood. The steps are slightly more, but as long as you follow the process, novices can master it; the whole process takes about 1 hour with a pressure cooker and 1.5 hours with an ordinary pot.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1850 kcal
ingredients_zh: 羊排 750g（建议选择带一些肥肉的）
盐 25g（注：若计划喝煮羊排的汤，则此处的盐在炖煮步骤中省略，在最后的煎烤步骤中加入）
ingredients_en: Lamb chops 750g (it is recommended to choose the ones with some fat)
25g salt (Note: If you plan to drink the soup for cooking the lamb chops, omit the salt in the stewing step and add it in the final grilling step)
steps_zh: 将羊排按照骨头分布，切成块状。
炒锅中加入冷水，放入全部羊排块，水沸腾后继续焯水 2 - 3 分钟，捞出备用。
将焯好水的羊排、桂皮、花椒、八角、白芷、香叶、料酒放入锅中（高压锅或普通锅）。
加入饮用水没过所有食材。如果使用高压锅，上汽后压 30 分钟。如果使用普通锅，炖煮 80 分钟。
将炖煮完成的羊排捞出，沥干水分，放入无油无水的炒锅 / 煎锅中。
中大火煎 6 - 7 分钟，直至羊排中的油脂被煎出，*表面呈金黄酥脆状态*。
锅中保留煎出的羊油，加入辣椒粉、孜然粒、烧烤撒料、孜然粉、白芝麻，翻炒均匀。
加入糖和盐（如果在炖煮步骤中未添加），翻炒均匀。
翻炒均匀后即可关火，盛盘。
steps_en: Cut the lamb chops into chunks according to the bones.
Add cold water to the wok, add all the lamb chops, continue to blanch for 2-3 minutes after the water boils, remove and set aside.
Put the blanched lamb chops, cinnamon, peppercorns, star anise, angelica, bay leaves, and cooking wine into a pot (pressure cooker or ordinary pot).
Add drinking water to cover all ingredients. If using a pressure cooker, turn on the steam and pressure for 30 minutes. If using a regular pot, simmer for 80 minutes.
Take out the cooked lamb chops, drain them and place them in a wok/frying pan that is oil-free and water-free.
Fry over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes, until the fat is cooked out of the lamb chops and *the surface is golden and crispy*.
Keep the fried mutton oil in the pot, add chili powder, cumin seeds, barbecue seasonings, cumin powder, and white sesame seeds, and stir-fry evenly.
Add sugar and salt (if not added during the simmering step) and stir-fry evenly.
After stir-fry evenly, turn off the heat and serve on a plate.

intro_zh:
这是一道经典的西式煎牛排，焦香外壳包裹着鲜嫩多汁的肉心，搭配黄油、大蒜和香草，风味浓郁。富含优质蛋白质、油脂及铁、锌等矿物质。烹饪流程对新手较为友好，但掌握火候仍需一些练习，全程 15-30 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1605 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Western-style pan-fried steak, with a tender and juicy heart wrapped in a caramelized shell, and rich in flavor with butter, garlic and herbs. Rich in high-quality protein, oil and minerals such as iron and zinc. The cooking process is relatively beginner-friendly, but mastering the heat still requires some practice and can be completed in 15-30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1605 kcal
ingredients_zh: 平底锅（有条件的推荐铸铁平底锅）
牛排，参见[如何选择不同种类的牛排](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/72352426)
橄榄油（推荐特级初榨橄榄油）
黑胡椒粉（推荐粗颗粒现磨黑胡椒）
香料（可选，推荐迷迭香或者百里香，尽量使用新鲜的植物枝条而不是这些香料磨成的粉）
配菜（ 可选，按喜好准备，这里推荐芦笋，口蘑，小番茄，小土豆，选其中的 1-2 种即可）
大蒜 1 个（约 25-30g，实际用量约为 5-10g）
百里香 2g（若使用新鲜百里香枝条，取 3-6 根，每根约 10cm 长即可）
ingredients_en: Pan (cast iron pan is recommended if possible)
Steak, see [How to choose different types of steak](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/72352426)
Olive oil (extra virgin olive oil recommended)
Black pepper (coarse-grained freshly ground black pepper is recommended)
Spices (optional, rosemary or thyme recommended, try to use fresh plant branches rather than the powder of these spices)
Side dishes (optional, prepare according to preference, here we recommend asparagus, mushrooms, small tomatoes, small potatoes, choose 1-2 of them)
2g thyme (if using fresh thyme branches, take 3-6 branches, each one is about 10cm long)
steps_zh: 从冰箱中取出牛排解冻。
将小番茄，小土豆和口蘑洗净，对半切开备用。
将大蒜剥皮，留 5-8 个较大的蒜瓣，用刀背**压扁**备用。
牛排的预处理
将炉灶打开高火（见附录对于火力大小的说明），同时锅中加入橄榄油，热锅 15-30 秒。
腌制牛排。将海盐和黑胡椒均匀的洒在牛排的全部表面并用手涂抹，揉搓，使得盐和胡椒颗粒尽量嵌入到肉中。注意，腌制完成后牛排**需要立即下锅，不推荐提前腌制牛排**。这是因为外表涂抹的盐会析出牛肉中的水分，影响烹饪的同时丧失风味。
热锅至油温 6-8 成（参见[油温判断技巧](./../../../tips/advanced/油温判断技巧.md)），将牛排由近及远的缓慢放入锅中。
如果您使用了土豆作为配菜，可以将土豆放入碗中，然后放进微波炉加热 10 分钟，或者放入开水煮 3-5 分钟。
单面煎制 1.5 分钟（这个时间适用于 2-3cm 厚大约的牛排。如果您的牛排更薄，考虑将这个时间缩短为 1 分钟。如果您的牛排更厚，考虑将这个时间增加至 2-2.5 分钟。）
翻面，再煎制 1.5 分钟。
将炉灶切换至中火，随后按顺序**快速加入**黄油、大蒜、百里香。用锅铲推动黄油在锅中快速涂抹直至完全融化。将大蒜压在牛排下以增加风味。
将平底锅**倾斜地放在灶上**，使得油全部流到锅的一侧。
将香料和大蒜放置在牛排上，用汤匙舀起锅中的油，不断地淋在牛排上。这个过程持续 30 秒，随后将牛排翻面，再重复这个过程 30 秒。
将牛排盛出放在案板上，用锡箔纸包裹，等待 5-10 分钟。这个过程（称为醒肉）的作用是利用牛排自身的温度继续加热，锁住水分。
将配菜（土豆，番茄，蘑菇）倒入锅中，开中火煎 5 分钟。
取出牛排，用刀切成宽度 1.5cm 宽度的肉条，此时您可以观察到牛肉的熟度。
取出配菜，装盘，淋上锅中剩余的油或者牛排酱汁（可选）
steps_en: Remove steak from refrigerator and defrost.
Wash the small tomatoes, small potatoes and mushrooms, cut them in half and set aside.
Peel the garlic, leaving 5-8 larger garlic cloves, flatten them with the back of a knife** and set aside.
Steak Preparation
Turn on the stove to high heat (see the appendix for instructions on heat), add olive oil to the pan, and heat the pan for 15-30 seconds.

Marinate steak. Sprinkle the sea salt and black pepper evenly over the entire surface of the steak and rub it with your hands so that the salt and pepper particles are embedded into the meat as much as possible. Note that the steak** needs to be cooked immediately after marinating. It is not recommended to marinate the steak** in advance. This is because the salt applied on the surface will precipitate the moisture in the beef, affecting the cooking process and losing the flavor.

Heat the pan until the oil temperature reaches 60-80% (see [Oil Temperature Judgment Techniques](./../../../tips/advanced/Oil Temperature Judgment Techniques.md)), and slowly put the steak into the pot from near to far.
If you are using potatoes as a side dish, place the potatoes in a bowl and microwave for 10 minutes, or boil them in boiling water for 3-5 minutes.

Cook on one side for 1.5 minutes (This time is for steaks approximately 2-3cm thick. If your steak is thinner, consider reducing this time to 1 minute. If your steak is thicker, consider increasing this time to 2-2.5 minutes.)
Flip and cook for another 1.5 minutes.

Turn the stove to medium heat and quickly add the butter, garlic, and thyme in that order. Use a spatula to quickly spread the butter in the pan until completely melted. Press the garlic under the steak for added flavor.
Place the pan on the stove **tilt** so that all the oil flows to one side of the pan.

Place the spices and garlic over the steaks, spooning in the oil from the pan and drizzling over the steaks. Continue this process for 30 seconds, then turn the steak over and repeat the process for another 30 seconds.

Place the steak on a cutting board, wrap in foil, and wait 5-10 minutes. The purpose of this process (called thawing) is to use the steak's own temperature to continue heating it and lock in the moisture.
Add the side dishes (potatoes, tomatoes, mushrooms) to the pan and fry over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Take out the steak and cut it into 1.5cm wide strips with a knife. At this time you can observe the doneness of the beef.
Remove the side dishes, place on a plate, and drizzle with remaining oil or steak sauce (optional)

intro_zh:
一道快手家常小炒，肉片滑嫩，土豆片软韧入味，带有蒜苗清香，属于典型的家常菜风格。瘦肉富含优质蛋白质和铁质，土豆提供碳水化合物和膳食纤维，搭配均衡。制作流程简单明了，需注意刀工和火候，适合有一定基础的新手尝试。从备料到出锅，预计 大约 1 小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：585 大卡
intro_en:
A quick home-cooked stir-fry, the meat slices are smooth and tender, the potato slices are soft and tasty, and have the fragrance of garlic sprouts. It is a typical home-cooked dish. Lean meat is rich in high-quality protein and iron, and potatoes provide carbohydrates and dietary fiber in a balanced combination. The production process is simple and straightforward, requiring attention to knife skills and heat. It is suitable for novices with a certain foundation to try. From preparation to serving, it should take about 1 hour to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 585 kcal
ingredients_zh: 生粉（玉米淀粉或其他淀粉）
steps_zh: 土豆去皮、对半切开，再切成约 2mm 的薄片，备用
蒜苗洗净，切成约 1cm 的段，备用
瘦肉洗净切成约 2mm 的薄片，放入碗中，加入 5g 生粉、5g 生抽、3g 老抽腌制十分钟，备用
瘦肉腌制时，烧一锅开水，将土豆片放入锅中，焯水，约 5 分钟
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
放入瘦肉，翻炒至变色，倒入蒜苗一起炒，蒜苗炒约 20 秒
放入土豆，保持翻炒，加入 2g 食用盐、5g 生抽，
炒约 3 分钟，盛盘
steps_en: Peel the potatoes, cut in half, and then cut into thin slices about 2mm, set aside
Wash garlic sprouts and cut into sections of about 1cm, set aside
Wash the lean meat and cut it into thin slices of about 2mm, put it into a bowl, add 5g cornstarch, 5g light soy sauce, 3g dark soy sauce and marinate for ten minutes, set aside
When marinating lean meat, boil a pot of water, put potato slices into the pot, and blanch for about 5 minutes
Heat a pan and put 10ml - 15ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Add the lean meat and stir-fry until it changes color. Add the garlic sprouts and stir-fry the garlic sprouts for about 20 seconds.
Add potatoes, keep stirring, add 2g edible salt and 5g light soy sauce,
Fry for about 3 minutes and serve
images: dishes/meat_dish/瘦肉土豆片/瘦肉土豆片.jpg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/瘦肉土豆片/瘦肉土豆片.md

intro_zh:
湖南家常红烧肉是一道湘味浓郁的家常菜，五花肉经慢炖后肥而不腻、入口软糯，咸香中带着微辣回甘。富含优质蛋白和脂肪，能为身体提供充足能量。制作需要一些耐心，对新手有一定挑战，但按步骤操作不难掌握，预计全程约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1348 大卡
intro_en:
Hunan home-style braised pork is a home-cooked dish with a rich Hunan flavor. The pork belly is fat but not greasy after being slow-cooked, and is soft and waxy in the mouth. It has a salty aroma with a slightly spicy aftertaste. Rich in high-quality protein and fat, it can provide the body with sufficient energy. The production requires some patience and is a challenge for novices, but it is not difficult to master by following the steps. The whole process is expected to take about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1348 kcal
ingredients_zh: 干小米椒🌶（根据个人情况而定）
ingredients_en: Dried millet pepper 🌶 (depending on personal circumstances)
steps_zh: 带皮五花肉洗净冷水下锅，加入姜片 2~3 片去腥味，煮到沸腾捞出冷水冲净白沫
五花肉切块，尺寸 1.5cm*1.5cm 块状大小
热锅加入油，加入冰糖小火搅拌至焦糖色即可，加入切好的五花肉，中火翻炒上色
加入备好的姜片、八角、桂皮、生抽、老抽、料酒、干小米椒、盐，小火翻炒 1 分钟，加开水没过肉
加盖中火煮沸，转小火慢顿 30 分钟，慢炖期间，间隔 10 分钟搅拌一次防止粘锅
小火慢炖汤汁剩三分之一的时，调成中火收汁出锅。
steps_en: Wash the pork belly with skin and put it into the pot under cold water. Add 2~3 slices of ginger to remove the fishy smell. Bring to boil, remove and rinse with cold water.
Pork belly cut into cubes, size 1.5cm*1.5cm block size
Heat oil in a pan, add rock sugar and stir over low heat until caramel color is achieved. Add sliced pork belly and stir-fry over medium heat until browned.

Add the prepared ginger slices, star anise, cinnamon, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, cooking wine, dried millet pepper, salt, stir-fry over low heat for 1 minute, add boiling water to cover the meat
Cover and bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce to low and simmer for 30 minutes. During the simmering period, stir every 10 minutes to prevent sticking.
Simmer over low heat until one-third of the soup is left, then turn to medium heat to reduce the sauce and remove from the pot.
images: dishes/meat_dish/湖南家常红烧肉/湖南家常红烧肉.jpeg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/湖南家常红烧肉/湖南家常红烧肉.md

intro_zh:
回锅肉是四川传统名菜，以二刀肉或五花肉为主料，成菜色泽红亮，肥肉透明微卷、瘦肉干香不柴，口感肥而不腻，咸鲜微辣，带有蒜苗与豆瓣酱的复合香气。猪肉富含优质蛋白和必需脂肪酸，搭配青红椒、蒜苗可补充维生素。这道菜步骤稍多，包含煮、切、煸炒，对火候和刀工有一定要求，但按流程操作新手也能成功，预计全程耗时约 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：997 大卡
intro_en:
Twice-cooked pork is a famous traditional Sichuan dish. It is made from Erdao Pork or Pork Belly as the main ingredient. The finished dish is bright red in color, the fat meat is transparent and slightly rolled, the lean meat is dry and fragrant, and the taste is fat but not greasy. It is salty and slightly spicy, with the compound aroma of garlic sprouts and bean paste. Pork is rich in high-quality protein and essential fatty acids. Paired with green and red peppers and garlic sprouts, it can supplement vitamins. This dish has a few steps, including boiling, cutting, and stir-frying. It requires certain heat and knife skills, but even a novice can succeed by following the process. The whole process is expected to take about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 997 kcal
ingredients_zh: 五花肉的用量为 0.5 斤/男人 0.3 斤/女人 （正宗回锅肉使用二刀肉[俗称：臀尖]制作，肉质坚实，肥瘦合适）
青红椒（根据受辣程度选择, 0-30g）*注：不建议使用肉厚的菜椒
ingredients_en: The amount of pork belly is 0.5 kg/man and 0.3 kg/woman (authentic twice-cooked pork is made from Erdao Pork [commonly known as hip tip], the meat is firm and suitable for fatness and leanness)
Green and red peppers (choose according to the degree of spiciness, 0-30g) *Note: It is not recommended to use thick-fleshed bell peppers
steps_zh: 锅烧热，用手将五花肉紧紧压在锅上炙皮
用钢丝球把皮刷干净，至黑色部分碳化部分被完全去除，不刷干净会有苦味
将五花肉放入锅中，放入能淹没五花肉的冷水，放入生姜片、料酒和小葱（取 2 棵小葱打结）
开大火煮，水开后撇去浮沫，继续煮 15 分钟，煮至瘦肉部分可以用筷子轻松刺穿
青红椒切圈
蒜苗切段
生姜切小薄片
将 5ml 豆瓣酱和 5ml 生抽提前混合
将煮熟的五花肉捞出放入冷水晾凉
擦干五花肉的水，切成上肥下瘦的 2mm 的薄片（切厚了口感不好，而且很油）
锅烧热，放入一层底油滑锅
放入五花肉煸炒至肥肉透明，肉片微卷（欲称起灯盏窝），二刀肉效果最佳。
倒入豆瓣生抽混合物，5g 味精翻炒 15 秒
放入青红椒圈和小姜片，放入另 5ml 豆瓣酱翻炒 30 秒
放入蒜苗翻炒 60 秒
出锅
选用冰冻五花肉常量放置 0.5 小时 或者鲜五花肉放冰箱冷藏 1 个小时，切成 2-5 mm 薄片
开中火，辣椒放过锅中干煸 30-45 秒后取出
锅烧热，放入一层底油滑锅，放入姜片煸炒 15 秒
倒入五花肉，间隔 10 S 翻炒一次，待五花肉出现焦黄色（翻炒时间越久五花肉口感越硬）
倒入之前干煸过的辣椒、10ml 豆瓣酱，生抽调味，继续翻炒 60 秒
倒入切成段的蒜苗翻炒 10 秒
出锅
steps_en: Heat the pot, press the pork belly tightly onto the pot with your hands to sear the skin
Brush the leather clean with steel wool until the black and carbonized parts are completely removed. If not brushed clean, there will be a bitter taste.
Put the pork belly into the pot, add enough cold water to cover the pork belly, add ginger slices, cooking wine and green onions (take 2 green onions and tie them into knots)
Turn up the heat and cook, skim off the foam after the water boils, and continue to cook for 15 minutes until the lean meat can be easily pierced with chopsticks.
Green and red peppers cut into rings
Garlic sprouts cut into sections
Cut ginger into small slices
Mix 5ml bean paste and 5ml light soy sauce in advance
Take out the cooked pork belly and put it in cold water to cool
Wipe off the water from the pork belly and cut into 2mm thin slices with fat on the top and thin on the bottom (thick cuts will not taste good and will be very oily)
Heat the pot, put a layer of oil into the pot
Add the pork belly and stir-fry until the fat is transparent and the meat slices are slightly rolled (you want to call it a lantern nest). The two-cut pork is the best.
Pour in the bean soy sauce mixture, 5g MSG and stir-fry for 15 seconds
Add green and red pepper rings and ginger slices, add another 5ml of bean paste and stir-fry for 30 seconds
Add garlic sprouts and stir-fry for 60 seconds
Take out of the pot
Choose frozen pork belly and keep it for 0.5 hours or fresh pork belly in the refrigerator for 1 hour and cut into 2-5 mm slices.
Turn on medium heat, put the chili in the pot and stir-fry for 30-45 seconds, then take it out
Heat the pan, add a layer of oil to the pan, add ginger slices and stir-fry for 15 seconds
Pour in the pork belly and stir-fry once every 10 seconds until the pork belly turns brown (the longer the stir-fry time, the harder the pork belly will taste)
Pour in the previously stir-fried chili, 10ml bean paste, light soy sauce to taste, and continue to stir-fry for 60 seconds.
Add the chopped garlic sprouts and stir-fry for 10 seconds
Take out of the pot

intro_zh:
糖醋排骨是一道酸甜可口、外酥里嫩的传统名菜，广受欢迎。排骨富含优质蛋白和钙质，有较好的滋补效果。这道菜涉及焯水、油炸、炒糖色和收汁等多个步骤，对火候和调味有一定要求，不算特别适合新手，但按照优化后的流程操作成功率较高。预计制作时长为 大约 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1022 大卡
intro_en:
Sweet and sour pork ribs is a popular traditional dish that is sweet and sour, crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. Spare ribs are rich in high-quality protein and calcium and have a good nourishing effect. This dish involves multiple steps such as blanching, frying, frying the sugar and collecting the juice. It has certain requirements for heat and seasoning. It is not particularly suitable for novices, but the success rate is higher if you follow the optimized process. Estimated production time is approximately 45 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1022 kcal
ingredients_zh: 食用油 300–350 ml  （油量需根据锅具大小调整，如用于深炸则以足以覆盖排骨 2/3 为准）
ingredients_en: Edible oil 300–350 ml (the amount of oil needs to be adjusted according to the size of the pot. If it is used for deep frying, it should be enough to cover 2/3 of the ribs)
steps_zh: 排骨与姜片放入冷水中，大火加热至水沸腾、出现大量泡沫后转中火，待水持续沸腾时再转小火焯水 2–3 分钟，捞出备用。
用开水反复清洗排骨 2–3 遍，确保彻底去除血沫。
在锅中倒入足够量的食用油进行深炸（油量依据锅具大小而定，建议约 300 ml 供一般家庭使用），待油温升至约 170°C 后，下排骨炸制 3–5 分钟，直至表面略呈金黄色，捞出控油。
另取干净锅，置于小火上加热 50 ml 热水，加入白砂糖 30 g，轻轻搅拌直至糖完全溶解，并略呈淡黄色。此步骤的重点在于观察糖溶解情况，无需过分依赖颜色变化。
将炸好的排骨倒入炒制糖水的锅中，迅速翻炒 30 秒后，依次加入香醋 5 ml、生抽 5 ml、蚝油 5 ml、鸡精 2 g、番茄酱 10 g、五香粉 0.5 g，再次翻炒 30 秒，使调料均匀裹覆排骨，然后加入开水至刚好没过排骨。
用大火将锅中液体煮沸后，加入老抽 5 ml 进行上色，并快速收汁；若排骨块较大，可转小火焖煮 5–10 分钟以便更好地入味，切勿采用中火长时间炖煮 20 分钟，以免损伤口感。
起锅装盘，撒上芝麻 2 g，即可享用。
steps_en: Put the ribs and ginger slices into cold water, heat over high heat until the water boils and a lot of foam appears, then turn to medium heat. When the water continues to boil, turn to low heat and blanch for 2-3 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Wash the ribs 2-3 times with boiling water to ensure the blood foam is completely removed.

Pour enough cooking oil into the pot for deep frying (the amount of oil depends on the size of the pot, it is recommended to be about 300 ml for general household use). After the oil temperature rises to about 170°C, fry the ribs for 3-5 minutes until the surface is slightly golden brown. Remove and control the oil.

Take another clean pot, heat 50 ml of hot water over low heat, add 30 g of white sugar, and stir gently until the sugar is completely dissolved and turns slightly light yellow. The point of this step is to observe the dissolution of the sugar without relying too much on the color change.

Pour the fried ribs into the pot with sugar water, stir-fry quickly for 30 seconds, then add 5 ml of balsamic vinegar, 5 ml of light soy sauce, 5 ml of oyster sauce, 2 g of chicken essence, 10 g of tomato sauce, and 0.5 g of five-spice powder. Stir-fry again for 30 seconds to evenly coat the ribs with the seasoning. Then add boiling water until the ribs are just covered.

After boiling the liquid in the pot over high heat, add 5 ml of dark soy sauce for coloring and rapid reduction of juice. If the ribs are large, you can turn to low heat and simmer for 5-10 minutes to better absorb the flavor. Do not simmer over medium heat for 20 minutes to avoid damaging the taste.
Remove from the pan, serve on a plate, sprinkle with 2 g of sesame seeds, and enjoy.

intro_zh:
黑椒牛柳是一道广受欢迎的家常小炒，黑椒风味浓郁，牛柳嫩滑，搭配甜脆的洋葱和彩椒，荤素均衡，口味老少咸宜。牛肉富含优质蛋白和铁，彩椒和洋葱能补充多种维生素。这道菜对新手十分友好，从备料到出锅，通常一小时以内就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：216 大卡
intro_en:
Black pepper beef tenderloin is a popular home-cooked stir-fry dish. It has a strong black pepper flavor and tender tender beef. It is paired with sweet and crispy onions and colorful peppers. It has a balanced meat and vegetable taste and is suitable for all ages. Beef is rich in high-quality protein and iron, and bell peppers and onions can supplement a variety of vitamins. This dish is very novice-friendly and can usually be completed within an hour from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 216 kcal
ingredients_zh: 牛肉（可以用牛里脊肉或者牛排肉）
牛肉量 = 份数 * 100 克 （视就餐者胃容量和锅容量酌情增减）
洋葱量 = 份数 * 1/12 个（即 3 人时约切 1/4 ）
菜椒量 = 份数 * 1/12 个（即 3 人时约切 1/4 ）
黑椒腌料 = 参照所购商品的说明按比例腌制
黑胡椒粉 = 份数 * 1 克（实际上是随便撒）
花生油 = 份数 * 10ml （实际上油量是依据菜量变动的，如对牛肉的量有增减请按对应比例变动）
ingredients_en: Beef (you can use beef tenderloin or steak meat)
Amount of beef = number of servings * 100 grams (depending on the stomach capacity of the diner and the capacity of the pot)
Amount of onions = number of servings * 1/12 (i.e. cut into 1/4 for 3 people)
Amount of peppers = number of servings * 1/12 (i.e. cut into approximately 1/4 for 3 people)
Black pepper marinade = Marinate according to the proportion according to the instructions of the purchased product
Black pepper = number of servings * 1 g (actually just sprinkle as you like)

Peanut oil = number of servings * 10ml (Actually, the amount of oil changes based on the amount of vegetables. If the amount of beef increases or decreases, please change it according to the corresponding proportion)
steps_zh: 将牛肉切条，长度最好控制在 8 厘米以下，厚度约 5-10 毫米，宽度约 1 厘米（要求不严格）
利用腌料腌制牛肉，混合均匀后静置，用量与时间请参照商品说明，可以延长不能缩短。
如果使用液态腌料，可以在腌制结束前三分钟撒一层黑胡椒粉，然后再加入淀粉，再次混合均匀后静置 20 分钟。
开火，热锅，加入花生油。
当能看到锅里的油冒出一丝烟时，放入牛肉，翻炒。
开中火偏大，翻炒 2 分钟至牛肉外表变色（即不出现明显血色，有血色部分说明翻炒不到位）（此处应小心油滴溅射）。
放入洋葱和菜椒，翻炒 2 分钟。
加入盐，再次撒一份黑胡椒粉，翻炒 30 秒，搅拌均匀。
观察洋葱已经变软即可关火，出锅，盛盘。
steps_en: Cut the beef into strips, the length is preferably less than 8 cm, the thickness is about 5-10 mm, and the width is about 1 cm (the requirements are not strict)
Use the marinade to marinate the beef, mix evenly and let it sit. Please refer to the product description for the dosage and time. It can be lengthened but not shortened.
If using liquid marinade, sprinkle a layer of black pepper three minutes before the end of marinating, then add starch, mix evenly again and let it sit for 20 minutes.
Turn on the heat, heat the pan and add peanut oil.
When you can see a hint of smoke coming out of the oil in the pan, add the beef and stir-fry.

Turn on medium-high heat and stir-fry for 2 minutes until the outside of the beef changes color (that is, there is no obvious blood color, and the bloody part means that the stir-fry is not done properly) (be careful with oil droplets splashing here).
Add onions and peppers and sauté for 2 minutes.
Add salt and again a pinch of black pepper and stir-fry for 30 seconds, stirring well.
Observe that the onions have softened, then turn off the heat, remove from the pan, and serve on a plate.

name_en: Stir-fried Pork with Wild Wild Rice
intro_zh:
茭白炒肉是一道家常快手菜，口感鲜嫩爽脆，咸鲜适口，属于典型的江南家常风味。茭白富含膳食纤维和多种维生素，搭配瘦肉提供优质蛋白，荤素搭配均衡营养。烹饪难度中等，新手稍加练习即可掌握，预计制作时长约 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：515 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried Pork with Wild Wild Rice is a home-cooked quick-serve dish that is tender, crispy, salty and delicious, and is a typical Jiangnan home-cooked dish. Wild rice is rich in dietary fiber and multiple vitamins. It provides high-quality protein when paired with lean meat, and has balanced nutrition with meat and vegetables. The cooking difficulty is medium and can be mastered by novices with a little practice. It should take about 20 minutes to prepare.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 515 kcal
steps_zh: 茭白切片，每片厚度 0.5 cm
瘦肉切条，厚度 0.3-0.5 cm，加入料酒、生粉、盐、水搅拌
姜切片、蒜头剁碎
起锅水烧开，放入茭白，水煮 60-90 S 后取出沥干
起锅，倒入 15 ml 油，倒入瘦肉，反复翻炒 60 S 取出
起锅，倒入 15 ml 油，倒入姜、蒜翻炒 30S，加入茭白继续翻炒 30 S
继续加入瘦肉翻炒 60 S，加入 20 ml 水，加入盐、鸡精后翻炒 60S 出锅
steps_en: Wild rice slices, each slice 0.5 cm thick
Cut the lean meat into strips with a thickness of 0.3-0.5 cm, add cooking wine, cornstarch, salt and water and stir
Slice ginger and mince garlic
Bring water to a boil, add wild rice, simmer for 60-90 seconds, then remove and drain
Take out the pan, pour 15 ml oil, add lean meat, stir-fry repeatedly for 60 seconds, take out
Take up the pot, pour 15 ml of oil, add ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds. Add wild rice and continue to stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Continue to add lean meat and stir-fry for 60 seconds. Add 20 ml of water. Add salt and chicken essence and stir-fry for 60 seconds. Remove from the pan.

intro_zh:
这是一道咸香下饭的湖南家常小炒，五花肉的油润、鸡蛋的嫩滑与青椒的清香彼此融合，口感层次丰富。猪肉与鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质，搭配青椒补充维生素 C，营养均衡。中等难度，需要注意煸炒火候和调味顺序，新手稍加练习也能做好。预计备菜 7 分钟，烹饪 10 分钟，总共约 17 分钟就能出锅。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1638 大卡
intro_en:
This is a Hunan home-style stir-fry that goes well with rice. The oiliness of the pork belly, the tenderness of the eggs and the fragrance of green peppers blend together, creating a rich texture. Pork and eggs provide high-quality protein, and green peppers supplement vitamin C for a balanced nutrition. It is of medium difficulty. You need to pay attention to the stir-frying heat and the order of seasoning. Novices can do it well with a little practice. Expect 7 minutes of prep time and 10 minutes of cooking time, for a total of about 17 minutes to be ready.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1638 kcal
steps_zh: 备菜阶段：将猪肉切片，最好把肥瘦分开放。同时要把青椒和小米辣切成段，蒜片用刀背拍成末，姜切成丝。鸡蛋打到小碗中，用筷子打散。
备好菜，就可正式煮菜了。先将油倒入锅中，锅中开小火，油热后将蛋液倒入锅中，将鸡蛋炒散，炒至断生即可，放回小碗中备用。
将锅中继续加一点油，开小火，锅热后将之前切的肥猪肉倒入锅中逼出猪油。
肥肉出现金黄色的时候，加大火力到中火，将瘦肉一起放入锅中翻炒。
瘦肉全部炒至变色的时候加入备好的姜丝、蒜末和豆瓣酱翻炒均匀给猪肉上色。
放入青红椒、炒至断生的鸡蛋后加入酱油和白糖，继续将它们翻炒到青椒微微断生，保持青椒清脆口感。
出锅上菜！
steps_en: Preparation stage: Slice the pork, preferably separating the fat and thin. At the same time, cut the green pepper and millet into sections, smash the garlic slices into mince with the back of a knife, and cut the ginger into shreds. Crack the eggs into a small bowl and beat with chopsticks.

After preparing the dishes, you can officially start cooking. Pour the oil into the pot first, turn on a low heat in the pot, pour the egg liquid into the pot after the oil is hot, stir-fry the eggs until they are broken, and put them back into a small bowl for later use.
Add a little more oil to the pot, turn on low heat, and when the pot is hot, pour the previously cut fatty pork into the pot and force out the lard.
When the fat meat turns golden brown, increase the heat to medium, add the lean meat into the pot and stir-fry.
When all the lean meat is fried, add the prepared shredded ginger, minced garlic and bean paste and stir-fry evenly to color the pork.

Add green and red peppers, fried eggs until they are broken, add soy sauce and sugar, continue to stir-fry them until the green peppers are slightly broken, and keep the crisp taste of the green peppers.
Take it out of the pan and serve!

file_path: dishes/meat_dish/农家一碗香/农家一碗香.md

intro_zh:
香辣浓郁、口感 Q 弹，是一道常见的家常下饭菜。鸡爪富含胶原蛋白，有助滋润皮肤、强健筋骨。制作需要先去趾甲，若用整只鸡爪还需去骨，对新手略有挑战，但耐心按步骤操作也能成功。从焯水到小火慢煮再翻炒入味，全程约需 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：986 大卡
intro_en:
Spicy, rich and chewy, it is a common home-cooked dish. Chicken feet are rich in collagen, which helps moisturize the skin and strengthen bones. To make it, you need to remove the toenails first. If you use the whole chicken feet, you also need to remove the bones. It is a little challenging for novices, but you can succeed if you follow the steps patiently. The whole process from blanching to simmering over low heat and then stir-frying to add flavor takes about 45 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 986 kcal
steps_zh: 给鸡爪剪去指甲。如果买的鸡爪只有脚掌部分，对半切开即可。 如果是整只鸡爪，需要去骨。清水洗干净。
鸡爪冷水下锅，葱姜料酒焯水，水开，撇去浮沫。
加入香叶、八角、生抽、老抽，盖盖小火慢煮三十分钟。
捞出鸡爪，留一碗鸡汤备用。
起锅烧油，用小火炒香姜末、蒜末、小米椒，能吃辣再放点辣椒面。加入生抽、老抽、蚝油、五香粉、盐，炒出酱香味。
放入鸡爪，放一点盐调味，翻炒一两分钟，再倒入鸡汤，边炒边搅动。
放入鸡精提鲜，撒入葱段搅拌均匀即可出锅。
steps_en: Trim the nails of the chicken feet. If the chicken feet you buy only have the sole part, just cut them in half. If it is a whole chicken foot, it needs to be boned. Rinse clean with water.
Place the chicken feet in a pot under cold water, blanch the onions and ginger in cooking wine, bring the water to a boil and skim off the foam.
Add bay leaves, star anise, light soy sauce, and dark soy sauce, cover and simmer over low heat for thirty minutes.
Remove the chicken feet and set aside a bowl of chicken soup.

Heat oil in a pan, sauté minced ginger, minced garlic, and millet pepper over low heat until fragrant. If spicy, add some chili powder. Add light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, oyster sauce, five-spice powder, and salt and stir-fry until the sauce becomes fragrant.
Add the chicken feet, season with a little salt, stir-fry for a minute or two, then pour in the chicken soup, stir-frying.
Add chicken essence to enhance the freshness, add green onions, stir evenly and serve.
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/香辣鸡爪煲/香辣鸡爪煲.md

intro_zh:
这道巴基斯坦风味咖喱牛肉香浓软糯，酸辣开胃，带着浓郁的香料气息。牛肉提供优质蛋白，搭配番茄和酸奶，营养均衡。做法不算繁琐，但慢炖需要一点耐心，很适合在闲暇的周末从容准备。从头到尾大约两个半小时，就能端出一锅温暖的异国美味。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：602 大卡
intro_en:
This Pakistani-style beef curry is fragrant, soft and glutinous, sour and appetizing, with a strong aroma of spices. Beef provides high-quality protein, and paired with tomatoes and yogurt, it is nutritionally balanced. The method is not complicated, but slow cooking requires a little patience, so it is suitable for leisurely preparation on weekends. It takes about two and a half hours from start to finish to serve up a warm pot of exotic delicacies.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 602 kcal
steps_zh: 全部螺丝椒切成段状，备用
全部番茄打成番茄蓉，备用
牛肉切成 2cm 的小块，洗净备用
炒锅中倒入一层油（用来防止番茄蓉沸腾蒸发）
倒入番茄蓉，持续搅拌 2-3 分钟，等待它越变越红
加入 5g 蒜粉，5g 姜粉和 1 包 50g 的 Masala 粉，搅拌均匀
加入牛肉和螺丝椒段，搅拌均匀
加入 1 盒酸奶（为了让整个酱汁变得粘稠），搅拌均匀
将整锅材料转移到电饭煲/电炖锅，并加入 250 ml 的水，开启炖肉/慢炖档，设定时间 2-3 个小时
等待完成，开锅检查牛肉软糯，就可以吃了
steps_en: Cut all peppers into segments and set aside
Puree all tomatoes and set aside
Cut beef into 2cm pieces, wash and set aside
Pour a layer of oil into the wok (to prevent the tomato puree from boiling and evaporating)
Pour in the tomato puree and stir continuously for 2-3 minutes until it becomes redder and redder.
Add 5g garlic powder, 5g ginger powder and 1 50g packet of masala powder, mix well
Add beef and chili pepper segments and mix well
Add 1 box of yogurt (to make the whole sauce thicker) and mix well
Transfer the entire pot of ingredients to the rice cooker/electric stew pot, add 250 ml of water, turn on the stew/slow cooker, and set the time for 2-3 hours
Wait for it to finish, open the pot and check if the beef is soft and glutinous, then you can eat it.

name_en: Fried pork with green pepper and potatoes
intro_zh:
青椒土豆炒肉是一道荤素搭配的家常小炒，口感鲜香脆嫩，酱香浓郁，特别下饭。土豆富含碳水化合物和维生素 C，青椒提供丰富的维生素 C 和膳食纤维，搭配猪肉的优质蛋白质，营养均衡。这道菜做法不复杂，对新手比较友好，从备料到出锅大约只需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1288 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried Pork with Green Peppers and Potatoes is a home-style stir-fry that combines meat and vegetables. It has a fresh, crispy and tender texture, and a rich sauce, making it a great addition to rice. Potatoes are rich in carbohydrates and vitamin C, and green peppers provide rich vitamin C and dietary fiber. Together with the high-quality protein of pork, the nutrition is balanced. This dish is not complicated to make and is friendly to novices. It only takes about 1 hour from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1288 kcal
steps_zh: 青椒去除根蒂切小块，土豆去皮切 2mm 薄片，猪肉切 4mm 薄片，葱横纵切 3mm 小段，姜蒜去皮拍散剁碎末；土豆淀粉加入约 15g 水搅拌均匀至水淀粉。
起锅烧油，加热至 7 成热放入猪肉片，缓缓翻滚炒至去肉红色，加入约 3ml 酱油，翻炒肉片均匀上色，放入约 2g 盐。
转 5 成油温，加入葱姜蒜炒 5 秒，然后加入土豆片，转 7 成油温均匀翻炒，加入加入约 5ml 酱油和 2g 盐，炒至土豆断生，表面轻微焦黄。
转 8 成油温加入青椒，大火煸炒出锅气（有白烟冒出），反复均匀翻炒 1 分钟上色，最后在锅周围倒入水淀粉转 4 成火勾芡。
在外观*呈粘稠状态*后关火，盛盘
steps_en: Remove the stems of the green pepper and cut into small pieces, peel the potatoes and cut into 2mm thin slices, cut the pork into 4mm thin slices, cut the green onions into 3mm lengthwise and crosswise sections, peel the ginger and garlic and chop into small pieces; add about 15g of water to the potato starch and stir evenly until it becomes watery starch.
Heat oil in a pan, heat to 70% heat, add pork slices, stir-fry slowly until the meat turns red, add about 3ml of soy sauce, stir-fry the meat slices to evenly color, add about 2g of salt.

Turn the oil temperature to 5%, add the onion, ginger and garlic and fry for 5 seconds, then add the potato slices, turn the oil to 7% and stir-fry evenly, add about 5ml of soy sauce and 2g of salt, stir-fry until the potatoes are tender and the surface is slightly browned.

Turn the oil temperature to 80% and add the green peppers. Stir-fry over high heat to release the steam (white smoke will come out). Stir-fry repeatedly for 1 minute to add color. Finally, pour water and starch around the pot and turn the heat to 40% to thicken.
When it looks *sticky*, turn off the heat and serve on a plate
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/青椒土豆炒肉/青椒土豆炒肉.md

intro_zh:
西红柿牛腩汤汁浓厚酸甜可口，牛肉软绵醇香，是道开胃下饭的家常菜。富含蛋白质、维生素和番茄红素，营养均衡。对新手有一定挑战，需要掌握炖肉火候和番茄炒汁的技巧。一般初学者大约需要 90 分钟完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：1569 大卡
intro_en:
The tomato and beef brisket soup is thick, sweet and sour, and the beef is soft and mellow. It is an appetizing home-cooked dish that goes well with meals. Rich in protein, vitamins and lycopene, nutritionally balanced. There is a certain challenge for novices, who need to master the skills of stewing meat and frying tomatoes. It usually takes beginners about 90 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 1569 kcal
ingredients_zh: 高压锅/砂锅/普通铝锅（铁锅）
2cm 两段葱段、两片姜片，葱花、姜各 10g
生抽、白胡椒粉，白糖，料/黄酒，八角三小片
牛腩（挑选肥瘦相间的口感比较好）
ingredients_en: 2cm two green onion segments, two slices of ginger, 10g each of chopped green onion and ginger
Light soy sauce, white pepper, white sugar, seasoning/rice wine, three small slices of star anise
Beef brisket (choose fat and lean ones for better taste)
steps_zh: 牛腩切条、切块成长宽高均 2cm ，冷水下锅，开锅煮制 2 分钟去除血水，捞出冲洗干净
另起锅 2L 水烧开，加入 2cm 两段葱段、两片姜片、八角、料/黄酒 5-10ml，放入焯好的牛肉，盖盖炖制（砂锅 1 小时，高压锅炖肉模式 45 分钟），筷子能轻松插透就证明炖好了
西红柿去皮：西红柿头部滑十字至腰线，筷子/刀叉从果蒂捅入，煤气灶小火，一边转动一边烤，及时拿下来查看，起皮后撕下来，切块。越小越好
起锅烧油，油温 7 成热，葱、姜各 10g，番茄下锅，炒透炒出番茄红色，加入煮好的牛腩和原汤，原汤刚刚没过牛肉即可
根据个人口味放入盐、糖、生抽调味盖盖
开锅后大火继续炒制 3-5 分钟
待番茄汁呈中等粘稠程度后关火，散入葱花，盛盘
steps_en: Cut the beef brisket into strips and cubes with an average length of 2cm in width and height. Place in a pot under cold water and cook for 2 minutes to remove the blood. Remove and rinse.

Bring another 2L pot of water to boil, add two 2cm green onions, two slices of ginger, star anise, 5-10ml of seasoning/rice wine, add the blanched beef, cover and simmer (1 hour in casserole, 45 minutes in pressure cooker stew mode). If chopsticks can be inserted easily, it means the stew is done.

Peel the tomatoes: slide the head of the tomato cross to the waistline, insert chopsticks/knives and forks from the fruit base, turn the gas stove over low heat and roast while turning, take it out in time for inspection, peel off the skin and cut into pieces. The smaller the better

Heat oil in a pan, set the oil temperature to 70%, add 10g each of onion and ginger, add tomatoes to the pan, stir-fry until the tomatoes turn red, add cooked beef brisket and stock, the stock will just cover the beef.
Add salt, sugar and light soy sauce according to personal taste and cover
After boiling the pot, continue to stir-fry over high heat for 3-5 minutes.
When the tomato juice becomes medium viscous, turn off the heat, sprinkle in the chopped green onions, and serve on a plate
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/西红柿牛腩/西红柿牛腩.md

intro_zh:
老妈蹄花汤色奶白，猪蹄软烂脱骨，口感细腻，配上酸辣蘸汁十分开胃，是经典的川式家常菜。猪蹄富含胶原蛋白，白芸豆增添绵密口感，营养丰富。操作需要高压锅和提前浸泡，对新手有一定挑战，但按步骤来做不难掌握。含浸泡和压煮，全程大约需要 2 小时（不含提前一晚浸泡白芸豆的时间）。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1425 大卡
intro_en:
Lao Ma's Hoof Flower Soup is milky white in color, the pig's trotters are soft and fall off the bones, and has a delicate texture. It is very appetizing when paired with hot and sour dipping sauce. It is a classic Sichuan-style home-cooked dish. Pig's trotters are rich in collagen, and white kidney beans add a dense texture and are rich in nutrients. The operation requires a pressure cooker and soaking in advance, which is a challenge for novices, but it is not difficult to master by following the steps. Including soaking and pressure cooking, the entire process takes about 2 hours (not including soaking the white kidney beans the night before).
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1425 kcal
ingredients_zh: 猪蹄（尽量选择猪前蹄：肉多筋多骨头少）
ingredients_en: Pig trotters (try to choose the front trotters: more meat, more tendons, less bones)
steps_zh: 200g 白芸豆提前一晚清水浸泡备用
准备猪前蹄，买菜的时候让师傅从中间劈开，用喷火枪去除毛囊，拿回家清洗
冷水锅中加入猪蹄、大葱段、姜片、料酒，焯水十分钟，撇去浮沫，捞出洗干净备用
高压锅中放入猪蹄、当归、白芷、白胡椒粉、姜片，上汽后压三十分钟，放入白芸豆，再压十分钟，这个时候如果汤底是奶白色，那么恭喜是正确的（如果中途需要加水，只能加热水）
揭盖后加入盐、鸡精、葱花调味
调制灵魂汁子：放入葱、蒜、小米椒，白胡椒粉、生抽、香醋、油泼辣子、花椒油、猪蹄原汤
灵魂汁子，浇给
steps_en: Soak 200g white kidney beans in water one night in advance and set aside
Prepare the pig's front hooves. When buying food, ask the chef to split it in the middle, use a flamethrower to remove the hair follicles, and take it home to clean.
Add pig's trotters, green onion segments, ginger slices and cooking wine to a pot of cold water, blanch for ten minutes, skim off the foam, remove and wash well and set aside

Put pig's trotters, angelica root, angelica root, white pepper powder, and ginger slices into the pressure cooker. Put the steam on and press for thirty minutes. Add the white kidney beans and press for another ten minutes. If the soup base is milky white at this time, congratulations are correct (if you need to add water halfway, you can only heat the water)
Uncover and add salt, chicken essence and chopped green onion to taste
Prepare the soul juice: add onions, garlic, millet pepper, white pepper, light soy sauce, balsamic vinegar, spicy oil, pepper oil, and pig trotter stock
Soul juice, pour it on

name_zh: 空气炸锅脆皮现腌炸鸡
name_en: Air fryer crispy marinated fried chicken
intro_zh:
空气炸锅炸鸡是一道先腌后炸的家常肉菜，外壳酥脆、内里多汁，调味可以按口味灵活切换。鸡翅富含优质蛋白和脂肪，适合作为正餐主菜或加餐。实操约 55-70 分钟（含一次裹粉；若选二次裹粉时约 70-90 分钟），如追求最佳效果，可冷藏腌制过夜（提前一天准备，第二天再炸）。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：700 大卡
intro_en:
Air fryer fried chicken is a home-style meat dish that is marinated and then fried. It has a crispy outer shell and juicy interior. The seasoning can be flexibly switched according to taste. Chicken wings are rich in high-quality protein and fat and are suitable as a main course or snack. The actual operation takes about 55-70 minutes (including the first coating with flour; if you choose the second coating, it will take about 70-90 minutes). If you want the best effect, you can refrigerate and marinate overnight (prepare one day in advance and fry the next day).
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 700 kcal
ingredients_zh: 淀粉（玉米淀粉或土豆淀粉均可）
食用油（用于喷涂或刷涂）
酸奶或牛奶（可选，帮助肉质更滑嫩）
鸡蛋（可选，帮助形成更饱满的外壳）
泡打粉（可选，帮助形成更酥脆的外壳）
鸡蛋 1 个（可选，用于裹浆）
ingredients_en: Starch (cornstarch or potato starch will work)
Yogurt or milk (optional, makes the meat more tender)
Eggs (optional, to help form a plumper crust)
Baking powder (optional, helps form a crispier crust)
steps_zh: 鸡翅中清洗后擦干水分，每个鸡翅两面各划 2 刀，方便入味。
调制腌料：生抽 15ml、蒜粉 8g、红甜椒粉 5g、洋葱粉 3g、黑胡椒粉 3g，牛奶或希腊酸奶 5ml（可选，让鸡肉更滑嫩）搅拌均匀。
将腌料和鸡翅中一起放到大 zip 保鲜袋里充分搅拌按摩，在冰箱里静置一晚。
裹粉：中筋面粉 60g、淀粉 30g、蒜粉 5g、红甜椒粉 5g、洋葱粉 2g、黑胡椒粉 2g、泡打粉 1g（可选，让外壳更酥脆）搅拌均匀。
裹浆（可选）：鸡蛋 1 个，牛奶或水 5ml，充分打散。
裹粉：将鸡翅中抖干水分，放入裹粉中轻轻按压，抖落多余的粉，一旁静置 10 分钟。
裹浆（可选）：如想要更饱满的外壳，可以再裹一层浆，然后重复裹粉步骤。
空气炸锅预热到 180°C，预热 5 分钟。
炸篮内刷薄油，鸡皮面朝下，鸡翅上喷或者刷薄油。
设定空气炸锅 180°C，先炸 10 分钟。
打开炸篮翻面，在鸡翅表面补喷或者刷薄油，再以 180°C 炸 6 分钟。
观察鸡皮颜色，并用牙签扎一下最厚的部分，看是否有血水流出。
如需要再以 200°C 炸 1-2 分钟补脆上色（可迭代进行，先炸 1 分钟观察再决定是否继续）。
steps_en: Wash the chicken wings and pat dry. Score 2 knives on both sides of each chicken wing for easy flavoring.

Prepare marinade: 15ml light soy sauce, 8g garlic powder, 5g red bell pepper powder, 3g onion powder, 3g black pepper powder, 5ml milk or Greek yogurt (optional, to make the chicken more tender) and mix well.
Place the marinade and chicken wings in a large zip bag, stir and massage thoroughly, and let rest in the refrigerator overnight.

Breading flour: 60g all-purpose flour, 30g starch, 5g garlic powder, 5g red bell pepper powder, 2g onion powder, 2g black pepper powder, 1g baking powder (optional, to make the shell crisper) and mix well.
Battering batter (optional): 1 egg, 5ml milk or water, well beaten.
Breading: Shake the chicken wings dry, put them into the batter and press lightly, shake off the excess flour, and set aside for 10 minutes.
Breading batter (optional): If you want a fuller crust, you can coat it with another layer of batter, and then repeat the battering step.
Preheat the air fryer to 180°C for 5 minutes.
Brush the frying basket with a thin layer of oil, with the chicken skin side down, and spray or brush the chicken wings with a thin layer of oil.
Set the air fryer to 180°C and fry for 10 minutes.
Open the frying basket and turn it over, spray or brush a thin layer of oil on the surface of the chicken wings, and fry at 180°C for 6 minutes.
Observe the color of the chicken skin and prick the thickest part with a toothpick to see if there is blood flowing out.
If necessary, fry at 200°C for another 1-2 minutes to add crispiness and color (this can be done iteratively, first fry for 1 minute and observe before deciding whether to continue).
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/空气炸锅脆皮现腌炸鸡/空气炸锅脆皮现腌炸鸡.md

intro_zh:
田螺酿是阳朔“十八酿”之首，螺肉韧而紧致、猪肉嫩滑，紫苏薄荷清香扑鼻，曾登上《舌尖上的中国 2》。富含蛋白质和多种微量元素，螺肉与猪肉搭配营养互补。这道菜步骤稍多，对新手有一定挑战，需提前半天让田螺吐沙，正式制作约 40 分钟，适合节假日全家一起动手。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：533 大卡
intro_en:
Stuffed snails are the first among Yangshuo's "Eighteen Brews". The snail meat is tough and firm, the pork is tender and smooth, and the perilla mint is fragrant. It has been featured in "A Bite of China 2". Rich in protein and a variety of trace elements, snail meat and pork are nutritionally complementary. This dish has a few steps and is a challenge for novices. You need to let the snails spit out the sand half a day in advance. It takes about 40 minutes to make it. It is suitable for the whole family to make together during holidays.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 533 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大田螺（乒乓球大小，约 20-25 个，上午买回放一下午吐沙）
猪肉（250g，肥瘦比例 3:7 的前夹肉最佳）
新鲜薄荷叶（一小把，点睛之笔）
紫苏叶（一小把，与田螺是绝配）
生抽 30ml（其中 15ml 调馅、15ml 调味汤汁）
ingredients_en: Large snails (table tennis size, about 20-25 pieces, bought in the morning and left to spit out sand in the afternoon)
Pork (250g, front-loaded meat with a fat-to-lean ratio of 3:7 is best)
Fresh mint leaves (a small handful, the finishing touch)
Perilla leaves (a small handful, perfect with snails)
30ml light soy sauce (15ml for filling and 15ml for seasoning soup)
steps_zh: 上午买回田螺，放入清水盆中，静置一下午吐沙
可在水中滴几滴香油（或者芥末~）加速吐沙
用刷子将田螺外壳刷洗干净（这一步可以时间久一些）
用老虎钳或菜刀剪去田螺尾部（约剪掉 1/3 到一半）
大锅烧水，水开后放入田螺焯烫 1-2 分钟（时间不可太久，螺肉会老）
捞出后用牙签挑出螺肉，去掉螺盖和黑色泥肠
螺壳用水冲洗干净，甩干水分备用
螺肉用盐抓洗干净，剁成碎粒（不要剁成泥，保留颗粒感才有嚼头）
猪肉剁成肉末
薄荷叶、紫苏叶切碎，姜切末，葱切葱花
将螺肉碎、猪肉末、薄荷碎、紫苏碎、姜末、葱花放入碗中
加入三花酒 15ml、生抽 15ml、食盐 3g
可选加入：蚝油 10ml、白胡椒粉 2g、淀粉 10g
朝一个方向搅拌至馅料粘稠上劲
图省事上面的所有东西直接放入打肉机直接打。
将馅料用筷子塞入田螺壳中，尽量塞满塞紧，但不要撑破螺壳
依次酿完所有田螺
热锅，倒入 30ml 食用油，可选放入酸笋和干辣椒炒出香味
倒入清水或高汤约 300ml，加生抽 15ml、食盐 2g，大火烧开
将酿好的田螺放入锅中，盖上锅盖，中小火焖煮 10 分钟
焖煮过程中不要频繁翻动，等肉馅六七成熟定型后再轻轻翻动
开盖，放入剩余的新鲜薄荷叶和紫苏叶，再焖 2-3 分钟
大火收汁至汤汁浓稠，即可出锅
steps_en: I bought the snails in the morning, put them in a basin of clear water, and let them sit for an afternoon to spit out sand.
You can drop a few drops of sesame oil (or mustard~) in the water to speed up spitting out sand.
Use a brush to clean the snail shell (this step can take a little longer)
Use vise or kitchen knife to cut off the tail of the snail (about 1/3 to half)
Boil water in a large pot. After the water boils, add the snails and blanch them for 1-2 minutes (the time should not be too long, as the snail meat will become old)
After taking it out, use a toothpick to pick out the snail meat, and remove the snail cover and black mud sausage.
Rinse the snail shell with water, shake dry and set aside.
Wash the snail meat with salt and chop it into small pieces (do not chop it into puree, keep the grainy texture to make it chewy)
minced pork
Chop mint leaves and perilla leaves, mince ginger, and chop green onions.
Put the minced snail meat, minced pork, mint, perilla, ginger and green onion into a bowl
Add 15ml of Sanhua wine, 15ml of light soy sauce, and 3g of salt
Optional addition: 10ml oyster sauce, 2g white pepper, 10g starch
Stir in one direction until the filling becomes thick and thick
To save trouble, put everything above directly into the meat blender and beat it directly.
Stuff the filling into the snail shell with chopsticks, try to stuff it as tightly as possible, but do not burst the shell.
Brew all the snails in sequence
Heat the pan, pour 30ml cooking oil, optionally add sour bamboo shoots and dried chili and stir-fry until fragrant
Pour in about 300ml of water or stock, add 15ml of light soy sauce and 2g of salt, and bring to a boil over high heat
Put the stuffed snails into the pot, cover the pot, and simmer over medium-low heat for 10 minutes
Do not stir frequently during the simmering process. Wait until the meat filling is mature and set, then stir gently.
Open the lid, add the remaining fresh mint leaves and perilla leaves, and simmer for another 2-3 minutes
Reduce the sauce over high heat until the soup is thick and ready to serve

intro_zh:
香煎五花肉是一道家常风味的快手荤菜，五花肉片煎得焦香微脆、肥而不腻，搭配脆爽的生菜叶和咸鲜豆瓣酱，入口酱香浓郁又解腻。猪肉富含优质蛋白质和脂肪，能快速补充能量，生菜则提供膳食纤维和维生素，营养更均衡。这道菜适合有一定下厨基础的朋友，新手只要注意火候和防溅油也能轻松上手，从备料到出锅大约半小时即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：2985 大卡
intro_en:
Pan-fried pork belly is a home-style quick meat dish. The pork belly slices are pan-fried until they are crispy, fat but not greasy. It is paired with crisp lettuce leaves and salty bean paste. The sauce is rich and soothing. Pork is rich in high-quality protein and fat, which can quickly replenish energy, while lettuce provides dietary fiber and vitamins, making the nutrition more balanced. This dish is suitable for friends who have some basic knowledge of cooking. Novices can easily get started as long as they pay attention to the heat and prevent splashing of oil. It takes about half an hour from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 2985 kcal
ingredients_zh: 五花肉条（推荐长宽高为 20cm\*6cm\*5cm）
酱油，盐，味精，料酒，姜蒜，油，豆瓣酱
ingredients_en: Pork belly strips (recommended length, width and height are 20cm\*6cm\*5cm)
Soy sauce, salt, MSG, cooking wine, ginger and garlic, oil, bean paste
steps_zh: 将五花肉条沿长边切片，每片厚 1mm-1.5mm，备用
将切好的五花肉放置碗中，依次加入 8g 酱油，1g 盐，1g 味精，10g 料酒，两片姜，两朵拍扁的大蒜腌制 10 分钟
将生菜叶直接用手扒下来，洗干净，备用
热锅，倒入 5ml 食用油。油轻微冒烟后下入五花肉。单面煎制焦黄色后翻面，另一边同理。
五花肉出锅后，装盘。
将豆瓣酱抹到菜叶上，卷着五花肉即可食用
steps_en: Slice the pork belly strips along the long side, each slice is 1mm-1.5mm thick, set aside
Place the cut pork belly in a bowl, add 8g soy sauce, 1g salt, 1g MSG, 10g cooking wine, two slices of ginger, and two flat garlic cloves and marinate for 10 minutes.
Pluck the lettuce leaves directly with your hands, wash them and set aside
Heat the pan and pour 5ml cooking oil. When the oil smokes slightly, add the pork belly. Flip until browned on one side and do the same with the other side.
After the pork belly is out of the pan, put it on a plate.
Spread the bean paste onto the vegetable leaves, roll the pork belly and serve

file_path: dishes/meat_dish/香煎五花肉/香煎五花肉.md

intro_zh:
锅包肉是东北经典名菜，起源于哈尔滨道台府，以白醋调出鲜明酸香，外壳酥脆、肉片滑嫩，酸甜爽口。猪肉提供优质蛋白质，搭配葱姜等蔬菜开胃解腻。这道菜需要掌握挂浆、油温和复炸技巧，烹饪难度中等偏上，新手需要耐心练习。从腌肉、调糊到炸制出锅，预计制作时长约 90 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：882 大卡
intro_en:
Guobao Pork is a classic Northeastern dish, originating from Daotai Prefecture in Harbin. It is made with white vinegar to create a bright and sour aroma. The shell is crispy, the meat is tender, and it is sweet and sour. Pork provides high-quality protein, and is paired with onions, ginger and other vegetables to appetize and relieve fatigue. This dish requires mastering the battering, oil temperature and re-frying skills. The cooking difficulty is medium to high, and novices need to practice patiently. From marinating the meat, mixing the batter to frying it, the preparation time is estimated to be about 90 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 882 kcal
ingredients_zh: 白醋（建议使用 9 度的醋，这样才会有较为突出的老式锅包肉特有的醋香）
玉米淀粉 1.5g（可用土豆淀粉代替）

intro_zh:
香菇滑鸡是一道以鸡腿肉和香菇为主料的家常菜，鸡腿肉经过煸炒和焖煮后口感滑嫩，搭配香菇独特的菌香，汤汁浓郁鲜美，属于老少皆宜的粤式风味。鸡肉富含优质蛋白质和多种氨基酸，香菇含有香菇多糖和膳食纤维，有助于增强免疫力和促进消化。这道菜需要一些刀工和火候控制，对新手有一定挑战，整体制作约需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：608 大卡
intro_en:
Mushroom-smoothed chicken is a home-cooked dish that uses chicken thighs and shiitake mushrooms as the main ingredients. The chicken thighs are stir-fried and braised to give it a smooth and tender texture. It is paired with the unique aroma of the shiitake mushrooms and the soup is rich and delicious. It is a Cantonese style that is suitable for all ages. Chicken is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of amino acids, and mushrooms contain lentinan and dietary fiber, which help enhance immunity and promote digestion. This dish requires some knife skills and fire control, making it challenging for novices, and takes about an hour to make.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 608 kcal
steps_zh: 温水泡发干香菇
姜切小块，葱切段，蒜对半切小粒
鸡腿去骨（不去骨也可，只是略影响程序员吃饭的效率而已），切成小块
泡发的香菇一分为四，香菇水留着备用
鸡腿肉焯水 1 分钟，去除血沫和杂质
鸡腿肉中加料酒 15ml、生抽 15ml、盐 1.5g、老抽 15ml，抓匀
油温 3 成，下入鸡腿肉煸炒，等鸡腿肉金黄后盛出备用
锅留底油，下入葱、姜、蒜炒香，香菇入锅，大火翻匀
等待 20 秒会有香菇香味从锅中飘出，此时下入煸炒过的鸡腿肉，下入香菇水（全部，**本程序员认为的灵魂操作**）、糖 15ml、生抽 30ml
转中火不盖盖，咕嘟 2 分钟收浓汤汁，淋入香油 5ml，撒上葱花后即可关火、装盘
steps_en: Soak dried mushrooms in warm water
Cut the ginger into small pieces, cut the green onions into sections, and cut the garlic in half and into small pieces.
Remove the bones from the chicken legs (it’s okay not to remove the bones, it just slightly affects the programmer’s eating efficiency) and cut into small pieces.
Divide the soaked mushrooms into quarters and reserve the mushroom water for later use
Blanch chicken thighs for 1 minute to remove blood foam and impurities
Add 15ml of cooking wine, 15ml of light soy sauce, 1.5g of salt, and 15ml of dark soy sauce to the chicken legs, mix well
Heat the oil to 30%, add the chicken thighs and stir-fry until the chicken thighs are golden, take them out and set aside.
Leave some oil in the pot, add onion, ginger and garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add mushrooms to the pot and stir well over high heat.

Wait for 20 seconds until the aroma of shiitake mushrooms wafts out of the pot. At this time, add the stir-fried chicken legs, mushroom water (all, **soul operation according to this programmer**), 15ml of sugar, and 30ml of light soy sauce.
Turn to medium heat without covering, simmer for 2 minutes to thicken the soup, pour in 5ml of sesame oil, sprinkle with chopped green onion, turn off the heat and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
酱排骨色泽酱红，肉质酥烂，骨香浓郁，汁浓味鲜，咸中带甜，是一道经典的家常菜。排骨富含优质蛋白质和钙质，营养均衡。制作涉及炒糖色和较长时间炖煮，对新手有一定挑战，但只要按步骤操作，也能顺利掌握。预计从备料到出锅约需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1351 大卡
intro_en:
Sauced spareribs are red in color, crispy in texture, rich in bone aroma, juicy and juicy, salty and sweet, and are a classic home-cooked dish. Spare ribs are rich in high-quality protein and calcium and have balanced nutrition. The production involves frying the sugar and stewing it for a long time, which is a certain challenge for novices, but as long as you follow the steps, you can master it smoothly. Expect it to take about 1 hour from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1351 kcal
steps_zh: 起锅烧热水，放入排骨、姜片、料酒，煮开后用勺子舀去白色油沫，2-3 分钟后出锅
冷水清洗排骨，清洗 2-3 遍
小火起锅，加入食用油，加入白砂糖 ，轻轻搅拌到糖水变成黄色
倒入排骨翻炒 30 S 后，加入生抽、蚝油、五香粉、蒜、小米椒后翻炒 30 S 后，加入清水没过排骨
大火煮 30 分钟，加入老抽上色，再煮 10 分钟
起锅摆盘
steps_en: Heat hot water in a pot, add pork ribs, ginger slices, and cooking wine. When it boils, use a spoon to scoop off the white oil foam and take it out of the pot after 2-3 minutes.
Wash the ribs in cold water 2-3 times
Heat the pot over low heat, add cooking oil, add sugar, stir gently until the sugar water turns yellow
Pour in the ribs and stir-fry for 30 seconds. Add light soy sauce, oyster sauce, five-spice powder, garlic, and millet pepper and stir-fry for 30 seconds. Add water to cover the ribs.
Cook over high heat for 30 minutes, add dark soy sauce for color, and cook for another 10 minutes
Put the pot on the plate

intro_zh:
这道菜鲜香微辣，芥末风味浓郁，虾肉紧实弹嫩，是一道快手家常海鲜菜。虾本身富含优质蛋白和钙，脂肪含量低，搭配芥末开胃解腻。中等难度，只要按步骤调制碗汁、控制火候，新手也能较快上手，全程约需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：579 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is fragrant and slightly spicy, with rich mustard flavor and firm and tender shrimp meat. It is a quick home-cooked seafood dish. The shrimp itself is rich in high-quality protein and calcium, and has low fat content. It can be paired with mustard to make it appetizing and relieve fatigue. The level of difficulty is medium. As long as you follow the steps to prepare the bowl of juice and control the heat, novices can get started quickly. The whole process takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 579 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小米辣（不吃辣可不放或替换成红菜椒）
ingredients_en: Spicy millet (you can omit it or replace it with red bell pepper if you don’t like spicy food)
30g light soy sauce, for bowl juice
