intro_zh:
排骨软烂脱骨，土豆绵软入味，酱香浓郁微甜微辣，是一道典型的北方家常炖菜。富含蛋白质、钙质和碳水化合物，营养均衡。制作略有难度，需掌握炒糖色与火候，但步骤清晰，新手也能尝试，全程大约 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：991 大卡
intro_en:
The ribs are soft and fall off the bones, the potatoes are soft and tasty, and the sauce is rich, slightly sweet and slightly spicy. It is a typical northern home-cooked stew. Rich in protein, calcium and carbohydrates, nutritionally balanced. It is a little difficult to make, as you need to master the color and heat of the fried sugar, but the steps are clear and even novices can try it. The whole process takes about 1.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 991 kcal
ingredients_zh: 姜 = 30g （分为两份：15g 焯水用，15g 炒制用）
小葱 = 25g （分为两份：15g 打成葱结，10g 切葱花）
料酒 = 25ml （分为两份：15ml 焯水用，10ml 炒制用）
ingredients_en: Ginger = 30g (divided into two parts: 15g for blanching and 15g for stir-frying)
Spring onions = 25g (divided into two parts: 15g chopped into knots, 10g chopped into small pieces)
Cooking wine = 25ml (divided into two parts: 15ml for blanching, 10ml for stir-frying)
steps_zh: **处理土豆：** 将 300g 土豆去皮，切成不规则的滚刀块 。**切好后立刻泡入一盆清水中**，隔绝氧气防止表面氧化发黑，备用。
**处理葱姜：** 将 30g 姜全部切成薄片（分成两份 15g）。将 25g 小葱处理好：15g 挽成一个葱结，剩余 10g 切成细小葱花备用。
**封装酱汁碗（一键调用）：** 拿一个小碗，依次加入 10ml 生抽、5ml 老抽、5ml 蚝油、5ml 黄豆酱，彻底搅拌均匀，放在灶台触手可及处备用。
**封装香料碟（一键调用）：** 拿一个小碟，放入 5g 干辣椒、1g 八角（约 1-2 颗）、1g 花椒（约 10 粒）、1g 桂皮（一小块），以及刚才切好的 15g 姜片，备用。
**开启异步水程：** 按下电热水壶开关，开始烧制 700ml 开水。（确保炒制完成时，开水刚好就绪）。
**冷水焯水：** 将 750g 肋排冷水下锅，加入 15g 葱结、15g 姜片、15ml 料酒。大火煮沸后，继续保持沸腾焯水 2 分钟，逼出内部血沫。
**热洗冷防：** 捞出排骨，**必须用热水**将排骨表面残留的浮沫清洗干净（遇冷水肉质会剧烈收缩变硬）。
**绝对脱水（防爆防溅）：** 洗净的排骨**必须用厨房纸彻底吸干表面水分**，装盘放在炒锅旁边备用（防止后续下入高温糖色时发生剧烈炸锅）。
**炒制糖色：** 热锅凉油，加入 20ml 食用油。将 10g 白糖倒入锅中，中小火不停搅拌。翻炒至白糖完全融化冒泡，并呈现红棕色的焦糖色 。
**上色煎制：** 迅速加入彻底脱水的 750g 排骨，转中大火翻炒。煎制约 2-3 分钟，至排骨两面微微金黄，且均匀裹满焦糖色。
**一键爆香：** 在锅中拨出一小块空地，**直接倒入【香料碟】**。利用锅底的热油爆香约 10 秒，激发出香料的脂溶性香气。
**一键调味：** 顺着热锅边缘淋入剩余的 10ml 料酒激发出锅气。紧接着**直接倒入【酱汁碗】**，翻炒约 30 秒，让酱料完全包裹排骨并炒出浓郁酱香。
**加水长炖：** 此时电热水壶已沸腾，直接加入 700ml 滚烫的开水（水量需没过排骨），大火烧开。随后盖上锅盖，转小火持续焖煮 40 分钟。
**加入土豆：** 40 分钟后打开锅盖，将泡在水里的 300g 土豆捞出沥干，下入锅中。重新盖上锅盖，继续小火焖煮 15-20 分钟，直到用筷子能轻松扎透土豆块。
**调味收汁：** 打开锅盖，加入 3g 盐（此时可尝一下汤汁，根据个人口味酌情微调）。转大火开始翻炒收汁，大约需要 3-5 分钟。直到汤汁变得浓稠，均匀地挂在排骨和土豆上即可关火。
**点缀出锅：** 盛盘出锅，在表面均匀撒上预处理好的 10g 葱花作为 UI 点缀即可。
steps_en: **Processing potatoes:** Peel 300g potatoes and cut into irregular hob pieces. **Immediately after cutting, soak in a basin of clean water** to isolate oxygen and prevent surface oxidation and blackening, set aside.

**Processing onion and ginger:** Cut all 30g of ginger into thin slices (divided into two 15g portions). Process 25g of green onions: roll 15g into a knot, and cut the remaining 10g into finely chopped green onions for later use.

**Encapsulated sauce bowl (one-click call):** Take a small bowl, add 10ml light soy sauce, 5ml dark soy sauce, 5ml oyster sauce, 5ml soybean paste in sequence, mix thoroughly and put it within reach of the stove for later use.

**Encapsulated spice dish (one-click call):** Take a small dish, add 5g dried chili pepper, 1g star anise (about 1-2 pieces), 1g peppercorns (about 10 pieces), 1g cinnamon (a small piece), and the 15g ginger slices just cut, set aside.
**Start the asynchronous water process:** Press the electric kettle switch to start boiling 700ml of boiling water. (Make sure the boiling water is just ready when the frying is completed).

**Cold water blanch:** Put 750g ribs in cold water, add 15g scallions, 15g ginger slices, and 15ml cooking wine. After boiling over high heat, continue to boil and blanch for 2 minutes to force out the blood foam inside.

**Hot wash and cold protection:** Take out the ribs, **must use hot water** to clean the remaining foam on the surface of the ribs (the meat will shrink violently and harden when exposed to cold water).

**Absolute dehydration (explosion-proof and splash-proof):** The washed ribs **must be thoroughly soaked with kitchen paper to dry the surface moisture**, plated and placed next to the wok for later use (to prevent violent frying when high-temperature sugar is added later).

**Frying sugar color:** Heat the pan with cold oil and add 20ml cooking oil. Pour 10g of white sugar into the pot and stir constantly over medium-low heat. Stir-fry until the sugar is completely melted and bubbling, and takes on a reddish-brown caramel color.

**Coloring and frying:** Quickly add 750g of thoroughly dehydrated pork ribs, turn to medium heat and stir-fry. Fry for about 2-3 minutes, until both sides of the ribs are lightly golden and evenly coated with caramel color.

**One-click sauteing:** Make a small space in the pot and **pour directly into the [Spice Dish]**. Use the hot oil at the bottom of the pot to sauté for about 10 seconds to bring out the fat-soluble aroma of the spices.

**One-click seasoning:** Pour the remaining 10ml of cooking wine along the edge of the hot pot to stimulate the steam. Then **pour directly into the [sauce bowl]** and stir-fry for about 30 seconds, allowing the sauce to completely coat the ribs and stir-fry the rich sauce aroma.

**Add water and simmer for a long time:** At this time, the electric kettle has boiled. Directly add 700ml of boiling water (the amount of water needs to cover the ribs) and bring to a boil over high heat. Then cover the pot, reduce heat and continue simmering for 40 minutes.

**Add potatoes:** After 40 minutes, open the lid of the pot, take out the 300g potatoes soaked in water, drain them, and put them into the pot. Replace the lid and continue to simmer for 15-20 minutes, until the potatoes can be easily pierced with chopsticks.

**Seasoning and collecting the sauce:** Open the lid of the pot and add 3g of salt (you can taste the soup at this time and fine-tune it according to your personal taste). Turn up the heat and start stir-frying to reduce the juice, which will take about 3-5 minutes. Turn off the heat until the soup thickens and evenly coats the ribs and potatoes.
**Decoration and serving:** Place on a plate and serve. Sprinkle 10g of pre-processed green onion evenly on the surface as UI decoration.

intro_zh:
羊排焖面是一道肉香浓郁、面条筋道的北方家常硬菜，羊排软烂，宽面吸足汤汁，每一口都满足。这道菜有肉有面有菜，一顿饭就能补齐人体所需的蛋白质、碳水和脂肪，营养全面。制作时需要先炖羊排再和面焖面，步骤稍多，更适合有一定下厨经验的朋友尝试，预计全程大约花费一个半小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1616 大卡
intro_en:
Lamb chop braised noodles is a northern home-cooked dish with rich meat flavor and chewy noodles. The lamb chops are soft and tender, and the wide noodles soak up the soup, making every bite satisfying. This dish contains meat, noodles and vegetables. One meal can provide the protein, carbohydrates and fats needed by the human body, making it comprehensively nutritious. When making it, you need to stew the lamb chops first and then simmer the noodles. There are a few steps, and it is more suitable for friends with some cooking experience. The whole process is expected to take about one and a half hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1616 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青椒，甜椒 各 2 个
steps_zh: 羊肉冷水下锅焯水，水开了之后把血沫撇掉，捞出羊肉。
切好生姜（ 4 片)，放入干辣椒与花椒在碗里备用。
在炒锅加入油。（多一点也没关系）
油热之后，放入白砂糖，给羊肉炒出焦糖色。
羊肉水份炒干之后，放入盐、老抽，以及备好的调味料。
加入清水没过羊肉，大火煮沸之后，让其继续煮 10 分钟，之后小火炖煮 30 分钟。
在此期间，可以和面。和面的量以及操作方法在附加内容里讲解 *（注 1）。
放入青椒，甜椒，大葱，以及面皮进行翻炒。
翻炒均匀之后，即可出锅。
steps_en: Blanch the mutton in a pot with cold water. When the water boils, skim off the blood and take out the mutton.
Cut ginger (4 slices), add dried chili pepper and Sichuan peppercorns in a bowl and set aside.
Add oil to wok. (A little more doesn’t matter)
After the oil is hot, add sugar and fry the lamb until it turns caramel color.
After the mutton is fried, add salt, dark soy sauce, and prepared seasonings.
Add water to cover the lamb, bring to a boil over high heat, allow to continue cooking for 10 minutes, then simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
During this period, you can make noodles. The amount of dough and the operation method are explained in the additional content* (Note 1).
Add green pepper, bell pepper, scallions, and dough and stir-fry.
After stir-frying evenly, take it out of the pan.

intro_zh:
荔枝肉是一道酸甜酥香的福州传统闽菜，外焦里嫩的肉块裹着红亮的酱汁，搭配水果添入清爽果香。猪瘦肉富含优质蛋白质，凤梨含有膳食纤维和维生素，能帮助开胃解腻。制作过程需要切肉、挂糊和两次油炸，略有挑战但步骤明确，适合有一定下厨基础的美食爱好者尝试，大约 45 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：681 大卡
intro_en:
Lychee meat is a traditional Fujian dish in Fuzhou that is sour, sweet and crispy. The meat is charred on the outside and tender on the inside, wrapped in a bright red sauce, and paired with fruits to add a refreshing fruity aroma. Lean pork is rich in high-quality protein, and pineapples contain dietary fiber and vitamins, which can help appetite and relieve fatigue. The production process requires cutting the meat, battering and frying twice. It is slightly challenging but the steps are clear. It is suitable for food lovers with a certain cooking foundation to try. It can be served to the table in about 45 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 681 kcal
steps_zh: 瘦肉切块（每块 2-3 cm ），放入大碗中，加入鸡蛋 1 个 、生粉 50 g 、生抽 3 ml 、鸡精 2 g
充分搅拌,直至生粉包裹住瘦肉块（太稀则继续加生粉，太干则加水），然后加入 5 ml 油，在充分搅拌后备用
在准备一个碗，加入番茄酱、鸡精 3 g 、生抽 2 ml 、姜末、白砂糖、生粉 10 g \香醋、凉水 200 ml ,充分搅拌后备用
切一个凤梨, 准备 6 个 （每个 1.5-2 cm）凤梨块
起锅烧油，倒入 500 ml 油，一直烧油直到听到油炸声
将瘦肉一个一个放入锅中（切记不可以整碗倒入），保证每个肉不要粘在一起
全部放入瘦肉后，每 30 S 用勺子来回两面翻转瘦肉块，直至瘦肉块表面金黄
取出瘦肉，一分钟后倒入油锅中继续炸，直至瘦肉块表面出现焦黄后，取出放入大碗备用
起锅，倒入汤汁，30 S 后倒入瘦肉块、凤梨块，充分翻炒后 出锅
摆上芝麻
steps_en: Cut lean meat into pieces (2-3 cm each), put into a large bowl, add 1 egg, 50 g cornstarch, 3 ml light soy sauce, and 2 g chicken essence
Stir thoroughly until the cornstarch coats the lean meat (if it is too thin, continue to add cornstarch, if it is too dry, add water), then add 5 ml of oil, stir thoroughly and set aside.
Prepare a bowl, add tomato sauce, 3 g chicken essence, 2 ml light soy sauce, minced ginger, white sugar, 10 g cornstarch, balsamic vinegar, 200 ml cold water, stir well and set aside
Cut a pineapple and prepare 6 (1.5-2 cm each) pineapple chunks
Heat oil in a pan, pour 500 ml of oil, and continue to heat oil until you hear frying sounds
Put the lean meat into the pot one by one (remember not to pour the whole bowl), ensuring that each piece of meat does not stick together.
After all the lean meat is put in, use a spoon to flip the lean meat pieces back and forth every 30 seconds until the surface of the lean meat pieces is golden.
Take out the lean meat, pour it into the oil pan after one minute and continue frying until the surface of the lean meat becomes brown, take it out and put it into a large bowl for later use.
Lift the pot, pour in the soup, add the lean meat cubes and pineapple cubes after 30 seconds, stir-fry thoroughly and remove from the pan
Place sesame seeds

intro_zh:
台式卤肉饭是一道浓香四溢的台湾家常料理，肉条软糯入味，酱汁琥珀般油亮，浇在热米饭上满口脂香。富含优质蛋白、胶原蛋白和碳水，能快速补充能量。做法对新手非常友好，只需备好食材、掌握火候，全程约 1.5 小时即可完成，其中动手操作仅需半小时，剩下的交给小火慢炖。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1495 大卡
intro_en:
Taiwanese braised pork rice is a fragrant Taiwanese home-cooked dish. The meat strips are soft and glutinous, and the sauce is amber-like and oily. It is poured on the hot rice and is full of fat. Rich in high-quality protein, collagen and carbohydrates, it can quickly replenish energy. The method is very friendly to novices. You only need to prepare the ingredients and control the heat. The whole process can be completed in about 1.5 hours. The hands-on operation only takes half an hour, and the rest is left to slow simmering.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1495 kcal
ingredients_zh: 带皮五花肉 （可用猪绞肉代替）
鸡蛋 4 个（可任意修改鸡蛋个数）
米饭 （根据个人食量决定）
ingredients_en: Pork belly with skin (can be replaced with minced pork)
Rice wine (cooking wine can be substituted)
4 eggs (the number of eggs can be modified as desired)
steps_zh: 带皮五花肉切成 $0.7cm（长）\times 0.7cm（宽） \times 2.5cm（高）$ 的细长条
红葱头、大蒜切末备用
鸡蛋煮熟剥壳，并用刀划破蛋白（便于入味），备用。
**大火**热锅，锅内放入 15 ml 食用油，让油滑满锅底即可。
放入五花肉条，翻炒至肉色稍微变白，沿锅边淋入米酒 10ml 。继续翻炒至五花肉不再出油。
将切好的红葱头加入锅中，翻炒 1 分钟爆出油葱香味。
将切好的红葱头加入锅中，翻炒 30 秒。
把猪肉推到旁边，放入冰糖加热到融化冒泡变成焦糖，再把猪肉一起翻拌，让焦糖均匀附着。
加入生抽炒出香气。
呛入米酒 25 ml ，水加到淹过猪肉，加入白胡椒粉、五香粉、八角、香叶、水煮蛋，沸腾后转小火卤 1 小时。
1 小时后，开大火收汁直到酱汁浓稠，呈现有光泽的琥珀色，即完成。
炖煮结束后，乘一碗米饭，将软烂的卤肉浇在米饭上，并加上卤蛋，开始享用。
steps_en: Cut the pork belly with skin into thin strips of $0.7cm (length)\times 0.7cm (width)\times 2.5cm (height)$
Mince shallots and garlic and set aside
Boil the eggs, peel them, and use a knife to score the whites (for better flavor) and set aside.
**High heat** Heat the pot, put 15 ml cooking oil in the pot, and let the oil cover the bottom of the pot.
Add the pork belly strips and stir-fry until the color of the meat turns slightly white. Pour 10ml of rice wine along the edge of the pot. Continue to stir-fry until the pork belly is no longer oily.
Add the chopped shallots to the pot and stir-fry for 1 minute to release the aroma.
Add the diced shallots to the pan and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Push the pork to the side, add rock sugar and heat until it melts and bubbles into caramel, then stir the pork together so that the caramel adheres evenly.
Add light soy sauce and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add 25 ml of rice wine, add water until the pork is covered, add white pepper, five-spice powder, star anise, bay leaves, and hard-boiled eggs. After boiling, reduce the heat to simmer for 1 hour.
After 1 hour, turn up the heat and simmer until the sauce is thick and glossy amber in color.
After the stew is finished, take a bowl of rice, pour the soft braised pork on top of the rice, add the braised eggs, and enjoy.
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/台式卤肉饭/台式卤肉饭.md

intro_zh:
咖喱肥牛是一道浓郁下饭的家常菜，咖喱的辛香与肥牛的脂香融合，搭配土豆、胡萝卜等蔬菜，口感绵软醇厚。富含蛋白质、维生素和钙质，荤素搭配均衡。做法简单，对新手友好，一般只需 40 分钟就能端上餐桌，很适合作为便当菜。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1821 大卡
intro_en:
Curry beef is a rich home-cooked dish that goes well with rice. The spicy aroma of curry blends with the fat aroma of beef. It is paired with potatoes, carrots and other vegetables, giving it a soft and mellow taste. Rich in protein, vitamins and calcium, with a balanced mix of meat and vegetables. It's easy to make, beginner-friendly, and typically has on the table in just 40 minutes, making it a great lunchbox dish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1821 kcal
ingredients_zh: 土豆 200g （挺饱腹的，酌情添加）
肥牛卷 300g （喜欢吃肉就多来点）
ingredients_en: Pure milk (Weigang fresh milk is recommended)
200g potatoes (very filling, add more as appropriate)
Fatty Beef Roll 300g (If you like meat, get more)
steps_zh: 洋葱切成条状、胡萝卜以及土豆切成块状，备用
烧一锅开水，水沸时将肥牛卷下锅，捞出血沫后放在一边沥水，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油，**等待 10 秒让油温升高**
放入洋葱，翻炒至洋葱变软变透明
放入土豆以及胡萝卜**翻炒 2 分钟**
加入冷水至淹没所有食材即可
将香叶、咖喱块投入锅中，盖上锅盖，**待水沸腾后将火调小然后等待直至土豆块以及胡萝卜块炖至软烂（可用筷子确认）**
加入肥牛卷以及牛奶，盖上锅盖再小火煮 2-3 分钟即可出锅（用勺子搅拌食材，注意力度，避免肥牛卷破碎）
steps_en: Cut onions into strips, carrots and potatoes into cubes, set aside
Boil a pot of water. When the water boils, roll the fat beef into the pot, remove the bleeding foam and set it aside to drain. Set aside.
Heat the pot, put 10ml - 15ml cooking oil in the pot, **wait 10 seconds for the oil temperature to rise**
Add onions and stir-fry until onions become soft and translucent
Add potatoes and carrots** stir-fry for 2 minutes**
Add cold water until all ingredients are covered

Put the bay leaves and curry cubes into the pot, cover the pot, **After the water boils, reduce the heat and wait until the potato and carrot chunks are stewed until soft (use chopsticks to confirm)**
Add beef rolls and milk, cover the pot and cook over low heat for 2-3 minutes before serving (stir the ingredients with a spoon and pay attention to avoid breaking the beef rolls)

intro_zh:
奶酪培根通心粉是经典美式家常菜，口感浓郁绵密，奶酪包裹弹牙通心粉，搭配香脆培根，咸香满足。富含蛋白质与钙质，但热量和脂肪较高，建议偶尔享用。制作需要一定耐心，掌握基础白酱和火候对新手略有挑战，整体难度中等。不烘烤时约 30 分钟即可上桌，若选择烘烤需额外预热和烤制，总时长约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：728 大卡
intro_en:
Macaroni with Cheese and Bacon is a classic American home-cooked dish with a rich and creamy texture. The chewy macaroni wrapped in cheese is paired with crispy bacon for a satisfying salty taste. Rich in protein and calcium, but high in calories and fat, it is recommended to be enjoyed occasionally. Making it requires a certain amount of patience. Mastering the basic white sauce and heat is a slight challenge for novices. The overall difficulty is medium. It will be ready to serve in about 30 minutes without baking. If you choose to bake, additional preheating and baking will be required, total time is about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 728 kcal
ingredients_zh: 奶酪 40-55g，若要烘烤额外准备 25g， 条状
ingredients_en: Cheese 40-55g, if you want to bake, prepare an extra 25g, in strips
steps_zh: 奶酪要磨成碎末
洋葱切成条状
通心粉用微咸的水煮 6 分钟
锅中放入黄油，等待融化
加入洋葱
洋葱软化后加入大蒜
大蒜香味出来后，加入肉类，等待 5 秒
分四次加入牛奶，每次搅拌 5 秒后再加下一次
加入面粉并充分搅拌
加入奶酪并搅拌均匀
将通心粉和奶酪搅拌
如果不打算烘烤，可以直接吃了
预热烤箱至 180°C
将额外的 50g 芝士铺在通心粉之上
等待烤箱预热至 180°C 后，将通心粉放入
烤至表面金黄,约 24 分钟
steps_en: Cheese should be grated
Onions cut into strips
Boil macaroni in lightly salted water for 6 minutes
**medium heat**
Put butter in the pot and wait until it melts
Add onions
Once the onions are softened add the garlic
After the garlic is fragrant, add the meat and wait 5 seconds
**Small fire**
Add the milk in four batches, stirring for 5 seconds each time before adding the next
Add flour and stir well
Add cheese and mix well
Stir macaroni and cheese
If you don’t plan to bake it, you can eat it directly
**Baking:**
Preheat oven to 180°C
Spread the extra 50g cheese on top of the macaroni
Wait for the oven to preheat to 180°C and then place the macaroni
Bake until golden brown, about 24 minutes
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/奶酪培根通心粉/奶酪培根通心粉.md

intro_zh:
湖南两祁地区传统特色菜，鸭肉煸炒后裹上混合米粉蒸制，口感软糯，咸香入味，回味悠长。鸭肉富含优质蛋白质和 B 族维生素，搭配米粉提供能量，营养均衡。制作需先煸炒再高压蒸制，稍有难度，适合有一定烹饪基础的朋友。从备料到出锅大约需要 1 小时，若选用老鸭需延长蒸制时间。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1332 大卡
intro_en:
A traditional specialty dish from the Liangqi region of Hunan, duck meat is stir-fried and then wrapped in mixed rice flour and steamed. It has a soft and glutinous texture, a salty aroma and a long aftertaste. Duck meat is rich in high-quality protein and B vitamins. When paired with rice noodles, it provides energy and balanced nutrition. The preparation requires stir-frying and then high-pressure steaming, which is a little difficult and suitable for friends with a certain cooking foundation. It takes about 1 hour from preparation to cooking. If you choose old duck, you need to extend the steaming time.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1332 kcal
ingredients_en: Fine chili powder (add if you want it spicy)
steps_zh: 将糯米粉、粘米粉、蒸肉粉、细辣椒粉、5 克盐、白胡椒粉倒一起搅匀
鸭子让热心摊主剁成蒸煮块，姜切片，蒜子剥皮，五花肉切片即可
热锅凉油煸炒五花肉出油，再加食用油烧热，下入鸭子煸炒
鸭子煸炒到表皮焦变色，下入姜蒜和盐继续煸炒香味
关小火倒入米粉翻炒，鸭肉均匀裹满米粉子，加入开水，少量多次的加，边加边翻炒
翻炒鸭肉和米粉有湿感，铲出入碗中，高压锅放水蒸 20-25 分钟
出锅前撒点葱花即可享用了
steps_en: Mix glutinous rice flour, rice flour, steamed pork powder, fine chili powder, 5 grams of salt and white pepper together.
Let the enthusiastic stall owner chop the duck into steaming cubes, slice the ginger, peel the garlic, and slice the pork belly.
Heat the pan with cold oil and stir-fry the pork belly to release the oil. Add cooking oil to heat, add the duck and stir-fry.
Stir-fry the duck until the skin turns brown, add ginger, garlic and salt and continue to stir-fry until fragrant.
Turn down the heat, pour in the rice noodles and stir-fry until the duck meat is evenly coated with the rice noodles. Add boiling water, a small amount at a time, and stir-fry while adding.
Stir-fry the duck meat and rice noodles until they feel moist, scoop them out into a bowl, put water in the pressure cooker and steam for 20-25 minutes
Sprinkle some chopped green onion before serving and enjoy

dishes/meat_dish/湘祁米夫鸭/step④：高压锅蒸煮.jpg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/湘祁米夫鸭/湘祁米夫鸭.md

intro_zh:
这是一道山东淄博特色烧烤，小饼卷肉配大葱的吃法风味独特，肉香、酱香与葱香交融，口感层次丰富。五花肉富含优质蛋白质和脂肪，大葱提供膳食纤维，搭配小饼能快速补充能量。制作需要控制炭火火候和翻烤技巧，对新手稍具挑战，全程约 40 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：650 大卡
intro_en:
This is a Shandong Zibo specialty barbecue dish. The meat is rolled in small pancakes and served with green onions. It has a unique flavor. The aroma of meat, sauce and green onions blend together, and the taste is rich in layers. Pork belly is rich in high-quality protein and fat, and green onions provide dietary fiber. Paired with shortbread, it can quickly replenish energy. Making it requires controlling the charcoal heat and flipping skills, which is a bit challenging for novices. The whole process can be completed in about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 650 kcal
steps_zh: 五花肉切成厚度不超过 2cm 长的块，并串成串。（五花肉可以预先腌制一下，味道更佳）
大葱切成 5cm 长的葱段，备用
芝麻酱加 10ml 温水调稀，与甜面酱混合均匀，备用（可以换成"芝麻盐"）
点燃炭火，等待炭火烧至**通红无明火**状态（约 15 分钟）
将五花肉串均匀摆在在烤网上，烤至*底面焦黄出油*后翻面
继续烤制约 2 - 3 分钟，至*两面焦黄、边缘微焦*后取下
取一张小薄面饼平铺，抹上 3 - 4g 混合酱料
放上烤好的肉片和 1 - 2 段大葱，卷起即可食用
steps_en: Cut the pork belly into pieces no more than 2cm thick and skewer them into skewers. (Pork belly can be marinated in advance for better taste)
Cut green onions into 5cm long pieces and set aside
Add 10ml of warm water to the sesame sauce to make it thin, mix evenly with the sweet noodle sauce and set aside (can be replaced with "sesame salt")
Light the charcoal fire and wait until the charcoal fire is **red and without open flame** (about 15 minutes)
Arrange the pork belly skewers evenly on the grill grid, grill until the bottom is browned and oily*, then turn over
Continue grilling for about 2-3 minutes, until both sides are browned and the edges are slightly charred* before removing
Take a small thin pancake and spread it flat, spread 3-4g of mixed sauce on it
Top with grilled meat slices and 1-2 green onions, roll up and serve

intro_zh:
这是一道客家传统名菜，成菜酱红油亮、汤汁黏稠，扣肉肥而不腻、软烂醇香。五花肉富含优质蛋白和脂肪酸，搭配梅干菜能提供膳食纤维。整体工序稍多，需要掌握煮、炸、蒸的火候，对新手有一定挑战。从备料到出锅，连同浸泡梅菜的时间在内，大约需要 2.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：3756 大卡
intro_en:
This is a traditional Hakka dish. The finished dish has a bright red sauce, a thick soup, and the meat is fat but not greasy, soft and mellow. Pork belly is rich in high-quality protein and fatty acids, and paired with prunes, it can provide dietary fiber. The overall process is a bit more, and you need to master the heat of boiling, frying, and steaming, which is a challenge for novices. From preparation to serving, including the time for soaking the pickles, it takes about 2.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 3756 kcal
steps_zh: 梅菜放到清水中，浸泡 1 小时
锅中倒入 50 ml 食用油，将整个五花肉猪皮朝下，放到锅中 1 分钟 ，取出挂掉猪皮 【可选】
锅中加入开水，放入五花肉，大火煮 20 分钟 （筷子可以插进五花肉），取出五花肉
在五花肉表面涂抹均匀老抽、五香粉、白砂糖，放置 15 分钟
起锅烧油，加入五花肉，中火油炸直至两面金黄色（3-5 分钟）
起锅烧油，倒入梅菜，加上小米椒、蒜蓉、鸡精、食用盐后翻炒，直至炒干梅干菜水分
五花肉切片（后端 0.5-1 cm）,放在大碗中，散上梅干菜
中火蒸 45 分钟
拿个盘子倒盖在五花肉大碗中，将五花肉倒在盘子中
steps_en: Put the pickles into clean water and soak for 1 hour
Pour 50 ml cooking oil into the pot, put the whole pork belly and pork skin side down, put it in the pot for 1 minute, take out and hang up the pork skin [optional]
Add boiling water to the pot, add pork belly, cook over high heat for 20 minutes (chopsticks can be inserted into the pork belly), take out the pork belly
Spread dark soy sauce, five-spice powder and white sugar evenly on the surface of the pork belly and let it sit for 15 minutes
Heat oil in a pan, add pork belly and fry over medium heat until golden brown on both sides (3-5 minutes)
Heat oil in a pan, pour in the pickled vegetables, add millet pepper, minced garlic, chicken essence, and edible salt and stir-fry until the dried pickled vegetables are moist.
Slice pork belly (rear end 0.5-1 cm), place in a large bowl, and scatter with prunes
Steam over medium heat for 45 minutes
Take a plate and cover it in the large pork belly bowl, and pour the pork belly into the plate.

intro_zh:
这是一道源自广东的传统煲仔菜，羊肉与腐竹在柱侯酱和腐乳的调和下，酱香浓郁，口感肥美而不腻口，暖身暖心，尤其适合寒冬食用。羊肉富含蛋白质和铁质，能温补气血，腐竹则提供优质植物蛋白，搭配起来营养均衡。虽然备料和炖煮步骤较多，但全程火候控制并不复杂，新手只需按部就班也能成功。预计从准备到出锅约需两个半小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：2391 大卡
intro_en:
This is a traditional claypot dish originating from Guangdong. The mutton and yuba are mixed with Zhuhou sauce and fermented bean curd. The sauce has a rich aroma and a rich but not greasy texture. It warms the body and heart, and is especially suitable for cold winter consumption. Mutton is rich in protein and iron, which can warm and replenish qi and blood, while yuba provides high-quality plant protein, which makes the combination nutritionally balanced. Although there are many steps for preparing ingredients and stewing, the entire heat control is not complicated, and novices can succeed just by following the steps. Expect it to take about two and a half hours from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 2391 kcal
ingredients_zh: 其余配菜例如马蹄、土豆或者萝卜可依据个人喜好自行添加
洋葱 1 个或红葱头 4 - 5 个
ingredients_en: Other side dishes such as water chestnuts, potatoes or radishes can be added according to personal preference.
steps_zh: 准备工作: 香菇提前浸泡 2 - 3 小时至变软。腐竹提前浸泡 30 分钟至变软
准备酱汁 1: 南乳、柱侯酱、20g 腐乳、老抽放入同个小碗中搅拌均匀
准备酱汁 2: 20g 腐乳、砂糖、辣椒油放入同个小碗搅拌均匀
泡好的香菇去除根部
泡好的腐竹切成 5cm 的小段，挤干水分
洋葱去皮切丝。也可以用去皮红葱头进行替代，口味更佳。
小葱切成大约 5cm 的葱段
羊腩冷水下锅，放入 2 - 3 片姜片，倒入凉水，大火煮至水滚后关火
捞出羊腩，放入准备好的冷水盆中放凉，使其更有嚼劲
锅烧热后放入冷油，放入 4 - 5 片姜片、洋葱/红葱头、葱白段、7 - 8 瓣蒜瓣进行爆香
放入冷却好的羊腩，用筷子搅拌大约 2 - 5 分钟直至出现金黄色
放入调好的酱汁 1 ，翻炒大约 2 分钟至颜色均匀
倒入清水至刚好没过食材
放入香菇、冰糖、香叶、八角、桂皮
加盖转小火炖 90 分钟
开盖加入腐竹，加盖转中火煮 20 分钟
开盖加入酱汁 2 搅拌均匀
关火，出锅前加入葱绿段或香菜
steps_en: Preparation: Soak the mushrooms for 2 - 3 hours in advance until soft. Soak the yuba for 30 minutes in advance until soft
Prepare the sauce 1: Put Nanfu, Zhuhou sauce, 20g fermented bean curd, and dark soy sauce into the same small bowl and stir well.
Prepare sauce 2: Put 20g fermented bean curd, sugar and chili oil into the same small bowl and mix well.
Remove the roots from soaked shiitake mushrooms
Cut the soaked yuba into 5cm pieces and squeeze out the water
Peel and shred onions. You can also substitute peeled shallots for a better taste.
Cut onions into approximately 5cm pieces
Put the lamb brisket in a pot with cold water, add 2-3 slices of ginger, pour in the cold water, cook over high heat until the water boils and then turn off the heat
Take out the lamb belly and put it in the prepared cold water basin to cool it to make it chewier.
After the pot is hot, add cold oil, add 4-5 slices of ginger, onions/scallions, white scallions, and 7-8 cloves of garlic and sauté until fragrant
Add the cooled lamb belly and stir with chopsticks for about 2-5 minutes until golden brown.
Add the prepared sauce 1 and stir-fry for about 2 minutes until the color is even
Pour in water until just enough to cover the ingredients
Add shiitake mushrooms, rock sugar, bay leaves, star anise, and cinnamon
Cover and simmer for 90 minutes
Open the lid and add the yuba, cover and cook over medium heat for 20 minutes.
Open the lid and add the sauce 2 and mix well
Turn off the heat and add green onions or coriander before serving.
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/枝竹羊腩煲/枝竹羊腩煲.md

intro_zh:
醉排骨是福州传统名菜，口感外酥里嫩，酸甜开胃，带着独特的鱼露鲜香。排骨富含蛋白质和钙质，营养解馋。这道菜需要掌握挂糊和复炸的技巧，更适合有一定下厨经验的朋友尝试，全程大约需要 40 分钟完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：934 大卡
intro_en:
Drunken Pork Ribs is a famous traditional dish in Fuzhou. It tastes crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. It is sweet and sour and appetizing, with a unique fish sauce aroma. Pork ribs are rich in protein and calcium, which is nutritious and satisfies cravings. This dish requires mastering the skills of battering and re-frying, and is more suitable for friends with some cooking experience. The whole process takes about 40 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 934 kcal
steps_zh: 排骨中加入 5 g 地瓜粉和水进行搅拌，清洗 2-3 遍后放入大碗备用
排骨中加入鱼露、地瓜粉、鸡蛋黄 充分搅拌
将排骨一个一个放入锅中（切记不可以整碗倒入），保证每个不要粘在一起
全部放入后，每 30 S 用勺子来回两面翻转瘦肉块，直至排骨表面金黄
取出排骨，一分钟后倒入油锅中继续炸，直至瘦肉块表面出现焦黄后，取出放入大碗备用
准备一个小碗，加入蒜末、香醋、白砂糖、鱼露、番茄酱、葱花、芝麻搅拌均匀，倒入 5 ml 热油
将汤汁浇灌入排骨，在充分搅拌后倒入盘中
steps_en: Add 5 g of sweet potato powder and water to the ribs, stir, wash 2-3 times, then put into a large bowl and set aside.
Add fish sauce, sweet potato powder, and egg yolk to the pork ribs and mix thoroughly
Put the ribs into the pot one by one (remember not to pour the whole bowl), ensuring that each one does not stick together.
After putting everything in, use a spoon to flip the lean meat pieces back and forth every 30 seconds until the surface of the ribs is golden.
Take out the ribs, put them into the oil pan after one minute and continue frying until the surface of the lean meat becomes brown, then take it out and put it into a large bowl for later use.
Prepare a small bowl, add minced garlic, balsamic vinegar, white sugar, fish sauce, tomato sauce, chopped green onion and sesame seeds, stir well, pour 5 ml hot oil
Pour the soup into the ribs, stir thoroughly and pour into the plate

intro_zh:
酸辣开胃、口感 Q 弹，是一道家常凉拌小吃。鸡爪富含胶原蛋白，对皮肤有益。去骨步骤繁琐费力，制作难度较高，不太适合新手尝试。全程耗时约 8 小时 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：815 大卡
intro_en:
Hot and sour, appetizing, and chewy in texture, it is a home-cooked cold snack. Chicken feet are rich in collagen, which is good for the skin. The bone removal step is tedious and laborious, making it difficult to make, so it is not suitable for novices to try. The journey takes approximately 8 hours and 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 815 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小米辣 4 个少辣，6 个中辣，12 个大辣（推荐大辣）
柠檬 2 颗（以 1 颗为单位来调整酸度）
ingredients_en: Xiaomi Spicy: 4 less spicy, 6 medium spicy, 12 very spicy (recommended very spicy)
2 lemons (adjust the acidity in steps of 1 lemon)
steps_zh: 用剪刀 / 刀 把鸡爪上的指甲的部分全部剪掉 **包括指甲下面的肉和骨头，让它一点指甲都不剩**
用水把他们洗干净，放一边
把`鸡爪`放入大锅中，准备去腥味
`大葱`，`料酒`，`姜` 全放进去
加水没过`鸡爪`
大火煮开 **中途可以把浮末捞起来**
水开**100度，沸腾**后等 10 分钟
关火，捞出来，把水沥干，洗干净，放入盆里
放入冰箱，**冷冻层** 20 分钟
把全部放入不是冷冻层的冰箱，然后分批**10个一批**拿出来去骨
从手指（鸡爪的）最前端开始，每只手指都要用刀划开**划到它的手背部分**
再从手背部用刀分划开至整个手臂
把每只手指关节处都掰一掰**按手指出声音时那种**
按着它的手指最前端，往里推，每只手指都一样，先推到中间手掌手背部分
每只手指皮脱离后，从手掌开始往手臂部分推直到整个脱下来了
放入碗中，备用
`小米辣` 切均匀小颗
`大蒜`，`洋葱`，`香菜`切碎
`柠檬`对半切开，把柠檬汁挤入鸡爪的容器里
把`全部`调料倒入装鸡爪的容器，`小米辣`，`大蒜`，`洋葱`和`香菜`也放进去
抓拌均匀
放入冰箱一个晚上（6 个小时）
调配好后全部放入准备好的鸡爪
steps_en: Use scissors/knife to cut off all the nails on the chicken feet **Including the meat and bones under the nails, leaving no nails at all**
Wash them with water and set aside
Put the `chicken feet` into the big pot and prepare to remove the fishy smell
`Green onions`, `cooking wine`, `ginger` are all put in
Add water to cover the chicken feet
Bring to a boil over high heat **You can scoop up the floating powder halfway**
Boil the water to 100 degrees and wait for 10 minutes after boiling
Turn off the heat, take it out, drain the water, wash it and put it in a basin
Place in the refrigerator, **freezer** for 20 minutes
Put them all in the refrigerator that is not in the freezer, and then take them out in batches of 10 and remove the bones.
Starting from the front end of the fingers (chicken feet), each finger should be cut with a knife** to the back of the hand**
Then use a knife to cut from the back of the hand to the entire arm
Crack each knuckle of each finger** the way you press your hands to point out the sound**
Press the front of its fingers and push inward. The same applies to each finger. First, push to the back of the middle palm.
After the skin of each finger is detached, push it from the palm to the arm until the whole finger is taken off.
Place in a bowl and set aside
`Millet spicy` cut into small pieces evenly
Chop `garlic`, `onion` and `cilantro`
Cut the lemon in half and squeeze the lemon juice into the container of chicken feet
Pour all the seasonings into the container with chicken feet, and put in the spicy millet, garlic, onion and coriander as well.
Mix evenly
Place in the refrigerator overnight (6 hours)
After mixing everything, add the prepared chicken feet

intro_zh:
猪皮冻是北方年夜饭常见的传统凉菜，晶莹剔透，口感滑嫩 Q 弹，特别适合下酒。猪皮富含胶原蛋白，有美容养颜的作用。这道菜难度稍高，需要耐心处理猪皮去腥和长时间熬煮，预计制作时长约 24 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1630 大卡
intro_en:
Pork skin jelly is a traditional cold dish that is common in northern New Year’s Eve dinners. It is crystal clear and has a smooth and chewy texture, making it especially suitable for drinking. Pig skin is rich in collagen and has beauty and beauty effects. This dish is a bit more difficult and requires patience to remove the fishy smell from the pig skin and a long time of cooking. It is expected to take about 24 hours to make.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1630 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大料、花椒、白芷、桂皮、丁香、香叶、小茴香
调料：盐 13g、味精 10g、鸡精 15g、生抽 50ml、老抽 20ml、葱 10g、葱 10g、姜片 20g
ingredients_en: Aniseed, Zanthoxylum bungeanum, Angelica dahurica, cinnamon, cloves, bay leaves, cumin
Seasoning: 13g salt, 10g MSG, 15g chicken essence, 50ml light soy sauce, 20ml dark soy sauce, 10g green onion, 10g green onion, 20g ginger slices
Spice bag: 10g star anise, 5g Sichuan peppercorns
steps_zh: 将猪皮，剁成不超过 10cm 小块，用清水浸泡 12 小时，然后冷水下锅，加入姜 10g、料酒 50ml 后，汆烫 5-10 分钟，捞出放入冷水中
将焯过水的猪皮，放到案板上，将里面的白肉部分全部剔除，然后再切成成不超过 3mm 的长条，放入盆中
加入白醋 20g，盐 5g，用力搓洗 3 分钟，再用清水洗净，这时的猪皮已经基本没什么腥味
锅内加入 4kg 水，放入猪皮，葱 10g，姜片 10g，八角 10g，花椒 5g，大火烧开后，小火煲煮 90 分钟至猪皮软烂
再加入盐 8g、味精 10g、鸡精 15g、生抽 50ml、老抽 20ml 调味后，倒入盘中，将葱姜，八角拣出，晾凉至果冻状
放冰箱冷藏即可，食用时，切成小块或者厚片
steps_en: Chop the pig skin into small pieces no more than 10cm, soak in water for 12 hours, then put it in cold water, add 10g of ginger and 50ml of cooking wine, blanch for 5-10 minutes, remove and put in cold water
Place the blanched pig skin on the chopping board, remove all the white meat inside, then cut it into long strips no more than 3mm, and put it in a basin
Add 20g of white vinegar and 5g of salt, scrub vigorously for 3 minutes, and then rinse with water. At this time, the pig skin has almost no fishy smell.

Add 4kg of water to the pot, add pork skin, 10g green onion, 10g ginger slices, 10g star anise, 5g Sichuan peppercorns, bring to a boil over high heat, then simmer over low heat for 90 minutes until the pig skin is soft and tender.

Then add 8g of salt, 10g of MSG, 15g of chicken essence, 50ml of light soy sauce, and 20ml of dark soy sauce. Season and pour into a plate. Remove the onions, ginger, and star anise and let cool until they become jelly-like.
Store it in the refrigerator and cut it into small pieces or thick slices when eating.

intro_zh:
这是一道经典广式风味菜肴，肉香浓郁，色泽红亮，带筋牛腩软烂入味，口感丰富。富含优质蛋白质和胶原蛋白，滋补暖身。虽需一定耐心，但使用高压锅能大幅缩短时间，对新手也较友好。普通炖煮约需 3 小时，用高压锅则约 1 小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：980 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Cantonese-style dish with rich meat aroma, bright red color, tender beef brisket and rich taste. Rich in high-quality protein and collagen, nourishing and warming. Although it requires some patience, using a pressure cooker can greatly shorten the time and is more friendly to novices. It takes about 3 hours to simmer normally, or about 1 hour in a pressure cooker.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 980 kcal
ingredients_zh: 炖煮锅，高压锅（可选，但极度推荐！）
牛腩（首选坑腩，带筋的部位）
柱候酱（核心酱），郫县豆瓣酱，南腐乳，叉烧酱（可选），蚝油， 老抽，生抽
香叶， 花椒，八角，干辣椒，丁香，甘草，干辣椒，小米辣（可选），姜，蒜
小米辣 1 条（可根据口味调整用量）
干辣椒 3 个（可根据口味调整用量）
ingredients_en: Stew pot, pressure cooker (optional, but highly recommended!)
Beef brisket (pit brisket, ribbed part preferred)
Zhuhou sauce (core sauce), Pixian bean paste, southern bean curd, barbecued pork sauce (optional), oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, light soy sauce
Bay leaves, Sichuan peppercorns, star anise, dried chili peppers, cloves, licorice, dried chili peppers, spicy millet (optional), ginger, garlic
1 piece of spicy millet (the amount can be adjusted according to taste)
3 dried chili peppers (amount can be adjusted according to taste)
2 pieces of southern fermented bean curd
steps_zh: 先把辅料备好：
牛肉不用切，直接冷水下锅，开大火焯水，水沸腾时将牛肉捞出
冲洗牛肉表面的杂质后，切成 4cm\*4cm\*4cm 的大块，控干水后放入碗中备用
大火，热锅下油，把碗 1（姜、蒜、小米辣）倒入锅中，炒香
中小火，倒入碗 2（香料），翻炒均匀，大概 30 秒
中小火，放入碗 3（南乳），用锅铲把南乳压碎
中小火，放入碗 4（豆瓣酱），翻炒均匀，大概 30 秒
中小火，放入碗 5（冰糖），炒至融化
中小火，下入牛腩，炒至牛肉上色
大火，沿锅边淋入碗 6（酒），快速翻炒，炒至牛肉表面略微焦褐
倒入碗 7（酱料），快速翻炒，留意底层汁水，炒至不停冒小气泡，汤汁略微浓稠
将锅内全部食材转移至另一个炖煮锅或高压锅，加水淹过食材
根据使用的锅来选择炖肉的时间：
时间到后开盖调味，如果不够咸加盐或生抽（少量加，不断尝味道，直到合适），不够甜则同理加糖
调好味道后便可以把牛腩先捞出
如果要吃萝卜土豆，则削皮切成 2cm 厚片倒入锅中煮 10 - 15 分钟（或煮至想要吃的口感），如果是高压锅则在加压煮 5 分钟
煮好后捞出萝卜土豆和牛腩放一起
把汤汁过滤淋入碗中
steps_en: Prepare the accessories first:
There is no need to cut the beef, put it directly into the pot under cold water, turn on high heat and blanch it, take out the beef when the water boils
After washing the impurities on the surface of the beef, cut it into 4cm\*4cm\*4cm large pieces, drain the water and put it in a bowl for later use.
Turn on high heat, heat oil in the pan, pour bowl 1 (ginger, garlic, millet spicy) into the pan, stir-fry until fragrant
On medium-low heat, pour bowl 2 (spice) and stir-fry evenly, about 30 seconds
Turn on medium-low heat, put bowl 3 (nanru), and use a spatula to crush the Nanru
Turn on medium-low heat, put in bowl 4 (bean paste), stir-fry evenly, about 30 seconds
Over medium-low heat, add bowl 5 (rock sugar) and stir-fry until melted
On medium-low heat, add beef brisket and stir-fry until beef is coloured.
Turn on high heat, pour bowl 6 (wine) along the edge of the pot, stir-fry quickly until the surface of the beef is slightly browned
Pour into bowl 7 (sauce), stir-fry quickly, paying attention to the bottom juice, and stir-fry until small bubbles continue to appear and the soup is slightly thick
Transfer all the ingredients in the pot to another stew pot or pressure cooker, add water to cover the ingredients
Choose how long to stew the meat according to the pot you are using:

After the time is up, open the lid and season. If it is not salty enough, add salt or light soy sauce (add a small amount and keep tasting until it is right). If it is not sweet enough, add sugar in the same way.
After adjusting the taste, you can take out the beef brisket first

If you want to eat radish potatoes, peel them and cut them into 2cm thick slices. Add them to the pot and cook for 10-15 minutes (or until the texture you want). If you use a pressure cooker, cook for 5 minutes.
After cooking, take out the radish, potatoes and beef brisket and put them together
Strain the soup and pour it into a bowl
images: dishes/meat_dish/柱候牛腩/柱候牛腩配米饭.jpeg
dishes/meat_dish/柱候牛腩/牛腩此时可开始炖煮.jpeg

intro_zh:
这是一道风味独特的家常菜肴，鸭肉鲜香软烂，透着淡淡啤酒清香，热而不浮、香而不腻。鸭肉富含蛋白质，啤酒去腥增香，搭配食用更有滋味。做法对新手友好，从备料到出锅大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：170 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked dish with a unique flavor. The duck meat is delicious and soft, with a faint fragrance of beer. It is hot but not flaky, fragrant but not greasy. Duck meat is rich in protein, and beer can remove the fishy smell and add flavor, making it more delicious when eaten together. The recipe is beginner-friendly and takes about 1 hour from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 170 kcal
steps_zh: 把鸭子切成 3 cm 小块，鸭肉冷水下锅，加姜片、料酒，焯一遍水，盛出沥干水分，备用。
炒锅烧热，放入约 100ml 食用油，大火待油烧开，鸭肉入锅翻炒至上色。
待鸭肉完全变色（肉眼可见泛白），将鸭肉拨到锅的一边，倒入豆瓣酱和糖，小火翻炒出香味和糖色。
加入丁香、八角、香叶、干辣椒、生抽、老抽、蒜，翻炒出香味。
倒入啤酒，没过鸭肉，加入盐、鸡精，然后中火将鸭子烧 30 分钟（牙口不好的话可以再多烧 5 分钟）。
出锅盛盘，上桌食用。
steps_en: Cut the duck into 3 cm pieces, put the duck meat into a pot under cold water, add ginger slices and cooking wine, blanch it in water, drain it and set aside.
Heat the wok, add about 100ml of cooking oil, wait until the oil boils over high heat, add the duck meat into the pan and stir-fry until it changes color.

When the duck meat has completely changed color (visible to the naked eye and turned white), move the duck meat to one side of the pot, pour in the bean paste and sugar, and stir-fry over low heat to bring out the aroma and color of the sugar.
Add cloves, star anise, bay leaves, dried chili peppers, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Pour in the beer to cover the duck meat, add salt and chicken essence, and then cook the duck over medium heat for 30 minutes (if you have bad teeth, you can cook it for an additional 5 minutes).
Remove from the pan, serve on a plate and serve.

intro_zh:
这道湘味小炒以大火爆炒逼出牛肉的嫩滑与椒香，口感鲜辣劲爽、芹菜脆嫩，极具湖南风味。牛里脊提供优质蛋白和易吸收的铁质，搭配芹菜增添膳食纤维，营养均衡。备料与烹饪步骤简单明了，全程旺火快炒，对新手十分友好，从切配到出锅大约一小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：619 大卡
intro_en:
This Hunan-style stir-fry is stir-fried over high heat to bring out the tenderness and peppery aroma of the beef. It has a spicy and refreshing taste, and the celery is crisp and tender, giving it a very Hunan flavor. Beef tenderloin provides high-quality protein and easily absorbable iron. Paired with celery to add dietary fiber, it is nutritionally balanced. The preparation and cooking steps are simple and clear. The whole process is stir-fried quickly, which is very friendly to novices. It can be completed in about an hour from cutting to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 619 kcal
steps_zh: 牛里脊切成不超过 3cm 宽，3mm 厚的薄片，倒入 6ml 酱油，用手抓匀备用
芹菜切成不超过 5cm 的小段，备用
小米椒切成丝状，备用
野山椒切成颗粒，备用
香菜切成成不超过 3cm 的小段，备用
热锅，锅内放入 15ml 食用油，大火等待 30 秒让油温升高
放入小米椒和野山椒爆香
放入牛里脊和芹菜，然后**大火翻炒 1 分钟**
关火，撒上香菜，盛盘
steps_en: Cut the beef tenderloin into thin slices no more than 3cm wide and 3mm thick. Pour in 6ml of soy sauce and mix well with your hands. Set aside.
Cut celery into small pieces no larger than 5cm and set aside
Cut the millet pepper into strips and set aside
Cut wild pepper into pieces and set aside
Cut coriander into small pieces no more than 3cm, set aside
Heat the pot, put 15ml cooking oil in the pot, wait for 30 seconds on high heat to allow the oil temperature to rise
Add millet pepper and wild pepper and sauté until fragrant
Add beef tenderloin and celery and **stir fry over high heat for 1 minute**
Turn off the heat, sprinkle with coriander, and serve
images: dishes/meat_dish/小炒黄牛肉/小炒黄牛肉.jpg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/小炒黄牛肉/小炒黄牛肉.md

intro_zh:
这道川味名菜以糊辣荔枝味见长，小酸甜中透着干辣椒与花椒的香气，鸡丁嫩滑、花生酥脆，口感层次丰富。富含优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，开胃下饭。做法分成简易和进阶两版，对新手比较友好，提前规划好腌制时间即可。从备料到出锅大约需要 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1790 大卡
intro_en:
This famous Sichuan dish is famous for its spicy lychee flavor. It is sweet and sour with the aroma of dried chili peppers and Sichuan peppercorns. The chicken is tender and smooth, the peanuts are crispy, and the taste is rich in layers. Rich in high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids, it is an appetizing meal. The method is divided into two versions: simple and advanced. It is more friendly to novices. Just plan the marinating time in advance. It takes about 1.5 hours from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1790 kcal
ingredients_en: Dried chili pepper (or two vitex sticks)
steps_zh: 手枪腿用剪刀去骨，鸡肉面用刀背拍打一遍，切条后切至 1.5cm 见方肉丁；泡于清水 10 分钟，捞出控干备用（若是鸡胸脯肉，则可以直接进行切丁以及之后的动作）
取大葱葱绿与姜片 5g 于碗中，倒入 50g 开水备用；葱白切 1.5cm 圆粒备用；取花生放入微波炉高火 5 分钟焙干备用
鸡丁中加入盐 2g，老抽酱油 5g，料酒 15g，淀粉 15g 搅拌均匀，至微微发干；缓慢加入部分葱姜水，搅拌鸡丁至粘手；保鲜膜密封，放入冰箱腌制 1 小时
干辣椒切段；起锅，大火烧热转小火；放入干辣椒焙干至微微发糊，捞起备用；花椒焙干至有香味，捞起备用
转大火，倒入 20g 植物油，7 成热（竹筷子起泡）下入鸡丁，煎至上面开始发白，用锅铲翻面，煎 30s 后翻炒均匀
下入葱粒翻炒，加入余下葱姜水不够 100g 再加一点清水（务必是热水）；盖上锅盖，转中小火焖 2 分钟；
转大火，下入熟花生，干辣椒和花椒；加入鸡精 2g，香醋 5g，白糖 2g，翻炒均匀；
淀粉 10g 加 50g 清水调成水淀粉，加入锅中，翻炒均匀，收汁到自己想要的浓度
关火，淋入芝麻油 10g，即可出锅
莴笋去皮切至 1cm 见方的小块，备用；
二荆条切成 1cm 长段；
手枪腿用剪刀去骨，鸡肉面用刀背拍打一遍，切条后切至 1.5cm 见方肉丁；泡于清水 10 分钟，捞出控干备用（若是鸡胸脯肉，则可以直接进行切丁以及之后的动作）；
取大葱葱绿与姜片 5g 于碗中，倒入 50g 开水备用；葱白切 1.5cm 圆粒备用
鸡丁中加入盐 2g，老抽酱油 5g，料酒 15g，淀粉 15g 搅拌均匀，至微微发干；缓慢加入部分葱姜水，搅拌鸡丁至粘手；保鲜膜密封，放入冰箱腌制 1 小时
转中火，倒入 20g 植物油，放入生花生翻炒至其表面微微焦糊，捞起花生但是油留在锅内；
继续加热，7 成热（竹筷子起泡）下入鸡丁，放入豆瓣酱，翻炒大概 1 分钟；
加入备好的莴笋丁，继续翻炒 1 分钟；
下入葱粒翻炒，加入余下葱姜水不够 100g 再加一点清水（务必是热水）；加入二荆条段；盖上锅盖，转中小火焖 2 分钟；
转大火，下入先前捞起来备用的花生，花椒；加入鸡精 2g，香醋 5g，白糖 2g，翻炒均匀；
淀粉 10g 加 50g 清水调成水淀粉，加入锅中，翻炒均匀，收汁到自己想要的浓度
关火，淋入芝麻油 10g 与油泼辣子 5g 再翻炒 10s，即可出锅
steps_en: Debone the pistol legs with scissors, beat the chicken noodles with the back of a knife, cut into strips and cut into 1.5cm cubes; soak in water for 10 minutes, remove and dry for later use (if it is chicken breast, you can directly cut into cubes and follow the steps)

Take 5g of green onions and ginger slices in a bowl, pour 50g of boiling water and set aside; cut the green onions into 1.5cm round pieces and set aside; put peanuts in the microwave and bake them over high heat for 5 minutes and set aside

Add 2g of salt, 5g of dark soy sauce, 15g of cooking wine, and 15g of starch to the diced chicken. Stir evenly until slightly dry. Slowly add part of the onion and ginger water, stir the diced chicken until it sticks to your hands. Seal with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.

Cut the dried chili peppers into sections; heat the pot over high heat and reduce the heat to low; add in the dried chili peppers and bake until slightly mushy, remove and set aside; roast the Chinese prickly ash until fragrant, remove and set aside

Turn up the heat, pour in 20g of vegetable oil, add diced chicken at 70% heat (bubbles with bamboo chopsticks), fry until the top starts to turn white, turn over with a spatula, fry for 30 seconds and then stir-fry evenly

Add the green onions and stir-fry, add the remaining green onions and ginger, add less than 100g of water, and add a little water (must be hot water); cover the pot, turn to medium-low heat and simmer for 2 minutes;
Turn to high heat, add cooked peanuts, dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorns; add 2g chicken essence, 5g balsamic vinegar, 2g sugar, stir-fry evenly;
10g of starch, add 50g of water to make water starch, add it to the pot, stir-fry evenly until the juice reaches the desired concentration
Turn off the heat, pour in 10g of sesame oil, and serve
Peel the lettuce and cut into 1cm square pieces, set aside;
Cut two wattle sticks into 1cm long sections;

Debone the pistol legs with scissors, beat the chicken noodles with the back of a knife, cut into strips and cut into 1.5cm cubes; soak in water for 10 minutes, remove and dry and set aside (if it is chicken breast, you can directly cut into cubes and subsequent actions);
Take 5g of green scallions and ginger slices in a bowl, pour 50g of boiling water and set aside; cut the white scallions into 1.5cm rounds and set aside

Add 2g of salt, 5g of dark soy sauce, 15g of cooking wine, and 15g of starch to the diced chicken. Stir evenly until slightly dry. Slowly add part of the onion and ginger water, stir the diced chicken until it sticks to your hands. Seal with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
Turn to medium heat, pour in 20g of vegetable oil, add raw peanuts and stir-fry until the surface is slightly burnt, remove the peanuts but leave the oil in the pot;
Continue to heat until 70% hot (bamboo chopsticks are blistering), add diced chicken, add bean paste, and stir-fry for about 1 minute;
Add the prepared diced lettuce and continue to stir-fry for 1 minute;

Add the diced green onion and stir-fry, add the remaining green onion and ginger, add less than 100g of water, and add a little water (must be hot water); add two pieces of wattle sticks; cover the pot, turn to medium-low heat and simmer for 2 minutes;
Turn up the heat, add the peanuts and Sichuan peppercorns that you scooped up earlier and set aside; add 2g of chicken essence, 5g of balsamic vinegar, 2g of white sugar, and stir-fry evenly;
10g of starch, add 50g of water to make water starch, add it to the pot, stir-fry evenly until the juice reaches the desired concentration
Turn off the heat, pour in 10g of sesame oil and 5g of spicy oil, stir-fry for 10 seconds, and it’s ready to serve.

intro_zh:
贵州辣子鸡是贵州地区的经典家常菜，以糍粑辣椒和多种香料烹制而成，鸡肉香糯软烂，土豆绵密入味，整体风味香辣浓郁。鸡肉富含优质蛋白质，搭配土豆等配菜，营养均衡。这道菜步骤较多，对新手有一定挑战，但按部就班也能成功。从备料到出锅，预计需要 1.大约 5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1441 大卡
intro_en:
Guizhou spicy chicken is a classic home-cooked dish in Guizhou. It is cooked with glutinous rice cake peppers and a variety of spices. The chicken is fragrant and soft, the potatoes are dense and tasty, and the overall flavor is spicy and rich. Chicken is rich in high-quality protein and paired with potatoes and other side dishes, it is nutritionally balanced. This dish has a lot of steps, so it may be a challenge for novices, but you can still succeed if you follow the steps. From preparation to serving, it is expected to take about 1.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1441 kcal
ingredients_zh: 糍粑辣椒（花溪党武的辣椒，遵义的子弹头，条子椒，大方的皱椒混合之后打碎的辣椒）
鸡三到四个人的量是四斤，人多可以依次累加
糍粑辣椒 500g，会是拳头大小两坨
菜籽油两斤，开始炸鸡会用很多
ingredients_en: Ciba peppers (peppers from Huaxi Dangwu, bullets from Zunyi, tiaozi peppers, and generous wrinkled peppers mixed and crushed)
The amount of chicken for three to four people is four pounds. If there are more people, you can add up in sequence.
500g of glutinous rice cake and pepper will be two fist-sized lumps
Two pounds of rapeseed oil, you will use a lot when you start frying the chicken
steps_zh: 在锅中加入和锅一半高度的油，将切成长条的土豆先炸至表面金黄然后捞出备用，等油温上至烤手时候将切好的鸡块放入锅中炸，并放入切好的生姜片和花椒
刚开始炸鸡的时候，油是浑浊的，因为鸡块里面有水的原因，等到油炸至清澈，鸡块就炸好了，然后捞出备用
现在锅里面的油可以捞三分之一出来，现在用不到这么多的油
将锅中剩余的油加热，加入糍粑辣椒，豆瓣酱，生姜片，炒出红油状，将炸好的鸡块翻炒均匀
等到鸡块都上色，加入老抽，倒入啤酒，啤酒一定要盖过鸡块，加上香叶盖上盖，闷十分钟，期间间隔翻炒
然后加入土豆条，大蒜（不用切，一颗一颗的最好），然后再闷 20 分钟
最后加入酒糟翻炒均匀再加入切好的蒜苗，就可以出锅了
steps_en: Add oil to half the height of the pot, fry the potatoes cut into long strips until the surface is golden brown, then remove and set aside. When the oil is hot enough to roast, put the cut chicken pieces into the pot and fry, and add sliced ginger and peppercorns.

When you first fry the chicken, the oil will be turbid because there is water in the chicken pieces. Wait until the chicken pieces are clear and the chicken pieces are fried, then take them out and set aside.
Now one-third of the oil in the pot can be drained out, so there is no need for so much oil now
Heat the remaining oil in the pot, add glutinous rice pepper, bean paste, and ginger slices, stir-fry until red oil turns, and stir-fry the fried chicken pieces evenly.
Wait until the chicken pieces are all colored, add dark soy sauce, pour in beer, the beer must cover the chicken pieces, cover with bay leaves, simmer for ten minutes, stir-fry at intervals.
Then add potato strips and garlic (no need to cut it, one piece at a time is best), and then simmer for another 20 minutes
Finally, add the distiller's grains and stir-fry evenly, then add the chopped garlic sprouts, and it's ready to serve.

intro_zh:
这道鸡肝小炒蒜香浓郁，口感嫩滑带点孜然的焦香，是一道家常风味小炒。鸡肝富含铁、维生素 A 和优质蛋白，有助补血明目。制作时需掌握焯水去腥的技巧，对新手略有挑战，从备料到出锅大约需要四十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：760 大卡
intro_en:
This stir-fried chicken liver has a rich aroma of garlic and a tender texture with a hint of burnt aroma from cumin. It is a home-style stir-fry. Chicken liver is rich in iron, vitamin A and high-quality protein, which can help replenish blood and improve eyesight. When making it, you need to master the skills of blanching to remove the fishy smell, which is a bit challenging for novices. It takes about forty minutes from preparing the ingredients to taking it out of the pot.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 760 kcal
ingredients_zh: 蒜苗（蒜苗指的是：大蒜幼苗发育到一定时期的青苗。有些地方叫做青蒜，特别说明一下。）
食用盐、鸡精（味精）、五香粉（十三香）、胡椒粉
蒜苗（约 200g，喜欢吃的可以多放）
大葱 150g（分成两份，一份切段 100g，一份切片 50g）
姜 120g（分成两份，一份切片 70g，一份切丁 50g）
ingredients_en: Garlic seedlings (garlic seedlings refer to garlic seedlings that have developed to a certain stage. In some places, they are called green garlic, so please explain.)
Edible salt, chicken essence (monosodium glutamate), five-spice powder (thirteen spices), pepper
Garlic sprouts (about 200g, you can add more if you like)
150g green onions (divided into two parts, one cut into 100g pieces and the other into slices 50g)
120g ginger (divided into two parts, one part sliced 70g, one part diced 50g)
steps_zh: 鸡肝清洗，备用
蒜苗清洗，切段，备用
大葱清洗，取 100g 切段，取 50g 切片，备用
姜清晰，取 70g 切片， 取 50g 切丁，备用
第一步：焯水
第二步：炒制
steps_en: Clean chicken livers and set aside
Wash garlic sprouts, cut into sections, and set aside
Wash the green onions, cut 100g into sections, and slice 50g into slices, set aside
Clear the ginger, take 70g and slice it, take 50g and dice it, set aside
Step 1: Blanch
Step 2: Fry

intro_zh:
这道香辣滑嫩的豆腐菜以咸鸭蛋替代传统豆瓣酱，咸鲜中带着微麻微辣，格外开胃下饭。富含优质蛋白和钙、铁等多种微量元素。制作难度适中，对新手友好，全程约需 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：476 大卡
intro_en:
This spicy and tender tofu dish uses salted duck eggs instead of traditional bean paste. It is salty and slightly spicy, making it particularly appetizing. Rich in high-quality protein and various trace elements such as calcium and iron. It's moderately difficult to make, beginner-friendly, and takes about 40 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 476 kcal
ingredients_zh: 咸鸭蛋（推荐留夫鸭的，这个是灵魂）
五花肉（超市的肉糜也行）
ingredients_en: Salted duck eggs (recommended for Liufu duck, this is the soul)
Pork belly (minced meat from the supermarket will also work)
Millet pepper (optional if you don’t like spicy food)
steps_zh: 大蒜和生姜切碎，备用
小米辣切成辣椒圈，备用
五花肉切成肉糜（本来就是买的肉糜的跳过）
肉糜中加入一半的食盐和味极鲜酱油，搅拌均匀，备用
鸭蛋用菜刀竖着对半切开（注意安全），去除蛋黄（一定要去除，不然会腥），剩下的蛋白捣碎成大约 2 mm * 2 mm 大小，不用太碎，备用
打开豆腐包装，用水果刀将在盒子中的豆腐划成大约 2.5 cm * 3 cm 大小，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
调成小火，放入大蒜、生姜、辣椒圈、花椒、咸鸭蛋、蒜蓉辣酱翻炒 20 秒，炒出香味
调成中火，放入肉糜，翻炒大约 1 分钟，肉炒变色
调成小火，放入豆腐，将剩下的食盐、味极鲜酱油酱油均匀的洒在豆腐上
从锅边倒入开水（不然豆腐容易破），没过豆腐即可
开大火，水沸腾后立马转入中火，等待大约 10 分钟
等到水只剩 1/5 并且豆腐表面已经入色，关火，盛盘
steps_en: Chop garlic and ginger and set aside
Chili millet cut into pepper rings, set aside
Cut the pork belly into minced meat (skip the minced meat you bought originally)
Add half of the salt and very fresh soy sauce to the minced meat, stir evenly, and set aside

Cut the duck eggs in half vertically with a kitchen knife (pay attention to safety), remove the yolk (be sure to remove it, otherwise it will be fishy), and mash the remaining egg white into about 2 mm * 2 mm size, do not break it too much, set aside
Open the tofu package, use a knife to cut the tofu in the box into approximately 2.5 cm * 3 cm size, set aside
Heat a pan and put 10ml - 15ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Reduce the heat to low, add garlic, ginger, chili rings, Sichuan peppercorns, salted duck eggs, and garlic chili sauce and stir-fry for 20 seconds until fragrant.
Turn to medium heat, add minced meat, and stir-fry for about 1 minute until the meat changes color.
Turn down the heat to low, add the tofu, and sprinkle the remaining salt and soy sauce evenly on the tofu.
Pour boiling water from the side of the pot (otherwise the tofu will break easily), just cover the tofu
Turn on high heat. Once the water boils, immediately turn to medium heat and wait for about 10 minutes.
Wait until only 1/5 of the water is left and the surface of the tofu has taken on color, turn off the heat and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
徽派红烧肉是一道色泽红亮、肥而不腻的经典徽式家常菜，口感软糯 Q 弹，咸甜交融。以五花肉为主料，富含优质蛋白质和脂肪，能提供充沛能量。烹制需掌握炒糖色与火候，稍有挑战，预估制作时长约 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：3847 大卡
intro_en:
Hui-style braised pork is a classic Hui-style home-cooked dish that is bright red in color, fat but not greasy, and has a soft and chewy texture with a blend of salty and sweet. Using pork belly as the main ingredient, it is rich in high-quality protein and fat and can provide plenty of energy. Cooking requires mastering the color and heat of the fried sugar, which is a bit challenging. The estimated cooking time is about 45 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 3847 kcal
steps_zh: 五花肉切块，每块 2-3 cm 大小
锅中加入 150 ml 食用油，倒入五花肉，煎炸 2 分钟 后，加入盐，翻炒五花肉，2 分钟 后出锅
锅中加入 50 ml 食用油，倒入白砂糖，翻炒到咖啡色
倒入五花肉，翻炒 30 S ，加入姜片、蒜头后翻炒 30 S
加入料酒，五香粉、葱，加入水没过五花肉，盖上锅盖煮 10 分钟
加入生抽、老抽、蚝油，中火煮 20 分钟
开锅，大火烧汁，端盘
steps_en: Cut pork belly into pieces, each piece is 2-3 cm in size
Add 150 ml cooking oil to the pot, pour in the pork belly, fry for 2 minutes, add salt, stir-fry the pork belly, and remove from the pan after 2 minutes
Add 50 ml cooking oil to the pot, pour in sugar, and stir-fry until brown
Pour in the pork belly and stir-fry for 30 seconds. Add ginger slices and garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add cooking wine, five-spice powder, green onions, add water to cover the pork belly, cover the pot and cook for 10 minutes
Add light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and oyster sauce and cook over medium heat for 20 minutes
Open the pot, simmer the juice over high heat, and serve
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/徽派红烧肉/徽派红烧肉.md

intro_zh:
水煮牛肉是川菜中的经典麻辣味型，口感滑嫩、汤汁红亮、香辣烫鲜。牛肉富含优质蛋白质和铁，搭配豆芽可补充膳食纤维。这道菜对新手来说不算太难，但需注意火候和泼油安全，整体制作约需四十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：431 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled beef is a classic spicy flavor in Sichuan cuisine. It has a smooth and tender texture, a bright red soup, and is spicy and fresh. Beef is rich in high-quality protein and iron, and paired with bean sprouts, it can supplement dietary fiber. This dish is not too difficult for novices, but they need to pay attention to the safety of heat and oil pouring. The overall preparation takes about forty minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 431 kcal
steps_zh: 牛肉洗干净切片。
加入 15g 姜丝，1 个鸡蛋，15g 淀粉，8g 蚝油，10ml 料酒搅拌均匀，腌制 15 分钟。
香菜洗干净切好。
锅里倒油，加入豆瓣酱，5g 姜丝，蒜片。
倒入开水，煮成红汤。
豆芽洗干净去掉尾须，放进开水里焯熟。
将豆芽铺入碗底。
将牛肉片一片一片的放进红汤中，煮熟以后捞出。
将牛肉铺在豆芽上，撒上香菜梗。
撒上香菜叶，辣椒粉，辣椒圈。
另起锅烧热油，将热油淋在菜上面，就完成了。
steps_en: Wash and slice the beef.
Add 15g shredded ginger, 1 egg, 15g starch, 8g oyster sauce, 10ml cooking wine, mix well, and marinate for 15 minutes.
Wash and chop the coriander.
Pour oil into the pot, add bean paste, 5g shredded ginger, and garlic slices.
Pour in boiling water and cook into red soup.
Wash the bean sprouts, remove the tails, and blanch them in boiling water.
Spread the bean sprouts into the bottom of the bowl.
Put the beef slices into the red soup one by one, and take them out after they are cooked.
Spread beef over bean sprouts and sprinkle with coriander stalks.
Sprinkle with coriander leaves, chili powder, and chili rings.
Heat up the oil in another pan, pour the hot oil on top of the vegetables, and you're done.

intro_zh:
冬瓜酿肉是一道荤素搭配的家常蒸菜，口感鲜嫩爽滑，肉馅的咸香与冬瓜的清甜相互融合，清爽不腻。猪肉末提供优质蛋白质和必需氨基酸，冬瓜则有助于清热利尿、补充水分。做法简单，即使是新手也能轻松上手，只需稍加练习卷肉技巧即可。从备料到出锅，大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：578 大卡
intro_en:
Winter melon stuffed with meat is a home-style steamed dish that combines meat and vegetables. It tastes fresh and smooth. The salty aroma of the meat filling and the sweetness of the winter melon blend together, making it refreshing and not greasy. Minced pork provides high-quality protein and essential amino acids, while winter melon helps clear away heat, diuresis and replenish water. The method is simple, even a novice can easily get started, just need to practice the meat rolling skills a little. From preparation to serving, it takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 578 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡蛋 1 个（可选,不习惯的人可能会有点腥）
葱姜末（姜 3-4 片约 30g, 取上面一根葱花中的葱白部分即可）
ingredients_en: 1 egg (optional, it may be a bit fishy for those who are not used to it)
Minced green onion and ginger (3-4 slices of ginger, about 30g, just take the white part of the chopped green onion)
steps_zh: 冬瓜去皮，切成 25cm 长 3cm 厚的片
将切好的冬瓜放入碗中，放入 15g 盐，将冬瓜抹匀，放置 10 分钟
放置冬瓜的同时，换个碗放入肉末，葱姜末， 5g 盐，淀粉 5g，胡椒粉，生抽，胡椒粉
使用筷子在肉末中进行顺时针搅拌，搅拌到食材颜色没有明显对比（约 2 分钟）
将腌制好的冬瓜（会变软）使用清水洗三遍
拿出 1 片冬瓜片卷起来，并把肉塞进去
放入碟子中摆到碟子的边缘
打入 1 个鸡蛋到中间圆圈处
放入普通铁锅中水烧开后，蒸 15 分钟，盖上锅盖
开盖，取出蒸好的冬瓜酿肉
将冬瓜酿肉碟子的水倒入锅中，放入水淀粉，加入 50ml 清水倒入锅中烧开
淋到冬瓜酿肉上
steps_en: Peel the winter melon and cut into 25cm long and 3cm thick slices
Put the cut winter melon into a bowl, add 15g of salt, spread the winter melon evenly and let it sit for 10 minutes
While placing the winter melon, change a bowl and add minced meat, minced onion and ginger, 5g salt, 5g starch, pepper, light soy sauce, and pepper
Use chopsticks to stir the minced meat clockwise until there is no obvious contrast in the color of the ingredients (about 2 minutes)
Wash the pickled winter melon (it will become soft) three times with water
Take out 1 piece of winter melon, roll it up and stuff the meat inside
Put it on the plate and place it to the edge of the plate
Crack 1 egg into the middle circle
Put water in an ordinary iron pot and bring to a boil, steam for 15 minutes and cover the pot.
Open the lid and take out the steamed winter melon stuffed with meat.
Pour the water from the winter melon-stuffed meat dish into the pot, add water starch, add 50ml of water, pour it into the pot and bring to a boil
Pour it over the winter melon stuffed meat
images: dishes/meat_dish/冬瓜酿肉/冬瓜酿肉成品.jpg
