intro_zh:
这是一道经典中式卤味，肉质鲜嫩入味，香气浓郁，卤汁可反复使用、越陈越香，适合做凉菜、下酒或搭配主食。菜品富含优质蛋白和多种维生素，营养均衡。制作需要一点耐心，但步骤清晰，对新手比较友好。提前浸泡去血水、熬糖色和高压卤制约需 1 小时，再浸泡过夜让风味充分渗入，第二天取出切片即可享用。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：467 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Chinese braised dish. The meat is tender and tasty, and the aroma is rich. The marinade can be used repeatedly and becomes more fragrant with age. It is suitable for cold dishes, wine or as a staple food. The dishes are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins, and are nutritionally balanced. It requires a little patience to make, but the steps are clear and friendly to novices. It takes about 1 hour to soak in blood-removing water, boil sugar color and high-pressure brine in advance. Then soak overnight to allow the flavor to fully penetrate. Take it out and slice it the next day to enjoy.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 467 kcal
ingredients_zh: 白糖（最好是黄冰糖，用于熬糖色）
清水 足量（需要没过所有肉类）
ingredients_en: White sugar (preferably yellow rock sugar, used to cook the sugar color)
Enough water (needs to cover all meat)
steps_zh: 牛腱子提前浸泡在冷水中 3 小时以上，去除血水
准备糖色：锅中加入 30g 白糖，小火加热至糖完全融化并呈现棕褐色，加入 150ml 热水，搅拌均匀备用
将洋葱切块，生姜和大蒜拍碎，干辣椒掰断备用
在锅中加入足量的水，放入卤料包、洋葱、生姜、大蒜、干辣椒，大火烧开
加入黄豆酱、豆瓣酱、蚝油和南腐乳各 15ml，搅拌均匀
倒入准备好的糖色，混合均匀
加入生抽 120ml 和老抽 60ml，搅拌均匀
加入 10-15g 盐调味
倒入 1 罐啤酒(330ml)，再次烧开
牛腱子放入锅中焯水 2-3 分钟，捞出并用热水冲洗干净表面的浮沫
将焯水后的牛腱子放入已烧开的卤水中，确保卤水没过所有肉类
盖上高压锅盖，上汽后继续烹饪 25-30 分钟
烹饪完成后，不要开盖保温，自然冷却并浸泡一晚上（这样会更入味）
将卤好的肉取出放入冰箱冷藏，使其成型
食用前取出切片，可直接食用或凉拌
卤水重复使用方法：每次卤完肉后，将卤水过滤，去除所有固体内容物，重新烧开杀菌，冷却后可冷藏或冷冻保存。使用时按原配方比例重新添加调味料。（加水量根据卤水使用情况而定）
卤水保存得当可以使用很长时间，且越老越香。
**重要提示**：如卤制素菜，必须另取一部分卤水，单独使用，并且卤制完素菜的卤水不可重复使用。
将蒜末、葱花、白芝麻、辣椒粉按 1:1:1:1 的比例混合，依个人口味加小米辣，热植物油中加入少量芝麻油或藤椒油，分次泼在调料上，再加入生抽、醋、蚝油各 10ml，5ml 糖，味精/鸡精，最后 15ml 卤汤混合均匀。
凉拌时可搭配拍黄瓜、木耳、油炸花生米、香菜等配菜。
steps_en: Soak beef tendon in cold water for more than 3 hours in advance to remove blood.
Prepare sugar color: add 30g white sugar to the pot, heat over low heat until the sugar is completely melted and turns brown, add 150ml hot water, stir evenly and set aside
Cut the onion into cubes, smash the ginger and garlic, break off the dried chili pepper and set aside
Add enough water to the pot, add the marinade packets, onions, ginger, garlic, and dried chili peppers, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add 15ml each of soybean paste, bean paste, oyster sauce and fermented fermented bean curd, stir evenly
Pour in the prepared sugar color and mix evenly
Add 120ml of light soy sauce and 60ml of dark soy sauce, stir evenly
Add 10-15g salt to taste
Pour in 1 can of beer (330ml) and bring to a boil again
Blanch the beef tendons in a pot for 2-3 minutes, remove and rinse away any foam on the surface with hot water
Place the blanched beef tendons into the boiled brine, making sure that the brine covers all the meat
Cover the pressure cooker, turn on the steam and continue cooking for 25-30 minutes
After cooking is completed, do not open the lid to keep warm, let it cool naturally and soak overnight (this will make it more delicious)
Take out the braised meat and put it in the refrigerator to let it take shape
Take out the slices before eating and can eat directly or cold.

How to reuse the brine: After braising the meat each time, filter the brine to remove all solid contents, boil it again for sterilization, and store it in the refrigerator or freezer after cooling. When using, re-add seasonings according to the original recipe proportions. (The amount of water added depends on the usage of brine)
Brine can be used for a long time if stored properly, and becomes more fragrant as it gets older.
**Important Tips**: If you are braised vegetarian dishes, you must take another part of the brine and use it separately, and the brine after braised vegetarian dishes cannot be reused.

Mix minced garlic, chopped green onions, white sesame seeds, and chili powder in a ratio of 1:1:1:1. Add millet to make it spicy according to personal taste. Add a small amount of sesame oil or cane pepper oil to the hot vegetable oil, pour it on the seasoning in batches, then add 10ml each of light soy sauce, vinegar, and oyster sauce, 5ml sugar, MSG/chicken essence, and finally 15ml of marinated soup. Mix evenly.
When served cold, it can be paired with cucumber, fungus, fried peanuts, coriander and other side dishes.

intro_zh:
桂林传统酿菜系列，将调好味的猪肉、虾滑等馅料酿入青椒、苦瓜、田螺、茄子等十多种中空食材中，煎焖成菜，一菜一味，鲜香多汁，口感软嫩或弹牙，属于浓郁的地方家常风味。馅料提供优质蛋白质，搭配多种蔬菜，富含维生素与膳食纤维，营养较为均衡。制作步骤需要逐一填馅和掌控火候，稍需耐心，但操作逻辑简单，厨艺新手也能尝试，预计全部完成约需 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：468 大卡
intro_en:
Guilin's traditional stuffed dishes series is made by stuffing well-seasoned pork, shrimp paste and other fillings into more than ten kinds of hollow ingredients such as green peppers, bitter gourds, snails, eggplants, etc., and then frying and stewing them into dishes. The filling provides high-quality protein and is paired with a variety of vegetables. It is rich in vitamins and dietary fiber and has a balanced nutrition. The production steps require filling the fillings and controlling the heat one by one, which requires a little patience, but the operation logic is simple, and even novice cooks can try it. It is estimated that it will take about 1.5 hours to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 468 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青椒、苦瓜、茄子、田螺、豆腐、香菇、南瓜花
柚子、笋、冬瓜、香芋、蒜、番茄、豆芽、蛋、香菌
猪肉馅（基础款，肥瘦比例 3:7）
混合馅（猪肉 + 虾滑，猪肉 + 螺肉等自由组合）
ingredients_en: Green peppers, bitter melon, eggplant, snails, tofu, mushrooms, pumpkin flowers
Grapefruit, bamboo shoots, winter melon, taro, garlic, tomatoes, bean sprouts, eggs, mushrooms
Pork stuffing (basic version, fat to lean ratio 3:7)
Mixed stuffing (pork + shrimp paste, pork + snail meat, etc. free combination)
steps_zh: **青椒酿**：青椒去籽挖空 → 塞入猪肉馅或虾滑 → 煎至虎皮色 → 酱汁焖煮
**田螺酿**：田螺焯水取肉 → 螺肉与猪肉剁碎混合 → 塞回螺壳 → 紫苏薄荷焖煮
**猪肉馅**：最基础通用的选择，肥瘦 3:7 口感最佳
**虾滑馅**：鲜甜弹牙，青椒酿里常用
**螺肉猪肉混合馅**：田螺酿的灵魂，螺肉与猪肉 1:1，加紫苏薄荷
**混合馅**：猪肉 + 虾滑混搭，鲜甜与油脂香兼得
steps_en: **Stuffed green peppers**: Remove the seeds and hollow out the green peppers → Stuff with pork filling or shrimp paste → Fry until tiger skin color → Stew in sauce
**Stuffed snails**: Blanch the snails to get the meat → mince and mix the snail meat and pork → stuff the snail shell back → braise with perilla and mint
**Pork stuffing**: The most basic and versatile choice, 3:7 fat to lean for the best taste
**Shrimp stuffing**: fresh, sweet and chewy, commonly used in stuffed green peppers
**Snail meat and pork mixed stuffing**: The soul of stuffed snail meat, snail meat and pork 1:1, plus perilla mint
**Mixed stuffing**: Pork + shrimp paste, a combination of fresh, sweet and oily flavor
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/桂林十八酿/桂林十八酿.md

intro_zh:
酱牛肉是一道北派家常冷荤，酱香浓郁，口感紧实不散，嚼劲十足。牛腱子肉富含优质蛋白和多种氨基酸，慢炖后更易消化吸收。制作过程不算复杂，但包含腌制、慢炖和长时间冷藏，对新手来说需要些耐心，从头到尾大约需要 10 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：2265 大卡
intro_en:
Sauced beef is a northern-style home-cooked cold meat with rich sauce flavor, firm texture and chewy texture. Beef shank is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of amino acids, and is easier to digest and absorb after slow cooking. The process is not complicated, but involves marinating, slow-cooking, and long periods of refrigeration. It requires some patience for novices, and takes about 10 hours from start to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 2265 kcal
steps_zh: 牛腱子肉清洗干净，用清水浸泡 1 小时，去除血水
用牙签或者叉子在牛腱子肉表面扎孔，加料酒、花椒、姜片后，用保鲜膜紧密包裹容器，腌制 4-6 小时
牛腱子肉切成 8cm，不超过 10cm 的肉块
牛腱子肉放入锅中，加入冷水至水面没过牛肉，开锅至水沸腾开始计时，同时捞出浮沫。3 分钟后停火，捞出牛肉，用温水洗净
将洗净后的牛腱子肉放入砂锅或炖锅，加水没过牛腱子肉，开大火，放入除盐之外其他未使用的配料
水开之后，大火转为小火，持续加热 90 分钟，加盐
加盐后，继续小火 90 分钟（注：每 30 分钟确认水位线，要求至少达到牛肉面高度的 80%）
加热 180 分钟后，捞出牛腱子肉，捞出牛腱子肉，用保鲜膜紧密包裹，放入冰箱冷藏数小时
取出后沿牛肉纹路切片，上桌食用，其他牛腱子肉建议不切片冷藏
steps_en: Wash the beef tendons and soak them in water for 1 hour to remove the blood.
Prick holes on the surface of the beef tendon with a toothpick or fork, add cooking wine, peppercorns, and ginger slices, wrap the container tightly with plastic wrap, and marinate for 4-6 hours
Cut beef shank into 8cm, no more than 10cm pieces

Put the beef shank meat into the pot, add cold water until the water surface covers the beef, boil the pot until the water boils and start timing, and remove the foam at the same time. Stop the fire after 3 minutes, take out the beef and wash it with warm water
Put the washed beef tendon meat into a casserole or stew pot, add water to cover the beef tendon meat, turn on the high heat, and add other unused ingredients except salt.
After the water boils, reduce the heat to low and continue heating for 90 minutes, add salt
After adding salt, continue to simmer for 90 minutes (Note: Check the water level every 30 minutes, it is required to reach at least 80% of the height of the beef noodles)
After heating for 180 minutes, remove the beef tendon meat, wrap it tightly with plastic wrap, and refrigerate it for a few hours.
Take it out and slice it along the grain of the beef before serving. It is recommended not to slice other beef tendons and refrigerate them.

intro_zh:
红烧猪蹄是一道汤汁浓郁、肉质软糯的经典家常菜，咸香甜美，极为下饭。猪蹄富含胶原蛋白和蛋白质，营养丰富。这道菜对新手有一定挑战，但借助高压锅可以简化流程，有一定烹饪基础更易上手。从备料到完成大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：639 大卡
intro_en:
Braised pig's trotters is a classic home-cooked dish with rich soup and soft and glutinous meat. It is salty and sweet and goes very well with rice. Pig trotters are rich in collagen and protein and are rich in nutrients. This dish is challenging for novices, but the process can be simplified with the help of a pressure cooker, making it easier to get started if you have a certain cooking foundation. It takes approximately 1 hour from prep to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 639 kcal
steps_zh: 冷水锅中放入热心摊主剁好的猪蹄，加入 20 ml 料酒与葱姜，煮 15 分钟去掉血腥
热锅冷油，倒入 30ml 食用油，放入 7-8 粒冰糖，开小火，熬成糖色，期间用锅铲把冰糖压碎，大概熬 2 分钟
熬成糖色后，放入焯过水的猪蹄，继续小火，翻炒猪蹄，直至所有猪蹄两面微黄
加入香叶 2 片、桂皮 1 块、八角 4 个、生抽 20 ml、老抽 20 ml、料酒 10 ml、姜 3 片、盐 8 克，转中火、继续翻炒 1 分钟
加入开水或者冷水，水需要没过猪蹄，盖上锅盖，大火烧开，烧开之后关火
把锅内的食材全部倒入高压锅中，高压锅中需要 15 分钟（如果同学没有高压锅，可放在锅中大火转小火熬制即可）
15 分钟之后，把高压锅的食材倒入炒锅中，开大火收汁，此时可用筷子尝下味道、淡的话可以加 2~3g 盐
大火收汁时长根据锅中的水来算，一般 30 秒即可，多留点也无碍、红烧猪蹄汤也是很下饭的
steps_en: Put the pork trotters chopped by the enthusiastic stall owner into a pot of cold water, add 20 ml of cooking wine and onion and ginger, and cook for 15 minutes to remove the blood.

Heat the pan with cold oil, pour 30ml of cooking oil, add 7-8 rock sugar, turn on low heat, and simmer until it turns into sugar color. Use a spatula to crush the rock sugar and simmer for about 2 minutes.
After it turns into sugar color, add the blanched pig's trotters, continue to stir-fry the pig's trotters over low heat until all the pig's trotters are slightly yellow on both sides.

Add 2 bay leaves, 1 piece of cinnamon bark, 4 star anise, 20 ml of light soy sauce, 20 ml of dark soy sauce, 10 ml of cooking wine, 3 slices of ginger, and 8 grams of salt. Turn to medium heat and continue to stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add boiling or cold water, the water needs to cover the pig's trotters, cover the pot, bring to a boil over high heat, then turn off the heat

Pour all the ingredients in the pot into the pressure cooker. It will take 15 minutes in the pressure cooker (if you don't have a pressure cooker, you can put it in the pot and cook it over high heat to low heat)

After 15 minutes, pour the ingredients from the pressure cooker into the wok, turn on high heat and reduce the juice. At this time, you can use chopsticks to taste the taste. If it is light, you can add 2~3g of salt.

The time it takes to reduce the juice over high heat is calculated based on the water in the pot. Generally, 30 seconds is enough. It’s okay to leave a little more. The braised pig’s trotter soup is also very good with rice.

intro_zh:
香干芹菜炒肉是一道家常小炒，豆干柔韧、芹菜爽脆、猪肉嫩滑，咸鲜微辣。芹菜富含膳食纤维，豆干和猪肉提供优质植物蛋白与动物蛋白。做法简单，对新手友好，从备料到出锅大约只需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：741 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried pork with dried celery is a home-style stir-fry. The dried tofu is soft, the celery is crisp, the pork is tender, and it is salty and slightly spicy. Celery is rich in dietary fiber, and dried tofu and pork provide high-quality plant protein and animal protein. It’s simple and beginner-friendly, and only takes about 30 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 741 kcal
ingredients_zh: 辣椒：青椒或者红椒都可以
花椒：6 粒（不喜欢可以不放，或者放花椒水）
ingredients_en: Chili peppers: green or red peppers are fine
Sichuan peppercorns: 6 pieces (you can omit it if you don’t like it, or add peppercorn water)
steps_zh: 芹菜去叶切段、切成不超过 4cm 的条状，备用
香干切条，宽约小拇指，备用
蒜头切片或者剁成蒜泥都行，备用
辣椒切圈或者斜切成条都行，备用
热锅，锅内放入 10ml - 15ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
放入花椒、大蒜爆香（可以吃姜的也可以额外放入一些姜片/姜丝）
加入猪肉炒至变色，再加入 8ml 老抽上色翻炒均匀（有豆瓣酱的，可以放入 3ml 豆瓣酱一起翻炒）
加入香干翻炒均匀（大约 2 分钟）
加入辣椒翻炒均匀（大约 1-2 分钟）
加入芹菜，放入 5g 盐翻炒 1 分钟
加入 3g 鸡精、5ml 蚝油翻炒均匀，即可出锅
steps_en: Remove leaves from celery, cut into sections and cut into strips no larger than 4cm, set aside
Cut the dried fragrant into strips, about the width of your little finger, set aside
Slice the garlic or mince it into minced garlic, set aside
You can cut the peppers into rings or diagonally into strips and set aside.
Heat a pan and put 10ml - 15ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Add Sichuan peppercorns and garlic and saute until fragrant (if you can eat ginger, you can also add some extra ginger slices/shredded ginger)
Add the pork and stir-fry until it changes color, then add 8ml of dark soy sauce and stir-fry evenly (if there is bean paste, you can add 3ml of bean paste and stir-fry together)
Add the dried fragrant spices and stir-fry evenly (about 2 minutes)
Add chili and stir-fry evenly (about 1-2 minutes)
Add celery, 5g salt and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add 3g chicken essence and 5ml oyster sauce, stir-fry evenly and serve.
images: dishes/meat_dish/香干芹菜炒肉/香干芹菜炒肉.jpg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/香干芹菜炒肉/香干芹菜炒肉.md

intro_zh:
这是一道源自北大食堂、甜辣风味的创新川菜，鸡肉先腌后炸，外酥里嫩，土豆香糯，青椒脆爽，裹满红亮的甜辣酱汁，咸甜微辣十分开胃。富含蛋白质、碳水化合物及维生素。制作涉及油炸和酱汁熬制，对新手稍有挑战，但按步骤操作即可成功，全程约需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1300 大卡
intro_en:
This is an innovative Sichuan dish with a sweet and spicy flavor originating from the Peking University cafeteria. The chicken is marinated and then fried. It is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. The potatoes are fragrant and waxy, and the green peppers are crisp. It is covered in a bright red sweet and spicy sauce. The salty, sweet and slightly spicy sauce is very appetizing. Rich in protein, carbohydrates and vitamins. The preparation involves frying and boiling the sauce, which is a bit challenging for novices, but you can succeed by following the steps, and the whole process takes about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1300 kcal
ingredients_zh: 郫县红油豆瓣酱（注意区分，不是那种棕黄色的豆瓣酱）
ingredients_en: Pixian Red Oil Doubanjiang (note the distinction, not the brownish-yellow bean paste)
steps_zh: 鸡腿去骨（如使用鸡腿排可忽略此步骤），鸡腿肉用刀背砸一砸，切成 2cm 的块。
鸡腿肉中加入盐、鸡精（可选）、胡椒粉、生抽、老抽、料酒，抓拌至粘手时加入淀粉拌匀，加入食用油防止粘连，腌制 30 分钟。
土豆去皮，切成 2cm 的块，沸水煮 5 分钟后捞出，控干水分，防止油炸时爆锅。
青椒去籽，切成 2cm 小片，放在笊篱中备用。
锅中加入宽油（根据锅的形状，能没过食材即可），油温烧至 180℃ 时，下入土豆块炸 3 分钟后捞出。
待油温再次升高到 180℃时，下入鸡块炸 2 分钟后捞出。
待油温再次升高到 180℃时，下入鸡块复炸 1 分钟后捞出。
待油温再次升高到 180℃时，下入土豆块复炸 1 分钟后，将锅中的油和土豆块经过笊篱过滤倒出，让笊篱上的青椒片断生。
锅中加入 5ml 食用油，小火煸炒蒜瓣至发黄，下入红油豆瓣酱煸炒出香，下入白糖炒融化，下入花椒碎，加 40ml 清水，不停搅拌至酱汁粘稠。
下入炸好的鸡块、土豆块、青椒片，搅拌均匀后出锅。
steps_en: Debone the chicken legs (if using chicken leg steaks, you can ignore this step), smash the chicken legs with the back of a knife and cut into 2cm pieces.

Add salt, chicken essence (optional), pepper, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and cooking wine to the chicken thighs. When the chicken legs are sticky, add starch and mix well. Add cooking oil to prevent sticking and marinate for 30 minutes.
Peel the potatoes and cut them into 2cm pieces. Boil them in boiling water for 5 minutes and then remove them to drain them to prevent them from exploding during frying.
Remove seeds from green peppers, cut into 2cm pieces, and place in a rack for later use.

Add a wide amount of oil to the pot (depending on the shape of the pot, just enough to cover the ingredients). When the oil temperature reaches 180°C, add the potato cubes and fry for 3 minutes before taking them out.
When the oil temperature rises to 180℃ again, add the chicken pieces and fry for 2 minutes before taking them out.
When the oil temperature rises to 180℃ again, add the chicken pieces and fry again for 1 minute before taking them out.

When the oil temperature rises to 180°C again, add the potato pieces and fry again for 1 minute. Then filter the oil and potato pieces in the pot through a strainer and pour them out, allowing the green pepper slices on the strainer to grow.

Add 5ml cooking oil to the pot, stir-fry the garlic cloves over low heat until they turn yellow, add red bean paste and stir-fry until fragrant, add white sugar and stir-fry until it melts, add crushed Sichuan peppercorns, add 40ml water, stir constantly until the sauce becomes thick.
Add the fried chicken pieces, potato pieces, and green pepper slices, stir evenly and remove from the pan.
images: dishes/meat_dish/干煸仔鸡/干煸仔鸡成品.jpg

intro_zh:
新疆大盘鸡是一道风味浓郁、色彩鲜艳的新疆家常菜，鸡肉鲜嫩不柴，土豆软糯吸汁，麻辣中带着微甜回甘。富含优质蛋白质和碳水化合物，搭配彩椒还能补充维生素 C。制作过程需要炒糖色和掌握收汁火候，对新手有一定挑战，但跟随步骤细心操作并不难，整体大约 1 小时可以完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1108 大卡
intro_en:
Xinjiang Chicken is a home-cooked dish from Xinjiang with rich flavor and bright colors. The chicken is tender and tender, the potatoes are soft and glutinous to absorb the juice, and it is spicy and slightly sweet. Rich in high-quality protein and carbohydrates, it also adds vitamin C when paired with bell peppers. The production process requires frying the sugar color and mastering the heat to reduce the juice, which is a certain challenge for novices, but it is not difficult to follow the steps carefully and can be completed in about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1108 kcal
ingredients_zh: 花椒，香叶，香果，干线椒，大蒜，大葱
油，盐，生抽，蚝油，料酒（可拿啤酒），白糖
鸡肉（鸡腿肉最好），土豆，菜椒和甜椒（可以不用，加上配色好看）
两个火枪腿的鸡肉（这大约是 1kg ）
ingredients_en: Zanthoxylum bungeanum, bay leaf, xiangguo, dried pepper, garlic, green onion
Oil, salt, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, cooking wine (can take beer), sugar
Chicken (chicken legs are best), potatoes, vegetable peppers and bell peppers (you can use them without, the color will look good)
2 musket legs of chicken (this is about 1kg)
One each of bell pepper and bell pepper, 50g each
steps_zh: 肉先剁好，块状，用清水+盐浸泡 5 分钟，去除血水，去腥，然后空干水
葱蒜辣椒土豆等洗干净，土豆削皮
葱白切长段，长度 4cm 一段，菜椒和线椒切块状
土豆切成滚刀土豆，即切一刀动滚动一下，一块土豆大概有 4cm*4cm 大小即可
炒糖色：先将油加入锅中，然后将白砂糖放入，用锅铲来回搅拌，将糖炒化，然后炒出焦黄色，此时将空干水的鸡肉倒入锅中翻炒，进行上色
放入花椒，香叶，香果，干线椒等进行翻炒
放入 5g 盐，生抽 7ml，蚝油 10g ，料酒 100g，倒入 1 升清水，料酒可以用啤酒代替
调至中火，将水烧开，调制中小火慢炖入味
当水收至鸡肉即将露出时，将土豆放在锅表面：注意不要翻动土豆，就盖在表面，不然翻到下面容易粘锅，继续盖锅盖炖，炖一会后将大葱，菜椒和甜椒放入，继续炖。
炖到汁收的差不多时可以进行翻面，将土豆与汤汁相吸，最后关火盛出。
steps_en: Chop the meat into pieces first, soak it in water and salt for 5 minutes to remove the blood and fishy smell, and then drain the water
Wash the onions, garlic, peppers, potatoes, etc., and peel the potatoes.
Cut green onions into long sections, 4cm long, and cut green peppers and string peppers into cubes
Cut potatoes into hobs, that is, cut them once and roll them once. A piece of potato should be about 4cm*4cm in size.

Fry the sugar color: first add oil to the pot, then add the white sugar, stir back and forth with a spatula, fry the sugar, and then fry until brown. At this time, pour the empty chicken into the pot and stir-fry to color.
Add peppercorns, bay leaves, fragrant fruits, dry peppers, etc. and stir-fry
Add 5g salt, 7ml light soy sauce, 10g oyster sauce, 100g cooking wine, and pour 1 liter of water. The cooking wine can be replaced with beer.
Adjust the heat to medium, bring the water to a boil, and simmer over medium to low heat until the flavor is absorbed.

When the water is reduced until the chicken is about to be exposed, place the potatoes on the surface of the pot: be careful not to flip the potatoes, just cover the surface, otherwise they will stick to the pot if turned over. Continue to cover the pot and simmer. After simmering for a while, add the green onions, green peppers and bell peppers and continue to stew.
When the sauce is almost reduced, you can turn it over, absorb the potatoes and soup, and finally turn off the heat and serve.
images: dishes/meat_dish/新疆大盘鸡/大盘鸡皮带面.jpeg
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/新疆大盘鸡/新疆大盘鸡.md

intro_zh:
这道广西经典家常菜以青椒包裹调好味的肉馅或虾滑，煎至表皮起皱呈虎皮色后焖煮入味，青椒清香与馅料鲜美交融，咸香微辣，十分下饭。猪肉和虾仁提供优质蛋白质，青椒富含维生素 C，营养均衡。制作需要一点耐心酿馅，但整体流程清晰，跟着步骤操作一般 30 分钟就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1403 大卡
intro_en:
This classic Guangxi home-cooked dish uses green peppers wrapped in seasoned meat fillings or shrimp paste, fried until the skin wrinkles and turns the color of tiger skin, and then simmered to add flavor. The fragrance of the green peppers blends deliciously with the fillings, and is salty and slightly spicy, making it a perfect addition to rice. Pork and shrimp provide high-quality protein, and green peppers are rich in vitamin C and are nutritionally balanced. Making the stuffing requires a little patience, but the overall process is clear and can usually be completed in 30 minutes by following the steps.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1403 kcal
ingredients_zh: 青椒（6-8 个，选笔直、肉厚的，不要用灯笼菜椒）
猪肉（250g，肥瘦比例 3:7 的前夹肉最佳）
淀粉（可选，涂青椒内壁防粘、勾芡收汁）
青椒 8 个（约 400g，选笔直肉厚的尖椒）
生抽 30ml（其中 15ml 调馅，15ml 调酱汁）
淀粉 10g（可选，其中 5g 涂青椒内壁、5g 水淀粉勾芡）
ingredients_en: Green peppers (6-8, choose straight and thick ones, do not use bell peppers)
Pork (250g, front-loaded meat with a fat-to-lean ratio of 3:7 is best)
Starch (optional, apply to the inner wall of green peppers to prevent sticking and thicken the juice)
8 green peppers (about 400g, choose straight and thick peppers)
30ml light soy sauce (15ml for filling and 15ml for sauce)
10g starch (optional, 5g to coat the inner wall of green pepper, 5g water starch to thicken)
steps_zh: 猪肉洗净剁成肉馅（或用绞肉机），姜切末，葱切葱花
肉馅中加入姜末、葱花、生抽 15ml、老抽 5ml、食盐 3g，搅拌均匀
可选加入：料酒 10ml、蚝油 10ml、鸡蛋 1 个、淀粉 5g、白胡椒粉 2g、白糖 5g
朝一个方向搅拌肉馅至粘稠上劲，腌制 10 分钟
青椒洗净，去蒂，用筷子小心挖去内部的籽和白筋，保持青椒完整不破
可选在青椒内壁撒干淀粉约 5g，摇晃均匀，帮助肉馅粘附不脱落
将腌好的肉馅用筷子或裱花袋塞入青椒中，尽量填满但不要太紧以防撑破
全部酿好后备用
碗中加入生抽 15ml、老抽 5ml、清水 100ml，搅拌均匀
可选加入淀粉 5g，使汤汁更浓稠
热锅，倒入 30ml 食用油，油温五六成热时放入酿好的青椒（肉面朝下先煎）
中小火慢煎，翻面使青椒各面都煎至表皮起皱呈虎皮色，盛出备用
锅留底油，可选放入蒜末爆香
倒入调好的酱汁，烧开后放入煎好的青椒
转中小火，盖上锅盖焖煮 5-8 分钟，至汤汁浓稠、青椒变软
开盖大火收汁至汤汁油亮包裹青椒，即可出锅装盘
虾仁 250g 去虾线，用刀背拍成虾泥（保留一定颗粒感，口感更好，直接买成品虾滑得了，买那种三角形的裱花一样直接塞进去）
虾滑馅调味：姜末 5g、食盐 2g、淀粉 5g、生抽 10ml
可选加入：料酒 5ml、白胡椒粉 1g、蛋清半个
朝一个方向搅拌至虾滑上劲，腌制 10 分钟
后续酿入、煎制、焖煮步骤与猪肉版本一致
虾滑易熟，焖煮时间可缩短至 4-5 分钟
steps_en: Wash the pork and mince it into minced meat (or use a meat grinder), mince the ginger, and chop the green onion.
Add minced ginger, chopped green onion, 15ml light soy sauce, 5ml dark soy sauce, and 3g salt to the meat filling, stir evenly
Optional additions: 10ml cooking wine, 10ml oyster sauce, 1 egg, 5g starch, 2g white pepper, 5g sugar
Stir the meat filling in one direction until thick and firm, marinate for 10 minutes
Wash the green peppers, remove the stems, and carefully dig out the seeds and white tendons inside with chopsticks to keep the green peppers intact.
You can optionally sprinkle about 5g of dry starch on the inner wall of the green pepper and shake evenly to help the meat filling adhere to it and not fall off.
Stuff the marinated meat filling into the green pepper with chopsticks or a piping bag, filling it as much as possible but not too tight to prevent it from bursting.
Prepare everything after brewing
Add 15ml of light soy sauce, 5ml of dark soy sauce and 100ml of water into the bowl and stir evenly
Optionally add 5g of starch to make the soup thicker
Heat the pan, pour 30ml cooking oil, when the oil temperature is 50% to 60% hot, add the stuffed green peppers (fry the meat side down first)
Fry slowly over medium-low heat, turn over and fry the green pepper on all sides until the skin becomes wrinkled and becomes tiger skin color. Dish out and set aside.
Leave oil in the pot, optionally add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant
Pour in the prepared sauce, bring to a boil and add the fried green peppers
Turn to medium-low heat, cover and simmer for 5-8 minutes, until the soup thickens and the green peppers soften.
Open the lid and reduce the sauce over high heat until the soup is shiny and coats the green peppers, then take it out of the pot and put it on a plate

250g shrimps. Remove the shrimp threads and pat them into paste with the back of a knife (keep a certain graininess for a better taste. Just buy the finished shrimps to make them slippery. Just buy the triangular ones and stuff them directly)
Shrimp filling seasoning: 5g minced ginger, 2g salt, 5g starch, 10ml light soy sauce
Optional additions: 5ml cooking wine, 1g white pepper, half egg white
Stir in one direction until the shrimp is cooked and marinated for 10 minutes
The subsequent steps of stuffing, frying, and stewing are the same as the pork version.
Shrimp are smooth and easy to cook, and the stewing time can be shortened to 4-5 minutes

intro_zh:
姜炒鸡是湖南风味的下饭菜肴，鸡肉干香入味，姜香浓郁，辣而不燥。鸡肉富含优质蛋白，生姜有助于驱寒暖胃、促进食欲。做法简单，新手也能轻松掌握。从腌制到出锅大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1539 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried chicken with ginger is a Hunan-style rice dish. The chicken is dry and fragrant. The ginger is rich in flavor, spicy but not dry. Chicken is rich in high-quality protein, and ginger helps to dispel cold, warm the stomach and stimulate appetite. The method is simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about 1 hour from marinating to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1539 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡 = 半只（土鸡最好，预计 650g）
食用油 = 50ml（茶油最好，没有就用菜籽油）
小米椒 = 0-5 个 (0-50g)（根据辣口味调整）
美人辣 = 0-5 个 (0-50g)（没有可以用小米椒代替）
ingredients_en: Chicken = half (local chicken is best, estimated to be 650g)
Edible oil = 50ml (tea oil is best, if not available, use rapeseed oil)
Millet pepper = 0-5 pieces (0-50g) (adjust according to spicy taste)
Meiren spicy = 0-5 pieces (0-50g) (if not available, millet pepper can be used instead)
steps_zh: 鸡尽量剁成 1cm 的小块，洗净后滤干，再放生抽腌和料酒腌制 30 分钟
大先热锅到微微冒烟，放入食用油，等 5 秒
下入姜片后转中火炒 30 秒，
下入鸡块翻炒 3 分钟，炒干水分，炒出鸡油
放入各种剁碎的辣椒和大蒜子，加盐和老抽继续翻炒 30 秒
倒入啤酒，中小火焖 2 分钟
大火收汁盛盘
steps_en: Chop the chicken into 1cm pieces as much as possible, wash and drain, then marinate with light soy sauce and cooking wine for 30 minutes.
Heat the pan until it is slightly smoking, add cooking oil and wait 5 seconds
Add the ginger slices and sauté over medium heat for 30 seconds.
Add the chicken pieces and stir-fry for 3 minutes to dry out the water and release the chicken fat.
Add various chopped chili peppers and garlic seeds, add salt and dark soy sauce and continue stir-frying for 30 seconds
Pour in the beer and simmer over medium-low heat for 2 minutes
Collect the juice over high heat and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
姜葱捞鸡是一道粤式经典家常菜，鸡肉嫩滑多汁，葱姜香气浓郁，咸鲜适口，十分下饭。鸡腿肉提供优质蛋白质，搭配姜葱能温中散寒、促进食欲。整体操作以蒸制和手撕为主，步骤清晰，对新手来说比较容易上手。从备料到完成大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：549 大卡
intro_en:
Chicken with ginger and onion is a classic Cantonese home-cooked dish. The chicken is tender and juicy, the onion and ginger are rich in aroma, salty and delicious, and it goes very well with rice. Chicken thigh meat provides high-quality protein, and when paired with ginger and green onion, it can warm the body, dispel cold, and stimulate appetite. The overall operation is mainly based on steaming and hand shredding, and the steps are clear, making it easier for novices to get started. It takes about 40 minutes from prep to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 549 kcal
steps_zh: 四个鸡腿清洗干净，放入碗中
碗中加入盐焗鸡粉和 5ml 油，搅拌均匀
让鸡腿静置腌制 15 分钟， 同时准备蒸锅并把水煮开
鸡腿腌制完成后， 放入水开后的蒸锅中，蒸制 20 分钟
将姜根据个人口味切成 1）姜蓉或 2）姜丝或 3）姜粒
将葱切成 0.5cm 小段
将葱姜放入蘸料碗，并加入盐和糖
将剩余的油倒入另一个锅中加热至六至七层热
将热油淋入葱姜碗中
鸡腿蒸好后将其撕碎成鸡丝，不需要特别细，大概 1cm 粗就可以
姜葱姜油淋在鸡丝上，搅拌均匀即可
steps_en: Clean the four chicken legs and put them in a bowl
Add salt-baked chicken powder and 5ml oil to the bowl, stir evenly
Let the chicken legs marinate for 15 minutes while you prepare the steamer and bring the water to a boil
After the chicken legs are marinated, put them into a steamer with boiling water and steam them for 20 minutes.
Cut the ginger into 1) minced ginger or 2) shredded ginger or 3) granulated ginger according to personal taste
Cut onions into 0.5cm pieces
Put the onion and ginger into the dipping bowl and add salt and sugar
Pour the remaining oil into another pan and heat until it is six to seven levels hot
Pour hot oil into the onion and ginger bowl
After the chicken legs are steamed, shred them into shreds. They don’t need to be particularly thin, about 1cm thick.
Pour the ginger, onion and ginger oil over the shredded chicken and stir evenly.

intro_zh:
鱼香茄子是一道经典的川味家常菜，酸甜微辣，茄子软糯吸汁，非常下饭。茄子富含膳食纤维和多种维生素，搭配肉末能补充蛋白质。制作难度中等，需要掌握炸茄子和调味技巧，新手稍加练习也能成功。从备料到出锅大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：579 大卡
intro_en:
Fish-flavored eggplant is a classic Sichuan home-cooked dish. It is sweet and sour and slightly spicy. The eggplant is soft and glutinous and absorbs the juice. It goes very well with rice. Eggplant is rich in dietary fiber and multiple vitamins, and can supplement protein when paired with minced meat. The difficulty of making it is medium. You need to master the skills of frying eggplant and seasoning. Novices can succeed with a little practice. It takes about 30 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 579 kcal
ingredients_zh: 小葱、姜、蒜、小米辣 （根据自己口味）
ingredients_en: Onion, ginger, garlic, millet spicy (according to your own taste)
steps_zh: 将茄子切成条。
将肉切成肉沫，葱姜蒜切碎、小米椒切丁。
调鱼香汁：碗中放入盐、味精、糖、生抽、老抽、醋、水淀粉搅拌均匀。
锅中倒入 300ml 油，开小火（小火容易掌控），等油温七成热（小火大约 40 秒，有烟冒出）放入茄子炸两分钟，当茄子边缘微黄就捞出。多出的油可以盛出以后炒菜用。
锅中留 15-30ml 油，倒入肉沫炒至颜色变白就盛出来。
锅中倒入 15-30ml 油，放入豆瓣酱、葱白、姜、蒜炒香，然后倒入肉沫翻炒均匀。
加入 80-150ml 清水（水面预计茄子八成高度为准），倒入茄子、倒入料汁，爆炒入味收汁。最后放入葱翻炒均匀，就可以起锅了。
steps_en: Cut the eggplant into strips.
Cut the meat into minced meat, chop the onion, ginger, garlic, and dice the millet and pepper.
Adjust the fish sauce: Put salt, monosodium glutamate, sugar, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, vinegar, and water starch in a bowl and stir evenly.

Pour 300ml oil into the pot, turn on low heat (low heat is easy to control), wait until the oil temperature is 70% hot (low heat is about 40 seconds, smoke will come out), add the eggplant and fry for two minutes, take it out when the edges of the eggplant are slightly brown. The extra oil can be scooped out and used for cooking later.
Leave 15-30ml of oil in the pot, pour in the minced meat and fry until the color turns white, then take it out.
Pour 15-30ml oil into the pot, add bean paste, scallions, ginger and garlic and stir-fry until fragrant, then add minced meat and stir-fry evenly.

Add 80-150ml of water (the water surface is expected to be 80% of the height of the eggplant), pour in the eggplant, pour in the sauce, and stir-fry until the flavor is reduced. Finally, add the onions and stir-fry evenly before serving.

intro_zh:
口水鸡是一道经典的四川凉菜，红油包裹的鸡肉冰爽 Q 弹、麻辣鲜香，夏季食用开胃解腻。鸡肉富含优质蛋白，搭配花生碎和香料，提供能量与风味。制作难度中等，需注意煮鸡火候和红油调味，适合有一定下厨经验的烹饪者。从备料、煮鸡、冷却到淋汁完成，预计耗时约 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1392 大卡
intro_en:
Saliva chicken is a classic Sichuan cold dish. The chicken wrapped in red oil is cool and chewy, spicy and fragrant. It is an appetizer and relieves fatigue when eaten in summer. The chicken is rich in high-quality protein and paired with chopped peanuts and spices to provide energy and flavor. The difficulty of making it is medium. You need to pay attention to the cooking temperature of the chicken and seasoning with red oil. It is suitable for cooks with certain cooking experience. It is expected to take about 1.5 hours from preparing the ingredients, cooking the chicken, cooling it to finishing pouring the sauce.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1392 kcal
steps_zh: 姜切片，1 颗小葱，15 颗花椒备用
鸡肉洗干净，放入锅中，清水没过鸡肉，放入姜片、小葱和花椒，开大火烧开。
大火烧开后，转中小火 20 分钟关火
取出鸡肉，放入冰水中，直至冰凉
取出鸡肉，切块摆盘子中，备用
小火把锅烧热，导入花生，烘烤至表皮爆裂。（注意随时翻动，不要糊了）
一颗葱切成段，蒜拍成末，花椒 15 颗，花生去皮切碎。
锅内导入油烧热后，放入葱段，花椒和一半蒜末，炒香
炒至油温 8 成热，关火，滤出热油
将热油倒入放辣椒粉的碗中，搅拌，并滤出红油
红油中放入剩余蒜末、生抽、醋、盐、味精、糖、香油、花椒粉。拌匀放凉
在鸡肉上撒上花生碎，把红油淋到切好的鸡肉上，撒上香菜。成盘
steps_en: Slice ginger, 1 shallot, 15 peppercorns, set aside
Wash the chicken, put it into a pot, cover the chicken with water, add ginger slices, shallots and peppercorns, and bring to a boil over high heat.
After the fire boils, turn to medium-low heat for 20 minutes and turn off the heat.
Remove the chicken and place it in ice water until cold
Take out the chicken, cut into pieces and place on a plate, set aside
Heat the pot over low heat, add peanuts, and roast until the skin bursts. (Be careful to flip it at any time and don’t burn it)
Cut a green onion into sections, mince garlic, 15 peppercorns, peel and chop peanuts.
After the oil is heated in the pot, add the green onions, peppercorns and half of the minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Fry until the oil temperature reaches 8%, turn off the heat and filter out the hot oil.
Pour the hot oil into the bowl with the chili powder, stir and strain out the red oil
Add the remaining minced garlic, light soy sauce, vinegar, salt, monosodium glutamate, sugar, sesame oil, and pepper powder to the red oil. Mix well and let cool
Sprinkle the chicken with chopped peanuts, pour the red oil over the cut chicken, and sprinkle with coriander. Plate

name_en: Dace with black bean sauce and lettuce
intro_zh:
豆豉鲮鱼油麦菜是一道咸香下饭的快手家常小炒，源于粤式罐头菜肴，油麦菜清脆、鲮鱼酥香。荤素搭配，富含蛋白质和膳食纤维。做法简单，对新手十分友好，一般十五分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：416 大卡
intro_en:
Dace with fermented beans and lettuce is a quick and savory home-cooked stir-fry that goes well with rice. It is derived from Cantonese canned dishes. The lettuce is crisp and the dace is crispy and fragrant. A combination of meat and vegetables, rich in protein and dietary fiber. The method is simple, very friendly to novices, and can usually be completed in fifteen minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 416 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鲮鱼罐头 1 罐（250g 上下）

**炒制过程**：

**Frying Process**:

intro_zh:
这是一道经典的澳门葡式风味快餐，牛肉碎嫩滑咸香，裹着浓郁酱汁和半熟蛋液，拌入米饭后口感油润诱人。牛肉末提供优质蛋白质，搭配鸡蛋和洋葱，营养均衡管饱。操作步骤简单易上手，特别适合新手尝试，从备料到出锅大约只需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1011 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Macau Portuguese-style fast food. The minced beef is tender, smooth and salty, wrapped in rich sauce and half-boiled egg liquid. It tastes oily and attractive after being mixed with rice. Ground beef provides high-quality protein, and when combined with eggs and onions, it is nutritionally balanced and filling. The operation steps are simple and easy to use, especially suitable for novices to try. It only takes about 30 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1011 kcal
ingredients_zh: 牛肉末（可以用稍微肥一点的猪肉末代替）
黄油（可用普通食用油代替）
鸡蛋 1 个（用于制作水波蛋或半熟煎蛋）
生抽 3 汤匙（1 汤匙用于腌制，2 汤匙用于料汁）
ingredients_en: Ground beef (you can use slightly fatter ground pork instead)
Butter (normal cooking oil can be substituted)
1 egg (for making poached eggs or soft-boiled omelettes)
3 tablespoons light soy sauce (1 tablespoon for marinating, 2 tablespoons for sauce)
steps_zh: 将 200g 牛肉末放入碗中，加入 1 汤匙生抽、半汤匙白糖和 2g 黑胡椒，搅拌均匀，**等待腌制 10 分钟**。
将半个洋葱切成小丁，备用。
调制料汁：在碗中加入 2 汤匙生抽、2 汤匙番茄酱、1 汤匙料酒、1 汤匙淀粉、半汤匙老抽和 50ml 清水，搅拌均匀备用。
另起一锅，制作一个水波蛋或半熟煎蛋，备用。
热锅，放入 10g 黄油。待黄油融化后，放入洋葱丁，小火煎熟至散发香味。
加入腌制好的牛肉末，与洋葱一起翻炒至牛肉变色。
倒入调好的料汁，撒上 2g 黑胡椒，继续炒制直至汤汁变粘稠后关火。
将炒好的免治牛肉浇在热米饭上，放上提前准备好的水波蛋或半熟煎蛋。
（可选）表面撒上 5g 切好的小葱花作装饰。
steps_en: Put 200g minced beef into a bowl, add 1 tablespoon light soy sauce, half a tablespoon sugar and 2g black pepper, stir well, **wait to marinate for 10 minutes**.
Cut half an onion into small cubes and set aside.

Prepare the sauce: Add 2 tablespoons of light soy sauce, 2 tablespoons of tomato paste, 1 tablespoon of cooking wine, 1 tablespoon of starch, half a tablespoon of dark soy sauce and 50ml of water in a bowl, stir well and set aside.
In another pot, make a poached egg or half-boiled omelette and set aside.
Heat the pan and add 10g of butter. After the butter melts, add the diced onions and fry over low heat until fragrant.
Add marinated minced beef and stir-fry with onions until beef changes color.
Pour in the prepared sauce, sprinkle with 2g of black pepper, continue to stir-fry until the soup becomes thick, then turn off the heat.
Pour the fried minced beef over the hot rice and top with the prepared poached eggs or half-boiled eggs.
(Optional) Sprinkle 5g chopped green onions on top for garnish.
