intro_zh:
这道家常美味色泽红润油亮，口感软糯，肥而不腻，酱香浓郁，搭配米饭特别过瘾。五花肉提供优质蛋白质和必需脂肪酸，加上鹌鹑蛋或豆皮，营养更全面。做法对新手相当友好，从备料到出锅大约需要 1.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：2775 大卡
intro_en:
This homely delicacy is red and shiny in color, soft and glutinous in texture, fat but not greasy, and has a rich sauce flavor. It is particularly enjoyable when paired with rice. Pork belly provides high-quality protein and essential fatty acids, and with quail eggs or bean curds, the nutrition is more comprehensive. The recipe is quite beginner-friendly, and it takes about 1.5 hours from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 2775 kcal
ingredients_zh: 注：如果有可能，请尽量把刀磨的锋利一些。
主料：`大肉`、`鸡蛋`（可选）、`豆皮`（可选）
辅料：`生姜`、`冰糖`、`生抽`、`老抽`、`料酒`、`香叶`、`八角`、`盐`、`水`、`葱`（记得要开水）
开水：没过食材的量，需要 600ml-900ml
鹌鹑蛋（可选，没有鹌鹑蛋，可以用同等重量的鸡蛋代替）：0-2 个
ingredients_en: Note: If possible, please try to sharpen the knife.
Accessories: `ginger`, `rock sugar`, `light soy sauce`, `dark soy sauce`, `cooking wine`, `geranium leaves`, `star anise`, `salt`, `water`, `green onions` (remember to boil water)
Boiling water: enough to cover the ingredients, 600ml-900ml is required
Quail eggs (optional, if you don’t have quail eggs, you can use eggs of the same weight instead): 0-2 pieces
steps_zh: `猪五花肉`切大块（约 4.5cm ，冷冻半小时至一小时更好切）
`豆皮`切 2cm 的宽度
`生姜`切片（每片厚度约 3mm ）
`水`烧开
`鹌鹑蛋`煮熟并用`叉子`/`牙签`扎孔（尽量多些好入味）
`大葱`大葱白色的部分`葱白`
冷水锅中放入切好的`猪五花肉`，加入料酒与葱姜，煮 15 分钟去掉血腥
锅中放入两片`生姜`提味
开中小火后直接加入`五花肉`，不需要放入食用油，每块`五花肉`六个面都煎一下，煎至出油即可
将煎出的油倒出备用，并将`五花肉`推至一边，加入 15g `冰糖`，翻炒至`冰糖`融化；
融化后将五花肉与冰糖炒至融合上色，加入
加入`烧好的开水`炖煮 40 分钟（刀工差的同学切的过大请自觉延长炖煮时间），并放入
盖上锅盖煮至沸腾后，加入煮好扎好孔的`鹌鹑蛋`和`豆皮`，开中小火，等待 40 分钟。（中途可适当翻搅防止粘锅）；
打开锅盖，待汤汁快没有的时候开大火收汁（切记不可收干）；
加入 2-3g `盐`，翻炒一下，就可以出锅了。
steps_en: Cut the pork belly into large pieces (about 4.5cm, freeze for half an hour to an hour for better cutting)
Cut the `bean skin` into 2cm width
`Ginger` slices (each slice is about 3mm thick)
`Water` boils
Boil the `quail eggs` and prick them with a `fork`/`toothpick` (try to get as many as possible for better flavor)
`Green onions` The white part of green onions`White onions`
Put the cut pork belly into a pot of cold water, add cooking wine, green onion and ginger, and cook for 15 minutes to remove the blood.
Add two slices of ginger to the pot to enhance the flavor
Turn on medium-low heat and add pork belly directly. No need to add cooking oil. Fry all six sides of each piece of pork belly until oil is released.
Pour out the fried oil and set aside, push the pork belly to one side, add 15g of rock sugar, and stir-fry until the rock sugar melts;
After melting, stir-fry the pork belly and rock sugar until combined and colored, add
Add boiled water and simmer for 40 minutes (students with poor knife skills may cut too large, please extend the stewing time), and add
Cover the pot and bring to a boil, then add the cooked quail eggs and bean skins, turn on medium-low heat and wait for 40 minutes. (Stir properly to prevent sticking to the pan);
Open the lid of the pot and when the soup is almost gone, turn on high heat to drain the sauce (remember not to drain it dry);
Add 2-3g of `salt`, stir-fry and it's ready to serve.

intro_zh:
这道红烧肉成菜色泽红亮，肥肉入口即化、瘦肉酥烂不柴，咸中带甜，是典型的南方甜口风味。五花肉提供优质蛋白和丰富的胶原蛋白，香辛料还能去腥暖胃。制作虽需熬糖色与慢炖，但每一步都拆解得清晰易懂，新手跟着操作也能成功，全程约 1.5 小时即可端上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：3248 大卡
intro_en:
This braised pork dish is bright red in color, the fat meat melts in your mouth, the lean meat is crispy and not too chewy, and it is salty and sweet. It is a typical southern sweet flavor. Pork belly provides high-quality protein and rich collagen, and the spices can also remove fishy smell and warm the stomach. Although the preparation requires boiling the sugar and simmering, each step is clearly broken down and easy to understand, and even a novice can succeed by following the operation. The whole process can be served on the table in about 1.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 3248 kcal
ingredients_zh: 注：如果有可能，请尽量把刀磨的锋利一些。
工具：`锅`（砂锅为宜，铝锅其次，高压锅也可以，最好不要铁锅、铜锅）
猪五花肉：1000g（约 2 斤）。*注：生肉烹饪后缩水脱脂严重，此分量最终出肉量约满足 2-3 人正常饭量。如仅 1 人食用，建议所有食材剂量减半。*
油：100-150ml，色拉油、猪油、花生油都可以
小葱：约 30g（3-4 根），葱白切段备用
大蒜：约 25g（5-6 瓣），中间切开备用
冰糖：50g（约大拇指甲盖大小的碎单晶冰糖 15 块）。如果上一步炒糖色已经使用了 50g，此处的 50g 为炖煮时二次调味使用，可根据对"南派甜口"的接受度调整至 30g。
料酒：总量 30ml（其中 20ml 用于前期焯水去腥，10ml 用于后期炖煮提鲜）
凉水：没过食材的量即可，看锅大小准备
开水：没过食材的量即可，看锅大小准备
ingredients_en: Note: If possible, please try to sharpen the knife.
Tools: `Pot` (casserole is suitable, aluminum pot is second, pressure cooker is also acceptable, it is best not to use iron or copper pot)
Accessories: `oil`, `rock sugar`, `dark soy sauce`, `cooking wine`, `geranium leaves`, `star anise`, `ginger`, `salt`, `onion`, `boiled water`, `cold water`, `garlic`, `sprickly ash`

Pork belly: 1000g (about 2 pounds). *Note: Raw meat shrinks and defatts severely after cooking. The final amount of meat produced is approximately enough for 2-3 people to eat normally. If only 1 person is consuming it, it is recommended to halve the dosage of all ingredients. *
Oil: 100-150ml, salad oil, lard, peanut oil are all acceptable
Green onions: about 30g (3-4 stalks), cut into sections and set aside
Garlic: about 25g (5-6 cloves), cut in the middle and set aside

Rock sugar: 50g (15 pieces of broken single crystal rock sugar about the size of your thumbnail). If 50g has been used to stir-fry the sugar color in the previous step, the 50g here is used for secondary seasoning during stewing. It can be adjusted to 30g according to the acceptance of "Southern sweetness".
Cooking wine: 30ml in total (20ml is used for blanching in the early stage to remove the fishy smell, and 10ml is used for stewing in the later stage to enhance the freshness)
Cold water: Just enough to cover the ingredients. Prepare according to the size of the pot.
Boiling water: just enough to cover the ingredients. Prepare according to the size of the pot.
steps_zh: `猪五花肉`先不切小块，切成能放入锅中的大块（约 5–6cm 宽）即可
`生姜`切片（每片厚度约 3mm ）
`开水`烧开
`凉水`自来水即可
`小葱`小葱白色的部分`葱白`切成小段（小葱最佳，大葱也可以）
`蒜`中间切开，不要拍扁，否则难以捞出以至最后`收汁`时影响味道
请将辅料分为两个"预备包"：
凉水锅中放入五花肉大块，加入 **20ml 料酒** 与 **A包**（2 片姜、2 段葱段），煮 15 分钟去掉血腥，捞出来后洗干净；
将焯过水的五花肉捞出，稍微放凉（不烫手即可），切成边长约 **3cm × 3cm × 3cm** 的正方体块（焯水后肉质收紧，此时切块比生肉时更容易且成品大小更均匀。3cm 切块最终成品约为 2.5cm，是最适宜入口且容易烧透的尺寸）
另起锅炒[糖色](./../../condiment/简易版炒糖色.md)，注意：**在此菜谱中，请采用其中提到的"操作 2"来制作**，即在糖液起密集小泡时，迅速将 **B包**（生姜、葱白、蒜、花椒、八角、香叶）倒入锅中爆香。
爆出香味后（约 5-10 秒内），**先不要加开水**，而是立刻将焯过水的`五花肉`倒入锅中`大火`翻炒，让肉块均匀裹上糖色并煸炒出油脂。待闻到肉香后，再倒入开水至没过全部肉，盖上锅盖，转中小火炖煮 50 分钟-60 分钟（高压锅则为 40 分钟）；
加入 **10ml 料酒**；
盖上锅盖煮至沸腾后，每隔 25 分钟打开盖子将浮在表面的油和沫捞出；
当水的高度减至肉最高的高度与锅底高度的 3/5 时，转中火，并捞出除肉和水以外的所有辅料，开始收汁；
打开锅盖，待汤汁快没有的时粘稠状出锅（切记不可收干）；
steps_en: Don’t cut the pork belly into small pieces first, but cut it into large pieces (about 5–6cm wide) that can fit into the pot.
`Ginger` slices (each slice is about 3mm thick)
`Boiling water` Boil
`Cold water` tap water is enough
`Scallions` Cut the white part of `scallions` into small sections (scallions are best, green onions are also acceptable)
Cut the garlic in the middle and do not flatten it, otherwise it will be difficult to remove and the taste will be affected when the juice is collected.
Please divide the excipients into two "prep packages":

Put large pieces of pork belly into a pot of cold water, add **20ml cooking wine** and **A bag** (2 slices of ginger, 2 slices of green onion), cook for 15 minutes to remove the blood, take it out and wash it;

Take out the blanched pork belly, let it cool slightly (it doesn't need to be hot), and cut it into cubes with a side length of about **3cm × 3cm × 3cm** (the meat will tighten after blanching, making it easier to cut into pieces than raw meat and the size of the finished product will be more uniform. The final product will be about 2.5cm when cut into 3cm pieces, which is the most suitable size for eating and easy to burn through)

Stir-fry [sugar color](./../../condiment/simplified version of stir-fried sugar color.md) in another pot, note: **In this recipe, please use the "operation 2" mentioned in it to make**, that is, when the sugar liquid bubbles densely, quickly pour **Pack B** (ginger, scallions, garlic, pepper, star anise, bay leaves) into the pot and saute until fragrant.

After the aroma explodes (within about 5-10 seconds), **do not add boiling water** first, but immediately pour the blanched pork belly into the pot and stir-fry over high heat, so that the meat is evenly coated with sugar color and stir-fry to produce fat. After the meat smells fragrant, pour boiling water until all the meat is covered, cover the pot, turn to medium-low heat and simmer for 50-60 minutes (40 minutes for the pressure cooker);
Add **10ml cooking wine**;
Cover the pot and cook until it boils, then open the lid every 25 minutes to remove the oil and foam floating on the surface;

When the height of the water is reduced to 3/5 of the highest height of the meat and the height of the bottom of the pot, turn to medium heat, remove all the ingredients except the meat and water, and begin to collect the juice;
Open the lid of the pot, and when the soup is almost gone, take it out of the pot (remember not to let it dry out);

intro_zh:
这道菜鲜辣开胃，蛙肉滑嫩弹牙，是一道典型的川味家常菜。牛蛙本身高蛋白、低脂肪，搭配泡姜泡椒等发酵食材，有助于促进食欲。做法相对直接，但油温控制和调味比例需要稍加留意，一般初学者也能在 1 到 2 小时内完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1643 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is spicy and appetizing, and the frog meat is tender and chewy. It is a typical Sichuan home-cooked dish. Bullfrog itself is high in protein and low in fat, and paired with fermented ingredients such as pickled ginger and pickled peppers, it can help stimulate appetite. The method is relatively straightforward, but you need to pay a little attention to the oil temperature control and seasoning ratio. Generally, beginners can complete it within 1 to 2 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1643 kcal
ingredients_zh: 野山椒（也可以用干红辣椒替代）
牛蛙肉块 800g （买 3 斤活蛙，建议挑小个头的，肉质鲜嫩）
泡姜 20-30 克 （看个人口味，喜欢重口一点可以多放）
泡椒 5-10 克 （看个人吃辣的承受能力，不能吃辣的建议减半为 2.5 克，微微辣）
大蒜 30-50 克 （可以根据口味偏好调整，最好不低于 30 克）
豆瓣酱 20-30 克 （重口选 30，想吃清淡点 20 克。PS 这菜不可能太清淡，哈哈）
生粉 30 克 （干淀粉可以平替）
猪油 20ml（没有猪油也可，用食用油替代）
ingredients_en: Wild sansho pepper (dried red chili pepper can also be used instead)
Bullfrog meat cubes 800g (if you buy 3 pounds of live frogs, it is recommended to choose small ones, as the meat is fresh and tender)
20-30 grams of pickled ginger (depending on your personal taste, you can add more if you like it stronger)
Pickled pepper 5-10 grams (depending on the individual's tolerance for spicy food, if you can't tolerate spicy food, it is recommended to halve it to 2.5 grams, which is slightly spicy)
Green and red chili pepper 20 g
30-50 grams of garlic (can be adjusted according to taste preference, preferably no less than 30 grams)
20-30 grams of bean paste (choose 30 if you want something lighter, 20 grams if you want something lighter. PS This dish can’t be too light, haha)
30 grams cornstarch (dry starch can be substituted)
20ml lard (you can also use cooking oil instead)
steps_zh: 牛蛙肉洗净后控干水分，加入 10 克以上的盐巴和 50ml 以上的啤酒，用手抓 5 分钟，去除牛蛙肉的腥味
然后对着清水冲洗，直至不再流出血水和杂质，控干水分，放到合适的器皿中，准备腌制
加入 5 克盐，30 克生粉，10ml 料酒，5 克胡椒粉，用手抓均匀，腌制 5-10 分钟
将泡姜 泡椒 野山椒 切丝或者片（根据自己刀工选择），青红辣椒切成圈圈 大蒜拨开即可
起锅烧热，加入 200ml 食用油（锅底比较平的可以再加 100ml）,烧至 6 成油温（有小气泡出现），将腌制好的牛蛙倒入，快速过油炸制，10 秒钟后捞出（不能超时太多，否则会导致蛙肉老柴）
捞出蛙肉后，控油，并将锅中的热油倒出到碗中，保留 30ml,加入 20ml 猪油（如果没有，则在锅中保留总共 50ml 食用油）
待油温 6 成热，加入泡姜、泡椒、野山椒、大蒜，超出香味，加入豆瓣酱 20 克，中火翻炒至出红油（时间控制在 30 秒），倒入 400ml 啤酒，
然后倒入炸过的牛蛙肉，用勺子推着翻，不要用力搅拌，加入 5 克胡椒粉，加入 5ml 藤椒油，中火慢焖 3 分钟
加大火力，大火收汁半分钟，加入青红辣椒圈，再煮 10 秒准备起锅
盛到盆里，撒上葱花，可以开动了！
steps_en: Wash the bullfrog meat, drain it, add more than 10 grams of salt and more than 50ml of beer, and scratch it with your hands for 5 minutes to remove the fishy smell of the bullfrog meat.
Then rinse with clean water until blood and impurities no longer flow out, drain the water, and place it in a suitable vessel to prepare for pickling.
Add 5 grams of salt, 30 grams of cornstarch, 10 ml of cooking wine, and 5 grams of pepper, mix evenly with your hands, and marinate for 5-10 minutes
Cut the pickled ginger, pickled peppers, and wild mountain peppers into shreds or slices (choose according to your knife skills), cut the green and red peppers into circles, and spread the garlic.

Heat up the pot, add 200ml cooking oil (you can add 100ml if the bottom of the pot is relatively flat), heat to 60% oil temperature (small bubbles will appear), pour in the marinated bullfrog, fry it quickly, and take it out after 10 seconds (do not overtime too much, otherwise the frog meat will become old)
After removing the frog meat, control the oil, pour the hot oil in the pot into a bowl, reserve 30ml, and add 20ml of lard (if not, reserve a total of 50ml of cooking oil in the pot)

When the oil temperature reaches 60%, add pickled ginger, pickled pepper, wild pepper, and garlic until fragrant. Add 20 grams of bean paste, stir-fry over medium heat until red oil emerges (time should be controlled at 30 seconds), pour in 400ml beer,
Then pour in the fried bullfrog meat, push it over with a spoon, do not stir hard, add 5 grams of pepper, add 5ml of rattan pepper oil, and simmer slowly for 3 minutes on medium heat.
Increase the fire power, reduce the juice for half a minute, add green and red pepper rings, and cook for another 10 seconds to prepare the pot.
Pour it into a basin, sprinkle with chopped green onions, and it’s ready to go!

intro_zh:
一道少油低卡的家常凉菜，鸡丝嫩滑入味，麻油与香醋调和出微麻微酸的清爽口感，适合夏日解腻。鸡胸肉富含优质蛋白且脂肪含量低。做法简单，新手也能轻松上手，从备料到完成大约只需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：293 大卡
intro_en:
A home-cooked cold dish with less oil and calories. The shredded chicken is tender and flavourful. Sesame oil and balsamic vinegar are blended to create a slightly numb and slightly sour refreshing taste. It is suitable for relieving greasiness in summer. Chicken breast is rich in high-quality protein and low in fat. The recipe is simple and can be easily picked up by novices, and it only takes about 30 minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 293 kcal
ingredients_en: Chicken breast (can be frozen at room temperature)
steps_zh: 姜切片，备用
锅中倒入 4 升水
加入鸡胸肉、姜片
倒入 20 毫升料酒
开大火不盖盖将水烧开
水开后转中火，用勺子将浮沫捞出
继续煮 **5-7** 分钟，如果是非冷冻肉煮 5 分钟，冷冻肉煮 7 分钟
鸡胸肉大小会影响成熟时间，用筷子插入鸡胸肉，如果能轻松插入，代表鸡肉熟了。如果不熟需延长煮制时间
用凉白开水冲泡鸡胸肉，使鸡胸肉降至室温
顺着鸡胸肉纹理将鸡胸肉撕成细丝
准备一个碗
碗中加入准备好的麻油、生抽、香醋、白糖、盐
搅拌料汁，使糖和盐尽量溶化
将料汁倒入鸡丝中，搅拌均匀
steps_en: Ginger slices, set aside
Pour 4 liters of water into the pot
Add chicken breast and ginger slices
Pour 20 ml cooking wine
Turn on high heat and bring the water to a boil without covering it
After the water boils, turn to medium heat and use a spoon to scoop out the floating foam.
Continue cooking for **5-7** minutes, 5 minutes for non-frozen meat or 7 minutes for frozen meat

The size of the chicken breast will affect the ripening time. Use chopsticks to insert the chicken breast. If it can be inserted easily, it means the chicken is cooked. If it is not cooked yet, extend the cooking time.
Soak the chicken breasts in cool boiled water until the chicken breasts come to room temperature
Tear the chicken breast into thin strips along the texture of the chicken breast
prepare a bowl
Add the prepared sesame oil, light soy sauce, balsamic vinegar, sugar and salt to the bowl
Stir the sauce to dissolve the sugar and salt as much as possible
Pour the sauce into the shredded chicken and stir evenly
images: dishes/meat_dish/凉拌鸡丝/凉拌鸡丝_焯水.jpg

intro_zh:
荷兰豆炒腊肠是一道清爽咸香的家常小炒，腊肠的油脂润着翠绿的荷兰豆，口感脆嫩不腻。荷兰豆富含优质蛋白质和多种维生素，有助于增强机体抗病能力。做法简单，几乎不需要刀工，初学者也能快速上手，从备料到出锅大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：606 大卡
intro_en:
Stir-fried sausage with snow peas is a refreshing and savory home-style stir-fry. The fat of the sausage moistens the green snow peas, giving it a crisp, tender and not greasy texture. Snow peas are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins, which help enhance the body's disease resistance. The method is simple and requires almost no knife skills, and even beginners can get started quickly. It only takes about 15 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 606 kcal
steps_zh: 把荷兰豆去掉蒂，有时间的也可以同时把尾部去掉
买腊肠之前可以问老板是生的还是熟的，如果是生的，需要提前蒸一下，如果是熟的可以直接使用
把荷兰豆清洗一下，然后焯一下水，大概 45s，荷兰豆焯至变色即可，捞出过凉水备用
热锅，锅内放入大约 10ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高
放入腊肠，保持翻炒至腊肠*微微卷边*，注意这里一定要**保持小火**，小到不能小的那种，不然容易糊
放入荷兰豆，转为中大火，翻炒 30s 放入生抽，接着再翻炒 20-30s 即可
steps_en: Remove the stems of the snow peas. If you have time, you can also remove the tails at the same time.
Before buying sausage, you can ask the boss whether it is raw or cooked. If it is raw, it needs to be steamed in advance. If it is cooked, you can use it directly.
Wash the snow peas and blanch them in water for about 45 seconds. Blanch the snow peas until they change color. Remove them and drain them in cold water. Set aside.
Heat a pan and put about 10ml cooking oil in the pan. Wait 10 seconds for oil temperature to rise
Add the sausage and stir-fry until the sausage is *slightly curled*. Note that it must be kept over low heat, not too small, otherwise it will burn easily.
Add snow peas, turn to medium-high heat, stir-fry for 30 seconds, add light soy sauce, and stir-fry for another 20-30 seconds.
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/荷兰豆炒腊肠/荷兰豆炒腊肠.md

intro_zh:
这是一道广式家常炖菜，牛腩软烂入味，萝卜吸饱汤汁后清甜浓郁，整体酱香回甘。富含优质蛋白和膳食纤维，开胃助消化。制作步骤稍多但难度适中，新手按部就班也能成功。预计从头到尾大约需要 2.5 小时完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：483 大卡
intro_en:
This is a Cantonese-style home-style stew. The beef brisket is soft and delicious. The radish is sweet and rich after absorbing the soup. The overall sauce has a sweet aftertaste. Rich in high-quality protein and dietary fiber, it is appetizing and aids digestion. There are a few steps to make, but the difficulty is moderate. Novices can also succeed if they follow the steps step by step. Expect it to take approximately 2.5 hours to complete from start to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 483 kcal
steps_zh: 萝卜滚到切块备用
牛腩整块焯水，加入 2 片姜和一把葱结，等水开之后煮 5-10 分钟，然后捞出切件
将牛腩切块，切成自己喜欢的大小（牛腩焯过水，待会儿焖的时候基本不会缩水了，大块的会焖相对就一点的时间）
准备焖牛腩的酱料，将南乳、柱侯酱、酱油、蚝油、糖、盐按上面的量调和（冰糖刚刚没了换成了白糖）
热锅下油，将姜蒜爆香,放入牛腩，炒至干身,加入调好的酱料，炒香,如果喜欢色泽浓一点的可以加一点老抽润色一下
调料充分混合之后倒入热水
将牛腩换到汤锅中，放入桂皮、八角、香叶和干辣椒，焖大概 2 个小时
牛腩焖到半软之后加入白萝卜继续焖 30 分钟
等到萝卜焖软之后就完成,一锅浓香的萝卜牛腩就完成了
steps_en: Roll the radish until cut into cubes and set aside
Blanch the whole beef brisket, add 2 slices of ginger and a handful of green onions, wait for the water to boil and cook for 5-10 minutes, then remove and cut into pieces.
Cut the beef brisket into pieces and cut it into the size you like (the brisket will be blanched and will not shrink when you braise it later. Larger ones will braise for a shorter time)

Prepare the sauce for braised beef brisket. Mix the southern milk, Zhuhou sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar and salt according to the above amount (the rock sugar has just been replaced with white sugar)

Heat oil in a pan, sauté ginger and garlic until fragrant, add beef brisket, stir-fry until dry, add the prepared sauce and stir-fry until fragrant. If you like a darker color, you can add a little dark soy sauce to taste.
Mix the ingredients thoroughly and then add hot water
Transfer the beef brisket to the soup pot, add cinnamon bark, star anise, bay leaves and dried chili peppers, and simmer for about 2 hours
Simmer the beef brisket until semi-soft, then add the white radish and continue to simmer for 30 minutes.
Wait until the radish is simmered until soft, and a pot of fragrant radish beef brisket is completed.
images: dishes/meat_dish/广式萝卜牛腩/广式萝卜牛腩.webp
file_path: dishes/meat_dish/广式萝卜牛腩/广式萝卜牛腩.md

intro_zh:
血浆鸭是一道湖南武冈传统名菜，鸭肉香酥脆嫩，浸透醋血后连姜和辣椒都变得甜净不辣。鸭肉与鸭血提供优质蛋白和铁质，适合补血养身。制作步骤较多，需要留意火候和翻炒，但跟着步骤操作，初学者也能在 大约 2 小时完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★★
预估卡路里：2482 大卡
intro_en:
Plasma duck is a famous traditional dish in Wugang, Hunan. The duck meat is crispy and tender. After being soaked in vinegar and blood, even the ginger and chili become sweet and not spicy. Duck meat and duck blood provide high-quality protein and iron, which are suitable for nourishing blood and maintaining health. There are many steps to make, and you need to pay attention to the heat and stir-frying, but by following the steps, beginners can complete it in about 2 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★★
Estimated calories: 2482 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鲜鸭血（宰杀鸭子时加醋接鸭血，用筷子顺时针搅拌防凝固）
酒（或者白酒、啤酒、米酒皆可）
姜 6 片 （根据个人吃辣喜好程度可多放 1-3 片姜）
辣椒 1000g（根据个人吃辣喜好程度可选青椒，线椒，美人椒等，喜欢吃辣可增加 5-8 个小米辣或朝天椒，切好备用）
ingredients_en: Fresh duck blood (add vinegar to catch the duck blood when slaughtering the duck, stir clockwise with chopsticks to prevent coagulation)
6 slices of ginger (you can add 1-3 more slices of ginger according to your personal preference for spicy food)

1000g peppers (you can choose green peppers, line peppers, beauty peppers, etc. according to your personal preference for spicy food. If you like spicy food, you can add 5-8 millet peppers or Chaotian peppers, cut them and set aside)
steps_zh: 鲜仔鸭肉切成约 3cm 小块，加料酒、姜片，去除血水。
炒锅烧热，放入约 100ml 食用油，大火待油烧开，放入腌制好的鲜鸭肉，不断翻炒。
待鸭肉完全变色（肉眼可见泛白），放入酒，再加入 200ml 开水，刚好淹没鸭肉即可，盖上锅盖中火煮 15 分钟。
水开之后，打开锅盖放入姜蒜，翻炒一遍，盖上锅盖持续加热 10 分钟。
打开锅盖放入辣椒，不断翻炒，待至肉眼可见辣椒炒软，放入鲜鸭血，此时需要不断翻炒，确保每块鸭肉和每片辣椒都有鸭血的浸润（此乃血浆鸭的精髓）。
翻炒至肉眼可见鸭血均为黑色，加入盐，鸡精，香葱，（喜欢食用山胡椒油的朋友也可以在此时放入 3-6 滴山胡椒油）再次翻炒一到二次即可。
出锅盛盘，上桌食用。
steps_en: Cut the fresh duck meat into about 3cm pieces, add cooking wine and ginger slices, and remove the blood.
Heat the wok, add about 100ml of cooking oil, wait until the oil boils over high heat, add the marinated fresh duck meat, and stir-fry continuously.

When the duck meat changes color completely (visible to the naked eye and turns white), add wine, then add 200ml boiling water to just cover the duck meat, cover the pot and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
After the water boils, open the lid of the pot, add ginger and garlic, stir-fry once, cover the pot and continue heating for 10 minutes.

Open the lid of the pot, add the chili peppers, and stir-fry until the chili peppers are visibly soft. Add the fresh duck blood. Stir-fry constantly to ensure that each piece of duck meat and each piece of chili pepper is soaked with duck blood (this is the essence of plasma duck).

Stir-fry until the duck blood is black visible to the naked eye. Add salt, chicken essence, and chives (if you like mountain pepper oil, you can also add 3-6 drops of mountain pepper oil at this time) and stir-fry once or twice.
Remove from the pan, serve on a plate and serve.

name_en: Simple version of fried sugar color
intro_zh:
糖色是中餐红烧类菜肴上色的关键技法，火候到位时能带来红亮光泽与独特的焦香风味。主要成分为糖，提供能量，但更多是调和菜肴色泽与口味。这道简易版炒糖色对火候控制有一定要求，新手需多加练习才能避免发苦或发甜，整体制作约需十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1028 大卡
intro_en:
Sugar coloring is a key technique for coloring Chinese braised dishes. When the heat is right, it can bring out a bright red luster and a unique burnt flavor. The main ingredient is sugar, which provides energy, but more importantly, it harmonizes the color and taste of dishes. This simple version of fried sugar has certain requirements on heat control. Newbies need more practice to avoid it becoming bitter or sweet. The overall preparation takes about ten minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1028 kcal
ingredients_zh: 炒糖色过程火不要太大！！！电磁炉温度不够，火候过了发苦，不够发甜
糖：50g（单晶冰糖约 15 块，或等重白砂糖。**基准比例**：每 1000g 肉对应 50g 糖，可根据个人口味增减 10g）
ingredients_en: Don’t use too much heat when frying the sugar! ! ! The temperature of the induction cooker is not high enough. It will taste bitter if it is overheated, but not sweet enough.

Sugar: 50g (about 15 pieces of single crystal rock sugar, or equal weight of white sugar. **Basic ratio**: 50g of sugar for every 1000g of meat, 10g can be increased or decreased according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 开火，并向锅中倒入 100ml 开水
再向锅中倒入 100ml 油，与第一步间隔越短越好，此时锅为大火中火都可以，着急的话可以大火
放入冰糖（如果冰糖过于耦合，可以提前敲碎，做到耦合度越低越好）
调整火力为中火
开始搅拌
steps_en: Turn on the heat and pour 100ml boiling water into the pot
Pour 100ml of oil into the pot again. The shorter the interval from the first step, the better. At this time, the pot can be set to high or medium heat. If you are in a hurry, you can use high heat.
Add rock sugar (if the rock sugar is too coupled, you can break it in advance to make the coupling as low as possible)
Adjust the firepower to medium heat
Start stirring

intro_zh:
这是一道中式面点配料，常用于烙饼，能让成品层次分明、外酥里软。主要提供碳水化合物和脂肪，为身体补充能量。做法十分简单，新手友好，预计只需 3 分钟就能调好。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：111 大卡
intro_en:
This is a Chinese pastry ingredient that is often used in pancakes to make the finished product layered, crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. Mainly provide carbohydrates and fats to replenish energy for the body. It’s simple, beginner-friendly and should only take 3 minutes to whip up.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 111 kcal
ingredients_en: Oil = (number of pancakes to be made * 10ml)
Salt = (number of pancakes to be made / 2) g
Flour = (number of pancakes to be made / 0.13) g
steps_zh: 面粉盛小碗里，加入盐
加入 200 度的热油
用筷子将其搅拌成无固状物体的糊状。
steps_en: Put flour in a small bowl and add salt
Add 200 degree hot oil
Use chopsticks to stir it into a smooth paste.

intro_zh:
蒜香酱油是一道蒜香浓郁、咸鲜油润的家常蘸料，常用于白切鸡、饺子等菜肴的提味。大蒜和芝麻分别具有抗菌和补充不饱和脂肪酸的作用。做法极其简单，对新手非常友好，全程只需大约 5 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：177 大卡
intro_en:
Garlic soy sauce is a home-made dipping sauce that is rich in garlic aroma, salty and oily. It is often used to enhance the flavor of boiled chicken, dumplings and other dishes. Garlic and sesame seeds have antibacterial and unsaturated fatty acid supplement effects respectively. It’s extremely simple and beginner-friendly, and only takes about 5 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 177 kcal
steps_zh: 拍碎蒜头
往蘸料碟中加入酱油
起锅，加入花生油，等到油温滚烫后加入拍好的蒜头，炸半分钟
半分钟后，关火，把热油倒入蘸料碟，用筷子搅拌即可
steps_en: Crush garlic
Add soy sauce to the dipping dish
Heat the pot, add peanut oil, wait until the oil is hot, add the chopped garlic, and fry for half a minute
After half a minute, turn off the heat, pour the hot oil into the dipping saucer, and stir with chopsticks.

intro_zh:
这款万能炸串酱料香辣浓郁、鲜咸适口，属于街头风味风格。主要提供脂肪和香辛料带来的芳香物质，能增进食欲。制作非常简单，对新手毫无压力，全程只需大约 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1826 大卡
intro_en:
This all-purpose fried skewers sauce is spicy, rich, salty and delicious, and is a street-style dish. It mainly provides aromatic substances brought by fats and spices, which can increase appetite. It's easy to make, stress-free for beginners, and only takes about 10 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1826 kcal
steps_zh: 所有原料在容器内混合，搅拌均匀。
锅里烧热油，油的用量以在容器内没过所有原材料为佳。
分三次淋入热油，每次 1/3，同时搅拌。
最后放入香油 10ml，生抽 10ml，花椒油 10ml，蚝油 10ml。
steps_en: Combine all ingredients in a container and stir evenly.
Heat oil in a pot. Use enough oil to cover all the ingredients in the container.
Drizzle in hot oil 1/3 in three batches, stirring at the same time.
Finally add 10ml of sesame oil, 10ml of light soy sauce, 10ml of peppercorn oil and 10ml of oyster sauce.

intro_zh:
葱油是一道提香增鲜的家常调味油，带着浓郁的葱香和开洋的复合鲜味，用来拌馅、凉拌或热菜明油都很适合。主要提供油脂能量，葱姜等辛香料还含有植物活性成分，可辅助去腥开胃。做法简单，对新手友好，一般准备加熬制大约 30 分钟就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：2069 大卡
intro_en:
Scallion oil is a home-made seasoning oil that enhances flavor and freshness. It has a strong aroma of scallions and a complex umami flavor. It is very suitable for stuffing, cold salad or hot dishes. It mainly provides oil energy. Spices such as onion and ginger also contain plant active ingredients, which can help remove fishy smell and stimulate appetite. The method is simple and friendly to novices. It usually takes about 30 minutes to prepare and simmer.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 2069 kcal
ingredients_en: Onions (green onions and small onions are acceptable)
steps_zh: 开洋泡入 50 度温水中，加入 10ml 料酒去腥，泡 10 分钟后取出沥干水分
葱，香菜洗净，切成 5cm 长的段，擦干表面水份
洋葱切成丝，在锅里用热水煮 5 分钟，取出沥干水份
姜去皮，切成片
锅里倒入全部油，放入上述预处理好的材料，开中小火炸 20 分钟
steps_en: Soak in 50 degree warm water, add 10ml cooking wine to remove the fishy smell, soak for 10 minutes, take out and drain
Wash green onions and coriander, cut into 5cm long sections, and wipe dry the surface water.
Cut onions into shreds, boil in hot water for 5 minutes, remove and drain
Peel the ginger and cut into slices
Pour all the oil into the pot, add the above pre-processed ingredients, and fry on medium-low heat for 20 minutes

intro_zh:
这款调味汁酸甜可口，是中餐里糖醋菜肴的经典风味来源。调制简单、比例易记，新手也能轻松上手，从备料到完成约需 10 分钟。糖分能提供能量，醋香有助于开胃解腻，让家常菜瞬间变得有滋有味。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：146 大卡
intro_en:
This sauce is sweet and sour and is a classic flavor source for sweet and sour dishes in Chinese cuisine. The preparation is simple, the proportions are easy to remember, and novices can easily get started. It takes about 10 minutes from preparation to completion. The sugar can provide energy, and the aroma of vinegar helps to appetize and relieve greasiness, making home-cooked dishes instantly delicious.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 146 kcal
steps_zh: 按照比例将各调料在小碗中搅拌均匀
按不同菜肴的方式处理完毕后，将配制好的糖醋汁倒入锅中
根据各菜肴的不同，烹制 5-10 分钟
大火收汁，可增加菜的浓度、香味和光泽
steps_en: Mix all ingredients in a small bowl according to proportion.
After processing the different dishes, pour the prepared sweet and sour sauce into the pot
Cook for 5-10 minutes depending on the dish
The juice is reduced over high heat, which can increase the concentration, aroma and luster of the dish.

intro_zh:
一道香辣扑鼻的陕西风味调味料，红油润泽，芝麻蒜香交织，入口辣而不燥、回味绵长。辣椒富含维生素 C 与辣椒素，能增进食欲、暖身驱寒。制作过程需掌握油温，对新手稍有挑战，但按部就班即可成功。全程约 10 分钟完成，是家常拌菜拌面的点睛之笔。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1854 大卡
intro_en:
A spicy and tangy Shaanxi-style seasoning, moist with red oil, intertwined with sesame and garlic, spicy but not dry in the mouth, with a long aftertaste. Chili peppers are rich in vitamin C and capsaicin, which can increase appetite, warm the body and ward off cold. The production process requires controlling the oil temperature, which is a bit challenging for novices, but you can succeed if you follow the steps. The whole process takes about 10 minutes to complete and is the finishing touch to home-style mixed vegetables and noodles.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1854 kcal
ingredients_zh: 花生油（可用菜籽油替换）
花生油 150 毫升 （可用菜籽油替换）
其他配料：八角(1)、花椒（20-50 粒都可，看个人口味）、香叶（2-3 片）、白芷（2-3 片）、姜片（大拇指粗细的姜切片）（可选）
白醋 5 ml（大概就是小铁勺子的量）
ingredients_en: Peanut oil (canola oil can be substituted)
150 ml peanut oil (can be replaced with rapeseed oil)

Other ingredients: star anise (1), Sichuan pepper (20-50 pieces, depending on personal taste), bay leaves (2-3 pieces), Angelica dahurica (2-3 pieces), ginger slices (thumb-thick ginger slices) (optional)
5 ml white vinegar (about the amount of a small iron spoon)
steps_zh: 拿出蒜头掰 2 个`小蒜头`去皮
拿出砧板剁碎`小蒜头`、`小米椒`
拿出碗倒入`花生油`
油热放入`其他配料`和`小葱`,等到香料变焦，捞出扔掉
拿出铁锅将碗内的油放入加热 2 分钟（菜籽油烧至冒烟）
此时是空碗
往空碗加入`干辣椒面`、`白芝麻`、`蒜末`、`小米椒`、`盐`、`五香粉`、`草寇`作为"调料"
关火将油温冷却至 `210` 摄氏度
将锅内热油倒入碗内并用勺子搅拌即可（可以在 `165` 摄氏度时加入同样"调料"的碗最后进行混合进行增辣）
倒入热油稍微搅拌后放入白醋，此时会重新沸腾。继续进行搅拌，白醋增香。
油泼辣子冷却到温热放白糖和味精，白糖可以是辣味柔和，不会那么的呛口
steps_en: Take out the garlic, break it into 2 small garlic heads and peel them.
Take out the chopping board and chop the `small garlic` and `millet pepper`
Take out the bowl and pour in peanut oil
Heat the oil and add other ingredients and green onions. Wait until the spices are browned, take them out and throw them away.
Take out the iron pot and put the oil in the bowl and heat it for 2 minutes (burn the rapeseed oil until it smokes)
It’s an empty bowl now
Add `dried chili noodles`, `white sesame`, `minced garlic`, `millet pepper`, `salt`, `five spice powder` and `grassroots` to the empty bowl as "seasonings"
Turn off the heat and cool the oil temperature to `210` degrees Celsius
Pour the hot oil in the pot into a bowl and stir with a spoon (you can add the same "seasoning" to the bowl at `165` degrees Celsius and mix at the end to increase the spiciness)
Pour in the hot oil, stir briefly and then add the white vinegar, which will boil again. Continue to stir and add aroma to the white vinegar.
Cool the oily spicy seeds until they are warm and add sugar and MSG. The sugar can make the spiciness soft and not so choking.
images: dishes/condiment/油泼辣子/口水鸡+油泼辣子.jpg

intro_zh:
自制饮料糖浆，按 1：1 比例将白砂糖与水混合溶解，方便控制冷饮甜度，是调饮的基础配方。富含碳水化合物，能快速补充能量。做法极其简单，对新手非常友好，仅需几分钟即可完成，冷藏可保存一周。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：400 大卡
intro_en:
Homemade beverage syrup is made by mixing and dissolving white sugar and water in a ratio of 1:1, making it easy to control the sweetness of cold drinks. It is the basic formula for making drinks. Rich in carbohydrates, it can quickly replenish energy. It's super simple and beginner-friendly, takes just a few minutes to make and can be refrigerated for up to a week.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 400 kcal
ingredients_zh: 可密封容器（建议使用高硼硅试剂瓶，便宜）
ingredients_en: Sealable container (recommended to use high borosilicate reagent bottle, cheap)
steps_zh: 将称好的白砂糖的饮用水于容器混匀
容器封盖放冰箱冷藏
steps_en: Mix the weighed sugar and drinking water in the container.
Cover the container and place it in the refrigerator

intro_zh:
这是一道酸甜可口、果香浓郁的家常果酱，非常适合涂抹面包。草莓富含维生素 C，不过熬煮时糖分较高，可依口味调整。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松搞定，从准备到熬好大约需要两个小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1940 大卡
intro_en:
This is a sweet, sour and fruity homemade jam, perfect for spreading on bread. Strawberries are rich in vitamin C, but the sugar content is higher when boiled, so you can adjust it according to taste. The recipe is very simple and can be easily done by novices. It takes about two hours from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1940 kcal
ingredients_zh: 白糖 400 克 （如需要低糖饮食，可以考虑降低到 200g）
ingredients_en: 400g of white sugar (if you need a low-sugar diet, you can consider reducing it to 200g)
steps_zh: 草莓洗净去叶
将草莓切碎放入合适的碗中
将白糖倒入碗中与草莓搅拌均匀
碗用保鲜膜覆盖静置 1 小时
将静置的草莓和糖的混合物倒入不粘锅中开大火烧开
烧开后转小火不断搅拌直至果酱呈粘稠状关火
待草莓酱冷却后装入准备好的密封罐中
steps_en: Wash strawberries and remove leaves
Chop the strawberries into a suitable bowl
Pour the sugar into a bowl and mix with the strawberries evenly
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let stand for 1 hour
Pour the rested strawberry and sugar mixture into a non-stick pan and bring to a boil over high heat
After it boils, turn down the heat and stir continuously until the jam becomes thick and thick. Turn off the heat.
After the strawberry jam has cooled, put it into the prepared sealed jar.

intro_zh:
一道清润滋补的广式炖汤，汤色清亮，入口甘醇，带有陈皮的独特清香。排骨提供优质蛋白，搭配西洋参、石斛等食材，能润肺健脾、生津止渴，适合经常熬夜的人群。制作难度中等，只需要将材料处理好放进炖盅，慢炖约两小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：357 大卡
intro_en:
A refreshing and nourishing Cantonese-style stew, the soup is clear in color and mellow in the mouth, with the unique fragrance of tangerine peel. Pork ribs provide high-quality protein, and when paired with American ginseng, dendrobium and other ingredients, it can moisten the lungs, strengthen the spleen, produce body fluids and quench thirst, and is suitable for people who often stay up late. The difficulty of making is medium. You only need to process the ingredients, put them into the stew pot, and simmer for about two hours to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 357 kcal
ingredients_zh: 排骨，用猪骨也替代也可，4-5 块
陈皮（一般选用 8-20 年制），一般 1 块陈皮是 3 瓣，取 1 瓣即可
西洋参（又名花旗参），9 片
ingredients_en: Pork ribs, you can also use pork bones instead, 4-5 pieces
Tangerine peel (usually 8-20 years old), usually 1 piece of tangerine peel has 3 segments, just take 1 segment
American ginseng (also known as American ginseng), 9 slices
steps_zh: 排骨用热水过一边，去血水
陈皮、麦冬、玉竹、石斛和西洋参，冲洗干净即可
煲汤盅洗干净
打开煲汤盅，先放入排骨在底部，然后依次放入陈皮、麦冬、玉竹、石斛和西洋参
加入热水进煲汤盅，水不宜太满
煲汤容器加入水，炖煮 1.5 小时即可
加入食盐，趁热饮用
steps_en: Rinse the ribs with hot water to remove the blood.
Rinse tangerine peel, Ophiopogon japonicus, Polygonatum odoratum, Dendrobium and American ginseng.
Clean the soup pot
Open the soup pot, first put the ribs at the bottom, then add tangerine peel, Ophiopogon japonicus, Polygonatum odorifera, Dendrobium and American ginseng in sequence.
Add hot water into the soup pot, the water should not be too full
Add water to the soup container and simmer for 1.5 hours
Add salt and drink while hot

intro_zh:
小米粥是一道北方常见的家常粥品，口感绵滑，米香浓郁，熬出的米油尤其养胃。它富含蛋白质、脂肪、碳水化合物和胡萝卜素，维生素 B1 含量在粮食中名列前茅，容易消化吸收。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松掌握，从烧水到出锅大约需要 30-35 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：362 大卡
intro_en:
Millet porridge is a common home-cooked porridge in the north. It has a smooth texture and rich rice aroma, and the rice oil is particularly nourishing to the stomach. It is rich in protein, fat, carbohydrates and carotene. Its vitamin B1 content ranks among the best among grains and is easy to digest and absorb. The method is very simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about 30-35 minutes from boiling water to taking it out of the pot.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 362 kcal
ingredients_en: Water (mountain spring water is best) 2000 grams
steps_zh: 小米 100 克，放入碗中，用水轻淘一遍（用手搅拌一下，将水倒掉，只是去掉外面的浮灰，不可搓洗！！！）
水烧开，务必烧开！！！
水烧开沸腾时，将小米倒入锅内。（很容易被忽视的一个很重要的环节）
搅拌使得小米不会粘连锅底，继续用大火熬 6-10 分钟，注意用中间穿插搅拌几次。
改中火、文火熬 15-20 分钟，锅盖要错开一条缝，千万不能让小米油溜掉哟，中间继续搅拌几次，不要糊锅底
steps_en: 100 grams of millet, put it into a bowl, wash it with water (stir it with your hands, pour out the water, just remove the floating dust on the outside, do not scrub!!!)
Boil the water, be sure to boil it! ! !
When the water comes to a boil, pour the millet into the pot. (A very important link that is easily overlooked)
Stir so that the millet does not stick to the bottom of the pot. Continue to simmer over high heat for 6-10 minutes, stirring several times in between.

Change the heat to medium and simmer for 15-20 minutes. The lid of the pot should be staggered by a gap to prevent the millet oil from slipping away. Continue stirring a few times in the middle to avoid burning the bottom of the pot.

intro_zh:
西红柿鸡蛋汤是一道酸甜开胃、口感滑嫩的家常汤品，做法极简，属于老少皆宜的大众菜肴。富含番茄红素、维生素 C 和优质蛋白质，营养均衡易吸收。对新手非常友好，快手省时，预计制作时长 大约 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：258 大卡
intro_en:
Tomato and egg soup is a home-cooked soup that is sour, sweet, appetizing, and has a smooth texture. It is a simple recipe and is a popular dish suitable for all ages. Rich in lycopene, vitamin C and high-quality protein, the nutrition is balanced and easy to absorb. It is very friendly to novices and saves time. The estimated production time is about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 258 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡蛋 1-2 个（依照自己的口味而定，喜欢吃鸡蛋就放 2 个，一般就放 1 个）
ingredients_en: 1-2 eggs (depending on your taste, if you like eggs, put 2, usually just 1)
15 grams of green onion, ginger and garlic
steps_zh: 将西红柿洗净，切块。
葱姜蒜切碎。
鸡蛋打到碗中，用筷子（或打蛋器）搅拌均匀。
热锅，并放入 15 毫升的油，待能从油中看到冒出一丝烟时，放入葱姜蒜翻炒 30 秒。
放入西红柿翻炒 1 分钟。
倒入水，水的高度大约为锅内菜品高度的 1.2 倍，并放入盐。
待开锅后，将鸡蛋液放入，并用筷子将鸡蛋打散，放入味素和香油。
等待 30 秒，关火出锅。
steps_en: Wash the tomatoes and cut into pieces.
Chop onion, ginger and garlic.
Crack the eggs into a bowl and stir evenly with chopsticks (or a whisk).
Heat the pan and add 15 ml of oil. When you can see a hint of smoke coming out of the oil, add the onion, ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add tomatoes and sauté for 1 minute.
Pour in water to a height approximately 1.2 times the height of the dish in the pot, and add salt.
After the pot is boiled, add the egg liquid, break the eggs with chopsticks, and add the seasoning and sesame oil.
Wait 30 seconds, turn off the heat and remove from the pan.

name_en: Tomato, Beef and Egg Drop Soup
intro_zh:
番茄牛肉蛋花汤是一道酸甜开胃的家常汤品，口感鲜嫩顺滑。牛肉富含优质蛋白和铁，番茄提供番茄红素和维生素 C，鸡蛋则补充卵磷脂。做法简单，新手也能轻松掌握，通常大约半 小时就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：262 大卡
intro_en:
Tomato, Beef and Egg Drop Soup is a sweet and sour home-cooked soup with a fresh and smooth taste. Beef is rich in high-quality protein and iron, tomatoes provide lycopene and vitamin C, and eggs provide lecithin. The recipe is simple and can be easily mastered by novices, and it can usually be served on the table in about half an hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 262 kcal
ingredients_en: The amount of beef is 150 g/person
The dosage of pepper is 0.5 g/person
steps_zh: 牛肉切成薄片
番茄切成小块
葱切成葱花
姜切成姜片
蒜剁成蒜泥
牛肉放入碗中
加盐、胡椒粉腌制 15-20 分钟
加水煮开
加入姜片和牛肉片，煮至牛肉变色
加入番茄块，煮至番茄变软
打散鸡蛋液，缓慢地倒入锅中，用筷子搅拌形成蛋花
加入盐和胡椒粉调味
最后加入葱花，即可出锅
steps_en: Beef sliced thinly
Tomatoes cut into small pieces
Scallions cut into slices
Ginger cut into slices
Chop garlic into minced garlic
Put beef in bowl
Add salt and pepper and marinate for 15-20 minutes
Add water and bring to boil
Add ginger slices and beef slices and cook until beef changes color
Add tomato chunks and cook until tomatoes become soft
Break up the egg liquid, slowly pour it into the pot, and stir with chopsticks to form egg drops.
Add salt and pepper to taste
Finally add chopped green onion and serve

intro_zh:
这是一道经典法式浓汤，口感丝滑绵密，菌香与奶香交融。蘑菇富含膳食纤维和微量元素，牛奶则提供优质蛋白与钙质。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松驾驭，从备料到完成大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：426 大卡
---
intro_en:
This is a classic French soup with a silky and creamy texture and a blend of fungus and milk aromas. Mushrooms are rich in dietary fiber and trace elements, while milk provides high-quality protein and calcium. The method is very simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about 30 minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 426 kcal
---
steps_zh: 白蘑菇切片备用，洋葱切末备用。
平底锅中放入黄油，小火融化后加入洋葱炒至透明。
加入白蘑菇翻炒至出水变软，撒入面粉搅拌均匀。
加入牛奶和清水，搅拌均匀后小火煮沸，保持搅拌防止糊底。
转小火煮约 10 分钟，汤汁浓稠。
倒入淡奶油继续加热 1 分钟，加入盐和黑胡椒调味。
熄火后可用料理机打成细腻浓汤（可选）。
steps_en: Slice white mushrooms and set aside, mince onions and set aside.
Melt the butter in a pan over low heat, then add the onions and sauté until translucent.
Add the white mushrooms and stir-fry until the water becomes soft, sprinkle in the flour and stir evenly.
Add milk and water, stir evenly and bring to a boil over low heat, keeping stirring to prevent the mixture from burning.
Reduce heat and simmer for about 10 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Pour in the whipped cream and continue to heat for 1 minute, and season with salt and black pepper.
After turning off the heat, use a food processor to make a fine soup (optional).

intro_zh:
腊八粥是一道传统节令甜粥，粥体粘稠软糯，融合了多种谷物、豆类和干果的复合香气。富含碳水化合物、矿物质和多种维生素，莲子还有养心安神之效，适合工作压力大的人食用。虽然食材种类多，但操作简单，耐心慢熬即可，对新手友好。除去浸泡等准备时间，熬煮约需 3 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：2042 大卡
intro_en:
Laba porridge is a traditional seasonal sweet porridge. The porridge is thick and soft, and combines the complex aroma of various grains, beans and dried fruits. Rich in carbohydrates, minerals and multivitamins, lotus seeds also have the effect of nourishing the mind and calming the mind, making them suitable for people who are under high work pressure. Although there are many types of ingredients, the operation is simple and requires patience and slow cooking, making it friendly to novices. Excluding preparation time such as soaking, simmering takes about 3 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 2042 kcal
ingredients_zh: 粥锅（普通锅容易糊底，有条件可选择高压锅）
中号玻璃碗（或其他中号不锈钢容器）
ingredients_en: Porridge pot (ordinary pots tend to burn the bottom, but you can choose a pressure cooker if possible)
Medium glass bowl (or other medium stainless steel container)
Rock sugar (or white sugar, for seasoning)
steps_zh: 提前洗净好绿豆、红豆、花生、黄豆、豌豆、红腰豆，并用干净的玻璃碗盛放好，注入 3/4 玻璃碗大小的饮用水，浸泡一夜（或最少 8 小时）。
提前洗净好大米、糯米、薏米、黑米、小米、莲子，并用干净的玻璃碗盛放好，注入 3/4 玻璃碗大小的饮用水，浸泡 3 小时。
将步骤 1 中准备好的盛有绿豆、红豆、花生、黄豆、豌豆、红腰豆的玻璃碗中的水分分离倒出，其余原料倒入粥锅中，加入 1 升饮用水（或漫过食材 1 拇指块），大火煮沸，煮沸后合上锅盖，小火煮 30 分钟。
将步骤 2 中准备好的盛有大米、糯米、薏米、黑米、小米、莲子的玻璃碗中的水分分离倒出，其余原料继续倒入粥锅中，合上锅盖，小火煮 60 分钟。
洗净好红枣、桂圆、栗子、核桃、葡萄干（其中红枣切成小片）、冰糖，倒入锅中，合上锅盖，小火煮 60 分钟。
确认煮出的粥粘稠后即可关火、盛盘、食用。
steps_en: Wash mung beans, red beans, peanuts, soybeans, peas, and red kidney beans in advance, put them in a clean glass bowl, pour 3/4 of the glass bowl size of drinking water, and soak overnight (or at least 8 hours).
Wash the rice, glutinous rice, barley, black rice, millet, and lotus seeds in advance, put them in a clean glass bowl, pour 3/4 of the glass bowl size of drinking water, and soak for 3 hours.

Separate and pour out the water in the glass bowl containing mung beans, red beans, peanuts, soybeans, peas, and red kidney beans prepared in step 1. Pour the remaining ingredients into the porridge pot, add 1 liter of drinking water (or 1 thumb piece to cover the ingredients), bring to a boil over high heat, close the lid after boiling, and simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.

Separate and pour out the water from the glass bowl containing rice, glutinous rice, barley, black rice, millet, and lotus seeds prepared in step 2. Continue pouring the remaining ingredients into the porridge pot, close the lid, and simmer over low heat for 60 minutes.
Wash the red dates, longans, chestnuts, walnuts, raisins (cut the red dates into small pieces), and rock sugar, pour them into the pot, close the lid, and cook over low heat for 60 minutes.
After confirming that the cooked porridge is thick, turn off the heat, serve on a plate, and eat.

intro_zh:
一道源自俄罗斯甜菜汤、在上海改良的海派家常汤品，以番茄和牛肉为主调，口感酸甜浓郁、醇厚鲜美。富含优质蛋白、番茄红素及多种维生素，营养均衡。制作简单，对初学者友好，全程预计 2–3 小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：2006 大卡
intro_en:
A Shanghai-style home-style soup originated from Russian beet soup and improved in Shanghai. It is based on tomatoes and beef. It has a sweet, sour, rich, mellow and delicious taste. Rich in high-quality protein, lycopene and multivitamins, nutritionally balanced. It’s easy to make, beginner-friendly, and should take about 2–3 hours to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 2006 kcal
ingredients_zh: 蔬菜高汤（欧芹、胡萝卜、洋葱三件套）
牛肉高汤（可用〇汤宝代替）
牛肉（可选牛腩肉或牛尾肉）
牛肉 250 g （可选用牛腩肉或牛尾肉）
番茄罐头 2 罐 （可用番茄替代、但风味欠佳）
番茄膏 5 g （增加番茄风味）
橄榄油 5 mL （橄榄油用于蔬菜的烹制，可以用植物油代替）
植物油 5 mL （植物油用于牛肉的烹制，不能用橄榄油代替）
ingredients_en: Beef stock (can be replaced by 〇Tangbao)
250 g beef (you can choose beef brisket or oxtail)
2 cans of canned tomatoes (tomatoes can be substituted, but the flavor will not be as good)
Olive oil 5 mL (olive oil is used for cooking vegetables and can be replaced with vegetable oil)
Vegetable oil 5 mL (vegetable oil is used for cooking beef and cannot be replaced with olive oil)
steps_zh: 洋葱、胡萝卜、欧芹切 1cm 见方小丁
红肠、马铃薯切 2cm 块
包菜去梗后，手撕至 2cm 片
牛肉撒盐 3 g 、黑胡椒 3 g 腌制 5 分钟
平底锅烧热，加入植物油
煎制牛肉，直至表面**焦黄色**（可以带生，千万别糊了），取出备用。
汤锅烧热，加入橄榄油、洋葱丁、胡萝卜丁、欧芹丁
炒至**洋葱透明**，加入番茄膏、番茄罐头
加入牛肉、马铃薯丁，翻炒均匀
加水没过食材，中火烹制 1 小时
开锅加入包菜丁、红肠丁，搅拌均匀
中火烹制半小时
开盖加入剩余 15 g 盐，混合均匀后盛盘
steps_en: Cut onions, carrots and parsley into 1cm cubes
Cut red sausage and potatoes into 2cm pieces
Remove stems from cabbage and tear into 2cm pieces by hand
Sprinkle beef with 3 g of salt and 3 g of black pepper and marinate for 5 minutes
Heat a pan and add vegetable oil
Fry the beef until the surface is **brown** (it can be raw, but don't burn it), take it out and set aside.
Heat the soup pot, add olive oil, diced onions, diced carrots, and diced parsley
Sauté until **onions are transparent**, add tomato paste and canned tomatoes
Add beef and potato cubes and stir-fry evenly
Add water to cover the ingredients and cook over medium heat for 1 hour
Add diced cabbage and red sausage to the pot and stir evenly
Cook over medium heat for half an hour
Open the lid and add the remaining 15 g of salt, mix well and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
生汆丸子汤口感鲜嫩弹滑，是一道原汁原味的家常汤品。猪肉提供优质蛋白质，搭配木耳、黄花等食材，营养较为均衡。制作中需要自己剁肉并掌握挤丸子的火候，稍有些门槛，更适合有一定基础的厨艺爱好者。从备料到上桌大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：857 大卡
intro_en:
The raw meatball soup is tender and smooth, and is an authentic home-cooked soup. Pork provides high-quality protein, and when paired with fungus, yellow flowers and other ingredients, the nutrition is relatively balanced. During the production, you need to chop the meat yourself and master the heat of squeezing the meatballs. There is a slight threshold, and it is more suitable for cooking enthusiasts with a certain foundation. It takes about 1 hour from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 857 kcal
ingredients_zh: 盐量 = 猪肉斤数 * 6 克
胡椒粉量 = 猪肉斤数 * 2 克
土豆淀粉 = 多少人的用量 * 40 克，本教程以一人用量算
ingredients_en: Soaked vermicelli (put in the bottom of the bowl)
Amount of salt = pounds of pork * 6 grams
Amount of pepper = pounds of pork * 2 grams
Potato starch = how many people use * 40 grams, this tutorial is based on the amount per person
steps_zh: 肉改刀切开，肥瘦三七分
上刀剁一剁，用刀背砸一砸，把肉筋打开打松疏
剁一剁，砸一砸，剁成肉末，要想好吃得自己剁，机器打的太黏糊了
每斤肉，6 克盐，1 克胡椒粉
上手抓匀
葱姜花椒水分次加，边加边搅，用手揉匀，让肉吸饱水。每斤肉末 80 克葱姜花椒水
放入鸡蛋清，继续顺着一个方向搅
加入 40 克土豆淀粉，搅匀
加入熟豆油，这是为了保持其嫩滑弹的状态
起锅烧水，烧开，改小火，似开非开的样子
上手，挤丸子，
全部漂起来，用小火煮 1 分钟
粉丝放碗底
加木耳，黄花，小香葱并用盐、胡椒粉、鸡粉打底调味
连汤带丸子冲如碗中
淋 3-5 滴香油
加一小颗香菜
steps_en: The meat is cut with a knife, and the fat is 30-70% lean.
Use the knife to chop, then smash it with the back of the knife to open and loosen the tendons.
Chop it, smash it, and chop it into minced meat. If you want it to taste delicious, you have to chop it yourself. The machine will make it too sticky.
Per kilogram of meat, 6 grams of salt, 1 gram of pepper
Grasp it evenly with your hands

Add the onion, ginger, and pepper water one at a time, stirring while adding, and knead evenly with your hands to allow the meat to absorb the water. 80 grams of onion, ginger and pepper water per kilogram of minced meat
Add the egg white and continue to stir in one direction
Add 40 grams of potato starch and mix well
Add cooked soybean oil to keep it tender and smooth.
Boil water in a pot, bring it to a boil, then reduce the heat to a low heat, it seems to be boiling but not boiling
Get started, squeeze the balls,
Rinse everything and cook over low heat for 1 minute
Put the fans at the bottom of the bowl
Add fungus, yellow flowers, chives and season with salt, pepper and chicken powder
The soup and meatballs are served in a bowl
Drizzle 3-5 drops of sesame oil
Add a pinch of coriander

intro_zh:
紫菜蛋花汤是一道清淡鲜美的家常汤品，属于中式简易汤菜。紫菜富含碘、钙和膳食纤维，鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质，二者搭配营养均衡。做法非常简单，对新手友好，从准备到出锅仅需约 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：217 大卡
intro_en:
Seaweed and egg drop soup is a light and delicious home-cooked soup, which is a simple Chinese soup dish. Seaweed is rich in iodine, calcium and dietary fiber, and eggs provide high-quality protein. The combination of the two is nutritionally balanced. It’s super simple and beginner-friendly, taking only about 20 minutes from prep to out of the pan.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 217 kcal
ingredients_zh: 虾仁（个人口味，可加可不加）
10g 的干紫菜（喜欢紫菜的可以多放些）
ingredients_en: Shrimp (optional or not according to personal taste)
10g of dried seaweed (if you like seaweed, you can add more)
steps_zh: 干紫菜用清水泡 15 分钟，捞起沥干水份备用。
热锅，倒入 1.5 升清水、5ml 油、2g 盐。待水开后放入紫菜。
紫菜烧开后 3 分钟，将打好的蛋液徐徐倒入锅内，30 秒既可起锅。
撒上葱花，转小火 20 秒。
关火，出锅前放入几滴香油，也有的会放入一点虾皮，味道也不错。
steps_en: Soak dried seaweed in water for 15 minutes, drain and set aside.
Heat the pot, pour 1.5 liters of water, 5ml of oil, and 2g of salt. After the water boils, add the seaweed.
3 minutes after the seaweed comes to a boil, slowly pour the beaten egg liquid into the pot and serve in 30 seconds.
Sprinkle with chopped green onion and reduce heat to low for 20 seconds.
Turn off the heat and add a few drops of sesame oil before serving. Some people also add a little shrimp skin, which tastes good.

intro_zh:
黄瓜皮蛋汤是一道快手家常汤品，口味清淡，带着皮蛋与蒜瓣煸炒出的焦香，暖心暖胃且不油腻。黄瓜清热补水，皮蛋提供一定蛋白质，低脂少负担。做法几乎没有技术门槛，厨房新手也能轻松完成，从备料到出锅只需大约十 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：311 大卡
intro_en:
Cucumber and preserved egg soup is a quick homemade soup with a light taste and the caramel aroma of stir-fried preserved eggs and garlic cloves. It is heart-warming and not greasy. Cucumber clears away heat and replenishes water, while preserved eggs provide a certain amount of protein, which is low in fat and less burdensome. There are almost no technical barriers to making this recipe, and even a novice in the kitchen can easily complete it. It only takes about ten minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 311 kcal
steps_zh: 黄瓜洗净，切成 0.5-1.2 mm 厚的薄片
葱洗净切成末，蒜用刀拍几下去皮，对半切一下
皮蛋剥去壳，然后每个切成 6-8 份。锅里倒入油，放入切好的皮蛋和大蒜
小火炒至皮蛋和大蒜表面有些焦黄，加入水，转大火烧开
放入黄瓜片。水再次沸腾以后立马关火，放入盐、鸡精调味即可出锅
装入碗中，再撒上葱花即可
steps_en: Wash the cucumber and cut into 0.5-1.2 mm thick slices
Wash and mince the onions. Peel the garlic with a knife and cut it in half.
Peel off the shells of preserved eggs and cut each into 6-8 pieces. Pour oil into the pot, add sliced preserved eggs and garlic
Fry over low heat until the surface of the preserved eggs and garlic is slightly browned, add water, turn to high heat and bring to a boil
Add cucumber slices. Once the water boils again, immediately turn off the heat, add salt and chicken essence to taste and serve.
Put it into a bowl and sprinkle with chopped green onion.

intro_zh:
这是一道清淡爽口的家常汤品，口味鲜美，属简易快手菜。金针菇含有丰富的氨基酸和膳食纤维，加鸡蛋还能补充优质蛋白。制作门槛极低，新手也能轻松驾驭，从备菜到出锅大约只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：149 大卡
intro_en:
This is a light and refreshing home-cooked soup with delicious taste. It is a simple and quick dish. Enoki mushrooms are rich in amino acids and dietary fiber, and adding eggs can also supplement high-quality protein. The production threshold is extremely low, and even novices can easily master it. It only takes about 10 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 149 kcal
ingredients_zh: 金针菇 400-500 克 （市场里面售卖的一袋即可）
ingredients_en: 400-500 grams of Enoki mushrooms (one bag sold in the market is enough)
steps_zh: 金针菇徒手掰散，越散越好**不然容易藏牙**，洗净备用。
用菜刀或者水果刀将上述金针菇段段切，可依据个人喜好，但长度不宜超过 5 cm。
将金针菇放入锅中，加水没过约食材总高度 1.1 倍，沸腾后**等待 3 分钟**。
加入味精和食盐并搅拌。
继续加热约 30 秒，关火装盘。
steps_en: Break the enoki mushrooms into pieces with your bare hands. The more scattered the better, otherwise it will be easy to hide the teeth. Wash and set aside.
Use a kitchen knife or fruit knife to cut the above-mentioned enoki mushrooms into sections according to personal preference, but the length should not exceed 5 cm.
Put the enoki mushrooms into the pot, add water to cover about 1.1 times the total height of the ingredients, and **wait 3 minutes** after boiling.
Add MSG and table salt and stir.
Continue heating for about 30 seconds, turn off the heat and serve on a plate.

name_en: Preserved egg and lean meat porridge
intro_zh:
皮蛋瘦肉粥是广东经典的家常粥品，粥底绵密顺滑，皮蛋的醇香与瘦肉的鲜嫩融合，口感温润鲜美。它富含碳水化合物和优质蛋白质，搭配蔬菜，营养较为均衡，易于消化吸收。这道粥步骤虽多，但操作直观，新手跟着流程也能顺利完成，预计制作时长约 1.5 小时，借助电饭锅的预约或保温功能，作为早餐尤为方便。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：776 大卡
intro_en:
Preserved egg and lean meat porridge is a classic home-cooked porridge in Guangdong. The porridge base is dense and smooth. The mellow aroma of preserved eggs and the tenderness of lean meat are combined, and the taste is warm and delicious. It is rich in carbohydrates and high-quality protein. When paired with vegetables, it has balanced nutrition and is easy to digest and absorb. Although this porridge has many steps, the operation is intuitive and even a novice can successfully complete it by following the process. It is expected to take about 1.5 hours to make. It is especially convenient for breakfast with the help of the rice cooker's reservation or keep-warm functions.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 776 kcal
steps_zh: 大米 - 洗净 - 放入电饭锅内胆 - 加入 1 升 饮用水
瘦肉 - 洗净 - 简易晾去水分 - 加入 10ml 食用油 - 揉搓均匀 - 放入电饭锅内胆
皮蛋 - 去壳 - 洗净 - 对半切开 - 分离蛋白蛋黄 - 蛋白简单切碎块 - 蛋黄揉碎 - 放入电饭锅内胆
生姜 - 洗净 - 削皮 - 去除枯黄枯黑无法食用部分 - 切丝 - 放入电饭锅内胆
小葱 - 洗净 - 去除根部 - 去除枯黄枯黑无法食用部分 - 切碎 - 放入小碗备用
香菜 - 洗净 - 去除根部 - 去除枯黄枯黑无法食用部分 - 切碎 - 放入小碗备用
生菜 - 洗净 - 去除根部 - 去除枯黄枯黑无法食用部分 - 切碎 - 放入小碗备用
酱油 + 蚝油 + 盐 + 胡椒粉 - 搅拌均匀 - 放入小碗备用
主料 - 使用电饭锅煮粥模式煮熟
配料 - 待主料煮熟后，生菜单独过一次热水，并与其余配料一同开盖加入主料中搅拌均匀
酱料 - 待主料煮熟后，与其余配料一同开盖加入主料中搅拌均匀
steps_en: Rice - wash - put into rice cooker - add 1 liter of drinking water
Lean meat - wash - simply dry out the water - add 10ml cooking oil - knead evenly - put into the rice cooker pot
Preserved eggs - shelled - washed - cut in half - separated from egg yolks - whites simply chopped into pieces - yolks crushed - put into rice cooker
Ginger - wash - peel - remove the yellow, black and inedible parts - cut into strips - put into the rice cooker pot
Green onions - wash - remove roots - remove yellow, black and inedible parts - chop finely - put in a small bowl and set aside
Coriander - Wash - Remove roots - Remove yellow, black and inedible parts - Chop - Put in a small bowl and set aside
Lettuce - wash - remove the roots - remove the yellow, black and inedible parts - chop into small pieces - put in a small bowl and set aside
Soy sauce + oyster sauce + salt + pepper - stir well - put into a small bowl and set aside
Ingredients - Cooked using the porridge cooking mode of the rice cooker
Ingredients - After the main ingredients are cooked, pour the lettuce into hot water separately, then open the lid and add it to the main ingredients together with the other ingredients and mix well.
Sauce - After the main ingredients are cooked, open the lid and add the remaining ingredients to the main ingredients and stir evenly

intro_zh:
白粥清淡绵软，是家常必备的暖胃主食，米香纯粹，老少皆宜。富含碳水化合物和少量蛋白质，易于消化吸收，有补脾、和胃、清肺的食养之效。操作简单，只需掌握好火候和水量，初学者也能轻松完成，全程约需 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：308 大卡
intro_en:
White porridge is light and soft. It is a must-have stomach-warming staple food at home. It has a pure rice aroma and is suitable for all ages. It is rich in carbohydrates and a small amount of protein, easy to digest and absorb, and has the effects of nourishing the spleen, harmonizing the stomach, and clearing the lungs. The operation is simple, just master the heat and the amount of water, and even beginners can complete it easily. The whole process takes about 25 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 308 kcal
ingredients_zh: 一般一个人可以食用 60ml-110ml 的米。
水的体积是米饭的体积的 9-12 倍。
中断大火加热的最晚时间 T1：1.5  分钟/500ml * 水体积
米粥能够食用的最早时间 Tr：10  分钟/500ml * 水体积
油的质量 Mo：生米体积 / 10
冷藏时间 Tc = 生米体积 /10 ml/分钟。
ingredients_en: Generally, one person can consume 60ml-110ml of rice.
The volume of water is 9-12 times the volume of rice.
The capacity of a bowl is 500ml.
The latest time to interrupt high-fire heating T1: 1.5 minutes/500ml * water volume
The earliest time when rice porridge can be eaten Tr: 10 minutes/500ml * water volume
Mass of oil Mo: volume of uncooked rice / 10
Refrigeration time Tc = volume of uncooked rice/10 ml/minute.
steps_zh: （可选）将 Mo ml 的油与洗净的米混合，*尽量确保完全混合，即每粒米上至少都沾上少量油*
（可选）将 米-油混合物品冷藏保存，冷藏时间 Tc。
将米和水加入锅中。
开大火，加热到 T1。
在 T1 之前将火关小。**如果忘记此步骤，水可能会漫出而熄灭火焰。非常危险！**
加热到 Tr。在 Tr 时关闭火源。
steps_en: (Optional) Mix Mo ml of oil with washed rice, *try to ensure complete mixing, that is, at least a small amount of oil on each grain of rice*
(Optional) Keep the rice-oil mixture refrigerated for Tc.
Add rice and water to the pot.
Turn up the heat and heat to T1.
Turn down the heat before T1. **If you forget this step, water may overflow and extinguish the flame. Very dangerous! **
Heat to Tr. Turn off the fire at Tr.

intro_zh:
这道汤品属于粤式老火靓汤，汤色清亮，入口甘润回香，带有陈皮的独特陈韵。排骨提供优质蛋白质和钙质，搭配陈皮、西洋参、石斛等食材，有助于理气健脾、滋阴润肺，适合长期熬夜或咽喉不适时饮用。整体操作不难，只需备好料、掌握炖煮时间，新手也能轻松完成。从备菜到出锅大约需要两小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：365 大卡
intro_en:
This soup is a Cantonese-style old fire soup. It is clear in color, sweet and fragrant in the mouth, and has the unique aging flavor of tangerine peel. Spare ribs provide high-quality protein and calcium. When combined with tangerine peel, American ginseng, dendrobium and other ingredients, it helps regulate qi, strengthen the spleen, nourish yin and moisturize the lungs. It is suitable for drinking when staying up late for a long time or when the throat is uncomfortable. The overall operation is not difficult, just prepare the ingredients and master the stewing time, and even a novice can complete it easily. It takes about two hours from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 365 kcal
ingredients_zh: 排骨，用猪骨也替代也可，4-5 块
陈皮（一般选用 8-20 年制），一般 1 块陈皮是 3 瓣，取 1 瓣即可
西洋参（又名花旗参），9 片
ingredients_en: Pork ribs, you can also use pork bones instead, 4-5 pieces
Tangerine peel (usually 8-20 years old), usually 1 piece of tangerine peel has 3 segments, just take 1 segment
American ginseng (also known as American ginseng), 9 slices
steps_zh: 排骨用热水过一边，去血水
陈皮、麦冬、玉竹、石斛和西洋参，冲洗干净即可
煲汤盅洗干净
打开煲汤盅，先放入排骨在底部，然后依次放入陈皮、麦冬、玉竹、石斛和西洋参
加入热水进煲汤盅，水不宜太满
煲汤容器加入水，炖煮 1.5 小时即可
加入食盐，趁热饮用
steps_en: Rinse the ribs with hot water to remove the blood.
Rinse tangerine peel, Ophiopogon japonicus, Polygonatum odoratum, Dendrobium and American ginseng.
Clean the soup pot
Open the soup pot, first put the ribs at the bottom, then add tangerine peel, Ophiopogon japonicus, Polygonatum odorifera, Dendrobium and American ginseng in sequence.
Add hot water into the soup pot, the water should not be too full
Add water to the soup container and simmer for 1.5 hours
Add salt and drink while hot
images: dishes/soup/陈皮排骨汤/陈皮排骨汤.jpg
file_path: dishes/soup/陈皮排骨汤/陈皮排骨汤.md

name_en: Pork Ribs and Bitter Melon Soup
intro_zh:
排骨苦瓜汤是一道汤色清亮、鲜美回甘的粤式家常汤品，排骨软烂、苦瓜清热解腻。富含蛋白质与维生素，虾皮还能补充钙质。处理过程需要焯水去腥、仔细去除苦瓜瓤，对新手有一定挑战，但借助电压力锅可大幅简化；传统慢炖需 2 至 4 小时，建议提前 4 小时准备，压力锅则只需约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：905 大卡
intro_en:
Pork Ribs and Bitter Melon Soup is a Cantonese-style home-cooked soup with a clear color, delicious taste and sweetness. The pork ribs are tender and the bitter melon clears away heat and relieves greasiness. Rich in protein and vitamins, dried shrimps can also supplement calcium. The process requires blanch water to remove the fishy smell and carefully remove the flesh of the bitter melon, which is a certain challenge for novices, but it can be greatly simplified with the help of an electric pressure cooker; traditional slow cooking takes 2 to 4 hours, and it is recommended to prepare 4 hours in advance. The pressure cooker only takes about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 905 kcal
ingredients_zh: 电压力锅（可以极大简化烹饪过程和时间）
砂锅（相比于炒锅更适合炖汤）
生姜 5~10g（可选，用于焯水时去腥）
ingredients_en: Electric pressure cooker (can greatly simplify the cooking process and time)
Casserole (more suitable for stewing soup than a wok)
5~10g ginger (optional, used to remove the smell when blanching)
steps_zh: 排骨洗净，切到约 4cm ±2cm * 3 ± 2cm 的小块（如没有剁排骨的工具，可以求助摊主）
炒锅倒入冷水 700ml 和排骨一起加热至煮沸，关火捞出排骨
苦瓜中间切为两半，清除干净内部的种子和苦瓜瓤，切为 0.5 ± 0.3 cm 的苦瓜条，洗净
steps_en: Wash the ribs and cut into small pieces of about 4cm ±2cm * 3 ± 2cm (if you don’t have the tools to chop the ribs, you can ask the stall owner for help)
Pour 700ml of cold water into the wok and heat with the ribs until boiling, turn off the heat and remove the ribs
Cut the bitter melon in half in the middle, clean the seeds and pulp inside, cut into 0.5 ± 0.3 cm bitter melon strips, and wash them
file_path: dishes/soup/排骨苦瓜汤/排骨苦瓜汤.md

intro_zh:
菌菇炖乳鸽汤色清亮、肉质细嫩，菌香与鸽鲜交融，属于家常粤式炖汤。乳鸽富含优质蛋白和多种氨基酸，菌菇提供多糖与膳食纤维，温和滋补。整道菜需先将乳鸽焯水去腥，再与玉米、菌菇同炖，对火候和时间的把控略有一些要求，新手稍加注意也能驾驭。从备料到出锅，使用高压锅约需 45 分钟，瓦罐慢炖则需 1 小时出头。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：324 大卡
intro_en:
The pigeon stewed with mushrooms has a clear color, tender meat, and a blend of fungus and pigeon meat. It is a home-style Cantonese stew. Squab is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of amino acids, while mushrooms provide polysaccharides and dietary fiber, which are mild and nourishing. The entire dish requires first blanching the squab to remove the fishy smell, and then stewing it with corn and mushrooms. It has some requirements on the control of heat and time, and novices can master it with a little attention. From preparation to serving, it takes about 45 minutes in a pressure cooker or just over an hour in a crock pot.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 324 kcal
steps_zh: 冷水洗干净热心摊主处理好的乳鸽
冷水锅中放入洗干净的乳鸽，加入 15ml 料酒与姜，水煮开即可捞出乳鸽，要不然会丢失营养
把乳鸽放到高压缩或者瓦罐中、倒入的水要没过乳鸽，放入生姜 20 g，玉米 200 g、菌菇 100 g
时间到了，盛到碗中，加入 3~5g 盐 即可
steps_en: Wash the squab in cold water and treat it well with the enthusiastic stall owner
Put the washed squab into a pot of cold water, add 15ml of cooking wine and ginger, bring the water to a boil and then remove the squab, otherwise the nutrients will be lost
Put the squab into a high-pressure or earthen pot, pour in water to cover the squab, add 20 g of ginger, 200 g of corn, and 100 g of mushrooms
When the time is up, put it into a bowl and add 3~5g of salt.
images: dishes/soup/菌菇炖乳鸽/菌菇炖乳鸽.jpg
file_path: dishes/soup/菌菇炖乳鸽/菌菇炖乳鸽.md

name_en: Pork Ribs, Yam and Corn Soup
intro_zh:
排骨山药玉米汤清甜醇厚，山药软糯、玉米回甘，融合了排骨的鲜香，属于老少皆宜的家常汤品。它富含蛋白质、膳食纤维和多种维生素，有健脾益胃、增强抵抗力的作用。做法简单，预处理和炖煮步骤清晰，新手也能轻松上手，全程大约需要 1 小时即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1054 大卡
intro_en:
The Pork Ribs, Yam and Corn Soup is sweet and mellow. The yam is soft and glutinous, and the corn is sweet. It combines the delicious flavor of the ribs. It is a home-cooked soup suitable for all ages. It is rich in protein, dietary fiber and multiple vitamins, which can strengthen the spleen and stomach and enhance resistance. The method is simple and the pre-processing and stewing steps are clear, making it easy for novices to get started. The whole process takes about 1 hour to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1054 kcal
ingredients_zh: 玉米（推荐甜玉米或糯玉米）
小葱（大约 15g，打结或切末备用）
ingredients_en: Corn (sweet corn or waxy corn recommended)
Spring onions (about 15g, knotted or minced and set aside)
steps_zh: **食材预处理**：
**排骨焯水**：
**翻炒排骨**：
**炖煮过程**：
**调味与出锅**：
steps_en: **Food preprocessing**:
**Blanched pork ribs**:
**Stir fried pork ribs**:
**Stewing process**:
**Seasoning and serving**:
file_path: dishes/soup/排骨山药玉米汤/排骨山药玉米汤.md

intro_zh:
玉米排骨汤是一道鲜美清甜的家常汤品，排骨软烂，玉米和胡萝卜带来自然甜味。富含蛋白质、维生素和膳食纤维，营养均衡。做法简单，对新手友好，只需将排骨焯水煸香后慢炖约一小时即可完成。从备菜到出锅大约需要一个半小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1724 大卡
intro_en:
Corn ribs soup is a delicious and sweet home-cooked soup. The ribs are tender and the corn and carrots bring natural sweetness. Rich in protein, vitamins and dietary fiber, nutritionally balanced. The method is simple and friendly to novices. You only need to blanch the pork ribs and simmer them for about an hour. It takes about an hour and a half from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1724 kcal
ingredients_zh: 砂锅（没有的话，用铁锅也行）
玉米一根（喜欢吃玉米的可以多一根）
胡萝卜一根（喜欢吃胡箩卜的可以多一根）
食用盐 10-15g（根据最后汤剩余的量而定）
ingredients_en: Casserole (if you don’t have one, you can also use an iron pot)
One stick of corn (if you like corn, you can add one more stick)
One carrot (if you like carrots, you can add one more)
Edible salt 10-15g (depending on the amount of soup left at the end)
steps_zh: 大葱切成 3-4cm 的大段，用刀背拍一下
玉米剁成小块
胡箩卜切成滚刀块
生姜去皮切大片
新鲜的排骨砍成小块
排骨凉水下锅，放入大葱、生姜、料酒开始焯水，大火烧开，撇去浮沫，捞出排骨，沥干水分
热锅凉油，切大片的生姜和排骨一起下锅煸炒，待排骨表面微微焦黄，放入醋（可加速肉质软烂），继续煸炒一分钟
冲入开水，一次给足，之后就不要再加了，大火烧开
先下入玉米，放入胡椒粉，盖盖小火炖二十分钟，然后放入胡萝卜，盖盖继续小火炖四十分钟
调味很简单，出锅前三分钟，除了盐什么都不用放，最后撒上一把小葱花即可
steps_en: Cut the green onions into 3-4cm pieces and pat them with the back of a knife.
Chop corn into small pieces
Carrot cut into hob cubes
Peel and cut ginger into large pieces
Fresh pork ribs chopped into small pieces
Put the ribs in a pot under cold water, add green onions, ginger, and cooking wine and start to blanch them. Bring to a boil over high heat, skim off the foam, take out the ribs, and drain the water.

Heat oil in a pan, add large slices of ginger and stir-fry with the ribs. When the surface of the ribs is slightly browned, add vinegar (can speed up the tenderness of the meat) and continue to stir-fry for one minute.
Pour in boiling water, give enough at one time, don’t add more after that, bring to a boil over high heat
Add the corn first, add the pepper, cover and simmer for 20 minutes, then add the carrots, cover and simmer for another 40 minutes.
The seasoning is very simple. You don’t need to add anything except salt for three minutes before serving. Sprinkle a handful of chopped green onions at the end.
images: dishes/soup/玉米排骨汤/玉米排骨汤.jpeg
file_path: dishes/soup/玉米排骨汤/玉米排骨汤.md

intro_zh:
朱雀汤是一道豫东地区的家常快手汤品，口感顺滑香甜，带着芝麻油的醇香。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质，制作非常简单，只需烧水冲蛋几步就能完成，前后不到十分钟即可上桌，还有清热去火的效果。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：168 大卡
intro_en:
Suzaku soup is a home-cooked soup in eastern Henan. It tastes smooth and sweet, with the mellow aroma of sesame oil. Eggs provide high-quality protein and are very simple to prepare. It only takes a few steps to boil water and rinse the eggs. It can be served in less than ten minutes. It also has the effect of clearing away heat and eliminating internal heat.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 168 kcal
ingredients_zh: 20 克白糖（根据个人口味调整）
ingredients_en: 20 grams of white sugar (adjust according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 鸡蛋在碗中打散，再倒入香油。
水烧开后，在沸腾状态下快速倒入盛有鸡蛋的碗中。
放入白糖。
steps_en: Beat the eggs in a bowl and pour in the sesame oil.
Once the water is boiling, quickly pour it into the bowl containing the eggs while it's still boiling.
Add sugar.

intro_zh:
银耳莲子粥清甜润滑，银耳软糯、莲子绵密，是常见的滋补粥品。富含天然胶质、膳食纤维及多种微量元素，有助养心安神。制作需经历浸泡和慢熬，对新手的耐心是个考验，全程大约需要 3.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：282 大卡
intro_en:
Tremella and Lotus Seed Porridge is sweet and smooth, with soft and waxy Tremella and dense lotus seeds. It is a common nourishing porridge. Rich in natural colloids, dietary fiber and various trace elements, it helps nourish the mind and calm the mind. The production requires soaking and slow boiling, which will test the patience of novices. The whole process takes about 3.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 282 kcal
steps_zh: 把银耳、莲子用清水浸泡 2 个小时，红枣浸泡 10 - 20 分钟，枸杞洗净，备用
在锅中倒入 600ml 水，烧开后依次放入银耳、莲子、红枣
等待水再次烧开后，盖上锅盖，转至中火继续熬
熬到大约 1 小时后，放入 5g - 10g 冰糖和 5g - 6g 枸杞，转至小火熬
小火继续熬 30 分钟，此时银耳开始呈现粘稠状态
再次放入 5g - 10g 冰糖，用勺子搅拌 5 - 10 分钟
关火，用勺子盛出
steps_en: Soak the white fungus and lotus seeds in water for 2 hours, soak the red dates for 10-20 minutes, wash the wolfberries and set aside
Pour 600ml of water into the pot, bring to a boil and add white fungus, lotus seeds, and red dates in order
Wait for the water to boil again, cover the pot, turn to medium heat and continue to simmer.
After simmering for about 1 hour, add 5g - 10g rock sugar and 5g - 6g wolfberry, turn to low heat and simmer
Continue to simmer over low heat for 30 minutes, when the white fungus begins to become sticky.
Add 5g - 10g rock sugar again and stir with a spoon for 5 - 10 minutes
Turn off the heat and scoop out with a spoon
images: dishes/soup/银耳莲子粥/银耳莲子粥.png
file_path: dishes/soup/银耳莲子粥/银耳莲子粥.md

intro_zh:
昂刺鱼豆腐汤是一道口感鲜嫩、汤白味浓的家常汤品，鱼肉刺少肉嫩，豆腐滑润，带有胡椒的微辛暖意，适合各个年龄层。鱼富含优质蛋白质，搭配豆腐能补充钙质，营养均衡好吸收。制作过程不算复杂，只要注意去腥和煎鱼防粘，一般初学者也可以上手，预计制作时长约 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：321 大卡
intro_en:
The fish and tofu soup is a home-cooked soup with a fresh and tender taste and a rich white soup. The fish meat has few bones and is tender, the tofu is smooth, and it has a slightly spicy and warm taste of pepper. It is suitable for all ages. Fish is rich in high-quality protein, and when paired with tofu, it can supplement calcium and provide a balanced nutrition that is easy to absorb. The production process is not complicated. As long as you pay attention to removing the fishy smell and preventing the fish from sticking, even beginners can get started. The production is expected to take about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 321 kcal
ingredients_zh: 昂刺鱼或者沙光鱼 一条
ingredients_en: One piece of thorn fish or sand fish
steps_zh: 鱼处理好后洗净，（特别注意肚内的血丝、不洗干净会有腥味），放入大碗中，倒入料酒、10g 姜片、5g 盐，腌制 15 分钟
豆腐切块，放入凉水浸泡 5 分钟，捞出备用
煎鱼前，先用生姜片擦一下锅防止粘锅，倒入油（油量为 15ml * 鱼的条数 ），烧热后放入鱼煎 2~3 分钟，期间需要晃动一下鱼，防止粘底，且需要翻一次身
待鱼全部煎好之后，倒入开水、5ml 料酒、姜片，小火转至大火，盖上锅盖、大火煮 10 分钟（水要稍微多一些，后面会蒸发掉一些）
见汤变白后倒入准备好的豆腐，调中火再煮 5 分钟，加入 10g 盐、3g 胡椒粉调味，最后撒上葱花出锅
steps_en: Wash the fish after processing (pay special attention to the blood in the belly, as it will smell fishy if not washed), put it in a large bowl, pour in cooking wine, 10g ginger slices, 5g salt, and marinate for 15 minutes
Cut tofu into cubes, soak in cold water for 5 minutes, remove and set aside

Before frying the fish, wipe the pan with ginger slices to prevent it from sticking, pour in oil (the amount of oil is 15ml * the number of fish), heat it up, add the fish and fry for 2 to 3 minutes. During this period, you need to shake the fish to prevent it from sticking to the bottom, and you need to turn it over once.

After all the fish is fried, pour in boiling water, 5ml cooking wine, and ginger slices, turn the heat from low to high, cover the pot, and cook on high for 10 minutes (a little more water will evaporate later)

When the soup turns white, pour in the prepared tofu, adjust the heat to medium and cook for another 5 minutes, add 10g salt and 3g pepper to taste, and finally sprinkle with chopped green onion and serve.
