intro_zh:
羊肉汤是一道家常暖身汤品，汤色乳白，肉质鲜嫩，带有大葱和白胡椒的清香与微辛。富含蛋白质、钙、铁等营养成分，有温补脾胃、抵御寒冷的功效。制作步骤简单，新手也能轻松掌握，整个烹饪过程大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：599 大卡
intro_en:
Mutton soup is a home-style warming soup. The soup is milky white in color, the meat is tender and fragrant and slightly spicy with green onions and white pepper. It is rich in protein, calcium, iron and other nutrients, and has the effect of warming the spleen and stomach and resisting cold. The preparation steps are simple and can be easily mastered by novices, and the entire cooking process takes about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 599 kcal
steps_zh: 羊肉切成长 5cm 宽 0.5cm 的块
大葱切成小段
羊肉放入锅中，加入 1000ml 常温水，加入料酒、大葱
煮沸 2 分钟后，捞出羊肉，使用常温水洗净，沥干水分
热锅加入食用油，加入羊肉，翻炒 2 分钟至羊肉表面微黄
加入开水，开到大火档位
5 分钟后，加入白胡椒粉、盐，继续煮沸 5 分钟
出锅之后，加入香菜、孜然粉，搅拌均匀
steps_en: Cut the mutton into 5cm long and 0.5cm wide pieces
Green onions cut into small pieces
Put the mutton into the pot, add 1000ml room temperature water, add cooking wine and green onions
After boiling for 2 minutes, take out the mutton, wash it with room temperature water and drain it.
Add cooking oil to a hot pan, add mutton, and stir-fry for 2 minutes until the surface of the mutton is slightly brown.
Add boiling water and turn to high heat
After 5 minutes, add white pepper and salt and continue boiling for 5 minutes
After taking it out of the pot, add coriander and cumin powder and stir evenly

intro_zh:
香菇勾芡汤汤浓味鲜，滑润适口，是一道快手的家常汤品。香菇含有丰富的氨基酸和多糖，有助于增强免疫力。制作过程需要一些基本的控火和勾芡技巧，但对新手依然友好。从备料到出锅，大约只需 25 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：146 大卡
intro_en:
Mushroom thickening soup is rich in flavor, smooth and palatable. It is a quick home-cooked soup. Shiitake mushrooms are rich in amino acids and polysaccharides, which help strengthen immunity. The production process requires some basic fire control and thickening skills, but is still friendly to novices. From preparation to serving, it only takes about 25 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 146 kcal
steps_zh: 香菇切片（每片厚度 0.5-1 cm,厚点相对薄点更有嚼劲），放入大碗中，倒入 2g 食用盐 浸泡 15 分钟
生粉倒入小碗中，加入 50ml 水，搅拌生粉直至融化没有颗粒（即水淀粉）
倒掉碗中的盐水，适当去掉香菇本身的水分（方便下一步煎炸）【可选】
小火，倒入油，待油开始冒小泡（小火 30s ，看每个锅的功率），倒入香菇，每面煎 10s 【可选】
倒入开水 300ml ，调中火再煮 3-5 分钟
倒入水淀粉，适当搅拌锅中汤汁后，加入 3g 盐、3 g ，最后撒上葱花出锅
steps_en: Slice the mushrooms (each slice is 0.5-1 cm thick, thicker ones are chewier than thinner ones), put them in a large bowl, pour 2g of edible salt and soak for 15 minutes
Pour the cornstarch into a small bowl, add 50ml of water, and stir the cornstarch until it melts and there are no particles (i.e. water starch)
Pour out the salt water in the bowl and remove the moisture from the mushrooms (to facilitate the next step of frying) [optional]
Turn on low heat, pour in the oil, wait until the oil starts to bubble (low heat for 30 seconds, depending on the power of each pot), add the mushrooms, and fry for 10 seconds on each side [optional]
Pour in 300ml of boiling water, turn to medium heat and cook for 3-5 minutes
Pour in the water starch, stir the soup in the pot properly, add 3g of salt, 3g, and finally sprinkle with chopped green onion and serve.
file_path: dishes/soup/勾芡香菇汤/勾芡香菇汤.md

intro_zh:
红烧鲤鱼是一道家常鲁菜，鱼肉先炸后炖，外皮微韧，肉质鲜嫩，咸甜酱香中透着五花肉的醇厚，汤汁浓稠下饭。富含优质蛋白和钙、磷等矿物质，有助滋补。处理炸鱼和调味配比稍需耐心，但步骤清晰，新手跟着做也能完成。从备料到出锅预计 大约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1051 大卡
intro_en:
Braised carp is a home-cooked Shandong dish. The fish is first fried and then stewed. The skin is slightly tough and the meat is fresh and tender. The salty and sweet sauce is full of mellow pork belly, and the soup is thick and goes well with rice. Rich in high-quality protein and minerals such as calcium and phosphorus, it helps nourish. It takes a little patience to handle the fried fish and seasoning ratio, but the steps are clear and even a novice can complete it by following them. Estimated time from preparation to serving is approximately 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1051 kcal
ingredients_zh: 油、盐、生抽、老抽、陈醋、蚝油、料酒、白糖
ingredients_en: Green onions, ginger, garlic, dried chili peppers
Oil, salt, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, mature vinegar, oyster sauce, cooking wine, sugar
steps_zh: 葱、姜、蒜、干辣椒分别清洗干净。
葱白处切段，每段长度约 4cm，再将每段劈为四瓣。
姜切片，每片厚度约 3mm。
一个大蒜拍碎切末，其余蒜切为二瓣。
干辣椒切四段。
五花肉切片，约 4cm*4cm。
清洗鱼。
鱼背肉厚处拉几道斜口，方便入味
锅里多倒点油，烧至 7 成热（刚刚开始冒烟），下入鱼炸 1 分钟至鱼皮稍稍变硬捞出备用（注意不要一下锅就拨弄鱼，等炸一会再拨弄、翻面），炸鱼的油倒出，锅里留一点底油
将锅里底油烧热，下入五花肉，煸出香味。
放入干辣椒、葱、姜、蒜瓣，翻炒 1 分钟。
将炸好的鱼倒入锅中。
沿锅边倒入
调至中火，将水烧开。
调至小火，慢焖入味。
15 分钟 后，打开锅盖，挑出锅里的葱、姜、蒜、干辣椒。
调至大火收汁，汤汁剩余 1/4 时，撒点蒜末，关火盛出。
红烧鲤鱼出锅！
steps_en: Wash onions, ginger, garlic and dried chilies separately.
Cut the white part of the scallion into sections, each section is about 4cm long, and then split each section into four pieces.
Slice ginger, each slice is about 3mm thick.
Crush one garlic clove and chop the rest into two cloves.
Cut dried chilies into four sections.
Slice pork belly into slices, about 4cm*4cm.
Clean the fish.
Make a few slits on the thick part of the fish's back to facilitate the flavoring.

Pour more oil into the pot and heat it until it is 70% hot (just starting to smoke). Add the fish and fry for 1 minute until the fish skin becomes slightly hard. Take it out and set aside (be careful not to fiddle with the fish as soon as you get out of the pot. Wait for a while before flipping it). Pour out the oil for frying the fish and leave a little base oil in the pot.
Heat the oil in the pot, add the pork belly and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add dried chilies, green onions, ginger, and garlic cloves and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Pour the fried fish into the pot.
Pour along the edge of the pot
Reduce heat to medium and bring water to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer until the flavors are absorbed.
After 15 minutes, open the lid of the pot and pick out the onions, ginger, garlic and dried chilies in the pot.
Turn up the heat to reduce the sauce. When 1/4 of the soup remains, sprinkle some minced garlic, turn off the heat and serve.
Braised carp is out of the pot!

intro_zh:
红烧鱼头是一道经典的家常烧菜，鱼头胶质丰富，肉质滑嫩，汤汁咸鲜微辣，十分下饭。鱼头富含优质蛋白、卵磷脂和不饱和脂肪酸，对滋养皮肤和大脑有益。由于需要处理生鱼和剁骨，难度稍高，不建议完全零基础的新手独自操作，全程制作（含腌制）约需 2–2.5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：333 大卡
intro_en:
Braised fish head is a classic home-cooked dish. The fish head is rich in gelatin, the meat is smooth and tender, and the soup is salty and slightly spicy, making it a perfect meal. Fish heads are rich in high-quality protein, lecithin and unsaturated fatty acids, which are beneficial to nourishing the skin and brain. Since it requires processing raw fish and chopped bones, it is slightly more difficult. It is not recommended for novices with no basic experience to operate alone. The entire preparation (including marinating) takes about 2-2.5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 333 kcal
ingredients_zh: 注：如果有可能，尽量另准备一把菜刀，超市或市场上均有廉价且刀片更厚的菜刀，刀片厚度在 5-7mm 为最佳。
大葱、姜、大蒜、香菜、美人椒
油、盐、鸡精、生抽、老抽、陈醋、黑胡椒粉、料酒
注：市场直接贩卖的鱼头一般分为两种：白鲢、花鲢。前者价格便宜，后者价格略贵，但口感也更佳！
ingredients_en: Note: If possible, try to prepare another kitchen knife. There are cheap kitchen knives with thicker blades available in supermarkets or markets. The best blade thickness is 5-7mm.
Green onions, ginger, garlic, coriander, bell pepper
Oil, salt, chicken essence, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, mature vinegar, black pepper, cooking wine

Note: Fish heads sold directly in the market are generally divided into two types: white silver carp and flowered silver carp. The former is cheaper, while the latter is slightly more expensive, but tastes better too!
Two star anise, five dried chili peppers
steps_zh: 葱、姜、蒜、香菜、美人椒分别清洗干净。
干辣椒与八角稍微冲洗即可。
大葱切两半。后半段大葱（葱白处）切段，每段长度约 4cm。前半段（葱叶处）先切段，再将每段劈为四瓣。
姜切片，每片厚度约 3mm。
大蒜拍碎。
拿出两棵香菜去根，切为 1.5cm 香菜碎。
将美人椒切为厚度为 3mm 的辣椒圈。
干辣椒切四段。
注：下文所述的鱼身是购买鱼头时所附带的鱼肉。
将鱼头去鳞，清洗鱼头处未被清理干净的内脏。
剁去鱼鳍、清理鱼鳃。
将鱼头下巴与鱼身连接的地方剁开，鱼身剁块，鱼头剁成四/六瓣。
将剁好的鱼头进行清洗，最好洗掉鱼块上滞留的血水。
将清洗好的鱼块放入盆中，加入 5g 盐、10g 生抽、10g 料酒。放入葱（前半段切碎的那个）、1/3 姜片。将其拌匀，静置 1-2 小时。
加入 30ml 油，等待锅热...
油热，将锅关至小火
放入姜片，慢慢翻炒，以姜片中的大部分汁水被炒出，以金黄色为准。
放入葱段，翻炒至葱段略显发白。
放入蒜碎、八角、干辣椒，翻炒 5 秒。
将腌制好的鱼头倒入锅中，翻炒 2-3 分钟。
倒入 500ml 清水，加入 2g 盐、3g 鸡精、5g 生抽、3g 老抽、5g 料酒、2g 黑胡椒粉、3g 陈醋。
将两棵香菜放入锅中，盖上锅盖。
调至大火，将水烧开。
调至中火，慢焖入味。
当汤汁减少一半时，打开锅盖。
调至大火收汁，汤汁剩余 1/3 时，关火盛至小盆中。
注：将锅中的汤汁均匀淋到鱼头上，盛盘时可以将锅中煮的香菜放入小盆底部，这样能让成品菜好看又好吃。
将香菜放至已经盛出的鱼头上，把切好的美人椒圈放在香菜之上。
色香味俱全的红烧鱼头出炉！
steps_en: Wash onions, ginger, garlic, coriander, and bell peppers separately.
Rinse the dried chilies and star anise briefly.

Cut green onions in half. Cut the second half of the scallions (white part) into sections, each section is about 4cm long. Cut the first half (green onion leaves) into sections first, and then split each section into four pieces.
Slice ginger, each slice is about 3mm thick.
Crush the garlic.
Take out two coriander stalks, remove the roots, and cut into 1.5cm pieces.
Cut the bell pepper into 3mm thick pepper rings.
Cut dried chilies into four sections.
Note: The fish body mentioned below is the fish meat that comes with the fish head when you purchase it.
Remove the scales from the fish head and clean the uncleaned internal organs of the fish head.
Chop off the fins and clean the gills.
Chop the joint between the fish head and the fish body, chop the fish body into pieces, and chop the fish head into four/six petals.
Wash the chopped fish heads. It is best to wash away the blood retained on the fish pieces.
Put the cleaned fish pieces into a basin, add 5g salt, 10g light soy sauce, and 10g cooking wine. Add scallions (chopped first half) and 1/3 ginger slices. Mix it well and let it sit for 1-2 hours.
Add 30ml oil and wait for the pan to heat...
Heat the oil, turn the pot to low heat
Add the ginger slices and stir-fry slowly until most of the juice in the ginger slices is cooked out, until golden brown.
Add the scallions and stir-fry until the scallions turn slightly white.
Add minced garlic, star anise, and dried chili pepper and stir-fry for 5 seconds.
Add the marinated fish heads to the pot and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Pour 500ml of water, add 2g salt, 3g chicken essence, 5g light soy sauce, 3g dark soy sauce, 5g cooking wine, 2g black pepper, and 3g mature vinegar.
Add two coriander stalks to the pot and cover.
Turn up the heat and bring the water to a boil.
Turn to medium heat and simmer until the flavors are absorbed.
When the soup has reduced by half, open the lid.
Turn up the heat to reduce the juice. When 1/3 of the soup is left, turn off the heat and transfer it to a small basin.

Note: Pour the soup in the pot evenly onto the fish head. When serving, you can put the coriander cooked in the pot into the bottom of the small basin. This will make the finished dish look good and delicious.
Place the coriander on the fish head that has been served, and place the cut bell pepper rings on top of the coriander.
Braised fish head with delicious color and flavor is out of the oven!

intro_zh:
这道菜酱香浓郁，蟹肉鲜甜微辣，土豆软糯、年糕 Q 弹，汤汁拌饭格外过瘾，属于一道适合聚餐的硬菜。它富含优质蛋白和多种微量元素，营养丰富。制作有一定难度，需处理活蟹、把控火候和调味比例，对新手略具挑战，预计全程约需 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：2111 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is rich in sauce, the crab meat is sweet and slightly spicy, the potatoes are soft and glutinous, the rice cakes are chewy, and the soup mixed with rice is particularly satisfying. It is a hard dish suitable for gatherings. It is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of trace elements and is rich in nutrients. There is a certain degree of difficulty in making it. It requires handling live crabs, controlling the heat and seasoning ratio. It is a bit challenging for novices. The whole process is expected to take about 1 hour.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 2111 kcal
ingredients_zh: 肉蟹（推荐优先级从高到低：缅甸黑蟹、青蟹、梭子蟹、大闸蟹）
年糕（推荐硬年糕，新鲜年糕亦可）
番茄酱（没有就挤半颗番茄碾碎）
淀粉（玉米淀粉或土豆淀粉）
大蒜 20 g（如果放了虾，追加 10 g）
食用油 30-50 ml（如果放了虾，追加 10 ml；油炸另需 500 mL）
海鲜酱 15 g（替代：蚝油 12 g + 白砂糖 3 g）
黄豆酱 15 g（替代：生抽 12 ml + 老抽 2 ml + 白糖 1 g）
甜面酱 10 g（替代：白糖 5.5 g + 生抽 4 ml + 老抽 0.5 ml）
白胡椒粉 2 g（如果放了虾，追加 1 g）
啤酒 200 ml（如果放了虾，追加 50-100 ml）
清水 800 ml（如果放了虾，追加 200 ml）
ingredients_en: Meat crabs (recommended priority from high to low: Burmese black crab, blue crab, swimming crab, hairy crab)
Rice cake (hard rice cake is recommended, fresh rice cake is also acceptable)
Sweet noodle sauce (or BBQ sauce, optional)
Tomato sauce (if not available, squeeze half a tomato and crush it)
Cooking wine (can use rice wine instead)
20 g garlic (if shrimp is added, add 10 g more)
Edible oil 30-50 ml (if shrimp is added, add 10 ml; for frying, add 500 ml)
15 g hoisin sauce (substitute: 12 g oyster sauce + 3 g sugar)
15 g soybean paste (substitute: 12 ml light soy sauce + 2 ml dark soy sauce + 1 g sugar)
10 g sweet noodle sauce (substitute: 5.5 g sugar + 4 ml light soy sauce + 0.5 ml dark soy sauce)
2 g white pepper (if shrimp is added, add 1 g more)
Beer 200 ml (if shrimp is added, add 50-100 ml)
800 ml of water (if shrimp is added, add 200 ml)
steps_zh: 土豆切块为各边均为 3 cm 的立方体，青/红椒切成边长 4 cm 的菱形片，洋葱切成 3 cm 宽的月牙瓣，年糕切成 1 cm 厚片
螃蟹切成 50-80 g 的块，裹薄淀粉，180 °C 油温炸 1 分钟捞出
锅中放油，蒜姜干辣椒爆香，放所有酱料 + 冰糖小火炒出红油，注意别糊底
加螃蟹、土豆、啤酒和清水，烧开转小火炖 12 分钟
放年糕和青红椒，开大火收汁到汤汁可以附着在物品表面，最后撒白胡椒粉
steps_en: Cut the potatoes into cubes with 3 cm on each side, cut the green/red peppers into diamond-shaped slices with 4 cm on each side, cut the onions into 3 cm wide crescents, and cut the rice cakes into 1 cm thick slices.
Cut the crab into 50-80 g pieces, coat in thin starch, fry in oil at 180 °C for 1 minute and remove.
Put oil in the pot, sauté garlic, ginger, dried chili until fragrant, add all the sauces + rock sugar and stir-fry the red oil over low heat, be careful not to burn the bottom
Add crabs, potatoes, beer and water, bring to a boil and simmer for 12 minutes
Put rice cakes and green and red peppers, turn on high heat to reduce the juice until the soup can adhere to the surface of the items, and finally sprinkle with white pepper

intro_zh:
清蒸生蚝是一道原汁原味的沿海家常菜，蚝肉鲜嫩多汁，带着淡淡的海水咸香，蒜蓉与姜丝激发出清甜口感。生蚝富含优质蛋白和锌元素，能帮助提升免疫力。操作不算复杂，但掀开滚烫锅盖和处理蚝壳需要稍加小心，新手也能顺利完成。从刷洗到出锅，大约只需二十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：184 大卡
intro_en:
Steamed oysters are an authentic coastal home-cooked dish. The oyster meat is tender and juicy, with a light salty aroma of sea water, and the minced garlic and shredded ginger bring out the sweet taste. Oysters are rich in high-quality protein and zinc, which can help improve immunity. The operation is not complicated, but you need to be careful when opening the hot pot lid and handling the oyster shells, and novices can complete it smoothly. From scrubbing to taking it out of the pot, it only takes about twenty minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 184 kcal
ingredients_zh: 酱油 每个生蚝 1 ml
steps_zh: 将生蚝用刷子刷干净（没有刷子用牙刷）。
蒸锅中放水，将蒸屉放上之后，将 6 个生蚝平铺在蒸屉,使用 50%功率，蒸 3 分钟。
用右手拿着湿抹布掀开烫锅盖，将每个生蚝的外壳掀开一半去掉，生蚝的凸面向下，平面向上，每个放 1 根姜丝,10g 蒜末放到生蚝上。
关上烫锅盖，100%功率蒸 3.5 分钟。
停火，用右手拿着抹布掀开烫锅盖，每个放 5ml 酱油。
盛盘。
steps_en: Brush the oysters clean with a brush (use a toothbrush if you don't have one).
Pour water into the steamer, place the steamer tray, spread 6 oysters on the steamer tray, use 50% power, and steam for 3 minutes.

Use your right hand to hold a wet rag to open the lid of the scalding pot. Open half of the shell of each oyster and remove it. The convex side of the oyster is downward and the flat side is upward. Place 1 piece of shredded ginger and 10g of minced garlic on each oyster.
Close the lid and steam at 100% power for 3.5 minutes.
Stop the heat, hold the rag in your right hand to lift the lid of the hot pot, and put 5ml of soy sauce into each pot.
Serve on a platter.

intro_zh:
这是一道融合泰式风味的家常海鲜菜，浓郁咖喱包裹着爆满的蟹肉，带有蟹黄香气和椰浆的顺滑口感。螃蟹富含优质蛋白和多种微量元素，有助于补充体力。制作工序清晰，只需注意封煎蟹黄和最后关火翻炒酱汁，对有一定下厨经验的人比较友好，一般从备料到出锅约需 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：815 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked seafood dish that combines Thai flavors. The rich curry is wrapped in crab meat, with the aroma of crab roe and the smooth taste of coconut milk. Crab is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of trace elements, which helps to replenish physical strength. The production process is clear. You only need to pay attention to sealing and frying the crab roe and finally turning off the heat and stir-frying the sauce. It is more friendly to people with certain cooking experience. It usually takes about 30 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 815 kcal
ingredients_zh: 咖喱块（推介乐惠蟹黄咖喱）
肉蟹 1 只（大约 300g） * 份数
ingredients_en: Curry cubes 15g (a small piece)*number of servings
steps_zh: 肉蟹掀盖后对半砍开，蟹钳用刀背轻轻拍裂，切口和蟹钳蘸一下生粉，不要太多。撒 5g 生粉到蟹盖中，盖住蟹黄，备用
洋葱切成洋葱碎，备用
大蒜切碎，备用
烧一壶开水，备用
起锅烧油，倒入约 20ml 食用油，等待 10 秒让油温升高
将螃蟹切口朝下，轻轻放入锅中，煎 20 秒，这一步主要是封住蟹黄，蟹肉。然后翻面，每面煎 10 秒。煎完将螃蟹取出备用
将螃蟹盖放入锅中，使用勺子舀起锅中热油泼到蟹盖中，煎封住蟹盖中的蟹黄，煎 20 秒后取出备用
不用刷锅，再倒入 10ml 食用油，大火让油温升高至轻微冒烟，将大蒜末，洋葱碎倒入，炒 10 秒钟
将咖喱块放入锅中炒化（10 秒），放入煎好的螃蟹，翻炒均匀
倒入开水 300ml，焖煮 3 分钟。
焖煮完后，倒入椰浆和蛋清，关火，关火后不断翻炒，一直到酱汁变浓稠。
出锅
steps_en: Uncover the meat crab and cut it in half. Use the back of a knife to gently pat the crab claws into pieces. Dip the cut and crab claws into cornstarch, not too much. Sprinkle 5g cornstarch into the crab lid to cover the crab roe and set aside
Chop the onion into fine pieces and set aside
Chop garlic and set aside
Boil a pot of water and set aside
Heat oil in a pan, pour in about 20ml cooking oil, wait 10 seconds for the oil temperature to rise

Place the crab cut side down, gently put it into the pot, and fry for 20 seconds. This step is mainly to seal the crab roe and crab meat. Then flip and cook for 10 seconds on each side. After frying, take out the crabs and set aside

Put the crab lid into the pot, use a spoon to scoop up the hot oil in the pot and pour it into the crab lid. Fry to seal the crab roe in the crab lid. Fry for 20 seconds and then take it out and set aside.
Without brushing the pot, pour in 10ml of cooking oil, turn up the heat and let the oil heat up until it smokes slightly. Add the minced garlic and onion, and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
Put the curry cubes into the pot and stir-fry (10 seconds). Add the fried crabs and stir-fry evenly.
Pour in 300ml of boiling water and simmer for 3 minutes.
After simmering, pour in the coconut milk and egg white, turn off the heat, and continue to stir-fry until the sauce thickens.
Take out of the pot

intro_zh:
红烧鱼是一道家常风味浓郁的经典菜，咸鲜微甜，鱼肉嫩滑入味，属于大众喜爱的中式烧菜。鱼肉富含优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，营养易吸收。制作时需要处理生鱼和油煎，步骤稍多，对新手有一定挑战，但跟着菜谱操作也能成功。从备料到出锅，大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：570 大卡
intro_en:
Braised fish is a classic dish with a strong home-style flavor. It is salty and slightly sweet, and the fish meat is tender and delicious. It is a popular Chinese cooking dish. Fish meat is rich in high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids, and its nutrients are easy to absorb. It requires processing raw fish and frying, which requires a few steps, so it is a challenge for novices, but you can still succeed if you follow the recipe. From preparation to serving, it takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 570 kcal
ingredients_zh: 油、盐、料酒、醋、酱油、白砂糖
鱼 建议新手以一条中等大小的鲫鱼上手，提前划好花刀，方便成熟（不然鱼背上容易夹生）
姜丝，以正常老姜切 2-3 片，然后片丝即可
蒜瓣 3-4 个，拍碎或者切碎或者切片
干辣椒（依照个人口味）2-3 个，切碎
盐 10g，如果辣椒辣度高，建议多一点
葱 1-2 根，正常就撒葱花
小米椒 1-2，不放也可以，过来人的经验，最多放 2 个，不然辣度过高要菊花残。
味精，看个人口味，不要放多，5g 即可。
蚝油，5g 即可，和味精一个道理
ingredients_en: Ginger, garlic cloves, dried chili peppers
Oil, salt, cooking wine, vinegar, soy sauce, white sugar
Fish: It is recommended that novices start with a medium-sized crucian carp and cut it in advance to facilitate maturity (otherwise, the fish will easily get caught on the back)
Shredded ginger, cut 2-3 slices of normal old ginger into thin slices
3-4 garlic cloves, crushed or minced or sliced
2-3 dried chili peppers (according to personal taste), chopped
10g salt, if the chili is very spicy, a little more is recommended
1-2 green onions, normally sprinkle with chopped green onions
1-2 millet peppers, you can leave them out. Experienced experience is that you can add at most 2 peppers, otherwise the spiciness will be too high and the chrysanthemums will be broken.
MSG, it depends on personal taste, don’t add too much, 5g is enough.
Oyster sauce, 5g is enough, the same as MSG
steps_zh: 姜蒜准备好，切碎
干辣椒切碎，和姜蒜一起
加入 30-50ml 油，等待锅热...
放入**擦干水分的鱼**（不想被热油溅一身的话），然后晃动锅，用热油煎鱼，注意这过程一定要小火
将鱼翻面，重复上面油煎过程
放入姜蒜辣椒，翻炒出香味
倒入料酒，稍微多一点，此过程注意安全，会起大量油烟
倒入醋（喜欢醋可以多放一点）
然后放入白砂糖，酱油（老抽)
加入冷水，以刚好淹没鱼身为宜，然后调成中火，盖上锅盖，大概 1 分钟后将鱼翻身，继续盖上锅盖
3-4 分钟后，加入盐、小米椒、蚝油（味精、鸡精等），然后继续盖上锅盖，后续继续要翻身
当锅内汤汁收汁到鱼的脊背线上的鱼鳍下面一点点的时候（或者汤汁不多的时候），转小火，加入香菜，葱花，然后盖上锅盖 20 秒，关火
起锅
steps_en: Ginger and garlic are ready and chopped
Chop dry chilies and add ginger and garlic
Add 30-50ml oil and wait for the pan to heat...
Put in the **dried fish** (if you don’t want to be splashed with hot oil), then shake the pan and fry the fish with hot oil. Note that this process must be done over low heat.
Turn the fish over and repeat the frying process above
Add ginger, garlic and chili and stir-fry until fragrant
Pour in the cooking wine, a little more. Pay attention to safety during this process, as a lot of oily smoke will be generated.
Pour in vinegar (if you like vinegar, add more vinegar)
Then add sugar and soy sauce (dark soy sauce)
Add cold water just enough to cover the fish, then turn to medium heat and cover the pot. After about 1 minute, turn the fish over and continue to cover the pot.
After 3-4 minutes, add salt, millet pepper, oyster sauce (MSG, chicken essence, etc.), then continue to cover the pot, and continue to turn it over.

When the soup in the pot is reduced to a little bit below the fins on the back line of the fish (or when there is not much soup), turn to low heat, add coriander and chopped green onion, then cover the pot for 20 seconds and turn off the heat.
Start the pot

intro_zh:
水煮鱼是一道麻辣鲜香、鱼肉嫩滑的经典川菜。巴沙鱼富含优质蛋白且脂肪含量低，搭配时令蔬菜营养均衡。做法中等难度，对新手有一定挑战，但按步骤操作也能成功。预计制作时长约 2 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：248 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled fish is a classic Sichuan dish with spicy, fragrant and tender fish meat. Pangasius is rich in high-quality protein and low in fat. It is nutritionally balanced when paired with seasonal vegetables. The method is of medium difficulty and may pose a challenge to novices, but you can still succeed if you follow the steps. Estimated production time is approximately 2 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 248 kcal
ingredients_zh: 蔬菜（比如土豆片/豆芽/花菜/生菜/……）
蔬菜（比如土豆片/豆芽/花菜/生菜/……） 可有不同搭配，推荐合计重量 300g 至 500g
红油豆瓣酱 40g （不怕辣想多加红油就多加 10 至 20g）
ingredients_en: Vegetables (such as potato chips/bean sprouts/cauliflower/lettuce/…) can be combined in different ways, and the recommended total weight is 300g to 500g
40g red oil bean paste (if you are not afraid of spicy food and want to add more red oil, add 10 to 20g more)
steps_zh: 准备：巴沙鱼若是从冷冻柜里取出，需要放室温自然解冻 5 小时再做切片处理。
切片：巴沙鱼撇成薄片，约 5cm 长，3cm 宽。
[腌制](../../tips/learn/学习腌.md)：将切好片的巴沙鱼放入大不锈钢碗中
加入 30g 豆瓣酱，3g 盐，10ml 藤椒油，3g 白胡椒粉
用手抓匀后加入 5ml 菜籽油收尾封住口味
常温静置至少 30 分钟入味。
备菜：大蒜切成蒜末。以 300g 花菜，200g 生菜为例，将花菜与生菜洗净。
焯水与炒菜：花菜[开水锅焯水](../../tips/learn/学习焯水.md)备用；将生菜洗净晾干，炒熟备用（不用放油）。
炒豆瓣酱：热锅冷油（菜籽油 20ml），加入 10g 豆瓣酱，10g 豆豉（可选），加入蒜末，**中火**慢炒。
汆鱼片：加入 150ml 热水，水很快开后加入腌制好的鱼片，轻轻翻动让鱼片在水中散开，加入 2g 盐和 2g 糖调味（此时可根据个人口味调整盐的用量）。水再次沸腾后即可盛盘。
盛盘：先将熟的蔬菜盛至大碗中，然后将热的鱼片盛在蔬菜上面，浇上锅中剩余热汤即可！
steps_en: Preparation: If the pangasius fish is taken out of the freezer, it needs to be defrosted naturally at room temperature for 5 hours before slicing.
Slice: Cut pangasius into thin slices, about 5cm long and 3cm wide.
[Marinated](../../tips/learn/learn marinated.md): Put the sliced pangasius into a large stainless steel bowl
Add 30g bean paste, 3g salt, 10ml vine pepper oil, 3g white pepper
Grip it evenly with your hands and add 5ml of rapeseed oil to seal the taste.
Let sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes to absorb the flavour.
Preparation: Chop the garlic into minced pieces. Take 300g of cauliflower and 200g of lettuce as an example. Wash the cauliflower and lettuce.
Blanching and stir-frying: Cauliflower [blanch in a pot of boiling water](../../tips/learn/learnblanch.md) and set aside; wash and dry the lettuce, stir-fry and set aside (no need to add oil).
Fried bean paste: Heat a pan with cold oil (rapeseed oil 20ml), add 10g bean paste, 10g tempeh (optional), add minced garlic, **medium heat** and stir-fry slowly.

Braised fish fillets: Add 150ml hot water. When the water boils quickly, add the marinated fish fillets. Gently turn the fish fillets to spread in the water. Add 2g salt and 2g sugar to taste (you can adjust the amount of salt according to personal taste at this time). Once the water boils again it is ready to serve.
Serving: First put the cooked vegetables into a large bowl, then put the hot fish fillets on top of the vegetables, and pour the remaining hot soup in the pot!

intro_zh:
响油鳝丝是一道经典的江浙沪家常菜，鳝丝鲜嫩滑爽，蒜香浓郁，酱汁微甜，淋上热猪油后香气四溢，非常下饭。鳝鱼富含优质蛋白和 DHA，营养丰富。这道菜对刀工和火候有一定要求，难度适中，新手需要稍加练习。从备料到出锅，一般 大约 40 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：556 大卡
intro_en:
Xiangyou shredded eel is a classic home-cooked dish from Jiangsu, Zhejiang and Shanghai. The shredded eel is tender and smooth, rich in garlic aroma, and the sauce is slightly sweet. When topped with hot lard, it is fragrant and goes very well with rice. Eel is rich in high-quality protein and DHA and is rich in nutrients. This dish requires certain knife skills and heat. It is moderately difficult and requires a little practice for novices. From preparation to cooking, it usually takes about 40 minutes to have it on the table.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 556 kcal
steps_zh: 将鳝鱼切成三段后切成细丝
加入 0.5 g 胡椒粉、3 g 料酒搅拌均匀，再加入 5 g 香油腌制
热油滑锅
加入植物油，烧到 6 成热
加入一半蒜末和全部姜末，翻炒几下
加入鳝丝，中火爆炒 30 秒
边缘淋入 10 g 料酒，翻炒几下
加入生抽，炒匀
加入蚝油、老抽，翻炒几下
加入食用盐、白糖、3 g 胡椒粉，炒匀
淀粉和水混合为水淀粉，倒入锅中，收汁至浓稠
装盘，撒上蒜蓉、葱花
另起锅烧热，加入猪油，烧至七成热，浇在鳝丝上
steps_en: Cut the eel into three sections and then cut into thin strips
Add 0.5 g pepper and 3 g cooking wine, mix well, then add 5 g sesame oil to marinate
Hot oil pan
Add vegetable oil and heat to 60%
Add half of the minced garlic and all of the minced ginger, stir-fry a few times
Add shredded eel and sauté over medium heat for 30 seconds
Pour 10 g of cooking wine on the edge and stir-fry a few times
Add light soy sauce and stir well
Add oyster sauce and dark soy sauce, stir-fry a few times
Add salt, sugar, 3 g pepper and stir well
Mix starch and water to form water starch, pour it into the pot, and reduce the juice until it becomes thick.
Serve on a plate and sprinkle with minced garlic and chopped green onion.
Heat up another pan, add lard, heat until 70% hot, pour on shredded eel

intro_zh:
这道菜是浙江平湖地区的秋日限定咸鲜风味，蟹黄绵润裹着酱香，蟹肉清甜，汤汁拌饭一绝。富含优质蛋白和微量元素。难度适中，适合有基础的新手，从准备到出锅大约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：468 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is a salty and fresh flavor that is limited to autumn in the Pinghu area of Zhejiang. The crab roe is soft and moist with the aroma of soy sauce, the crab meat is sweet, and the soup is perfect with rice. Rich in high-quality protein and trace elements. The difficulty is moderate and suitable for beginners with basic knowledge. It takes about 30 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 468 kcal
ingredients_zh: 螃蟹（首选河蟹，次选梭子蟹）
菜油（未脱色的菜籽油，俗称“毛菜油”或“土菜油”，备选花生油）
螃蟹 500 g（约 3-4 只中等河蟹）
ingredients_en: Crab (river crab is the first choice, swimming crab is the second choice)
Rapeseed oil (unbleached rapeseed oil, commonly known as "mao rapeseed oil" or "native rapeseed oil", peanut oil is an alternative)
steps_zh: 把螃蟹刷洗干净，然后在砧板上对半劈开
锅里下菜油，放入姜末和豆瓣酱爆香，加入冰糖炒化，直到冒小气泡就盛出
在盘子里铺上一层酱，然后把切好的螃蟹切开面朝下，整齐排放在酱上
放点葱段和姜片，建议敲个鸡蛋或在盘底铺肉末
上锅蒸 10-12 分钟
steps_en: Brush the crabs clean and cut them in half on a cutting board
Add vegetable oil to the pot, add minced ginger and bean paste and stir-fry until fragrant, add rock sugar and stir-fry until small bubbles appear and serve.
Spread a layer of sauce on the plate, then place the sliced crabs cut side down and arrange them neatly on the sauce
Put some green onions and ginger slices. It is recommended to crack an egg or spread minced meat on the bottom of the plate.
Steam for 10-12 minutes

name_en: Microwave Scallion and Ginger Black Cod
intro_zh:
微波做鱼，葱姜提鲜，热油一淋，香气四溢，是一道肉质细嫩、滋味咸鲜的家常蒸鱼菜，属于改良粤式做法。黑鳕鱼富含优质蛋白和欧米伽-3 脂肪酸，对心脑健康有益。操作不算复杂，但需掌握火候和油温，更适合有一定下厨经验的朋友。从备料到上桌大约只需二十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：749 大卡
intro_en:
Cook the fish in the microwave, add onion and ginger to freshen it up, then drizzle it with hot oil and the aroma will be overflowing. It is a home-style steamed fish dish with tender meat and salty taste. It is an improved Cantonese style recipe. Black cod is rich in high-quality protein and omega-3 fatty acids, which are good for heart and brain health. The operation is not complicated, but you need to master the heat and oil temperature. It is more suitable for friends with some cooking experience. It only takes about twenty minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 749 kcal
ingredients_zh: 黑鳕鱼，带皮，2 片，450g（本菜谱主角，所有调料可根据鳕鱼的实际重量进行比例调整）
ingredients_en: Black cod, skin on, 2 slices, 450g (the protagonist of this recipe, all seasonings can be adjusted according to the actual weight of the cod)
steps_zh: 鱼片分别放入密封袋，鱼皮向下放在盘子中。
取葱白切丝 25g，姜去皮后切丝，10g，混合在一起后分成两半，分别放在袋内鱼片上。
每个袋子倒入 2.5mL 料酒。
封好密封袋，放入微波炉中，中火（800 瓦）微波至*不透明且容易散开*时（约 3.5-5 分钟），从袋中取出鱼片。
去除青葱和姜。
取酱油 25mL，芝麻油 2mL，混合均匀后平均淋在两片鱼片上。
取葱绿切细丝 10g，姜去皮后切丝 3g，混合后分成两份撒在鱼片上。
取花生油 50mL，在小锅中加热至 190℃。
将热油淋到放油葱绿的鱼片上，立刻上桌。
steps_en: Place fish fillets in separate ziplock bags, skin side down on a plate.
Take 25g of scallions and shred them, peel and shred 10g of ginger, mix them together and divide them into two halves and place them on the fish fillets in the bag.
Pour 2.5mL of cooking wine into each bag.
Seal the ziplock bag and microwave on medium heat (800 watts) until opaque and easy to spread* (about 3.5-5 minutes). Remove the fillets from the bag.
Remove shallots and ginger.
Take 25mL of soy sauce and 2mL of sesame oil, mix evenly and pour evenly on the two fish fillets.
Cut 10g green onions into thin strips, peel and cut 3g ginger into thin strips, mix and divide into two portions and sprinkle on the fish fillets.
Take 50mL of peanut oil and heat it to 190℃ in a small pot.
Pour the hot oil over the green fish fillets and serve immediately.

intro_zh:
香煎翘嘴鱼是一道风味浓郁的家常河鲜，鱼身经腌晒后干香紧实，煎至外皮金黄酥脆，肉质细腻咸鲜，带着豆瓣与青椒的微辣回甜。鱼肉富含优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，营养易吸收。制作需要提前腌晒两到四天，烹饪时间约半小时，煎鱼时需耐心控火，对新手稍有挑战，但成菜后香气扑鼻，格外下饭。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：820 大卡
intro_en:
Pan-fried fish is a home-cooked river fish with rich flavor. The fish body is dried and firm after being pickled and sun-fried until the skin is golden and crispy. The meat is delicate and salty, with a slightly spicy and sweet taste from watercress and green pepper. Fish meat is rich in high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids, and its nutrients are easy to absorb. It needs to be marinated and sun-dried for two to four days in advance, and the cooking time is about half an hour. When frying the fish, you need to be patient and control the fire. It is a little challenging for novices, but the aroma is fragrant when it is ready, and it is especially delicious with rice.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 820 kcal
ingredients_zh: 翘嘴鱼（肉食性鱼类，肉细腻，口感好）
老抽：2ml（不太喜欢重口的可以不放）
干辣椒：4-6 个（根据个人口味选择）
ingredients_en: Squid (carnivorous fish, delicate meat, good taste)
Dark soy sauce: 2ml (if you don’t like the heavy flavor, you can leave it out)
Dried chilies: 4-6 (choose according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 鱼开背杀好（让卖鱼的杀好，千万不要剖腹杀鱼，切记是开背），清洗干净
鱼表面用盐涂抹均匀，倒入料酒约 80ml,姜末 20g，放入冰箱保鲜层进行腌制 1-2 天
取出腌制好的鱼，用绳挂起晾晒至半干（约 1-2 天，具体时间需结合气温与阳光）
食用前请将鱼用清水清洗，沥干水分（防止水遇油飞溅）
开大火将锅烧热，迅速改小火，锅中放油，尽量保持整个锅表面有油，将鱼沿锅边划入锅内（先煎鱼背面）
鱼入锅后（和翻面后），不要着急移动鱼的位置（此时容易破皮），煎约 30 秒后，尝试晃动锅
背面煎约 1 分钟后，翻面煎约 1-2 分钟，煎至两面金黄
等两面都煎好时，把鱼推向锅边一点，留点空间放入豆瓣酱炒香味，放入姜蒜，
炒出佐料香味后，加入料酒，生抽，老抽，倒入热水，水量和鱼平齐或者少点
此时改中大火，煮 5-10 分钟，后放入青椒断，白糖，鸡精，十三香，陈醋
改小火 2-5 分钟，放入葱，香菜，即可出锅
steps_en: Kill the fish with its back open (let the fish seller kill it, never kill it by dissection, remember to open its back) and clean it
Spread salt evenly on the surface of the fish, pour about 80ml of cooking wine and 20g of minced ginger, and put it in the refrigerator to marinate for 1-2 days.
Take out the marinated fish and hang it on a rope to dry until it is semi-dry (about 1-2 days, the specific time depends on the temperature and sunlight)
Please wash the fish with clean water and drain it before eating (to prevent water from splashing with oil)

Turn on high heat and heat the pot, quickly reduce the heat to low, put oil in the pot, try to keep the entire surface of the pot covered with oil, put the fish into the pot along the edge of the pot (fry the back of the fish first)
After the fish is put into the pot (and after flipped over), do not move the fish in a hurry (the skin will easily break at this time). After frying for about 30 seconds, try shaking the pot.
After frying the back side for about 1 minute, turn over and fry for about 1-2 minutes until both sides are golden brown.
When both sides are fried, push the fish to the edge of the pot a little, leave some space, add bean paste and stir-fry until fragrant, add ginger and garlic,
After the seasonings are fragrant, add cooking wine, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and pour hot water. The amount of water should be equal to or less than the fish.
At this time, change to medium-high heat and cook for 5-10 minutes, then add chopped green pepper, sugar, chicken essence, thirteen spices, and mature vinegar.
Reduce heat to low for 2-5 minutes, add onions and coriander, and serve
images: dishes/aquatic/香煎翘嘴鱼/香煎翘嘴鱼.jpeg
file_path: dishes/aquatic/香煎翘嘴鱼/香煎翘嘴鱼.md

intro_zh:
鳊鱼炖豆腐是一道家常红烧菜，鱼肉鲜嫩入味，豆腐饱吸汤汁，咸鲜微辣。鳊鱼富含优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，豆腐则提供植物蛋白和钙质，搭配起来营养均衡。制作难度适中，煎鱼时稍需耐心防粘，整体步骤清晰，新手也能尝试。从备料到完成约需 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：524 大卡
intro_en:
Braised bream with tofu is a home-style braised dish. The fish is tender and tasty, the tofu is full of soup, salty and slightly spicy. Bream is rich in high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids, while tofu provides plant protein and calcium, making the combination nutritionally balanced. The difficulty of making it is moderate, and you need a little patience to prevent it from sticking when frying the fish. The overall steps are clear, and even novices can try it. It takes about 40 minutes from prep to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 524 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鳊鱼（鱼可以让摊主帮忙处理好）
干辣椒（不吃辣可以不放）
老抽：2ml（不太喜欢重口的可以不放）
干辣椒：4-6 个（根据个人口味选择）
盐：5-8 克（根据个人口味选择）
ingredients_en: Bream (the fish can be handled by the stall owner for help)
Dried chili pepper (you can omit it if you don’t like spicy food)
Dark soy sauce: 2ml (if you don’t like the heavy flavor, you can leave it out)
Dried chilies: 4-6 (choose according to personal taste)
Salt: 5-8 grams (choose according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 鳊鱼改刀,放上姜片和料酒腌制 5-10 分钟
老豆腐切块后放入水中备用
锅中加油，可以放点盐在锅里，防止煎鱼的时候粘锅，把腌制的鱼用厨房纸擦干水分，把鱼放到锅中，两面都煎一下
等两面都煎好时，把鱼推向锅边一点，留点空间放入葱姜蒜，干辣椒，香叶，八角炒出味道
炒出佐料香味后，加入料酒，生抽，老抽，冰糖，桂皮，倒入热水，水量和鱼平齐或者少点
大火烧开后，放入老豆腐，豆腐贴在锅边，加入食盐，转小火
小火烧 10-15 分钟，然后大火收点汁，即可出锅
steps_en: Cut the bream into a knife, marinate with ginger slices and cooking wine for 5-10 minutes
Cut the old tofu into pieces and put it into water for later use.

Add oil to the pot. You can put some salt in the pot to prevent the fish from sticking to the pot when frying. Dry the marinated fish with kitchen paper, put the fish into the pot, and fry both sides.

When both sides are fried, push the fish to the side of the pot a little, leave some space and add onions, ginger, garlic, dried chili peppers, bay leaves, and star anise to stir-fry until the flavor develops.
After the condiments are fragrant, add cooking wine, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, rock sugar, cinnamon, and pour in hot water. The amount of water should be equal to or less than the fish.
After the fire comes to a boil, add the old tofu. The tofu sticks to the edge of the pot. Add salt and turn to low heat.
Simmer over low heat for 10-15 minutes, then use high heat to reduce some juice and serve.
images: dishes/aquatic/鳊鱼炖豆腐/鳊鱼炖豆腐.jpg
file_path: dishes/aquatic/鳊鱼炖豆腐/鳊鱼炖豆腐.md

intro_zh:
这道菜麻辣鲜香，虾肉细嫩多汁，是经典的川湘风味下酒菜，在家自制干净又实惠。小龙虾富含优质蛋白和多种微量元素，但汤汁含油盐较多，适合偶尔享用。处理活虾和多种香料对新手有一定挑战，不过不去虾线可明显降低难度。从备料到出锅大约需要 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：571 大卡
intro_en:
This dish is spicy and fragrant, and the shrimp meat is tender and juicy. It is a classic Sichuan and Hunan style dish for drinking. It is clean and affordable to make at home. Crayfish is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of trace elements, but the soup contains more oil and salt, so it is suitable for occasional enjoyment. Handling live shrimp and a variety of spices can be challenging for novices, but not deveining the shrimp can significantly reduce the difficulty. It takes about 45 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 571 kcal
ingredients_zh: 油 = 70 毫升（这是平时炒菜 3 倍量）
ingredients_en: Oil = 70 ml (this is 3 times the usual amount for cooking)
steps_zh: 小龙虾刷干净去虾线，葱切 2cm 葱段，姜蒜切末。
烧油，油微热, 下香叶、八角、桂皮、青花椒、花椒、子弹头辣椒。
香料出香气之后下锅葱姜蒜
葱姜蒜爆香后，加入郫县豆瓣、黄豆酱，炒出红油。
下小龙虾，翻炒至变色。
加入啤酒，等啤酒烧开后加入生抽，盐。
将小龙虾完全煮熟后出锅。
steps_en: Brush the crayfish clean and remove the shrimp lines, cut the green onions into 2cm pieces, and mince the ginger and garlic.
Heat the oil slightly, add bay leaves, star anise, cinnamon, green peppercorns, Sichuan peppercorns, and bullet peppers.
After the spices are fragrant, add onion, ginger and garlic to the pot
After the onion, ginger and garlic are sauteed, add Pixian bean paste and soybean paste, and stir-fry until red oil is produced.
Add the crayfish and stir-fry until it changes color.
Add beer, wait until the beer boils and add light soy sauce and salt.
Cook the crayfish completely and remove from the pan.

intro_zh:
蒜香黄油虾是一道经典的西式海鲜菜，虾肉鲜嫩弹牙，被浓郁的蒜香和黄油包裹，带有淡淡柠檬清香。虾肉富含优质蛋白，搭配黄油提供能量，适合快速补充营养。做法简单，只需几种常见食材，新手也能轻松上手，从备料到出锅大约二十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：526 大卡
intro_en:
Garlic butter shrimp is a classic Western seafood dish. The shrimp meat is tender and chewy, wrapped in rich garlic and butter, with a light lemon fragrance. Shrimp meat is rich in high-quality protein, and when paired with butter, it provides energy and is suitable for quick nutritional supplements. The recipe is simple and only requires a few common ingredients. Even novices can easily get started. It takes about 20 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 526 kcal
ingredients_zh: 大虾（推荐黑虎虾或基围虾）
ingredients_en: Prawns (black tiger prawns or prawns recommended)
steps_zh: 大虾去头去壳留尾，用牙签挑去虾线，洗净后用厨房纸吸干水分
大蒜切成蒜末，备用
中火加热平底锅，放入 10ml 橄榄油
油热后放入大虾，每面煎 1-1.5 分钟至变色，取出备用
同一锅中加入黄油，融化后放入蒜末，小火炒香（约 30 秒）
如使用白葡萄酒，此时加入并煮至酒精挥发（约 1 分钟）
将虾放回锅中，与蒜香黄油酱汁翻炒均匀（约 1 分钟）
挤入柠檬汁，翻炒均匀后立即关火
装盘，淋上锅中剩余酱汁
steps_en: Remove the heads, shells and tails of the prawns, pick out the shrimp lines with toothpicks, wash them and absorb the water with kitchen paper.
Chop the garlic into minced pieces and set aside
Heat a pan over medium heat and add 10ml olive oil
When the oil is hot, add the prawns and fry for 1-1.5 minutes on each side until they change color. Remove and set aside.
Add butter to the same pan, add minced garlic after melting, stir-fry over low heat until fragrant (about 30 seconds)
If using white wine, add it at this point and cook until the alcohol evaporates (about 1 minute)
Return the shrimp to the pan and stir-fry with the garlic butter sauce (about 1 minute)
Squeeze in the lemon juice, stir well and turn off the heat immediately
Plate and pour remaining sauce on the pan
file_path: dishes/aquatic/蒜香黄油虾/蒜香黄油虾.md

intro_zh:
白灼虾是一道粤式经典快手菜，虾肉鲜甜弹嫩，原汁原味。虾本身富含优质蛋白和多种矿物质，搭配蘸料开胃不油腻。做法简单容错率高，对新手非常友好，从备料到出锅大约只需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：519 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled shrimp is a classic Cantonese quick-serve dish. The shrimp meat is sweet, tender and authentic. The shrimp itself is rich in high-quality protein and various minerals, and it is appetizing and not greasy when paired with dipping sauces. The method is simple, highly error-tolerant, and very friendly to novices. It only takes about 15 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 519 kcal
ingredients_zh: 虾 250g * 份数（建议 1-2 人份）
ingredients_en: Shrimp 250g * number of servings (recommended for 1-2 people)
steps_zh: 洋葱切小块，姜切片，平铺平底锅。
活虾冲洗一下（去除虾线、剪刀减掉虾腿虾须子都是可选操作），控水，铺在平底锅的洋葱、姜片之上。
锅内倒入料酒，盖上锅盖，中火 1 分钟，小火 5 分钟，关火 5 分钟。
和上一步并行操作，制作蘸料：
虾出锅，用干净的盘子装好。
steps_en: Cut the onion into small pieces, slice the ginger, and lay them flat on the pan.
Rinse the live shrimps (removing the shrimp lines and trimming the shrimp legs and slivers with scissors are optional), control the water, and place them on the onions and ginger slices in the pan.
Pour cooking wine into the pot, cover the pot, turn on medium heat for 1 minute, low heat for 5 minutes, and turn off the heat for 5 minutes.
Operate in parallel with the previous step to make the dipping sauce:
Remove the shrimp from the pan and place on a clean plate.

name_en: Grilled sea cucumber with green onion
intro_zh:
这是一道经典的鲁菜家常烧制海味，以浓郁的葱香和软糯入味的海参为特色，汤汁稠亮咸鲜回甜。海参富含胶原蛋白与多种微量元素，对滋养身体很有益处。整体烹饪难度不高，但需提前花时间将干海参充分泡发，实际烧制过程约三十分钟即可完成，新手只要按步骤操作也容易成功。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：299 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic Shandong cuisine home-cooked seafood, characterized by the strong aroma of green onions and soft and glutinous sea cucumbers. The soup is thick, bright, salty, fresh and sweet. Sea cucumbers are rich in collagen and a variety of trace elements, which are very beneficial to nourishing the body. The overall cooking difficulty is not high, but you need to spend time in advance to fully soak the dried sea cucumber. The actual cooking process can be completed in about thirty minutes. Novices can easily succeed as long as they follow the steps.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 299 kcal
ingredients_zh: 泡发好的海参![海参](./海参.jpeg)
泡发好的海参（北极参） 4 个
大葱葱白 1 根大葱的葱白即可
ingredients_en: White scallions. Just the white scallions of 1 green onion.
steps_zh: 葱白切成 1cm 的段，备用。
海参切成 1cm 的段，备用。
准备一个空碗，倒入 20g 蚝油， 10g 生抽， 2g 白糖，搅拌均匀。
另一个空碗倒入淀粉，水，制备水淀粉，勾芡用。
热锅，锅内放入 20ml - 25ml 食用油。等待 10 秒让油温升高。
放入葱白，调*小火*，注意不要让葱白变焦。大概煎 3-5 分钟即可。
用筷子夹出葱白，放入盘中备用。
倒入调好的料汁，炒香，**等待 1 - 2 分钟** 。
放入切好的海参，翻炒 1 分钟
加入 100 ml 的水， 中小火， **等待 5 分钟**
等待锅中汤汁快干的时候，加入水淀粉，加入前面取出的葱白
在外观*呈粘稠状态*后关火，盛盘
steps_en: Cut green onions into 1cm sections and set aside.
Cut the sea cucumber into 1cm sections and set aside.
Prepare an empty bowl, pour 20g oyster sauce, 10g light soy sauce, 2g sugar, and stir evenly.
Pour starch and water into another empty bowl to prepare water starch for thickening.
Heat the pot and put 20ml - 25ml cooking oil in the pot. Wait 10 seconds for the oil to heat up.
Add the scallions and turn down the heat to *low*, being careful not to let the scallions burn. Fry for about 3-5 minutes.
Use chopsticks to pick out the white scallions and put them on a plate and set aside.
Pour in the prepared sauce, stir-fry until fragrant, **wait 1 - 2 minutes**.
Add the sliced sea cucumber and stir-fry for 1 minute
Add 100 ml of water, turn to medium-low heat, **wait 5 minutes**
When the soup in the pot is almost dry, add water starch and add the green onion taken out earlier.
When it looks *sticky*, turn off the heat and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
蛏抱蛋是福建福州一带的传统家常菜，蛏肉裹着蛋液煎得外酥里嫩，带着洋葱和生抽的咸鲜香气。蛏子富含优质蛋白和锌、铁等微量元素，与鸡蛋搭配营养均衡。制作难度适中，需掌握煎炸火候但步骤不繁琐，预计 大约 30 分钟就能端上餐桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1229 大卡
intro_en:
Razor clam egg is a traditional home-cooked dish in Fuzhou, Fujian. The razor clam meat is wrapped in egg liquid and fried until it is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with the salty aroma of onions and light soy sauce. Razor clams are rich in high-quality protein and trace elements such as zinc and iron. They are nutritionally balanced when paired with eggs. The preparation is moderately difficult and requires mastery of the frying temperature, but the steps are not complicated. You can expect it to be on the table in about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1229 kcal
steps_zh: 烧开水，将蛏子放入水中，水煮 2 分钟后，捞上来去壳，放入大碗
往大碗中加入洋葱、生抽、料酒、鸡精、生粉后，充分搅拌
往大碗中打入 2 个 鸡蛋，继续搅拌
起锅烧油，倒入碗中蛏子，煎炸至单面金黄后，翻面继续煎炸
steps_en: Boil water, put razor clams into the water, boil for 2 minutes, remove the shells, and put them into a large bowl
Add onions, light soy sauce, cooking wine, chicken essence, and cornstarch to a large bowl and stir thoroughly.
Crack 2 eggs into a large bowl and continue mixing
Heat oil in a pan, pour razor clams into the bowl, fry until golden brown on one side, then turn over and continue frying

intro_zh:
这道鲁菜经典以咸甜交融的酱汁包裹整虾，成菜红亮油润，虾肉紧实弹嫩。虾本身富含优质蛋白与虾青素，脂肪含量低，是补充营养又不易增加负担的食材。制作时需要炼葱油、剪虾、焖烧、收汁，对火候和调味把握有一定要求，更适合有基础的厨友尝试，全程大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：584 大卡
intro_en:
This Shandong classic dish uses a salty and sweet sauce to wrap whole shrimps. The finished dish is bright red and oily, and the shrimp meat is firm and tender. Shrimp itself is rich in high-quality protein and astaxanthin, and has low fat content. It is a nutritional supplement without adding burden. The preparation requires refining scallion oil, cutting shrimps, stewing, and collecting juice. There are certain requirements for heat and seasoning. It is more suitable for experienced cooks. The whole process takes about 40 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 584 kcal
ingredients_en: Cooking wine, salt, rock sugar, vegetable oil
steps_zh: 剪虾枪到根上，虾须虾爪都剪掉，沙包挑掉，开背虾线挑出来，洗净备用
炸料油
下油，虾摆放整齐，两面变色后轻轻摁虾头
大火烧开转小火盖盖子闷（中途不能再加汤水，不要开盖）
皮亮虾弯就可以起锅，虾摆盘
收汁（过滤后倒回锅里收浓，放葱油 ） 汤汁剩余 1/4 时。
浇汁
完成
开吃✅
steps_en: Cut the shrimp to the root, cut off all the tentacles and claws, remove the sandbags, pick out the open back shrimp line, wash and set aside
frying oil
Add oil, arrange the shrimps neatly, and gently press the heads of the shrimps after both sides change color.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then lower the heat to low and cover with a lid to simmer (do not add more soup in the middle, and do not open the lid)
Once the skin is bright and the shrimps are bent, you can start the pot and arrange the shrimps on the plate.
Collect the juice (filter and pour it back into the pot to thicken, add scallion oil) when 1/4 of the soup remains.
pour juice
Complete
Start eating✅

intro_zh:
葱油桂鱼是一道葱香浓郁、鱼肉鲜嫩的家常蒸菜，属于中式清淡口味，适合各地人群。桂鱼富含优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，经过精细去腥处理，保留了鱼肉的鲜美与营养。做法对新手十分友好，容错性高，只要按步骤操作，基本零失败。从备料到出锅，全程大约需要 45 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：311 大卡
intro_en:
Mandarin fish with scallion oil is a home-style steamed dish with rich onion aroma and fresh fish meat. It has a light Chinese taste and is suitable for people from all over the world. Mandarin fish is rich in high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids. It has been carefully processed to remove the fishy smell, retaining the deliciousness and nutrition of the fish meat. The method is very friendly to novices and has high fault tolerance. As long as you follow the steps, there is basically no failure. From preparation to serving, the whole process takes about 45 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 311 kcal
ingredients_zh: 塑料盘或塑料盆（腌鱼用）
蒸鱼盘子（能平放下一条鱼即可）
防烫盘夹（或者防烫手套）
ingredients_en: Plastic plate or basin (for pickled fish)
Steamed fish plate (just enough to hold one fish flat)
steps_zh: 去菜市场买已经处理好的鱼（自己处理的话最好不要内脏），将鱼身表面的所有鳞片刮干净
用厨房用纸将鱼肚子里的贴骨血和黑膜擦干净（帖骨血会影响口感，黑膜是鱼腥味的来源）
用菜刀在鱼身表面来回刮几次，将鱼身的黏液刮掉，进一步去除腥味，然后用清水将鱼内外冲洗干净
将鱼平放在砧板，使用厨房纸将鱼内外的水分擦干，然后鱼头朝左，尾朝右，从鱼鳃边开始，每隔 3cm 纵向划一刀，深度达到鱼的脊椎骨即可，另一面使用同样的处理方式
将鱼平放在盆中，确保盘中没有多余水分
取一块 50g 姜（鸡蛋大小），用削皮刀把表面的皮去除并洗干净，然后切成厚度为 3mm 的姜片
将小米辣洗干净、去蒂，切成厚度为 2mm 的小圆片（或切成 1mm 宽度的丝状）
将小葱洗干净，去除根须，切成 3cm 的小段，稍微粗一点的小葱，可以沿着小葱生长的方向沿中间劈开
加入 8g 盐，25g 料酒到盆中，带上一次性手套，然后对鱼进行全身按摩 1 分钟，确保鱼身每个部位都均匀涂抹了盐和料酒
按摩好鱼后，在鱼身的每一个刀口中塞入一片姜片，鱼肚子中放入 3 片姜片，腌制 10 分钟（建议不要腌制太久，否则鱼的鲜度降低）
在鱼腌制期间，在蒸锅中加入 5L 清水，烧开后，在蒸锅上放上蒸笼
鱼腌制好后，会析出水分，将多余水分和腌制用料酒、姜片倒掉，用清水冲洗干净鱼身和鱼肚，用厨房纸擦干鱼身和鱼肚
将鱼平放在蒸鱼盘中，重新在鱼身、鱼肚刀口处塞入姜片
然后将蒸鱼盘放入蒸笼中，盖上盖子，中火蒸 20 分钟
期间水蒸气会附着整个鱼和盘子上，凝结后形成鱼汤，出锅后千万不要倒掉这个汤，这个汤汁是鲜味精华
用防烫夹将蒸鱼盘夹出，在鱼身和鱼周围淋上 10g 蒸鱼豉油
然后在鱼身和周围均匀撒上小葱段和小米辣
在铁锅中倒入 15g 植物油，用中小火慢熬 5 分钟，不要用大火，否则油会挥发很快
将出锅后的热油均匀地慢慢地淋在鱼身上，鲜掉眉毛的葱油桂鱼就出炉啦！
steps_en: Go to the wet market to buy fish that has been processed (if you process it yourself, it is best not to remove the internal organs), and scrape off all the scales on the surface of the fish.
Use kitchen paper to wipe off the blood and black film in the fish's belly (the blood on the bone will affect the taste, and the black film is the source of the fishy smell)

Use a kitchen knife to scrape the surface of the fish back and forth several times to remove the mucus from the fish to further remove the fishy smell. Then rinse the fish inside and out with clean water.

Place the fish flat on the cutting board, use kitchen paper to dry the water inside and outside the fish, then turn the fish head to the left and tail to the right. Starting from the gills, make a cut lengthwise every 3cm until the depth reaches the backbone of the fish. Use the same treatment method on the other side.
Place the fish flat in the basin, making sure there is no excess water in the dish
Take a 50g piece of ginger (the size of an egg), use a paring knife to remove the skin on the surface and wash it, then cut it into 3mm thick slices.
Wash the millet, remove the stems, and cut into small discs with a thickness of 2mm (or cut into 1mm wide strips)
Wash the shallots, remove the roots, and cut them into 3cm pieces. For slightly thicker shallots, you can split them in the middle along the direction of the growth of the shallots.

Add 8g salt and 25g cooking wine to the basin, put on disposable gloves, and then massage the whole body of the fish for 1 minute to ensure that every part of the fish body is evenly coated with salt and cooking wine

After massaging the fish, stuff a slice of ginger into each incision of the fish body, put 3 slices of ginger into the belly of the fish, and marinate for 10 minutes (it is recommended not to marinate for too long, otherwise the freshness of the fish will be reduced)
While the fish is marinating, add 5L of water to the steamer, bring it to a boil, and place a steamer basket on the steamer

After the fish is marinated, water will precipitate. Pour away the excess water, cooking wine and ginger slices, rinse the fish body and fish maw with clean water, and dry the fish body and fish maw with kitchen paper.
Place the fish flat on the steamed fish plate, and stuff the ginger slices into the fish body and the incision of the fish belly.
Then put the steamed fish tray into the steamer, cover it, and steam over medium heat for 20 minutes

During this period, the water vapor will adhere to the entire fish and the plate, and condense to form fish soup. Do not pour out the soup after it is out of the pot. This soup is the essence of umami.
Use anti-scalding clips to take out the steamed fish plate and pour 10g of steamed fish soy sauce on and around the fish.
Then sprinkle green onions and millet pepper evenly around the fish body and surrounding area
Pour 15g of vegetable oil into the iron pot and simmer for 5 minutes over medium-low heat. Do not use high heat, otherwise the oil will evaporate quickly.
Pour the hot oil evenly and slowly over the fish, and the fresh mandarin fish with scallion oil is ready!

intro_zh:
阳朔啤酒鱼是广西阳朔的地方名菜，选用漓江鲜鱼带鳞煎制，以啤酒代水焖煮，鱼鳞酥脆、鱼肉鲜嫩，啤酒香与番茄微酸交融，风味浓郁独特。鱼肉富含优质蛋白和矿物质，搭配番茄、辣椒，维生素丰富且开胃助食。制作难度中等，对新手稍具挑战，但跟着步骤操作也能成功，预计 30 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：1092 大卡
intro_en:
Yangshuo Beer Fish is a famous local dish in Yangshuo, Guangxi. It is made from fresh fish with scales from the Li River and braised with beer instead of water. The fish scales are crispy and the fish meat is tender. The aroma of beer and the slightly sour tomato blend together, giving it a rich and unique flavor. Fish is rich in high-quality protein and minerals, and paired with tomatoes and peppers, it is rich in vitamins and appetizing. The difficulty of making it is medium, and it is a little challenging for novices, but you can still succeed if you follow the steps. It is expected to be completed in 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 1092 kcal
ingredients_zh: 剑骨鱼或鲤鱼（约 1.5 斤，让店家处理内脏，但**不要刮鱼鳞**）
漓泉啤酒（一瓶，约 330ml，桂林本地啤酒，最正宗）
剑骨鱼或鲤鱼 1 条（约 750g，不去鳞）
ingredients_en: Swordfish or carp (about 1.5 pounds, let the store handle the internal organs, but **do not scrape the scales**)
Liquan Beer (one bottle, about 330ml, local beer in Guilin, the most authentic)
steps_zh: 鱼处理好内脏，保留鱼鳞，清洗干净，从腹部剖开成两半（背部相连），用 15ml 料酒、姜片、食盐 3g 腌制 15 分钟
番茄切块，青椒红椒切块，大蒜拍碎，生姜切片，葱切段（葱白葱叶分开）
用姜片擦拭锅底，热锅后倒入 30ml 食用油，油热后放入鱼（鱼皮朝下），煎至两面金黄、鱼鳞酥脆，盛出备用
锅中留底油，放入葱白、姜片、蒜瓣爆香
加入 15g 桂林辣椒酱，炒出红油
放入番茄块，翻炒至番茄出汁变软
倒入整瓶啤酒，加入 15ml 生抽、5ml 老抽、5g 白糖、5g 食盐，搅拌均匀
放入煎好的鱼，大火烧开后转中小火，盖上锅盖焖煮 15-20 分钟
开盖，放入青椒红椒块，继续煮 3-5 分钟
大火收汁至汤汁浓稠，撒上葱叶段，出锅装盘
steps_en: Remove the internal organs of the fish, retain the scales, clean it, cut it in half from the abdomen (connected at the back), marinate with 15ml of cooking wine, ginger slices, and 3g of salt for 15 minutes
Cut tomatoes into cubes, green and red peppers into cubes, mince garlic, slice ginger, and cut green onions into sections (separate the white and white green onion leaves)

Wipe the bottom of the pot with ginger slices, heat the pot and pour 30ml of cooking oil. When the oil is hot, add the fish (skin side down) and fry until both sides are golden brown and the fish scales are crispy. Remove and set aside.
Leave some oil in the pot, add scallions, ginger slices and garlic cloves and saute until fragrant
Add 15g Guilin chili sauce and stir-fry until red oil appears
Add tomato cubes and stir-fry until tomatoes become juicy and soft
Pour the whole bottle of beer, add 15ml light soy sauce, 5ml dark soy sauce, 5g sugar, 5g salt, and stir evenly
Add the fried fish, bring to a boil over high heat, then turn to medium-low heat, cover the pot and simmer for 15-20 minutes
Open the lid, add green and red pepper cubes, and continue cooking for 3-5 minutes
Reduce the sauce over high heat until the soup thickens, sprinkle with green onion leaves, remove from the pot and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
这道广东传统名菜以鲜香嫩滑著称，虾肉清甜弹牙，蒜香浓郁扑鼻。海虾富含优质蛋白和钙、硒等微量元素，搭配蒜蓉有助杀菌开胃。做法十分简单，处理虾、铺酱、蒸制、淋油几步即成，新手也能轻松驾驭，全程约需 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：456 大卡
intro_en:
This traditional Cantonese dish is famous for its freshness, tenderness and tenderness. The shrimp meat is sweet and chewy, and the garlic is rich and fragrant. Shrimp is rich in high-quality protein and trace elements such as calcium and selenium. Paired with minced garlic, it can help sterilize and appetizer. The method is very simple, just a few steps of preparing the shrimp, spreading the sauce, steaming, and pouring oil. Even novices can easily master it. The whole process takes about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 456 kcal
steps_zh: 用刀从从虾头中间切开，切到距离虾尾 1 cm
将蒜蓉酱铺在虾身中间，放在盘子中
锅中倒入热水，将盘子放入锅中，大火蒸 3 分钟
烧热油，倒入虾盘中，倒入生抽
steps_en: Use a knife to cut through the middle of the shrimp head to 1 cm from the tail.
Spread the garlic sauce between the shrimps and place on a plate
Pour hot water into the pot, put the plate into the pot, and steam over high heat for 3 minutes
Heat oil, pour into shrimp plate, pour in light soy sauce

intro_zh:
一道鲜美诱人的海鲜快手菜，煎制后的阿根廷红虾肉质白嫩，口感鲜甜浓郁，虾壳酥香。富含碘、磷和虾青素等微量元素，有助于增强免疫力、保护心脏并降低胆固醇。难度适中，需要掌握火候和翻面技巧，但步骤清晰，新手按操作来也能成功。预计 大约 20 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：309 大卡
intro_en:
A delicious and tempting seafood quick dish, the pan-fried Argentinian red shrimp has white and tender meat, a sweet and rich taste, and the shrimp shell is crispy and fragrant. Rich in trace elements such as iodine, phosphorus and astaxanthin, it helps strengthen immunity, protect the heart and lower cholesterol. The difficulty is moderate, and you need to master the heat and flipping skills, but the steps are clear, and novices can succeed if they follow the instructions. Expect it to take about 20 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 309 kcal
ingredients_zh: 阿根廷红虾（选用了速冻虾）
ingredients_en: Argentinian red shrimp (quick-frozen shrimp was chosen)
steps_zh: 阿根廷红虾解冻，最好是提前 1 天从速冻取出放到冷藏里自然解冻，能更好保持风味和口感。可买已经开背去虾线的，节省了不少时间
解冻好的红虾洗净擦干备用，注意这里一定要沥干水分，赶时间可以用厨房用纸吸干水分
生姜切片，洋葱切小方块，香菜洗干净后，叶茎分离，把香菜叶切碎，大蒜压碎切成小块碎末
大火热锅，热锅后倒入两调羹橄榄油，等油温升高后，放入生姜片，洋葱块和香菜茎煸炒
约 1 分钟后取出生姜，洋葱和香菜茎，弃用
调中大火，放入红虾开始煎，注意所有虾需要单面都完整接触平底锅，煎约 2 分钟，同时给每只虾刷上一层油
待底面虾壳有微微焦黄时翻面，并撒入大蒜碎末，轻微晃动平底锅使得受热均匀
约 1 分钟后添加 20ml 白葡萄酒
再煎 1 分钟后调中小火，均匀撒上一层盐和黑胡椒
给每只虾滴上一滴生抽
撒上香菜叶，装盘
切好柠檬片，摆放到盘边即可
steps_en: To defrost Argentinian red shrimp, it is best to take it out of the quick-freeze and place it in the refrigerator to thaw naturally one day in advance to better maintain the flavor and texture. You can buy the ones with the shrimp lines already opened on the back, which saves a lot of time.
Wash and dry the thawed red shrimp and set aside. Note that the water must be drained here. If you are in a hurry, you can use kitchen paper to absorb the water.
Slice the ginger, cut the onion into small cubes, wash the coriander, separate the leaves and stems, chop the coriander leaves, crush the garlic and chop into small pieces.
Heat a pan over high heat. Pour two tablespoons of olive oil into the pan. When the oil temperature rises, add ginger slices, onion pieces and coriander stems and stir-fry.
After about 1 minute, remove the ginger, onion and coriander stems and discard

Turn up the heat to medium, add the red shrimp and start frying. Note that all shrimps need to be completely exposed to the pan on one side. Fry for about 2 minutes. At the same time, brush each shrimp with a layer of oil.
When the shrimp shells on the bottom are slightly browned, turn over and sprinkle in minced garlic. Shake the pan slightly to heat evenly.
After about 1 minute add 20ml white wine
Fry for another 1 minute, then lower the heat to medium-low and sprinkle evenly with salt and black pepper.
Add a drop of light soy sauce to each shrimp
Sprinkle coriander leaves and serve
Cut the lemon slices and place them on the edge of the plate
