intro_zh:
清蒸鲈鱼是一道粤式经典蒸菜，鱼肉细嫩爽滑，味道清淡鲜美，能最大程度保留鲈鱼的原汁原味。鲈鱼富含优质蛋白和 DHA，营养丰富且易于消化。这道菜操作简单，对新手非常友好，从备料到出锅大约只需三十分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：385 大卡
intro_en:
Steamed seabass is a classic Cantonese steamed dish. The fish meat is tender and smooth, and the taste is light and delicious. It can retain the original flavor of seabass to the greatest extent. Sea bass is rich in high-quality protein and DHA, making it nutritious and easy to digest. This dish is easy to operate and very friendly to novices. It only takes about thirty minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 385 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鲈鱼（害怕杀鱼的同学可以让店家帮忙杀）
ingredients_en: Bass (Students who are afraid of killing fish can ask the store to kill it for them)
steps_zh: 姜切片切丝、香葱的葱白切段，葱绿切丝，切丝后放入冷水浸泡备用。
鲈鱼处理好后洗净，用厨房纸擦干，两面分别划几刀，用盐洗掉鱼身的粘液，并用 10g 盐抹遍鱼身的内外，腌制 10 分钟以上。
补充一个鲈鱼改刀和摆盘的方法，改刀后可以让鲈鱼立起来蒸，均匀受热，同时吃起来更加方便，无需翻面。
鱼肚内塞上姜和葱白，鱼身也撒上姜和葱白，量为备用的一半。蒸鱼的碟子用筷子将鱼跟碟子隔开蒸
水烧热感觉到水温后放进入鱼
大火清蒸 10 分钟。
蒸好的鱼，用干净的盘子装起来并去除身上姜蒜
鱼身浇上 15ml 蒸鱼豉油
鱼身重新撒上姜和葱丝，锅内加上 10ml 食用油并烧热，将食用油淋至鱼身即可出菜
steps_en: Slice and shred the ginger, cut the white and green scallions into sections, cut into shreds, soak in cold water and set aside.

After handling the sea bass, wash it, dry it with kitchen paper, score a few times on both sides, use salt to wash off the mucus on the fish body, and rub 10g of salt all over the inside and outside of the fish body, and marinate for more than 10 minutes.

Add a method for changing the cutter and plating of seabass. After changing the cutter, the seabass can be steamed standing up and heated evenly. At the same time, it is more convenient to eat without turning it over.

Stuff the fish belly with ginger and green onions, and sprinkle ginger and green onions on the fish body, half of the amount reserved. Use chopsticks to separate the fish from the plate while steaming the fish.
When the water is hot and you feel the water temperature, put the fish in
Steam over high heat for 10 minutes.
Steamed fish, put it on a clean plate and remove the ginger and garlic
Pour 15ml steamed fish soy sauce over the fish body
Sprinkle the fish body with ginger and green onion again, add 10ml cooking oil to the pot and heat it up, pour the cooking oil all over the fish body and serve.

intro_zh:
这道菜以黄油与芥末的奇妙搭配为亮点，虾肉紧实弹嫩，酱汁浓郁辛香，是一道新派海鲜菜肴。虾肉富含优质蛋白和多种微量元素，营养均衡。制作难度适中，只要提前备好料、控制火候，新手也能成功。从处理活虾到出锅，大约需要 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：637 大卡
intro_en:
This dish highlights the wonderful combination of butter and mustard. The shrimp meat is firm and tender, and the sauce is rich and spicy. It is a new style seafood dish. Shrimp meat is rich in high-quality protein and a variety of trace elements, and is nutritionally balanced. The difficulty of making it is moderate. As long as you prepare the ingredients in advance and control the heat, even novices can succeed. It takes about 30 minutes from handling live shrimp to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 637 kcal
ingredients_zh: 罗氏虾 1 斤多  广东市场价大概 40~45 一斤
料酒、朗姆酒或啤酒 15g 到 30g
蒜 5 颗 剁成蒜蓉
ingredients_en: More than 1 kilogram of Roche shrimp. The market price in Guangdong is about 40~45 per kilogram.
Cooking wine, rum or beer 15g to 30g
steps_zh: 将罗氏虾剪掉头尾尖刺、触须和脚，剪刀把虾身开背，去除虾线。
提前搅拌好芥末酱汁：酱油、蚝油、芥末、盐、糖，搅拌均匀！
洗好香菜，切段备用。
罗氏虾沥掉水，锅中加入油，直接放入罗氏虾，中火，外表煎至金黄，捞出。
下入蒜蓉，大火，利用煎虾剩下的油继续煎炒蒜蓉，等到锅中白雾冒出，蒜蓉已经煎出香味，下虾和黄油，让虾充分吸收黄油香味
下入调好的酱汁，继续大火煮沸，翻炒虾，至酱汁收汁，加入酒（料酒、啤酒可以放 30g，朗姆酒味道浓郁放 15g 即可。）
在等酱汁稍微收汁，加入香菜翻炒两下，即可出锅。
steps_en: Cut off the head and tail spikes, tentacles and feet of the shrimp. Open the back of the shrimp with scissors and remove the shrimp line.
Stir the mustard sauce in advance: soy sauce, oyster sauce, mustard, salt, sugar, stir evenly!
Wash the coriander and cut into sections and set aside.
Drain the water from the shrimps, add oil to the pot, add the shrimps directly, fry over medium heat until golden brown, remove.

Add minced garlic, turn on high heat, and use the remaining oil from frying the shrimp to continue frying the minced garlic. Wait until white mist comes out of the pot and the minced garlic has fragrant. Add the shrimp and butter to allow the shrimp to fully absorb the fragrance of the butter.
Add the prepared sauce, continue to boil over high heat, stir-fry the shrimp until the sauce is reduced, and add wine (you can add 30g of cooking wine and beer, and 15g of rum for a strong flavor.)
Wait for the sauce to reduce slightly, add coriander and stir-fry twice before serving.
images: dishes/aquatic/芥末黄油罗氏虾/芥末黄油罗氏虾.jpg
file_path: dishes/aquatic/芥末黄油罗氏虾/芥末黄油罗氏虾.md

intro_zh:
这道川味烤鱼麻辣鲜香，鱼肉外焦里嫩，配菜吸饱汤汁后格外下饭。草鱼富含优质蛋白，搭配多种蔬菜，营养均衡。做法看似复杂，但跟着步骤走其实不难，适合想挑战硬菜的新手。从备料到上桌大约需要一小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：2152 大卡
intro_en:
This Sichuan style grilled fish is spicy and fragrant, the fish is charred on the outside and tender on the inside. The side dishes soak up the soup and go well with the meal. Grass carp is rich in high-quality protein, paired with a variety of vegetables, and has balanced nutrition. The method may seem complicated, but it is not difficult to follow the steps. It is suitable for novices who want to challenge tough dishes. It takes about an hour from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 2152 kcal
ingredients_zh: 草鱼（农贸市场或者超市让店家杀掉，去除不要的器官）
香菜（放更好吃，根据个人口味可放可不放）
ingredients_en: Grass carp (ask the store to kill it at farmers’ markets or supermarkets and remove unnecessary organs)
Coriander (it tastes better if you add it, you can add it or not according to your personal taste)
A small handful of green peppercorns
steps_zh: 草鱼（一般 3 斤 ）从背部切开，两面沿着鱼的背部往下划几刀，不要划到鱼肚皮，不然不易定型
把鱼放到容器中，加入料酒，10g 白胡椒粉，5g 食盐抹匀腌制二十分钟入味。
把半根大葱切成一块一块，大蒜粒中间切开，和八角香叶桂皮放在一个容器中
干辣椒段中间一分为二切开并和灯笼椒装在一个容器中
芹菜切小段
豆芽焯水
千张焯水切成丝
洋葱切成丝。
烤制鱼
锅中撒上 20ml 食用油，等到油热后，把大葱大蒜八角香叶倒入炒香
加上一包火锅底料的一半和 15-20g 豆瓣酱，炒出红油
加入 5g 白糖，10g 食盐，5ml 生抽调味，倒入和食材齐平的清水煮开
依次下入芹菜段，豆芽，千张丝，不用煮熟，稍微烫一下后铺上洋葱丝，放上烤鱼
加入干辣椒，灯笼椒，青花椒
另一个锅烧油，油热后浇在刚加入的辣椒上面激发出香味
最后撒上熟花生米，葱花，白芝麻，香菜
煮 5-6 分钟，美味即成。
steps_en: Cut grass carp (generally 3 pounds) from the back, and make a few cuts along the back of the fish on both sides. Do not cut into the belly of the fish, otherwise it will not be easy to shape.
Put the fish in a container, add cooking wine, 10g white pepper, 5g salt and marinate for 20 minutes to add flavor.
Cut half a green onion into pieces, cut the garlic in the middle, and put it in a container with star anise, leaves, cinnamon
Cut the dried chili segments in half and put them in a container with the bell peppers
Cut celery into small pieces
Blanched bean sprouts
Blanch Qianzhang and cut into strips
Cut onions into shreds.
grilled fish
Spread 20ml cooking oil in the pot, wait until the oil is hot, add the green onions, garlic, star anise leaves and stir-fry until fragrant
Add half of a pack of hot pot base ingredients and 15-20g of bean paste, stir-fry until red oil
Add 5g white sugar, 10g salt, 5ml light soy sauce to taste, pour in water level with the ingredients and bring to a boil
Add celery segments, bean sprouts, and Qianzhang shreds in sequence. No need to cook them. Blanch them slightly, then put onion shreds on top, and put the grilled fish on top.
Add dried chilies, bell peppers, and green peppercorns
Heat oil in another pot. When the oil is hot, pour it on top of the freshly added chilies to stimulate the aroma.
Finally, sprinkle with cooked peanuts, chopped green onion, white sesame seeds, and coriander
Cook for 5-6 minutes and it's delicious.

intro_zh:
鲤鱼炖白菜是一道鲜香浓郁的家常炖菜，鱼肉软嫩入味，白菜清甜吸汁，属于典型的北方风味。鲤鱼富含优质蛋白和不饱和脂肪酸，搭配白菜提供膳食纤维和维生素，营养均衡。制作过程需要煎鱼和炖煮，有一定难度但不算复杂，适合有基础烹饪经验的朋友尝试，从备料到出锅大约需要 40 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：792 大卡
intro_en:
Carp stewed with cabbage is a home-cooked stew with a rich aroma. The fish meat is tender and tasty, and the cabbage is sweet and juicy. It is a typical northern flavor. Carp is rich in high-quality protein and unsaturated fatty acids, and when paired with cabbage, it provides dietary fiber and vitamins for a balanced nutrition. The preparation process requires frying and stewing the fish, which is somewhat difficult but not complicated. It is suitable for friends with basic cooking experience to try. It takes about 40 minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 792 kcal
ingredients_zh: 干辣椒（不吃辣可以不放）
娃娃菜：13 片（可以多放一些，一顿就缩小了）
干辣椒：4-6 个（根据个人口味选择）
ingredients_en: Dried chili pepper (you can omit it if you don’t like spicy food)
Baby cabbage: 13 pieces (you can put more, it will shrink after one meal)
Dried chilies: 4-6 (choose according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 鲤鱼清洗干净，改刀（在鱼身上多划几个伤口，方便入味）
娃娃菜清洗干净放入盘中备用
锅中加油，等油热放入“少盐” “姜” “蒜” “郫县豆瓣酱” “桂皮” “八角” 炒出香味
把鱼放锅里煎（3 分钟）每（30 秒）需要翻面
加入“水”（水量尽量和鱼平齐，可以少一点点） 放入 “生抽” “老抽” “娃娃菜”
大火炖 15-20 分钟，汤汁快干时添加 “盐” 即可出锅
steps_en: Clean the carp and cut it with a knife (make a few more wounds on the fish to make it easier to taste)
Wash the baby cabbage and put it on a plate for later use
Add oil to the pot, wait until the oil is hot, add "less salt", "ginger", "garlic", "Pixian bean paste", "cinnamon" and "star anise" and stir-fry until fragrant
Fry the fish in the pan (3 minutes), turning it every (30 seconds)
Add "water" (the amount of water should be as level as the fish, but a little less) and add "light soy sauce", "dark soy sauce" and "baby cabbage"
Simmer over high heat for 15-20 minutes. When the soup is almost dry, add "salt" and serve.
images: dishes/aquatic/鲤鱼炖白菜/鲤鱼炖白菜.jpeg
file_path: dishes/aquatic/鲤鱼炖白菜/鲤鱼炖白菜.md

intro_zh:
糖醋鲤鱼是经典鲁菜，外酥里嫩、酸甜适口，鱼身炸至金黄浇上红亮糖醋汁，十分诱人。鱼肉富含优质蛋白和多种矿物质，易于消化吸收。这道菜对新手不太友好，难度中等偏上，需掌握改刀、挂糊和油炸火候。从备料到成菜大约需要 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：1011 大卡
intro_en:
Sweet and sour carp is a classic Shandong dish. It is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, sweet and sour. The fish body is fried until golden brown and topped with a bright red sweet and sour sauce. It is very tempting. Fish meat is rich in high-quality protein and various minerals, and is easy to digest and absorb. This dish is not very friendly to novices, and the difficulty is medium to high. You need to master the knife, batter and frying temperature. It takes about 1 hour from prep to dish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 1011 kcal
steps_zh: 将鱼清洗干净，确保无鱼鳞等异物
将鱼头朝左，鱼肚朝下，右手持刀。刀竖直切下 1cm，按紧鱼身往左片 3-4cm，再将鱼片中间轻轻划一刀
将鱼放进盆里，然后将大姜切片，大葱切段（随便切切就行了，主要是需要去腥味）
用吃奶的力气将大葱大姜里的汁水挤到盆中
加入 20g 盐，25g 料酒，然后给鲤鱼搓个澡，涂抹均匀
找个干净的盆，加入 100g 面粉、200g 淀粉、180g 水、5g 盐，用手将其搅拌均匀，面糊此时粘稠呈可拉丝状态，然后打入一个鸡蛋，再次搅匀
等待 30 分钟
将鱼放在案板上，用干毛巾将鱼身上的水擦干（这样可以更好的挂糊）
将盆冲洗干净，用干毛巾擦干
起锅烧油，加入约 1L 的油，将油温烧至 7 成热，约 200-240 度
捏起鱼的尾巴，将鱼头沉入锅底，用勺子往鱼的身上淋热油，待面糊成型后，将鱼慢慢放入锅中，拿锅铲轻轻铲起鱼的头部，然后垫上笊篱。防止底部炸糊。
准备一个盛鱼的盘子，放在锅的旁边。
用锅铲从鱼身处轻轻铲入，两个工具配合鱼翻个身。再炸两分钟，还是同样的方式（笊篱托着鱼头，锅铲托着鱼身，将鱼盛入盘中）
将锅中的油倒入擦干的盆中，放置一边，然后将锅刷干净
将 50g 清水、40g 番茄酱、20g 白糖、10g 白醋放入小碗中，搅拌均匀
再准备一个小碗加入 10g 淀粉、10g 水，搅拌成水淀粉
开大火将锅烧热，然后倒入之前准备的料汁，大火烧开，转小火
加入调好的水淀粉，边倒边搅拌，然后 20 秒后关火
将熬好的糖醋汁用勺子均匀地浇在鱼身上，可以加点香菜或葱花点缀，糖醋鲤鱼就做好了
steps_en: Clean the fish and make sure there are no scales or other foreign matter

Turn the fish head to the left, belly down, and hold the knife in your right hand. Cut 1cm off vertically with the knife, press the fish body tightly and slice 3-4cm to the left, then lightly make a slash in the middle of the fish fillet
Put the fish into a basin, then slice the ginger and green onions into sections (you can just cut them into any size, mainly to remove the fishy smell)
Use the strength of sucking milk to squeeze the juice from the green onion and ginger into the basin
Add 20g salt and 25g cooking wine, then give the carp a bath and spread evenly
Find a clean basin, add 100g flour, 200g starch, 180g water, 5g salt, mix it evenly with your hands. The batter will now be thick and stringy, then add an egg and mix again.
Wait 30 minutes
Place the fish on the chopping board and dry the water on the fish with a dry towel (this will allow the fish to hang better)
Rinse the basin and dry it with a dry towel
Heat oil in a pan, add about 1L of oil, and heat the oil to 70% hot, about 200-240 degrees

Pinch up the tail of the fish, sink the fish head to the bottom of the pot, pour hot oil on the fish with a spoon, and after the batter is formed, slowly put the fish into the pot, use a spatula to gently scoop up the head of the fish, and then put a grate on it. Prevent the bottom from burning.
Prepare a plate for the fish and place it next to the pot.

Use a spatula to gently shovel in the fish from the body, and use the two tools to turn the fish over. Fry for another two minutes, still in the same way (the fish head is supported by the fence, the fish body is supported by the spatula, and the fish is placed on the plate)
Pour the oil in the pot into a dry basin, set it aside, and then brush the pot clean
Put 50g water, 40g tomato paste, 20g sugar and 10g white vinegar into a small bowl and stir evenly
Prepare a small bowl, add 10g starch, 10g water, stir to form water starch
Turn on high heat to heat the pot, then pour in the previously prepared sauce, bring to a boil over high heat, then turn to low heat
Add the prepared water starch, stir while pouring, then turn off the heat after 20 seconds
Pour the cooked sweet and sour sauce evenly on the fish with a spoon. You can add some coriander or chopped green onion to garnish. The sweet and sour carp is ready.

intro_zh:
黄油煎虾是一道风味浓郁、虾肉鲜嫩弹牙的家常海鲜菜。鲜虾富含优质蛋白和钙、锌等矿物质，搭配黄油增添了奶香与能量。制作相对简单，只需耐心处理活虾，新手也能顺利上手，总耗时约一小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：741 大卡
intro_en:
Butter-fried shrimp is a home-cooked seafood dish with rich flavor and tender and chewy shrimp meat. Fresh shrimp is rich in high-quality protein and minerals such as calcium and zinc. When paired with butter, it adds milky flavor and energy. The preparation is relatively simple, just need to be patient with the live shrimps, and even a novice can get started smoothly. It takes about an hour in total.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 741 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鲜虾（强推肉质紧实的九节虾，普通明虾也可以）
黄油（推荐安佳，一次用一小盒 7g）
ingredients_en: Fresh shrimp (highly recommend the firm-fleshed nine-section shrimp, ordinary prawns are also acceptable)
Butter (Anchor is recommended, use a small box of 7g at a time)
steps_zh: 鲜虾摘除头部，顺带扯出虾线（这步处理不好可在下一步开背时取出虾线），使用剪刀剪开或菜刀片开虾背，沥干水分备用
调制酱汁：小碗放入上述量的全部生抽、米酒、白糖、盐搅匀备用
中大火热锅，热锅内放入食用油，等待 10 秒让油温升高
虾全部放入锅中，开始瓶磨黑胡椒，均匀地撒在虾上翻炒
虾变色后加入黄油，黄油完全融化后倒入调制酱汁，继续翻炒
大火翻炒 15 秒收汁即可装盘
steps_en: Remove the head of the fresh shrimp and pull out the shrimp thread (if this step is not handled well, you can take out the shrimp thread when opening the back in the next step), use scissors or a vegetable blade to open the shrimp's back, drain the water and set aside
Prepare the sauce: put all the above-mentioned light soy sauce, rice wine, sugar, and salt in a small bowl and stir well and set aside.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat, put cooking oil in the hot pan, wait 10 seconds for the oil temperature to rise
Put all the shrimps into the pot, start grinding black pepper, sprinkle evenly on the shrimps and stir-fry
After the shrimp changes color, add butter. When the butter is completely melted, pour in the prepared sauce and continue to stir-fry.
Stir-fry over high heat for 15 seconds to reduce the juice and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
这是一道用红茶和奶粉轻松调制的家常饮品，茶香与奶香交融，口感顺滑温暖。红茶中的茶多酚搭配牛奶的蛋白质和钙质，既能提神又补充日常营养。做法非常简单，新手也能一次成功，仅需大约半 小时就能喝上自制奶茶。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：81 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked drink easily made with black tea and milk powder. The aroma of tea and milk blend together, and the taste is smooth and warm. The tea polyphenols in black tea combined with the protein and calcium in milk can not only refresh your mind but also supplement your daily nutrition. The method is very simple, and even a novice can succeed in one attempt. It only takes about half an hour to drink homemade milk tea.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 81 kcal
ingredients_zh: 袋泡红茶（推荐立顿黄牌精选红茶）
杯子，例如带刻度的杯子，陶瓷杯或保温杯
ingredients_en: Black tea bag (recommend Lipton Yellow Label Selected Black Tea)
Whole milk powder or evaporated milk
Cups, such as graduated mugs, ceramic mugs or thermos mugs
steps_zh: 取袋泡红茶 2 包放入杯中，加入 180-200mL **沸水**。
称取 11-12g 奶粉和 5-7g 砂糖，分别加入前一步骤得到的液体中。
搅拌均匀即可饮用。
steps_en: Take 2 bags of black tea bags, put them into a cup, and add 180-200mL **boiling water**.
**Wait 20 - 30 minutes**.
Weigh 11-12g of milk powder and 5-7g of sugar, and add them to the liquid obtained in the previous step.
Stir well and drink.

intro_zh:
这是一道改良版的经典港式甜品，用奇亚籽代替西谷米，口感滑嫩又带有籽粒的细微嚼劲，芒果的香甜与葡萄柚的微酸交织，椰奶增添浓郁。富含膳食纤维、维生素 C 和优质脂肪，清爽解暑。制作非常简单，新手也能轻松完成，从备料到享用只需约 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：661 大卡
intro_en:
This is an improved version of a classic Hong Kong-style dessert. Chia seeds are used instead of sago rice. The texture is smooth and tender with the slight chewiness of the seeds. The sweetness of mango is intertwined with the slight acidity of grapefruit, and coconut milk adds richness. Rich in dietary fiber, vitamin C and high-quality fat, it is refreshing and refreshing. It's very simple to make, even for novices, and it only takes about 20 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 661 kcal
steps_zh: 奇亚籽泡牛奶 10 分钟。
泡籽之时，把半粒芒果、葡萄柚去皮切丁，放入杯中。
半粒芒果切小块放入调理机加冰块、椰奶打成泥。
倒入杯中，放上点缀材料（如有）。
一边享用一边写代码！！
steps_en: Soak chia seeds in milk for 10 minutes.
While soaking the seeds, peel and dice half of the mango and grapefruit and put them into a cup.
Cut half a mango into small pieces, add ice cubes and coconut milk to a blender and puree.
Pour into a cup and top with garnishing ingredients (if any).
Enjoy and write code at the same time! !

intro_zh:
印度奶茶是一道充满异域风情的家常饮品，以红茶、牛奶和多种香料现煮而成，口感浓郁顺滑，带有生姜、豆蔻、肉桂交织的辛香暖意。牛奶提供优质蛋白和钙质，香料则有助于暖身驱寒、促进消化。制作过程简单直观，对新手友好，从备料到入口只需大约 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：135 大卡
intro_en:
Chai milk tea is an exotic home-cooked drink made from freshly brewed black tea, milk and various spices. It has a rich and smooth taste, with the spicy warmth of ginger, cardamom and cinnamon. Milk provides high-quality protein and calcium, while spices help warm the body, dispel cold, and promote digestion. The process is simple, intuitive and beginner-friendly, taking only about 10 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 135 kcal
ingredients_zh: 红茶（CTC 红茶最佳，或阿萨姆红茶）
绿色小豆蔻 2 颗，拍开
ingredients_en: Black tea (CTC black tea is best, or Assam black tea)
steps_zh: 将生姜拍碎（不用切太碎，拍开即可释放姜汁）
将小豆蔻用刀背拍开，露出里面的籽
将黑胡椒粒拍碎
在小奶锅中倒入 120ml 水
放入拍碎的生姜、小豆蔻、肉桂棒、丁香、黑胡椒粒
大火煮沸后转小火，**煮 2 分钟**，让香料的味道充分释出
加入红茶 8g，继续小火**煮 2 分钟**，直至*茶汤颜色变深*
倒入全脂牛奶 120ml
中火加热，**注意观察**，当奶茶开始*冒泡上升*时立即转小火（牛奶极易溢出）
小火**煮 2-3 分钟**，期间可以将锅提起倒回（反复提拉 3-4 次），使茶汤与牛奶充分融合
加入糖，搅拌溶解
关火
用滤网过滤到茶盏中，去除茶叶和香料残渣
趁热饮用
steps_en: Crush the ginger (you don’t need to chop it too finely, just pat it open to release the ginger juice)
Slap the cardamom with the back of a knife to reveal the seeds inside
Crush black peppercorns
Pour 120ml water into a small milk pot
Add chopped ginger, cardamom, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and black peppercorns
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce to low heat and **cook for 2 minutes** to fully release the flavor of the spices
Add 8g of black tea and continue to **simmer for 2 minutes** on low heat until the *tea soup becomes darker*
Pour in 120ml of whole milk
Heat over medium heat, **pay attention**, when the milk tea starts *bubbly and rise*, immediately turn to low heat (milk can easily overflow)
Cook over low heat for 2-3 minutes. During this period, you can lift the pot and pour it back (repeatedly 3-4 times) to fully combine the tea soup and milk.
Add sugar and stir to dissolve
Turn off the heat
Strain into the tea cup through a strainer to remove tea leaves and spice residues
Drink while hot

intro_zh:
这是一款融合了印度传统酸奶饮品“拉西”的创新饮品，口感绵密顺滑、清甜不腻，特别适合作为早餐或午后提神饮品。牛油果富含单不饱和脂肪酸与膳食纤维，搭配酸奶的优质蛋白和益生菌，一杯便能提供持久饱腹感。制作极为简单，新手也能零失败，从备料到享用只需 大约 5 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：392 大卡
intro_en:
This is an innovative drink that combines the traditional Indian yogurt drink "Lassi" with a creamy, smooth, sweet and not greasy taste. It is especially suitable as a breakfast or afternoon pick-me-up drink. Avocado is rich in monounsaturated fatty acids and dietary fiber. Combined with the high-quality protein and probiotics of yogurt, one cup can provide a long-lasting feeling of satiety. It's extremely easy to make, even for novices, and it only takes about 5 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 392 kcal
ingredients_zh: 薄荷叶或坚果碎（可选，用于装饰）
蜂蜜 1 汤匙（可根据口味增减）
ingredients_en: Mint leaves or chopped nuts (optional, for garnish)
1 tablespoon honey (can be increased or decreased according to taste)
steps_zh: 将牛油果对半切开，去核，剥去外皮，将果肉切成小块备用。
在搅拌机中加入 120ml 原味酸奶、切好的牛油果块、1 汤匙蜂蜜以及 60ml 冷牛奶。
（可选）加入一小撮小豆蔻粉以增加独特风味。
启动搅拌机，**搅拌大约 1 分钟**直至液体变得完全顺滑和浓郁。
将打好的饮品倒入杯中。
（可选）在表面放上几片薄荷叶或撒上 5g 切碎的坚果作为装饰。
steps_en: Cut the avocado in half, remove the core, peel off the skin, and cut the flesh into small pieces and set aside.
Add 120ml plain yoghurt, chopped avocado, 1 tablespoon honey and 60ml cold milk to a blender.
(Optional) Add a pinch of cardamom powder for a unique flavor.
Start the blender and **blend for about 1 minute** until the liquid is completely smooth and rich.
Pour the whipped drink into the cup.
(Optional) Garnish with a few mint leaves or sprinkle with 5g of chopped nuts.

intro_zh:
酸梅汤（半成品加工）是一道酸甜爽口的夏日消暑饮品，传统京味风格。酸梅汤本身有生津止渴、帮助消化的好处。做法极其简单，只需按顺序搅拌即可，对新手毫无难度，全程大约五分钟就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：603 大卡
intro_en:
Sour plum soup (semi-finished product processing) is a sweet and sour summer drink, traditional Beijing style. Sour plum soup itself has the benefits of promoting body fluids, quenching thirst, and helping digestion. The method is extremely simple, just stir in order, it is not difficult for novices, and the whole process can be completed in about five minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 603 kcal
ingredients_zh: 酸梅晶固体饮料 120 克
steps_zh: 取饮用水 1177 克。
放入酸梅晶固体饮料 60 克，使用汤匙顺时针搅拌 50 圈。
再放入剩下 60 克酸梅晶固体饮料，再次使用汤匙顺时针搅拌 50 圈。
放入 9 克的方糖，使用汤匙顺时针搅拌 100 圈。
放入北京二锅头酒 48 克，用汤匙顺时针搅拌 30 圈。
steps_en: Take 1177 grams of drinking water.
Add 60 grams of sour plum crystal solid drink and stir clockwise 50 times with a spoon.
Add the remaining 60 grams of sour plum crystal solid drink and stir clockwise 50 times with a spoon again.
Add 9 grams of cubed sugar and stir clockwise 100 times with a spoon.
Add 48 grams of Beijing Erguotou wine and stir clockwise 30 times with a spoon.

intro_zh:
冬瓜茶是一款清爽解暑的传统饮品，口感甘甜柔和，带有冬瓜特有的清香，冰镇后风味更佳。冬瓜本身低热量、富含水分，搭配冰糖熬制，能补充能量、生津止渴。制作不复杂，但对新手而言需要一些耐心，全程大约需要 4 到 5 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：296 大卡
intro_en:
Winter melon tea is a refreshing traditional drink that relieves summer heat. It tastes sweet and soft, with the unique fragrance of winter melon. It tastes better after being chilled. Winter melon itself is low in calories and rich in water. When cooked with rock sugar, it can replenish energy, produce body fluids and quench thirst. It’s not complicated to make, but it does require some patience for newbies, and the process takes about 4 to 5 hours.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 296 kcal
steps_zh: **准备冬瓜**：将冬瓜去皮，去籽，切成小块（每块不超过 4cm）。
**加入冰糖**：冬瓜加入冰糖，搅拌均匀，盖上保鲜膜放冰箱冷藏 2 小时以上。
**煮冬瓜**： 此时冬瓜出了很多水, 倒入锅中 大火煮开，然后转中小火慢慢熬制 1~2 个小时，中途多搅拌防止糊锅。
**过滤冬瓜茶**：使用过滤网将煮好的冬瓜茶液过滤，取出冬瓜块，只保留茶液。
**冷却**：将冬瓜茶液放凉后，倒入干净的容器中，放入冰箱冷藏即可。
**享用**: 熬好的冬瓜茶液是浓缩汁，根据个人喜好添加水或其他饮品，冷热皆宜。
steps_en: **Prepare the winter melon**: Peel the winter melon, remove seeds, and cut into small pieces (each piece should not exceed 4cm).
**Add rock sugar**: Add rock sugar to winter melon, mix well, cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for more than 2 hours.

**Boil the winter melon**: At this time, the winter melon has released a lot of water. Pour it into the pot and bring it to a boil over high heat. Then turn to medium to low heat and simmer slowly for 1 to 2 hours. Stir frequently to prevent the pot from sticking.
**Filter the winter melon tea**: Use a filter to filter the cooked winter melon tea liquid, remove the winter melon pieces, and keep only the tea liquid.
**Cooling**: Let the winter melon tea liquid cool down, pour it into a clean container, and put it in the refrigerator to refrigerate.
**Enjoy**: The boiled winter melon tea liquid is a concentrated juice. Add water or other drinks according to personal preference. It is suitable for hot or cold.

intro_zh:
可乐桶是一款简单易调的休闲鸡尾酒，口感清爽甜润，可乐的气泡和柠檬汁很好地中和了威士忌的烈感，适合聚会场合。主要提供能量，柠檬补充维生素 C。整个调配过程只需 5 分钟即可完成，新手也能轻松上手。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：450 大卡
intro_en:
Coke Bucket is a simple and easy-to-make casual cocktail with a refreshing and sweet taste. The bubbles and lemon juice of Coke can well neutralize the strong taste of whiskey, making it suitable for party occasions. Primarily providing energy, lemon supplements vitamin C. The entire blending process only takes 5 minutes to complete, making it easy for novices to get started.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 450 kcal
steps_zh: 将柠檬对半切（**刀方向垂直于柠檬的头尾连线**），并从其中的一半中切取一片柠檬备用
再次将柠檬对半切，将得到的 4 角柠檬用压汁器压出柠檬汁置于容器中备用
将挤压过的柠檬置于容器中备用
选择一个杯子，建议使用容量在大约 1 升的大型玻璃杯或铁皮酒桶
将冰块和挤压过的柠檬入杯中（可根据个人喜好设计柠檬与冰块的摆放）
倒入 15 毫升柠檬汁（如果喜酸可以加多点或全加）
沿杯壁缓慢倒入可口可乐至距离杯口 3/4 处（控制可乐和威士忌的比例约在 5:1 ）
倒入威士忌直至满杯
steps_en: Cut the lemon in half (**The direction of the knife is perpendicular to the line connecting the head and tail of the lemon**), and cut a piece of lemon from one half and set aside.
Cut the lemon in half again, use a juicer to squeeze out the lemon juice from the 4 lemon wedges, and place it in a container for later use.
Place the squeezed lemons in a container and set aside
Choose a cup, it is recommended to use a large glass or tin barrel with a capacity of about 1 liter
Put ice cubes and squeezed lemon into the cup (the arrangement of lemon and ice cubes can be designed according to personal preference)
Pour in 15 ml lemon juice (if you like sourness, you can add more or all)
Slowly pour Coca-Cola along the wall of the glass to 3/4 of the distance from the mouth of the glass (control the ratio of Coca-Cola to whiskey to about 5:1)
Pour whiskey until the glass is full

intro_zh:
这款鸡尾酒口感层次分明，入口先是伏特加的烈，紧接着是咖啡奶油的回甘，点燃后饮用有独特的冰火体验，属于经典创意鸡尾酒。咖啡酒与百利甜酒提供了少量咖啡因和奶脂，但整体营养以酒精为主。制作需要练习分层倒酒和点火技巧，对新手稍有难度，整个过程大约只需 5 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：80 大卡
intro_en:
This cocktail has a distinct taste. The strong taste of vodka is first felt in the mouth, followed by the sweetness of coffee cream. After being lit, it gives a unique ice and fire experience. It is a classic creative cocktail. Coffee wine and Baileys provide a small amount of caffeine and cream, but the overall nutrition is dominated by alcohol. Making it requires practicing layered pouring and lighting techniques, it’s a little difficult for novices, and the whole process only takes about 5 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 80 kcal
steps_zh: 在利口酒杯的最底层倒入甘露咖啡酒到 1/3 处。(10ml)
顺着吧勺缓缓倒入爱尔兰百利甜酒，也是 1/3 处 (10ml)。注意要慢，保证层次分明。（太快甜酒会和咖啡混合）
最后在上层倒入蓝天原味伏特加 （10ml)
用打火机热一下杯口
最后一步点火： 看到淡蓝色的小火苗了吗？
steps_en: Fill the bottom 1/3 of the liqueur glass with Kahlua. (10ml)
Slowly pour 1/3 of the Irish Baileys (10ml) down the bar spoon. Be careful to go slowly and make sure the layers are clear. (The liqueur will mix with the coffee too quickly)
Finally, pour Blue Sky Original Vodka (10ml) on top
Use a lighter to heat the rim of the cup
The last step is to light the fire: Do you see the small light blue flame?

intro_zh:
长岛冰茶是一款口感酷似冰茶、入口柔和但酒精度颇高的经典鸡尾酒。它本身营养价值不高，偶尔小酌可放松身心，但切勿过量。做法非常简单，只需按比例混合四种基酒、甜酒和果汁，新手也能轻松调制。从准备到完成仅需 大约 5 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：281 大卡
intro_en:
Long Island Iced Tea is a classic cocktail that tastes like iced tea, is soft in the mouth but has a high alcohol content. It itself has low nutritional value, and you can relax by drinking it occasionally, but don’t overdo it. The preparation is very simple, just mix four base wines, liqueur and fruit juice in proportion, and even novices can make it easily. It only takes about 5 minutes from prep to finish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 281 kcal
steps_zh: 柠檬对半切，挤出 30ml 柠檬汁至杯中；
依次向杯中加入：
向杯中缓慢倒入 20ml 枫糖浆，边倒边搅拌；
向杯中加入 75ml 可乐；
向杯中加入冰块直至满杯；
轻轻搅拌 20 秒；
开始享用.
steps_en: Cut the lemon in half and squeeze 30ml of lemon juice into the cup;
Add to the cup:
Slowly pour 20ml maple syrup into the cup, stirring while pouring;
Add 75ml of cola to the cup;
Add ice cubes to the glass until it is full;
Stir gently for 20 seconds;
Start enjoying.

intro_zh:
这款鸡尾酒口感清爽酸甜，带有薄荷的清凉和朗姆酒的微醺，是经典的夏季饮品。酒精含量较低，佐以富含维生素 C 的青柠，能生津解渴、提神醒脑。制作十分简单，对新手友好，从备料到完成只需大约十 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：187 大卡
intro_en:
This cocktail has a refreshing and sweet taste, with the coolness of mint and the hint of rum. It is a classic summer drink. It has a low alcohol content and is served with lime, which is rich in vitamin C, to quench your thirst and refresh your mind. It's very simple and beginner-friendly to make and only takes about ten minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 187 kcal
ingredients_zh: 一块青柠（切成两个半块）
ingredients_en: A wedge of lime (cut into two halves)
steps_zh: 将切成半块的青柠之一切成小块，放入海波杯，随后用研杵将其捣出汁；
用 3-4 珠薄荷叶沿着杯口涂抹，随后将其放入杯中；
加入 糖浆 20ml；
加入 金色朗姆酒 45ml；
将剩下的半块青柠压出汁水放入杯中；
轻轻搅拌，使砂糖/糖浆处于半融合状态；
将打碎的冰块放入杯中，直到占杯中 3/4；
加入冰镇苏打水直到刚好淹没碎冰；
旋转搅拌半分钟；
使用碎冰将海波杯补满；
将剩下的一株薄荷叶拍醒，插入碎冰，作装饰。
steps_en: Cut one of the halved limes into small pieces, place in a highball glass, and mash with a pestle to extract the juice;
Spread 3-4 mint leaves along the rim of the cup and place them into the cup;
Add 20ml syrup;
Add 45ml golden rum;
Squeeze the juice from the remaining half of the lime into a cup;
Stir gently until the sugar/syrup is semi-blended;
Place the crushed ice cubes into the glass until it fills 3/4 of the glass;
Add ice-cold soda water until the crushed ice is just covered;
Stir for half a minute;
Use crushed ice to top up the Highball glass;
Beat the remaining mint leaves to wake up, insert crushed ice, and garnish.

intro_zh:
这道特调饮品融合了咖啡的醇香与菠萝的酸甜，气泡清爽、奶盖绵密，口感层次丰富。菠萝富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维，搭配咖啡能提神醒脑。制作难度中等，只需打发奶油并混合液体，全程约 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：180 大卡
intro_en:
This special drink combines the mellow aroma of coffee with the sweet and sour taste of pineapple, with refreshing bubbles, dense milk cap, and rich taste. Pineapple is rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, and can be refreshing when paired with coffee. It's medium easy to make, just whip the cream and mix in the liquids, and it's done in about 10 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 180 kcal
ingredients_zh: 咖啡液（推荐浓缩或者冷萃）
ingredients_en: Coffee liquid (concentrated or cold brew recommended)
steps_zh: 杯子里依次加入冰块，咖啡液，菠萝汁和苏打水
奶油加糖打发至湿性发泡，加入朗姆酒和牛奶均匀只有流动性
在第一部混合液上方倒入奶油
奶油顶面撒上海盐
steps_en: Add ice cubes, coffee liquid, pineapple juice and soda water to the cup in sequence
Cream the butter and sugar until it becomes wet foam, add the rum and milk and evenly mix until it becomes fluid.
Pour the cream on top of the first mixture
Sprinkle the top of the cream with sea salt
images: dishes/drink/菠萝咖啡特调/菠萝咖啡特调.png
file_path: dishes/drink/菠萝咖啡特调/菠萝咖啡特调.md

name_en: Passion fruit and orange special blend
intro_zh:
这是一道酸甜清爽的夏日饮品，融合了百香果的热带果香与橙子的鲜甜，搭配茉莉绿茶或苏打气泡水，口感层次分明，冰爽解腻。富含维生素 C，有助增强免疫力和滋润肌肤。包含腌制、泡茶、榨汁等步骤，操作略多但难度适中，新手也能尝试。需提前一天腌制百香果，总耗时约 24 小时，实际动手时间仅 大约 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：173 大卡
intro_en:
This is a sweet and sour summer drink that combines the tropical fruity aroma of passion fruit and the fresh sweetness of orange. Paired with jasmine green tea or soda sparkling water, it has a distinct taste and is refreshing and refreshing. Rich in vitamin C, it helps strengthen immunity and moisturizes skin. It includes steps such as pickling, making tea, and juicing. It is a little more complicated but moderately difficult, and even novices can try it. The passion fruit needs to be marinated one day in advance, which takes about 24 hours in total, and the actual hands-on time is only about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 173 kcal
ingredients_zh: 基于茉莉绿茶版本准备，一杯分量，约 380 毫升
腌制百香果部分（因为量小不好配置，这里是两次的分量）
ingredients_en: Prepared based on jasmine green tea version, one cup serving, approx. 380 ml
Pickled passion fruit part (because the quantity is small and difficult to prepare, here are two portions)
steps_zh: 百香果腌制（因为量小不好配置，这里是两次的分量）
茉莉绿茶调配（推荐比例=>茶 : 水 : 冰 = 1~2 : 50 : 30）
橙子的处理（可在泡茶期间处理）
正式调配
steps_en: Pickled passion fruit (because the quantity is small and difficult to prepare, here are two portions)
Jasmine green tea blend (recommended ratio => tea: water: ice = 1~2: 50: 30)
Processing of oranges (can be processed during tea making)
Formal deployment
file_path: dishes/drink/百香果橙子特调/百香果橙子特调.md

intro_zh:
这是一道传统中式发酵甜品，口感清甜微醺，带着淡淡的酒香。具有健脾开胃、促进消化的作用。制作过程简单有趣，虽然需要等待发酵，但动手操作并不复杂，非常适合作为发酵入门。预计制作总时长约 2 天，其中实际动手时间仅需 大约 1 小时。
预估烹饪难度：★★★★
预估卡路里：420 大卡
intro_en:
This is a traditional Chinese fermented dessert with a sweet and slightly boozy taste, with a faint aroma of wine. It has the effect of strengthening the spleen, appetizing and promoting digestion. The production process is simple and interesting. Although you need to wait for fermentation, the hands-on operation is not complicated and is very suitable as an introduction to fermentation. The total production time is expected to be approximately 2 days, of which only approximately 1 hour of hands-on time will be required.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★★
Estimated calories: 420 kcal
ingredients_zh: 安琪甜酒曲一包 (8g)（虽然按比例为每 1000g 糯米用 3g，但多放酒曲能提高成功概率）
清水 720g + 600g（720 克用于蒸饭，后 500g 用于发酵）
干净密封玻璃或陶瓷容器 1 个
ingredients_en: 800g glutinous rice (round glutinous rice is recommended)
One pack (8g) of Anqi sweet rice wine (although the proportion is 3g per 1000g of glutinous rice, but adding more rice wine can increase the probability of success)
720g + 600g water (720g for steaming rice, the last 500g for fermentation)
1 clean sealed glass or ceramic container
steps_zh: 将 800g 糯米淘洗干净放入电饭煲，加入 720g 清水选择蒸饭模式
蒸熟后将米饭倒出摊凉，使用干净的工具将其摊至 30°C （用温度计测量为宜，体感温热但不烫手）
将 8g 安琪甜酒曲用 20ml 温水（约 30°C）化开，均匀撒在糯米饭中，同时翻拌均匀
向糯米饭中加入 600g 清水帮助酒曲翻拌均匀。静置 2-3 分钟后发现糯米饭吸饱水分。这次加水可以让酒酿首次发酵便汤汁丰富
用擀面杖在糯米饭中央挖一个小洞（便于出酒）
将混合好的米饭装入干净容器中，轻轻压平表面，盖上盖子或保鲜膜密封好
放置于 28 ～ 32°C 环境下发酵 24 ～ 48 小时。发酵期间不可剧烈摇晃或移动
发酵成功标准为：中间凹槽有透明酒液渗出，整体略带酒香，无异味、不酸败
发酵结束后可立即冷藏保存（过程中可以加入桂花），每次食用用干净工具取出，可冷藏保存 7 ～ 10 天
可以继续二次发酵，加入 500ml 清水增加酒酿产量（800g 水以内即可）
酒酿会一直持续发酵。如果想停止发酵，可以上锅蒸 10 分钟杀菌，或放入冰箱冷藏
将 800g 糯米淘洗干净，倒入清水中浸泡 6 ～ 8 小时（冬季建议泡 8 ～ 10 小时），泡至米粒饱满
沥干糯米，放入蒸布中，隔水蒸 40 ～ 60 分钟。每 20 分钟打开锅盖翻动一次确保蒸熟均匀
蒸熟后将米饭倒出摊凉，加入酒曲，后续步骤同上
当然，酒酿老手可以随意尝试不同米搭配。可以替换 20%的糯米为小米、燕麦、黄米、血糯米等
steps_en: Rinse 800g of glutinous rice and put it into the rice cooker. Add 720g of water and select steam rice mode.
After steaming, pour the rice out and let it cool. Use clean tools to spread it to 30°C (it is better to use a thermometer to measure it. It will feel warm to the body but not hot to the touch).
Dissolve 8g of Angel Rice with 20ml of warm water (about 30°C), sprinkle evenly into the glutinous rice, and stir evenly

Add 600g of water to the glutinous rice to help stir the koji evenly. After letting it sit for 2-3 minutes, you will find that the glutinous rice has absorbed enough water. Adding water this time will make the fermented rice fermented for the first time and the soup will be rich.
Use a rolling pin to dig a small hole in the center of the glutinous rice (to facilitate the release of the wine)
Put the mixed rice into a clean container, gently flatten the surface, cover with a lid or plastic wrap and seal it
Leave to ferment at 28-32°C for 24-48 hours. Do not shake or move violently during fermentation
The criteria for successful fermentation are: transparent wine seeping out from the middle groove, with a slight aroma of wine overall, no peculiar smell, and no rancidity.

It can be refrigerated and stored immediately after fermentation (osmanthus can be added during the process). Use clean tools to take it out after each consumption. It can be refrigerated and stored for 7 to 10 days.
You can continue the secondary fermentation and add 500ml of water to increase the yield of fermented rice (within 800g of water is enough)
The wine will continue to ferment. If you want to stop the fermentation, you can steam it in a pot for 10 minutes to sterilize it, or put it in the refrigerator.
Wash 800g of glutinous rice, pour it into water and soak it for 6 to 8 hours (8 to 10 hours is recommended in winter) until the rice grains are full.
Drain the glutinous rice, put it in a steaming cloth, and steam for 40 to 60 minutes. Open the lid and stir every 20 minutes to ensure even steaming
After steaming, pour the rice out and let it cool, add the koji, and follow the same steps as above.
Of course, brewing veterans are free to try different rice combinations. You can replace 20% of glutinous rice with millet, oats, yellow rice, blood glutinous rice, etc.

intro_zh:
砂糖椰子冰沙是一道极具热带风情的快手冷饮，清甜的椰香融合粗粒黄糖的焦香，口感绵密冰爽。椰子水富含天然电解质与矿物质，能快速补充水分，咖啡调糖增添碳水能量。制作门槛极低，只要提前将椰汁冻硬，敲打成沙即可，对新手毫无压力。从冷冻到出品需提前准备 10 小时以上，但动手操作仅需几分钟，很适合作为悠闲的午后冰品。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：231 大卡
intro_en:
Sugar and Coconut Smoothie is a quick and cold drink with a tropical flavor. The sweet coconut aroma is combined with the caramel aroma of coarse brown sugar, and the taste is dense and refreshing. Coconut water is rich in natural electrolytes and minerals, which can quickly replenish water, and coffee mixed with sugar adds carbohydrate energy. The production threshold is extremely low. You only need to freeze the coconut milk in advance and beat it into sand. There is no pressure on novices. It takes more than 10 hours to prepare from freezing to serving, but the hands-on operation only takes a few minutes, making it perfect for a leisurely afternoon ice cream.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 231 kcal
ingredients_zh: 瓶装椰汁（瓶口较大为佳）
咖啡调糖 10g（两包太古咖啡调糖）
ingredients_en: Bottled coconut milk (the bottle with a larger mouth is better)
Coffee mixed with sugar (yellow coarse grains)
Coffee sugar 10g (two packs of Taikoo coffee sugar)
steps_zh: 500ml 瓶装椰汁倒掉 200ml，立刻拧紧瓶盖。
将这瓶椰汁放入冰箱冷冻区并冷冻 10 小时以上。
将这瓶椰汁取出，若确认瓶中椰汁已彻底冻结，则在墙角、椅背、桌角等坚硬表面上用力抽打。（请务必确认表面不会因此受到损伤）
当抽打到冻结椰汁变成冰沙状态，打开瓶盖倒出冰沙。
在冰沙表面均匀撒上咖啡调糖或坚果碎。
完成
steps_en: Pour out 200ml of coconut milk from the 500ml bottle and tighten the bottle cap immediately.
Place the bottle of coconut milk in the freezer section of your refrigerator and freeze it for 10 hours or more.

Take out the bottle of coconut milk. If you confirm that the coconut milk in the bottle has been completely frozen, tap it hard on a hard surface such as a wall, chair back, or table corner. (Please make sure the surface will not be damaged)
When the frozen coconut milk turns into smoothie, open the bottle cap and pour out the smoothie.
Sprinkle coffee sugar or chopped nuts evenly over the surface of the smoothie.
Complete
