intro_zh:
这是一道清爽健康的果蔬特饮，口感酸甜细腻，带有奇异果与苹果的天然果香，菠菜味清淡不抢。富含维生素 C 和膳食纤维，有助于促进消化。制作非常简单，新手也能一次成功，全程预计只需 10 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：184 大卡
intro_en:
This is a refreshing and healthy fruit and vegetable drink with a sweet and sour taste, with natural fruit flavors of kiwi and apple, and a light spinach flavor. Rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber, it helps improve digestion. It's so simple to make that even a novice can do it right the first time, and the whole process is expected to only take 10 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 184 kcal
steps_zh: 将猕猴桃切成两半，每半再分四份小块
将苹果切丁
将菠菜叶去梗，只留叶子部分
将菠菜切碎
一起倒入榨汁机搅拌杯
注水
加入白砂糖
启动搅拌机，搅拌约 4 个 15 秒（每 15 秒停下看状态）
steps_en: Cut the kiwi fruit in half and divide each half into four small pieces
Dice the apple
Remove the stems from the spinach leaves, leaving only the leaf part
Chop the spinach
Pour into juicer blender cup together
water injection
Add sugar
Start the mixer and mix for about 4 15 seconds (stop every 15 seconds to check the status)
file_path: dishes/drink/奇异果菠菜特调/奇异果菠菜特调.md

intro_zh:
这款鸡尾酒色彩层次分明，底部红石榴糖浆似晚霞，中间橙汁透亮，上层蓝橙酒液如海水，整体呈现海边落日的意境，喝起来酸甜清爽，带朗姆酒香。橙汁和柠檬汁含少量维生素 C，酒精能帮助放松。调酒步骤不复杂，但倒液沿搅拌棒做出分层需要一点耐心，新手跟着做也能成功，准备加调制大约一刻钟搞定。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：173 大卡
intro_en:
This cocktail has distinct layers of color. The bottom layer of pomegranate syrup is like sunset, the middle layer is translucent orange juice, and the upper layer of blue orange liquor is like sea water. The overall mood is like a sunset on the seaside. It tastes sour, sweet and refreshing, with the aroma of rum. Orange and lemon juice contain small amounts of vitamin C, and alcohol can help relax you. The steps for making wine are not complicated, but it requires a little patience to pour the liquid along the stirring rod to create layers. Novices can also succeed if they follow it. It takes about a quarter of an hour to prepare and mix.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 173 kcal
ingredients_en: A big ice cube will do just fine
steps_zh: 柠檬洗净切出一片
选择一个杯子，建议使用容量在 350~400 毫升的透明玻璃杯
放入大冰块，用搅拌棒搅拌冰杯
加入红石榴糖浆
让橙汁沿搅拌棒导入酒杯，到就被一半就行
轻轻搅拌半圈
倒入苏打水
拿出调酒杯，加入白朗姆 + 蓝橙力娇酒 + 柠檬汁 + 冰块。然后 shake，shake
轻轻倒入酒杯中
插上柠檬和吸管
steps_en: Wash the lemon and cut into slices
Choose a cup, it is recommended to use a transparent glass with a capacity of 350~400ml
Add large ice cubes and stir the ice cup with a stir stick
Add grenadine
Let the orange juice pour into the wine glass along the stir stick until it is half filled.
Stir gently half a turn
Pour in soda water
Take out a mixing glass and add white rum + blue cura liqueur + lemon juice + ice cubes. Then shake, shake
Pour gently into the wine glass
Insert lemon and straw

intro_zh:
石凉粉是河南信阳的传统小吃，口感爽滑如果冻，配以薄荷汁或柠檬汁清凉解暑，属于豫菜系。由冰粉籽手工揉搓而成，天然无添加，含有丰富的植物胶质。制作非常简单，对新手友好，全程约需 3 小时，其中 2.5 小时为静置凝固时间，几乎不占用人工。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：110 大卡
intro_en:
Stone jelly is a traditional snack in Xinyang, Henan. It has a smooth texture like jelly and is served with mint juice or lemon juice to cool down and relieve the heat. It belongs to the Henan cuisine. Made from hand-kneaded ice powder seeds, it is natural and contains no additives and is rich in plant gum. The production is very simple and friendly to novices. The whole process takes about 3 hours, of which 2.5 hours is the standing and solidification time, which requires almost no labor.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 110 kcal
ingredients_zh: 过滤豆浆渣的纱布一块
一次性透明塑料杯（可选）
ingredients_en: A piece of gauze to filter soy milk residue
Glowing ice cubes when exposed to water (optional)
steps_zh: 将凉白开倒入盆中；
将冰粉籽全部用纱布包起来，开口处打结
将包好的冰粉籽放入凉白开中，在凉白开中用力揉搓 6 分钟
然后将凉白开放置 2.5 小时，即可成型
随后将石凉粉用勺子装进准备好的一次性透明塑料杯中，加入 10ml 薄荷汁或者 10g 薄荷粉（柠檬汁、山楂汁、桑椹汁也可），再放入遇水发光冰块，用勺子慢慢搅拌均匀
steps_en: Pour the cool boiled water into a basin;
Wrap all the ice powder seeds with gauze and tie a knot at the opening
Put the wrapped ice powder seeds into the cold water and knead vigorously in the cold water for 6 minutes
Then leave the cold boiled water for 2.5 hours to form.

Then put the stone jelly powder into the prepared disposable transparent plastic cup with a spoon, add 10ml mint juice or 10g mint powder (lemon juice, hawthorn juice, mulberry juice can also be used), then add ice cubes that glow when exposed to water, and slowly stir evenly with a spoon

intro_zh:
这是一款经典的金酒鸡尾酒，口感清爽微苦，带有柠檬的明亮酸香与汤力水的细腻气泡，入口轻盈畅快。虽然主要提供水分和少量酒精带来的热量，新鲜柠檬汁能补充维生素 C，帮助提神。做法非常简单，新手也能轻松掌握，预计只需 5 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：205 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic gin cocktail with a refreshing and slightly bitter taste, with the bright sour aroma of lemon and the delicate bubbles of tonic water, making it light and smooth in the mouth. Although it mainly provides water and a small amount of calories from alcohol, fresh lemon juice can provide a boost of vitamin C and help boost your mood. It's so simple that even a novice can master it, and it should only take 5 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 205 kcal
steps_zh: 将柠檬对半切（**刀方向垂直于柠檬的头尾连线**），并从其中的一半中切取一片柠檬备用
再次将柠檬对半切，将得到的 4 角柠檬用压汁器压出柠檬汁置于容器中备用
选择一个杯子，建议使用容量在 350~400 毫升的透明玻璃杯
将 100 克冰块放置在杯底
倒入 30~40 毫升金酒
倒入 15 毫升柠檬汁（如果喜酸可以加多点或全加）
用勺子搅拌均匀
将之前准备的一片柠檬放置好
缓慢沿杯壁注入汤力水直至满杯（不要倒在冰上，避免起泡流失）
用勺子轻轻上下提拉将液体搅拌均匀（不要旋转搅拌，避免起泡流失）
在液面放置好装饰用的绿叶（可选）
steps_en: Cut the lemon in half (**The direction of the knife is perpendicular to the line connecting the head and tail of the lemon**), and cut a piece of lemon from one half and set aside.
Cut the lemon in half again, use a juicer to squeeze out the lemon juice from the 4 lemon wedges, and place it in a container for later use.
Choose a cup, it is recommended to use a transparent glass with a capacity of 350~400ml
Place 100 grams of ice cubes at the bottom of the cup
Pour 30~40ml gin
Pour in 15 ml lemon juice (if you like sourness, you can add more or all)
Mix evenly with a spoon
Place the slice of lemon you prepared earlier
Slowly pour tonic water along the wall of the cup until the cup is full (do not pour on ice to avoid foaming and loss)
Use a spoon to gently lift the liquid up and down to stir the liquid evenly (do not rotate and stir to avoid foaming and loss)
Place decorative green leaves on the liquid surface (optional)

intro_zh:
经典金酒鸡尾酒，酸甜适口，气泡激爽。柠檬提供丰富维 C，搭配蔗糖糖浆平衡酸度。制作非常简单，新手只需 5 分钟即可调制完成，适合在家轻松享用。注意饮酒有害健康，请勿过量。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：150 大卡
intro_en:
Classic gin cocktail, sweet and sour, with refreshing bubbles. The lemon provides a rich source of vitamin C, and the cane sugar syrup balances the acidity. It is very simple to make and can be prepared by novices in just 5 minutes, making it suitable for easy enjoyment at home. Please note that drinking alcohol is harmful to your health, please do not overdose.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 150 kcal
ingredients_zh: [蔗糖糖浆](../../condiment/蔗糖糖浆/蔗糖糖浆.md)
steps_zh: 将柠檬对半切（**刀方向垂直于柠檬的头尾连线**），并从其中的一半中切取一片柠檬备用
再次将柠檬对半切，将得到的 4 角柠檬用压汁器压出柠檬汁置于容器中备用
选择一个杯子，建议使用容量在 350~400 毫升的透明玻璃杯
将 100 克冰块放置在杯底
倒入 30~40 毫升金酒
倒入 20 毫升柠檬汁（如果喜酸可以加多点或全加）
倒入 30~40 克蔗糖糖浆
用勺子搅拌均匀
将之前准备的一片柠檬放置好
缓慢沿杯壁注入苏打气泡水直至满杯（不要倒在冰上，避免起泡流失）
用勺子轻轻上下提拉将液体搅拌均匀（不要旋转搅拌，避免起泡流失）
在液面放置好装饰用的绿叶（可选）
将冰块、金酒、柠檬汁、蔗糖糖浆倒入雪克瓶，雪克均匀
将充分雪克的产物倒到杯子中（如果里面的冰太碎了，可以选择过滤其中的冰，重新往杯中补充冰块）
steps_en: Cut the lemon in half (**The direction of the knife is perpendicular to the line connecting the head and tail of the lemon**), and cut a piece of lemon from one half and set aside.
Cut the lemon in half again, use a juicer to squeeze out the lemon juice from the 4 lemon wedges, and place it in a container for later use.
Choose a cup, it is recommended to use a transparent glass with a capacity of 350~400ml
Place 100 grams of ice cubes at the bottom of the cup
Pour 30~40ml gin
Pour in 20 ml lemon juice (if you like sourness, you can add more or all)
Pour 30~40 grams of sucrose syrup
Mix evenly with a spoon
Place the slice of lemon you prepared earlier
Slowly pour sparkling water along the wall of the cup until the cup is full (do not pour it over ice to avoid loss of bubbles)
Use a spoon to gently lift the liquid up and down to stir the liquid evenly (do not rotate and stir to avoid foaming and loss)
Place decorative green leaves on the liquid surface (optional)
Pour ice cubes, gin, lemon juice, and sucrose syrup into the shaker bottle, and mix evenly
Pour enough shake of the product into the cup (if the ice inside is too broken, you can choose to filter the ice and refill the cup with ice cubes)

intro_zh:
这道饮品以新鲜柠檬为主角，搭配果蜜调和，酸甜平衡，冰镇后更感清凉解暑。柠檬富含维生素 C，经常饮用有助于补充营养、提神美白。制作步骤极简，只需捶打、加料、摇晃，新手也能在三五分钟内完成。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：141 大卡
intro_en:
This drink uses fresh lemon as the main character and is blended with fruit honey to balance the sweetness and sourness. It feels even more refreshing after being chilled. Lemon is rich in vitamin C. Regular drinking can help to supplement nutrition, refresh and whiten your skin. The production steps are extremely simple, just beat, add ingredients and shake, and even a novice can complete it in three to five minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 141 kcal
steps_zh: 称 40~45 克柠檬，放入雪克杯中
雪克杯盖盖子锤大约 10 次
加入果蜜 40~45 克
补水
摇晃均匀
最后根据喜好加冰
steps_en: Weigh 40~45 grams of lemon and put it into a shaker cup
Hammer the shaker lid about 10 times
Add 40~45 grams of fruit honey
Hydrate
Shake evenly
Finally, add ice according to preference

intro_zh:
耙耙柑茶是一款融合了柑橘清甜与茉莉花香的果茶饮品，口感清爽回甘，属于创意调饮，不限于特定菜系。耙耙柑富含维生素 C 与膳食纤维，搭配绿茶饮用能带来清新提神的体验。做法非常简单，新手友好，从泡茶到搅拌全程仅需约 15 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：81 大卡
intro_en:
Mandarin tea is a fruit tea drink that combines the sweetness of citrus and the fragrance of jasmine. It has a refreshing and sweet taste. It is a creative drink and is not limited to specific cuisines. Mandarin orange is rich in vitamin C and dietary fiber. Drinking it with green tea can bring a refreshing and refreshing experience. The recipe is very simple and beginner-friendly, and the entire process from making tea to stirring only takes about 15 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 81 kcal
ingredients_zh: 耙耙柑 1~2 个（200 克以上）
steps_zh: 茉莉绿茶调配（推荐比例=>茶 : 水 : 冰 = 1~2 : 50 : 30）
正式调配
steps_en: Jasmine green tea blend (recommended ratio => tea: water: ice = 1~2: 50: 30)
Formal deployment

intro_zh:
这是一道源自泰国街头的经典奶茶，茶香浓郁，口感绵密顺滑，炼乳与牛奶带来香甜奶味。茶奶结合可提供少量蛋白质和钙，但含糖量较高，适宜作为消暑解渴的饮品。制作步骤简单，但需反复过滤茶汤并等待长时间冷藏，整体耗时约 4 小时 20 分钟，对新手稍有耐心即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：185 大卡
intro_en:
This is a classic milk tea originating from the streets of Thailand. It has a rich tea aroma and a creamy and smooth taste. The condensed milk and milk bring a sweet and milky taste. The combination of tea and milk can provide a small amount of protein and calcium, but the sugar content is high, making it suitable as a drink to relieve summer heat and quench thirst. The preparation steps are simple, but you need to repeatedly filter the tea soup and wait for a long time to refrigerate. The overall process takes about 4 hours and 20 minutes. It can be completed with a little patience for novices.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 185 kcal
ingredients_en: Hong Kong style milk tea filter bag
steps_zh: 600cc 水大火烧开
在过滤袋中装入 20g 茶粉，开水倒入过滤袋中，过滤 20 遍
使用克称量取 24g 炼乳、24g 白糖和 18ml 牛奶放入 1000ml 以上的水壶中
将过滤好的茶水倒入水壶中搅拌，直到白糖融化
将水壶放到冰箱 4 小时以上
喝前可以加 6-8 颗冰块
steps_en: 600cc water is brought to a boil over high heat
Put 20g tea powder into the filter bag, pour boiling water into the filter bag, and filter 20 times
Use grams to weigh 24g condensed milk, 24g sugar and 18ml milk into a kettle of more than 1000ml
Pour the filtered tea into the kettle and stir until the sugar melts
Place the kettle in the refrigerator for more than 4 hours
You can add 6-8 ice cubes before drinking
images: dishes/drink/泰国手标红茶/泰国手标红茶.jpg
file_path: dishes/drink/泰国手标红茶/泰国手标红茶.md

intro_zh:
酸梅汤是一道酸甜可口、清凉解暑的传统饮品，冰镇后饮用尤为沁人心脾。配方中的乌梅、山楂、甘草等原料有助于生津止渴、消食开胃。做法简单，新手友好，只需浸泡、熬煮和冷藏即可。制作全程包括浸泡、两次煎煮和冷藏，大约需要 6 小时以上，建议提前准备。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：359 大卡
intro_en:
Sour plum soup is a traditional drink that is sweet and sour, refreshing and relieving the heat. It is especially refreshing when consumed chilled. The raw materials such as black plum, hawthorn, and licorice in the formula help to produce body fluids, quench thirst, and stimulate appetite. It’s simple and beginner-friendly, just soak, boil and refrigerate. The entire preparation process includes soaking, two decoctions and refrigeration, which takes about 6 hours or more. It is recommended to prepare in advance.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 359 kcal
steps_zh: 冲洗材料（干桂花和冰糖除外）， 1.5 升水常温浸泡两小时以上（干桂花和冰糖除外）
开中大火煮沸，盖盖，转小火煮 40 分钟，为头煎
将冰糖放入盆内，再将沥好用材的头汤趁热倒入，搅拌至冰糖融化。
药材重新装回锅内再 600 毫升的水，开大火煮沸，盖盖，转中火，再煮 20 分钟为二煎
最后将二煎和冰糖水趁热混合为成品。在成品 60-70℃加入干桂花（不要超过 80℃）加盖晾凉再放入冰箱冷藏 3 小时以上。
饮用时记得将干桂花沥出。如饮茶般细啜，冰凉振齿，酸醒人、甜适度，滋味丰满而悠长
steps_en: Rinse ingredients (except dried osmanthus and rock sugar), soak in 1.5 liters of water at room temperature for more than two hours (except dried osmanthus and rock sugar)
Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, cover, turn to low heat and simmer for 40 minutes until the head is fried.
Put the rock sugar into a basin, pour the drained soup into it while it's still hot, and stir until the rock sugar melts.
Put the medicinal materials back into the pot and add 600 ml of water, bring to a boil over high heat, cover, turn to medium heat, and cook for another 20 minutes for the second decoction.

Finally, mix the second fried and rock sugar water while hot to form the finished product. Add dried osmanthus flowers to the finished product at 60-70℃ (do not exceed 80℃), cover and let cool, then refrigerate for more than 3 hours.
Remember to drain the dried osmanthus flowers when drinking. Sip carefully like drinking tea, cool and refreshing, sour, moderately sweet, full and long-lasting taste

intro_zh:
一份高蛋白、高纤维的便捷营养早餐，将牛奶的滑润、燕麦的谷香与煎蛋的嫩脆巧妙结合，入口温热柔和、易于消化，饱腹感强。制作过程简单直接，对新手极为友好，全程约三分钟即可完成，搭配蔬果更添清爽。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：421 大卡
intro_en:
A convenient and nutritious breakfast with high protein and fiber, which cleverly combines the smoothness of milk, the cereal flavor of oats and the tenderness and crispness of fried eggs. It is warm and soft in the mouth, easy to digest, and has a strong feeling of fullness. The preparation process is simple and straightforward, extremely friendly to novices, and can be completed in about three minutes. It is even more refreshing when paired with fruits and vegetables.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 421 kcal
steps_zh: 将牛奶倒入早餐杯（冷的即可）
准备好 200ml 水，如果是直饮水直接加入燕麦，否则请烧开后加入燕麦
水沸后 2 分钟，燕麦煮好
煮好的燕麦捞出倒入牛奶中（尽量不要将煮燕麦的水也倒入牛奶，影响口感）
将燕麦替换为快煮燕麦
将牛奶倒入装有快煮燕麦的容器中并搅拌
将混合物放入微波炉中
中等火力微波 4 分钟
热锅，锅内放一层底油，油热后煎鸡蛋，每面煎 20s，考虑调底味（3g 椒盐，可选）
关火，装盘
steps_en: Pour the milk into the breakfast cup (cold is fine)
Prepare 200ml of water. If it is drinking water, add oats directly. Otherwise, add oats after boiling.
2 minutes after the water boils, the oats are ready
Remove the cooked oats and pour them into the milk (try not to pour the water used to cook the oats into the milk, as this will affect the taste)
Replace oats with quick-cooking oats
Pour the milk into the container of quick cooking oats and stir
Place the mixture in the microwave
Microwave on medium heat for 4 minutes
Heat a pan, put a layer of base oil in the pan, fry the eggs after the oil is hot, fry for 20 seconds on each side, consider adjusting the base flavor (3g salt and pepper, optional)
Turn off the heat and plate

intro_zh:
这道传统小吃茶香浓郁，鲜香可口，富含优质蛋白质，是快捷的营养早餐之选。制作步骤清晰，难度适中，新手需要留意火候与香料配比，约 30 分钟即可完成，一次能做够 2-3 人食用，适合周末从容备好。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：193 大卡
intro_en:
This traditional snack has a rich tea aroma, is fresh and delicious, and is rich in high-quality protein. It is a quick and nutritious breakfast choice. The preparation steps are clear and the difficulty is moderate. Novices need to pay attention to the heat and spice ratio. It can be completed in about 30 minutes. It can feed 2-3 people at a time and is suitable for leisurely preparation on weekends.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 193 kcal
steps_zh: 用冷水将鸡蛋煮熟，大火大约 8 分钟（根据自家厨具决定）
鸡蛋捞出，过冷水
将鸡蛋互相碰撞，使每个鸡蛋产生裂缝
将鸡蛋下锅，放入八角，香叶，桂皮，茴香，冰糖，红茶，生抽，老抽，食盐
加水直至没过鸡蛋
大火煮开之后，转中小火煮 15 分钟
steps_en: Boil the eggs in cold water and cook over high heat for about 8 minutes (depending on your own kitchen utensils)
Take out the eggs and put them in cold water
Crash the eggs against each other to create cracks in each egg
Put the eggs into the pot, add star anise, bay leaves, cinnamon, fennel, rock sugar, black tea, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and salt
Add water until eggs are covered
After boiling over high heat, turn to medium-low heat and simmer for 15 minutes

intro_zh:
一道甜香软糯的中式传统粥品。以糯米、红枣和桂圆同煮，自带甘甜，暖身暖胃。有补血安神、健脑益智、补养心脾的食养效果。做法非常友好，新手也能轻松掌握，从准备到粥香满屋大约需要 70 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：617 大卡
intro_en:
A sweet, soft and glutinous traditional Chinese porridge. Boiled with glutinous rice, red dates and longan, it has its own sweetness and warms the body and stomach. It has the nutritional effects of nourishing blood and calming the nerves, strengthening the brain and improving intelligence, and nourishing the heart and spleen. The method is very user-friendly and can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about 70 minutes from preparation to when the porridge fills the house with aroma.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 617 kcal
steps_zh: 将桂圆肉扒出，用清水洗两次，放入碗中浸泡 10 分钟
红枣用清水洗两次，放入碗中浸泡 10 分钟
糯米放入电饭锅中，清水淘米两次后，加入 2000ml 水
将桂圆和红枣加入电饭锅
打开电饭锅煮饭模式，1 小时后粥成
steps_en: Take out the longan meat, wash it twice with water, put it in a bowl and soak it for 10 minutes
Wash the red dates twice with water and soak them in a bowl for 10 minutes
Put the glutinous rice into the rice cooker, rinse it twice with clean water, then add 2000ml of water
Add longan and red dates to the rice cooker
Turn on the rice cooker cooking mode, the porridge will be ready after 1 hour

intro_zh:
意式香肠北非蛋是一道浓郁鲜香的地中海风味料理，溏心蛋卧在酸甜的番茄肉酱里，搭配脆面包蘸食，口感丰富。主要食材提供优质蛋白质，番茄、甜椒和洋葱带来维生素与膳食纤维。制作不难，只需注意焖蛋火候，全程约 30 分钟即可上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：668 大卡
intro_en:
Italian Sausage North African Eggs is a rich and fragrant Mediterranean-style dish. The soft-boiled eggs are nestled in the sweet and sour tomato meat sauce and served with crispy bread for dipping. It has a rich taste. The main ingredients provide high-quality protein, and tomatoes, bell peppers and onions bring vitamins and dietary fiber. It’s not difficult to make, just pay attention to the temperature of the eggs and it will be ready to serve in about 30 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 668 kcal
ingredients_zh: 意式猪肉香肠（去肠衣）、辣香肠 (Chorizo) 或切块的午餐肉
百味来 (Barilla) 拿坡里意面酱 (Napoletana Sauce)
面包（推荐酸面团面包 Sourdough、恰巴塔 Ciabatta 或厚切吐司）
百味来拿坡里意面酱：1 罐（400g，提供基本的番茄、洋葱和香草风味）
ingredients_en: Pork sausage (casing removed), chorizo, or diced lunch meat
Bell peppers (green or red peppers are acceptable)
Bread (sourdough, ciabatta or thick-cut toast recommended)
Barilla Napoli Pasta Sauce: 1 jar (400g, provides basic tomato, onion and herb flavor)
Bell pepper: half (cut into thin strips)
steps_zh: 将意式猪肉香肠去肠衣备用；洋葱切小丁；甜椒切细丝。
在宽口平底锅中倒入 10ml - 15ml 橄榄油，中火加热。
放入处理好的香肠或午餐肉，翻炒至边缘金黄酥脆（如果使用生香肠，翻炒时用勺子将其捣碎变色）。
将洋葱丁和甜椒丝加入锅中与肉一起翻炒，持续翻炒 4 - 5 分钟，直到蔬菜变软，洋葱呈半透明状。
倒入百味来拿坡里意面酱，搅拌均匀。将火调至中低火，保持微沸炖煮 2 - 3 分钟。（如果酱汁看起来太稠，可以加入 15ml 水）。
用勺子的背面在锅内的酱汁中挖出 3 - 4 个小“坑”。
依次小心地将鸡蛋打入每个坑中。
盖上平底锅的盖子，利用蒸汽焖熟蛋白。等待 3 - 5 分钟。**注意：请频繁检查状态**。当蛋白变得不透明且凝固，但轻轻摇晃平底锅时蛋黄仍能晃动（溏心状态）时即可结束这一步。
关火。根据个人喜好撒上磨碎的帕马森干酪、新鲜欧芹或干辣椒碎。
将平底锅直接端上桌，配以硬壳面包蘸取蛋黄与酱汁食用。
steps_en: Remove the casings from the Italian pork sausage and set aside; dice the onion; cut the bell pepper into thin strips.
Pour 10ml - 15ml olive oil into a wide pan and place over medium heat.
Add the prepared sausage or luncheon meat and stir-fry until the edges are golden and crispy (if using raw sausage, mash it with a spoon to change color).
Add the diced onions and shredded bell peppers to the pan with the meat and stir-fry, continuing to stir-fry for 4 - 5 minutes, until the vegetables are soft and the onions are translucent.
Pour in the Barilla Napoli pasta sauce and mix well. Reduce heat to medium-low and maintain simmering for 2 - 3 minutes. (If the sauce seems too thick, add 15ml water).
Use the back of a spoon to make 3 - 4 small "dimples" in the sauce in the pan.
Carefully crack the eggs into each pit in turn.

Cover the pan and let the steam cook the egg whites. Wait 3-5 minutes. **Note: Please check status frequently**. Finish this step when the egg whites are opaque and set, but the yolks still jiggle when you shake the pan gently (to a runny state).
Turn off the heat. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese, fresh parsley or chopped dried chili pepper, if desired.
Serve straight from the pan with crusty bread for dipping in the egg yolk and sauce.

intro_zh:
微波炉荷包蛋是一道便捷的家常快手菜，蛋白嫩滑、蛋黄软糯，带有芝麻油的清香。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白质和卵磷脂。做法极其简单，新手也能轻松掌握，从准备到出锅仅需约 2 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：169 大卡
intro_en:
Microwave poached eggs are a convenient home-cooked dish with tender and smooth egg whites, soft and waxy yolks, and the fragrance of sesame oil. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and lecithin. The method is extremely simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It only takes about 2 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 169 kcal
steps_zh: 将鸡蛋打入小碗中，用筷子在所有鸡蛋黄上扎 2 个洞，避免加热弄脏微波炉
然后向碗内倒入常温饮用水
再向碗内倒入食用盐
最后加入芝麻油
将放好材料的碗放入微波炉中，高火加热 80 秒
到达设定时间后，使用抹布垫着手取出成品
steps_en: Break the eggs into a small bowl and use chopsticks to poke 2 holes in all the egg yolks to avoid heating and staining the microwave.
Then pour room temperature drinking water into the bowl
Pour edible salt into the bowl
Finally add sesame oil
Place the bowl with the ingredients in the microwave and heat on high for 80 seconds
After the set time is reached, use a rag to remove the finished product

intro_zh:
水煮玉米是一道家常快手菜，口感清甜软糯。新鲜玉米带皮煮制，保留原香，加入盐和糖更能提味。它富含膳食纤维、维生素与碳水化合物，能为身体提供饱足感。做法极其简单，新手也能轻松上手，从准备到上桌只需大约 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：108 大卡
intro_en:
Boiled corn is a quick home-cooked dish with a sweet and chewy texture. Fresh corn is cooked in its husks to retain its original flavor, and salt and sugar are added to enhance the taste. It is rich in dietary fiber, vitamins and carbohydrates, which can provide the body with a feeling of satiety. It’s extremely simple to make, even for novices, and only takes about 15 minutes from prep to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 108 kcal
ingredients_zh: 淹过玉米约半节指头的水
煮玉米的时候，开始和淡盐水，差不多 2 克盐加 50ml 的水
根据口味选择加或者不加糖（可选）
ingredients_en: A pot big enough to hold corn
About half a finger of corn is covered with water
When cooking corn, start with light salt water, about 2 grams of salt and 50ml of water
Choose to add sugar or not according to taste (optional)
steps_zh: 将新鲜玉米剥去外皮，剩部分玉米皮入锅
加入淹过玉米约半节指头的水，加盐和糖
水煮开之后转至小火，加盖继续煮 15-20 分钟，玉米煮久点没事。
煮熟后沥干水分，冷却后食用。
steps_en: Peel off the outer shell of fresh corn and put the remaining corn husks into the pot
Add about half a finger's worth of water to cover the corn, add salt and sugar
After the water boils, reduce the heat to low, cover and continue cooking for 15-20 minutes. It will be fine if the corn is cooked longer.
Drain the water after cooking and serve after cooling.

intro_zh:
手抓饼外酥里软，层次分明，是深受喜爱的家常面点。饼皮用半烫面制作，柔韧有嚼劲，搭配鸡蛋和蔬菜，营养均衡。做法对新手很友好，从和面到出锅大约只需 40 分钟，非常适合忙碌的早晨。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：1050 大卡
---
intro_en:
Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, and with distinct layers, hand cakes are a beloved home-cooked pastry. The crust is made of semi-hot noodles, which is pliable and chewy. It is paired with eggs and vegetables for a balanced nutrition. The recipe is beginner-friendly and only takes about 40 minutes from kneading to cooking, making it perfect for busy mornings.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 1050 kcal
---
steps_zh: 面粉放入碗中，加入开水搅拌成絮状，再加入冷水揉成光滑面团，覆盖湿布静置 20 分钟。
面团分成每份约 100 克，搓圆，擀成薄片。
表面均匀涂抹食用油，撒上盐，卷成蜗牛状，松弛 10 分钟。
面团再次擀成薄饼，厚度均匀。
热锅中倒入油，小火煎至两面金黄起泡。
煎好的饼依次铺入煎蛋、生菜、火腿、芝士片等配料，卷起即可。
steps_en: Put the flour into a bowl, add boiling water and stir until it becomes fluffy, then add cold water and knead it into a smooth dough, cover with a damp cloth and let it rest for 20 minutes.
Divide the dough into portions of about 100 g each, roll into rounds and roll into thin slices.
Spread cooking oil evenly on the surface, sprinkle with salt, roll into a snail shape, and rest for 10 minutes.
Roll the dough into a thin pancake again to an even thickness.
Pour oil into the hot pan and fry over low heat until golden brown and bubbly on both sides.
Spread the fried pancakes with fried eggs, lettuce, ham, cheese slices and other ingredients in sequence, and then roll it up.

intro_zh:
一道用微波炉快速制作的嫩滑蒸蛋，口感细腻如布丁，属于家常快手菜。富含优质蛋白，易于消化吸收，很适合作为早餐或轻食。制作非常简单，新手也能轻松上手，全程约 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：151 大卡
intro_en:
A tender steamed egg made quickly in the microwave, with a texture as delicate as pudding, it is a quick home-cooked dish. It is rich in high-quality protein, easy to digest and absorb, and is suitable for breakfast or light snacks. It is very simple to make and can be easily started by novices. The whole process can be completed in about 10 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 151 kcal
ingredients_zh: 保鲜膜或微波炉专用盖
鸡蛋 2 个（约 100g 蛋液）
温水或高汤 100-120ml（蛋液体积的 1.0-1.2 倍）
ingredients_en: Warm water or stock 100-120ml (1.0-1.2 times the volume of egg liquid)
A few drops of sesame oil (for cooking)
steps_zh: 将鸡蛋打散，加入温水/高汤、盐、生抽，轻轻搅匀，尽量不要起泡。
将蛋液过筛倒入耐热碗中，表面若有气泡可用牙签轻戳。
覆盖保鲜膜并扎 8-10 个小孔，或使用微波炉专用盖（留缝隙）。
放入微波炉中加热：
加热完成后取出静置 1 分钟，让余温使中心完全熟化。
淋上香油，撒葱花即可食用。
steps_en: Beat the eggs, add warm water/stock, salt, and light soy sauce, stir gently and try not to foam.
Sift the egg mixture into a heat-resistant bowl. If there are any bubbles on the surface, poke lightly with a toothpick.
Cover with plastic wrap and poke 8-10 small holes, or use a microwave-safe lid (leaving gaps).
Heat it in the microwave:
After heating is complete, take it out and let it sit for 1 minute to allow the residual heat to fully cook the center.
Drizzle with sesame oil, sprinkle with chopped green onion and serve.

intro_zh:
这是一道用普通电锅就能轻松做出的家常蛋料理，蛋黄呈现流动的溏心状态，口感嫩滑香醇。每颗鸡蛋提供约 6 克优质蛋白质，尤其适合健身人群补充营养。制作过程简单明了，只要掌握好加热和静置的时间，新手也能快速上手，全程仅需 大约 15 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：72 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked egg dish that can be easily made with an ordinary electric pot. The egg yolk is in a runny state and has a tender, smooth and fragrant taste. Each egg provides about 6 grams of high-quality protein, which is especially suitable for fitness people to supplement nutrition. The production process is simple and straightforward. As long as you master the heating and resting times, novices can get started quickly. The whole process only takes about 15 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 72 kcal
ingredients_zh: 鸡蛋 1 颗或更多（只要您的电锅装得下，不管有几颗鸡蛋都可以）
淹过鸡蛋约 2 公分的冷水
ingredients_en: 1 egg or more (no matter how many eggs you have, as long as your electric cooker can fit them)
Cover the eggs with about 2 cm of cold water
steps_zh: 将鸡蛋放入电锅中。鸡蛋不可互相堆叠，应皆在底部，并留有空间可以晃动
倒入淹过鸡蛋约 2 公分的冷水
开盖，使用最大功率加热至水滚起（大约 85 - 95 度，稍微滚动，不需完全沸腾）
关火，盖上盖子，让鸡蛋静置。
沥干水分，用冷水冲洗鸡蛋约 1 分钟，即可去壳食用。
steps_en: Place the eggs into the electric cooker. Eggs should not be stacked on top of each other, they should all be at the bottom with room to shake
Pour in cold water covering about 2 cm of the eggs
Open the lid and use maximum power to heat the water until it boils (about 85 - 95 degrees, slightly rolling, not full boiling)
Turn off the heat, cover and let the eggs sit.
Drain the water and rinse the eggs with cold water for about 1 minute before shelling them and serving.

intro_zh:
这是一道通过科学家研发的循环水煮法制成的鸡蛋，蛋黄绵密细腻，蛋白均匀凝固，口感层次分明。它保留了更多营养素，多酚含量比传统煮法高 23%，蛋白质丰富。制作难度较高，需精准控温并反复转移，预计制作时长约 35 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：86 大卡
intro_en:
This is an egg made through the circulating water boiling method developed by scientists. The yolk is dense and delicate, the protein is evenly solidified, and the taste is distinct. It retains more nutrients, contains 23% more polyphenols than traditional cooking, and is rich in protein. The production is difficult and requires precise temperature control and repeated transfers. The production is expected to take about 35 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 86 kcal
ingredients_zh: 新鲜鸡蛋（推荐 AA 级）
steps_zh: 准备两锅水： A 锅维持 100°C 沸水， B 锅维持 30°C 温水
用漏勺将鸡蛋放入 A 锅，启动定时器
精准**每 2 分钟**将鸡蛋转移至另一锅水
重复转移操作共 16 次（总时长 32 分钟）
最后一次转移后，在 B 锅静置 30 秒
立即放入冰水（ 0 摄氏度）终止加热（维持 30 秒）
剥壳时从钝端气室处开始，沿纵轴剥离蛋膜
steps_en: Prepare two pots of water: Pot A maintains 100°C boiling water, while Pot B maintains 30°C warm water.
Using a slotted spoon, place the eggs into pot A and start the timer
Precisely **every 2 minutes** transfer the eggs to another pot of water
Repeat transfer operation 16 times (total time: 32 minutes)
After the last transfer, let stand in pot B for 30 seconds
Immediately put in ice water (0 degrees Celsius) to stop heating (maintain for 30 seconds)
When peeling, start from the air chamber at the blunt end and peel off the egg membrane along the longitudinal axis.

intro_zh:
燕麦鸡蛋饼是一道快手营养早餐，口感软嫩，带有燕麦的谷物香气与蛋奶的醇厚，属于家常简约风格。富含蛋白质、碳水化合物和膳食纤维，能为身体提供充足能量，尤其适合健身人士和工作日早晨。做法简单，对新手友好，从备料到出锅通常只需十几分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：535 大卡
intro_en:
Oatmeal egg pancake is a quick and nutritious breakfast. It tastes soft and tender, with the aroma of oatmeal and the richness of custard. It is a simple home-style style. Rich in protein, carbohydrates and dietary fiber, it can provide the body with sufficient energy, especially suitable for fitness people and workday mornings. The method is simple and friendly to novices, and it usually only takes ten minutes from preparation to cooking.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 535 kcal
ingredients_zh: 牛奶 50-100g，能够将燕麦搅拌粘稠即可
可根据口味选择增加 50g 蔬菜，如菠菜。
鸡蛋两个，亦可选择两个蛋清，一个蛋黄。
纯干燕麦片 50g （大约等同一个鸡蛋的量）
ingredients_en: 50-100g of milk, just enough to make the oats thick
You can add 50g of vegetables such as spinach according to taste.
Two eggs, you can also choose two egg whites and one egg yolk.
Pure dry oatmeal 50g (about the same amount as an egg)
A carton of milk is about 250ml
A handful of chopped vegetable leaves
steps_zh: 将牛奶与干燕麦混合搅拌均匀至黏稠状。
将鸡蛋搅拌均匀至颜色单一程度。
将鸡蛋液倒入燕麦牛奶中继续搅拌至黏稠、均匀。
平底锅中加入一层黄油并覆盖均匀。
下入搅拌好的食材，并摊开至饼状。
小火加热两到三分钟。如想要加入蔬菜，可以在加热过程中加入碎菜叶。
翻面继续加热两分钟。
出锅，搭配剩下的牛奶作为早餐。
steps_en: Mix milk and dry oats until smooth.
Beat the eggs until uniform in color.
Pour the egg mixture into the oat milk and continue stirring until thick and uniform.
Add a layer of butter to the pan and cover evenly.
Add the mixed ingredients and spread into a cake shape.
Heat over low heat for two to three minutes. If you want to add vegetables, you can add chopped vegetable leaves during the heating process.
Flip and continue heating for two minutes.
Remove from the pan and serve with remaining milk for breakfast.

intro_zh:
这是一道北方传统面食，松软可口，带着淡淡麦香。使用冷冻花卷蒸制，能快速补充碳水化合物和膳食纤维。做法极其简单，烹饪新手也能轻松掌握，全程仅需半小时，是理想的快手早餐。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：400 大卡
intro_en:
This is a traditional northern pasta dish that is soft and delicious, with a light wheat aroma. Steaming frozen Hanamaki can quickly replenish carbohydrates and dietary fiber. The recipe is extremely simple and can be easily mastered by novice cooks. The whole process only takes half an hour, making it an ideal quick breakfast.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 400 kcal
ingredients_zh: 冷冻花卷 5 个（女生分量 3 个即可）（可以在超市、各种买菜平台购买）
ingredients_en: 5 frozen flower rolls (3 pieces for girls) (can be purchased in supermarkets and various grocery shopping platforms)
steps_zh: 从花卷的包装袋中取出 5 个花卷
把花卷平铺在碟子上，尽量不用重叠
往锅里倒入 400ml 水，把蒸架放里面，把装花卷的碟子放在蒸架上，盖上锅盖。
开大火加热，直至水沸腾。
转中火加热 15 分钟
开盖用手感受花卷的表面温度，如果不够热，就继续盖上盖子加热，否则就可以关火出锅。
碟子取出放凉至 50 度即可食用
steps_en: Take out 5 flower rolls from the packaging bag
Lay the flower rolls flat on the plate, trying not to overlap
Pour 400ml of water into the pot, place the steaming rack inside, place the plate holding the flower rolls on the steaming rack, and cover the pot.
Turn up the heat and heat until the water boils.
Turn to medium heat and cook for 15 minutes
Open the lid and feel the surface temperature of the Hanamaki with your hands. If it is not hot enough, continue to cover it and heat it. Otherwise, you can turn off the heat and remove from the pot.
Take out the plate and let it cool to 50 degrees before eating

intro_zh:
这是一道极简快手早餐，烤至微脆的吐司夹入甜香果酱，外脆内软，方便随身携带，属于典型的便捷西式简餐。主要提供碳水化合物和糖分，能快速补充晨间能量。操作几乎零门槛，非常适合不擅烹饪的忙碌新手。从准备到完成只需大约 2 分钟，无需开火，也几乎不用清洗厨具。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：223 大卡
intro_en:
This is a minimalist and quick breakfast. Slightly toasted toast is sandwiched with sweet and fragrant jam. It is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. It is easy to carry around. It is a typical convenient Western-style simple meal. Mainly provides carbohydrates and sugar, which can quickly replenish morning energy. The operation is almost zero-threshold, which is very suitable for busy novices who are not good at cooking. It only takes about 2 minutes from prep to done, no fire required, and almost no cooking utensils to clean.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 223 kcal
ingredients_zh: 果酱足够涂满一面吐司的量
ingredients_en: Enough jam to cover one side of toast
steps_zh: 将吐司放入面包机
设置好档位,时间到了会自动弹出
两分钟后吐司加热完成弹出
先取出一片吐司,涂满果酱再盖上另一片吐司即可
用餐巾纸包一下可以边走边吃也可以吃完再出门
steps_en: Put toast into bread machine
Set the gear and it will pop up automatically when the time is up.
After two minutes, the toast will pop up after heating.
First take out a piece of toast, spread it with jam and then cover it with another piece of toast.
Wrap it in a napkin and you can eat it while walking or you can finish it before going out.

intro_zh:
微波炉版的快手蛋糕，口感松软香甜，是一道零基础也能轻松上手的家庭甜点。以鸡蛋、面粉为基础，搭配黄油提供能量和浓郁香气，糖分快速补充体力，加入坚果或水果还能增加膳食纤维和维生素。仅需准备少数材料，借助微波炉高火一分钟即可完成，从备料到品尝最快仅需 2 分钟，新手约 20 分钟即可搞定。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：308 大卡
intro_en:
The microwave version of quick cake has a soft and sweet texture. It is an easy family dessert that can be made with no basic knowledge. It is based on eggs and flour, and is paired with butter to provide energy and rich aroma. The sugar quickly replenishes physical strength. Adding nuts or fruits can also increase dietary fiber and vitamins. You only need to prepare a few ingredients, and it can be completed in one minute with the help of a microwave oven on high heat. From preparation to tasting, it only takes 2 minutes at the fastest, and a novice can cook it in about 20 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 308 kcal
ingredients_en: Baking powder (it tastes like cake without adding it)
steps_zh: 加入以下食材，注意不要超过容器的 3/4
夸赞一下自己🥰
微波炉（高火）加热 **1分钟** （至蓬松蛋糕形态）
取出杯子（烫手啊啊啊啊↑）并拍朋友圈就可以吃了
steps_en: Add the following ingredients, making sure not to fill more than 3/4 of the container
Praise yourself🥰
Microwave (high heat) for **1 minute** (until fluffy cake shape)
Take out the cup (it’s hot to the touch↑) and take a photo of it on your WeChat Moments and you’re ready to eat.

intro_zh:
煎饺是一道底部金黄酥脆、内馅鲜嫩多汁的家常面点，常见于北方餐桌。搭配速冻水饺制作，富含碳水化合物和蛋白质，简单快手。预估难度二星，对新手非常友好，总共约需 15 分钟就能端上桌。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：769 大卡
intro_en:
Pan-fried dumplings are a home-cooked pastry with golden and crispy bottoms and juicy fillings. They are commonly found on northern dining tables. Made with quick-frozen dumplings, it is rich in carbohydrates and protein and is quick and easy. Estimated difficulty level is two stars, it is very beginner-friendly, and it takes about 15 minutes to serve.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 769 kcal
ingredients_zh: 芝麻、葱花（切段）或其他配料
饺子一包 （根据个人食量选择， 约 10 - 15 个）
ingredients_en: Sesame seeds, chopped green onions (cut into sections) or other ingredients
One pack of dumplings (choose according to personal appetite, about 10-15 pieces)
steps_zh: 取出平底锅（不沾平底锅最佳）
加入 10ml - 15 ml 食用油
开火，放入饺子（尽量平均铺开，不宜堆叠）
立刻加入清水，水线没过饺子平均高度的 1/2
盖上锅盖（此时炉灶应该处于大火）
等待 8 - 10 分钟
当锅中水分仅剩 2mm 时， 转中火开始煎制
当水分全部蒸发后，摇晃平底锅使饺子受热均匀
放入黑芝麻和葱花再焖 10s
1 - 2 分钟夹出一个饺子观察底部，若出现金黄色脆皮立即取出
steps_en: Remove the pan (non-stick pan is best)
Add 10ml - 15ml cooking oil
Turn on the heat and put in the dumplings (spread them evenly as much as possible and avoid stacking)
Immediately add water until the water line covers 1/2 of the average height of the dumplings.
Cover the pot (the stove should be on high heat at this point)
Wait 8-10 minutes
When there is only 2mm of water left in the pot, turn to medium heat and start frying
When all the water has evaporated, shake the pan to heat the dumplings evenly
Add black sesame seeds and chopped green onions and simmer for 10 seconds
After 1-2 minutes, take out a dumpling and observe the bottom. If a golden crispy skin appears, take it out immediately.

intro_zh:
一道甜辣浓郁的韩式溏心蛋小菜，酱汁挂满蛋白，入口嫩滑，回味微辛。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白与卵磷脂，营养饱腹。做法极为简单，新手也能轻松上手，从煮蛋到冷藏入味大约需要一个半小时。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：669 大卡
intro_en:
A sweet, spicy and rich Korean soft-boiled egg dish, the sauce is covered with egg whites, tender and smooth in the mouth, with a slightly spicy aftertaste. Eggs provide high-quality protein and lecithin, which are nutritious and satiating. The recipe is extremely simple and can be easily mastered by novices. It takes about an hour and a half from boiling the eggs to refrigerating them.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 669 kcal
ingredients_en: Korean soy sauce (or light soy sauce)
Chili pepper (millet spicy or green and red pepper)
Soy sauce (or light soy sauce) 4 tablespoons
steps_zh: 烧一锅开水，水沸腾后放入鸡蛋，**煮 7 分钟**（得到完美的溏心蛋状态）。
煮鸡蛋的期间调制酱汁：将 4 汤匙酱油、4 汤匙清水、2 汤匙味淋、2 汤匙白糖倒入小锅中。
加热酱汁至沸腾，煮开以挥发掉味淋中的酒精味，随后关火放凉备用。
将切好的辣椒圈加入放凉的酱汁中。
将煮好的鸡蛋捞出，放入冰水中冷却后剥去蛋壳。
将剥好的鸡蛋放入调好的酱汁中，表面淋上 5ml 芝麻油并撒上葱花。
放入冰箱**冷藏等待 1 - 2 小时**，让鸡蛋充分入味。
steps_en: Boil a pot of water. When the water boils, add the eggs and **boil for 7 minutes** (to get the perfect soft-boiled egg state).
While the eggs are cooking, prepare the sauce: Pour 4 tablespoons soy sauce, 4 tablespoons water, 2 tablespoons mirin, and 2 tablespoons sugar into a small pot.
Heat the sauce to a boil, boil to evaporate the alcohol in the mirin, then turn off the heat and set aside.
Add the sliced pepper rings to the cooled sauce.
Remove the hard-boiled eggs, cool them in ice water and peel off the shells.
Put the peeled eggs into the prepared sauce, drizzle 5ml sesame oil on the surface and sprinkle with chopped green onion.
Place in the refrigerator**refrigerate for 1 - 2 hours** to allow the eggs to fully absorb the flavor.

intro_zh:
这道西式早餐三明治以水浸金枪鱼拌入蛋黄酱和俄式酸黄瓜汁，咸鲜微酸，口感绵密，配上烤脆的吐司格外饱腹。富含优质蛋白和 Omega-3 等营养，能快速补充能量。制作非常简单，只需混合酱料、用轻食机加热，新手也能在 5 分钟里轻松搞定。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：569 大卡
intro_en:
This Western-style breakfast sandwich is made with water-soaked tuna mixed with mayonnaise and Russian pickle juice. It is salty, slightly sour, and has a dense texture. It is particularly filling when paired with crispy toast. Rich in nutrients such as high-quality protein and Omega-3, it can quickly replenish energy. It's very simple to make, just mix the sauce and heat it in a light food maker, and even a novice can make it in 5 minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 569 kcal
ingredients_zh: 水浸金枪鱼罐头（不建议用油浸，会很腻）
俄式酸黄瓜汁 10-15mL（可根据个人口味调整）
ingredients_en: Canned tuna soaked in water (it is not recommended to soak it in oil as it will be very greasy)
Russian pickled cucumber juice 10-15mL (can be adjusted according to personal taste)
steps_zh: 将金枪鱼、蛋黄酱、俄式酸黄瓜汁倒入碗中，用勺子搅拌，保证将金枪鱼块搅碎，酱整体呈糊状，并备用
将 1 片吐司放在轻食机上
将做好的金枪鱼酱涂抹到吐司上，建议 10-15ml
将另一片方形吐司片覆盖在上面，并按压轻食机，开机
待轻食机自动停止加热，即可装盘使用
steps_en: Pour the tuna, mayonnaise, and Russian pickle juice into a bowl, stir with a spoon to ensure that the tuna pieces are broken up, and the sauce becomes mushy as a whole, and set aside
Place 1 piece of toast on the food maker
Spread the prepared tuna sauce on the toast, 10-15ml is recommended
Cover it with another square piece of toast and press the machine to turn it on
After the light food machine automatically stops heating, you can put it on a plate and use it.

intro_zh:
太阳蛋是一道用微波炉快速制成的家常早餐。口感嫩滑，蛋清凝固、蛋黄微溏，属于典型的快手菜。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白和多种维生素，易于消化吸收。做法非常简单，对新手友好。使用可控火候微波炉只需 3 分钟就能完成，不可控火候的也仅需几分钟反复加热。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：113 大卡
intro_en:
Sun-cooked eggs are a quick home-cooked breakfast dish that can be made in the microwave. The taste is tender and smooth, the egg white is solidified and the yolk is slightly runny. It is a typical quick dish. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and multiple vitamins and are easy to digest and absorb. The method is very simple and friendly to novices. It only takes 3 minutes to use a microwave oven with controllable heat, and it only takes a few minutes to reheat it if the heat is not controllable.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 113 kcal
ingredients_zh: 分可控火候微波炉或不可控火候微波炉（定义和分辨方式请见附加内容）
盐的用量为 1 g 每个鸡蛋。
油的用量为 5 mL 每个鸡蛋。
ingredients_en: Divided into controllable heat microwave ovens or non-controllable heat microwave ovens (see additional content for definitions and distinctions)
The amount of salt is 1 g per egg.
The amount of oil used is 5 mL per egg.
steps_zh: 准备一个小碗，倒入在上一步计算好的油，撒盐，搅拌均匀。倾斜碗使油沾在碗表面。
取出一个鸡蛋，打入小碗。
蛋黄表面戳孔。牙签戳 5 个或筷子戳 1 个。
放入微波炉，中火 3 分钟。
准备一个小碗，倒入在上一步计算好的油，撒盐，搅拌均匀。倾斜碗使油沾在碗表面。
取出一个鸡蛋，打入小碗。
蛋黄表面戳孔。牙签戳 5 个或筷子戳 1 个。
放入微波炉，1 分钟。
while（太阳蛋 否 大面积成固体状） 用微波炉打(30s);
steps_en: Prepare a small bowl, pour in the oil calculated in the previous step, sprinkle with salt, and stir evenly. Tilt the bowl so that the oil coats the surface of the bowl.
Take an egg and break it into a small bowl.
Poke holes in the surface of the egg yolk. Poke 5 with toothpicks or 1 with chopsticks.
Place in microwave on medium heat for 3 minutes.
Prepare a small bowl, pour in the oil calculated in the previous step, sprinkle with salt, and stir evenly. Tilt the bowl so that the oil coats the surface of the bowl.
Take an egg and break it into a small bowl.
Poke holes in the surface of the egg yolk. Poke 5 with toothpicks or 1 with chopsticks.
Place in microwave for 1 minute.
while (the sun egg will become solid over a large area) Beat it in the microwave (30s);

intro_zh:
这是一道简单快手的西式简餐，吐司夹着绵密的鸡蛋酱和咸香培根，口感软嫩又带着焦香。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白，搭配培根和黄油能快速补充能量。操作非常友好，厨房新手也能轻松驾驭，全程只需 大约 10 分钟即可完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：560 大卡
intro_en:
This is a simple and quick Western-style meal. The toast is filled with dense egg sauce and salty bacon. It tastes soft and tender with a burnt aroma. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and can be paired with bacon and butter for a quick energy boost. The operation is very user-friendly, even for kitchen novices, and the whole process only takes about 10 minutes to complete.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 560 kcal
steps_zh: 吐司切去四边，备用
鸡蛋煮熟，捣碎
混合鸡蛋、蛋黄酱、盐、黑胡椒
锅中加入黄油，煎熟培根
组装吐司，在两片吐司间加入制作好的鸡蛋酱及培根
四边形吐司切成三角形装盘
steps_en: Cut off all four sides of the toast and set aside
Eggs boiled and mashed
Mix eggs, mayonnaise, salt, and black pepper
Add butter to pan and fry bacon
Assemble the toast and add the prepared egg sauce and bacon between the two pieces of toast
Cut the square toast into triangles and serve on a plate

intro_zh:
这是一道松软鲜嫩的美式家常蛋料理，加入牛奶后蛋花细密、口感绵润，富含优质蛋白和钙质。做法简单，对新手友好，从准备到出锅大约只需 20 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：258 大卡
intro_en:
This is a soft and tender American-style home-style egg dish. After adding milk, the egg flakes are fine and moist, and it is rich in high-quality protein and calcium. It’s simple, novice-friendly, and only takes about 20 minutes from prep to dish.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 258 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡蛋打入大碗中，加盐搅打至起泡，静置 15 分钟
黄油切小块入锅，倒入蛋液，开小火不断搅拌
黄油一融化，就快速翻动蛋液，将其打碎成细密状，在蛋液大体凝固前关火
加入牛奶搅拌 15 秒，至炒蛋湿润绵密，装盘
steps_en: Crack the eggs into a large bowl, add salt and beat until foamy, let sit for 15 minutes
Cut the butter into small pieces and put it into the pot, pour in the egg liquid, turn on low heat and stir constantly
As soon as the butter melts, quickly stir the egg mixture to break it into fine pieces. Turn off the heat before the egg liquid is roughly solidified.
Add milk and stir for 15 seconds until the scrambled eggs are moist and dense, then serve on a plate

intro_zh:
一道简单快手的小吃，外皮微酥，内里软糯，裹着蛋香与甜味，是南方家常风味。糍粑提供丰富碳水，鸡蛋补充蛋白质，热量较高但很顶饱。制作过程极其简单，新手也能轻松驾驭，全程仅需大约十 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：379 大卡
intro_en:
A simple and quick snack, slightly crispy on the outside, soft and glutinous on the inside, wrapped in the aroma of egg and sweetness, it is a southern home-cooked snack. Glutinous rice cake provides rich carbohydrates, and eggs supplement protein. It is high in calories but very filling. The production process is extremely simple and can be easily mastered by novices. The whole process only takes about ten minutes.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 379 kcal
ingredients_en: Two pieces of glutinous rice cake
steps_zh: 把糍粑切成长方形小块，便于后面煎
碗里打入一个鸡蛋并把鸡蛋搅碎，加入 2g 食用盐
将切好的小糍粑依此放入搅碎的鸡蛋里面，涂抹完糍粑双面为止
锅里倒入植物油 10ml ，把涂抹好的糍粑小块放进去小火慢慢煎软。
将剩下的鸡蛋液慢慢倒在糍粑表面
用筷子或者勺子为糍粑翻面，来回煎至金黄色后开吃
steps_en: Cut the glutinous rice cake into rectangular pieces for easy frying later
Crack an egg into a bowl and beat it into pieces. Add 2g of edible salt.
Put the cut small glutinous rice cakes into the beaten eggs until both sides of the glutinous rice cakes are coated.
Pour 10ml of vegetable oil into the pot, put the smeared glutinous rice cake pieces into it and fry over low heat until soft.
Slowly pour the remaining egg liquid onto the surface of the glutinous rice cake
Use chopsticks or a spoon to flip the glutinous rice cake over and fry until golden brown before eating.

intro_zh:
这是一道以滑嫩如布丁的口感和清雅鲜美的风味见长的家常菜，南北通吃，北方常亲切地称其为“鸡蛋糕儿”。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白和卵磷脂，是日常补充营养的便捷之选。做法只需掌握蛋水比例和小火慢蒸的诀窍，对新手非常友好，从准备到出锅通常 大约 15 分钟就能完成。
预估烹饪难度：★★
预估卡路里：143 大卡
intro_en:
This is a home-cooked dish known for its smooth texture like pudding and elegant and delicious flavor. It is eaten in both north and south. The north often calls it "chicken cake" affectionately. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein and lecithin, making them a convenient choice for daily nutritional supplements. The method only requires mastering the egg-water ratio and slow steaming over low heat. It is very friendly to novices and can usually be completed in about 15 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★
Estimated calories: 143 kcal
steps_zh: 鸡蛋打入碗中，打散
取其他容器，倒入 1.5 倍（半个蛋壳为 0.5 倍水）于蛋液的温水（温度 20~30），将盐倒入水中化开
将盐水倒入鸡蛋液中，顺时针或逆时针单方向搅拌均匀，气泡之类的可以用舀出丢弃，过筛则口感更加。
使用锡纸包裹盛蛋液的碗（或用盘子盖住），置入提前带盖并加入大约 3cm 深度水的锅中
中火烧至水开，转最小的火继续蒸 4 分钟
steps_en: Crack the eggs into a bowl and beat them
Take another container, pour 1.5 times (half an eggshell is 0.5 times water) into the warm water (temperature 20~30°C) of the egg liquid, pour the salt into the water and let it boil
Pour the salt water into the egg liquid and stir evenly in one direction clockwise or counterclockwise. You can scoop out any bubbles and discard them, and sieve them for a better taste.
Wrap the bowl containing the egg liquid with tin foil (or cover it with a plate), place it in a pot with a lid and add about 3cm of water.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, then turn to minimum heat and continue steaming for 4 minutes

intro_zh:
空气炸锅面包片是一道极简快手的主食，外脆内软，麦香纯粹，特别适合减脂期食用。它富含膳食纤维和植物蛋白，能提供较长时间的饱腹感。做法毫无门槛，只需将面包片放入空气炸锅即可，对新手极其友好，从准备到完成仅需大约五分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★
预估卡路里：254 大卡
intro_en:
Air fryer bread slices are a simple and quick staple food. They are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. They have a pure wheat flavor and are especially suitable for eating during the fat loss period. It is rich in dietary fiber and plant protein, which can provide a feeling of satiety for a longer period of time. There are no barriers to making it, just put the bread slices into the air fryer. It is extremely friendly to novices and only takes about five minutes from preparation to completion.
Estimated cooking difficulty:★
Estimated calories: 254 kcal
steps_zh: 取出两片面包片（建议使用粗粮面包片）
将面包片**垂直**放入空气炸锅
200°C 烘烤 5 分钟
取出即可使用
steps_en: Take out two slices of bread (coarse bread slices are recommended)
Place the bread slices **vertically** into the air fryer
Bake at 200°C for 5 minutes
Take it out and use it

intro_zh:
这道简易版苏格兰蛋外层酥脆，内里糖心软嫩，融合了芝士的奶香和培根的烟熏风味，是一道源自英式做法的创意小吃。鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质，芝士补充钙质，搭配手抓饼皮能满足一餐的能量需求。制作过程不复杂，新手也能轻松上手，从准备到出锅大约只需 20 至 30 分钟。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：599 大卡
intro_en:
This simple version of Scotch egg is crispy on the outside and soft and tender on the inside. It combines the milky aroma of cheese and the smoky flavor of bacon. It is a creative snack originated from British cooking. Eggs provide high-quality protein, cheese supplements calcium, and the hand-made crust can meet the energy needs of a meal. The preparation process is not complicated and can be easily picked up by novices. It only takes about 20 to 30 minutes from preparation to serving.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 599 kcal
ingredients_zh: 手抓饼 1 份-2 份（看鸡蛋大小）
ingredients_en: 1-2 portions of hand cakes (depending on the size of the eggs)
steps_zh: 用冷水下锅水开 3 分钟后捞出
鸡蛋捞出，放入冰水中剥壳更快速也更完整
用芝士片包裹鸡蛋
培根片包裹鸡蛋
手抓饼两端切除以矩形包裹鸡蛋
油温 6 成下锅（油面波动，有青烟，筷子插入油中周围泛起气泡即是 6 成温度） 炸制金黄即可
空气炸锅 160 度 15 分钟
切开即可食用
steps_en: Boil the pot with cold water for 3 minutes and take it out.
Remove the eggs and put them in ice water to peel them faster and more completely.
Wrap eggs with cheese slices
Bacon wrapped eggs
Cut off both ends of the hand cake and wrap the eggs in a rectangular shape

Put the oil into the pot at 60% temperature (the oil surface fluctuates, there is green smoke, and when a chopstick is inserted into the oil and bubbles appear around it, it is 60% temperature) and fry until golden brown.
Air fryer 160 degrees 15 minutes
Cut and ready to eat

intro_zh:
温泉蛋源自日本，蛋白呈半流动凝乳状，蛋黄却温润凝固，口感滑嫩细腻，与溏心蛋恰好相反。鸡蛋富含优质蛋白、卵磷脂和多种维生素，营养十分全面。制作时需要借助温度计将水温控制在 70℃，虽然对温度稍有要求，但步骤简单，耐心等待约半小时便能完成。佐以昆布酱油和葱花，鲜香清爽，是一道轻松上手的小食。
预估烹饪难度：★★★
预估卡路里：72 大卡
intro_en:
Hot spring eggs originate from Japan. The egg white is in the shape of semi-fluid curd, but the yolk is warm and solid. The taste is smooth and delicate, which is exactly the opposite of the soft-boiled egg. Eggs are rich in high-quality protein, lecithin and multiple vitamins, and are very nutritious. When making, you need to use a thermometer to control the water temperature at 70°C. Although there are slight temperature requirements, the steps are simple and can be completed after waiting patiently for about half an hour. Served with kombu soy sauce and chopped green onion, it is fragrant and refreshing, making it an easy snack.
Estimated cooking difficulty: ★★★
Estimated calories: 72 kcal
ingredients_zh: 厨房用温度计（尽量选用带有夹子的温度计）
杯子（无特定要求，只要是杯子就行）
昆布酱油（一种日式的少盐酱油，用于为温泉蛋调味）
鸡蛋的用量为 1 个，按照您的食量和锅的大小计算。
ingredients_en: Kitchen thermometer (try to use one with a clip)
Cup (no specific requirements, as long as it is a cup)
Kombu soy sauce (a Japanese low-salt soy sauce used to flavor hot spring eggs)
The amount of egg required is 1, based on your serving size and the size of the pot.
steps_zh: 在锅中盛装一定量自来水，确保水面没过约鸡蛋 3cm，水中插入温度计
开火或打开电磁炉，逐渐调整电磁炉功率或火苗大小，使得水温保持在 **70 摄氏度**
将鸡蛋放入锅中。鸡蛋不可互相堆叠，应皆在底部，并留有空间可以晃动
保持当前温度 **25 分钟**
准备一杯冰水
捞出鸡蛋，并立刻放入冰水中，**等待 3 分钟**
将鸡蛋打入小碗，完成制作
steps_en: Fill a pot with a certain amount of tap water, make sure that the water surface is about 3cm below the egg, and insert a thermometer into the water.
Turn on the induction cooker or turn on the induction cooker, and gradually adjust the induction cooker power or flame size to keep the water temperature at **70 degrees Celsius**
Place the eggs into the pot. Eggs should not be stacked on top of each other, they should all be at the bottom with room to shake
Maintain current temperature **25 minutes**
Prepare a glass of ice water
Remove the eggs and immediately put them into ice water, **wait 3 minutes**
Crack the eggs into a small bowl to complete the preparation
